src: Italy have defeated Portugal 31-5 in Pool C of the 2007 Rugby World Cup at Parc des Princes, Paris, France.
ref: 意大利在法国巴黎王子公园体育场举办的2007年橄榄球世界杯C组以31-5击败葡萄牙。

src: Andrea Masi opened the scoring in the fourth minute with a try for Italy.
ref: 安德里亚·马西在第四分钟成功达阵，意大利率先得分。

src: Despite controlling the game for much of the first half, Italy could not score any other tries before the interval but David Bortolussi kicked three penalties to extend their lead.
ref: 尽管上半场大部分时间意大利都控制着比赛，但在中场休息前，意大利未能再次达阵得分，不过大卫·博尔托鲁斯通过三个罚踢进球，扩大了领先优势。

src: Portugal never gave up and David Penalva scored a try in the 33rd minute, providing their only points of the match.
ref: 葡萄牙从未放弃，大卫·佩纳尔瓦在第33分钟成功达阵，这是他们本场比赛唯一的得分。

src: Italy led 16-5 at half time but were matched by Portugal for much of the second half.
ref: 上半场意大利以16-5领先，但下半场大部分时间葡萄牙的表现不相上下。

src: However Bortolussi scored his fourth penalty of the match, followed by tries from Mauro Bergamasco and a second from Andrea Masi to wrap up the win for Italy.
ref: 然而，博尔托鲁斯踢进了他本场比赛的第四个罚球，随后是莫罗·贝加马斯科的数次达阵和安德烈·马西的第二次达阵，为意大利赢得了比赛。

src: Currently third in Pool C with eight points, Italy face a tough match against second placed Scotland on 29 September.
ref: 意大利目前以8分排名C组第三，9月29日将面临一场艰难的比赛，对手是排名第二的苏格兰。

src: New Zealand lead the group with ten points, ahead of Scotland on points difference.
ref: 新西兰以10分位居小组首位，在积分上领先苏格兰。

src: Portugal are bottom of the group with no points, behind Romania with one.
ref: 葡萄牙以零分垫底，落后罗马尼亚一分。

src: Criticism was targeted to Government efforts in the affair of the Jian Seng in the Australian Senate March 28 and 29 over the handling of the ghost ship, the tanker Jian Seng, which was found abandoned and unlit in the Gulf of Carpentaria.
ref: 3月28日和29日，澳大利亚参议院就“建胜”号幽灵船的处理问题对政府在“建胜”号事件中的努力提出了批评，这艘名为“建胜”的油轮，在卡本塔利亚湾被发现时被遗弃且没有亮灯。

src: Senator Joe Ludwig (Labor, Queensland) asked of the Minister for Justice and Customs Senator Chris Ellison in Question Time whether he stood by his claim that he made yesterday that the discovery of the Jian Seng demonstrated that the Australian Government had in place "aerial and maritime surveillance to intercept a vessel in these circumstances, and that was done", and asked why it took the Government two weeks to intercept the vessel after it entered Australian waters.
ref: 参议员乔·路德维希（工党，昆士兰）在接受《时代》周刊采访时，问司法和海关部长克里斯·埃里森，他是否坚持自己昨天的说法，即“建胜号”的发现，表明澳大利亚政府“在这种情况下进行了空中和海上监视，拦截了一艘船只，而且确实做到了”。并询问为什么政府在这艘船进入澳大利亚水域后花了两周时间拦截它。

src: Senator Ellison responded that at the vessel's first sighting on March 8 "it was not doing anything illegal", and criticised the Opposition's claim that the ship was drifting for seventeen days, saying that "it was not stated as having drifted for the whole of the 17 days".
ref: 埃里森参议员回应称，该船于3月8日首次发现“它没有采取任何违法行为”，并批评反对派声称这艘船漂流了17天，并说“没有说明这艘船漂流了整整17天”。

src: Ludwig went on to note that it was not Customs that spotted the ship but a "passing Australian barge", but Ellison had defended this, stating that Ludwig "thinks that commercial vessels have absolutely no role in looking out for Australia" and that Ellison will "rely on reports to our hotline and go out and inspect vessels".
ref: 路德维希接着指出，发现这艘船的不是海关，而是一艘“经过澳大利亚的驳船”，但埃利森对此进行了辩护，他说，路德维希“认为商业船只在为澳大利亚着想方面完全没有什么作用”，埃利森将“依靠向我们的热线报告，出海检查船只”。

src: Later, Senator Kerry O'Brien (Labor, Tasmania) criticised the Government's implementation of coastal defense, and highlighted the dangers of ignoring the ship for seventeen days, saying that "it posed and possibly still poses unknown environmental and quarantine risks" and that the Jian Seng "has been refused admission to Weipa harbour...It could have been carrying literally anything."
ref: 后来，参议员克里·奥布莱恩（工党，塔斯马尼亚州）批评政府实施沿海防御的做法，并强调忽视这艘船17天的危险，说“它构成了而且可能仍然构成未知的环境和检疫风险”，并说建胜号“已被拒绝进入威帕港……它可能携带了任何东西。”

src: Senator David Johnston (Liberal, Western Australia) went on to debate that there are no shipping lanes in the area where the Jian Seng was found, and that devoting resources to a harmless ship would leave gaps in the coastal defenses elsewhere.
ref: 参议员约翰斯顿（自由党，西澳大利亚）继续辩论说，在“建胜”号被发现的海域没有航道，把资源投入一艘无害的船只，会给其他地方的海防留下缺口。

src: Pakistani officials have said that a suspected suicide bomber exploded a car near the provincial legislative assembly that was in session in Peshawar, killing at least 49 people and wounding more than 100 others.
ref: 巴基斯坦官员表示，一名疑似自杀式炸弹袭击者在白沙瓦会议期间在省立法议会附近引爆了一辆汽车，造成至少49人死亡，100多人受伤。

src: The blast scattered debris and destroyed vehicles in Peshawar's crowded Khyber Bazaar area, located in the center of the city.
ref: 爆炸发生在白沙瓦市中心熙熙攘攘的开伯尔巴扎地区，造成碎片散落，车辆被毁。

src: "A suicide bomber blew himself up as the car was next to a passenger bus passing through the market," said senior police officer Shafqat Malik.
ref: 高级警官沙夫卡特马利克说：“一名自杀式炸弹袭击者在一辆经过市场的客车旁引爆了自己。”

src: He said that the bomb consisted of fifty kilograms of explosives, and contained shells and bearings to maximise damage.
ref: 他说，为了达到最大杀伤力，这枚炸弹由50公斤炸药组成，装有炮弹和轴承。

src: One eyewitness told the Voice of America news agency he was sitting in his shop when a big explosion shook the area Friday morning, sending dust in the air and causing objects to fall from the walls.
ref: 一名目击者对美国之音说，星期五早上，他坐在自己的店里，突然发生了一起大爆炸，震动了这个地区，空气中充满了灰尘，一些东西从墙上掉了下来。

src: A teacher working in a nearby school also said that when he went outside after the blast, he saw bodies lying all around the area.
ref: 附近一所学校的一名教师也说，爆炸发生后他走到外面，看到到处都是尸体。

src: Pakistani Interior Minister Rehman Malik indicated that such acts of terrorism might force the government to launch a much anticipated anti-Taliban operation in South Waziristan.
ref: 巴基斯坦内政部长雷曼马利克表示，这种恐怖主义行为可能会迫使政府在南瓦济里斯坦发起备受期待的反塔利班行动。

src: He said that Friday's blast, along with a number of other deadly attacks in Peshawar, shows the government has in his words "no option" but to go on the offensive.
ref: 他说星期五的爆炸以及白沙瓦发生的其他一些致命袭击事件表明，政府在他的言论中“没有选择”，只能继续进攻。

src: While the military has not publicly set a date for any major operation in the area, UN officials say some 80,000 civilians have fled the region in anticipation of a new offensive.
ref: 尽管军方尚未公开确定在该地区采取任何重大行动的日期，但联合国官员表示，约8万名平民已逃离该地区，因为他们预计将发动新一轮进攻。

src: Seismologists at USGS have indicated that this earthquake is an aftershock of the 9.0 earthquake which had occurred just a few hours earlier, 305 km (190 miles) distant, in the Indian Ocean near Sumatra, Indonesia.
ref: 美国地质勘探局的地震学家指出，这次地震是几小时前发生在305公里（190英里）远的印尼苏门答腊岛附近的印度洋上的9.0级地震的余震。

src: The Bangladesh Meteorological Department issued a statement that the quake had struck Chittagong, a southern port that is the second largest city in Bangladesh.
ref: 孟加拉国气象部门发表声明说，这次地震袭击了孟加拉国第二大城市——南部港口吉大港。

src: London, England — With the 2012 Summer Paralympics starting in less than a week, parts of Papua New Guinea's Paralympic delegation arrived in London earlier today in order to support the pair of athletes the country qualified for the Games, athletics competitor Francis Kompaon and powerlifter Timothy Harabe.
ref: 英国伦敦-随着2012年夏季残奥会在不到一周的时间内开幕，巴布亚新几内亚残奥代表团的部分成员今天早些时候抵达伦敦，以支持该国有资格参加奥运会的两名运动员——田径运动员弗朗西斯·孔帕恩和举重运动员蒂莫西·哈拉比。

src: The Games are Kompaon's second, having competed at the 2008 Summer Paralympics where he earned his country's first Paralympic medal when he finished second in the 100 metre event.
ref: 这是孔帕翁的第二届奥运会，他参加了2008年夏季残奥会，并在100米比赛中获得第二名，为该国赢得了第一枚残奥会奖牌。

src: Harabe, only the tenth person ever to represent his country at the Games, is making his Paralympic Games debut.
ref: 哈拉比是第10位代表国家参加奥运会的运动员，他将首次参加残奥会。

src: The British High Commissioner to Papua New Guinea, Jackie Barson, MBE, wished both athletes well, saying in a written statement, "It is a fantastic achievement for the PNG to be represented by two world class Paralympic athletes".
ref: 英国驻巴布亚新几内亚高级专员杰姬·巴森在一份书面声明中祝愿这两名运动员身体健康，他说：“巴布亚新几内亚能有两名世界级残疾人运动员代表，这是一项了不起的成就。”

src: PNG Paralympic Committee President Bernard Chan also congratulated his country's athletes, saying, "They will be great ambassadors for PNG and I hope both Francis and Timothy will inspire other athletes to train hard and hope to represent PNG at this Paralympic level during their participation."
ref: 巴布亚新几内亚残奥委员会主席伯纳德陈也祝贺该国运动员，他说：“他们将是巴布亚新几内亚伟大的大使，我希望弗朗西斯和蒂莫西都能激励其他运动员努力训练，并希望在参加残奥期间代表巴布亚新几内亚参加残奥会。”

src: The 2012 Games will be the fourth time the country has participated, with the three other appearances happening at the 1984 Summer Paralympics, 2000 Summer Paralympics and 2008 Summer Paralympics.
ref: 2012年奥运会将是该国第四次参加，另外三次分别是1984年夏季残奥会、2000年夏季残奥会和2008年夏季残奥会。

src: Other members of the Papua New Guinea 2012 Paralympic delegation include PNG Paralympic Committee President Bernard Chan; Chef de Mission Dr. Kefu Ma; team manager Rosemary Mawe; Davina Chan, the president's wife; coach William McKenny; and official Jeffrey Robby.
ref: 巴布亚新几内亚2012年残奥会代表团的其他成员包括巴布亚新几内亚残奥委员会主席伯纳德・陈、主教练马克福博士、团队经理罗斯玛丽・莫、总统夫人戴维娜・陈、教练威廉・麦肯尼和官方杰弗里・罗比。

src: In southern Afghanistan in the province of Ghazni, the 29-year old Dutch pilot Michael Donkervoort died when his F-16 fighter jet crashed.
ref: 在加兹尼省的阿富汗南部，29岁的荷兰飞行员迈克尔·唐克沃特在他的F-16战斗机坠毁时死亡。

src: "The plane was flying at a great height when the accident occurred, which means it can be ruled out that the craft was shot down. "
ref: “事故发生时，飞机正在高空飞行，这意味着可以排除飞机被击落的可能性。”

src: "We therefore assume it was an accident," said the Dutch Defense Ministry.
ref: “我们因此认为这是一次意外，”荷兰国防部说。

src: There has been an investigation launched into the cause of the crash, which was found by a team of rescuers from the United States.
ref: 一组来自美国的救援人员发现了坠机，目前正在对事故原因进行调查。

src: The jet was flying with another F-16 when it crashed.
ref: 飞机坠毁时正与另一架F-16战斗机一起飞行。

src: The United States has said that "regional extremists" may be targeting Air Uganda airplane flights between Southern Sudan and Uganda.
ref: 美国表示，“地区极端分子”可能把乌干达航空公司在南苏丹和乌干达之间的航班作为袭击目标。

src: A warning posted yesterday on the Web site of the US Embassy in Khartoum says there is a "potential threat" on the flights between Juba, Sudan and Kampala, Uganda.
ref: 美国驻喀土穆大使馆网站昨日发布警告称，苏丹朱巴与乌干达坎帕拉之间的航班存在“潜在威胁”。

src: The embassy did not name the potential attackers but said the threat is of "sufficient seriousness," and that air travelers should "maintain vigilance at all times."
ref: 大使馆没有透露潜在袭击者的名字，但表示威胁“足够严重”，航空旅行者应该“始终保持警惕”。

src: The US has increased its airport security following the failed attempted December 25 bombing of a Delta flight by a Nigerian man with explosives in his underpants.
ref: 12月25日，一名在内裤中携带爆炸物的尼日利亚男子试图袭击达美航班失败后，美国增加了机场安检。

src: Sudan is one of fourteen countries where passengers headed for the US will undergo additional searches at airport security.
ref: 14个国家的赴美乘客要在机场安检处接受额外检查，苏丹是其中之一。

src: Two scientists working at McGill University in Canada, reporting on their research and the research of other scientists, state in Scientific American that Vitamin D may have many uses in the human body besides building strong bones.
ref: 两位在加拿大麦吉尔大学工作的科学家报告了他们的研究和其他科学家的研究，他们在“科学美国人”杂志中指出，维生素D除了可以建立强壮的骨骼外，还可能在人体中有很多用途。

src: According to the scientists, Luz E. Tavera-Mendoza and John H. White, Vitamin D intake may also be beneficial in the prevention of cancer, multiple sclerosis, diabetes, and fighting tuberculosis, influenza and inflammatory bowel disease.
ref: 根据科学家卢斯·E·塔维拉-门多萨和约翰·H·怀特的说法，摄入维生素D也可能有益于预防癌症，多发性硬化症，糖尿病以及抗击肺结核，流行性感冒和炎症性肠病。

src: The researchers say that there is an emerging "widespread consensus" among experts that a large part of the population has levels of Vitamin D in their bodies that is well below optimal concentrations for health, particularly in temperate regions, due to decreased sunlight and or less time outdoors, and during or just after the winter months.
ref: 研究人员表示，专家们之间正在形成一种“广泛的共识”，即大部分人口体内的维生素D水平远远低于健康的最佳浓度，特别是在阳光减少或户外时间减少的温带地区，以及在冬季或刚过冬季的几个月。

src: One study indicated that as many as 92% of adolescent girls in Northern Europe may have deficient levels of Vitamin D and 37% have severely deficient levels.
ref: 一项研究表明，北欧多达92％的少女可能缺乏维生素D，37％的人严重缺乏。

src: The problem is far worse among African-Americans than Americans with lighter skin.
ref: 非裔美国人的问题比皮肤较浅的美国人要严重得多。

src: Almost half of African-American women may be seriously Vitamin D deficient, with presumably still another fraction deficient.
ref: 几乎一半的非裔美国女性可能严重缺乏维生素D，可能还有另一部分缺乏。

src: Furthermore, the authors say researchers at Harvard University and elsewhere believe the FDA minimum recommended daily allowance of Vitamin D is far too low.
ref: 此外，作者说，哈佛大学和其他地方的研究人员认为，FDA最低建议维生素D的每日允许量太低了。

src: The Recommended Dietary Allowance (RDA) ranges from 200 to 600 International Units (IU).
ref: 推荐膳食津贴（RDA）范围为200至600国际单位（IU）。

src: The first author takes 1000 IU during wintertime and the second author takes 5,000 IU in wintertime.
ref: 第一作者在冬季需要1000IU而第二作者在冬季需要5000IU。

src: They do caution, however, that there is a level at which Vitamin D becomes toxic.
ref: 不过，他们也警告说，维生素D在一定程度上是有毒的。

src: Similar research has also been recently performed by researchers at the Queensland University of Technology who found that many elderly were likely not getting sufficient Vitamin D due in part to insufficient exposure to the sun.
ref: 昆士兰科技大学的研究人员最近也进行了类似的研究，他们发现，许多老年人可能得不到足够的维生素D，部分原因是晒太阳不足。

src: Researchers at Japan's Kanazawa University announced the identification of a hormone produced by the liver, apparently a previously unknown cause of insulin resistance.
ref: 日本金泽大学的研究人员宣布，他们发现了一种由肝脏产生的激素，这显然是一种此前未知的胰岛素抵抗原因。

src: The discovery may offer new research targets in treating insulin resistance and type 2 diabetes.
ref: 该发现可能为治疗胰岛素抵抗和2型糖尿病提供新的研究目标。

src: Insulin resistance (IR) is a condition where the body's cells are unable to respond properly to insulin-based treatments.
ref: 胰岛素抵抗（IR）是身体细胞无法对基于胰岛素的治疗做出适当反应的病症。

src: The pancreas continues insulin production but fails to prevent increases in glucose levels; in other words, the body becomes unable to respond to the insulin properly.
ref: 胰腺继续产生胰岛素，但未能阻止血糖水平的升高，换句话说，身体无法对胰岛素做出适当的反应。

src: The researchers found the liver expresses higher levels of the gene encoding "selenoprotein P" (SEPP1) in people with type 2 diabetes – those with more insulin resistance.
ref: 研究人员发现，在胰岛素抵抗程度较高的2型糖尿病患者的肝脏中，编码“硒蛋白P”（SEPP1）的基因表达水平较高。

src: This new connection between SEPP1 and adipokine is to be an area for further research.
ref: SEPP1和脂肪因子之间的这种新联系将成为进一步研究的领域。

src: The discovery may help in understanding plaques associated with Alzheimer's disease.
ref: 这一发现可能有助于了解与阿尔茨海默病相关的斑块。

src: Researchers at Kyushu University in Fukuoka, Japan concluded in an earlier study that insulin resistance and the development of plaques found in Alzheimer's sufferers were likely linked.
ref: 日本福冈九州大学的研究人员在早期的一项研究中得出结论，胰岛素抵抗和阿尔茨海默氏症患者的斑块发展可能有关。

src: The World Health Organisation estimates 37 million people worldwide live with dementia and/or Alzheimer's.
ref: 据世界卫生组织估计，全世界有3700万人患有痴呆症和或阿尔茨海默病。

src: Former New Mexico governor Gary Johnson received the 2012 presidential nomination of the U.S. Libertarian Party at Saturday's Libertarian National Convention in Las Vegas, Nevada.
ref: 前新墨西哥州州长加里·约翰逊星期六在内华达拉斯维加斯举行的自由意志主义全国代表大会上获得2012年美国自由党总统候选人提名。

src: Judge James P. Gray of California was selected as his running mate.
ref: 加利福尼亚州的杰姆斯·P·格雷法官被选为他的竞选伙伴。

src: Johnson's association with the Libertarian Party stretches back to 1993, when he was a dues-paying-member for about a year.
ref: 约翰逊与自由党的关系可以追溯到1993年，当时他是一名缴纳会费的党员，任期约一年。

src: In 2000, the party recruited him to run as their presidential nominee, but he rejected the offer, saying, "I'm a Republican, and I'm not going to run for President."
ref: 2000年，该党招募他作为总统候选人参选，但他拒绝了这一提议，并说：“我是共和党人，我不会竞选总统。”

src: As a Republican, Johnson was elected and re-elected as governor of New Mexico in 1994 and 1998.
ref: 作为共和党人，约翰逊在1994年和1998年当选并再次当选为新墨西哥州州长。

src: During his governorship, he vetoed over 750 bills, more than all other then-governors combined, and left the state with a $1 billion budget surplus.
ref: 在他担任州长期间，他否决了750多项法案，比当时所有其他州长否决的法案加起来还多，并为该州留下了10亿美元的预算盈余。

src: Since leaving office in 2003 due to term limits, he has advocated for marijuana legalization, climbed Mount Everest, and has entered into presidential politics.
ref: 自2003年因任期限制而卸任以来，他一直倡导大麻合法化，攀登过珠穆朗玛峰，并参与了总统竞选。

src: During the 2008 Republican primaries, Johnson endorsed the candidacy of Congressman Ron Paul, the Libertarian Party's 1988 presidential nominee.
ref: 在2008年的共和党初选中，约翰逊支持了1988年自由党总统候选人、国会议员罗恩·保罗。

src: In 2012, he chose to mount his own presidential campaign, seeking the Republican Party nomination on a platform of non-interventionism in foreign affairs and extensive cuts to the federal budget.
ref: 2012年，他选择发起自己的总统竞选，以不干涉外交事务和大幅削减联邦预算为竞选纲领，寻求共和党提名。

src: Though he participated in two early Republican debates, Johnson was barred from most due to low poll numbers.
ref: 尽管约翰逊参加了共和党早期的两场辩论，但由于民调支持率较低，他被禁止参加大多数辩论。

src: As a result, in December, he decided to end his Republican campaign and return to the Libertarian Party.
ref: 结果，在12月，他决定结束他的共和党竞选并返回自由党。

src: After months of campaigning, Johnson edged activist R. Lee Wrights on the first ballot with 70 percent of the 595 convention delegates.
ref: 经过几个月的竞选活动，约翰逊在第一轮投票中以595名党代会代表的百分之70击败了活动人士R·李·莱特斯。

src: In contrast, former Congressman Bob Barr took six ballots to secure the 2008 nomination.
ref: 相比之下，前国会议员鲍勃·巴尔在2008年获得提名时只获得了6票。

src: Upon his victory, Johnson proclaimed, "I am honored and I just want to pledge that no one will be disappointed."
ref: 在胜利之后，约翰逊宣称：“我很荣幸，我只想承诺没有人会失望。”

src: He suggested the party nominate James P. Gray as his running mate, and they complied, choosing Gray as the vice presidential nominee.
ref: 他建议共和党提名杰姆斯·P·格雷为竞选伙伴，他们同意了，选择了格雷为副总统候选人。

src: Gray is a jurist, who has served as a trial judge for Orange County, California since 1983.
ref: 格雷是一名法学家，自1983年以来一直担任加利福尼亚州奥兰治县的审判法官。

src: He ran for Congress as a Republican in 1998, and was the Libertarian Party's 2004 nominee for U.S. Senate in California.
ref: 1998年，他以共和党人的身份竞选国会议员，2004年，他被自由意志党提名为美国加利福尼亚州参议员。

src: In his writings and media appearances, Gray has advocated against the War on Drugs.
ref: 在他的作品和媒体露面中，格雷一直主张反对毒品战争。

src: In 2008, the Libertarian Party appeared on 45 state ballots with Barr winning 0.4 percent of the popular vote.
ref: 2008年，自由党参加了45个州的投票，巴尔赢得了百分之0.4的选票。

src: A recent Public Policy Polling (PPP) survey shows Johnson with six percent national support in a matchup with President Barack Obama and the presumptive Republican nominee Mitt Romney.
ref: 最近的一项公共政策民调显示，约翰逊在与美国总统巴拉克·奥巴马和共和党总统候选人米特·罗姆尼的较量中获得了百分之6的全国支持率。

src: A PPP poll from December showed Johnson with 23 percent support in a three way race in New Mexico.
ref: 12月的PPP调查显示约翰逊在新墨西哥州的三方竞选中获得23％的支持。

src: Falkirk were today relegated from the Scottish Premier League (SPL), after they failed to beat Kilmarnock away from home.
ref: 法尔柯克今天从苏格兰超级联赛（SPL）降级，因为他们没有在主场击败基尔马诺克。

src: The teams fought out a 0–0 draw at Rugby Park, a game which did not see many shots on goal with only nine in the whole game.
ref: 球队在橄榄球公园0比0战平，整场比赛只有9次射门，射门次数不多。

src: It is the first time Falkirk have been in the second tier of Scottish football since 2005.
ref: 这是福尔柯克自2005年以来第一次进入苏格兰足球的第二梯队。

src: Kilmarnock had previously been two points clear of twelfth position, occupied instead by Falkirk.
ref: 在此之前，基尔马诺克比位居第十二名的福尔柯克多了两分。

src: The team in last place would be relegated, and, only needing a draw, Kilmarnock played a slow and defensive game.
ref: 最后一名的球队将被降级，而基马诺克只需要一场平局，所以就踢了一场慢吞吞的防守比赛。

src: It is the first time Falkirk have been in the second tier of Scottish football since 2005.
ref: 这是福尔柯克自2005年以来第一次进入苏格兰足球的第二梯队。

src: With only two shots on target the entire game, much of the credit for the draw went to each team's defensive line, putting in several last-ditch tackles to stifle attacks.
ref: 整场比赛只有两球射正，平局的大部分功劳都归于两队的防线，他们在最后关头进行了几次铲球，以遏制进攻。

src: While Falkirk had the upper hand in the first half possession-wise, the contest was more even in the second.
ref: 虽然福尔柯克上半场在控球方面占上风，但下半场的比赛更加势均力敌。

src: On 77 minutes, the Falkirk side had the ball in the net, but the goal was disallowed for a clear foul on the Kilmarnock goalkeeper.
ref: 第77分钟，福尔柯克一方将球打进球门，但由于对基马诺克门将的一次明显犯规，进球被判无效。

src: Shortly after, Kilmarnock clipped the crossbar with a Craig Bryson effort.
ref: 不久之后，基尔马诺克用克雷格·布赖森的一记射门击中横梁。

src: Falkirk had a glorious opportunity to win the game on 86 minutes, when the ball landed for Ryan Flynn with the goal empty, but the young midfielder put it over from ten yards.
ref: 福尔柯克在第86分钟有一个绝佳的机会赢得比赛，当时球落在了莱恩·弗林的前面，面对球门空门，但这位年轻的中场球员在10码外把球射偏。

src: Kilmarnock manager Jimmy Calderwood, speaking after the game, spoke of his experiences: "It was a long, long day."
ref: 基尔马诺克的主教练吉米·卡尔德伍德在赛后谈到了他的经历：“这是漫长的一天。”

src: "I wouldn't advise it for anybody to be honest, you know. "
ref: “我不会建议任何人说实话，你知道。”

src: "We had a chance on the counter attack, we didn't take it, and then I think it was the 92nd or 93rd minute young Flynn missed a dottie of a chance."
ref: “我们有机会反击，但我们没有抓住机会，我想那是在第92分钟或第93分钟，年轻的弗林错过了一次机会。”

src: When asked about his future at the club, Calderwood replied: "I'll see what the idea is."
ref: 当被问及他在俱乐部的未来时，卡尔德伍德回答说：“我会看到这个想法是什么。”

src: " I wouldn't want to stay with too many games like this."
ref: “我不想玩踢太多这样的比赛。”

src: The manager of Falkirk, Steven Pressley, also told Radio Scotland his views on the game: "It was a very emotional day, you know, we're bitterly disappointed, but once again I couldn't ask any more from this group of players. "
ref: 福尔柯克的主教练史蒂文·普雷斯利也告诉苏格兰广播电台他对这场比赛的看法：“这是非常激动人心的一天，你知道，我们非常失望，但我不能再向这群球员要求更多了。”

src: "The things we talk about, the desire, the effort, the application, they were in abundance today."
ref: “我们谈论的事情，包括欲望，努力，战术运用，它们今天都得到了充分发挥。”

src: This was Pressley's first season as a manager, and he was questioned on his experience in the role: "I love it. "
ref: 这是普里斯利作为主教练的第一个赛季，他在这个角色上的经验受到了质疑：“我喜欢这个角色。”

src: "It's been an emotional day today, but in terms of my three months in charge, it's been a terrific experience. "
ref: “今天是激动人心的一天，但就我任职的三个月而言，这是一次非常棒的经历。”

src: "I very much enjoy it here and hopefully we can certainly build for next season."
ref: “我非常喜欢这里，希望我们能为下一季做好准备。”

src: 14 people have died after heavy rain and flash flooding hit a gorge near the south western city of Chongqing, China.
ref: 在中国重庆西南部城市附近的一个峡谷遭遇暴雨和洪水泛滥后，已有14人死亡。

src: It is reported that a group of hikers entered a forbidden area of the Tanzhangxia Gorge along with a guide.
ref: 据报道，一群徒步旅行者和导游一起进入了潭獐峡峡谷的禁区。

src: 16 members of the group of 35 were rescued but 14 died and 5 are still missing.
ref: 35名小组中的16名成员获救，但14人死亡，5人仍然失踪。

src: The flooding was caused by a heavy rainstorm on Saturday which caused a wall of water to trigger down the gorge.
ref: 洪水是由星期六的一场暴雨引起的，这场暴雨触发了一堵水墙冲下峡谷。

src: Around 400 rescue workers are helping the rescue effort and looking for any possible survivors.
ref: 大约400名救援人员正在协助救援行动并寻找任何可能的幸存者。

src: Several homes and streets were flooded during the rainstorm despite the effort of the villagers who built temporary flood guards.
ref: 尽管村民们建造了临时防洪堤，暴雨中还是有几处房屋和街道被淹。

src: Two sculptures have been confiscated and thirteen pro-democracy activists arrested in Hong Kong, in what critics have described as "politically motivated" censorship.
ref: 在香港，两尊雕塑被没收，13名民主派活动人士被捕，批评人士称这是“出于政治动机”的审查。

src: The sculptures, a new replica of the "Goddess of Democracy" and a carving called the "Tiananmen Massacre Relief", had been placed in the piazza of Hong Kong's Times Square shopping mall in remembrance of the 21st anniversary of the Tiananmen Square Incident.
ref: 这些雕塑是“民主女神”的新复制品和一幅名为“天安门大屠杀救济”的雕刻品，已被放置在香港时代广场购物中心的广场上，以纪念天安门事件21周年。

src: Although the Causeway Bay piazza is designated as a public space, its day-to-day operations are run by the shopping mall's management.
ref: 虽然铜锣湾广场被指定为公共空间，但其日常运作由购物中心的管理层负责。

src: They made a complaint that the Hong Kong Alliance in Support of Patriotic Democratic Movements in China, or the "Alliance" for short, had failed to ask permission for their activities.
ref: 他们抱怨支持中国爱国民主运动的香港联盟，简称“联盟”未能就他们的活动获得许可。

src: When police and officials from the Food and Environmental Hygiene Department attempted to remove the sculptures on the grounds for obstructing public access, they were prevented from doing so by activists for two hours.
ref: 当警方和食品环境卫生署的官员试图以妨碍公众进入为由移除这些雕塑时，他们被活动人士阻止了两个小时。

src: The police made 13 arrests, including that of a legislator for preventing the police from carrying out their duties.
ref: 警方共拘捕13人，包括一名阻止警方执行职务的议员。

src: The statue was removed and is currently in the custody of the Customs and Excise department (C&ED).
ref: 该雕像被移除，目前由海关（C＆ED）保管。

src: The 13 persons arrested were released on bail the same day.
ref: 被捕的13人当天获准保释。

src: Alliance secretary Albert Ho claimed that as Times Square was a public area, the police had no right to stop them, that similar activities had been held before, and that he had "...never been treated so barbarically and so violently...".
ref: 联盟秘书长何鸿燊声称，由于时代广场是一个公共区域，警方没有权利阻止他们，之前曾举行过类似的活动，并且“他从来没有受过如此野蛮和如此暴力的待遇……”。

src: Alliance vice-chairman Lee Cheuk-yan said that C&ED's action was unusual, and that he has contacted the department to find out if the department was trying to censor materials related to the Tiananmen Square incident.
ref: 联盟副主席李卓人表示，中电国际的行为不同寻常，他已与新闻部联系，以查明新闻部是否试图审查与天安门事件有关的材料。

src: As part of its Basic Law, Hong Kong continues to enjoy western-style liberties within the One country, two systems settlement within China.
ref: 作为《基本法》的一部分，香港继续享有“一国两制”的自由。

src: In the past political activities that are taboo in China proper have been tolerated by the Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China (SAR) authorities.
ref: 过去，中华人民共和国特别行政区当局一直容忍在中国境内属于禁忌的政治活动。

src: Zulia has a large portion of Venezuela's oil and gas reserves and is ruled by governor Manuel Rosales, a friend of the United States.
ref: 祖里亚拥有委内瑞拉很大一部分石油和天然气储备，由美国的朋友、委内瑞拉州长曼努埃尔・罗萨莱斯控制。

src: He said that the imperialists are attempting to give strength and form to the secessionist movement, with the goal of controlling the oil in the region.
ref: 他说，帝国主义者正试图为分离主义运动赋予力量和形式，目的是控制该地区的石油。

src: According to reports, the government of People's Republic of China has stopped restricting access to the Chinese Wikipedia in some parts of the country starting on July 3.
ref: 据报道，自7月3日起，中华人民共和国政府已停止限制在该国部分地区访问中文维基百科。

src: The report originated on the Wikimedia Foundation's mailing list quoting a website saying "Wikipedia Chinese version unblocked."
ref: 这份报告来自维基媒体基金会的邮件列表，其中引用了一个网站的话说：“维基百科中文版已被解禁。”

src: Wikinews has confirmed that the reports are accurate through discussion with people attempting to access Wikipedia from China.
ref: 维基新闻与试图从中国访问维基百科的人进行了讨论，证实这些报道是准确的。

src: Despite the report, there are still some issues with accessing the site according to readers of the site.
ref: 尽管有这份报告，但据网站的读者说，访问该网站仍然存在一些问题。

src: Sources tell Wikinews that although the English version is unblocked, the Chinese version still remains blocked or hard to access in many parts of the country.
ref: 消息人士告诉维基新闻，尽管英文版本未被封锁，但中国版本在该国许多地方仍然受阻或难以访问。

src: This comes after the Chinese unblocking of the all other language variations of Wikipedia in April.
ref: 这是在四月份中国对维基百科所有其他语言版本解禁之后的事情。

src: Ian A. Holton, who is an administrator on the English Wikipedia, has confirmed that the Chinese Wikipedia is accessible in the Liaoning Province, although users in Shanghai, Shenzhen and some in Beijing are still unable to access the site.
ref: 英文维基百科的管理员伊恩·A·霍尔顿证实，在辽宁省可以访问中文维基百科，不过上海、深圳和北京的一些用户仍然无法访问该网站。

src: The restriction in Beijing does not appear to cover the entire area: sources have told Wikinews the site can be accessed in many parts of Beijing.
ref: 北京的限制似乎并未覆盖整个地区：消息人士告诉维基新闻，该网站可以在北京的许多地方访问。

src: There has been some doubt on whether Wikipedia will remain accessible after the Olympic games.
ref: 人们对奥运会后维基百科是否还能继续开放持怀疑态度。

src: Christiano Moreschi, another active contributor to the English Wikipedia, said that "I doubt this will last 5 minutes beyond the end of the closing ceremony of the Olympics."
ref: 英语维基百科的另一位活跃贡献者克里斯蒂亚诺·莫雷斯基表示：“我怀疑，奥运会闭幕式结束后，这种情况是否会持续5分钟。”

src: The International Olympic Committee warned China in April that it wanted the internet freely accessible for the entire duration of the Olympic Summer Games.
ref: 国际奥委会4月份警告中国，希望在整个奥运会夏季期间可以自由上网。

src: Unrestricted access is guaranteed to the 30,000 reporters and media staff expected for the Olympics under Beijing's 'host city contract'.
ref: 根据北京的“主办城市协议”，预计参加奥运会的30000名记者和媒体工作人员将保证可以无限制访问网页。

src: Police are investigating a shooting on Buffalo's East Side late Saturday night which left one person in critical condition at a local hospital.
ref: 警方正在调查星期六晚上在布法罗东区发生的枪击事件，这起事件导致一名人员在当地一家医院处于危急状态。

src: According to Buffalo police communications, at approximately 11:00 p.m. EDT a young male in his late teens was shot at least once in the head near 118 East Utica Street.
ref: 布法罗警方通讯称，东部时间晚上11点左右，一名不到二十岁的年轻男子在东尤蒂卡街118号附近头部至少被击中一次。

src: Police say that witness reports indicate that the shooter then ran over the victim with a car and sped off Westbound on E. Utica.
ref: 警方说，目击者的报告显示，枪手随后开着一辆汽车从受害者身上碾过，然后在东尤蒂卡街向西行驶。

src: No other details on the suspect or his vehicle were given.
ref: 没有提供关于嫌疑人或其车辆的其他细节。

src: The victim was taken to Erie County Medical Center where he is undergoing treatment.
ref: 受害者被送往伊利县医疗中心接受治疗。

src: The extent of his injuries has not yet been released, but he is listed in stable condition.
ref: 他的伤势尚未缓解，但目前情况稳定。

src: Judith Miller of The New York Times and Matthew Cooper of Time magazine can be jailed for refusing to reveal their sources to a U.S. federal grand jury, according to the decision of the U.S. Court of Appeals in Washington D.C.
ref: 根据美国华盛顿特区上诉法院的判决，“纽约时报”的朱迪思·米勒和“时代”杂志的马修·库珀因拒绝向美国联邦大陪审团透露消息来源而被判入狱。

src: The reporters were among those approached with information about Valerie Plame as a CIA employee, and have refused to testify before an inquiry into the leak of national security information.
ref: 这些记者是接触到有关美国中央情报局雇员瓦莱丽·普莱姆的信息的人之一，他们拒绝在国家安全信息泄露调查之前作证。

src: Neither reporter actually wrote an article about Ms. Plame, whose identity was actually broken by Robert Novak in a July 14, 2003 column in the Chicago Sun-Times, but they have been the target of Special Counsel Patrick Fitzgerald of Illinois.
ref: 2003年7月14日，罗伯特・诺瓦克在《芝加哥太阳时报》的一篇专栏文章中，揭露了普莱姆的身份。这两名记者实际上都没有写过一篇关于普莱姆的文章，但他们一直是伊利诺伊州特别法律顾问帕特里克菲茨杰拉德的目标。

src: The U.S. Intelligence Identities Act makes it illegal to reveal the identity of CIA officers.
ref: 《情报人员身份保护法》规定，揭露中央情报局官员的身份是违法的。

src: However, the three-judge panel's decision on Tuesday upheld a lower court's ruling last year that Ms. Miller and Mr. Cooper should answer confidential conversations with government sources.
ref: 然而，由三名法官组成的陪审团周二做出的裁决，支持了下级法院去年的一项裁决，即米勒和库珀应回答与政府消息人士的秘密谈话。

src: Citing secret evidence presented by Mr. Fitzgerald, the panel said this case differs from the classic uncovering of wrongdoing by reporters relying on unnamed sources.
ref: 该委员会援引菲茨杰拉德提供的秘密证据说，这起案件不同于传统上依靠匿名消息来源揭露记者不当行为的做法。

src: A song released yesterday in support of the BBC is making an impact on several UK music charts.
ref: 昨天发布的一首支持英国广播公司的歌曲正在冲击几大英国音乐排行榜。

src: Stand-up comic Mitch Benn wrote I'm Proud of the BBC in response to the criticism the licence fee-funded corporation has received from its commercial competitors and the right-wing press.
ref: 单人脱口秀演员米奇·本写道“我为BBC感到骄傲”，以回应由许可证费用资助的BBC受到的来自商业竞争对手和右翼媒体的批评。

src: The Conservative-led coalition government announced two weeks ago that the licence fee is to be frozen for six years, and that the BBC will take over responsibility from the Foreign Office for funding the World Service.
ref: 保守党领导的联合政府两周前宣布，许可证费用将冻结6年，英国广播公司将从英国外交部接管为国际频道提供资金的职责。

src: The song, loosely inspired by Billy Joel, lists many of the BBC's achievements.
ref: 这首歌的灵感或多或少来自比利·乔尔，它列举了BBC的许多成就。

src: Benn, a regular on BBC Radio 4's satirical programme The Now Show, decided to release I'm Proud of the BBC as a single after realising that it was provoking emotional responses from audiences during his nationwide tour.
ref: Benn是BBC广播4台讽刺节目《Now Show》的常客，在他的全国巡演中，他意识到《我为BBC感到骄傲》在观众中引起了强烈反响，于是他决定发行将其作为单曲发行。

src: He told BBC Radio 5 Live that the song was receiving standing ovations, and people were wiping away tears.
ref: 他告诉BBC广播5台，这首歌受到了起立鼓掌的欢迎，人们都在擦眼泪。

src: A video was filmed last month outside of Broadcasting House, White City and Television Centre with a cast of volunteers recruited from the social networking site Twitter.
ref: 上个月在广播大楼，白城和电视中心外拍摄了一段视频，其中有一从社交网站推特上招募来的群志愿者。

src: The song was officially released as a 'download-only' track on Monday.
ref: 周一，这首歌作为“只供下载”曲目正式发布。

src: Yesterday's charts reveal that it has reached pole position on Amazon's rock chart, and is listed as the 14th most downloaded track overall.
ref: 昨天的排行榜显示，它已经在亚马逊的摇滚排行榜上占据了极重要的位置，并在总下载量排行榜上名列第14位。

src: Fans have created two Facebook groups to promote the single in an attempt to get it to a good position in the UK Singles Chart, which would force the BBC's commercial rivals to play the track.
ref: 粉丝已经创建了两个脸书小组来推广单曲，试图让它在英国单曲榜中占据一席之地，这将迫使BBC的商业竞争对手播放该曲目。

src: Benn says that he has always been a supporter of the BBC, and yesterday compared it to the emergency services.
ref: 本说他一直是BBC的支持者，昨天他把BBC比作紧急服务机构。

src: "You also pay for the Fire Brigade, whether or not your house burns down. "
ref: “不管你的房子是否被烧毁，你都要为消防队付钱。”

src: He points out that he only receives a small percentage of his income from the corporation; last night he played with his band The Distractions at the Bloomsbury Theatre in London.
ref: 他指出，他只从BBC获得一小部分收入，昨晚他在伦敦布卢姆斯伯里剧院和他的乐队The Distractions一起演出。

src: The UK Audit Commission has delivered a report that questions the reappointment of Mike Storey, the former leader of Liverpool City Council.
ref: 英国审计委员会发布了一份报告，对利物浦市议会前主席迈克·斯托里的连任提出质疑。

src: It also brings into question the conduct of his replacement as leader, Warren Bradley.
ref: 这也使他取代议长沃伦布拉德利的行为受到质疑。

src: This follows a report from KPMG, which the council has refused to release.
ref: 此前，该议会拒绝公布毕马威的一份报告。

src: Earlier in 2006 the council was the subject of a series of reports from alleged council insiders via a blog.
ref: 2006年早些时候，该议会通过博客收到了一系列来自所谓委员会内部人士的报告。

src: Lech Walesa, the founder of the Solidarity movement has quit the organisation.
ref: 团结运动的创始人莱赫·瓦文萨已退出该组织。

src: The Solidarity trade union movement and political party was founded in 1980 to combat Poland's Communist government.
ref: 团结工会运动和政党成立于1980年，以对抗波兰的共产党政府。

src: "I have given up my membership last year because Solidarity and I have gone separate ways," said Walesa who served as Poland's first post-Communist president from 1990 to 1995.
ref: 瓦文萨曾在1990年至1995年担任波兰首位后共产主义总统，他说：“我去年放弃了我的会员身份，因为团结工会和我已分道扬镳了。”

src: Walesa, 62, is boycotting Solidarity's 26th anniversary celebration this month as he does not want to appear with current President Lech Kaczynski and his twin brother, Prime Minister Jaroslaw Kaczynski with whose policies he disagrees.
ref: 现年62岁的瓦文萨抵制本月举行的团结工会成立26周年庆祝活动，因为他不想和现任总统卡钦斯基以及他的孪生兄弟、现任总理卡钦斯基一起出席纪念活动。卡钦斯基的政策与瓦文萨不同。

src: "His approach is to first destroy and then think about what to build," Walesa said of the president.
ref: 瓦文萨在谈到总统时表示：“他的方法是先摧毁，然后再考虑建造什么。”

src: Last August, he said of the union "This is no longer my union."
ref: 去年八月他谈到工会时说，“这不再是我的工会了”。

src: It was revealed today that Walesa has not formally been a member of Solidarity since the beginning of this year.
ref: 今天透露，自今年年初以来，瓦文萨已不再是团结工会的正式成员。

src: Walesa says he left Solidarity after the union ignored his criticism of its support of the Law and Justice Party led by the Kaczynskis.
ref: 瓦文萨说，他批评了工会对卡钦斯基领导的法律和正义党的支持，在工会对此表示忽视后，他离开了团结工会。

src: Solidarity was created as an independent trade union when such organizations were outlawed under the Communist state.
ref: 团结工会是在共产主义国家取缔这类组织时建立的独立工会。

src: Despite attempts to destroy the group through repressions, it came to embody a broad social anti-communist movement within Poland.
ref: 尽管有人试图通过镇压摧毁该组织，但它最终在波兰国内体现了广泛的社会反共运动。

src: It is credited as one of many dissident movements which in the 1980s pressured reforms which eventually led to the dissolution of the Soviet Union and states in its sphere of influence.
ref: 它被认为是1980年代许多不同政见运动之一，这些运动对改革施加压力，最终导致苏联及其势力范围内的国家解体。

src: Solidarity eventually came to power in Poland with Walesa serving as President of Poland from 1990 to 1995.
ref: 团结工会最终在波兰掌权，瓦文萨于1990年至1995年担任波兰总统。

src: In accordance with the Treaty on Open Skies, Norway and Denmark started conducting observation flights over Belarus and Russia yesterday.
ref: 根据“开放天空条约”，挪威和丹麦昨天开始在白俄罗斯和俄罗斯进行观察飞行。

src: These flights are expected to last until July 1, with seven Belarusian and two Russian inspectors monitoring foreign planes.
ref: 这些飞行预计将持续到7月1日，七名白俄罗斯和两名俄罗斯视察员将监视外国飞机。

src: The treaty establishes a program of unarmed aerial surveillance flights over the entire territory of its 34 state participants.
ref: 该条约规定了一项在其34个参与国的所有领空进行非武装空中侦察飞行的计划。

src: The treaty is designed to enhance mutual understanding and confidence by giving all participants, regardless of size, a direct role in gathering information about military forces and activities of concern to them.
ref: 该条约旨在让所有参加国，不论其规模大小，在收集有关军事力量和他们关注的活动的信息方面发挥直接作用，以增进相互理解和信任。

src: Russia and Belarus signed the treaty in 1992 in Helsinki.
ref: 俄罗斯和白俄罗斯于1992年在赫尔辛基签署了该条约。

src: According to the spokesman of Belarusian Ministry of Defense, Russia and Belarus have finished their analogous flight over the USA on June 25.
ref: 据白俄罗斯国防部发言人称，俄罗斯和白俄罗斯已于6月25日完成飞越美国上空的类似飞行。

src: Miriam Stucky is running for the Green Party of Ontario in the Ontario provincial election, in the Peterborough riding.
ref: 米里亚姆·斯图基正在彼得伯勒选区参加安大略省的绿党选举。

src: Wikinews' Nick Moreau interviewed her regarding her values, her experience, and her campaign.
ref: 维基新闻的尼克・莫罗就她的价值观、经历和竞选活动采访了她。

src: Stay tuned for further interviews; every candidate from every party is eligible, and will be contacted.
ref: 请继续关注进一步的采访，每一政党的每一位候选人都有资格当选，我们将与他们联系。

src: Expect interviews from Liberals, Progressive Conservatives, New Democratic Party members, Ontario Greens, as well as members from the Family Coalition, Freedom, Communist, Libertarian, and Confederation of Regions parties, as well as independents.
ref: 期待自由主义者、进步保守派、新民主党成员、安大略绿党、家庭联盟、自由组织、共产主义者、自由意志党、地区政党联盟以及无党派人士的采访。

src: The 2005-2006 Ontario Hockey League season kicked off to a start Wednesday night at Wendler arena in The Dow Event Center in Saginaw, Michigan, USA with the Saginaw Spirit hosting the Plymouth Whalers, with over 4,600 people attending.
ref: 2005-2006年安大略冰球联赛赛季于本周三晚在美国密歇根州萨吉诺陶氏活动中心的温德勒球场拉开帷幕，由萨吉诺精神队主场迎战普利茅斯捕鲸队，共有4600多人观看。

src: A power shot by a player sent the game into a 5-minute delay when a piece of glass on the boards was shattered during the first period.
ref: 在第一节比赛中，一名球员的大力射门导致比赛延迟了5分钟，原因是板上的一块玻璃被打碎。

src: The game opened its first period with 4 goals for the Whalers, with right wing player Dan Collins scoring two.
ref: 本场比赛第一节就捕鲸船队就进了4球，其中右翼球员丹·柯林斯独进2球。

src: Teammates James Neal and John Vigilante picked up the remainder.
ref: 队友詹姆斯·尼尔和约翰·维吉拉特包揽了剩下的两球。

src: The Spirit also received a goal, made by defenseman Patrick McNeill.
ref: 精神队也获得了进球，由防守队员帕特里克麦克尼尔攻入。

src: The second period started with an early goal by Michal Birner for the Spirit.
ref: 第二节比赛开始时，迈克尔·伯纳率先为精神队攻进一球。

src: Plymouth later rebounded with two goals from players Ryan McGinnis and Dan Collins.
ref: 后来普利茅斯队球员莱恩·麦金尼斯和丹·柯林斯扳回两球。

src: Later on in the period, Plymouth member Jared Boll was penalized with a ten minute misconduct.
ref: 接下来的比赛时间里，普利茅斯成员贾里德·波尔由于犯规被取消10分钟的比赛资格。

src: He did not return to play for the remainder of the game.
ref: 在余下的比赛时间里他再没有回到场上。

src: A man claiming to have attached a bomb to his body has been arrested after a stand-off with police officers in a town in Hertfordshire, England.
ref: 在英格兰赫特福德郡的一个小镇与一名警察对峙后，一名声称已将炸弹附在他身上的男子被捕。

src: Police were notified of the incident at the Co-operative Bank on Market Street, Watford at approximately 1020 BST (0920 UTC) Thursday.
ref: 警方于星期四大约1020 BST（世界时9点20分）向沃特福德市场街合作银行通报此事。

src: Noises resembling bangs were heard at approximately 1320 BST (1220 UTC); the male suspect was placed under arrest at about 1345 BST (1245 UTC), just over three hours after the incident began.
ref: 大约在英国夏令时1320（世界时12点20）可以听到类似砰砰声的声音，这名男性嫌疑人于英国夏令时1345分（世界时1245分）被捕，当时距离事件发生仅3个多小时。

src: According to a spokeswoman for the police, "[a]n explosive device of some kind - as yet we don't know what this is - has been removed from this individual."
ref: 据警方发言人称，“目前我们还不知道这是什么，但已经从这名男子身上取出了某种爆炸装置。”

src: Much of the town centre was sealed off during this incident.
ref: 在这次事件中，市中心的大部分都被封锁了。

src: According to a statement from Hertfordshire Constabulary: "Safety of members of the public was paramount and a cordon was put in place and people were evacuated from nearby premises."
ref: 根据赫特福德郡警察局的一份声明：“公众成员的安全至关重要，警戒线已经到位，人们已从附近的房屋撤离。”

src: "There will be police activity in the town centre for a while to come."
ref: “未来一段时间，市中心将有警察活动。”

src: "Understandably this caused concern within the community and we would like to thank members of the public for their co-operation in this matter."
ref: “可以理解的是，这引起了社区的关注，我们要感谢公众在这个问题上的合作。”

src: The spokeswoman has reported that the alleged criminal "has been arrested and will be taken to police custody for interview" and that "[i]nvestigations into the nature of this device will continue".
ref: 该女发言人报告说，被指控的罪犯“已被逮捕并将被警方拘留进行面谈”，并且“将继续调查该装置的性质”。

src: Complex 40 was first used in 1965, for the maiden flight of the Titan IIIC rocket.
ref: 复合体40于1965年首次用于泰坦IIIC火箭的首飞。

src: Following the second Titan III launch, it was modified to serve as a launch pad for the US Air Force's Manned Orbiting Laboratory (MOL).
ref: 在第二次泰坦III发射之后，它被改装为美国空军载人轨道实验室（MOL）的发射台。

src: In November 1966, a boilerplate MOL space station was launched on a Titan IIIC from the complex, along with a Gemini capsule, and four satellites.
ref: 1966年11月，一个样板MOL空间站与一颗双子座太空舱以及四颗卫星一起，通过该复合体在泰坦IIIC上发射升空。

src: Following the cancellation of MOL, it was converted back to a regular Titan launch complex, and was used for 55 launches, of Titan IIIC, 34D, and IV rockets.
ref: 在MOL被取消后，它被转换回一个常规的泰坦发射复合体，用于发射55次泰坦IIIC、34D和IV火箭。

src: Two planetary probes, two commercial satellites, a British military communications satellite, and numerous payloads for the American armed forces were launched from the complex, which ceased operations in April 2005, when the penultimate Titan IV launched the Lacrosse-5 spy satellite for America's National Reconnaissance Office.
ref: 两颗行星探测器、两颗商业卫星、一颗英国军用通信卫星和美国武装部队的大量有效载荷从该复合体发射，该复合体于2005年4月停止运行，当时第二颗泰坦四号为美国国家侦察局发射了长曲棍球-5间谍卫星。

src: Along with Launch Complex 41, which was demolished in 1999, LC-40 was used for heavy-lift Titan rocket launches.
ref: 连同在1999年被拆除的41号发射复合体一起，LC-40被用来发射重型泰坦火箭。

src: The Mars Observer and Cassini-Huygens missions to Mars and Saturn respectively were launched from Complex 40.
ref: 分别发往火星和土星的火星观测者号和卡西尼-惠更斯号是从复合体40发射的。

src: The launch pad is being demolished to make way for a new complex, which will be used by the SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket, currently scheduled to make its maiden flight in 2009.
ref: 发射台正在拆除，以便为一个新的复合体让路，该太空船将用于目前计划于2009年首飞的SpaceX猎鹰9号火箭。

src: As well as being used for commercial launches, the new LC-40 will be used for cargo resupply missions to the International Space Station, under a Commercial Orbital Transportation Services (COTS) contract with NASA.
ref: 根据与NASA签订的商业轨道运输服务（COTS）合同，新的LC-40不仅用于商业发射，还将用于向国际空间站提供货物补给。

src: It could eventually be used for manned missions using the SpaceX Dragon spacecraft.
ref: 它最终可以用于使用SpaceX天龙号太空船的载人飞行任务。

src: SpaceX currently has a five year lease on the site.
ref: SpaceX目前在该基地有五年租约。

src: Russia Today TV, Moscow's English-language satellite television channel, reported that Russian government officials are considering filing libel suits against international journalists over their reporting on the poisoning death of former Russian spy Alexander Litvinenko.
ref: 莫斯科英语卫星电视频道俄罗斯今日电视台报道称，俄罗斯政府官员正在考虑就其前俄罗斯间谍亚历山大・利特维年科中毒死亡的报道向国际记者提起诽谤诉讼。

src: Litvinenko was a strong critic of Russian President Vladimir Putin and shortly before he died in London from radiation poisoning in late November, Litvinenko accused Putin of ordering his assassination.
ref: 利特维年科是俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京的强烈批评者，在他11月底死于伦敦核辐射中毒前不久，利特维年科指责普京下令暗杀他。

src: Putin and other Russian officials strongly denied any prior knowledge of a plot to kill Litvinenko.
ref: 普京和其他俄罗斯官员强烈否认任何事先知道杀害利特维年科的阴谋。

src: According to a report posted late Friday on the Russia Today TV web site, the Federal Agency for Press and Mass Media is gathering publications worldwide to be studied for libelous and offensive comments against Russia in their coverage of the Litvinenko's case.
ref: 根据周五晚些时候在俄罗斯今日电视网站上发布的一份报告，联邦新闻出版与传媒署正在收集世界各地的出版物，以便在他们对利特维年科案件的报道中对俄罗斯的诽谤和冒犯性言论进行研究。

src: Russia Today TV reported that the Russian government intends to file law suits for libel against international media if there is evidence of journalistic misconduct.
ref: 据俄罗斯今日电视台报道，如果有证据表明存在新闻失当行为，俄罗斯政府将以诽谤罪起诉国际媒体。

src: In a Voice of America interview shortly before he was poisoned by a radioactive substance polonium-210, former Russian spy Litvinenko had accused Putin of ordering the murder of Russian journalist Anna Politkovskaya to silence her and intimidate other independent journalists.
ref: 前俄罗斯间谍利特维年科在被放射性物质钋-210毒死前不久接受美国之音采访时指责普京下令谋杀俄罗斯记者安娜·波利特科夫斯卡娅，以使她保持沉默，并恐吓其他独立记者。

src: She had been killed by an unknown assailant in Moscow in early October.
ref: 10月初，她在莫斯科被一名不知名的袭击者杀害。

src: Several senior Russian politicians have said that the deaths of Politkovskaya and Litvinenko were playing into the hands of Russia's enemies and, therefore, could not have been authorized by Moscow.
ref: 几位俄罗斯高级政治家曾表示，波利特科夫斯卡娅和利特维年科的死正被俄罗斯的敌人利用来谋取利益，因此，这件事不可能是受莫斯科批准所为。

src: The Russian government's warnings aimed at international journalists follow Putin's largely successful efforts to bring major media outlets in Russia under government control and to limit media criticism of his policies.
ref: 俄罗斯政府对国际记者发出警告之前，普京基本上成功地将俄罗斯主要媒体置于政府控制之下，并限制了媒体对他政策的批评。

src: Reporters Without Borders, a Paris-based nongovernmental organization, has called Putin one of the world's top "Predators of Press Freedom."
ref: 总部设在巴黎的非政府组织“记者无国界”称普京是世界上“新闻自由的头号掠夺者”之一。

src: FreeMediaOnline.org, a California-based nonprofit organization which monitors media and supports press freedom worldwide, said that the latest warnings issued by the Federal Agency for Press and Mass Media would prove a major embarrassment for Putin and for Russia if they were carried out.
ref: FreeMediaOnline.org是一家总部位于加利福尼亚州的非盈利组织，负责监控媒体并支持全世界的新闻自由。它说，联邦新闻出版与传媒署发布的最新警告，如果得到执行，将会给普京和俄罗斯带来重大难堪。

src: An article on the FreeMediaOnline.org web site claims that even if there is no direct link between the two assassinations and the Kremlin, Putin is ultimately responsible for the climate of lawlessness and suppression of free media that may have contributed to these murders.
ref: 在FreeMediaOnline.org网站上的一篇文章声称，即使这两起暗杀事件与克里姆林宫没有直接联系，普京最终也要为无法无天的氛围和对自由媒体的压制负责，而这些可能与这些谋杀有关。

src: FreeMediaOnline.org also noted that uncovering the truth about the murders of Politkovskaya and Litvinenko would be difficult because independent journalists in Russia have been either silenced or intimidated by President Putin's media advisors, government regulators, and security services.
ref: FreeMediaOnline.org还指出，揭露波利特科夫斯卡娅和利特维年科谋杀案的真相将是困难的，因为俄罗斯的独立记者要么被普京总统的媒体顾问、政府监管机构和安全部门压制，要么受到恐吓。

src: Putin insists he is a strong supporter of democracy and press freedom.
ref: 普京坚称他是民主和新闻自由的坚定支持者。

src: In a speech to Russian television broadcasters in late November 2006, Putin said that the development of Russian state and society would be unthinkable without independent media, without the possibility of listening to different points of view, and without television.
ref: 普京在2006年11月底对俄罗斯电视台的一次讲话中说，没有独立媒体，没有听取不同观点的可能性，没有电视，俄罗斯国家和社会的发展将是不可想象的。

src: Putin's critics point out that he has successfully placed under the Kremlin's control all major nationwide television channels.
ref: 普京的批评者指出，他已经成功地将所有主要的全国性电视频道置于克里姆林宫的控制之下。

src: According to FreeMediaOnline.org, journalists working for these channels no longer dare to offer any significant criticism of Mr. Putin's policies.
ref: 根据FreeMediaOnline.org，为这些频道工作的记者不再敢对普京的政策提出任何重大批评。

src: The organization warned that restrictions on media freedom in Russia have emboldened criminal elements to engage in illegal activities.
ref: 该组织警告说，对俄罗斯媒体自由的限制使犯罪分子更加胆大妄为从事非法活动。

src: The British actor Chris Langham has been found guilty on 15 counts of downloading child pornography.
ref: 英国演员克里斯·兰厄姆被判15项下载儿童色情作品罪名成立。

src: A jury of four women and seven men took two hours and forty minutes to reach a verdict at Maidstone Crown Court.
ref: 由四名女子和七名男子组成的陪审团花了两个小时四十分钟在梅德斯通皇冠法院作出判决。

src: Judge Philip Statman said that Langham will remain in custody till his sentencing on September 14.
ref: 法官菲利普·斯特曼表示，兰厄姆将被拘留至9月14日宣判。

src: Langham, 58, from Goldford, Kent claimed that he had been studying porn sites, researching for a character called, "Pedro," for the television series Help.
ref: 58岁的兰厄姆来自肯特郡的戈德福德，他声称自己一直在研究色情网站，为电视剧《相助》中的角色“佩德罗”做研究。

src: However, co-star Paul Whitehouse claimed he had no knowledge of this research.
ref: 然而，联合主演保罗・怀特豪斯声称他不知道这项研究。

src: Langham refused to answer questions about certain images found on his computer.
ref: 兰厄姆拒绝回答有关他电脑上发现的某些图像的问题。

src: During his time in court, Langham claimed that he was abused at the age of eight during a holiday to Canada.
ref: 在法庭上，兰厄姆声称他在8岁去加拿大度假时受到虐待。

src: He also said his brothers and sisters were abused, and that he felt no shame at looking at child pornography.
ref: 他还说，他的兄弟姐妹受到虐待，他对观看儿童色情作品并不感到羞耻。

src: Langham said he pleaded not guilty because he did not want to be labelled a, "Paedophile".
ref: 兰厄姆表示，他不认罪，因为他不想被贴上“恋童癖”的标签。

src: Langham however was cleared of charges of indecently assaulting an underage girl.
ref: 然而，兰厄姆没有受到猥亵侵犯未成年女孩的指控。

src: The girl claimed that Langham took her virginity at the age of 14, but Judge Statman said, "The Crown accepts that there is no evidence to support these particular counts on the indictment."
ref: 女孩声称兰厄姆在她14岁的时候就夺走了她的贞洁，但斯塔曼法官说：“公诉人承认没有证据支持起诉书中的这些具体指控。”

src: Langham said, in a statement read out by his solicitor, "I am absolutely delighted my name has been cleared of all the charges I have consistently denied."
ref: 兰厄姆在一份由他的律师宣读的声明中说：“我非常高兴我的名字被清除，脱离了我坚持否认的所有指控。”

src: "I have been found guilty on charges I have made admission to from the moment of my first arrest."
ref: “从我第一次被捕的那一刻起，我被指控入狱，被判有罪。”

src: "I am grateful to the jury for their careful deliberation and I would also like to thank the press for their restraint in not making the lives of my wife, children and family difficult during this time and I implore them to continue to grant my family the privacy they need."
ref: “我感谢陪审团的认真考虑，我也要感谢媒体在这段时间内的克制，没有让我妻子、孩子和家人的生活变得困难，我恳请他们继续给予我的家庭他们所需要的隐私。”

src: "I am afraid I am unable to comment further until sentence on the 14 September."
ref: “我担心在9月14日被判刑前我无法再发表评论。”

src: Derek Cuff, Deputy Inspector of Kent Police said, "Let us not forget that child abuse images circulating on the internet are real situations involving real children, who are sexually abused for other's gain and self-gratification."
ref: 肯特警方副巡视员德里克·库夫说：“我们不要忘记，互联网上传播的儿童虐待图像是涉及真实儿童的真实情况，这些儿童因其他人的收获和自我满足而受到性虐待。”

src: The jury had to view some images that had to be selected carefully - but what they saw and heard in evidence is harrowing and disturbing.
ref: 陪审团必须查看一些仔细挑选的图像，但他们在证据中看到和听到的是令人痛心和不安的。

src: "I think this itself puts some measure of perspective on the level of child abuse we are dealing with."
ref: “我认为这本身就可以对我们正在处理的虐待儿童的程度提出一些看法。”

src: This will affect the filming of the next series of the satirical sitcom The Thick of It, where Langham plays Hugh Abbot MP.
ref: 这将影响下一系列讽刺情景喜剧《幕后危机》的拍摄，其中兰厄姆饰演休·艾伯特议员。

src: The last two special episodes did not star Langham due to his arrest.
ref: 由于兰厄姆被捕，上两集的特辑没有让他出演。

src: Writer Armando Iannucci hoped that if Langham was found not guilty, he would be able to appear in his show again.
ref: 作家阿尔曼多·伊安努奇希望如果兰厄姆被判无罪，他将能够再次出现在他的节目中。

src: As of 9 am this morning, flaring is still being carried out by ExxonMobil at Jurong Island, Singapore.
ref: 截至今天上午9点，埃克森美孚仍在新加坡裕廊岛进行燃烧。

src: This is the 3rd day flaring works are being carried out by the company to burn off excess fuel from the refinery plant.
ref: 这是该公司为燃烧炼油厂过剩燃料而进行的第三天燃除工作。

src: The flame, according to Ms Eva Ho, Communications Manager of ExxonMobil, is dying.
ref: 埃克森美孚公司负责人伊娃·何女士表示，火焰正在熄灭。

src: ExxonMobil wishes to assure members of the public that no health risk is posed as water and carbon dioxide are produced as a result of the flaring.
ref: 埃克森美孚希望向公众保证，由于燃烧产生的水和二氧化碳不会对健康造成危害。

src: Meng Yew Choong, Assistant Director of Corporate Communication at the National Environment Agency also clarifies:
ref: 国家环境局企业传播助理主任孟耀国也澄清说：。

src: "The hydrocarbon gases are burnt safely into water vapour and carbon dioxide, both harmless gases.
ref: “碳氢化合物气体被安全地燃烧成水蒸气和二氧化碳，这两种气体都是无害的。

src: Regular STOMP contributor Mike Muk shot a video of the flaring as well and he sent it in to Stomp.
ref: STOMP的定期撰稿人迈克穆也播放了一段关于燃烧的视频，并将其发送给了Stomp。

src: STOMPer NZSheep also sent a picture to a website, offering the closest look of the flaring activity, taken just outside the security fences surrounding Jurong Island.
ref: STOMPer NZSheep还向一家网站发送了一张照片，该照片是在裕廊岛周围的安全围栏外拍摄的，可以最近距离看到燃烧活动的画面。

src: A leading Queensland union says that the Melbourne Cup due to be run tomorrow at 3:00pm Australian Eastern Daylight Saving Time could be used as a valuable educational tool in the classroom.
ref: 昆士兰州的一个主要工会表示，定于澳大利亚东部夏令时明天下午3点举行的墨尔本杯可以作为一种宝贵的课堂教育工具。

src: The Queensland Teachers Union president Steve Ryan said that he supported staff making their own decisions on whether to watch the race but statistics principles could be taught in conjunction with showing the race.
ref: 昆士兰教师工会主席史蒂夫·瑞安说，他支持员工就是否观看比赛做出自己的决定，但统计学原理可以结合展示比赛来教授。

src: Mr Ryan said that incorporating the Cup into the curriculum would make statistics 'real' to work with, rather than using textbook material.
ref: 瑞安表示，将杯赛纳入课程将使统计数据“真实”可用，而不是使用教科书材料。

src: "It's about making subjects real and certainly that's a good example of how you can use a particular situation."
ref: “这是让实验对象真实化，这当然是如何利用特定情况的一个很好的例子”。

src: Many religious schools in Brisbane have chosen not to show the race due to gambling concerns.
ref: 布里斯班的许多宗教学校出于对赌博的担忧而选择不播放比赛。

src: Bangladesh pulled off a surprising victory over South Africa by 67 runs in the Super 8 phase of the World Cup at the Providence Stadium, Georgetown, Guyana.
ref: 孟加拉国取得了令人惊叹的胜利，在圭亚那乔治城的普罗维登斯体育场举行的板球世界杯超级八强赛中以67分优势战胜南非队。

src: This past Tuesday, a United States federal judge ordered the popular video sharing website YouTube to hand over a record of every video that users have watched, including registered accounts and IPs.
ref: 上周二，美国一位联邦法官要求热门视频分享网站YouTube公司提供观看每个视频的用户注册账户和IP地址。

src: Viacom, which owns several U.S. television networks such as MTV and Nickelodeon, launched a $1 billion lawsuit last year alleging that YouTube wasn't doing enough to stop its copyrighted material from appearing in over 160,000 unauthorized clips that have been viewed over 1.5 billion times.
ref: 拥有例如MTV和尼克国际儿童频道等数个美国电视网络公司的维亚康姆公司去年以YouTube公司没有及时停止侵权文件导致未授权视频数量超过16万，总浏览量超过15亿次，而向其发起了10亿美元的诉讼。

src: Viacom argued that since they claimed that copyright material is more popular than user-made videos, they needed access to the information to strengthen the case, in which US District Court judge Louis L. Stanton agreed and ordered Google to turn over such information.
ref: 维亚康姆争辩道，他们表明版权材料比用户自制的视频更受欢迎，他们需要得到这些信息来源去强调该情况，美国地方联邦法院法官路易斯·斯坦顿支持该观点并要求谷歌提供上述信息。

src: Google argued that this would cause privacy issues, but Stanton said it was just speculation.
ref: 谷歌争辩这将会造成隐私问题，但是斯坦顿表示这只是谷歌的推测。

src: The Electronic Frontier Foundation, a San Francisco-based privacy advocate group, said the ruling was "a setback to privacy rights, and will allow Viacom to see what you are watching on YouTube." said EFF's senior staff attorney Kurt Opsahl.
ref: 电子前线基金会是倡导保护个人隐私的组织，其高级职业律师科特奥普萨表示，该判决“将允许维亚康姆知道个人在Youtube上看了什么，是保护个人隐私权利的倒退”。

src: Viacom had also requested for the code used to search keywords for each video and access to Google's advertising database to see if Google was receiving revenue from ads from the alleged videos, but these requests were denied by the judge, arguing that code and ad data was too valuable.
ref: 维亚康姆也要求搜索每个视频关键字的代码和谷歌广告数据库的权限来判断谷歌是否从可疑视频的广告中获利，但是这些要求被法官以代码和广告数据价值太高而驳回。

src: There are concerns that Google is violating the Digital Millennium Copyright Act which allows a video provider service to not to be sued if it removes copyrighted material.
ref: 相关信息表明谷歌因允许视频提供者移去版权材料并免于起诉，这违反了《数字千年著作权法案》。

src: Amidst ongoing Israeli bombings of Gaza, with the death toll of the bombardments up to 537 with another 2,500 people wounded, UN food agencies again warned that the people of Gaza are facing a heavy humanitarian crisis.
ref: 被以色列炮火包围的加沙地区，因轰炸造成的死亡数字上升到537名，另有2500人受伤，联合国食品署再次告诫加沙人民正面临着严峻的人道主义危机。

src: "The current situation in Gaza is appalling, and many basic food items are no longer available on the market," Said Christine van Nieuwenhuyse, the World Food Program's (WFP) representative in the Palestinian territory, in a statement that was released on Friday.
ref: 据世界粮食计划署巴勒斯坦区域代表克里斯汀·范·尼乌文胡斯在周五发表的报道，“现在加沙的情形恶劣不堪，很多基本的食物已经无法在市场上找到”。

src: "This area ... is one of the poorest and most heavily affected by the recent conflict," she added.
ref: 她补充道，“这个区域现在已经是受冲突影响最严重和最贫乏的区域之一”。

src: WFP officials said that they have begun to give bread to 15,000 new recipients, a number which added to the already large group of people that had been lining up for bread after two years of Israeli blockades of Gaza, the most recent of which began in early November.
ref: 世界粮食计划署官方报道，在以色列包围加沙2年以来，加上之前11月初开始向市民发放面包，其已开始向新的15000名民众发放面包。

src: The blockades, surely a catalyst for violent Hamas attacks, have been condemned by Human Rights Watch as a "violation of international humanitarian law."
ref: 此次包围是哈马斯暴力袭击的催化剂，人权监察站谴责其违背了《国际人道主义法》。

src: Struggling Gazan hospitals say that they are completely out of even the most basic medical supplies and have little or no capacity to deal with further casualties.
ref: 苦苦挣扎的加沙地区医院表达，他们已经用尽了所有的基本医疗供给，仅能供少数或没有能力对未来的伤员进行救治。

src: In addition, Israeli ground forces entered Gaza on Saturday causing an immediate spike in casualties and even attacks on the hospitals and paramedics themselves.
ref: 另外，以色列的地面部队于周六进入加沙时立即造成伤亡人数猛增，其甚至向医院及医护人员发起进攻。

src: As sewage runs through the streets, many Gazans are trying to flee the area by storming the border with Egypt, a move which Egyptian police blocked on Sunday and are planning to do so again today as Egyptian leaders ordered their policemen to open fire on Gazans trying to flee into Egypt.
ref: 街道上遍布着污物，很多加沙人民寄希望冲击埃及边界网逃离加沙，而埃及领导人要求警方随时可以向企图逃往埃及的人加沙人民开枪，埃及警方在周日迅速在隔离边界区域作出部署并计划今天再次实施。

src: Hasan Khalaf, Gaza's assistant deputy health minister, described the ongoing assault on Gaza as "an Israeli massacre".
ref: 加沙卫生部副部长助理哈桑哈拉夫形容对加沙的持续袭击是“一场以色列的屠杀”。

src: "There is no comparison between what we have and what [Israel] are doing to us."
ref: “以色列对我们做的和我们现有的完全没有可比性”。

src: "The international community are standing unable to help us, and yet we know they have been helping Israel for tens of years."
ref: “国际组织仍保持无法帮助我们的态度，而我们都知道他们已经帮助了以色列数十年。”

src: At least eight construction workers have died and thirteen more are injured after a building collapsed during construction in Qiuzhigou Village, a suburb of China's Wuhan City.
ref: 中国武汉市郊区的邱之沟村一在建大楼倒塌，导致至少8名建筑工人死亡，13人以上受伤。

src: It is unclear how many more if any are trapped as the project's coordinator fled and is being sought by police.
ref: 项目负责人已逃逸并被警方通缉，现不清楚是否有更多人被困。

src: The collapse occurred at 5 p.m. local time yesterday and reduced the four-story structure to a five-metre pile of rubble.
ref: 坍塌发生在昨天当地时间下午5点，4层结构坍塌为5米高的碎石堆。

src: The building was a private residence and was illegal as authorities had not been informed of it.
ref: 该建筑是私人住宅，建造时没有通知当地部门，属于违法建筑。

src: Its location in an area accessible only via narrow alleys is hampering search and rescue efforts as heavy equipment such as cranes is having difficulty reaching the scene.
ref: 坍塌地点位于仅有窄巷子通达的地区，起重机等重型设备很难到达现场，因此影响了搜救进度。

src: Around 100 rescuers continue to pick through the rubble in the rain.
ref: 大约100名搜救人员仍在雨中翻开碎石堆继续搜救。

src: Two weeks ago, on February 1st, it was the second day of the national environmental Focus the Nation teach-in.
ref: 两周前的2月1日是国家环境焦点座谈会的第二天。

src: One of these events, which took place at the same time at other educational institutions across the country, took place in the city of Lynn at the campus of North Shore Community College.
ref: 其中一个项目在林恩市的北岸社区学院的校园举行，同时也在全国其他教育机构举办。

src: Wikinews accredited reporter Patrick Mannion was there in attendance along with Congressman John F. Tierney of Massachusetts's 6th congressional district and Lynn's State Senator Thomas McGee.
ref: 维基新闻特派记者帕特里克·曼尼翁与马萨诸塞州第六国会选区的国会议员约翰·F·蒂尔尼和林恩市的参议员托马斯·麦基一同出席。

src: One of Lynn's two representatives, Robert Fennell, also attended; the other representative Steven Walsh sent an aide.
ref: 林恩的两位代表之一罗伯特·范内尔也出席活动，另一位代表斯蒂芬·沃尔什则派助手出席。

src: The representatives for the nearby cities of Salem and Beverly, John Keenan and Mary Grant along with various local area mayors and city councilors also attended the event.
ref: 附近萨勒姆市和贝弗利市的代表约翰·基南和玛丽·格兰特与各市市长和市议员也出席了活动。

src: John F. Kerry, the senator for Massachusetts was supposed to attend but could not due to voting on the economic stimulus package in Washington D.C..
ref: 计划出席的马萨诸塞州参议员约翰·F·凯瑞，因在华盛顿特区参与经济刺激综合法案的投票而未能出席。

src: However, Senator Kerry did record a video statement DVD for the event in which he addressed the gathered crowd.
ref: 然而，凯瑞参议员确实为该活动录制了DVD，内容为他在聚集群众前发表的演讲。

src: Senator McGee started things off by talking about the need to recreate the North Shore Technical High School to include a focus on environmental jobs and the need to improve the Essex Agricultural and Technical High School which is deteriorating, but is known for it's agricultural teaching which would help to save the dwindling farming areas north of Boston.
ref: 参议员麦基以谈论需要重建北岸技术高中以关注环保就业作为开头，并表示需要改进以农业教学闻名但日益衰微的埃塞克斯农业和技术高中，这将有助于挽救波士顿北部日益减少的农业地区。

src: McGee urged people that should get more involved with their local farming co-ops and that farmland needs to be recognized and redeveloped.
ref: 麦基鼓励人们更多地参与到当地的农业合作活动中，推动人们重新认识和发展农田。

src: He noted that obesity in young people is a problem and that schools are developing partnerships with local farms to provide more healthy meals and to show students whats going on at their local farm.
ref: 他指出，年轻人的肥胖成为问题，而学校正与当地农场合作以提供更多健康的食物，并向学生展示当地农场的现况。

src: Representative Keenan commended the college for holding this dialogue and Al Gore along with his movie, An Inconvenient Truth.
ref: 基南代表对学院开展对话以及阿尔·戈尔和他的电影《难以忽视的真相》表示称赞。

src: Keenan noted the need for Salem's coal-fired power station for the need to switch to clean coal.
ref: 基南指出，萨勒姆的燃煤发电站需要更换为清洁煤。

src: Walsh aide's brought up the fact he is committed to ending paper waste at the Massachusetts State House.
ref: 沃尔什的助手表示，他将致力于停止马萨诸塞州政府办公室的纸张浪费。

src: The city council president from Chelsea, Roseann Bongiovanni, who is also the associate executive director of the local community organization, the Chelsea Collaborative, asked the various reasons for the crowd in why they became concerned about global warming.
ref: 切尔西市议会主席，当地社区组织“合作切尔西”的联合执行董事罗森·博吉奥瓦尼向群众提问，他们是基于哪些理由而开始担心全球变暖问题？

src: The audience noted the melting of ice sheets, air quality, Hurricane Katrina and Al Gore.
ref: 听众的回答是：融化的冰盖，空气质量，卡特里娜飓风以及阿尔·戈尔。

src: Bongiovanni then noted that Chelsea and neighboring East Boston have no green space or waterfront due the industrialization of both areas, noting that 100% of the jet fuel for planes at Logan Airport, 70% to 80% of heating oil and that the trucks delivering the oil are spewing diesel.
ref: 博吉奥瓦尼随后指出，切尔西和邻近的东波士顿这两个地区由于工业化已经没有绿地或海滨，并指出包括在洛根机场百分之百的飞机航空燃油，百分之70到80的取暖油和运送油的卡车都排放柴油。

src: She also noted the large salt pile in Chelsea used for the deicing of highways in the Commonwealth and said that it is located there "illegally."
ref: 她还指出，切尔西堆放了大量用于联邦高速公路除冰的盐堆，而它们是“非法地”被放置于该地。

src: She further noted the company, Energy Management Inc., behind the controversial Cape Wind project, proposed building a diesel power plant across the street from a Chelsea elementary school and that air quality in Chelsea is bad.
ref: 她进一步指出，能源管理公司，这个隐藏于具争议的海角风能项目背后的公司，已计划在切尔西小学对面建造一个柴油发电厂，而切尔西的空气质量已经很不好了。

src: She closed her dialogue by noting that "Global warming does not recognize boundaries."
ref: 她以“全球变暖无分界”来结束了对话。

src: Mary Grant said she was interested in hearing ideas and noted the redeveloping of Beverly's high school to include more solar panels and a new wind turbine and that the school would be powered by 50% of it.
ref: 玛丽·格兰特表示，她对听取大家的想法很感兴趣，并表示重建中的贝弗利高中将拥有更多的太阳能电池板和一个新的风力涡轮机，学校百分之50的能源将由此供应。

src: One person asked the need to lower the level of bureaucracy in government as she was "running around city government" in order to have a bee farm in her backyard.
ref: 有一名人士要求政府降低其官僚作风，因为她曾经因为想在后院建蜜蜂农场而“跑遍了全市的政府部门”。

src: Robert Fenell, the owner of Lynn's Capitol Diner who is notable for keeping chickens at the establishment located in downtown Lynn just two blocks away from the college noted that people should start going organic and going back to nature, that people should switch to more energy efficient lighting and grow gardens in their backyard.
ref: 林恩Capitol Diner餐厅的老板罗伯特·范内尔以将养鸡场建在离学院两个街区远的林恩市中心而闻名。他表示，人们应该开始体验有机生活，回归自然，并且转而使用能源效率更高的灯光及在自家后院种植花园。

src: After Fennell spoke it was time for questions and answers, and questions were given by various audiences members including Mannion himself, who asked about the MBTA's Blue Line and rapid transit and others asking various questions such wither or not to include a green curriculum in state education or asking for the politicians to talk more on some of their positions.
ref: 范内尔结束发言后是问答环节，不同的听众成员提出了问题，其中包括曼尼翁本人，他询问了有关马萨诸塞州海湾交通局蓝线和快速运输的问题，而其他人则问了诸如州教育在绿色课程方面是否凋零？或是要求政治家们谈论更多关于他们自身立场等问题。

src: After questions and answers finished, the video statement from John Kerry began to play.
ref: 在问答结束后，约翰·凯瑞的视频演讲开始播放。

src: Kerry noted that there are still skeptics of global warming and climate change in Congress who "test the science" despite the efforts and research of Al Gore and the United Nations and noting that "the White House is the last place for change."
ref: 凯瑞指出，尽管阿尔·戈尔和联合国作出了努力和研究，但在国会上仍有人怀疑全球变暖和气候变化，想要“检验科学”。他并且指出：“白宫是最后改变的地方”。

src: He then went on to say that the world needed a new international treaty on climate change and noted that America is horrendous when it comes to energy efficiency.
ref: 他接着指出，世界需要一个新的关于气候变化的国际性条约，并指出美国在能源效率上表现可怕。

src: Kerry also noted that the Bush administration resisted the change and the points of the climate conference in Bali; "Luckily, time is almost up," added Kerry.
ref: 凯瑞也指出，布什政府反对巴厘岛气候会议上的观点及变化；凯瑞补充道，“幸运的是，时间快结束了”。

src: Kerry went on to mention the need for massive new research on new energy and capturing carbon and noted he was working with Alaska's senator, Ted Stevens on pushing for sequestering plants.
ref: 凯瑞接着提到大量关于新能源和获取碳的新研究的必要性，并表示他与阿拉斯加参议员特德·史蒂文在推动植物隔离。

src: Kerry continued the theme of environmental conservation and change by topping off his statement by reminding the crowd of first Earth Day and how it lead to the creation of the Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act, Endangered Species Act and the Environmental Protection Agency and it noted it happened because of people's actions.
ref: 凯瑞继续阐述环境保护与变化的主题，并在结论中提醒听众，是人类的行动创造出第一个地球日，并由其导向清洁空气法案、清洁水法案、濒危物种法案和美国环境保护署的成立。

src: Tierney finished off the speech by noting the need for high risk energy research in the style of DARPA so we can better compete against the "Chinas and Japans."
ref: 蒂尔尼最后指出，需要以美国国防部高级研究计划局的方式进行高风险能源研究，以便能够更好地与“中国和日本”竞争，并以此结束演讲。

src: He also called for more green-collar jobs and noted his work on last year's Green Jobs Act.
ref: 他还呼吁更多的绿领工作并提到了去年他在绿色就业法案的努力。

src: The United Stated Department of Justice has asked for corruption charges against former Alaska Senator Ted Stevens to be dropped because evidence was withheld from the defense team by the original prosecutors.
ref: 美国司法部对前阿拉斯加参议员特德·史蒂文斯贪污腐败的指控已经撤销，因为辩方提供的证据被原检察官扣留。

src: The Justice Department has stated that they will not retry Stevens.
ref: 司法部表示他们将不会重审史蒂文斯。

src: In a statement, US Attorney General Eric Holder said, "After careful review, I have concluded that certain information should have been provided to the defense for use at trial."
ref: 声明中提出，美国司法部长埃里克·霍尔德表示，“经过仔细的调查，我认定某些信息可以提供给辩方在法庭上使用”。

src: "In light of this conclusion, and in consideration of the totality of the circumstances of this particular case, I have determined that it is in the interest of justice to dismiss the indictment and not proceed with a new trial."
ref: “根据本结论并考虑到整个案子的特殊情况，我决定驳回诉讼请求并不再开庭审理。”

src: Stevens was convicted in October on seven felony counts of lying on senate disclosure forms about gifts, largely in the form of free renovations to his home, received from an oil service company; his conviction is thought to have been a large factor in his November electoral defeat to former Anchorage mayor Mark Begich, the current junior Senator from Alaska.
ref: 10月份，史蒂文斯被控在担任参议员期间犯有7项罪行，包括接受大部分是以免费翻修他房子形式所进行的油服公司赠礼。这项指控被认为对他在11月的选举中被前任安克雷奇市长、现任阿拉斯加资浅参议员马克·贝吉奇击败起到重要因素。

src: Stevens immediately appealed his conviction and has maintained his innocence.
ref: 史蒂文斯立即对他的指控表示上诉并坚称自己的清白。

src: The prosecution case has met with a number of procedural difficulties, with US District Court judge Emmet G. Sullivan holding the prosecution in contempt in March for failing to turn over documents concerning an FBI whistleblower's reports of mishandling of the case.
ref: 这场起诉遇到了很多程序上的困难，3月份，美国联邦地区法院法官埃米特·G·沙利文对起诉态度轻蔑，没有翻阅FBI检举者的报告而错误的处理了案子。

src: The Justice Department has since replaced the case's prosecutors, and the allegations of misconduct have held up sentencing from the original convictions.
ref: 司法部因此更换了案子的检察官，根据最初的证据，无法对其不端行为的指控提供量刑依据。

src: The filed papers indicate that notes were never turned over from an interview that has the oil contractor estimated the house renovation for far less then he specified at trial.
ref: 存档文件表明这些笔记从未被翻阅浏览，笔记表明石油服务商对房屋翻修的预估要远小于他在庭审时的说明。

src: The original trial team was removed, but in the end Attorney General Eric Holder thought it would be best if the case was dropped.
ref: 最初的庭审团队被调走，但是最后司法部长埃里克·霍尔德认为案子撤诉将会是最好的结果。

src: NPR's source indicate that Holder wish to forcefully transmit that prosecutorial misconduct will not be tolerated.
ref: 美国国家公共电台表明，霍尔德希望强力传播检方不端行为是无法容忍的情况。

src: The trying prosecutors are under investigation by the Justice Department for their conduct in the matter.
ref: 这些难堪的检察官将因他们在本案当中的行为而接受司法部调查。

src: Stevens, now 85, served as Alaska's Senator from 1968 to 2009.
ref: 史蒂文斯现年85岁，在1968年至2009年间担任阿拉斯加参议员。

src: On Saturday Mikheil Saakashvili, the President of Georgia, called for a ceasefire in the South Ossetia war.
ref: 星期六，格鲁吉亚总统米哈伊尔·萨卡什维利呼吁在南奥赛梯战争中实现停火。

src: "I call for an immediate ceasefire," said Saakashvili, speaking in Tbilisi.
ref: “我呼吁立即停火，”萨卡什维利在第比利斯的讲话中提出。

src: "Russia has launched a full scale military invasion of Georgia."
ref: “俄罗斯在格鲁吉亚发动了全面军事入侵”。

src: After calling for the ceasefire Saakashvili continued by saying that "I am willing to have international mediation; I am willing to have international separation of forces; we have to establish normal regime under international supervision."
ref: 在呼吁停火后，萨卡什维利继续说到：“我愿意诉诸国际仲裁；我愿意采取国际军事隔离手段；我们必须在国际监督下建立正常的体制”。

src: Russian President Dmitry Medvedev stated his position regarding the ending of the conflict in a phone call with Federal Chancellor of Germany Angela Merkel: "The only possible and reasonable way out of this situation is the withdrawal of Georgian troops to their initial positions and the immediate signing of a legally binding agreement on the non-use of force."
ref: 俄罗斯总统德米特里•梅德韦杰夫在他与德国总理安格拉·默克尔的通话中，就终止冲突问题表明了他的立场：“摆脱这一形势的唯一可能且合理的方式，是格鲁吉亚部队必须撤回其最初的位置，并立即签署一份关于不使用武力的、具有法律约束力的协议”。

src: He reiterated much the same position in telephone conversation with the President of the United States, George W. Bush, today.
ref: 他在今天与美国总统乔治·W·布什的电话交谈中，重申了几乎相同的立场。

src: Saakashvili's call for a ceasefire comes soon after his declaration that Georgia is now in a state of war.
ref: 萨卡什维利在宣布格鲁吉亚进入战争状态之后，立即发出停火呼吁。

src: "I have signed a decree on a state of war."
ref: “我已经签署了进入战争状态的法令”。

src: "Georgia is under a state of total military aggression by the Russian navy, air force, large-scale ground operations," he said in a televised meeting that was broadcast on national television.
ref: “格鲁吉亚正遭到由俄罗斯海军、空军和大规模地面作战行动构成的全面军事侵略”，他在国家电视台播出的电视会议上这样说道。

src: Alexandre Lomaia, the head of the Georgian security council, said that President Saakashvili's proposal states that the Georgian troops will withdraw from Tskhinvali, and will stop reacting to the Russian bombings.
ref: 格鲁吉亚安全委员会首脑亚历山大·洛玛亚指出，萨卡什维利总统在他的建议中表示，格鲁吉亚部队将撤离茨欣瓦利，并将停止对俄罗斯的轰炸做出反应。

src: The crisis broke out after days of heavy fighting in the region.
ref: 在该地区经历了为期数日的激烈战斗之后，危机爆发了。

src: On August 7, Georgian troops launched an offensive against the Ossetian town of Tskhinvali.
ref: 8月7日，格鲁吉亚部队对茨欣瓦利的奥赛梯镇发动了进攻。

src: Russia responded to these actions by sending their own troops into South Ossetia on August 8.
ref: 8月8日，俄罗斯对此做出了反应，派遣自己的部队进入南奥赛梯。

src: According to the Russian Presidents office, drinking water is no longer available in what constitutes South Ossetia's capital, Tskhinvali, because "the water and sewage treatment plants have been destroyed".
ref: 根据俄罗斯总统办公室提供的信息，在所谓的南奥赛梯首府茨欣瓦利，已经无法获得饮用水，因为“水厂和污水处理厂均已被摧毁”。

src: It is further stated that 30,000 people have left South Ossetia to seek refuge in Russia in the last 36 hours alone; and that preparations are underway to provide tented and permanent accommodation for these.
ref: 信息中进一步指出，仅仅在过去36小时中，就有30,000人离开南奥赛梯前往俄罗斯寻求庇护；为这些人提供帐篷和永久住所的准备工作正在进行之中。

src: South Ossetia is a former province of Georgia that broke away from Georgia and declared its independence on November 28, 1991.
ref: 南奥赛梯曾经是格鲁吉亚的一个省，它于1991年11月28日脱离格鲁吉亚并宣布独立。

src: Investigators with the National Transportation Safety Board in the United States have issued an 'urgent safety recommendation' in connection to their role alongside the United Kingdom's Air Accidents Investigation Branch in investigating loss of power in Rolls-Royce engines on Boeing 777s, with the AAIB following suit.
ref: 美国国家运输安全委员会的调查人员发布了一份“紧急安全建议书”。该建议书与其协同英国航空事故调查局调查波音777劳斯莱斯引擎动力丧失事件中所承担的任务有关。而后者亦效仿了这一作法。

src: One of them resulted in British Airways Flight 38 crashing short of the runway at London's Heathrow Airport last year.
ref: 其中的一次事故导致英国航空公司38号航班去年在接近伦敦希思罗机场跑道处坠毁。

src: The NTSB and the AAIB want Rolls-Royce to redesign the engines.
ref: 国家运输安全委员会和航空事故调查局要求劳斯莱斯公司重新设计这些引擎。

src: Both events occurred on Boeing 777-200ER airplanes powered by Rolls-Royce RB211 Trent 800 Series engines.
ref: 这两个事件均发生在由劳斯莱斯RB211 Trent800系列引擎提供动力的波音777-200ER飞机上。

src: On January 17, 2008 British Airways Flight 38 experienced a dual engine rollback (reduction of engine power) on final approach to Heathrow and crashed, leaving one passenger seriously injured, eight passengers and four of the flight crew with minor injuries and the airplane written off.
ref: 2008年1月17日，英国航空公司38号航班在降落希思罗机场的最后进近阶段因双引擎失灵（发动机功率降低）而坠落，导致1名乘客受重伤，8名乘客及4名机组人员受轻伤，飞机报废。

src: The second event occurred on November 26, 2008, when a Delta Air Lines Boeing 777 experienced a single engine rollback during cruise flight over Montana, United States while en route from Shanghai to Atlanta.
ref: 第二个事件发生在2008年11月26日，当时有一架达美航空公司的波音777从上海飞往亚特兰大，途中在美国蒙大拿州上空巡航飞行时，发生了单引擎失灵。

src: Normal operations resumed after the flight crew followed Boeing's published procedure to recover engine performance and the airplane landed safely in Atlanta.
ref: 当机组人员按照波音公司发布的程序恢复了发动机性能后，飞机便恢复了正常运行并在亚特兰大安全着陆。

src: Boeing has already developed new procedures after the crash to prevent ice from building up within their 777 fuel systems after it became apparent that icing may have been a factor, and it was some of these that the Delta flight crew had followed.
ref: 在估计到结冰可能是导致事故的一个因素之后，波音公司已经在坠机事件发生后制定了新的程序以防止其777燃油系统结冰，而达美航班机组人员后来执行的恰恰是这些程序中的某些步骤。

src: As part of the recent releases by the NTSB and AAIB it has become apparent that investigators from both bodies, which are collaborating, have found ice buildup in the fuel system caused both rollbacks.
ref: 在国家运输安全委员会和航空事故调查局最近发布的消息中已经明确指出：合作双方的调查人员均已发现，燃油系统结冰确为导致上述两个发动机失灵事件的原因。

src: In both cases a build-up of ice (from water normally present in all jet fuel) developed on a component called the fuel/oil heat exchanger.
ref: 在上述两个案例中，均在一个被称作燃油或滑油热交换器上发生了结冰现象（产生于通常存在于所有喷气燃油中的水）。

src: This restricted the flow of fuel to the engine, resulting in the uncommanded engine rollback.
ref: 结冰限制了燃油流入引擎，导致非指令性引擎失灵。

src: Investigators initially struggled to produce enough ice under test conditions but have now found that at high concentration, fuel can form ice at very low temperatures in enough quantity to seriously restrict fuel flow, according to a new interim report by the AAIB.
ref: 根据航空事故调查局最新发布的中期报告，调查人员起初尽力在试验条件下制造足够的冰，但是现在发现，高浓度的燃油可在非常低的温度下形成足够量的冰，从而严重限制燃油的流动。

src: This does not occur when fuel demand is lower, as the hot oil then becomes sufficient to entirely melt the ice.
ref: 当燃油需求量比较低的时候，不会发生这种情况，因为热滑油足以完全融化所结成的冰。

src: The vigorous tests are thought to be the first of their kind.
ref: 人们认为，这些强有力的试验是史无前例的。

src: They have also confirmed that while ice may have formed elsewhere in the airliner's fuel system fuel was probably not restricted at any other location.
ref: 它们还证实，虽然在班机燃油系统中的其他位置也可能结了冰，但是燃油的流动在那些部位可能并未受到限制。

src: Instead, it is thought 'soft' ice formed in the pipes and then broke off, travelling to the fuel/oil heat exchanger and restricting it.
ref: 相反，人们认为是管路中形成的“软”冰脱落后，进入了燃油或滑油热交换器，从而对其产生了限制作用。

src: The NTSB has now revealed that they have advised Rolls-Royce to redesign the fuel/oil heat exchanger, and Rolls-Royce have stated that they are indeed working on a replacement part that will be available within twelve months.
ref: 国家运输安全委员会透露说，他们已经建议劳斯莱斯重新设计其燃油或滑油热交换器，而后者表示，他们确实正在设计一个替换部件，并将于12个月内供货。

src: The AAIB advised Boeing and Rolls-Royce to jointly review the problem across the fuel system, and both companies responded that they 'accepted' this recommendation and repeated that a replacement part was being developed.
ref: 航空事故调查局建议波音和劳斯莱斯公司联合起来对整个燃油系统进行评估，而这两个公司均回应道，他们“接受”该项建议，并重申其正在研制一个替换部件。

src: Both the NTSB and the AAIB also sent letters to the US Federal Aviation Administration and the European Aviation Safety Agency requesting the installment of the modified component be mandatory.
ref: 国家运输安全委员会和航空事故调查局同时又向美国联邦航空管理局和欧洲航空安全局致函，要求强制性安装改进后的部件。

src: The NTSB suggested this should be either the next maintenance check or within six months.
ref: 国家运输安全委员会建议，应在下一次保养检查的时候，或者在6个月内进行安装。

src: There are 220 Boeing 777-200s - the only type using the affected engine - with Trent 800 series engines.
ref: 现有的220架波音777-200型飞机是唯一采用上述受到影响的Trent800系列引擎的型号。

src: The fuel/oil heat exchanger is a dual purpose part designed to simultaneously melt fuel ice and cool down engine oil.
ref: 燃油或滑油热交换器是一个双重用途部件，其设计目的是使其能够在融化燃油冰的同时又能对引擎滑油进行冷却。

src: The AAIB further noted that it is unclear whether other aircraft designs are at risk, and advised the FAA and EASA to look into increased use of de-icing additives and investigate both the accumulation and sudden movement of ice in aircraft fuel systems and the actual formation of ice in the fuel itself.
ref: 航空事故调查局进一步指出，尚不清楚其他飞机的设计中是否存有同样的风险，并建议联邦航空管理局和欧洲航空安全局对日益增多的除冰添加剂使用情况进行调查，同时对飞机燃油系统中的积冰和冰块的突然移动，以及燃油本身的实际结冰机制展开调研。

src: Severe flooding in the island nation of Fiji has killed eight people and forced thousands to evacuate.
ref: 岛国斐济发生的严重洪灾已经致使8人丧生，并迫使数千居民撤离。

src: The flooding is mainly in the western part of the country's main island, Viti Levu, where most of the resorts hosting international travellers are located.
ref: 洪水主要发生在该国主岛维提岛的西部地区。多数接待国际旅游者的度假胜地均位于这个岛上。
