src: Fiji's National Disaster Office has advised all tourists still in the country to prepare for more bad weather and possibly more flooding.
ref: 斐济国家灾害办公室建议，所有仍停留在该国的旅游者要准备应对更糟糕的天气，也许还有更多的洪水。

src: Fiji's chief of disaster management Aisea Qumihajelo said in a statement, "There's another depression heading toward Fiji within the next two days and that will bring an additional threat."
ref: 斐济灾害管理主任艾希·曲米哈杰罗在一份声明中指出：“今后两天，将有另一股低气压向斐济逼近，并带来新的威胁”。

src: The government of Fiji's military dictator Frank Bainimarama declared a state of emergency in the city of Nadi, the country's tourist centre, and other parts of western Viti Levu.
ref: 斐济政府的军事独裁者弗朗克·贝尼玛拉玛已宣布该国旅游中心纳迪市，以及其他维提岛西部地区，进入紧急状态。

src: Over 6,000 people have evacuated the area and are now in one of Fiji's 144 evacuation centers sheltered from the storm.
ref: 超过6000人已经撤离该地区，并已入住斐济提供的144个避风疏散中心。

src: Government sources have reported that at least six people have been killed by floodwaters, and two people were crushed by a landslide.
ref: 据政府消息人士报道，至少有6人已死于洪水，2人死于滑坡。

src: The flood has affected many of the rural areas of the island, washing out sugar cane crops across the area and damaging roads and bridges.
ref: 洪水影响到岛上许多农村地区，将甘蔗作物洗劫一空，并冲垮了道路和桥梁。

src: "Widespread flooding, including severe flooding of major rivers and streams, is expected on Wednesday and Thursday."
ref: “预计星期三和星期四将发生大面积洪水，包括来自主要河流的严重洪水”。

src: "The western division is likely to be worse affected once again," said Fiji's director of meteorology, Rajendra Prasad.
ref: 斐济气象局长拉彦达·普拉萨德说：“西部地区可能会再次遭到重创”。

src: Rescue efforts, led by the government and the Red Cross, have begun especially in rural and heavily-flooded areas.
ref: 在政府和红十字会的领导下，救援行动已经展开，特别是在农村和洪水重灾区。

src: Vetaia Dokonivalu, a local resident from Ba, a hard-hit town, commented, "It was really frightening."
ref: 在受到重创的坝镇，一位当地居民维塔亚·多科尼瓦鲁评论说：“这真的很可怕”。

src: "We watched as the doors of our homes were forced open by the water."
ref: “当我们家的大门被洪水冲开的时候，我们只能眼巴巴地看着”。

src: "We saw our belongings being swept out of the houses."
ref: “我们看到家里的物品被冲出屋外”。

src: This flooding has also caused a food crisis in some parts.
ref: 这场洪水还在有些地区引发了粮食危机。

src: Isimeli Tukana, a health official, said, "People need to collect as much rainwater as possible and drink as much of this as possible."
ref: 卫生官员伊西梅里·图卡纳说：“人们必须尽量收集雨水，并尽量饮用这种水”。

src: "Watch out for food from supermarkets especially from the towns of Ba, Nadi, Sigatoka and Rakiraki."
ref: “要注意超市中的食品，特别是来自坝镇、纳迪市、辛加东卡市和拉吉拉吉镇的食品”。

src: "Our health inspectors will be doing their rounds as soon as the water goes down."
ref: “一旦洪水下降，我们的卫生检察官就会立即开始巡视”。

src: According to the Fiji Retailers Association, the storm has caused over a million dollars worth of damage to Fiji's businesses.
ref: 根据斐济零售商协会提供的信息，这场风暴给斐济商界造成了价值百万美元的损失。

src: The three armed robbers entered the museum half an hour before closing.
ref: 三名武装劫匪在闭馆之前半小时进入了博物馆。

src: One man with a pistol forced employees to the ground while the other two men stole the paintings.
ref: 一人用手枪强迫员工们趴在地上，另外两人则动手盗画。

src: The four paintings are worth a total of 163 million US dollars.
ref: 这四幅绘画作品的总价值高达1.63亿美元。

src: It's said that it would be hard to sell the stolen paintings on the open market due to the popularity of the paintings.
ref: 据说由于这些被盗的绘画作品非常有名，很难将它们在公开市场上售出。

src: There is a reward of 90 thousand US dollars for the artwork.
ref: 为这些艺术品开出了9万美元的悬赏金。

src: The robbers, who were still at large, stole the paintings Sunday from the E.G. Bührle Collection, one of Europe's finest private museums for Impressionist and ｖ, police said.
ref: 劫匪们仍然在逃。他们星期日从E·G·比尔勒馆藏盗窃了这些名画。那可是欧洲最好的印象派私人博物馆之一，警察如是说。

src: It was the largest art robbery in Swiss history and one of the biggest ever in Europe, said Marco Cortesi, spokesman for the Zurich police.
ref: 苏黎世警方发言人马可·科特西说，这是瑞士历史上最大的艺术品盗窃案，在欧洲也算得上有史以来最大的窃案之一。

src: He compared it to the theft in 2004 of Edvard Munch's The Scream and Madonna from the Munch Museum in Norway.
ref: 他将之与2004年从挪威蒙克博物馆盗取爱德华·蒙克的“尖叫”和“麦当娜”窃案相比。

src: Last week, Swiss police reported that two Pablo Picasso paintings were stolen from a Swiss exhibition near Zurich.
ref: 瑞士警方上周报告说，在苏黎世附近的瑞士展会上有两幅毕加索绘画作品被盗。

src: Fires continue to burn in Greece on Monday destroying everything in their path.
ref: 希腊的大火星期一继续燃烧，沿途的所有物品均付之一炬。

src: Death toll has exceeded 60 with daily Greek newspapers Kathimerini and Ta Nea reporting 61 and 63 deaths respectively.
ref: 死亡人数已超过60人。希腊“每日新闻报”和“新闻报”各自报道的死亡人数分别为61人和63人。

src: Ancient Olympia, birthplace of the Olympics, was also threatened but firefighters kept the site safe.
ref: 奥林匹克运动会的诞生地古代奥林匹亚也受到大火的威胁，但是消防队员确保了遗址的安全。

src: The new museum of Olympia was saved in the last minute but part of the ancient stadium was not spared.
ref: 新建的奥林匹亚博物馆在最后一刻被挽救了下来，但是古代体育场的一部分却未能逃过劫难。

src: The Greek Government has offered a €1 million reward for anyone providing information which leads to the arrest of an arsonist.
ref: 希腊政府悬赏100万欧元，以奖励任何根据其提供的信息抓捕到纵火犯的人员。

src: Over 500 groups, including the Democratic Progressive Party, are planning a massive march and rally for Saturday in Taipei City.
ref: 超过500个团体，包括民进党，正在计划于星期六在台北市举行大规模游行和集会。

src: March promoters are vowing to bring one million people onto the streets to protest the People's Republic of China's "anti-secession" law aimed at thwarting Taiwan independence.
ref: 游行的组织者发誓，将动员一百万人上街抗议中华人民共和国旨在阻止台湾独立的“反分裂国家法”。

src: The march, titled "326 March for Democracy and Peace", will begin in ten different locations, converging on the square near the Presidential Office in downtown Taipei City.
ref: 游行的名目叫做“326民主与和平游行”；将于10个不同地点出发，最后在台北市中心总统府附近的广场会合。

src: "Democracy and peace are the ultimate goal of the march," said Joseph Wu, the Mainland Affairs Council Chairman.
ref: 陆委会主委吴钊燮说：“游行的最终目标是民主与和平”。

src: Wu announced on Friday that he would take part in the rally, but did not disclose in which part of the parade he would appear.
ref: 吴于星期五宣布说，他将参加集会，但并未透露他将在哪一个游行队伍中露面。

src: Taiwan's President Chen Shui-bian announced on Thursday that he will also attend the event with his family.
ref: 台湾总统陈水扁于星期四宣布说，他也将携带全家参加活动。

src: "I cannot and will not be absent on March 26, and I will take my entire family to participate in this sacred moment in history to walk and stand up together with the Taiwanese people," Chen said.
ref: 陈说：“3月26日的活动我不能，也不愿意缺席。我将携带全家参与这一神圣的历史时刻，与台湾人民站在一起，行走在一起”。

src: Chen further declared that he has, "heard the outrage and anger of the Taiwan people."
ref: 陈进一步宣布，他已经“听到了台湾人民的愤怒心声”。

src: A Chinese scholar warned that the situation could become "further aggravated" by Saturday's planned event.
ref: 一位中国学者警告道，计划于星期六召集的活动可能会使形势“进一步恶化”。

src: "The secessionist forces plot to stir up public sentiments to embolden themselves."
ref: “分裂势力企图通过煽动公众情绪为自己壮胆”。

src: "Such moves are doomed to meet failure," said Huang Jiashu, a professor at the People's University of China.
ref: 中国人民大学教授黄家述说：“这种举动注定会失败”。

src: He stated that secessionist forces had "malevolently distorted" the anti-secession law.
ref: 他说，分裂势力“恶意歪曲”反国家分裂法。

src: The Taiwan Domestic News Hour on ETTV is running a 326 graphic to note the march and rally during its news reports about the upcoming event, and also has an animated graphic with marchers carrying signs in the lower-left hand corner of the screen.
ref: ETTV“台湾国内新闻时间”在对这个即将到来的活动进行报道时，制作了326活动图表来解说该游行和集会。还播出了一幅动画图片，在屏幕左下角出现了游行者手持标语的画面。

src: Zorn discussed a variety of issues, including frustration with the classification system that has disadvantaged some United States swimmers because of what she sees as its subjective nature.
ref: 佐恩讨论了各种各样的问题，包括对分级体制的不满。该体制将某些美国游泳运动员置于不利的地位，而她认为原因在于其主观性。

src: She also talked about the increased visibility of the Games, how things have changed from when she started in 1980 to the current 2012 Summer Paralympics.
ref: 她还谈到对比赛关注度的提高，从她1980年首次参赛一直到最近的2012年夏季残奥会之间已有很大的变化。

src: Zorn discussed how sponsorship has evolved from her early time participating, and issues with the Paralympics inside the United States at the present.
ref: 佐恩讨论了自从她早期参会以来赞助机制的发展状况，以及当前美国国内残奥会面临的问题。

src: This year Zorn was inducted into the International Paralympic Hall of Fame at a ceremony in London.
ref: 今年，在伦敦举行的一个仪式上，佐恩被纳入国际残奥会名人堂。

src: Having last competed in the 2004 Summer Paralympics, if she was swimming today, she would be classified as an S12 swimmer.
ref: 她的最后一场比赛是在2004年的夏季残奥会上，假如她今天仍然参赛游泳的话，她就会被分到S12级。

src: She currently works for the United States Department of Veterans Affairs, helping returning soldiers adjust to life as civilians.
ref: 目前她为美国退伍军人事务部工作，帮助退役士兵适应公民生活。

src: The Swiss people have voted yes to the freedom of circulation to the new EU states.
ref: 对于允许人员向新欧盟国家自由流通的协议，瑞士国民投了赞成票。

src: Overall 55.95% (1 457 355) voted yes and 44.05% (1 147 236) voted no.
All the cantons voted yes, apart from the six and a half Ticino, Appenzell Innerrhoden, Obwalden, Nidwalden, Glarus, Schwyz and Uri.
ref: 除了提契诺、内阿彭策尔、上瓦尔登、下瓦尔登、格拉鲁斯、施维茨和乌里这六个半州以外，所有的州都投了赞成票。

src: German-speaking and French-speaking parts of Switzerland had similar results; in previous national popular consultations, German-speaking cantons were regarded as less progressive than French-speaking ones.
ref: 瑞士德语区和法语区的投票结果相似。在此前的全民协商公投中，德语州区被认为不像法语州区那么先进。

src: The campaign was especially harsh, most governmental parties calling for acceptance, except the far-right wing Swiss People's Party (though Swiss People's Party's charismatic figure Christoph Blocher personally called for acceptance as well).
ref: 争论特别激烈。多数政府党派呼吁接受这一协议，但是极右翼的瑞士人民党则不在此列（尽管瑞士人民党的极具魅力的领导人克里斯托弗·布洛克个人也呼吁接受这一协议）。

src: Smaller formations, both from the extreme Right and extreme Left, attempted to smear fear of massive immigration and unemployement.
ref: 小一点的团体，既有极右翼的又有极左翼的，试图散布对大规模移民和失业的恐惧。

src: Switzerland has ratified bilateral agreements with the members of the European Union in March 2004, but the new members (Cyprus, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Latvia, Lithuania, Malta, Poland, Slovakia and Slovenia) were not included in the deal.
ref: 瑞士于2004年3月批准了与欧盟成员国的双边协议，但是约定中并不包括新成员国（塞浦路斯、捷克共和国、爱沙尼亚、匈牙利、拉脱维亚、立陶宛、马耳他、波兰、斯洛伐克和斯洛文尼亚）。

src: The results have been greeted by most of the political establishment.
ref: 投票结果受到多数政治机构的欢迎。

src: Martin Garbus, Esq. filed a shareholder derivative suit Monday against Marvel Entertainment and its Chief Executive Officer Isaac Perlmutter, as well as Stan Lee, the creator of Marvel superhero characters, and Lee's wife and former Marvel Studios head, Avi Arad.
ref: 马丁·贾伯斯先生于星期一对漫威娱乐公司及其首席执行官艾萨克·普尔玛塔和漫威超级英雄角色的原创人斯坦·李及其妻子，以及前漫威工作室负责人阿维·阿拉德提出了股东衍生诉讼。

src: The suit is for more than US$750 million (£528M) — about half of the estimated proceeds from Marvel's movies.
ref: 诉案索赔超过7.5亿美元（5.28亿英镑），大约占漫威电影所得收益的一半。

src: Plaintiff Stan Lee Media (SLM) has four shareholders who live in Florida, California and Canada, and include Jose Abadin and Nelson Thall.
ref: 原告斯坦·李媒体公司（SLM）有四位股东，分别居住在弗洛里达州、加利福尼亚州和加拿大，其中包括约瑟夫·阿巴丁和纳尔逊·塔尔。

src: The company is suing for recovery of civil damages representing one-half of film and book earnings from such blockbuster films as Spider-Man, Iron Man, X-Men, Hulk, and Fantastic Four franchises.
ref: 该公司诉求民事赔偿，金额为来自走红大片，包括蜘蛛侠、钢铁侠、X战警、绿巨人，以及神奇四侠等特许经营权所获得的影片和图书收益的一半。

src: Defendants are accused of copyright violations over both the Marvel superhero characters and intellectual properties created by Stan Lee.
ref: 被告被指控侵犯了斯坦·李原创的漫威超级英雄角色和知识产权。

src: Spider-Man's three cinematic outings, starring Tobey Maguire, earned more than $1bn (￡702m).
ref: 由托比·马奎尔主演的三部蜘蛛侠影片收入了超过10亿美元（7亿2千万英镑）。

src: "Most of Marvel's financial success, including from the films, comes out of assets created by Stan Lee that are the subject of this suit," the complaint states.
ref: 诉状指出：“漫威公司的大部分财务成功，包括经营影片的收入，均来自斯坦·李所创造的资产，这些都是诉讼标的”。

src: Lee, 86, has denied the allegations and has previously filed his own $50 million counter lawsuit against SLM, claiming the company has destroyed his name and reputation and prevented his effort to develop such properties as "The Accuser" and "The Drifter" and others via his first-look deals with Disney and Virgin Comics.
ref: 今年86岁的李否认这一指控，并于此前对SLM公司提出了价值5千万美元的反诉讼，声称该公司毁坏了他的名誉并阻止他通过与迪斯尼和维京漫画公司签订优先合作契约来开发诸如“原告”和“流浪汉”等新资产的努力。

src: Former dot-com company STM further alleges that it has agreed to pay Lee a $250,000 annual salary plus $100 million in company stock in exchange for the rights to the superhero characters.
ref: 前网络公司STM进一步声称其已经同意每年向李支付25万美元的年薪，外加1亿美元的公司股权，以换取超级英雄角色的使用权。

src: "That money should have gone to the corporation," said Garbus.
ref: “那些钱应该已经到了该公司”，贾伯斯说。

src: Lee's counsel, Mark Williams, replied: "We look forward to a positive resolution for Stan Lee and his family."
ref: 李的律师马克·威廉回答说：“我们期盼着能为斯坦·李及其家庭提供一个积极的解决方案”。

src: Marvel has said the court pleadings, which were filed in U.S. District Court in Manhattan, are filled with "ridiculous claims".
ref: 漫威公司说，在曼哈顿联邦地方法院提交的诉状充满了“荒谬的主张”。

src: SLM ran out of operating capital during the dot-com meltdown in December 2000, closing operations entirely by December 19 of that year.
ref: SLM公司在2000年12月网络公司崩溃期间耗尽了经营资本，当年12月19日彻底停止运营。

src: The company was placed into Chapter 11 Reorganization in Bankruptcy by Stan Lee in 2001.
ref: 该公司被斯坦·李于2001年申请根据联邦破产法第11章进行重组。

src: During the insolvency proceedings, Lee assigned the major character franchises he had created to his new public company, POW! Entertainment, without the bankruptcy court's approval.
ref: 在执行破产程序期间，李未经破产法庭的许可就将其原创的主要角色特许经营权转让给他的新上市公司POW！娱乐公司。

src: Two multi-billion dollar lawsuits for damages were filed against Lee, his new company, his new partner Arthur Lieberman and Marvel Entertainment for cybersquatting and failure to disclose the existence and value of the Rights Assignment Lee made to the company when he founded it.
ref: 李、李的新公司、他的新合作伙伴阿瑟·利伯曼和漫威娱乐公司被提起了两项金额高达数十亿美元的诉讼，内容为恶意抢注物联网域名，以及李在设立公司时并未披露特许经营权转让的存在及其价值。

src: The company remained under bankruptcy protection until the US Trustee for the Central District of California moved to dismiss the bankruptcy proceedings for failure of the company as debtor in possession to comply with basic requirements of filing monthly reports and paying quarterly fees to the Trustee.
ref: 公司当时仍然享受破产保护，直到加利福尼亚中央区的美国受托人因该公司作为债务人未能遵守提供月报表和向受托人支付季度费等基本规定而终止了破产程序。

src: SLM was taken back by the shareholders after its dismissal from bankruptcy and hired a legal and accounting forensic consultant to review all transactions that occurred during bankruptcy.
ref: 破产终止后，股东们收回了SLM公司并雇用了一位法律和会计法务顾问对破产期间发生的所有交易进行审查。

src: By November 2006, all of the officers and directors of the company had resigned or abandoned their positions and the company's lawyers for the debtors in possession attempted to obtain court authorization to destroy or dispose of the company's books and records.
ref: 到了2006年11月，公司所有的高级职员和董事都辞职或放弃了自己的职位，而公司的债务人律师则试图获得法庭授权以销毁或处置公司的图书和录像录音。

src: This initiated a long-running legal battle between shareholders and the company's founder, Lee.
ref: 这就在股东和公司创建人李之间引发了一场旷日持久的争斗。

src: The plaintiffs in this most recent suit contend that Lee, Perlmutter, Arthur Lieberman and Avi Arad conspired in bad faith to conceal and misappropriate financial interests in Lee's creations assigned to Stan Lee Media in 1998.
ref: 最新诉讼案的原告声称，李、普尔玛塔、阿瑟·利伯曼和阿维·阿拉德恶意串通起来隐瞒和私占李于1998年转让给斯坦·李媒体公司的原创作品的经济利益。

src: SLM's meltdown involved its former President Peter F. Paul fleeing to Brazil, contributions made to Bill and Hillary Clinton, Paul's extradition and more.
ref: 导致SLM公司崩溃的原因包括其前总裁彼得·F·保尔逃亡巴西、为比尔·克林顿和希拉里·克林顿提供的献金、保尔的引渡，以及其他各种原因。

src: In 2007, SLM filed a $5 billion lawsuit in which it claimed co-ownership of all of Stan Lee's creations for Marvel.
ref: 2007年，SLM公司提出价值50亿美元的诉讼，声称其拥有斯坦·李为漫威制作的全部原创作品的共同所有权。

src: The cause of death was established to be complications of diabetes.
ref: 死亡原因被确定为糖尿病并发症。

src: Gonzalez had suffered with the illness for several years and was wheelchair bound.
ref: 冈萨雷斯已患此病多年，并被迫长期坐在轮椅上。

src: Standing over 7.5 feet (2.3 metres) tall, Gonzalez was originally a basketball player before becoming a wrestler.
ref: 身高7.5英尺（2.3米）的冈萨雷斯原先是一名篮球运动员，后来又成了一名摔跤运动员。

src: Upon moving to the United States, he was drafted in the third round of the 1988 NBA draft by the Atlanta Hawks.
ref: 他刚刚移居美国，就在1988年NBA第三轮选秀中被亚特兰大鹰队选中。

src: After his basketball career ended, he joined World Championship Wrestling (WCW).
ref: 结束了篮球生涯以后，他加入了世界摔跤锦标赛（WCW）。

src: During his time there, he wrestled as El Gigante for two years, then joining the World Wrestling Federation (WWF), now World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE).
ref: 在从事摔跤运动期间，他化名伊莱·吉根特参加了两年比赛，然后参加了世界摔跤联合会（WWF），现在是世界摔跤娱乐公司（WWE）的成员。

src: He debuted at the 1993 Royal Rumble where he eliminated Undertaker from the Royal Rumble match.
ref: 他于1993年“皇家大战”中首次出场就将“送葬者”淘汰出局。

src: He spent the entire of his time at with the WWF feuding with Undertaker and left the company in July 1993 after losing a Rest in Peace match to him.
ref: 在世界摔跤联合会中，他将全部时间花费在与“送葬者”之间的争斗上。后来他在“安息”赛中输给了后者，并于1993年7月离开了公司。

src: After leaving the company, he wrestled in Japan before retiring in 1995 after suffering from sciatic nerve pain.
ref: 此后，他又去日本从事摔跤运动。1995年因坐骨神经痛而退役。

src: Republican John McCain has conceded the election to Democrat Barack Obama.
ref: 共和党人约翰・麦凯恩在选举中输给了民主党人巴拉克・奥巴马。

src: After two years of campaigning, today United States citizens went to the polls to vote for the Presidency and for numerous Senate, House, state and local races across the country.
ref: 经过两年的竞选活动，今天美国公民前往投票站投票选举总统，并在全国各地参加许多参议院、众议院、州和地方的竞选活动。

src: The District of Columbia and at least 32 states had early voting before election day.
ref: 哥伦比亚特区和至少32个州在选举日之前提前投票。

src: By October 31, over 23 million people had voted by mail or at early voting locations.
ref: 截至10月31日，已有2300多万人通过邮寄或提前投票的方式进行了投票。

src: Of the approximately 6 million people of known party affiliation who voted early, 58% were Democrats and 42% were Republicans.
ref: 在早期投票的大约600万已知党派人士中，百分之58是民主党人，百分之42是共和党人。

src: Record numbers of voters were expected to the polls on election day.
ref: 选举日预计选民人数创历史新高。

src: There were reports of technical problems and long lines across the country.
ref: 据报道，全国各地都存在技术问题和排长队的现象。

src: Heavy turnouts were reported in Indiana, Ohio, and Wyoming, among other states.
ref: 据报道，印第安纳、俄亥俄和怀俄明等州都有大量选民参加投票。

src: By 11:45 A.M. EST Obama is projected to have won 349 electoral votes to McCain's 163 votes.
ref: 到美国东部时间上午11点45分，奥巴马预计赢得349张选举人票，而麦凯恩赢得163张。

src: The popular vote at this time was 62,992,553 (52%) for Obama, 55,796,823 (46%) for McCain.
ref: 奥巴马当时的民众投票率为62,992,553（百分之52），麦凯恩为55,796,823（百分之46）。

src: Australian airline Qantas has returned the first of its fleet of Airbus A380s to service, after all six of the "superjumbo" aircraft were grounded three weeks ago following one aircraft's engine sustaining extensive midair damage; it landed safely in Singapore without injury.
ref: 澳大利亚航空公司已让首批空客A380客机恢复服务。三周前，这六架“超大型”客机全部停飞，原因是一架飞机的发动机在空中遭受严重损坏，飞机安全降落在新加坡，无人受伤。

src: The airline stated that all of the aircraft have undergone extensive safety inspections and they are satisfied they are safe.
ref: 该航空公司表示，所有飞机都经过了全面的安全检查，他们对飞机的安全感到满意。

src: Alan Joyce, CEO of Qantas, said: "It's great that we can reintroduce the aircraft."
ref: 澳航首席执行官艾伦·乔伊斯表示：“我们能够重新推出这款飞机，这太棒了。”

src: "If we weren't, we wouldn't be restarting the operations today."
ref: “如果我们不这样做，我们今天就不会重新开始运营。”

src: A spokesperson confirmed that tests had been performed "in close consultation with Rolls-Royce and Airbus" on the model's Trent 900 engines.
ref: 一位发言人证实，在“与劳斯莱斯和空客密切协商”的情况下，对该机型的Trent900发动机进行了测试。

src: Qantas has replaced at least 14 engines, and modifications have been made to Trent 900s used by two other companies, Lufthansa and Singapore Airlines.
ref: 澳航已经更换了至少14台发动机，另外两家公司汉莎航空和新加坡航空也对Trent900进行了改装。

src: Experts said that the incident was embarrassing for Airbus; the airline's shares have dropped by 7% since.
ref: 专家表示，这一事件令空客感到尴尬，自那以来，该航空公司的股价已经下跌了百分之7。

src: Aviation journalist Tom Ballantyne said that the failure earlier this month was "certainly the most serious incident that the A380 has experienced since it entered operations."
ref: 航空记者汤姆·巴兰提恩表示，本月早些时候的故障“无疑是A380投入运营以来遭遇的最严重事故”。

src: The A380 made its first commercial flight in 2007, and is now in service with several other airlines, including Air France.
ref: A380于2007年首次进行商业飞行，目前正在与包括法国航空在内的其他几家航空公司合作。

src: It is the largest commercial passenger airliner in the world, with an 840-passenger maximum capacity, though Qantas's can carry 450.
ref: 它是世界上最大的商业客机，最大载客量为840人，而澳航的最大载客量为450人。

src: There are reportedly plans to build a cargo version of the plane, which, aviation experts have suggested, would be the world's first "triple-decker" freight aircraft; Airbus has not confirmed that this variant will be built.
ref: 据报道，有人计划制造一架货机，航空专家建议，这将是世界上第一架“三层”货机，空客还没有证实这种改型飞机将被制造。

src: The Los Angeles City Council voted unanimously to sue a police officer accused of creating a story about being shot by someone at El Camino High School, causing a costly search for the assailant by police.
ref: 洛杉矶市议会一致投票决定起诉一名警察，该警察被控编造了一篇在埃尔卡米诺高中被人开枪打死的故事，导致警方对袭击者进行了代价高昂的搜索。

src: The officer, Jeffrey Stenroos, who had worked for the Los Angeles Unified School District police for eight years, caused thousands of students to remain on lockdown for hours.
ref: 这名名叫杰弗里·斯滕鲁斯的警官在洛杉矶联合学区警察局工作了八年，他让数千名学生被封锁了几个小时。

src: Traffic officers, county sheriffs, California Highway Patrol, and the Federal Bureau of Investigation were involved in the search.
ref: 交通官员，县治安官，加州公路巡逻队和联邦调查局都参与了搜索。

src: The council voted to ask Stenroos to pay the city for the cost of the search.
ref: 委员会投票要求斯滕鲁斯支付全城的搜索费用。

src: Council president Eric Garcetti said, "We had thousands of dollars spent on police overtime."
ref: 市议会主席埃里克加塞蒂说：“我们花了数千美元用于警察加班。”

src: Thursday, the Los Angeles Police chief announced Stenroos' claim was false and he was later arrested and released on $20,000 (€14,600) bail, charged with filing a false police report.
ref: 周四，洛杉矶警察局长宣布斯滕鲁斯的说法是假的，随后他以2万美元（14600欧元）保释金被捕并获释，罪名是提交了一份虚假的警方报告。

src: Stenroos allegedly mishandled a firearm and shot himself in his bulletproof vest, according to an anonymous police official.
ref: 据一位不愿透露姓名的警官说，斯滕鲁斯涉嫌不当使用枪支，穿着防弹背心自杀。

src: A chemical part of the saliva of a poisonous lizard, the Gila monster, has become an integral partner in the control of Type 2 diabetes.
ref: 毒蜥蜴吉拉怪兽唾液中的一种化学成分，已成为控制2型糖尿病不可或缺的成分。

src: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved its use for people who have not achieved adequate control of their diabetes with oral medications.
ref: 美国食品和药物管理局已经批准对那些通过口服药物没能充分控制糖尿病的人使用该药物。

src: It is injected before eating morning and evening meals as part of a combination treatment with oral drugs.
ref: 在进食早餐和晚餐之前注射，作为口服药物联合治疗的一部分。

src: The FDA said it could be approved as a stand-alone treatment if the drug companies can support such use with data.
ref: 美国食品和药物管理局表示，如果制药公司可以通过数据支持此类使用，它可以被批准为独立治疗。

src: Eli Lilly & Co. was the development partner in creation of the drug.
ref: Eli Lilly＆Co.是该药物的开发合作伙伴。

src: "With Byetta's demonstrated effects on blood sugar and its safety profile, physicians and patients now have a new approach to fight the growing diabetes epidemic," said Sidney Taurel, CEO of Lilly.
ref: Lilly首席执行官西德尼·陶瑞尔说：“鉴于比埃塔对血糖的影响及其安全性，医生和患者现在有了一种新的方法来对抗日益蔓延的糖尿病。”

src: Microsoft has extended the warranty on its Xbox 360 video game console to three years from the date of purchase following a large number of problems with the console and "an unacceptable number of repairs", costing the company more than one billion US dollars.
ref: 微软将Xbox360游戏机的保修期从购买之日起延长至3年，此前该游戏机出现了大量问题，“维修次数多得令人无法接受”，导致微软损失逾10亿美元。

src: The fault, which has been dubbed the "red ring of death", causes the console to fail completely.
ref: 这个被称为“红色死亡之环”的故障导致控制台完全失效。

src: In an open letter to owners of the Xbox 360, Peter Moore of Microsoft said, "As of today, all Xbox 360 consoles are covered by an enhanced warranty program to address specifically the general hardware failures indicated by the three flashing red lights on the console."
ref: 在一封致Xbox360用户的公开信中，微软的彼得・摩尔表示，“截至今日，Xbox360所有控制台都纳入了一项强化保修计划，专门针对控制台上三道红灯所显示的一般硬件故障。”

src: The extended warranty covers repairing and shipping of the console and the company has promised to reimburse those owners who have already had to pay for repairs.
ref: 延长保修期包括控制台的维修和运输，公司承诺偿还那些已经支付维修费用的用户。

src: Microsoft has not released details of the number of units that have suffered from the problem but has said it is "bigger than we are comfortable with".
ref: 微软尚未公布该问题所涉及的设备数量的细节，但表示“比我们所能接受的要多”。

src: The Xbox 360 was launched by Microsoft in 2005 and in January of this year the company lowered its sales expectations to 12 million units for the year ending June 2007.
ref: Xbox360于2005年由微软推出，今年1月，该公司将截至2007年6月的销售预期下调至1200万台。

src: Oregon State University (OSU) animal researchers in conjunction with the U.S. Department of Agriculture's (USDA) Dubois, Idaho-based Sheep Experiment Station released a report on an OSU-USDA study which was initiated in 1995 after breeders asked the government to determine why some rams bought as breeding studs showed no interest in females.
ref: 俄勒冈州立大学（OSU）动物研究人员与美国农业部（USDA）位于爱达荷州杜波依斯绵羊实验站联合发布了一份关于OSU-USDA研究的报告。该研究始于1995年，当时饲养员要求政府弄清楚为什么一些买来做种羊的公羊对雌性没有兴趣。

src: The researchers are working under a $2.8 million grant from the National Institutes of Health in hopes of developing a test which can determine the likelihood of a ram being female-oriented before it is sold as a stud.
ref: 研究人员获得了国家卫生研究院280万美元的资助，在进行相关研究，希望开发出一种测试方法，可以确定公羊在作为种羊出售之前是否对雌性感兴趣。

src: By studying difference in the animal's brains after slaughter, the study also showed what could be a biological determiner for what makes a ram male-oriented instead of female-oriented sexually.
ref: 通过研究动物屠宰后大脑的差异，研究还显示了什么可以成为生物决定因素，使公羊以雄性为导向而不是以雌性为导向的性行为。

src: The scientists' results showed that the anterior preoptic area of the rams' hypothalamus was 50 percent smaller in male-oriented rams as opposed to female oriented rams.
ref: 科学家的研究结果表明，公绵羊下丘脑的前视区比母绵羊小百分之50。

src: A 1991 study of human brains of AIDS victims showed a similar hypothalamus size difference between gay and heterosexual men.
ref: 1991年对艾滋病受害者的人类大脑进行的一项研究显示，同性恋和异性恋男性之间存在类似的下丘脑大小差异。

src: The sheep researchers postulate that low levels of aromatase hormones in the brain of a developing male sheep fetus may have kept the brain from fully masculinizing, leading to sexually male-oriented rams.
ref: 绵羊研究人员推断正在发育的雄性绵羊胎儿大脑中的芳香化酶激素水平低，可能使大脑更加完全雄性化，从而孕育出雄心倾向的公羊。

src: "This lends further support to the idea that homosexuality has biological underpinnings," Charles Roselli, a professor of physiology and pharmacology, said in an interview with the Corvallis Gazette-Times.
ref: 生理学和药理学教授查尔斯·罗塞利在接受《科瓦利斯公报时报》采访时说：“这进一步支持了同性恋具有生物学基础的观点。”

src: Professor Stormshak believes that "understanding sexual drives and the continuum of sexual behavior could possibly help explain the scientific basis of sexual assault [and] put an end to assertions that homosexuality is a lifestyle choice."
ref: 斯托姆沙克教授认为，“理解性冲动和性行为的连续性可能有助于解释性侵犯的科学基础，并终结同性恋是一种生活方式选择的断言。”

src: Multiple news agencies, including the New York Times and CNET yesterday suggested that a campaign operative for Sarah Palin, the Republican vice presidential candidate, worked on the Wikipedia article on her in the 24 hours before the vice presidential candidate was announced.
ref: 包括《纽约时报》和CNET在内的多家新闻机构昨日表示，共和党副总统候选人萨拉•佩林的一名竞选工作人员，在这位副总统候选人宣布参选的24小时前，曾在维基百科上撰写有关她的文章。

src: Wikinews has investigated the claim further, after seeing these allegations.
ref: 维基新闻在看到这些指控后进一步调查了这一说法。

src: The user who added the content on Wikipedia was known as Young Trigg, and Wikinews has learned that the account was created at exactly 08:02 UTC on August 28.
ref: 在维基百科上添加内容的用户被称为Young Trigg，而维基新闻已经知道该帐户是在8月28日08点02 UTC创建的。

src: Just eight minutes later the user made their first edit to Wikipedia.
ref: 仅仅八分钟后，用户首次编辑维基百科。

src: In this first edit the user said that Palin "briefly worked as a sports reporter for local Anchorage television stations, while also working as a commercial fisherman with her husband, Todd, her high school sweetheart".
ref: 这位用户在第一次编辑中说，佩林“曾短暂地在当地的安克雷奇电视台做过体育记者，同时也和她的丈夫、高中时的恋人托德一起做过商业渔民”。

src: In the second edit Palin and her family were described as "avid outdoors enthusiasts."
ref: 在第二次编辑中，佩林和她的家人被描述为“狂热的户外爱好者”。

src: This edit also said that "Sarah and her father would sometimes wake at three am to hunt moose before school, and the family would regularly run 5k and 10k races".
ref: 该编辑还说，“萨拉和她的父亲有时会在凌晨3点起床，赶在上学之前去猎鹿，他们全家会定期参加5公里和10公里的赛跑。”

src: Some of the other edits say that Sarah was "brought to statewide attention because of whistleblowing on ethical violations by state Republican Party leaders," she played in a "championship game despite a stress fracture in her ankle, hitting a critical free throw in the last seconds," and she won a "scholarship to help pay her way through college."
ref: 其他一些编辑说，萨拉“因为州共和党领导人对违反道德的行为的举报而引起全州的关注，”她参加了一场“冠军赛，尽管脚踝处有压力骨折，在最后几秒钟内打了一个关键的罚球，”她赢得了“帮助她完成大学学业的奖学金”。

src: Young Trigg also noted that "Palin holds a lifetime membership with the National Rifle Association".
ref: Young Trigg还指出，“佩林拥有全国步枪协会的终身会员资格”。

src: The editor also said that her election of mayor came "despite the lack of support from party leaders and being outspent by her Democratic opponent."
ref: 这位编辑还说，她当选市长是“尽管缺乏党内领导人的支持，而且她的民主党对手的开支也超过了她”。

src: Other positive claims added included the statement that "Palin successfully killed the Bridge to Nowhere project that had become a nationwide symbol of wasteful earmark spending".
ref: 其他正面的声明还包括“佩林成功地扼杀了‘通向虚无之桥’项目，该项目已经成为全国范围内浪费专项拨款的象征。”

src: Young Trigg also removed the sentence that said that "critics [of Palin] included the state Republican party's chairman, Randy Ruedrich, one of her fellow Oil & Gas commissioners".
ref: Young Trigg还删除了一句话，称“佩林的批评者包括州共和党的主席兰迪·鲁德里奇，她的同事之一的石油和天然气专员”。

src: This unusual editing pattern aroused some suspicion among other editors of Wikipedia.
ref: 这种不同寻常的编辑模式引起了维基百科其他编辑的怀疑。

src: One of these editors is Justen Deal, who told Young Trigg that "some of yours edits may have affected the article in such a way so as to reflect more favorably on the subject of the article."
ref: 其中一位编辑是贾斯廷·迪尔，他告诉Young Trigg“你的一些编辑可能会以这种方式影响文章，以便更好地反映文章的主题。”

src: Deal described his reason for suspecting a conflict of interest to a reporter for Wikinews.
ref: 迪尔向维基新闻的一名记者描述了他怀疑存在利益冲突的原因。

src: He said that "It was clear to me that an editor very familiar with Wikipedia and the governor had made a single-purpose account that had made a significant number of edits that were universally favorable to the subject of the article."
ref: 他说，“我很清楚，一位非常熟悉维基百科的编辑和州长创建了一个单一用途的账户，对文章的主题进行了大量普遍有利的编辑。”

src: "Given the fortuitous timing, it made sense to remind the editor of our conflict of interest guidelines".
ref: “考虑到这个偶然的时机，提醒编辑我们的利益冲突指导方针是有意义的”。

src: After this message was sent by Deal, Young Trigg said that "I will acknowledge that I volunteer for the McCain campaign."
ref: 在此消息由迪尔发送后，Young Trigg说：“我将承认我为麦凯恩竞选活动做志愿者。”

src: The user did however state that "I did not know Palin was the nominee when I made my edits," and "no one instructed me to make these edits."
ref: 然而，用户确实说“当我进行编辑时，我不知道佩林是被提名者”，并且“没有人指示我进行这些编辑。”

src: "I did this on my own 'becuz' I like improving Wikipedia articles".
ref: “这是我自己做的，因为我喜欢改进维基百科的文章。”

src: Young Trigg made a total of 43 contributions (many on talk pages) and announced they would retire from Wikipedia at 07:58 UTC on August 31.
ref: Young Trigg总共贡献了43篇文章（很多都在谈话页面上），并宣布他们将在8月31日UTC时间07点58退出维基百科。

src: In addition to editing the article on Sarah Palin, the user also asked an anonymous contributor to Wikipedia about that person's edit that stated that Palin was the VP nominee, before the official announcement:
ref: 除了编辑有关萨拉·佩林的文章外，这位用户还询问维基百科上一位匿名贡献者，在正式宣布佩林获得副总统提名之前，此人的编辑是这样说的。

src: Wikinews contacted the McCain campaign with a request for a statement regarding this issue; and, at the time of publication, had not received a response.
ref: 维基新闻与麦凯恩竞选团队联系，要求就这一问题发表声明；在发表时，没有收到任何回应。

src: Police briefly cordoned off Mile-End tube station in East London on Saturday morning.
ref: 周六早上，警方在东伦敦短暂封锁了Mile-End地铁站。

src: A man has been taken away and the alert has now been lifted.
ref: 一名男子已被带走，警报现已解除。

src: This is the latest of many security alerts in London, which is at a high state of alert.
ref: 这是伦敦最新的安全警报，目前伦敦处于高度警戒状态。

src: In the United Kingdom, television presenter Derek Batey has died at the age of 84.
ref: 在英国，电视节目主持人德里克·巴蒂去世，享年84岁。

src: Yesterday, ITV Border, the company for whom he used to work, said Batey died Sunday night in a hospice near his Lytham St Annes residence in Lancashire, England after experiencing a brief illness.
ref: 昨天，他曾供职的独立电视公司（ITV Border公司）表示，巴蒂在英国兰开夏郡利瑟姆圣安内斯住所附近的一家临终关怀机构短暂患病，于周日晚去世。

src: Batey, who was born in Brampton, Carlisle in 1928, was at one time a ventriloquist.
ref: 巴蒂1928年出生于卡莱尔的布兰普顿，曾经是一名口技表演者。

src: According to BBC News Online, Batey first worked in broadcasting for the BBC.
ref: 据BBC新闻在线报道，巴蒂最初在BBC从事广播工作。

src: He went on to work for Carlisle-based Border Television, which is now called ITV Border, from its inception in 1961.
ref: 从1961年成立以来，他继续为位于卡莱尔的BorderTelevision电视台工作，现在称为独立电视公司（ITV Border公司）。

src: He continued to work at the station for about 25 years, gaining the nickname 'Mr Border' as a result.
ref: 他继续在该电视台工作了大约25年，因此获得了“Border先生”的绰号。

src: Batey was notable for presenting the game show Mr. and Mrs., a format which he developed for Border Television after seeing a similar game show on Canadian television.
ref: 巴蒂是著名的游戏节目《先生和太太》（Mr.and Mrs.）的主持人，这是他在加拿大电视上看到类似的游戏节目后为Border tv开发的一种形式。

src: Batey presented 500 episodes of the TV programme, which tested married persons on their knowledge of their partners to see which which couple had the best knowledge of each other.
ref: 巴蒂主持了500集电视节目，测试了已婚人士对伴侣的了解程度，看哪对夫妇最了解对方。

src: At its peak in the 1970s, the programme achieved nine million viewers.
ref: 在20世纪70年代的巅峰时期，该节目的观众达到了900万。

src: Batey adapted the game show into a successful stage show which he presented 5000 times.
ref: 巴蒂将游戏节目改编成了一个成功的舞台表演，他展示了5000次。

src: Batey also presented a talk show called Look Who's Talking.
ref: 巴蒂还主持了一档名为《看谁在说话》的脱口秀节目。

src: Recalling the basis for the launch of the series, Batey said: "[T]here wasn't a lot of theatre in the Border area and we thought if we could bring the national names to Carlisle and invite the audiences in, it is a chance to see names where they couldn't see elsewhere, so we did that."
ref: 回忆起该系列节目的推出背景，巴蒂说：“Border地区的剧院并不多，我们认为如果我们能把国家的名字带到卡莱尔，邀请观众进去，这是一个机会，让他们看到在别处看不到的名字，所以我们做到了。”

src: Both Mr. and Mrs. and Look Who's Talking were originally regional programmes and were later broadcast across the ITV Network, Batey reported.
ref: 巴蒂报道说，《先生和太太》（Mr.and Mrs.）和《看谁在说话》最初都是地区性节目，后来在ITV网络上播出。

src: Harry King, a former colleague and friend of Derek Batey, described him as "a proud Cumbrian [...] a people person and was never happier than when he was talking to people."
ref: 德里克·巴蒂的前同事兼朋友哈里·金形容他是“一个骄傲的坎布里亚人……”他是个善于交际的人，从来没有比与人交谈时更快乐。

src: "He could be talking to the Queen or the person next door".
ref: “他可以和女王或隔壁的人交谈”。

src: King described Mr. and Mrs. as "iconic" and said Batey "would always let the people he was talking to take the limelight".
ref: 金将《先生和太太》（Mr.and Mrs.）描述为“标志性的”，并说巴蒂“永远会让他谈话的人成为人们关注的焦点”。

src: ITV News Border reporter Matthew Taylor said Batey "will leave a lasting legacy in this region".
ref: ITV新闻边境记者马修・泰勒表示，巴蒂“将在该地区留下永久的遗产”。

src: Chicago peace activist and musician Malachi Ritscher burned himself alive Friday morning (Nov. 3, 2006) on the Kennedy Expressway, apparently in protest of the Iraq war.
ref: 芝加哥和平活动家和音乐家马拉奇·里查于周五早晨（2006年11月3日）在肯尼迪高速公路上自焚，显然是为了抗议伊拉克战争。

src: Police found a homemade sign near his body which said "Thou Shalt Not Kill."
ref: 警方在他的尸体附近发现了一个自制的牌子，上面写着“不得杀人”。

src: Before the act, he posted a suicide note on his website.
ref: 在此之前，他在自己的网站上发布了遗书。

src: The United Kingdom Parliament is planning to expand the powers of bailiffs in pursuit of unpaid debts.
ref: 英国议会正计划扩大执行官的权力，以追究未偿还的债务。

src: While the new measures are not yet officially active, bailiffs are expected to soon be able to use force in entering debtors' homes and restraining them.
ref: 虽然新措施尚未正式实施，但执行官预计很快就能够使用强制力进入债务人的家园并限制他们。

src: The preemptive crackdown was introduced with predictions of hundreds of thousands of British citizens losing their homes to credit companies as the international financial crisis grows worse.
ref: 这场先发制人的打击行动，是基于随着国际金融危机愈演愈烈，预测将有数十万英国公民的住房会被信贷公司夺走。

src: Previous to the proposed laws, bailiffs were not allowed to break into or enter homes unless the debtor was already there, or as a last resort.
ref: 在拟议的法律之前，执行官不得闯入或进入民宅，除非债务人已经在那里，或作为最后手段。

src: Justice Lord Bach stated the Act would not be made active until after Parliament had finished extensive consulting, and that the new powers of bailiffs would be carefully monitored.
ref: 巴赫勋爵表示，在议会完成广泛的咨询之后，该法案才会生效，并且将严格监督执行官的新权力。

src: Civil rights activists like Paul Nicolson of the Zacchaeus 2000 Trust, however, have heavily criticized the new laws, accusing them of destroying fundamental civil rights and stripping away "tried and tested protections that make a person's home his castle and which have stood for centuries".
ref: 然而，像扎凯2000信托基金的保罗•尼科尔森这样的民权活动人士，对这些新法律提出了严厉批评，指责它们破坏了公民的基本权利，剥夺了“久经考验的保护措施，这些保护措施使一个人的家成为他的城堡，而且屹立了数百年”。

src: A government spokesman said the Parliament was considering its options for implementing the new laws and would make an announcement soon.
ref: 一名政府发言人表示，议会正在考虑实施新法律的方案，并将很快宣布。

src: Sir Alan Sugar will continue to front the BBC series The Apprentice after his appointment as "enterprise tsar" for the British government.
ref: 艾伦·休格爵士被任命为英国政府的“企业冠军”后，将继续主持BBC电视剧集“学徒”。

src: Sugar will return as host for the sixth series in the spring of next year.
ref: 休格将在明年春季作为第六个系列赛的主持人回归。

src: Sugar was previously being pushed to choose between the roles.
ref: 休格之前被迫在自身扮演的角色之间做出选择。

src: The BBC released a statement saying that "The BBC is satisfied that [Sir Alan's] new role as an Enterprise Champion to the government will not compromise the BBC's impartiality or his ability to present The Apprentice."
ref: BBC发表声明称，“BBC很满意，艾伦爵士作为政府企业冠军的新角色不会损害BBC的公正性，也不会损害他在‘学徒’中的演出能力。”

src: Critics have raised concerns over Sir Alan holding both roles.
ref: 批评人士对艾伦爵士同时担任这两个角色表示担忧。

src: They commented that they have stated that it would breach the BBC's impartiality rules.
ref: 他们评论说，他们已经表示会违反BBC的公正性规则。

src: The Conservatives said that it would be impossible for him to continue both roles.
ref: 保守党说，他不可能继续担任这两个角色。

src: They added the fact that the next series is due to start during the build up to a possible General Election.
ref: 他们补充说，实际上，下一个系列预定在可能举行大选的准备期间开始。

src: On Friday, the 189 Parties to the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT) agreed to a final resolution calling for steps toward the banning of weapons of mass destruction (WMD) in the Middle East.
ref: 周五，“不扩散核武器条约”（NPT）的189个缔约方同意最终决议，呼吁采取步骤，在中东禁止大规模杀伤性武器。

src: The resolution directs United Nations Secretary-General Ban Ki-Moon to organize a conference of all the Middle East states.
ref: 该决议指示联合国秘书长潘基文组织所有中东国家的会议。

src: The resolution singles out Israel, calling on "all states in the Middle East that have not yet done so to accede to the treaty as non-nuclear weapon states so as to achieve its universality at an early date."
ref: 该决议点名以色列，呼吁“中东所有尚未这样做的国家作为无核武器国家加入该条约，以便早日实现其普遍性。”

src: In an official statement from the Prime Minister's Office, Israel said the resolution, "is deeply flawed and hypocritical."
ref: 以色列在总理办公室的官方声明中表示，该决议“存在严重缺陷和虚伪”。

src: "It ignores the realities of the Middle East and the real threats facing the region and the entire world."
ref: “它忽视了中东的现实以及该地区和整个世界面临的真正威胁。”

src: The statement went on to state, "[the resolution] singles out Israel, the Middle East's only true democracy and the only country threatened with annihilation."
ref: 声明还说，“【该决议】特别指出以色列是中东唯一真正的民主国家，也是唯一面临毁灭威胁的国家。”

src: "Yet the terrorist regime in Iran, which is racing to develop nuclear weapons and which openly threatens to wipe Israel off the map, is not even mentioned in the resolution."
ref: “然而，该决议中甚至没有提到伊朗的恐怖主义政权，该政权正在竞相发展核武器并公开威胁要将以色列从地图上抹去。”

src: An Arab-backed proposal for a WMD-Free zone in the Middle East, supported in 1995 by the NPT Conference, was never acted upon.
ref: 阿拉伯支持的在中东建立无大规模毁灭性武器区的建议在1995年得到《不扩散条约》会议的支持，但从未付诸行动。

src: As a non-signatory state, Israel is not bound by any resolutions of the NPT.
ref: 作为一个非签署国，以色列不受“不扩散核武器条约”任何决议的约束。

src: The two dominant parties of Pakistan's National Assembly have united in a coalition to impeach President Pervez Musharraf.
ref: 巴基斯坦国民议会的两个主要政党，联合起来弹劾总统佩尔韦兹·穆沙拉夫。

src: The decision was announced by party leaders Asif Ali Zardari, widower of former premier Benazir Bhutto, and Nawaz Sharif, with the parties aiming for a successful no-confidence vote against President Musharraf.
ref: 两党领导人，身为前总理贝娜齐尔·布托鳏夫的阿西夫·阿里·扎尔达里与纳瓦兹·谢里夫宣布了这一决定，双方的目标是成功地对穆沙拉夫总统进行不信任投票。

src: The impeachment process is planned to start within the following week.
ref: 弹劾程序计划在下一周内开始。

src: There have been concerns that an attempt at impeachment would result in a detrimental political battle in a country already facing political instability.
ref: 有人担心，企图弹劾将会为已经面临政治不稳定的国家带来有害的政治斗争。

src: A senior member of a party allied with Musharraf stated that the impeachment would "open a Pandora's box" regarding Pakistan's future.
ref: 与穆沙拉夫结盟的一个党的高级成员表示，弹劾将“打开关于巴基斯坦未来的潘多拉盒子”。

src: Once the impeachment process begins, the coalition will need to muster a required two-thirds majority in order to successfully impeach Musharraf.
ref: 一旦弹劾程序开始，联合政府将需要获得三分之二的多数票才能成功弹劾穆沙拉夫。

src: Musharraf has little support in the National Assembly, as most of his political allies were defeated in the February elections.
ref: 由于穆沙拉夫的大多数政治盟友在今年2月的选举中被击败，他在巴基斯坦国民议会所能得到的支持很少。

src: If the coalition is successful, Musharraf will be the first president in Pakistan's sixty-one year history to have been impeached.
ref: 如果联盟成功，穆沙拉夫将成为巴基斯坦六十一年历史上第一位被弹劾的总统。

src: Musharraf has canceled his trip to the Beijing Olympics so that he can focus on planning a response to the coalition.
ref: 穆沙拉夫取消了他的北京奥运之旅，以便他可以集中精力策划对联盟的回应。

src: Successfully defeating the impeachment will depend largely on the support of the military, for which he acted as chief until international pressure forced him to step down a year ago.
ref: 成功地挫败弹劾案将在很大程度上取决于军方的支持，在国际压力迫使他一年前下台之前，他一直担任军方领导人。

src: Other options Musharraf may explore include declaring a state of emergency, which could aid him in getting the support of the military, or dissolving parliament, though this would likely lead to political chaos.
ref: 穆沙拉夫可能寻求的其他选择包括宣布国家进入紧急状态，这可能有助于他获得军方的支持，或者解散议会，尽管这可能会导致政治混乱。

src: Italian Prime Minister Silvio Berlusconi is in San Raffaele Hospital overnight in Milan following an assault during an autograph session at the end of a rally.
ref: 意大利总理西尔维奥·贝卢斯科尼在米兰的圣拉斐尔医院过夜，此前他在集会结束后的一次签名活动中遭到袭击。

src: The 73 year-old media mogul received a punch in the face from an assailant who police named as 42 year-old Massimo Tartaglia, a local man who has been undergoing mental health treatment for ten years.
ref: 这位73岁的媒体大亨受到一名袭击者的当面一拳，袭击者是世卫组织警察，名叫42岁的马西莫·塔尔塔利亚，他是当地一名接受心理健康治疗10年的男子。

src: Tartaglia was holding a replica of Milan's famous Domo Cathedral as he struck the premier; the composition of the replica is unknown, but eyewitnesses suggest it may have been made from marble, iron or another heavy material.
ref: 塔尔塔利亚在袭击总理时，手里拿着米兰著名的多莫大教堂的复制品，该复制品的组成尚不清楚，但目击者表示，它可能是由大理石、铁或其他重材料制成的。

src: The assailant is currently in custody at a police station somewhere in Milan; police have confirmed he has no prior criminal record.
ref: 袭击者目前在米兰的某个警察局被拘留，警方已证实他之前没有犯罪记录。

src: The attack on Berlusconi left him requiring treatment for damage to his mouth, a broken nose, cuts to his face and, according to reports from BBC News, at least two broken teeth.
ref: 对贝卢斯科尼的袭击使他需要治疗，因为他的嘴巴受损，鼻子骨折，脸部受伤，据BBC新闻报道，至少有两颗牙齿断了。

src: This is not the only attack Berlusconi has received; several years ago a man hit him with a tripod, leaving him with a cut to his forehead.
ref: 这不是贝卢斯科尼收到的唯一攻击，几年前，一名男子用三脚架击中他，让他的前额受伤。

src: UN Secretary General Kofi Annan will formally present a plan this morning to the UN General Assembly when it meets in New York later today.
ref: 联合国秘书长科菲·安南将于今天晚些时候在纽约会晤时向联合国大会正式提出一项计划。

src: The plan, entitled In Larger Freedom, is part of the UN's attempt to revitalise itself during its sixtieth anniversary year.
ref: 这项名为“更大自由”的计划，是联合国在其成立60周年之际重振自身的努力的一部分。

src: If implemented, this plan will be the largest change ever to the international body, calling for the addition of nine members to the Security Council, and for the creation of a new Human Rights Council to replace the 53-member Human Rights Commission.
ref: 如果这项计划得到执行，这将是这个国际机构有史以来最大的变化，它要求增加安全理事会的9个成员，并要求设立一个新的人权理事会来取代由53个成员组成的人权委员会。

src: The Canadian ambassador to the UN, Allan Rock, was the first diplomat to officially respond by saying, "A lot of hard work lies ahead but we are optimistic."
ref: 加拿大驻联合国大使艾伦·洛克是第一位正式回应的外交官，他说：“未来还有很多艰苦的工作，但我们很乐观。”

src: Oxfam, Amnesty International, and other NGOs, have come out in support of the plan.
ref: 乐施会、大赦国际和其他非政府组织都支持这项计划。

src: On Thursday the 22nd of March, 2005, Anna Ayala, a woman from Las Vegas, claimed to have found a human finger in her bowl of chili at a Wendy's restaurant located at 1405 Monterey Highway, just south of downtown San Jose, California, owned by Fresno-based Jern Management..
ref: 2005年3月22日星期四，来自拉斯维加斯的一名妇女安娜·阿亚拉声称在位于加利福尼亚州圣何塞市南部1405蒙特利高速公路的，归弗雷斯诺旗下的杰恩管理公司所有的温迪餐厅的辣椒碗里发现了一根人类手指。

src: The finger, which probably belonged to a woman as it had a long and manicured fingernail, did not belong to any of the restaurant employees.
ref: 手指不是任何餐厅员工的，可能是某个女性的，因为它有修长而且修剪整齐的指甲。

src: The food supplies were seized by officials to be traced back to its manufacturers, while the restaurant was permitted to open again later with chili prepared from fresh ingredients.
ref: 食品供应被官员查封，追溯至生产厂家。随后，这家餐厅获准重新开业，供应用新鲜配料烹制的辣椒。

src: Australian Capital Territory — Thousands of Canberrans took a look at the new Cotter Dam on the Cotter River on open day on Sunday.
ref: 澳大利亚首都领地——周日的开放日，数千名堪培拉人参观了位于科特河上的新科特大坝。

src: The public was given limited access to the still-active construction site.
ref: 公众只能有限地进入仍然在建的建筑工地。

src: Buses took viewers from the car park below to top of the dam wall.
ref: 公共汽车将观众从下面的停车场带到了水坝墙的顶部。

src: They ran every 15 minutes from 8:30 am to 4:00 pm.
ref: 他们从早上8：30到下午4：00每15分钟一班。

src: The dam is to supply fresh water to the city of Canberra.
ref: 大坝将为堪培拉市供应淡水。

src: This is to provide water security for the city as droughts become more frequent due to global warming.
ref: 这是为了提供城市的水安全，因为全球变暖导致干旱变得更加频繁。

src: It is a gravity dam, which holds back the waters through sheer mass.
ref: 它是一个重力坝，通过绝对质量阻挡水域。

src: In addition to the main dam, there are two saddle dams filling depressions in the landscape so flood waters flow over the spillway and not out the sides of the lake.
ref: 除了主坝，还有两座鞍状大坝填满了洼地，这样洪水就会流经溢洪道，而不会从湖岸流出。

src: The dam on the Cotter River has been under construction for four years.
ref: 科特河上的大坝已建了四年。

src: These are to be replanted to replace the native flora.
ref: 这些植物将被重新种植以取代当地的植物群。

src: The dam replaces an old dam, first built in 1911 but subsequently expanded several times.
ref: 这座大坝取代了一座建于1911年但后来扩建了好几次的旧大坝。

src: Now heritage listed, it has been submerged by the waters of the new dam.
ref: 现在列入遗产，它已被新大坝的水域淹没。

src: Some materials were salvaged from the old dam to build the new, and some have been put on display.
ref: 一些材料是从旧坝上打捞来的用来建造新大坝，有些已经展出。

src: The river is named after Garrett Cotter, an Irish-born convict who was transported to Australia and lived in the area in the 1830s and 1840s.
ref: 这条河以爱尔兰出生的罪犯加勒特·科特的名字命名。19世纪三四十年代，他被流放到澳大利亚，住在这里。

src: Heavy rains in Indonesia yesterday triggered widespread flooding and landslides across the nation.
ref: 昨天印度尼西亚的暴雨引发了全国范围内的大洪水和山体滑坡。

src: It has emerged that last night a bridge was swept away by the swollen river it stretched across, leaving around 40 to 50 people missing in Madiun, East Java.
ref: 昨晚，东爪哇省马迪翁一座桥被泛滥的河水冲走，造成约40至50人失踪。

src: Meanwhile, the total toll of those known or feared to be dead has reached 130.
ref: 与此同时，已知或可能死亡的人数已达130人。

src: According to local police chief Supardi in a telephone conversation with Xinhua the flood waters weakened a foundation, resulting in the collapse.
ref: 据当地警方局长苏帕迪在与新华社的电话交谈中说，洪水冲垮了地基，导致房屋倒塌。。

src: At least twenty motorcyclists, car drivers and passengers are thought to be dead, but as of midnight, no bodies had been recovered.
ref: 据信至少有20名摩托车手、汽车司机和乘客死亡，但截至午夜，尚未发现尸体。

src: Continuing heavy rain forced the search to be abandoned temporarily.
ref: 持续的大雨迫使搜寻工作暂时停止。

src: Java as a whole is the worst affected island; in addition to the bridge collapse most of the landslides occurred in two Central Java districts.
ref: 总的来说，爪哇是受影响最严重的岛屿，除了大桥垮塌，大部分滑坡发生在爪哇岛中部的两个地区。

src: Health ministry official Rustam Pakaya told reporters that at least 28,000 people have been forced to abandon their homes in central Java, although exact figures are not yet available.
ref: 印尼卫生部官员鲁斯塔姆・帕卡亚对记者说，爪哇中部至少有2万8千人被迫离开家园，不过目前还没有确切的数字。

src: The Red Cross commented that 45,000 East Javanese people have been similarly displaced.
ref: 红十字会评论说，有45,000名东爪哇人同样流离失所。

src: Thousands are seeking shelter in mosques and other public buildings.
ref: 数千人正在清真寺和其他公共建筑中寻求庇护。

src: Landslides buried houses and made roads impassable, while hundreds police officers, military personnel, local officials and volunteers have been digging with farm tools and even their hands to search for survivors.
ref: 山体滑坡掩埋了房屋，道路无法通行，数百名警察、军事人员、地方官员和志愿者一直在用农具甚至双手挖掘，寻找幸存者。

src: Heavy machinery is available but the road conditions have prevented it arriving at the areas where it is required.
ref: 可以使用重型机械，但道路条件阻止了它到达需要的区域。

src: Jakarta has dispatched aid in the form of five tonnes of biscuits and instant meals, ten tonnes of baby food and multiple boats.
ref: 雅加达已经发放了5吨饼干和速食，10吨婴儿食品和多艘船的援助。

src: This brings the total confirmed death toll in the area to 48.
ref: 这使得该地区确认的死亡人数达到48人。

src: He said that most bodies were recovered from three metre deep mud and required heavy digging machinery to retrieve.
ref: 他说，大多数尸体是在三米深的泥土中找到的，需要重型挖掘机械才能找到。

src: Local resident Siswo told AFP "Suddenly I felt my house shaking, and I thought it was an earthquake."
ref: 当地居民Siswo告诉法新社“突然间我觉得我的房子在颤抖，我以为这是地震。”

src: "When I got outside, I saw that the houses next to mine were already covered by earth," and that it struck twelve neighbouring houses.
ref: “当我到外面的时候，我看见我旁边的房子已经被土覆盖了，”它击中了邻近的十二座房子。

src: In the next district, Wonogiri, disaster management centre head Sri Mubadi told reporters they had retrieved two more bodies, reaching a total of six, with eleven more missing.
ref: 在下一个地区沃诺吉里，灾难管理中心负责人穆巴迪对记者说，他们又找到了两具尸体，总共6具，还有11具失踪。

src: He also confirmed that they currently have no access to heavy equipment.
ref: 他还证实，他们目前无法获得重型设备。

src: In Tawangmangu about 1,000 rescuers were also searching for bodies and survivors without the aid of heavy machinery.
ref: 在达旺曼古，大约1000名救援人员也在没有重型机械帮助的情况下搜寻尸体和幸存者。

src: Islamic cleric Abu Bakar Bashir toured a Karanganyar village, at which time he commented that he felt the disaster had been caused as a form of divine revenge, saying "This was likely caused by immoral acts going on here," and "This could be a lesson to be learned."
ref: 伊斯兰神职人员阿布·巴卡尔·巴希尔视察了卡兰加亚尔的一个村庄，他当时评论说，他觉得这场灾难是作为一种神圣的报复而造成的，他说，“这很可能是这里正在发生的不道德行为造成的”，“这可能是一个值得吸取的教训。”

src: The 69-year-old served two years after being linked to the 2002 Bali bombings, before having his conviction overturned last year.
ref: 现年69岁的他在2002年巴厘岛爆炸案中被控两年后服刑，去年他的罪名被推翻。

src: For five consecutive years landslides and floods have occurred in Java, claiming many lives.
ref: 连续五年，爪哇发生了山体滑坡和洪水，夺走了许多人的生命。

src: The main trigger is ecological destruction caused by deforestation, forest conversions and chaotic spatial planning, Chalid told Reuters.
ref: Chalid告诉路透社，主要的触发因素是森林砍伐，森林改造和混乱的空间规划造成的生态破坏。

src: There have been no adequate efforts by the government to protect the people from disasters.
ref: 政府没有做出足够的努力来保护人民免受灾害。

src: When the landslides happened officials were on holiday and there was no access of heavy equipment to the affected areas.
ref: 当发生山体滑坡时，官员正在度假，并且没有重型设备进入受影响地区。

src: West Indies have beaten England by 15 runs in the first Twenty20 international of their tour of England at The Oval, London, England.
ref: 西印度群岛在伦敦椭圆球场以15分的优势击败了英格兰队，这是西印度群岛首次派对参加在英国举办的国际性二十20比赛。

src: The West Indian innings started off badly by losing Gayle early, however they turned their fortunes around with some attacking and aggressive cricket and posted a huge total of 208.
ref: 攻方西印度群岛的击球局一开始就很糟糕并且盖尔被罚出局，然而他们在打出了一些攻击性和侵略性的比赛后扭转了他们的命运，总共得了208分。

src: A bigger total could have been posted if it had not been for a late innings batting collapse.
ref: 如果不是因为最后的击球局失利，这个总分可能会更高。

src: England started their reply by getting off to a flyer, but lost some early wickets that slowed down the run-rate.
ref: 英格兰队开始以飞击进行反击，但由于过早错失了几次三柱门，以致减慢了得分的节奏。

src: Leading the charge was Paul Collingwood with a fast 79 with 5 4's and 4 6's.
ref: 在比赛中冲锋陷阵的是保罗·柯林伍德，以54's and 46's的速度快速得了79分。

src: Had they not have lost the early wickets, England would have probably won the match to take a 1-0 lead in the series.
ref: 要不是他们错失了早先的几次三柱门，英格兰很可能会赢得这场比赛，在系列赛中以1-0领先。

src: Instead, it is West Indies that have taken a 1-0 lead in the series.
ref: 相反，西印度群岛在系列赛中以1-0领先。

src: The prosecutor did not withhold complains for "simple" and "severe" physical harm by negligence against gendarmes Poget and Deiss in the trial of the Aubonne Bridge affair.
ref: 检察官没有对奥邦桥事件审判中警察Poget和Deiss因疏忽造成的“简单”和“严重”身体伤害提出申诉。

src: A jawbone found in Aruba is not that of missing American Natalee Holloway, who was a recent high school-graduate at the time of her disappearance.
ref: 在阿鲁巴发现的颚骨不是失踪的美国人娜塔莉·霍洛威的颚骨，她失踪时刚从高中毕业。

src: Officials confirmed the news after Dutch scientists completed tests on the bone.
ref: 在荷兰科学家完成对骨头的检测后，官方证实了这一消息。

src: The jawbone, which also had a wisdom tooth with it, was found by an American tourist close to the Phoenix Hotel.
ref: 颚骨上也有一颗智齿，是凤凰酒店附近的美国游客发现的。

src: A second bone had also been found by another tourist earlier this month.
ref: 本月早些时候，另一名游客也发现了第二块骨头。

src: The bone was sent to the Netherlands Forensic Institute where scientists completed tests.
ref: 骨头被送到荷兰法医学院，科学家在那里完成了测试。

src: They compared the bone to dental records given to them by Natalee's father, from which they confirmed the the bone was not that of Natalee, although it was human.
ref: 他们把这块骨头和娜塔莉的父亲给他们的牙齿记录进行了比较，并从中确认这块骨头不是娜塔莉的，尽管它是人的。

src: It was said to be unlikely that the bone was Holloway's as there is no physical evidence that she was murdered.
ref: 据说这块骨头不太可能是霍洛威的，因为没有实物证据表明她是被谋杀的。

src: Taco Stein, the Aruban Solicitor General, released a statement after the announcement was made.
ref: 阿鲁巴总检察长塔科·斯坦在声明发布后发表了一份声明。

src: He commented on the speed of the identification; he said that they had quickly ruled out Holloway because her records had shown that she had her wisdom teeth previously removed.
ref: 他评论了鉴定的速度，他说，他们很快就排除了霍洛威的可能性，因为她的记录显示，她的智齿之前被拔掉过。

src: Last week, Naked News announced that it would dramatically increase its international language mandate to news reporting, with three new broadcasts.
ref: 上周，《裸体新闻》宣布，将大幅增加新闻报道的国际语言授权，增加三家新的广播公司。

src: Already reporting in English and Japanese, the global organization is launching Spanish, Italian, and Korean-language programs, for television, the web, and mobile devices.
ref: 该组织已经用英语和日语进行报道，正在推出用于电视，网络和移动设备的西班牙语，意大利语和韩语语言程序。

src: Wikinews interviewed one of the English broadcast's anchors a little while ago, about the program.
ref: 不久之前，维基新闻关于这个节目采访了一位英语广播的主持人。

src: The broadcasts feature daily news and human interest pieces, presented by an anchor who gradually removes their clothing.
ref: 这些节目以每日新闻和人文新闻为特色，主持人会逐渐脱掉他们的衣服。

src: The internationally-focused newscast created a stir upon its launch in 1999, but has since expanded with online viewers in 172 nations.
ref: 这部聚焦国际的新闻节目在1999年开播时就引起了轰动，但自那以后，它的网络观众遍及172个国家。

src: Naked News President David Warga commented in a press release that "our intention at Naked News is to be a global media source, much like CNN or BBC World."
ref: 《裸体新闻》总裁大卫·瓦尔加在一份新闻稿中说：“我们创办《裸体新闻》的目的是成为一个全球性的媒体来源，就像CNN或BBC一样。”

src: "We are looking forward to expanding into other languages as well, because there is definitely a market demanding our brand of infotainment."
ref: “我们也期待着扩展到其他语言，因为市场肯定要求我们的信息娱乐品牌。”

src: Unlike the foreign stations run by the BBC or CNN, the international broadcasts will not be produced by the company.
ref: 与英国广播公司或美国有线电视新闻网运营的外国电台不同，这些国际广播不会由该公司制作。

src: Branding and practices will be licensed to the other production and distribution companies.
ref: 品牌和实践将授权给其他生产和分销公司。

src: Warga claims that, instead of presenting the naked female form as "fluff-head bimbos", their news organization "encourages society to see women as being smart, powerful, and sophisticated."
ref: 沃加称，他们的新闻机构“鼓励社会把女性视为聪明、强大和成熟的女性”，而不是把裸体女性形象描绘成“愚蠢的荡妇”。

src: Despite this, the press release lists hotel rooms as being one of the primary distribution methods; hotels account for a large segment of the pornography industry's broadcast market.
ref: 尽管如此，新闻稿还是将酒店客房列为主要的分销方式之一，酒店占色情行业广播市场的一大部分。

src: South Africa crashed out of the 2011 Cricket World Cup after being beaten by New Zealand in the quarterfinals, played at Mirpur, in Bangladesh.
ref: 南非队在孟加拉国米尔布尔举行的四分之一决赛中被新西兰击败后，在2011年板球世界杯中惨遭淘汰。

src: Chasing a victory target of 222, South Africa were all out for 172 after some inspired bowling performance by Jacob Oram and Nathan McCullum.
ref: 在雅各布·奥拉姆和内森·麦库勒姆做出一些精彩的而又振奋人心的投球后，南非队一路狂得172分，最后以222分赢得比赛胜利。

src: Earlier South Africa restricted the kiwis for 221 for the loss of 8 wickets.
ref: 早些时候，南非以让其错失8个三柱门的战绩限制了新西兰人不到221分。

src: Afterward, Jesse Ryder top scored for NZ with 83 runs while Ross Taylor scored 43.
ref: 之后，杰西・莱德为新西兰队得了83分高居第一，而罗斯・泰勒得到了43分。

src: Morne Morkel took three wickets while fast bowler Steyn and Spinner Imran Tahir took two wickets each.
ref: 莫恩·默克尔拿下了三次三柱门，而快速投球手斯廷和旋转手伊姆兰·塔希尔各拿下了三次三柱门。

src: South Africa collapsed from 121 for three wickets and lost the final seven wickets for 51 runs.
ref: 南非队以三次三柱门从121分开始崩盘，最后以51分丢掉了最后的七次三柱门。

src: McCullum, who opened the bowling for NZ, took three wickets while Oram took another four wickets and triggered a collapse.
ref: 麦卡勒姆首先为新西兰开始投球，他拿下了3次三柱门，而奥兰拿下了另外4次三柱门，并导致对手崩溃。

src: NZ will now play either Srilanka or England in the semi-finals.
ref: 新西兰队现在将在半决赛中迎战斯里兰卡或英格兰队。

src: Oil has risen to a new all-time record high during trading in Asia, passing US$91.10 at 10:23 p.m. on October 25 (eastern time).
ref: 在亚洲的交易中，石油价格创下了历史新高，在东部时间10月25日晚10点23分超过91.10美元。

src: In electronic trading at the NYMEX Crude Futures in the United States touched a record price of, at US$92.22, according to Bloomberg, setting another record all-time high.
ref: 据彭博社报道，纽约商品交易所美国原油期货的电子交易价格创下了历史新高，达到92.22美元。

src: On the IntercontinentalExchange Brent Crude futures reached US$89.30 (basis December) as of 8:34 a.m..
ref: 截至上午8：34，洲际交易所布伦特原油期货价格达到89.30美元（12月基准价格）。

src: NYMEX Crude closed at $91.86, while ICE Brent closed at $88.69, at the conclusion of Friday's trading.
ref: 纽约商品交易所原油期货周五收盘报91.86美元，洲际交易所布伦特原油期货周五收盘报88.69美元。

src: The raise come when the United States announced that it had an "unexpected loss" in the nation's stockpile of oil.
ref: 当美国宣布其石油储备“意外损失”时，油价上涨。

src: The fear that Turkey may launch a large scale attack on Kurdish Militants inside Iraq is also being blamed for the raise in prices and the U.S. imposed more sanctions on Iran for continuing to enrich uranium.
ref: 由于担心土耳其可能会对伊拉克境内的库尔德武装分子发动大规模袭击，油价上涨也被归咎于这种担忧，而美国也因伊朗继续浓缩铀而对其实施了更多制裁。

src: Australia's Commonwealth Banks states that the raise is "being supported by an increase in geopolitical tensions and also market developments."
ref: 澳大利亚联邦银行表示，此次加息“得到了地缘政治紧张局势加剧和市场发展的支持”。

src: "The US has announced that it is imposing new sanctions on Iran, Oil markets also continued to have an eye on developments related to the current tensions between Turkey and Kurd rebels in Iraq."
ref: “美国已宣布对伊朗实施新的制裁，石油市场也继续关注土耳其与库尔德叛乱分子目前在伊拉克的紧张关系。”

src: OPEC has agreed that by November 1, 2007, they will increase the amount of barrels of oil they produce by 500,000 barrels a day.
ref: 欧佩克已经同意，到2007年11月1日，他们将把石油日产量提高50万桶。

src: The U.S. says that they would like that number increased.
ref: 美国表示他们希望这个数字增加。

src: Just two weeks after China sent global markets into a tumble, growing worries about sub-prime mortgage lenders in the United States are sending jitters through stock exchanges around the globe.
ref: 就在中国令全球市场陷入动荡的两周后，对美国次级抵押贷款机构的担忧日益加剧，令全球各地的证券交易所都感到不安。

src: The three major US stock market indices each fell two percent from Monday's closing price, marking the second-biggest loss of 2007.
ref: 美国三大股市指数均较周一收盘价下跌百分之2，创下2007年第二大跌幅。

src: London's FTSE 100, Paris' CAC 40 and Frankfurt's DAX 30 indices each closed down more than 1 percent.
ref: 伦敦的FTSE 100，巴黎的CAC 40和法兰克福的DAX 30指数均下跌超过百分之1。

src: As the Mortgage Bankers Association reported that late payments on mortgages and home foreclosures in the US homes rose in the fourth quarter to their highest level in years, investors are concerned that not only US banks but also multi-national banks around the globe could have exposure.
ref: 美国抵押贷款银行家协会报告称，去年第四季度，美国住房抵押贷款逾期付款和房屋止赎上升至多年来的最高水平。与此同时，投资者担心，不仅是美国的银行，全球各地的跨国银行也可能面临风险敞口。

src: More than two dozen sub-prime lenders have closed or sold operations as defaults on those mortgages have risen.
ref: 随着次级抵押贷款违约上升，20多家次级抵押贷款机构已经关闭或出售了业务。

src: The delinquencies and defaults have started to soar, said Nicolas Retsinas, director of Housing Studies at Harvard University.
ref: 哈佛大学住房研究主任尼古拉斯·雷齐纳斯说，拖欠和违约已经开始飙升。

src: A lot of these lenders started to make loans and lost track of some of the fundamentals.
ref: 许多贷款机构开始发放贷款，并失去了一些基本面的线索。

src: New Century Financial Corporation, the second largest sub-prime lender in the US, has recently revealed that its creditors were no longer providing funds and, further, it has become subject of an SEC investigation.
ref: 美国第二大次级贷款机构新世纪金融公司最近披露，其债权人不再提供资金，并已成为美国证交会调查的对象。

src: The New York Stock Exchange has said it will delist New Century.
ref: 纽约证券交易所已表示将退市新世纪。

src: Accredited Home Loan Lending, another major sub-prime mortgage specialist, said it was seeking fresh capital and waivers on its lending covenants.
ref: 另一家主要的次级抵押贷款专业机构“合格住房贷款公司”表示，它正在寻求新的资本，并在贷款契约上寻求豁免。

src: Sub-prime lenders provide mortgages to people who do not qualify for loans from mainstream lenders, typically due to their credit histories.
ref: 次级贷款人向不符合主流贷款人贷款条件的人提供抵押贷款，通常是由于他们的信用记录。

src: The lenders then bundle these mortgages as collateral for loans that they obtain from other financing firms, such as GMAC.
ref: 然后，贷款机构将这些抵押贷款打包，作为从GMAC等其它金融公司获得贷款的抵押品。

src: Such firms can then repackage these loans and sell them as mortgage-backed securities.
ref: 然后，这些公司可以重新包装这些贷款并将其作为抵押贷款支持证券出售。

src: These securities may end up in the hands of major multi-national banks such as Citibank, HSBC, and Commerzbank.
ref: 这些证券可能最终落入花旗银行，汇丰银行和德国商业银行等主要跨国银行的手中。

src: Each level of lending assumes a level of financial risk, but trouble can arise when the risk tolerances are exceeded.
ref: 每个级别的贷款都会产生一定程度的财务风险，但是当超出风险承受能力时会出现问题。

src: If too many homeowners default on their mortgages, the sub-prime lender can end up defaulting.
ref: 如果太多房主拖欠抵押贷款，次级贷款人可能最终违约。

src: If too many of these lenders default, as it is feared may be happening now, the defaults can cascade upward.
ref: 如果这些贷款机构中有太多出现违约，人们担心这种情况现在可能正在发生，违约可能会一级级上升。

src: While no one is predicting major bank failures at this point, it is feared that their profits could be hurt.
ref: 虽然目前没有人预测会有大型银行倒闭，但人们担心它们的利润可能受到影响。

src: Thursday at Madrid–Barajas Airport, Wikinews interviewed Spanish Paralympic swimmer Marta Gomez, who is scheduled to compete at the 2013 IPC Swimming World Championships that start on Monday in Montreal, Canada.
ref: 周四在马德里巴拉哈斯机场，维基新闻采访了西班牙残奥会游泳选手玛尔塔·戈麦斯，她将参加周一在加拿大蒙特利尔举行的2013年国际残奥委会游泳世锦赛。

src: This is Laura Hale, I'm interviewing Marta Gómez, a Spanish Paralympic swimmer going to the 2013 IPC Swimming World Championships in Montreal.
ref: 我是劳拉·黑尔，正在采访参加2013年蒙特利尔国际残奥委会游泳世锦赛的西班牙残奥会游泳运动员玛塔·戈麦斯。

src: Are you going to Montreal and what strokes and distances are you competing in?
ref: 你要去蒙特利尔吗，你要参加什么泳姿和距离的比赛？

src: A controversial development training course called "Landmark Forum" is cited in religious discrimination lawsuits in United States federal courts in New York and Washington, D.C.
ref: 在纽约和华盛顿特区的美国联邦法院提起的宗教歧视诉讼中，提到了一门名为“里程碑论坛”的有争议的发展培训课程。

src: The seminars are run by a San Francisco, California-based for-profit training company called Landmark Education.
ref: 这些研讨会是由一家位于加利福尼亚旧金山的盈利性培训公司运营的，名为里程碑教育。

src: The company evolved from Erhard Seminars Training "est", and has faced criticism regarding its techniques and its use of unpaid labor.
ref: 该公司从艾哈德研讨会培训“est”发展而来，并因其技术和无偿劳动的使用而受到批评。

src: The sperm bank and surrogacy company Los Angeles-based Growing Generations is named as a defendant in the New York lawsuit, and the Democratic political action committee Twenty-First Century Democrats is a defendant in the Washington, D.C. case.
ref: 总部位于洛杉矶的精子银行和代孕公司“成长的一代”在纽约的诉讼中被列为被告，21世纪的民主党政治行动委员会在华盛顿的案件中被列为被告。

src: In separate lawsuits filed in the United States District Court for the Southern District of New York in Manhattan, New York, and in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia in Washington, D.C., former employees are suing their employers for monetary damages and claiming religious discrimination after their employers allegedly mandated that they attend courses at Landmark Education.
ref: 在纽约曼哈顿纽约南部地区的美国地方法院和华盛顿哥伦比亚特区的美国地方法院分别提起的诉讼中，前雇员正在起诉他们的雇主，要求赔偿经济损失，并声称在雇主强制他们参加里程碑教育的课程后，他们受到了宗教歧视。

src: In the US$3 million federal lawsuit filed in New York, Scott Glasgow is suing his former employer Growing Generations and its CEO Stuart Miller.
ref: 在纽约提起的300万美元的联邦诉讼中，斯科特·格拉斯哥起诉了他的前雇主、成长一代和首席执行官斯图尔特·米勒。

src: Growing Generations maintains sperm banks and also arranges surrogacy for gay couples who wish to have children.
ref: 成长一代经营精子库，并为希望生孩子的同性恋夫妇安排代孕。

src: The company has offices in New York and Los Angeles, and has done business with celebrities including actor B. D. Wong of Law & Order: SVU.
ref: 该公司在纽约和洛杉矶设有办事处，并与包括法律与秩序：SVU的演员B·D·王在内的名人做过生意。

src: Glasgow was marketing director of Growing Generations, and claims he was fired in June 2007 after refusing to continue attending Landmark Education seminars.
ref: 格拉斯哥是成长一代的营销总监，并声称他在拒绝继续参加里程碑教育研讨会后于2007年6月被解雇。

src: Glasgow is also suing for sexual harassment, and claims Miller came on to him in September 2006.
ref: 格拉斯哥也在起诉性骚扰，并声称米勒于2006年9月向他求助。

src: He made approximately $100,000 per year as the company's marketing director, and was the company's only employee based out of New York City.
ref: 他作为公司的营销总监每年赚大约10万美元，并且是公司在纽约市以外唯一的员工。

src: "I want them to stop imposing Landmark on the employees, and I want an apology," said Glasgow in a statement in The Village Voice.
ref: 格拉斯哥在乡村之声的一份声明中说：“我希望他们不再对员工强加里程碑，我希望他们道歉。”

src: Brent Pelton, one of Glasgow's attorneys, stated that: "The Landmark philosophy is deeply ingrained in the culture of the company".
ref: 格拉斯哥律师之一布伦特佩尔顿表示：“里程碑哲学在公司文化中根深蒂固”。

src: Glasgow said that the Landmark Education training courses were "opposite" to his Christian beliefs.
ref: 格拉斯哥说，里程碑教育培训课程与他的基督教信仰“相反”。

src: According to Glasgow he was questioned by Miller in May 2007 after he walked out of a Landmark Education course, and was fired shortly thereafter.
ref: 据格拉斯哥的消息，2007年5月，米勒在结束了一门里程碑教育课程后，对他进行了讯问，并在不久后被解雇。

src: We stand by the allegations contained in the complaint and we look forward to proving them at trial, said Pelton in a statement to ABC News.
ref: 佩尔顿在给ABC新闻的一份声明中表示，我们支持投诉中包含的指控，我们期待在审判中证明这些指控。

src: Ian Wallace, an attorney who represents Growing Generations, claimed that Glasgow wasn't fired but walked away from his position.
ref: 代表成长一代的律师伊恩华莱士声称，格拉斯哥没有被解雇，而是离开了他的位置。

src: Growing Generations and Mr. Miller are very confident that these claims will be dismissed ultimately, and there's no factual basis for them whatsoever, said Wallace in a statement to The Village Voice.
ref: 华莱士在乡村之声的一份声明中表示，成长一代和米勒先生非常有信心这些说法最终会被驳回，并且没有任何事实根据。

src: Lawyers representing Growing Generations and Stuart Miller declined comment to The New York Post, and did not immediately return a message from ABC News.
ref: 代表成长一代的律师和斯图尔特·米勒拒绝对纽约邮报发表评论，并没有立即回复ABC新闻的消息。

src: In Glasgow's complaint, entered into federal court record on April 18, he asserts that Landmark Education constitutes a "religion", and "perceived their philosophy as a form of religion that contradicted his own personal beliefs".
ref: 在4月18日提交联邦法院备案的格拉斯哥诉状中，他声称，里程碑教育构成了一种“宗教”，并“将其哲学视为一种与他个人信仰相抵触的宗教形式”。

src: He states that when he was promoted to Director of Marketing, he asked Miller if he could stop attending the Landmark sessions but was told that they were mandatory for all of the company's executives and that Landmark is "very much the language of the company."
ref: 他说，当他被提升为市场总监时，他问米勒是否可以停止参加这些里程碑会议，但米勒告诉他，这些会议对公司所有高管都是强制性的，里程碑会议“在很大程度上是公司的语言”。

src: Glasgow said his performance at the company was assessed based on how he was "touching, moving and inspiring" others, a phrase from the Landmark philosophy, as opposed to his business accomplishments at the company.
ref: 格拉斯哥表示，他在公司的表现是基于他如何“触动，感动和鼓舞”他人来评估的，这是里程碑哲学的一句话，而不是他在公司的商业成就。

src: The complaint claims that the actions of Miller and Growing Generations violated Federal, New York State and New York City civil rights laws.
ref: 诉状称，米勒和成长一代的行为违反了联邦，纽约州和纽约市的民权法。

src: The lawsuit filed in federal court in Washington, D.C. deals with a separate plaintiff and company, but the plaintiff in the suit also claims that religious discrimination took place for allegedly being mandated to attend Landmark Education courses.
ref: 在华盛顿特区联邦法院提起的诉讼涉及另一名原告和一家公司，但原告还声称，宗教歧视是由于被强制参加里程碑教育课程。

src: Kenneth Goldman is suing the United States Democratic political action committee Twenty-First Century Democrats (also 21st Century Democrats) and its former executive director Kelly Young.
ref: 肯尼思・高德曼起诉美国民主党政治行动委员会二十一世纪民主党人（也是21世纪民主党人）及其前执行董事凯莉扬。

src: Goldman was formerly the communications director of 21st Century Democrats.
ref: 高德曼曾是21世纪民主党的传播主管。

src: According to Goldman's complaint, three employees of 21st Century Democrats were fired after refusing to attend the Landmark Forum course.
ref: 根据高德曼的投诉，21世纪民主党的三名员工在拒绝参加里程碑论坛课程后被解雇。

src: The complaint asserts that Landmark Education has "religious characteristics and theological implications" which influenced the mission of 21st Century Democrats and the way the organization conducted business.
ref: 该投诉称，里程碑教育具有“宗教特征和神学意义”，影响了21世纪民主党的使命和组织开展业务的方式。

src: Goldman's complaint states that in addition to himself, a training director and field director were also fired after they made it clear they would not attend the Landmark Forum.
ref: 高德曼的投诉称，除了他自己之外，培训主管和现场主管在明确表示他们不会参加里程碑论坛后也被解雇了。

src: Goldman says executive director Young infused Landmark Education jargon terms into staff meetings such as "create possibilities", "create a new context", and "enroll in possibilities".
ref: 高德曼表示，执行董事杨将里程碑教育术语术语融入员工会议，如“创造可能性”，“创造新环境”和“注入可能性”。

src: He also claims that Young "urged" staff members to participate in Landmark Education events outside of the workplace, drove employees to and from Landmark functions, and used funds from 21st Century Democrats to pay for employees to attend those functions.
ref: 他还声称，杨“敦促”工作人员参加工作场所以外的里程碑教育活动，驱使员工往返里程碑职能部门，并利用21世纪民主党人的资金支付员工参加这些职能。

src: Goldman's complaint asserts that he was discriminated against in violation of the District of Columbia Human Rights Act.
ref: 高德曼的投诉称，他因违反哥伦比亚特区人权法案而受到歧视。

src: In a statement in The Washington Times, the executive director of 21st Century Democrats, Mark Lotwis, called the lawsuit "frivolous" and said: "we're going to defend our organization's integrity".
ref: 在《华盛顿时报》的一份声明中，21世纪民主党的执行董事马克·洛特维斯称这起诉讼“毫无意义”，并表示：“我们将捍卫我们组织的诚信。”

src: Landmark Education spokeswoman Deborah Beroset said that the Landmark Forum "is in no way religious in nature and any claim to the contrary is simply absurd," and stated: "While we are not a party to this lawsuit and have no firsthand knowledge of it, we can only assume that we are being used as a legal and political football to further the plaintiff's own financial interests."
ref: 里程碑教育发言人黛博拉·贝罗塞特说，地标性论坛“根本不是宗教性质的，任何相反的说法都是荒谬的，”并表示：“虽然我们不是这场诉讼的当事人，也没有第一手的资料，但我们只能假设，我们是被当作一场法律和政治足球，来推进原告自己的经济利益。”

src: The New York lawsuit was filed April 14, and is still in early filing stages.
ref: 纽约诉讼于4月14日提起，目前仍在提交申请阶段。

src: A conference with the federal court judge in the case has been scheduled for June 17.
ref: 该案件的联邦法院法官会议定于6月17日召开。

src: The Washington, D.C. suit began in November 2007, and entered mediation this past March.
ref: 华盛顿特区的诉讼始于2007年11月，并于今年3月进入调解阶段。

src: As of April 15 the parties in the case were due back to court on July 11 to update the court on the mediation process.
ref: 截至4月15日，该案件的当事人于7月11日返回法院，就调解程序向法院提交最新情况。

src: Landmark Education is descended from Erhard Seminars Training, also called "est", which was founded by Werner Erhard.
ref: 里程碑教育是由沃纳·埃哈德创立的埃哈德研讨会培训，又称est发展而来的。

src: est began in 1971, and Erhard's company Werner Erhard and Associates repackaged the course as "The Forum" in 1985.
ref: est始于1971年，1985年，埃哈德的公司沃纳·埃哈德及其同事将该课程重新包装为“论坛”。

src: Associates of Erhard bought the license to his "technology" and incorporated Landmark Education in California in 1991.
ref: 埃哈德的合伙人购买了他的“技术”许可证，并于1991年在加利福尼亚州注册了里程碑教育。

src: This is not the first time employees have sued claiming mandatory attendance at "Forum" workshops violated their civil rights.
ref: 这不是员工第一次起诉声称强制参加“论坛”研讨会，侵犯了他们的公民权利。

src: In a lawsuit filed in December 1988 in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Georgia, eight employees of DeKalb Farmers Market in Decatur, Georgia sued their employer claiming their religious freedom and civil rights were violated when they were allegedly coerced into attending "Forum" training sessions.
ref: 在1988年12月在佐治亚州北区美国地方法院提起诉讼时，乔治亚州迪凯特的迪卡尔布农民市场的八名雇员起诉他们的雇主声称他们的宗教自由和民权受到侵犯，据称他们被强迫参加“论坛”培训课程。

src: Many of these training programs, particularly at large corporations, claim to be purely psychological, aimed at improving productivity and morale and loyalty.
ref: 许多这些培训计划，特别是大公司，声称纯粹是心理学，旨在提高生产力，士气和忠诚度。

src: But in fact they are religious, said University of Denver religious studies professor Carl Raschke in a statement to The Wall Street Journal.
ref: 但实际上他们是宗教信仰，丹佛大学宗教研究教授卡尔・拉什克在给华尔街日报的一份声明中说。

src: The DeKalb Farmers Market employees were represented by lawyers for the American Civil Liberties Union.
ref: 迪卡尔布农贸市场的雇员由美国公民自由联盟的律师代表。

src: Consulting Technologies Inc., an affiliate of Transformational Technologies Inc., was named as a party in the lawsuit.
ref: 咨询技术公司，转型技术公司的附属公司，被列为诉讼的一方。

src: Transformational Technologies was founded by Werner Erhard, and was not named as a party in the suit.
ref: 转型技术公司由沃纳·埃哈德创立，并没有被列为诉讼当事人。

src: The "Forum" course that the employees claimed they were mandated to attend was developed by Werner Erhard and Associates.
ref: 员工们声称他们被要求参加的“论坛”课程是由沃纳·埃哈德和他的同事们开发的。

src: Employees said that they were fired or pressured to quit after they objected to the Forum courses.
ref: 员工表示，他们在反对论坛课程后被解雇或被迫辞职。

src: The workers claimed that the Forum course contradicted with their religious beliefs.
ref: 工人声称论坛课程与他们的宗教信仰相矛盾。

src: The plaintiffs in the suit included adherents of varying religious backgrounds, including Christianity and Hinduism.
ref: 诉讼中的原告包括不同宗教背景的信徒，包括基督教和印度教。

src: "It's like brainwashing," said Dong Shik Kim, one of the plaintiffs in the case.
ref: “这就像洗脑，”本案原告之一金东植说。

src: The plaintiffs said they lost their jobs after objecting to a "new age quasi-religious cult" which they said was developed by Werner Erhard.
ref: 原告称，他们是在反对沃纳•埃哈德发展的“新时代准宗教崇拜”之后丢掉工作的。

src: The DeKalb Farmers Market denied the allegations, and an attorney for the company Edward D. Buckley III told The Wall Street Journal that employees were encouraged, not coerced, to attend the training sessions.
ref: 迪卡尔布农民市场否认了这些指控，该公司的律师爱德华·D·巴克利三世告诉“华尔街日报”，员工受到鼓励，而不是被强迫参加培训课程。

src: According to The Wall Street Journal, The Forum said it would not sanction workers being coerced to attend its training sessions.
ref: 据“华尔街日报”报道，该论坛表示不会批准工人被迫参加培训课程。

src: The parties in the DeKalb Farmers Market religious discrimination case came to a settlement in May 1989, and the case was dismissed with prejudice in June.
ref: 迪卡尔布农民市场宗教歧视案的当事人于1989年5月达成和解，该案于6月被驳回。

src: The terms of the out-of-court settlement were not made public, but the employees' attorney Amy Totenberg told The Wall Street Journal that the case "has made employers come to grips with the legitimate boundaries of employee training".
ref: 庭外和解的条款尚未公开，但雇员的律师艾米·托滕伯格告诉《华尔街日报》，此案“让雇主开始认真对待员工培训的合法界限”。

src: According to Title VII of the Civil Rights Act of 1964, employers must "reasonably accommodate" their employees' religious beliefs unless this creates "undue hardship".
ref: 根据1964年“民权法案”第七章，雇主必须“合理地容纳”其雇员的宗教信仰，除非这会造成“过度的困难”。

src: In September 1988, the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission issued a policy-guidance notice which stated that New Age courses should be handled under Title VII of the Act.
ref: 1988年9月，平等就业机会委员会发布了一份政策指导通知，其中规定新时代课程应根据该法第七章处理。

src: According to the Commission, employers must provide "reasonable accommodation" if an employee challenges a training course, unless this causes "undue hardship" for the company.
ref: 根据委员会的说法，如果雇员挑战培训课程，雇主必须提供“合理的调解”，除非这会给公司带来“不必要的困难”。

src: In October 2006, Landmark Education took legal action against Google, YouTube, the Internet Archive and a website owner in Queensland, Australia in attempts to remove criticism of its products from the Internet.
ref: 2006年10月，里程碑教育对谷歌、YouTube、互联网档案馆和澳大利亚昆士兰的一家网站所有者采取了法律行动，试图从互联网上删除对其产品的批评。

src: The company sought a subpoena under the Digital Millennium Copyright Act in an attempt to discover the identity of an anonymous critic who uploaded a 2004 French documentary of the Landmark Forum to the Internet.
ref: 该公司根据“数字千年版权法案”寻求传票，试图查明一名匿名评论家的身份。这名评论家在2004年将里程碑论坛的一部法国纪录片上传到互联网上。

src: The Electronic Frontier Foundation represented the anonymous critic and the Internet Archive, and Landmark withdrew its subpoena in November 2006 in exchange for a promise from the anonymous critic not to repost the video.
ref: 电子前沿基金会代表匿名评论家和互联网档案馆，里程碑于2006年11月撤回其传票，以换取匿名评论家不转发视频的承诺。

src: Landmark Education itself has come under scrutiny for its controversial labor practices.
ref: 里程碑教育因其有争议的劳动实践而受到审查。

src: The company has been investigated by the United States Department of Labor in separate investigations originating out of California, Colorado, and Texas.
ref: 该公司已经在加利福尼亚州、科罗拉多州和德克萨斯州分别接受了美国劳工部的调查。

src: Investigations focused on the heavy reliance of unpaid labor in the company's workforce, which Landmark Education calls "assistants" and deems volunteers.
ref: 调查的重点是公司的劳动力严重依赖无偿劳动力的情况，里程碑教育称之为“助手”并认为是志愿者。

src: Labor based out of Colorado found that activities performed by Landmark Education's "assistants" include: "office, clerical, telephone solicitation and enrollment, as well as greeting customers, setting up chairs, handling microphones during the seminars and making coffee."
ref: 科罗拉多州的劳工组织发现，里程碑教育公司的“助理”们所从事的活动包括：“办公室、文员、电话招揽和登记，以及问候顾客、摆好椅子、在研讨会期间处理麦克风和煮咖啡。”

src: "Additionally, a number of volunteers actually teach the courses and provide testimonials during and after the courses."
ref: “此外，一些志愿者实际上教授课程，并在课程期间和课程结束后提供推荐书。”

src: The Colorado investigation's 1996 report found that "No records are kept of any hours worked by any employees."
ref: 科罗拉多调查的1996年报告发现，“没有记录任何员工工作的任何时间。”

src: According to a 1998 article in Metro Silicon Valley: "In the end the Department of Labor dropped the issue, leaving Landmark trumpeting about its volunteers' choice in the matter."
ref: 根据Metro硅谷1998年发表的一篇文章：“最终劳工部放弃了这个问题，让里程碑大肆宣传其志愿者在此事上的选择。”

src: Metro Silicon Valley reported that Landmark Education at the time employed 451 paid staff, and also utilized the services of 7,500 volunteers.
