ref: Metro硅谷报道，里程碑教育当时雇用了451名付薪员工，并利用了7,500名志愿者的服务。

src: After an investigation into Landmark Education's labor practices by the U.S. Dept.Labor's offices out of California, the company was deemed to have overtime violations.
ref: 在美国加州劳工部对里程碑教育公司的劳工行为进行调查后，该公司被认定存在违反加班规定的行为。

src: According to the Department of Labor's 2004 report on the investigation, back wages of $187,569.01 were found due to 45 employees.
ref: 根据美国劳工部2004年的调查报告，，发现拖欠了45名员工187,569.01美元的薪金。

src: Labor in Texas which concluded in 2005 stated: "Minimum wage violation found."
ref: 2005年德克萨斯州工党做出结论表示：“发现最低工资违规。”

src: "Volunteers (Assistants) are not paid any wages for hours worked while performing the major duties of the firm."
ref: “在履行公司的主要职责时，志愿者（助理）在工作时间内没有得到任何工资。”

src: "The assistants set up rooms, call registrants, collect fees, keep stats of classroom data/participants, file, they also are answering phones, training and leading seminars."
ref: “助理们设置房间，呼叫注册人，收取费用，保存教室数据和参与者的统计数据，文件，他们还接听电话，培训和领导研组织讨会。”

src: Landmark Education agreed to pay back wages for the overtime violation, but did not comply with the overtime violation found by the U.S. Dept.
ref: 里程碑教育同意支付加班费，但不服从承认美国部门发现的加班费违规行为。

src: Landmark Education denied that the "assistants" are employees, though the Department of Labor report concluded: "Interviews reveal that the employees are taking payments, registering clients, billing, training, recruiting, setting up locations, cleaning, and other duties that would have to be performed by staff if the assistants did not perform them."
ref: 里程碑教育否认这些“助理”是雇员，尽管劳工部的报告总结道：“采访显示，这些雇员在收取报酬、注册客户、记账、培训、招聘、设立地点、打扫卫生，以及其他一些工作，如果这些助理不履行这些职责，员工就必须履行这些职责。”

src: According to the 2004 investigative report by Pièces à Conviction in the "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" program, Landmark Education was investigated by the French government in 1995.
ref: 根据PiècesàConviction在2004年的“Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous”项目中的调查报告，里程碑教育于1995年被法国政府调查。

src: In the "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" program volunteers were filmed through a hidden camera and shown performing duties for Landmark Education in France including manning phones, recruitment and financial work for the company, and one volunteer was shown cleaning a toilet.
ref: 在“Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous”项目中，志愿者通过一个隐藏的摄像机拍摄，并展示了法国里程碑教育的职责，包括为公司配备电话，招聘和财务工作，并且一名志愿者被要求清洁厕所。

src: Le Nouvel Observateur reported that after "Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous" aired in France, labor inspectors investigated Landmark Education's use of unpaid volunteers.
ref: Le Nouvel Observateur报道称，在法国播出的“Voyage au pays des nouveaux gourous”之后，劳动监察员调查了里程碑教育对无偿志愿者的使用情况。

src: According to Le Nouvel Observateur, one month after the labor investigation took place the French branch of the company had disbanded.
ref: 根据Le Nouvel Observateur的说法，劳工调查发生一个月后，该公司的法国分公司解散了。

src: A former "Introduction Leader" to the Landmark Forum, Lars Bergwik, has recently posted a series of videos to YouTube critical of the company and its practices.
ref: 作为里程碑论坛的前“引言负责人”，拉尔斯•伯格威克最近向YouTube上发布了一系列视频，批评该公司及其做法。

src: Bergwik appeared on a 2004 investigative journalism program on Sweden's Channel 4, Kalla Fakta (Cold Facts).
ref: 伯格威克参加了2004年瑞典第4频道冷酷的事实的调查性新闻节目。

src: According to Bergwik, after the Kalla Fakta program on Landmark Education aired, "Landmark left Sweden".
ref: 据伯格威克说，在冷酷的事实的里程碑教育项目播出后，“里程碑离开了瑞典”。

src: Two people were killed and two others were seriously injured yesterday when a boulder collapsed onto a house in the German town of Stein an der Traun, south-east of Munich.
ref: 昨天，当一块巨石倒塌在慕尼黑东南部德国小镇Stein an der Traun的一所房子里时，两人死亡，另外两人受重伤。

src: A family of four were said to have been watching television together in the lounge when a large lump of rock, about 50 tons, broke off from a 50 foot cliff above the house.
ref: 据说四口之家一共在休息室看电视时，一块大约50吨的大块岩石从房子上方50英尺的悬崖上脱落。

src: The boulder fell from about 15 metres above the residence and landed on top of the house, crushing it.
ref: 巨石从住宅上方约15米处落下，落在房屋顶部，将其碾碎。

src: The cause of the rock fall is unknown, but police have said that there had been no prior signs that the cliff was unstable.
ref: 岩石坠落的原因尚不清楚，但警方已经说过，先前没有迹象显示悬崖不稳定。

src: The accident, which happened at approximately 1940 local time, killed a 45-year-old father and his 18-year-old daughter.
ref: 这起事故发生在当地时间约19：40，造成一名45岁的父亲和他18岁的女儿死亡。

src: A 40-year-old mother and her 16-year-old son were seriously injured and were taken to hospital for treatment, after a rescue operation that lasted into the early hours of the following morning.
ref: 一位40岁的母亲和她16岁的儿子严重受伤，在一次持续到第二天凌晨的救援行动后被送往医院治疗。

src: The task involved up to 250 rescue personnel, some with sniffer dogs.
ref: 这项任务涉及多达250名救援人员，其中一些人带有搜救犬。

src: An official from the international humanitarian movement the Red Cross said "[w]e made contact with them early on and kept talking with them through the night as we pulled away at the debris."
ref: 红十字会的国际人道主义运动官员说：“我们很早就与他们取得联系，并在我们撤离残骸时整夜与他们交谈。”

src: Joachim Herrmann, the Bavarian Interior Minister, spoke of his thoughts about the incident.
ref: 巴伐利亚内政部长约阿希姆·赫尔曼谈到了他对这一事件的看法。

src: I have never seen anything like this, he was quoted as saying.
ref: 引用他的话说：“我从未见过这样的事。”

src: The European Space Agency (ESA) reported on Friday that the Wilkins Shelf, an enormous Antarctic ice shelf half the size of Scotland, could break away from the continent very soon.
ref: 欧洲航天局（ESA）周五报道称，威尔金斯陆架是一个巨大的南极冰架，是苏格兰面积的一半，可能很快就会脱离非洲大陆。

src: According to reports, only a thin strip of ice connects it to the Charcot Island, and cracks are expanding rapidly.
ref: 据报道，只有一条薄薄的冰带连接到夏科岛，裂缝迅速扩大。

src: This is the largest shelf of ice so far to have disintegrated in the Antarctic.
ref: 到目前为止，这是迄今为止在南极洲解体的最大冰架。

src: In February 2008, the shelf lost 425 square kilometres (164 square miles) of ice, followed by a loss of another 62 square miles in May 2008.
ref: 2008年2月，冰架上的冰减少了425平方公里（164平方英里），随后在2008年5月又减少了62平方英里。

src: During the last year the ice shelf has lost about 1800 square kilometers (694 square miles), or about 14 percent of its size, said Angelika Humbert from the Institute of Geophysics at University of Münster in Germany.
ref: 德国明斯特大学地球物理研究所的安吉丽卡·亨伯特表示，去年冰架已损失约1800平方公里（694平方英里），约占其面积的14％。

src: Scientists say that the shelf, if it detaches from the mainland, won't cause an increase in sea levels, as it is already floating.
ref: 科学家表示，如果冰架与大陆分离，它将不会导致海平面上升，因为它已经浮动。

src: Most scientists believe that the incident is further evidence of global warming.
ref: 大多数科学家认为这一事件是全球变暖的进一步证据。

src: Average temperatures in the Antarctic peninsula have increased by about 2.5 degrees Celsius (3.8 degrees Fahrenheit) in the past fifty years.
ref: 在过去的五十年里，南极半岛的平均气温上升了约2.5摄氏度（3.8华氏度）。

src: King Abdullah of Saudi Arabia has announced women will be allowed to vote in the country and run for municipal elections there.
ref: 沙特阿拉伯国王阿卜杜拉宣布，将允许妇女在该国投票并参加那里的市政选举。

src: Abdullah made this announcement at the start of a new Shura Council term.
ref: 阿卜杜拉在一个新的舒拉委员会任期开始时宣布这一消息。

src: In a speech, the king said "we refuse to marginalise women in society in all roles that comply with sharia" and so made the decision "to involve women in the Shura Council as members, starting from next term".
ref: 在一次演讲中，国王说：“我们拒绝将社会上所有符合伊斯兰教法的角色的女性边缘化”，因此决定“从下一届开始，让女性成为舒拉议会的成员”。

src: Abdullah clarified that female adults "will be able to run as candidates in the municipal election and will even have a right to vote."
ref: 阿卜杜拉澄清说，成年女性“将能够作为候选人参加市政选举，甚至将有投票权。”

src: Such changes are to be put in place "according to Islamic principles," he said.
ref: 他说，这些变化将根据伊斯兰原则实施。

src: Muslim women, he continued, "must not be marginalised in opinion or advice".
ref: 他继续说，穆斯林妇女“绝不能在意见或建议中被边缘化”。

src: Activists have sought women's right to vote in Saudi Arabia for years.
ref: 多年来，积极分子一直在寻求女性在沙特阿拉伯投票的权利。

src: As it stands, women in Saudi Arabia cannot drive, nor travel without male permission, based on Sunni Islam principles.
ref: 根据逊尼派伊斯兰教的原则，沙特阿拉伯的妇女不能驾驶，也不能在没有男性许可的情况下旅行。

src: Apple Inc. today has introduced the much-anticipated iPhone at the Macworld Conference in San Francisco.
ref: 苹果公司今天在旧金山的麦客世界大会上发布了备受期待的苹果手机。

src: The iPhone is claimed to be "a revolutionary mobile phone" as stated on the Apple website.
ref: 据称苹果网站上称苹果手机为“革命性手机”。

src: The device appears to be running a mobile version of the Apple operating system Mac OSX.
ref: 该设备似乎正在运行苹果操作系统Mac OSX的移动版本。

src: It is approximately the same size as a 5th generation iPod, it has a 3.5-inch LCD touchscreen display that is used to access all features of the phone including number dial, as well as making phone calls.
ref: 它的大小与第五代iPod差不多，有一个3.5英寸的液晶触摸屏，用于访问手机的所有功能，包括拨号和打电话。

src: The iPhone plays music, movies, displays pictures and is able to connect to a wireless network.
ref: 苹果手机播放音乐，电影，显示图片，并能够连接到无线网络。

src: Apple CEO Steve Jobs unveiled the device by walking onto the stage and taking the iPhone out of his jeans pocket.
ref: 苹果首席执行官史蒂夫·乔布斯走上舞台，将苹果手机从牛仔裤口袋中取出，从而推出了该设备。

src: During his 2 hour speech he stated that "Today Apple is going to reinvent the phone, We are going to make history today".
ref: 在他2个小时的演讲中，他表示“今天苹果将重塑手机，我们今天将创造历史”。

src: Today Apple also released their Media Center device - Apple TV.
ref: 今天苹果也发布了他们的媒体中心设备-Apple TV。

src: It will directly compete with Microsoft's Media Center operating system.
ref: 它将直接与微软的媒体中心操作系统竞争。

src: Apple has taken a different approach to the media center market; rather than storing content (such as movies, music and photos) on the device, Apple TV connects to a computer (Mac and Windows) over a wirless network connection and plays all content stored on that computer.
ref: 苹果对媒体中心市场采取了不同的方法，苹果TV不是在设备上存储内容（如电影、音乐和照片），而是通过无线网络连接连接到计算机（Mac和Windows），并播放存储在该计算机上的所有内容。

src: This makes it substantially easier for users to organize their media content.
ref: 这使得用户更容易组织他们的媒体内容。

src: Thirty-four Indonesian fisherman have been jailed in Broome in northern Western Australia (WA) for illegal fishing offences.
ref: 34名印尼渔民因非法捕鱼罪在西澳大利亚州（WA）布鲁姆被捕。

src: Seven of the 34 have been jailed in Australia before for previous fishing offences.
ref: 34人中有7人曾因之前的捕鱼罪在澳大利亚被监禁。

src: Their vessels were found hiding in mangroves off the Kimberley coast.
ref: 发现他们的船只藏在金伯利海岸附近的红树林中。

src: The fisherman were found in possession of nearly two tonnes of trochus shell, a shell valued for fashioning into high quality buttons, beads and trinkets.
ref: 这名渔民被发现拥有近两吨重的特罗科斯贝壳，这种贝壳可以用来制作高质量的纽扣、珠子和小饰品。

src: The WA Fisheries Department says the jail terms reflect the seriousness with which the offence is being viewed.
ref: 西澳大利亚州渔业部表示，监狱条款反映了对犯罪行为的严肃性。

src: Department officer Chris Mitchell says the fishermen had traversed 200 miles of Commonwealth waters and were inside the three nautical mile state limit when they were caught.
ref: 部门官员克里斯米切尔说，这些渔民已经穿越了200英里的英联邦水域，当他们被抓住时，他们在三海里的国家限制范围内。

src: He says their actions are a serious breach of fisheries laws.
ref: 他说他们的行为严重违反了渔业法。

src: "In the early days, the courts would have given a good behaviour bond for a first offender", he said.
ref: 他说：“在早期，法院会为第一个罪犯提供守行保释令”。

src: That was more specifically for the traditional sail-powered vessels, not these motorised vessels that are coming down and because these are in state waters it is far more serious.
ref: 那更具体地说是传统的帆船动力船，而不是那些正在下降的机动船，因为这些船在州水域中更为严重。

src: On Thursday, skippers of 11 Indonesian fishing boats were fined by a Perth court.
ref: 星期四，11艘印度尼西亚渔船的船长被珀斯法院罚款。

src: Three of the men, who had previous convictions, were fined $15,000 each, with 100 days to pay.
ref: 其中三人之前有前科，每人被罚款1.5万美元，罚款期限为100天。

src: The remaining eight were fined $9000 each and given 60 days to pay.
ref: 其余八人每人被罚款9000美元，并有60天的时间支付罚款。

src: The captains were fined between $9,000 and $15,000 for fishing and taking trochus shell from Australian waters off the north-west coast last month.
ref: 这两名船长上个月在澳大利亚西北海岸附近水域捕鱼并拿走了圆锥形贝壳，因此被处以9000美元至1.5万美元不等的罚款。

src: Three of the captains have been caught fishing in Australian waters before between 1997 and 2004.
ref: 其中三名船长在1997年至2004年之间曾在澳大利亚水域捕鱼被抓。

src: Legal Aid lawyer David McKenzie, says the fishermen were very poor and it was highly unlikely they would be able to pay the fines.
ref: 法律援助律师大卫麦肯齐说，渔民非常贫穷，他们极不可能支付罚款。

src: The magistrate ordered that they spend between 60 and 100 days in jail in Western Australia if the fines were not paid.
ref: 如果没有支付罚款，地方法官命令他们在西澳大利亚州的监狱中度过60至100天。

src: The independent and nonpartisan US congressional watchdog, the Government Accountability Office (GAO) called the Food and Drug Administration's decision not to allow over-the-counter (OTC) sales of an Emergency Contraceptive pill, "unusual".
ref: 独立无党派的美国国会监督机构政府问责局（GAO）称美国食品和药物管理局不允许非处方（OTC）销售紧急避孕药的决定是“不寻常的”。

src: Emergency Contraceptive Pills or ECPs ("morning-after" or "next-day" pills ) are used to prevent an unintended pregnancy, following unprotected sexual intercourse.
ref: 紧急避孕药或ECPs（“事后避孕药”或“次日避孕药”）用于在无保护的性交后防止意外怀孕。

src: They are objectionable for abortion opponents who consider their use to be a form of abortion, though scientific studies (including those by the FDA) classify them as contraceptives.
ref: 尽管科学研究（包括食品和药物管理局的研究）将其归类为避孕用品，但反对堕胎的人认为它们是堕胎的一种形式，因此它们是不受欢迎的。

src: The pill, called Plan B is manufactured by Barr Laboratories and had been approved earlier by the FDA as a prescription drug.
ref: 这种名为“B计划”的药丸是由Barr实验室生产的，早前已被FDA批准为处方药。

src: Barr Laboratories requested that the drug be approved for OTC sale for adults and prescription-only sale for minors.
ref: 巴尔实验室要求该药物被批准用于成人的OTC销售和未成年人的处方销售。

src: The decision to not approve went against the advice given by the FDA's Joint Advisory Committee and its Review staff and led to a GAO investigation into the decision making process.
ref: 不批准的决定违背了FDA联合咨询委员会及其审查人员的建议，并导致了GAO对决策过程的调查。

src: The investigation was requested by 30 House members and 17 Senators.
ref: 30名众议院议员和17名参议员要求进行调查。

src: The GAO found several anomalies in the decision making process.
ref: GAO在决策过程中发现了几个异常现象。

src: The rationale used by Dr. Steven Galson, the acting director of the Centre for Drug Evaluation and Research for rejecting the application was novel and did not follow usual FDA practices.
ref: 药物评估和研究中心代理主任史蒂文·高尔森博士拒绝申请的理由是新颖的，不符合FDA的惯例。

src: The decision was not signed off by the director of the office responsible for the application and the director of the Office of New Drugs, as they disagreed with the "reject" decision.
ref: 负责申请的办公室主任和新药办公室主任没有签署这项决定，因为他们不同意“拒绝”的决定。

src: The GAO also found that the FDA's high-level management more involved in reviewing this decision than in other change-to-OTC applications.
ref: GAO还发现，FDA的高层管理人员在审查这一决定时比在其他OTC药品变更申请时参与更多。

src: The Plan B decision was the only one of 67 proposed prescription to OTC changes to be disapproved, even after advisory committees approved the changes.
ref: 即使在咨询委员会批准了这些变更之后，计划B的决定也是67个提议的OTC变更处方中唯一被拒绝的决定。

src: FDA review staff told the investigators that they were told early in the review process that the decision would be made by high-level management.
ref: FDA审查人员告诉调查人员，他们在审查过程的早期就被告知，高级管理层将做出决定。

src: E-mail and other documents involving the then-FDA Commissioner Mark McClellan were found to have been destroyed "routinely".
ref: 当时的FDA局长马克·麦克莱伦的电子邮件和其他文件被发现“例行”销毁。

src: The FDA has disagreed with the GAO's finding that the high-level management was more involved in processing this application and that the rationale offered was novel, despite acknowledging that the adolescent cognitive ability rationale was unprecedented in FDA practice.
ref: 美国食品和药物管理局不同意GAO的发现，即高级管理层更多地参与处理该申请，并且提供的理由是新颖的，尽管承认青少年认知能力的基本原理在FDA实践中是前所未有的。

src: The accounts as to whether the decision to reject was taken prior to the reviews being completed offered to the investigators were conflicting.
ref: 关于是否在审查完成之前作出拒绝的决定提供给调查人员的说法是相互矛盾的。

src: The acting director cited concerns about the potential behavioral implications for younger adolescents from OTC marketing of Plan-B, given their supposed lower cognitive ability, and that it was not valid to extrapolate data from older to younger audiences.
ref: 代理导演提到了对计划b的OTC营销对青少年潜在行为影响的担忧，因为他们的认知能力被认为较低，而且不能从年龄较大的观众身上推断出数据。

src: However, the FDA had not considered similar "potential behavioral implications" for younger users for other OTC-switches and had previously considered it appropriate to extrapolate data from older to younger audiences.
ref: 然而，FDA没有考虑对年轻用户使用其他OTC交换机的类似“潜在行为影响”，并且之前认为从年长观众到年轻观众推断数据是合适的。

src: The last two journalists reported killed at the turn of the year were Syrians; just at a time when protests and violence in the country are escalating, and the Arab League begins its initial assessment of the situation.
ref: 据报道，今年年初被杀的最后两名记者是叙利亚人；正当这个国家的抗议和暴力升级，阿拉伯联盟开始对局势进行初步评估的时候。

src: Shot on December 30, and the first journalist to die in 2012, was veteran journalist Shukri Ratib Abu Burghol.
ref: 2012年12月30日，资深记者舒克里·拉蒂布·阿布·伯格尔被枪杀，成为首位在2012年去世的记者。

src: The senior journalist was shot in the face after arriving home from work at a radio station in Darayya, on the southern outskirts of the capital city Damascus.
ref: 这名资深记者在首都大马士革南郊达拉亚一家电台下班回家后被击中脸部。

src: According to Reporters Without Borders, he died three days after the shooting at Al Mouwsat Hospital.
ref: 据无国界记者报道，他在Al Mouwsat医院枪击案发生三天后死亡。

src: Burghol, 56, was a journalist for about 21 years, working for the newspaper Al-Thawra (The Revolution) whilst also hosting a weekly show for Radio Damascus.
ref: 现年56岁的伯格霍尔是一名约有21年经历的记者，曾在报纸Al-Thawra（革命）工作，同时还为大马士革电台主持每周一次的节目。

src: A source told the Xinhua news agency Burghol had received threats.
ref: 一位消息人士告诉新华社博格尔已经收到威胁。

src: Basil Al-Sayed became the last journalist to die in 2011, shot on December 29 by a sniper in the city of Homs.
ref: 巴兹尔·艾尔-赛义德于2011年12月29日在霍姆斯市被狙击手击毙，成为最后一名在2011年去世的记者。

src: The Arab League has confirmed that the Syrian government have been seen using snipers against protesters elsewhere in Daraa.
ref: 阿拉伯联盟证实，有人看到叙利亚政府在德拉其他地方使用狙击手对付抗议者。

src: The shooting of Al-Sayed took place in the Bab Amr section of Homs.
ref: Al-Sayed的射击发生在霍姆斯的Bab Amr地区。

src: The city has been one of the hot spots for protests against Bashar al-Assad's government during 2011.
ref: 2011年，该市一直是抗议巴沙尔・阿萨德政府的热门地点之一。

src: In the last week of the year, the Bab Amr neighbourhood was attacked by the Syrian military and experienced heavy violence.
ref: 在今年的最后一周，Bab Amr社区遭到叙利亚军队的袭击并经历了严重的暴力事件。

src: The 24-year-old camera operator was a citizen journalist who uploaded his videos to video-sharing sites to spread information about the protests.
ref: 这位24岁的摄影师是一名公民记者，他将视频上传到视频分享网站，传播有关抗议活动的信息。

src: Photojournalists and camera operators have been some of the the most at-risk during the Arab uprisings in Tunisia and Libya.
ref: 在突尼斯和利比亚的阿拉伯起义期间，摄影记者和摄影师一直是风险最高的人。

src: Ferzat Jarban — the first known journalist to be killed in Syria — was a freelance camera operator, arrested on November 19 whilst filming protests in Al-Qusayr, Homs Governorate.
ref: 费扎特·贾班是第一位在叙利亚遇害的记者，他是一名自由摄影师，11月19日在霍姆斯省阿尔·库萨尔拍摄抗议活动时被捕。

src: Currently information is hard to verify and reliable independent sources are largely banned or restricted inside Syria.
ref: 目前，信息很难核实，可靠的独立来源在叙利亚境内基本上被禁止或限制。

src: Foreign journalists have been barred from the country, and from covering the protests.
ref: 外国记者被禁止进入该国，并且不得参与抗议活动。

src: At the end of 2011 Arab League observers had sent out observers to different cities in Syria to monitor the situation, whilst one of its advisers called for the organization to retreat after Al-Assad's government reneged on agreements to halt the crackdown.
ref: 2011年底，阿拉伯国家联盟观察员派出观察员前往叙利亚的不同城市监测情况，同时其中一名顾问呼吁该组织在阿萨德政府违反停止打击协议后撤退。

src: According to Navi Pillay, High Commissioner for Human Rights at the United Nations, more than 5,000 people have been killed during the Syrian uprising, a figure that includes around 300 children.
ref: 根据联合国人权事务高级专员纳维皮莱的说法，在叙利亚起义期间，有5000多人被杀，这一数字包括大约300名儿童。

src: Three journalists are now known to have been killed in Syria.
ref: 现在已知有三名记者在叙利亚遇害。

src: In December, the Committee to Protect Journalists (CPJ) addressed an open letter to Syrian President Al-Assad calling for the release of all journalists in detention; the CPJ documented 29 cases of journalists being detained in 2011.
ref: 12月，保护记者委员会（CPJ）致函叙利亚总统阿萨德，呼吁释放所有被拘留的记者，CPJ记录了2011年被拘留的29起记者案件。

src: The CPJ reported that 45 journalists were killed worldwide in 2011, whereas — using differing criteria — Reporters Without Borders state that 66 journalists around the world died in 2011, and assert that, by almost every indicator, violence and censorship against international journalists was worse in 2011, up 16% on their 2010 figures.
ref: CPJ报道，2011年全世界共有45名记者丧生，而无国界记者则用不同的标准表示，2011年全世界共有66名记者死亡，并声称，从几乎所有的指标来看，2011年针对国际记者的暴力和审查情况更糟，比2010年的数字上升了百分之16。

src: A gunman opened fire at a hunting shop in the Russian city of yesterday, leaving six people dead.
ref: 一名枪手昨天在俄罗斯城市的一家狩猎店开火，造成六人死亡。

src: Two of the victims were young girls aged 14 and 16.
ref: 其中两名受害者是14岁和16岁的年轻女孩。

src: The Moscow Investigative Committee identify the main suspect as former convict Sergei Pomazun.
ref: 莫斯科调查委员会将主要嫌犯确定为前罪犯谢尔盖·波马赞。

src: Authorities said the man, believed to have used a hunting rifle, killed three salespeople and two bystanders, and injured another woman who died of head wounds shortly after the incident.
ref: 有关当局说，这名据信使用猎枪的男子杀死了三名销售人员和两名旁观者，另一名女子在事件发生后不久因头部受伤而死亡。

src: The man left the scene in a BMW, later abandoning the vehicle.
ref: 这名男子乘坐宝马离开现场，后来把车辆遗弃。

src: Local authorities have said the search involves around 1200 police; InSerbia reports a team of 50 troops have also been dispatched to assist with the manhunt.
ref: 地方当局表示搜查涉及约1200名警察；据塞尔维亚报道，还派遣了一支由50名士兵组成的小组协助进行搜捕。

src: Police also warned civilians the suspect may have a gas pistol and a semi-automatic rifle.
ref: 警方还警告平民，嫌疑人可能有气枪和半自动步枪。

src: Regional police spokesperson Alexei Pomorov told AFP, "We do not know whether it was a conflict because there's no one we can ask: everyone's dead".
ref: 地区警察发言人亚历克谢波莫罗夫告诉法新社：“我们不知道这是否是一场冲突，因为我们不能问任何人：每个人都死了。”

src: Police cordoned off the suspect's residence and found an empty weapons-storage safe.
ref: 警方封锁了嫌疑犯的住所，发现了一个空的武器储藏箱。

src: Conservative Party leader David Cameron was last night a victim of crime following the theft of his bicycle.
ref: 昨晚，保守党领袖戴维·卡梅伦的自行车被盗，他也因此成为犯罪的受害者。

src: The Leader of the Opposition in the United Kingdom was out shopping in West London when the incident happened at around 6:30 last night.
ref: 事件发生在昨晚6点半左右，英国反对党领袖正在西伦敦购物。

src: He was said to have chained the bike to a short bollard while he picked up some groceries in Tesco on Portobello Road.
ref: 据说，他在波多贝罗路的乐购超市买东西时，把自行车拴在了一个短柱上。

src: When he came out, the bike along with its chain had vanished.
ref: 当他出来时，那辆带着链子的自行车不见了。

src: He stated that he "would very much like it back" and that to him "it was absolutely priceless".
ref: 他说他“非常想要它回来”，对他来说“这绝对是无价的”。

src: He is also said to have reported the theft on the Scotland Yard online reporting website, but was pessimistic about it being returned.
ref: 据说，他还在伦敦警察厅的在线报道网站上报告了这起盗窃案，但他对被归还持悲观态度。

src: The thieves are said to be a group of teenagers.
ref: 据说盗贼是一群青少年。

src: Around 19,000 bicycles are reported stolen every year in London alone.
ref: 据报道，仅伦敦就有大约19,000辆自行车被盗。

src: Cameron's spokesperson said he had owned the bike for five years, and used it regularly to cycle to work.
ref: 卡梅伦的发言人说，卡梅伦已经拥有这辆自行车五年了，经常骑着它去上班。

src: She stated he was "pretty hacked off" by the theft.
ref: 她说他被偷了“很惨”。

src: Police have found the body of a man they had been hunting in Cumbria, United Kingdom for a series of shootings.
ref: 警方在英国坎布里亚郡发现了一名男子的尸体，该男子因一系列枪击事件而被警方追捕。

src: Police later confirmed that twelve people had been killed with a further thirteen injured, three critically.
ref: 警方后来证实，已有12人死亡，另有13人受伤，其中3人伤势严重。

src: Shots were fired in Whitehaven, Seascale and Egremont, with a total of thirty different crime scenes.
ref: 在怀特黑文、西斯卡尔和埃默里蒙特，总共发生了30起不同的犯罪现场。

src: The Sellafield nuclear reprocessing plant was locked down for the first time in its history.
ref: 塞拉菲尔德核后处理厂有史以来第一次被封锁。

src: The prime suspect was named as 52 year old local man Derrick Bird, a taxi driver.
ref: 嫌疑人名叫德里克·伯德，是当地一名52岁的出租车司机。

src: The first of Bird's victims was a fellow taxi driver shot in Whitehaven at about 10.30 local time, with the following victims being shot at random as Bird drove down the west coast.
ref: 伯德的第一个受害者是当地时间10点30分左右在怀特海文被枪击的出租车司机，当时他在伯德沿西海岸行驶，其他以下受害者则是被乱枪枪击。

src: Originally driving a Citroën Picasso, he was later said to be on foot when he crashed his vehicle.
ref: 他最初开的是雪铁龙毕加索汽车，后来据说撞车时他是步行的。

src: Members of the public were advised by police to stay indoors, and for those who saw him not to approach him, but to call them.
ref: 警方建议公众呆在室内，看到他的人不要接近他，而是打电话给他们。

src: The manhunt covered the Boot or Scafell Pike area, and at 14:04 BST (13:04 UTC) the Deputy Chief Constable of Cumbria reported that a body believed to be Bird was found in a wood near Boot with a firearm, and that he had turned the weapon on himself.
ref: 搜捕行动覆盖了Boot或Scafell Pike地区，并于英国夏令时14：04（格林威治标准时间13点04分），坎布里亚副警长报告说，一个据信是伯德的尸体被发现在Boot附近的树林里，尸体上有一支枪，他把枪对准了自己。

src: The affected area is popular with walkers and hikers, and currently, many schools across England are on half term, meaning the pupils have no classes.
ref: 受影响的地区很受步行者和徒步旅行者的欢迎，目前，英格兰的许多学校都在期中假，这意味着学生没有上课。

src: British news network BBC News spoke to several eye-witnesses in relation to the incidents, from each of the areas, including Peter Watson of Whitehaven.
ref: 英国广播公司新闻网就这些事件采访了来自各个地区的目击者，包括怀特黑文的彼得·沃森。

src: When I first got here it must have just happened.
ref: 我来到这里时，肯定是刚刚发生。

src: There was a man lying on the ground with police stood over him and a jacket on him, he reported.
ref: 他说，当时有一名男子躺在地上，警察站在他身旁，身上穿着一件夹克。

src: Home Secretary Theresa May is due to make a statement on the incident to the House of Commons tomorrow.
ref: 内政大臣特里萨·梅定于明天就此事向下议院发表声明。

src: The 2010 United Nations Climate Change Conference negotiations continued this week in Bonn, Germany.
ref: 2010年联合国气候变化大会谈判本周在德国波恩继续进行。

src: The 4,500 attendees include government delegates from 182 governments, representatives from business and industry, environmental organizations and research institutions.
ref: 4,500名与会者包括来自182个政府的政府代表，工商界代表，环境组织和研究机构。

src: Luis Alfonso de Alba, Mexico's special representative for climate change, told Reuters, "Mexico does not want to raise false expectations but we certainly are ambitious".
ref: 墨西哥气候变化特别代表Luis Alfonso de Alba告诉路透社，“墨西哥不想提出虚假的期望，但我们当然雄心勃勃”。

src: He criticised the outgoing head of the U.N.'s climate secretariat, Yvo de Boer, and the European Union's climate commissioner Connie Hedegaard for their scepticism.
ref: 他批评即将离任的联合国气候秘书处负责人伊沃·德布尔和欧盟气候专员康妮·赫泽高的怀疑态度。

src: Negotiating under the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change , the next negotiating session is scheduled to take place in August, followed by another, final one-week intersessional meeting, before Cancún.
ref: 根据《联合国气候变化框架公约》进行的谈判，下一届谈判会议定于8月举行，随后在坎昆会议之前举行为期一周的最后一次休会会议。

src: The talks were designed to discuss issues that were not resolved at the 2009 United Nations Climate Change Conference in Copenhagen.
ref: 会谈旨在讨论2009年哥本哈根联合国气候变化会议未解决的问题。

src: The two working groups are the Ad Hoc Working Group on Long-Term Cooperative Action and the Ad Hoc Working Group on Further Commitments for Annex .
ref: 这两个工作组是长期合作行动问题特设工作组和附件进一步承诺问题特设工作组。

src: These groups were specifically designed to negotiate a long-term response to climate change.
ref: 这些小组专门用于谈判对气候变化的长期反应。

src: The AWG-LCA is the negotiating group tasked to deliver a new "COP16 negotiative text" ahead of the June negotiating session.
ref: AWG-LCA是一个谈判小组，其任务是在6月谈判会议之前提交新的“COP16谈判案文”。

src: The AWG-KP is to focus on emissions reduction commitments for the 37 industrialised countries that have ratified the Kyoto Protocol for the period beyond 2012.
ref: AWG-KP将重点关注已批准2012年以后“京都议定书”的37个工业化国家的减排承诺。

src: There are also two UNFCCC standing committees meetings, the Subsidiary Body for Scientific and Technological Advice and the Subsidiary Body for Implementation .
ref: 还有两个UNFCCC常设委员会会议，即附属科学技术咨询机构和附属履行机构。

src: The conference is officially referred to as the 16th session of the Conference of the Parties to the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change (UNFCCC) and the 6th session of the Conference of the Parties serving as the meeting of the Parties to the Kyoto Protocol.
ref: 会议正式名称为《联合国气候变化框架公约》第十六届缔约方会议和《京都议定书》缔约方会议第六届缔约方会议。

src: Authorities in western Kenya have arrested 19 suspects in connection with a spree of recent mob killings.
ref: 肯尼亚西部当局逮捕了19名涉嫌与最近暴徒杀戮事件有关的嫌疑人。

src: Earlier this week 11 elderly people had been burned on suspicion of witchcraft.
ref: 本周早些时候，11名老人因涉嫌巫术而被烧死。

src: The 8 female and 3 male victims were aged 80 to 96 according to BBC News.
ref: 据BBC新闻报道，8名女性和3名男性受害者年龄在80至96岁之间。

src: Belief in witchcraft is widespread in the Kisii District of Nyanza Province and attacks against purported witches had happened before, but this week's attacks targeted an unusually large number of people.
ref: 在尼扬扎省的基西地区，对巫术的信仰十分普遍，对传说中的女巫的袭击以前也发生过，但本周的袭击针对的是数量异常庞大的人群。

src: Police launched an investigation into the incident and have deployed additional personnel to guard the area to prevent revenge attacks.
ref: 警方已对该事件展开调查，并部署了额外人员来保护该地区，以防止报复袭击。

src: Approximately 300 young men were reportedly responsible for the attacks.
ref: 据报道，大约有300名年轻男子应对袭击事件负责。

src: According to deputy police spokesman Charles Owino, those who can be proven to have had direct involvement in the killings would be charged with murder.
ref: 据警方副发言人查尔斯·奥维诺称，那些被证明直接参与谋杀的人将被控谋杀罪。

src: The Council of Australian Governments (COAG) will meet in Canberra today for its first meeting of 2006.
ref: 澳大利亚政府理事会（COAG）将于今天在堪培拉举行2006年第一次会议。

src: Members of COAG are the Prime Minister, State Premiers, Australian Capital and Northern Territory Chief Ministers, and the President of the Australian Local Government Association.
ref: 农委会成员包括总理、州总理、澳大利亚首都和北领地首席部长以及澳大利亚地方政府协会主席。

src: On the agenda is a wide range of issues such as health, economic reform, regulation, and education.
ref: 会议议程包括一系列广泛的问题，如卫生、经济改革、监管和教育。

src: The state leaders (all of whom are members of the Australian Labor Party), met last night to develop a strategy for dealing with John Howard, Australia's Prime Minister.
ref: 这些州的领导人（都是澳大利亚工党的成员）昨晚开会，制定了一项应对澳大利亚总理约翰·霍华德的策略。

src: A1 Team New Zealand has won the feature race at the A1 Grand Prix in Shanghai, China today, followed by A1 Team Great Britain and A1 Team Germany.
ref: A1新西兰队在今天中国上海举行的A1大奖赛中获得特色赛冠军，英国A1队和德国A1队分获第二，三名。

src: The third place win for Germany has secured the 2006/2007 championship.
ref: 德国队获得第三名，该队曾经赢得了2006/2007赛季的冠军。

src: In qualifying for the sprint race, Great Britain's driver Robbie Kerr managed to secure the pole position with the fastest lap time recorded this weekend.
ref: 在冲刺赛的资格赛中，英国车手罗比·科尔以本周末的最快圈速保住了杆位。

src: New Zealand's driver, Jonny Reid, started in second position, narrowly missing out on what would have been his third pole position of the season.
ref: 新西兰车手强尼·里德以第二名的成绩出线，险些错失本赛季第三杆的位置。

src: Third and fourth place starters are the United States and Germany respectively.
ref: 第三和第四名的首发球员分别是美国和德国。

src: Great Britain managed to win the sprint race, thus securing a first place start in the feature race.
ref: 英国成功赢得了冲刺赛，从而确保了在正赛中的第一出发杆位。

src: During the entire sprint race, Great Britain were the leaders, with a "comfortable" lead, always maintaining their position in front of New Zealand.
ref: 在整个冲刺赛中，英国以“轻松”的优势领先，始终保持着领先于新西兰的位置。

src: During the feature race Jonny Reid, driving New Zealand's Black Beauty car, passed Great Britain on lap number 16 of the 50-lap race.
ref: 在正赛期间，驾驶新西兰“黑美人”赛车的强尼·里德在50圈比赛的第16圈超过了英国。

src: After five hours of meeting, the presidents Hugo Chávez from Venezuela and Alvaro Uribe from Colombia put a end to the diplomatic tension that had completed two months.
ref: 经过五个小时的会晤，来自委内瑞拉的乌戈·查韦斯总统和来自哥伦比亚的阿尔瓦罗·乌里韦结束了两个月来的外交紧张局势。

src: The crisis started with the alleged irregular arrest (according to Venezuela) of the FARC guerrilla Rodrigo Granda by Colombian authorities.
ref: 这场危机始于哥伦比亚当局对FARC游击队罗德里戈·格兰达的非法逮捕（据委内瑞拉称）。

src: President Chavez said: "We have decided to turn the page so we can fix the things that were misadjusted, clarify the things that could be clouded and work together in the construction for the common people".
ref: 查韦斯总统说：“我们已经决定翻过这一页，这样我们就可以修复那些被错误调整的地方，澄清那些可能被混淆的地方，共同为普通民众的建设而努力。”

src: The meeting was scheduled for early this month, however it was postponed due to a disease of the Colombian president.
ref: 会议定于本月初举行，但由于哥伦比亚总统的疾病而推迟举行。

src: The encounter served both to finish the harshness between the two countries and to resume bilateral agreements and the activity in the border which were paralyzed as a result of the crisis.
ref: 这次会晤既是为了结束两国之间的不和谐因素，也是为了恢复双边协议以及因危机而陷入瘫痪的边境活动。

src: Uribe admitted that the Colombian armed conflict is a problem which must be solved by his country despite the disturbances caused by subversive groups in the neighboring countries to Colombia.
ref: 乌里韦承认，哥伦比亚的武装冲突是一个必须由哥伦比亚自己解决的问题，尽管哥伦比亚邻国的颠覆组织制造了动乱。

src: As a result of the meeting, the presidents will organize a binational high level commission in the next weeks.
ref: 会议结果表明，总统将在未来几周内组织一次双边高级别委员会。

src: The commission will evaluate the crisis's consequences, reinforce the integration between both countries and coordinate the future of the antiterrorist fight.
ref: 该委员会将评估危机的后果，加强两国的融合，协调反恐斗争的未来。

src: The fight against terrorism will be done by security organisms of both countries by means of a rigorous legal adjustment in the actions which implies to cooperate so that the sovereignty is not affected and the sovereignty is respected, according to Uribe.
ref: 乌里韦说，打击恐怖主义的斗争将由两国的安全机构通过对行动进行严格的法律调整来完成，这种法律调整意味着进行合作，使主权不受影响，主权得到尊重。

src: A collision between Christian band MercyMe's tour bus and a car has killed two passengers in the car and the 18-year-old driver's unborn baby.
ref: 基督教乐队MercyMe的旅游巴士和一辆汽车之间的碰撞导致车内两名乘客和18岁的司机未出生的婴儿死亡。

src: The woman is in critical condition following the crash, which occurred in Fort Wayne, northeastern Indiana.
ref: 事故发生在印第安纳州东北部的韦恩堡，这名妇女目前情况危急。

src: The bus was headed to Six Flags St. Louis in Missouri for the band to play to a sold-out crowd.
ref: 巴士开往密苏里州的六旗圣路易，乐队将在座无虚席的人群中演出。

src: At 1:15 a.m. Saturday, according to witnesses, the bus was going through a green light when the car made a turn in front of it.
ref: 据目击者说，周六凌晨1点15分，当汽车在前面转弯时，公共汽车正在通过绿灯。

src: No-one on the bus was injured, and the band rescheduled the show for September as a result of the incident.
ref: 公共汽车上没有人受伤，由于事件原因，乐队重新安排了9月份的演出。

src: A photograph of the damaged bus was posted on the band's website, depicting moderate crumpling to the front area of the vehicle.
ref: 乐队的网站上发布了一幅受损巴士的照片，照片中巴士的前部有轻微的变形。

src: For the Chesapeake Bay, the largest estuary in the United States, a first-time-ever “water quality forecast” was issued Monday for the upcoming summer season by the Chesapeake Bay Program.
ref: 对于美国最大的河口切萨皮克湾，切萨皮克湾项目于本周一发布了有史以来首次的夏季“水质预报”。

src: The eastern mid-Atlantic region’s heavy spring rainfalls are predicted to increase nutrient levels in bay waters, leading to oxygen eating algae blooms and leaving deep water dead zones.
ref: 据预测，大西洋中部东部地区春季的强降雨将增加海湾水域的营养水平，导致以氧气为食的藻类大量繁殖，并留下深水死区。

src: Project leader William Dennison, of the University of Maryland Center for Environmental Studies said, “The forecast indicates that recent weather conditions and heavy pollutant loads could lead to a bad summer for the Bay.”
ref: 马里兰大学环境研究中心的项目负责人威廉·丹尼森说：“预测表明，最近的天气条件和重污染负荷可能导致海湾夏季恶劣。”

src: The prediction is for this to be the fourth-worst season for dissolved oxygen in two decades.
ref: 预测这是二十年来溶解氧的第四个最差季节。

src: The Chesapeake Bay Program launched the new forecast to build on a base of environmental data gathered over the last two decades as water quality concerns have grown.
ref: 由于水质问题日益严重，切萨皮克湾计划在过去二十年收集的环境数据基础上发布了新的预测。

src: The forecast is meant to be a proactive tool that provides resource managers with information that can be used to guide policies for the bay’s protection and restoration.
ref: 该预测旨在成为一种主动的工具，为资源管理人员提供可用于指导海湾保护和恢复政策的信息。

src: Cars, fertilizer, human and animal wastes, industrial and agricultural pollutants all play a part.
ref: 汽车，肥料，人类和动物废物，工业和农业污染物都起着作用。

src: "This means that we need to do a lot more to reduce phosphorus and nitrogen pollution from getting into the bay, said Beth McGee, of the Chesapeake Bay Foundation.
ref: 切萨皮克湾基金会的贝斯·麦吉说：“这意味着我们需要做更多的工作来减少磷和氮污染进入海湾。”

src: "The biggest source of pollution in the bay is agriculture, and we've got to find a way to provide farmers with more resources to manage the land better."
ref: “海湾最大的污染源是农业，我们必须找到一种方法，为农民提供更多的资源来更好地管理土地。”

src: Nutrient rich pollutants composed mainly of nitrogen and phosphorous come from far away places carried by rivers, and nearby the bay from farm and metropolitan runoff.
ref: 以氮、磷为主要成分的富营养化污染物来自河流所携带的遥远地方，来自农业和都市径流的海湾附近。

src: They collect in the huge bay and meet tidal flows from the ocean.
ref: 它们聚集在巨大的海湾，迎接来自海洋的潮汐流。

src: Algae feed off the nutrients, and they are either consumed by aquatic life or sink at the end of their life cycle.
ref: 藻类以营养物质为食，它们或者被水生生物消耗掉，或者在它们的生命周期结束时下沉。

src: With such an abundant food source, algae blooms can cover large surfaces of water and choke off sunlight to underwater plants.
ref: 拥有如此丰富的食物来源，藻类大量繁殖可以覆盖大面积的水，并阻挡阳光照射到水下植物。

src: Later when the plants die, the process of their decomposition on the bottom consumes oxygen to a state where the water becomes anoxic, and unable to support life.
ref: 当植物死亡后，它们在底部的分解过程消耗氧气，使水缺氧，无法维持生命。

src: As notorious as weather forecasters are for often being wrong, it should come as no surprise if this first forecasting step by the federally funded program misses its mark.
ref: 尽管天气预报经常出错是出了名的，但如果这项由联邦政府资助的计划的第一步预报失误，也不足为奇。

src: Forces such as heavy storms or hurricanes, which churn water, would have an effect.
ref: 猛烈的风暴或飓风等搅动水的力量会产生影响。

src: Excessive wind and unexpected precipitation, or nutrient level jumps, would also contribute.
ref: 过多的风和意想不到的降水，或营养水平的上升，也会造成这种情况。

src: 25 people were killed today and 33 were injured when a large explosion ripped through a karaoke bar in Tianshifu, Liaoning Province, China.
ref: 今天在中国辽宁省天时府的一家卡拉OK酒吧发生大爆炸，造成25人死亡，33人受伤。

src: The state-run Xinhua news agency says the cause of the disaster is under investigation.
ref: 官方的新华社说，灾难的原因正在调查中。

src: Four people are reported to be in a serious condition.
ref: 据报道有四人情况严重。

src: Originally, Xinhua reported only five fatalities, but as rescue workers continued to move away debris, the full extent of the death toll was discovered.
ref: 起初，新华社只报道了5人死亡，但随着救援人员继续清理废墟，死亡人数的全部情况已被发现。

src: Xinhua has also reported that several employees at the bar, as well as the wife of the owner, were being questioned.
ref: 新华社还报道说，酒吧的几名员工以及老板的妻子正在接受讯问。

src: According to a philly.com article authored by The Associated Press, Xinhua failed to state whether this was as witnesses or as suspects in any potential criminal activity, but the Shanghai Daily said that Xinhua had reported the people had been detained as suspects.
ref: 据美联社在philly.com上发表的一篇文章说，新华社没有说明这两人是作为证人还是作为任何潜在犯罪活动的嫌疑人，但《上海日报》说，新华社报道说，这些人是作为嫌疑人被拘留的。

src: The owner himself, Mr. Qu, was killed in the blast.
ref: 主人自己，曲先生，在爆炸中丧生。

src: Investigators say they are currently unsure if the blast was purely accidental, or if foul play was involved, as all efforts were initially focused on attempting to locate survivors.
ref: 调查人员说，他们目前还不确定爆炸是否纯粹是意外，或者是否与谋杀有关，因为所有的努力最初都集中在寻找幸存者上。

src: The two-storey building, which also housed a bathhouse, was completely leveled by the blast.
ref: 这座两层楼的建筑，也、里面还有一个浴室，在爆炸中完全夷为平地。

src: In addition, several cars were buried under the debris and windows in nearby buildings were shattered by the pressure wave.
ref: 此外，几辆车被埋在碎片下面，附近建筑物的窗户被压力波破碎。

src: A power cut in the area was also caused by the blast due to damage to the local electricity network.
ref: 由于当地电力网络的损坏，该地区的停电也是由于爆炸造成的。

src: 77-year-old local resident Chen Xiaohong, who lives 50 metres from ground zero, described the explosion: "I was watching my grandson finishing his lessons.
ref: 77岁的当地居民陈晓红住在离原爆点50米的地方，他描述了这次爆炸：“当时我正看着我的孙子完成他的功课。

src: Suddenly, we heard a big bang, then the door burst open from effects of a powerful shock wave and the lights went out...
ref: 突然间，我们听到了一声巨响，然后门被一股强大的冲击波撞开，灯光熄灭……。

src: Meng Xianling, who runs a seafood stall located down a narrow lane opposite the site of the accident building, commented that "I was afraid the parlor's boiler would explode.
ref: 孟宪岭在事故大楼对面的一条狭窄车道上经营着一家海鲜摊位，评论说：“我担心客厅的锅炉会爆炸。

src: China has been the location of many disasters in both public and private places, such as fires and explosions.
ref: 中国发生了很多公共和私人场所的灾难，比如火灾和爆炸。

src: Earlier this year, an unsafe arrangement with a two-ton steel ladle resulted in the Qinghe Special Steel Corporation disaster, in which molten steel was accidentally poured into a room full of workers, killing 32.
ref: 今年早些时候，一个两吨钢包的不安全安排导致了清河特钢公司的灾难，其中钢水被意外倒入满是工人的房间，造成32人死亡。

src: The majority of China's accidents stem from a combination of lax safety regulations and negligence, and accidents continue regularly despite promises by the government to prevent them.
ref: 中国的大多数事故都是由松懈的安全法规和疏忽造成的，尽管政府承诺要防止事故发生，但事故仍在定期发生。

src: US Supreme Court Justice John Paul Stevens has given federal prosecutors until next Friday to respond to the request of former Illinois governor Rod Blagojevich and his brother Robert to delay their corruption trial.
ref: 美国最高法院法官约翰·保罗·史蒂文斯要求联邦检察官在下周五之前对前伊利诺斯州州长罗德·布拉戈耶维奇和他的兄弟罗伯特提出的推迟腐败审判的请求做出回应。

src: The trial is set to begin on June 3, and many of the charges they face are based on a federal honest-services law.
ref: 审判定于6月3日开始，他们面临的许多指控都是基于联邦诚信服务法。

src: The Blagojevich brothers challenge the constitutionality of this law and believe the trial should be delayed until the high court is expected to decide the issue next month.
ref: 布拉戈耶维奇兄弟对这项法律的合宪性提出质疑，并认为审判应该推迟到高等法院预计下个月对这个问题作出裁决。

src: The request had already been denied by District Judge James Zagel and the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals.
ref: 地方法官詹姆斯·扎格尔和第七巡回上诉法院已经驳回了这一请求。

src: Stevens, who handles appeals from the Seventh Circuit, had three options: reject the request for a delay of trial, grant it, or allow the federal government to respond.
ref: 处理第七巡回上诉的史蒂文斯有三种选择：拒绝延迟审判的请求，批准，或允许联邦政府作出回应。

src: We believe that means he sees this as not frivolous, and he’s going to decide it on the merits, said Michael Ettinger, Robert's attorney.
ref: 罗伯特的律师迈克尔·艾丁格说，我们相信这意味着他认为这不是草率的，他会根据案情来决定。

src: Prosecutors added new charges, including bribery, against the brothers in case the Supreme Court finds the honest-services law unconstitutional.
ref: 检察官增加了新的指控，包括针对兄弟贿赂，以防最高法院认为诚实服务法违反宪法。

src: They believe the June 3 start date should not be held back.
ref: 他们认为6月3日的开始日期不应该推迟。

src: The United Nations (UN) suspended all of its operations in Gaza from yesterday, after the bombing of a convoy of UN aid trucks which killed one Palestinian driver, and wounded three others.
ref: 在联合国援助卡车车队遭到轰炸，造成一名巴勒斯坦司机死亡，另有三人受伤后，联合国（联合国）于昨天暂停了在加沙的所有行动。

src: Thursday was the second day of attacks on UN targets after three UN schools housing refugees were bombed on Tuesday, killing over 50 civilians.
ref: 星期四是袭击联合国目标的第二天，因为周三有三所联合国学校的住房难民遭到轰炸，造成50多名平民死亡。

src: "UNRWA decided to suspend all its operations in the Gaza Strip because of the increasing hostile actions against its premises and personnel", Adnan Abu Hasna, a Gaza-based spokesman for the United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA), said yesterday.
ref: 联合国救济和工程处（近东救济工程处）驻加沙的发言人阿德南·阿布·哈斯娜昨天表示，“近东救济工程处决定暂停其在加沙地带的所有行动，因为对其房地和人员的敌对行动日益增加”。

src: Richard Miron, spokesman for the UN said that the Israeli military had been notified in advance of the coordinates of the relief trucks saying, "This underlines the fundamental insecurity inside Gaza at a time when we are trying to address the dire humanitarian needs of the population there."
ref: 联合国发言人理查德·米伦表示，以色列军方在得知救援卡车的坐标之前就得到了通知，他说，“这突显出加沙内部的根本不安全，而我们正在努力解决那里居民的人道主义需求。”

src: The bombing of the UN trucks was the last straw for the UN, already angered after Israeli tanks fired on a UN school housing refugees killing 50 including an entire family of seven young children.
ref: 联合国卡车的爆炸事件是联合国的最后一根稻草，以色列坦克向一所联合国学校的难民开枪，造成50人死亡，其中包括7名儿童的全家，这已经激怒了联合国。

src: The UN said that they had given Israel the GPS coordinates of their schools, and demanded accountability for the attacks.
ref: 联合国表示，他们已经向以色列提供了他们学校的GPS坐标，并要求对这些攻击负责。

src: More schools were attacked including the al-Fakhora School killing 40 people, many of them women and children.
ref: 更多学校遭到袭击，包括al-法克霍拉学校造成40人死亡，其中许多人是妇女和儿童。

src: Hours before the attack on the al-Fakhora School was an attack on Asma Elementary School which killed three Palestinian cousins.
ref: 在al-法克霍拉学校遇袭数小时前，阿斯马小学遇袭，三名巴勒斯坦表亲丧生。

src: The cousin's father said the bodies were so mangled he couldn't tell the bodies apart, "We came to the school when the Israelis warned us to leave," he said.
ref: 这位表亲的父亲说，尸体已经血肉模糊，他分不清这两具尸体，“当以色列人警告我们离开时，我们来到这所学校，”他说。

src: A relative came and told me one of my sons was killed.
ref: 一位亲戚来告诉我，我的一个儿子被杀了。

src: The International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC) said on yesterday that they were trying for four days to get their ambulances to a Gaza neighborhood before being allowed to by Israeli military forces.
ref: 红十字国际委员会（ICRC）昨天表示，他们花了四天时间试图将救护车开到加沙地带的一个社区，然后才被以色列军方允许进入。

src: After getting there, they said, they found four starving children sitting next to the bodies of their dead mothers.
ref: 他们说，到达那里后，他们发现四个饥饿的孩子坐在他们死去的母亲的尸体旁边。

src: "This is a shocking incident", said Pierre Wettach, ICRC chief for Israel and the occupied Palestinian territories.
ref: “这是一个令人震惊的事件”，红十字国际委员会以色列和巴勒斯坦被占领土负责人皮埃尔·韦特奇说。

src: The Israeli military must have been aware of the situation but did not assist the wounded.
ref: 以色列军方必须意识到这种情况，但没有帮助伤员。

src: Neither did they make it possible for us or the Palestinian Red Crescent to assist the wounded.
ref: 它们也没有使我们或巴勒斯坦红新月会有可能援助伤员。

src: Israel granted a three-hour ceasefire yesterday that they gave for aid workers to enter areas that they had closed off.
ref: 以色列昨天同意停火三小时，允许救援人员进入他们封锁的地区。

src: 50 bodies were recovered during the ceasefire, raising the death toll to 763, including more than 200 children, since air raids first began on December 27.
ref: 停火期间收回了50具尸体，自从12月27日首次开始空袭以来，死亡人数增加到763人，其中包括200多名儿童。

src: Eight Israeli soldiers and three civilians have died in the same period.
ref: 同期有8名以色列士兵和3名平民死亡。

src: Israeli forces also shot a Palestinian man in the West Bank during a protest against Israel's actions in Gaza.
ref: 在抗议以色列在加沙的行动期间，以色列部队还在西岸开枪打死了一名巴勒斯坦人。

src: Yesterday, a Palestinian man was killed by Israeli forces after a confrontation in the West Bank Jewish settlement of Ma'ale Adumim near Jerusalem.
ref: 昨天，在耶路撒冷附近的约旦河西岸犹太人定居点马阿勒阿杜明发生冲突后，一名巴勒斯坦男子被以色列军队杀害。

src: 66 passengers and the crew of a New York to San Francisco UAL flight got an unwanted stop in the "Windy City," Chicago, on Tuesday, following a bomb scare.
ref: 美国联合航空公司一架从纽约飞往旧金山的航班于本周二遭遇炸弹袭击，机上66名乘客和机组人员在“风城”芝加哥意外停留。

src: United Air Lines spokesman Jeff Green said a flight attendant was alerted by a passenger to another passenger's suspicious materials and wires.
ref: 联合航空公司发言人杰夫格林说，一名空姐接到一名乘客对另一名乘客的可疑材料和电线的警告。

src: The crew decided to divert the flight to O’Hare, empty the plane, and allow the bomb squad to inspect for safety.
ref: 机组决定将飞机转移到奥黑尔，清空飞机，让炸弹小组检查安全。

src: They discovered vials of herbal liquids, some wires, and an MP3 player.
ref: 他们发现了几瓶药液、一些电线和一个MP3播放器。

src: The passenger and music player were reunited, everybody re-boarded the aircraft, and with three hours lost, the flight took off for San Francisco.
ref: 乘客和音乐播放器重新团聚，每个人都重新登上飞机，三个小时后，飞机起飞前往旧金山。

src: Today, it was announced that Syd Barrett, the founding member of British rock band Pink Floyd died from a complication with diabetes.
ref: 今天，英国摇滚乐队平克·弗洛伊德的创始成员西德·巴雷特因糖尿病并发症去世。

src: According to a Pink Floyd spokeswoman, he died days earlier (July 7) but the announcement was withheld.
ref: 据平克·弗洛伊德的一位女发言人说，他在几天前（7月7日）去世，但声明没有公布。

src: There will be a private family funeral in the next few days," said his brother Alan Barrett.
ref: 他的弟弟艾伦·巴雷特说：“我们将在未来几天举行一个私人的家庭葬礼。

src: The band are naturally very upset and sad to learn of Syd Barrett’s death.
ref: 听到西德·巴雷特的死讯，乐队自然非常难过。

src: Syd was the guiding light of the early band line-up and leaves a legacy which continues to inspire, noted a statement issued by Pink Floyd.
ref: 平克·弗洛伊德在一份声明中指出，赛迪是乐队早期阵容的指路明灯，他留下的遗产将继续鼓舞人心。

src: During 1967-1968, Syd Barrett was considered to be the main member and songwriter of Pink Floyd.
ref: 1967年至1968年，西德·巴雷特被认为是平克·弗洛伊德的主要成员和作曲家。

src: However, due to mental illness, he was forced to leave the band after recording only one album, The Piper at the Gates of Dawn.
ref: 然而，由于精神疾病，他只录制了一张专辑《黎明门前的风笛手》，就被迫离开了乐队。

src: Pink Floyd recorded Wish You Were Here as a tribute following Barrett's leave.
ref: 平克·弗洛伊德在巴雷特走后录制了《希望你在这里》，作为纪念。

src: The album features Shine On You Crazy Diamond, with lyrics explicitly about Barrett's rise to fame and subsequent dissolution.
ref: 这张专辑的特点是《闪耀在你疯狂的钻石上》，歌词明确表达了巴雷特的成名和随后的解散。

src: An accident involving two school buses, a tractor trailer and an sport utility vehicle has left at least two people dead and fifty more injured about 40 miles outside of St. Louis, Missouri according to reports.
ref: 据报道，密苏里州圣路易斯市40英里外发生一起事故，涉及两辆校车、一辆拖拉机拖车和一辆运动型多用途车，造成至少两人死亡，50多人受伤。

src: The school buses were carrying students from St. James High School and were en route to the Six Flags St. Louis amusement park, approximately 10 miles (16.1 kilometres) from the scene of the accident.
ref: 校车上载着圣詹姆斯高中的学生，他们正前往六旗圣路易斯游乐园，那里距离事故现场大约10英里（16.1公里）。

src: Wikileaks has obtained and released a list of all 3,863 websites that are being censored by Danish Internet Service Providers as of February 2008.
ref: 维基解密已获得并发布了截至2008年2月由丹麦互联网服务提供商审查的所有3,863个网站的列表。

src: The system is used to filter out child pornography, although Wikileaks points out it "can be used to censor anything" and claims "most sites on the list are still censored (i.e must be on the current list), even though many have clearly changed owners or were possibly even wrongly placed on the list."
ref: 这个系统被用来过滤儿童色情，尽管维基解密指出它“可以用来审查任何东西”，并且声称“名单上的大多数网站仍然被审查（即必须在当前的名单上），即使许多网站已经明确地改变了所有者，或者可能被错误地放在名单上。”

src: We discussed the unusual leak with them, and the results are published here.
ref: 我们与他们讨论了不寻常的泄漏，结果发表在这里。

src: We asked if Wikileaks was worried about the criminal implications of linking to so much illegal content, but they were not.
ref: 我们问维基解密是否担心与这么多非法内容链接会带来犯罪后果，但他们并不担心。

src: They said that it was "politically untenable" to prosecute them, pointing out that Wikileaks is hosted in many different countries across the globe.
ref: 他们说起诉他们“在政治上站不住脚”，并指出维基解密在全球许多不同的国家都有网站。

src: We asked them if they were "concerned about the possibility of censorship in the UK, Denmark, Finland etc.?"
ref: 我们问他们是否“担心在英国、丹麦、芬兰等地有可能实施审查”。

src: "No," Wikileaks told us "We welcome it."
ref: “不，”维基解密告诉我们“我们欢迎它。”

src: Wikinews wondered if this was because of the Streisand effect, but Wikileaks said it was "because it will demonstrate how censorship systems are abused."
ref: 维基新闻想知道这是否是因为史翠珊效应，但维基解密称这是“因为它将证明审查制度是如何被滥用的。”

src: Wikinews asked Wikileaks why they didn't simply post a list of the sites which they felt were legal and add that all the others contained child porn, but Wikileaks felt "that would not be a fair representation of the material we obtained."
ref: 维基新闻问维基解密他们为什么不简单地发布他们认为合法的网站列表，并补充说所有其他网站都包含儿童色情内容，但维基解密认为“以这种方式呈现我们所获得的材料并不公平”。

src: After seeking clarification, Wikinews was told "the question is not what we need to be told.
ref: 在寻求解释后，维基新闻被告知“问题不在于我们需要被告知什么。

src: The question is what we need not to be told and who decides.
ref: 问题是我们不需要被告知什么以及由谁来决定。

src: Wikinews then asked why they didn't leave the full list available, but mark which sites they felt should not be censored.
ref: 维基新闻随后询问为什么他们没有留下完整的清单，但标出他们认为不应该审查的网站。

src: We have better things to do, was the response given.
ref: 得到的答复是，我们有更好的事情要做。

src: It is not so easy to set up merchant accounts."
ref: 设置商家帐户并不容易。”

src: And what would due process be?
ref: 什么是正当程序？

src: Due process would involve sending a letter to the owner of the merchant account with the accusation and giving them a right to be heard and an appeal process.
ref: 正当程序将包括向商户账户的所有者发送一封带有指控的信函，并赋予他们被听取的权利和上诉程序。

src: The banks are politically a lot more powerful than the internet industry so this hasn't happened."
ref: 银行在政治上比互联网行业强大得多，所以这种情况尚未发生。”

src: And should funds in these accounts be seized straight away, or simply frozen until a judge or similar clears their release?
ref: 这些账户中的资金应该立即被扣押，还是干脆被冻结，直到法官或类似机构批准释放这些资金？

src: "If the accounts are in-jurisdiction, they should be frozen and released or not at the end of the process.
ref: “如果帐户属于司法管辖，它们应该被冻结，并在流程结束时决定释放或否。

src: There are plenty of existing mechanisms to do this for drug trafficking, for example."
ref: 例如，在毒品贩运方面有许多现有的机制可以做到这一点。”

src: Wikileaks then added "As an analogy, one might argue that everyone should have a loaded gun in the house to protect themselves against home invasions.
ref: 维基解密接着补充道：“作为一个类比，有人可能会说，每个人在家里都应该有一把上膛的枪，以保护自己免受家庭入侵。”

src: This seems perfectly reasonable; however experience has shown that once the gun is in the house, it will find other targets."
ref: 这似乎完全合理；然而，经验表明，一旦枪在房子里，它就会找到其他目标。

src: Members of Australia's Health Services Union (HSU) will go on strike in Victoria next week in a dispute over stalled wage and career structure negotiations.
ref: 澳大利亚卫生服务联盟（HSU）成员基于在停滞工资和职业结构的谈判上仍有争端，将于下周在维多利亚州继续罢工。

src: Over 5000 physiotherapists, speech pathologists and radiation therapists will walk off the job next week, effectively closing the state's 68 largest health services.
ref: 超过5000名的物理治疗师、语言病理学家和放射治疗师将于下周离开工作岗位，有效关闭该州最大的68家医疗服务机构。

src: The strike will force the closure of intensive care units and emergency departments across the state.
ref: 罢工将迫使整个州的重症监护病房和急诊部门关闭。

src: National secretary of the HSU, Kathy Jackson said admissions would be crippled, while intensive care patients would have to be evacuated to New South Wales, Tasmania and South Australia as hospitals will not be able to perform tests or administer treatment.
ref: HSU的国家秘书凯西·杰克逊说，入院安排将瘫痪，而重症监护病人不得不撤离到新南威尔士州、塔斯马尼亚州和南澳大利亚州，因为医院将无法进行检查或实施治疗。

src: When an ambulance shows up you can't admit a patient without an X-ray being available, you can't intubate them and you can't operate on them, she said.
ref: 她说，当一辆救护车出现时，在不能使用X光的情况下，你无法接收病人，你不能插管或是进行操作。

src: If something goes wrong in an ICU you need to be able to X-ray, use nuclear medicine or any diagnostic procedure, said Ms Jackson.
ref: 杰克逊女士说，如果ICU出现问题，你需要能够进行X光检查，使用核医学或任何诊断程序。

src: Ms Jackson said the HSU offered arbitration last year, but the state government refused.
ref: 杰克逊女士说，HSU去年提出了仲裁，但州政府拒绝了。

src: They're not interested in settling disputes, they hope that we are just going to go away.
ref: 他们对解决争端不感兴趣，他们希望我们能够走开。

src: We're not going away, we've gone back and balloted the whole public health workforce in Victoria, those ballots were successful, 97 percent approval rating, she said.
ref: 她说，我们不会走开，我们已经回来并要求整个维多利亚州的公共卫生人员投票，这些投票是成功的，有97％的支持率。

src: The HSU is urging the government to commence serious negotiations to resolve the dispute before industrial action commenced.
ref: HSU敦促政府在工业行动开展之前开始认真谈判以解决争端。

src: The government has offered the union a 3.25 per cent pay increase, in line with other public sector workers but the union has demanded more, but stopped short of specifying a figure.
ref: 政府已向工会提议3.25％的加薪，与其他公共部门工人一致，但工会要求更多，但没有说明一个数字。

src: Victorian Premier John Brumby said the claim would be settled according to the government's wages policy.
ref: 维多利亚州州长约翰·布伦比表示，这一要求将根据政府的工资政策来解决。

src: The Government is always willing and wanting to sit down and negotiate with the relevant organisations .
ref: 政府总是愿意并希望与有关组织坐下来谈判。

src: we have a wages policy based around an increase of 3.25 per cent and, above that, productivity offset, he told parliament.
ref: 他对议会表示，我们的工资政策基础是百分之3.25左右的增长，高于这一水平，将抵消生产率的上升。

src: The union claims it is also arguing against a lack of career structure, which has caused many professionals to leave the health service.
ref: 工会声称它还反对缺乏职业结构，这导致许多专业人员离开医疗服务。

src: Ms Jackson said wages and career structures in Victoria were behind other states.
ref: 杰克逊女士说，维多利亚州的工资和职业结构落后于其他州。

src: Victorian Opposition Leader Ted Baillieu said he was not in support of the proposed strike and called on the government to meet with unions.
ref: 维多利亚反对党领袖泰德·贝利厄表示，他不支持罢工提议，并呼吁政府与工会会面。

src: There could not be a more serious threat to our health system than has been announced today.
ref: 对我们的卫生系统来说，没有比今天宣布的更严重的威胁了。

src: We now have to do whatever is possible to stop this strike from proceeding, he said.
ref: 他说，我们现在必须尽一切可能阻止这次罢工。

src: The opposition leader will meet with the union at 11:30 AM today.
ref: 反对派领导人将于今天上午11：30与工会会面。

src: Victorian Hospitals Industry Association industrial relations services manager Simon Chant said hospitals were looking at the possible impact and warned that patients may have to be evacuated interstate if the strike goes ahead.
ref: 维多利亚州医院行业协会工业关系服务经理西蒙·钱特说，医院正在考虑可能产生的影响，并警告说，如果罢工继续进行，病人可能必须撤出至州外。

src: The Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard has conducted a missile test exercise, in which nine missiles of three different types were launched simultaneously.
ref: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队进行了一次导弹试验，同时发射了三种不同类型的九枚导弹。

src: The exercise, known as Great Prophet III was conducted early this morning from an undisclosed location near to the Strait of Hormuz.
ref: 这次演习被称为“大先知3号”，于今天凌晨在霍尔木兹海峡附近的一个秘密地点进行。

src: One of the missiles launched was an upgraded version of the Shahab-3, capable of reaching Eastern European countries like Bulgaria and Greece as well and Middle Eastern countries such as Israel, Egypt and the Arabian Peninsula.
ref: 其中一枚导弹是“流星-3”的升级版，能够到达保加利亚和希腊等东欧国家，以及以色列、埃及和阿拉伯半岛等中东国家。

src: Eight shorter range Zelzal and Fateh missiles were also launched.
ref: 还发射了八枚较短射程的扎尔扎尔和法塔赫导弹。

src: The Iranians have been under international pressure to withraw from their plans of achieving nuclear proficiency, but have rejected putting a hold on their programme and have also been moving forward with their rocketry programme.
ref: 伊朗一直受到国际社会的压力，要求其放弃提升核能力的计划，但伊朗拒绝搁置核计划，并一直在推进火箭计划。

src: The test is believed to have been a reaction to Israeli and American military exercises, which the Iranian government believed to be training for an attack on facilities related to the Iranian nuclear development programme.
ref: 据信这次试验是对以色列和美国军事演习的反应，伊朗政府认为这些演习是为了攻击与伊朗核发展计划有关的设施而进行的。

src: In addition to these tests, Iran's first indigenous satellite launch attempt, which will place the Omid spacecraft into low Earth orbit, is expected immanently.
ref: 除了这些试验之外，伊朗预计不久之后将进行第一次的本土卫星发射尝试，将把Omid航天器送入近地轨道，。

src: A successful satellite launch would demonstrate that Iran's missiles have global reach.
ref: 一次成功的卫星发射将证明伊朗的导弹射程扩及全球。

src: The tests have been widely criticised by the international community.
ref: 这些测试受到国际社会的广泛批评。

src: The British government stated that it "underlines the need for Iran to comply with its international obligations on the nuclear issue", and that the test was "unwelcome".
ref: 英国政府在声明中强调，“伊朗必须遵守其在核问题上的国际义务”，并且该测试“不受欢迎”。

src: The French ministry of defence suggested that "these missile tests can only reinforce the concerns of the international community", and the German government described the exercise as "regrettable".
ref: 法国国防部建议“这些导弹试验只会加深国际社会的担忧”，而德国政府称这次演习“令人遗憾”。

src: The United States government claims that the test was "evidence that the missile threat is not an imaginary one".
ref: 美国政府声称，这次试验“证明导弹威胁不是凭空捏造的”。

src: American presidential candidate John McCain suggested that it justified US proposals to construct a missile defence system in Eastern Europe, whilst his opponent Barack Obama described Iran's missile programme as a "great threat".
ref: 美国总统候选人约翰·麦凯恩表示，它证明了美国在东欧建设导弹防御系统的提议是合理的，而他的对手巴拉克·奥巴马则称，伊朗的导弹计划是一个“巨大威胁”。

src: Russia, however called for diplomacy, stating that they believe Iran to be "ready for negotiations", and Israel's Prime Minister issued a statement saying that he had "no desire for conflict or hostilities with Iran".
ref: 然而，俄罗斯呼吁进行外交努力，称他们相信伊朗已“准备好谈判”，以色列总理发表声明称，他“无意与伊朗发生冲突或敌对行动”。

src: The eruption of volcano Tungurahua on August 16 destroyed several small villages in the Ecuadorian Andes.
ref: 8月16日，通古拉瓦火山爆发，摧毁了厄瓜多尔安第斯山脉的几个小村庄。

src: At least 6 people have been killed and about 4000 residents of the affected area have been evacuated.
ref: 至少6人死亡，大约4000名受灾地区的居民被疏散。

src: The 5,023 m high volcano spat lava, stones and ash for several hours on Wednesday night.
ref: 周三晚上，5023米高的火山喷出岩浆、石块和火山灰长达数小时。

src: A 10km high ash cloud spread over an area of 740 by 180 km.
ref: 一个10公里高的灰烬云分布在180到740公里的区域内。

src: Towns like Ambato or Riobamba, 30 km away from the volcano have been covered with up to 5cm of ash.
ref: 像安巴托或里奥班巴这样距离火山30公里的城镇，已经被5厘米厚的火山灰覆盖。

src: Pyroclastic flows descending on the northwestern slopes of the volcano left a path of destruction behind.
ref: 火山碎屑流从火山的西北斜坡上流下，留下了一条破坏之路。

src: At least seven small villages and hamlets have been completely destroyed.
ref: 至少有七个小村庄和村庄被完全摧毁。

src: The Institute for Geophysics has lost an important part of its equipment installed on the slopes of Tungurahua, limiting their capability to monitor the volcanic activity.
ref: 地球物理研究所失去了安装在通古拉瓦斜坡上的一项重要设备，限制了它们监测火山活动的能力。

src: On Thursday, air traffic in the whole country was limited due to ash layers on several airports.
ref: 周四，由于几个机场的火山灰层，全国的空中交通受到限制。

src: On Thursday the provinces of Chimborazo, Tungurahua, Cotopaxi and Bolivar have been declared a disaster area.
ref: 周四，钦博拉索、通古拉瓦、科托帕希和玻利瓦尔省被宣布为灾区。

src: Losses in agriculture due to the ash cover are estimated at $150 Million.
ref: 由灰烬覆盖造成的农业损失估计为1.5亿美元。

src: On Friday, volcanic activity decreased to a calm that remained into Saturday evening, but the Ecuadorian Institute for Geophysics warns that a further eruption may be imminent.
ref: 周五，火山活动平静下来，一直持续到周六晚上，但是厄瓜多尔地球物理研究所警告说，可能还会有火山爆发。

src: In 1999, after a long period of rest, the volcano started an eruptive process that continues to this day.
ref: 1999年，经过长时间的休眠，火山开始喷发，一直持续到今天。

src: In May 2006 it increased dramatically culminating in violent eruptions on July 14 and August 16.
ref: 2006年5月，火山爆发急剧增加，在7月14日和8月16日达到顶峰。

src: The first case of Avian Flu in Iraq was announced today by the country's Health Minister, Abdel Mutalib Mohammed.
ref: 伊拉克卫生部长阿卜杜勒·穆塔里布·穆罕默德今天宣布，该国出现首例禽流感病例。

src: The preliminary result was reportedly from a United States military laboratory in Cairo; the World Health Organisation are expected to seek confirmation of this from a UK laboratory.
ref: 初步结果据报来自开罗的一个美国军事实验室，预计世界卫生组织将寻求英国一家实验室的证实。

src: The victim was Shangen Abdul Qader, a 15-year-old girl from the northern Kurdish village of Raniya.
ref: 患者是来自北部库尔德村庄拉尼亚的15岁女孩尚恩·阿卜杜勒·卡迪尔。

src: The death of the girl's uncle is also believed to be under investigation due to him having symptoms that may indicate flu.
ref: 据信，女孩的叔叔的死亡也在调查中，因为他可能有流感症状。

src: The area of Iraq where the suspected deaths occurred borders Turkey where there have been 12 confirmed cases of which four resulted in death.
ref: 发生可疑死亡病例的伊拉克地区与土耳其接壤，土耳其已确诊12例，其中4例死亡。

src: Turkey's last reported victim, Fatma Ozcan, was also aged 15.
ref: 土耳其上一次报告的患者法塔玛·奥兹坎也是15岁。

src: Chemical Ali, as he was known, received a death sentence on January 17, 2010, for ordering the 1988 gas attack on the town of Halabja in northern Iraq; 5,000 people are thought to have died in the assault on the Kurdish area.
ref: 2010年1月17日，马吉德·阿里因1988年下令对伊拉克北部哈拉比亚镇发动毒气袭击而被判死刑，据信有5000人在库尔德地区的袭击中丧生。

src: Majid, 68, had also received the death sentence at earlier trials for his part in attacks on Kurds in 1988, for suppressing a revolt by Shia Muslims, and for killing Shia Muslims in Baghdad in 1999.
ref: 68岁的马吉德在早些时候的审判中也因为他在1988年袭击库尔德人；镇压什叶派穆斯林的叛乱以及1999年在巴格达杀害什叶派穆斯林而被判处死刑。

src: He was regarded as one of the most brutal figures in Saddam Hussein's regime, ordering killings of opponents, as well as mass deportations.
ref: 他被认为是萨达姆·侯赛因政权中最残忍的人物之一，下令杀害反对者，并进行大规模驱逐。

src: He was captured after the fall of Saddam in 2003.
ref: 他在2003年萨达姆倒台后被捕。

src: According to the government spokesman, "[t]he execution happened without any violations, shouting or cries of joy."
ref: 据政府的发言人说，“行刑过程中没有任何违法行为，也没有欢呼雀跃。”

src: The Iraqi state television, al-Iraqiya, broadcast images that it says are of the hanging.
ref: 伊拉克国家电视台al-Iraqiya播放了据称是绞刑的画面。

src: A multi-center US study of 748 patients, who were to undergo treatment for coronary artery disease, has found that prayer by Christian, Muslim, Jewish, and Buddhist groups had no measurable effects on the medical health of the study subjects.
ref: 美国多中心对748名接受冠状动脉疾病治疗的患者进行的一项研究发现，基督教、穆斯林、犹太教和佛教团体的祈祷，对研究对象的医疗健康没有可测量的影响。

src: The prayers were conducted by established congregations and were held away from the hospitals.
ref: 祈祷是由既有的会众在远离医院的地方进行的。

src: The study, published in the 16 July 2005 issue of The Lancet, found that the likelihood of an adverse cardiovascular event in hospital, re-admission or death within six months was unaffected by prayer.
ref: 这项研究发表在2005年7月16日出版的“柳叶刀”杂志上。研究发现，在医院里发生心血管疾病、再次入院或在六个月内死亡的可能性不受祈祷的影响。

src: None of the patients were told that they were prayed for, and none of the prayer groups knew who they prayed for.
ref: 没有一个病人被告知有人为他们祈祷，也没有一个祈祷团体知道他们为谁祈祷。

src: The study also examined the effects of "music, imagery, and touch (MIT) therapy" before heart surgery.
ref: 该研究还检查了心脏手术前“音乐、图像和触觉（MIT）治疗”的效果。

src: Practitioners qualified to Level 1 Healing Touch taught the patient relaxation techniques and played soothing music before applying 21 Healing Touch hand positions, over a 40 minute session.
ref: 在40分钟的疗程中，拥有1级触摸治疗资格的从业者，在21处位置实施手触摸治疗前，教授患者放松技巧和播放舒缓音乐。

src: There was no significant change in the combined chance of an adverse cardiovascular event in hospital, re-admission or death within six months.
ref: 6个月内住院、再次入院或死亡的不良心血管事件的总发生率无显著变化。

src: However, while the set of patients was evenly split, only 7 patients who received MIT therapy died, and 20 patients who did not receive it died.
ref: 然而，尽管这组患者被平均分配，但接受MIT治疗的患者只有7名死亡，未接受的患者则有20名死亡。

src: The result is not highly significant due to the low overall number of people who died.
ref: 由于死亡总人数较低，结果并不显着。

src: A number of studies has recently examined the possible effects of prayer, with mixed results.
ref: 最近，一些研究调查了祈祷可能产生的影响，结果并不一致。

src: While some religious groups have hailed studies which found positive results , skeptics have challenged the very notion of scientifically examining prayer , and have described past studies as flawed or even fraudulent.
ref: 尽管一些宗教团体对发现积极结果的研究表示欢迎，但怀疑论者对科学检验祈祷的概念本身提出了质疑，称过去的研究存在缺陷，甚至存在欺诈。

src: The mechanisms through which distant intercessory prayer might convey healing benefit are unknown, the authors of the study explain.
ref: 这项研究的作者解释说，远距离的代祷可能传递治愈益处的机制尚不清楚。

src: One hypothesis they propose for such effects are "non-local features of consciousness based theoretically around observations in quantum physics."
ref: 对于这种效应，他们所提出的假设之一是“基于量子物理学观察理论的意识的非局部特征”。

src: Dutch financial institution ING Group reported today in its quarterly results an impairment charge of €194 million euros (approximately US$285.6 million).
ref: 荷兰金融机构荷兰国际集团今天在其季度业绩中报告了1.94亿欧元（约2.856亿美元）的减值支出。

src: However, as a result of selling an equity stake in rival ABN AMRO, the net profit of €2.48 billion, was 18% higher than last year.
ref: 然而，由于出售竞争对手ABN AMRO的股权，净利润为24.8亿欧元，比去年高出18％。

src: The impairment charge is a result of risky investments, including RBMS (mortgage) investments backed by subprime loans and Alt-A loans, which are made to borrowers with a slightly better credit profile than those in the subprime category, as well as from collateral debt obligations (CDOs).
ref: 减值支出是风险投资的结果，包括次级贷款和针对信用状况略好于次级贷款类别借款人的Alt-A贷款支持的RBMS（抵押贷款）投资，以及抵押债务凭证（CDOs）。

src: The new book Game of Shadows: Barry Bonds, BALCO, and the Steroids Scandal that Rocked Professional Sports, by Mark Fainaru-Wada and Lance Williams of The San Francisco Chronicle, is being released today.
ref: 《旧金山纪事报》记者马克·费纳鲁·瓦达和兰斯·威廉姆斯的新书《阴影游戏：震撼了职业体育界的巴里·邦兹、海湾地区实验室合作公司和类固醇丑闻》将于今日发行。

src: The authors not only implicate professional baseball celebrity Barry Bonds in the use of performance-enhancing drugs, but also say Gary Sheffield received human growth hormone and testosterone from Greg Anderson, Bonds's personal trainer.
ref: 作者不仅暗示职业棒球名将巴里·邦兹服用提高成绩的药物，而且还说，加里·谢菲尔德从格雷格·安德森那里得到了人体生长荷尔蒙和睾丸酮。后者是邦兹的私人教练。

src: The book goes on to claim that Jason Giambi also took performance-enhancing drugs from Anderson.
ref: 该书还声称，杰森·吉昂比也从安德森那里拿到了提高成绩的药物。

src: Bonds continues to insist that he did not realize his trainer was giving him steriods.
ref: 邦兹坚持说，他不知道教练一直在给他服用类固醇。

src: He claimed in his grand jury testimony that he thought he was receiving flaxseed oil and an arthritis salve.
ref: 他在为大陪审团作证的时候说，他以为自己使用的是亚麻籽油和关节炎药膏。

src: Sheffield's response to the claims was quite simple: when asked if the allegations made against him were true, his response was "Nope."
ref: 谢菲尔德的回应非常简单：当被问及对他的指控是否属实时，他的答复是：“不”。

src: Despite the book's accusations of Sheffield and Giambi, it centers around Bonds and the founder of the Bay Area Laboratory Co-Operative or BALCO, Victor Conte Jr.
ref: 尽管对谢菲尔德和吉昂比提出了指控，但是这本书重点指向了邦兹和海湾地区实验室合作公司的创始人小维克多·孔黛。

src: Conte is currently serving four months in prison for distribution of steriods and money laundering.
ref: 孔黛正在监狱服刑四个月，罪名是分发类固醇和洗钱。

src: It appears that the steroid controversy concerning Bonds will only intensify as he continues to march on towards the career home runs record, one of baseball's most sacred records.
ref: 看起来，随着邦兹继续向职业本垒打纪录-棒球界最神圣的纪录之一——挺进，有关他服用类固醇的争议将愈演愈烈。

src: A sixteen-year-old girl, Darlene Etienne, was pulled out from underneath the rubble of a collapsed school in Haiti yesterday, fifteen days after a magnitude 7.0 earthquake struck the country, devastating most buildings in the capital, Port-au-Prince.
ref: 昨日，在一场7.0级地震袭击海地15天之后，一名16岁女孩达琳·艾蒂安被人们从该国一所倒塌的学校废墟下面救了出来，地震摧毁了首都太子港的大多数建筑物。

src: Etienne had been studying at school in the capital when the tremors starｔed, collapsing the building.
ref: 艾蒂安正在首都的学校学习时，地震开始并摧毁了这座建筑物。

src: She had apparently survived by drinking water from a bathroom, and the Al Jazeera news agency reports rescuers had heard her mumbling something about having some Coca-Cola.
ref: 她显然是因为在洗手间喝水而幸存下来。据半岛通讯社报道，救援人员听见她咕哝着说想要喝点可口可乐。

src: When pulled from the rubble, she was reportedly dehydrated, but happy.
ref: 据报道，被拖出废墟时，她虽然已经脱水，但是很愉快。

src: Etienne was taken to a French-run field hospital, and later to a hospital ship moored off the Haitian coast for further treatment.
ref: 艾蒂安被送往一家法国人办的战地医院，后来又被送往在海地近海锚泊的一艘医院船上继续治疗。

src: She just said 'Thank you', she's very weak, which suggests that she's been there for 15 days, said the head of the rescue team that recovered the girl, Samuel Bernes, noting that she was located "in a pocket, surrounded by concrete".
ref: 救出这位姑娘的救援队长塞缪尔·伯恩斯说，她身体非常虚弱，只说了一句“谢谢”。这意味着15天来她一直被困在那里。他指出，她当时位于“一个空当里，四周都是混凝土构件”。

src: She couldn't really talk to us or say how long she'd been there but I think she'd been there since the earthquake.
ref: 她无法跟我们说话，或告诉我们她在那儿被困了多久，但是我想，地震开始后她就一直在那里。

src: I don't think she could have survived even a few more hours, rescuer Claude Fuilla told the Associated Press.
ref: 救援队员克劳德·弗伊拉告诉美联社说，我想，要是再晚几个小时，她就不可能活着被救出来了。

src: I don't know how she happened to resist that long, said another rescue worker, JP Malaganne, as quoted by the BBC.
ref: 据BBC引用另一名救援工作者JP·玛拉加纳的话说，我不知道她何以能够坚持那么久。

src: It all happened very quickly, but rescue teams managed to get her out and she was covered in layers of dust and concrete, said Jonah Hull, a correspondent for Al Jazeera, describing the rescue effort as being "a delicate process".
ref: 这一切都发生得很快，但是救援队设法把她救了出来。她被埋在好几层灰尘和混凝土下面，半岛通讯社的记者乔纳·赫尔说。该记者将这次救援行动描述为“一个小心翼翼的过程”。

src: Five days ago, the Haitian government officially ended its search for living people under the rubble; upwards of 130 people have been rescued from underneath the remains of collapsed buildings.
ref: 五天以前，海地政府正式结束在废墟下搜寻幸存者的行动。从倒塌的建筑物下面救出了130余人。

src: Italian Prime Minister Silvio Berlusconi's government received a vote of confidence from the Italian Senate Thursday, after it earned the confidence of the House yesterday.
ref: 意大利总理希尔维奥·贝卢斯科尼的政府在昨天获得众院的信任票后，又于星期四获得了参院的信任票。

src: The Senate's tally was 170 pros, 117 cons and no abstentions.
ref: 参院的计票结果是170票赞成，117票反对，没有弃权票。

src: Berlusconi declared these votes of confidence as demonstrating the strength and coherence of his coalition.
ref: 贝卢斯科尼宣布这些信任票显示了联合政府的力量和团结一致。

src: He also declared that he wanted a change in the electoral law so that a bipartisan political system would arise, and that he wants to form a majority government after the next election.
ref: 他还宣布自己想要修改选举法，以便形成两党制的政治体制，而且他还想在下一次选举后组成一个多数派政府。

src: In a Tuesday media event, Verizon Wireless announced it had reached an agreement with Apple Inc. and would begin selling a CDMA version of the iPhone 4 beginning early February.
ref: 在星期二的一次媒体活动中，威讯无线公司宣布，该公司已与苹果公司达成协议，将于2月初开始销售CDMA版本的iPhone4。

src: The move means the end of rival company AT&T's status as the only official US carrier of the iPhone, a status it held since the first iPhone debuted in 2007.
ref: 这一举动意味着AT&T公司作为iPhone唯一美国官方载体的竞争地位已经结束。自2007年第一部iPhone首次推出以来，该公司一直保持着这种地位。

src: The press conference, held in New York City, was hosted by Verizon's president, Lowell McAdam, Apple's chief operating officer, Tim Cook, and Verizon Wireless' chief executive officer, Dan Mead.
ref: 威讯无线总裁洛维尔·麦克亚当、苹果公司首席运营官蒂姆·库克和威讯无线的首席执行官丹·米德主持了在纽约城召开的这次记者会。

src: Neither Verizon Communications CEO Ivan Seidenberg nor Apple CEO Steve Jobs attended the conference.
ref: 威讯通讯公司的首席执行官伊万·赛登伯格和苹果公司首席执行官史蒂夫·乔布斯均未出席会议。

src: During the event, McAdam said, "If the press writes something long enough and hard enough, it eventually comes true."
ref: 在记者会上，麦克亚当说：“如果新闻界报道的东西足够长，足够有力，那么它最终就会成为现实”。

src: "We're bringing the fruit of our labor with a giant partner, and that's Apple."
ref: “我们正将自己的劳动成果与一个巨人伙伴结合到一起，那就是苹果公司”。

src: Such a partnership had been rumored for years, and the amount of speculation grew over the past few months.
ref: 这一伙伴关系已经被谣传了多年，而在过去几个月里各种猜测愈发多了起来。

src: iPhone 4 pre-orders for current Verizon users begin February 3, and a public release is scheduled for February 10.
ref: 威讯用户将于2月3日开始提交iPhone4的预订单，计划将于2月10日公开发行。

src: The "Verizon iPhone," as it has been dubbed for months, has been altered from the original iPhone 4 so it can utilize Verizon's 3G CDMA (code division multiple access) network.
ref: “威讯iPhone”已经冠名几个月了。它是原始iPhone4的修改版，以便让它能够利用威讯的3G CDMA（码分多址连接方式）网络。

src: This means, however, that Verizon iPhone users will not be able to use the company's 4G LTE (long term evolution) network, and will thus be unable to make calls and access the Internet at the same time.
ref: 然而，这又意味着“威讯iPhone”的用户将不能使用该公司的4G LTE（长期演进技术）网络，同时也就不能访问英特网和打电话。

src: Cook told the audience that the LTE hardware was not ready yet, saying, "The first generation LTE chip sets force some design compromises, some of which we would not make."
ref: 库克告诉听众说，LTE硬件尚未制作完备，“第一代LTE芯片提出了一些折衷性设计方案，有些方案我们不会采纳”。

src: "Secondly—and most importantly—Verizon Wireless customers have told us they want the iPhone now."
ref: “第二点也是最重要的一点，威讯无线客户告诉我们，他们现在就想得到iPhone”。

src: However, Verizon's iPhone 4 allows the user to create a personal Wi-Fi hotspot, which means up to five other wireless devices can connect to the Internet through the phone.
ref: 然而，威讯的iPhone4允许用户创建个人WiFi热点，这意味着另外5部无线设备可以通过该手机接入英特网。

src: Pricing was announced as US$199 for a 16 GB version and US$299 for a 32 GB version, both requiring two-year contracts—the same cost for an AT&T iPhone 4.
ref: 公布的价格是：16GB版199美元，32GB版299美元。两个版本都需要签订两年的合同-与AT&T iPhone4的价格相同。

src: However, Verizon said it would not mention the cost of data plans at this time, with Mead saying, "We talked about the device pricing, but we're not going to talk about the pricing for the network for that connectivity."
ref: 然而威讯又说，它不愿意在这个时候谈到数据计划的成本。米德说：“我们商谈了设备的定价问题，但是不打算商谈网络连接定价的问题”。

src: Four members of a filmcrew have been arrested on suspicion of assault after squirting water at movie star Tom Cruise at the London premiere of the War of the Worlds on Sunday evening.
ref: 一个电影制作团队的4名成员因涉嫌袭击而被捕。他们在星期日晚上《世界大战》伦敦首映式上向影星汤姆·克鲁兹脸上喷水。

src: The crew were freelancers filming a new comedy show for Channel 4.
ref: 这个自由电影团队当时正在为第四频道拍摄一部新滑稽剧。

src: Channel 4 has no production facilities itself; all television programmes are commissioned from independent companies .
ref: 第四频道没有自己的制作设备；所有的电视节目都委托给独立公司制作。

src: Cruise had been on a walkabout meeting and greeting fans, and was being interviewed by the crew under the impression that it was a serious interview, when they used a fake microphone to squirt him in the face.
ref: 克鲁兹当时正在一次漫游会面中与粉丝打招呼。他接受了这个团队的采访，还以为那是一次认真的采访。结果这几个人用一支假麦克风向他脸上喷水。

src: He took hold of the culprit, grasping his wrist, asking him why he did it.
ref: 他一把抓住了恶作剧者，握住他的手腕，质问他为什么那样做。

src: "Why would you do that? What's so funny about that? It's ridiculous."
ref: “你为什么要那样干？很好玩吗？荒唐”。

src: "I'm here giving you an interview, answering your questions and you do something nasty."
ref: “我在这里接受你们的采访，回答你们的问题，而你们却干出这种讨厌的事”。

src: Security guards then took the filmcrew away, before they were arrested and bailed by the police.
ref: 随后，保安人员拉走了这拨人并逮捕了他们。后来他们被警方保释了。

src: Scotland Yard have said, "We will see whether to pursue the charges, or see whether the victim wants to pursue it."
ref: 苏格兰场曾表示：“我们要看看是否需要起诉，或者看看受害者是否打算起诉”。

src: Tom Cruise resumed meeting fans and signing autographs, spending an hour in Leicester Square.
ref: 汤姆·克鲁兹则继续与粉丝见面并为粉丝签名，在莱斯特广场逗留了一个小时。

src: They said that they defend the investigation of corruption schemes, however they said that the Lula government is the victim of a destabilization campaign.
ref: 他们说，他们要保护腐败案的调查计划。然而他们又说，卢纳政府是一场稳定破坏运动的受害者。

src: They blame the President of the United States George W. Bush for the crisis.
ref: 他们谴责说，美国总统乔治·布什要为这场危机负责。

src: They say that the government of Lula is victim of a coup attempt by Bush supporters.
ref: 他们说，卢纳政府是布什支持者发动的政变的受害者。

src: Other parliamentarians, even some of the Workers' Party, didn't agree with the coup argument.
ref: 其他议员，其中甚至包括一些工人党议员，都不同意政变的说法。

src: Some senators said that only the Wokers' Party itself initiated the crisis.
ref: 有些参议员说，引发危机的恰恰是工人党自己。

src: The Dover, Pennsylvania school board became the first to mandate inclusion of Intelligent Design in a public school biology curriculum.
ref: 宾夕法尼亚州的多弗尔学校教育委员会率先授权将智能设计纳入公立学校生物学课程体系。

src: For this year's November 8 election, Republicans fielded a pro-Intelligent Design slate of candidates including some returning candidates who had previously voted to include a statement about Intelligent Design in the biology curriculum.
ref: 为了准备今年11月8日的选举，共和党为候选人推出了一个由赞成智能设计的候选人组成的名单，包括一些此前曾投票赞成将智能设计纳入生物学课程体系而后来又改变了观点的候选人。

src: A mixed slate of Democrat and Republican candidates came forward as an alternative group of school board candidates, the Dover CARES coalition.
ref: 这份由民主党候选人和共和党候选人混合组成的名单形成了教育委员会候选人的替代群体，即多弗尔CARES联盟。

src: They proposed to remove Intelligent Design from the biology curriculum but allow discussion of Intelligent Design in courses dealing with philosophy and comparative religion.
ref: 他们建议将智能设计从生物课程体系中删除，但是却允许在哲学课和比较宗教学课程中讨论智能设计问题。

src: All eight open school board seats were won by Dover CARES coalition candidates.
ref: 全部8个教育委员会的公开席位都被多弗尔CARES联盟的候选人夺得。

src: Two candidates who had previously voted as school board members to include intelligent design in the public school science curriculum received the fewest votes in Tuesday's election.
ref: 在星期二的选举中，两名此前曾作为教育委员会成员赞成将智能设计纳入公立学校科学课程体系的候选人所得到的选票最少。

src: One of the newly elected board members is Bryan Rehm, a parent of a Dover school student.
ref: 布莱恩·莱姆是新当选的教育委员会成员之一。他是多弗尔学校一名学生的父亲。

src: Rehm, along with ten other parents, initiated a law suit against the school board for its decision to insert Intelligent Design into the science curriculum.
ref: 莱姆以及其他10名父母对教育委员会提起诉讼，谴责后者将智能设计纳入科学课程体系。
