src: In October 2004, the Dover school board decided that Intelligent Design is a scientific theory that should be mentioned in biology classes that include discussion of biological evolution as part of the course content.
ref: 2004年10月，多弗尔学校教育委员会决定，智能设计是应该在生物课上被提到的一个科学理论，作为课程的一部分内容，生物课上也讨论生物进化论的问题。

src: The board mandated that a statement should be read in those classes stating "Intelligent Design is an explanation of the origin of life," and "The school leaves the discussion of the Origins of Life to individual students and their families."
ref: 教育委员会要求在那些课堂上宣读一份声明，即“智能设计是对生命起源的一种解释”，而“学校应将有关生命起源的讨论留给学生自己及其家庭去做”。

src: The school board's statement on Intelligent Design directs students to the book Of Pandas and People as a source of information "for students who might be interested in gaining an understanding of what Intelligent Design actually involves."
ref: 该教育委员会关于智能设计的这一声明引导学生阅读《关于大熊猫和人类》这本书，“以此作为一个信息源，帮助可能对智能设计发生兴趣的学生了解智能设计实际上包含些什么内容”。

src: This book is published by the Foundation for Thought and Ethics, a non-profit organization founded for the purpose of "promoting and publishing textbooks presenting a Christian perspective."
ref: 这本书是思想与伦理基金会出版的。这是一个以“推动和出版代表基督教观点的课本”为宗旨的非盈利组织。

src: Parents of some Dover public school students filed a lawsuit against the school board, charging that including the school board's statement on Intelligent Design was an attempt to introduce religion into the science curriculum.
ref: 多弗尔公立学校的一些学生家长对学校教育委员会提出法律诉讼，指控该教育委员会关于智能设计的声明试图将宗教引入科学课程体系。

src: The book Of Pandas and People says, "Intelligent design means that various forms of life began abruptly through an intelligent agency."
ref: 《关于大熊猫和人类》这本书说道：“智能设计的观点，意味着各种形式的生命均突然产生于某一智能机构”。

src: The original complaint in the law suit against the school board claimed that "Intelligent design is a non-scientific argument or assertion."
ref: 诉讼中最初对学校教育委员会提出的指控是：“智能设计是一个非科学命题或者是一种断言”。

src: The US District Court Judge John Jones, who heard the non-jury case, hopes to make his ruling by the end of the year.
ref: 美国地区法院的法官约翰·琼斯听取了这个无陪审团案件，并希望在年底做出裁决。

src: The evidence phase of the trial ended on November 4, 2005.
ref: 审判的取证阶段于2005年11月4日结束。

src: A local Dover newspaper, the York Daily Record, editorialized that Dover voters should take trial testimony into account during the general election when they could cast votes for school board members along with other elective offices.
ref: 多弗尔当地报纸《约克日志》发表评论说，多弗尔选民应该在普选期间将审判证词纳入考虑范围，以便决定对学校教育委员会成员和其他选任职位的投票。

src: Biology teachers in the Dover schools have refused to read the school board's statement on Intelligent Design to students because the Pennsylvania state code for education states that "The professional educator may not knowingly and intentionally misrepresent subject matter."
ref: 多弗尔学校的生物教师拒绝宣读教育委员会关于智能设计的声明，因为宾夕法尼亚州的教育法典要求“职业教育家不得在明知不对的情况下故意曲解教学内容”。

src: In a letter to their administrator, the teachers stated their view that "Intelligent design is not science."
ref: 教师们在给行政管理人的信中表明自己的观点：“智能设计不是科学”。

src: School administrators have been reading the school board's Intelligent Design statement to students in Dover public schools.
ref: 学校的行政管理人员一直在研究多弗尔学校教育委员会向学生宣读的智能设计声明。

src: In a free trade zone in Antalya, Turkey, 80 women workers of FMC Novamed are in strike for almost a year now, since September 26th, 2006.
ref: 自2006年9月26日起，在土耳其安塔利亚的一个自由贸易区，FMC诺米克的80名女工举行了近一年的罢工。

src: They allege not only low wages but also severe abuses on FMC's part.
ref: 他们不仅声称工资低，而且还指控FMC严重滥用职权。

src: Novamed, founded in 2001, is a factory managed by Turkish capitalists and located in the free trade zone in Antalya, Turkey.
ref: 诺米克成立于2001年，是一家由土耳其资本家管理的工厂，位于土耳其安塔利亚的自由贸易区。

src: It is owned by Fresenius Medical Care (FMC), which is an international corporation with its headquarters in Germany.
ref: 它由费森尤斯医疗保健公司（FMC）所有，这是一家总部设在德国的国际公司。

src: With factories in 12 countries and a total of 100,000 workers, FMC is a monopoly in the market of dialysis products.
ref: FMC在12个国家设有工厂，共有10万名员工，垄断透析产品市场。

src: NASA has completed a major test of a 20-meter square solar sail, marking a "crucial milestone" in space propulsion technology.
ref: 美国宇航局完成了对20平方米太阳帆的重大测试，标志着太空推进技术的“关键里程碑”。

src: It is not the first to test solar sails, as the Japanese have deployed two solar sails in space.
ref: 它不是第一个测试太阳帆的人，因为日本人在太空中部署了两个太阳帆。

src: The Planetary Society is planning on launching a solar sail possibly by June 21.
ref: 行星学会计划在6月21日前发射太阳帆。

src: Shot into orbit by a converted intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM), the Cosmos 1 would be launched from a submerged Russian submarine from within the Barents Sea.
ref: 宇宙1号将由一枚改装的洲际弹道导弹（ICBM）送入轨道，从巴伦支海的一艘俄罗斯潜艇上发射。

src: The spacecraft, powered by the sail, will have no destination.
ref: 由帆提供动力的宇宙飞船将没有目的地。

src: The purpose is simply to test the propulsion system that uses the pressure from solar light particles to move the ship outward from a starting orbit around the earth at 500 miles.
ref: 其目的仅仅是测试推进系统，该系统利用来自太阳光线粒子的压力将飞船从环绕地球500英里的起始轨道向外移动。

src: The propulsion technology is currently believed to be the most efficient available for interstellar space travel.
ref: 目前，推进技术被认为是星际太空旅行中最有效的。

src: Theoretically a craft propelled by the pressure of a constant light source, such as a purpose-built laser, could achieve speeds approaching the speed of light.
ref: 从理论上讲，由例如专用激光器等的恒定光源的压力推动的工艺可以实现接近光速的速度。

src: This is due to the efficiencies of the spacecraft not having to carry its own fuel.
ref: 这是由于航天器的效率不必携带自己的燃料。

src: Approaching the speed of light would, however, require a long period of constant acceleration.
ref: 然而，接近光速将需要长时间的恒定加速。

src: Such high speed will be impossible for the current test vehicles and any launched in the foreseeable future, as they rely on the light from the Sun, which rapidly becomes weaker with increasing distance.
ref: 对于当前的测试车辆以及在可预见的未来发动的任何测试车辆来说，这样的高速度是不可能的，因为它们依赖于来自太阳的光线，随着距离的增加，太阳光线会迅速变弱。

src: According to the National Geographic News, "NASA, the European Space Agency, Japan, and Russia all have developed solar sails, but none has yet tried to prove that the sails can propel a spacecraft under controlled flight."
ref: 据《国家地理新闻》报道，“美国国家航空航天局、欧洲航天局、日本和俄罗斯都已经研制出了太阳帆，但还没有一个国家试图证明太阳帆可以推动受控飞行的航天器。”

src: The Supreme Court of Japan ruled on Wednesday that a condition imposed by an Act for acquiring Japanese nationality is unconstitutional, and confirmed the nationality of the plaintiffs.
ref: 日本最高法院周三裁定，一项获得日本国籍的法案强加的条件违反宪法，并确认了原告的国籍。

src: Each of the ten plaintiffs is a child who was born to a Filipino mother and later acknowledged by a Japanese father.
ref: 十名原告中的每一个都是菲律宾母亲所生的孩子，后来得到了一位日本父亲的承认。

src: They filed claims for Japanese nationality between 2003 and 2005, but the government turned down because the parents were not legally married in each case.
ref: 他们在2003年到2005年之间申请加入日本国籍，但是都被政府拒绝了，因为他们的父母都没有合法结婚。

src: According to Japan's Act on nationality, a non-Japanese child (under 20) who was after its birth legitimated by marriage and acknowledgment can acquire Japanese nationality by filing notification, with some requirements which the plaintiffs had already fulfilled.
ref: 根据《日本国籍法》，非日本籍儿童（20岁以下）经婚姻和承认合法生育后，可以通过申报通知获得日本国籍，其中一些条件原告已经满足。

src: The Supreme Court ruled on Wednesday that the condition 'legitimated by marriage' results in unreasonable distinctions to violate Article 14 of the Constitution of Japan, which guarantees equality under the law.
ref: 最高法院周三裁定，“婚姻合法化”的条件导致无理的区别，违反了日本宪法第14条，该条款保障法律规定的平等。

src: The Supreme Court left effective the rest of this provision and accepted the plaintiffs' claims for Japanese nationality.
ref: 最高法院对该条款的其余部分保持有效，并接受了原告对日本国籍的要求。

src: The judgment pointed out recent changes in people's notions in Japan as to family life or parent-child relationship, and also referred to two conventions which Japan has ratified.
ref: 判决书指出了日本人对家庭生活或亲子关系的最近观念的变化，并提到了日本批准的两项公约。

src: There are estimated to be tens of thousands of children in similar situations in Japan and a considerable number overseas.
ref: 据估计，在日本有成千上万的儿童处于类似的情况，在海外也有相当数量。

src: Chief Cabinet Secretary Nobutaka Machimura on Wednesday made a comment about the judgment at a press conference.
ref: 内阁官房长官町村信孝周三在新闻发布会上对判决作出评论。

src: Machimura said, "This judgment, saying violation of Constitution, weighs so much."
ref: 町村说：“这种判断违反宪法的说法非常重要。”

src: "As a government, we should take it gravely, and we want to examine its content in detail and consider how to react."
ref: “作为政府，我们应该严肃对待，我们希望详细研究其内容并考虑如何应对。”

src: He added, "I have an impression, just hearing of it, that it's a reasonable judgment."
ref: 他补充说，“我有个印象，仅仅是听说，这是一个合理的判断。”

src: "Equality under the law is an important point of view."
ref: “法律面前的平等是一个重要的观点。”

src: :(a) while it's within the scope of the Legislation of the Diet how conditions are set for acquiring / losing Japanese nationality (Article 10), a distinction without rational reasons brought by such a condition may be unconstitutional (Article 14: Paragraph 1).
ref: ：（a）虽然日本国会的立法范围内规定了取得和丧失日本国籍的条件（第10条），但如果没有合理理由对这种条件作出区分，则可能是违反宪法的（第14条第1款）。

src: :(b) being legitimated by the parents' marriage or not is a thing the child can not change by its will or endeavor.
ref: ：（b）是否因父母的婚姻而合法化，是子女不能通过意愿或努力而改变的事情。

src: :(c) the purpose of legislation of this provision is rational, because that is considered to demand the child's tight connection with Japan's society.
ref: ：（c）这项规定的立法目的是合理的，因为这被认为是要求儿童与日本社会紧密联系。

src: :(d) after this provision was added in 1984, both notions and actual situations of people in Japan have been becoming of variety, as to family life or parent-child relationship.
ref: ：（d）在1984年增加这项规定后，日本人的概念和实际情况在家庭生活或亲子关系方面变得多种多样。

src: :(e) the child's tight connection with Japan's society can not be measured instantly by whether the parents have got legally married.
ref: ：（e）孩子与日本社会的紧密关系无法通过父母是否合法结婚来立即衡量。

src: :(g) this provision results in distinctions not only as to legitimacy but also as to two other factors: any non-Japanese child without legitimacy acknowledged before its birth by a Japanese father, and any child without legitimacy born to a Japanese mother, can acquire Japanese nationality provided by this Act.
ref: ：（g）这一规定不仅在合法性方面有区别，而且在另外两个方面也有区别：任何日本父亲在出生前承认的无合法性的非日本儿童，以及任何日本母亲所生的无合法性的儿童，都可以获得本法规定的日本国籍。

src: These distinctions have no rational relation with the purpose of legislation.
ref: 这些区别与立法的目的没有合理的关系。

src: :(h) another provision in this Act states a child in this situation may be naturalized with fewer conditions, but it doesn't justify the relation between the purpose and the distinctions, because naturalization is within discretion of the Minister of Justice.
ref: ：（h）该法的另一项规定指出，在这种情况下，儿童可以在较少的条件下归化，但这并不证明目的与区别之间的关系是正当的，因为归化是由司法部长斟酌决定的。

src: One judge in the majority, who supported the conclusion, shared a view with the five dissenting: the distinction as to legitimacy is caused by non-existence of due legislation.
ref: 多数派的一名法官支持这一结论，他同意五名持不同意见的法官的意见：合法性的区别是由于没有适当的立法。

src: This judge concluded that the Judiciary can remedy the lack, because it doesn't betray the will of the Legislation of the Diet as to this Act.
ref: 该法官得出结论认为，司法机构可以弥补这一缺陷，因为它并没有背叛国会立法对本法案的意愿。

src: Two dissenting judges of the five concluded that these distinctions are unconstitutional, but correction of it depends, in principle, on legislative measures by the Diet.
ref: 五名法官中有两名持不同意见的法官得出结论说，这些区别是违反宪法的，但是，原则上，纠正这种区别取决于国会的立法措施。

src: The other opinion of three dissenting judges is contrary to the major opinion.
ref: 三位不同意见的法官的另一种意见与主要意见相悖。

src: They argued, for example, :the distinction as to legitimacy is not unconstitutional and is within the range of choice of legislative measures.
ref: 例如，他们认为：对合法性的区分并非违宪，而且属于选择立法措施的范围。

src: :even if it's unconstitutional, the plaintiffs' appeals are to be dismissed, following the viewpoint in the other dissenting opinion.
ref: ：即使这是违宪的，原告的上诉也要被驳回，遵循其他不同意见的观点。

src: :it's dubious whether or how people in Japan have been making changes as in (d).
ref: ：在（d）中，日本人是否或如何做出改变是可疑的。

src: :it's rational to offer Japanese nationality in two other situations as in (g).
ref: ：在（g）中的另外两种情况下提供日本国籍是合理的。

src: :easy naturalization as in (h) to offer Japanese nationality is rational both as a measure and in practice.
ref: ：简单归化，如（h）中提供日本国籍无论是作为一种措施还是在实践中都是理性的。

src: :foreign countries' movement as in (f) is not to be instantly reflected in judgment on constitutionality; they are different from Japan, with a large number of international marriages and expansion of regional unification like EU.
ref: ：（f）项所述的外国运动不应立即反映在对合宪性的判断上，他们与日本不同，有着大量的跨国婚姻和像欧盟这样的地区统一性的扩张。

src: A military weapons storage facility in al-Masalmyiah, just north of Aleppo, Syria has exploded, killing at least 15 Syrian soldiers and injuring at least 50 others.
ref: 叙利亚阿勒颇北部al-马萨米亚一处军事武器储存设施发生爆炸，造成至少15名叙利亚士兵死亡，至少50人受伤。

src: The explosion occurred on the grounds of a military academy's infantry school where weapons and ammunition are stored.
ref: 爆炸发生在一所军事学院的步兵学校，那里储存着武器和弹药。

src: The blast, which occurred at 4:30 a.m. EEST (UTC+3) is believed to have been caused by excessive summer temperatures, but other reports suggest that a gas leak may have sparked the blast.
ref: 爆炸发生在EEST（UTC+3）凌晨4点30分，据信是由于夏季气温过高引起的，但其他报告显示气体泄漏可能引发爆炸。

src: Firefighters report several deaths and injuries, but also said that the fires caused by the blast have been extinguished.
ref: 消防队员报告了几起伤亡事件，但也表示，爆炸引起的火灾已经被扑灭。

src: Tens of thousands of Syrians took to the streets Friday in cities across the country protesting for freedom.
ref: 成千上万的叙利亚人星期五走上街头，在全国各地的城市为自由抗议。

src: Syria's official news agency (SANA) reported, "scattered groups of citizens came out to the streets in several areas of the provinces after Friday prayers and chanted slogans calling for freedom without the intervention of security forces."
ref: 叙利亚官方通讯社（SANA）报道说，“星期五祈祷后，分散的民众在几个省份的街道上游行，高呼口号，要求在没有安全部队干预的情况下获得自由。”

src: However, protests in Damascus reportedly turned violent as security forces were said to disperse the crowds with batons and tear gas to prevent protesters reaching the capital's main square.
ref: 然而，据报道，大马士革的抗议活动变得暴力，因为据说安全部队用警棍和催泪瓦斯驱散人群，以防止抗议者到达首都的主要广场。

src: "I counted 15 mukhabarat [secret police] busloads," a source reported to Reuters news agency.
ref: 一位消息人士向路透社报道说：“我数了有15辆穆哈巴拉特【秘密警察】大巴。”

src: "They went into the alleyways just north of the square chasing protesters and yelling 'you pimps, you infiltrators, you want freedom? we will give it to you'."
ref: “他们走进广场北部的小巷，追赶抗议者，大喊‘你们这些皮条客、渗透分子，你们想要自由？我们会把它给你的。”

src: Protests in Syria have intensified since mid-March after families of political prisoners held rallies in Damascus and people in Daraa protested against the arrests of more than a dozen children for anti-regime graffiti.
ref: 自3月中旬以来，叙利亚的抗议活动愈演愈烈。此前，多名政治犯的家人在大马士革举行集会，德拉的民众抗议十几名儿童因涂鸦反政府而被捕。

src: The protests continued as Syria’s President, Bashar al-Assad failed to lift the emergency law the country has operated under since his Arab Socialist Ba’ath Party came to power in 1963.
ref: 抗议活动在叙利亚总统巴沙尔·阿萨德任内继续进行，他领导的阿拉伯社会复兴党自1963年执政以来一直执行的紧急状态法未能得到解除。

src: The Assad government has met protests with a mixture of minor concessions and force.
ref: 阿萨德政府以小让步和武力相结合的方式应对抗议活动。

src: After a meeting of NATO foreign ministers in Berlin, US Secretary of State Hillary Clinton said, "The Syrian government did not meet the legitimate demands of the Syrian people."
ref: 美国国务卿希拉里·克林顿在柏林会见北约外长后表示，“叙利亚政府没有满足叙利亚人民的合法要求。”

src: "It is time for the Syrian government to stop its crack down on these people and begin to meet their aspirations."
ref: “叙利亚政府是时候停止对这些人的镇压，开始实现他们的愿望了。”

src: The delegation asked for a deadline for their demands to be met.
ref: 代表团要求为满足他们的要求设定最后期限。

src: Al Jazeera correspondent Rula Amin said, "It seems from the people in Daraa that the government is seriously trying to contain [the situation in] Daraa because that is where it all started."
ref: 半岛电视台记者鲁拉·阿明说：“从达拉的人们看来，政府电视台正在严肃地试图控制达拉的局势，因为那里是一切开始的地方。”

src: "If they manage to calm the situation in Daraa, the government believes it will be able to contain the situation throughout Syria."
ref: “如果他们设法平息达拉的局势，政府相信将能够控制整个叙利亚的局势。”

src: A Kam Air plane from Afghanistan, traveling in China's Xinjiang region was not hijacked and did not receive a bomb threat, according to Afghan officials.
ref: 据阿富汗官员称，一架来自阿富汗的Kam航空公司的飞机在中国新疆地区飞行时没有被劫持，也没有收到炸弹威胁。

src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
ref: 此前中国新华社报道，一架飞机被劫持。

src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
ref: 后来的报道说，这架飞机受到炸弹威胁，被转移回阿富汗，降落在坎大哈。

src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
ref: 早期的报道说，这架飞机被拒绝在乌鲁木齐紧急降落后被转移回阿富汗。

src: The plane was traveling to China and had been ordered to turn around after the proper paperwork was not in place.
ref: 这架飞机当时正在飞往中国的途中，由于不具备所需的文件材料，它被命令掉头。

src: Upon its return, the plane landed in Kabul after it encountered high winds.
ref: 飞机返回后，遇到大风后降落在喀布尔。

src: It is not known how many people were on board the plane, but no injuries are reported.
ref: 目前尚不清楚飞机上有多少人，但没有受伤报告。

src: A NATO official denied there was an emergency landing due to a threat and says the Chinese media reports are untrue.
ref: 一名北约官员否认由于威胁而紧急降落，并称中国媒体报道不真实。

src: The Xinjiang region was the scene of a violent uprising by its Uyghur population last month.
ref: 新疆地区上个月发生了维吾尔族暴力起义。

src: Sharansky’s resignation as Minister of Diaspora Affairs and Jerusalem was accepted by Prime Minister Ariel Sharon at Sunday’s cabinet meeting.
ref: 在星期天的内阁会议上，以色列总理沙龙接受了沙朗斯基辞去犹太人事务部部长和耶路撒冷部长职务的决定。

src: "The only aim of the current government is the implementation of the disengagement plan, and therefore it is wrong, even immoral, for me to remain a part of this government."
ref: “本届政府的唯一目标是实施脱离接触计划，因此，让我继续留在这个政府是错误的，甚至是不道德的。”

src: Sharansky said that although he was always against what he calls the "so-called disengagement plan," he decided to leave the government once the battle against the withdrawal was no longer able to be waged from within the government.
ref: 沙朗斯基说，尽管他一直反对他所谓的“所谓的脱离接触计划”，但一旦反对撤军的战斗无法在政府内部展开，他决定离开政府。

src: "Our main battle now is public opinion, because the struggle in the government is finished," he said.
ref: “我们现在的主要战斗是公众舆论，因为政府的斗争已经完成，”他说。

src: Although he hopes to take the struggle to the people, the former minister hopes his move will pave the way for other politicians to follow their consciences.
ref: 尽管他希望把这场斗争带给人民，但这位前部长希望他的举动将为其他政客遵循他们的良知铺平道路。

src: "I don’t know how effective my quitting will be," Sharansky said, "but I hope it will encourage other politicians and ministers to at least vote according to what they believe and what they think."
ref: 沙朗斯基说：“我不知道我的辞职会有多有效，但我希望它能鼓励其他政客和部长们至少根据他们的信仰和想法来投票。”

src: The former prisoner of Zion (who served time in a Soviet prison for wanting to emigrate to Israel) says his main objection to the plan to withdraw from Gaza and northern Samaria is the fact that the withdrawal is not contingent on the creation of democracy within the Palestinian Authority.
ref: 这位锡安的前囚犯（曾因想移居以色列而在苏联监狱服刑）说，他对从加沙和撒玛利亚北部撤出的计划的主要反对意见是，撤出并不取决于巴勒斯坦权力机构内的民主制度的建立。

src: "I have promoted the spread of democracy as the only answer for thirty years."
ref: “我推动民主的传播是三十年来唯一的答案。”

src: "And now, at the time when an American president declares these principles and promotes them, an Israeli PM comes along and does the exact opposite."
ref: “而现在，当一位美国总统宣布这些原则并宣传这些原则时，一位以色列总理出现并做了恰恰相反的事情。”

src: Although he has in the past supported withdrawal from parts of the land of Israel, Sharansky says the current plan goes too far.
ref: 沙朗斯基说，尽管他过去支持从以色列部分地区撤军，但是目前的计划走得太远了。

src: "We cannot control another people and we will need serious compromise, but that compromise does not include giving another people the ability to destroy us…as if we run from Gaza, Gaza will not run after us."
ref: “我们无法控制另一个人，我们需要认真妥协，但这种妥协不包括让另一个人有能力摧毁我们……好像我们从加沙逃跑一样，加沙不会追赶我们。”

src: "I had many opportunities to present my point of view to the Prime Minister, both publicly and privately," Sharansky said.
ref: “我有很多机会公开和私下向总理提出我的观点，”沙朗斯基说。

src: "I told him we will not have ten years – we will not even have ten days free from pressure, because we are legitimizing one-sided withdrawals from Jewish areas – each withdrawal will only invite more pressure."
ref: “我告诉他我们将不会有十年的时间，我们甚至不会有十天免于压力，因为我们正在使从犹太地区单方面撤军合法化，每次撤军只会招致更多压力。”

src: "We are speaking about three generations of Jews that were sent on the important mission by the Israeli government and made an empty desert into a blossoming garden."
ref: “我们说的是三代犹太人，他们被以色列政府派去执行重要任务，把一片空旷的沙漠变成了鲜花盛开的花园。”

src: "Now we will just destroy all these beautiful communities, with their unique agriculture and incredible Judaism - for what?" Sharansky asks.
ref: “现在我们要摧毁所有这些美丽的社区，用他们独特的农业和难以置信的犹太教-为了什么？”。沙朗斯基问道。

src: The German city of Munich has delayed the start of its planed migration to Linux till 2006.
ref: 德国城市慕尼黑将其迁移到Linux的计划启动推迟到2006年。

src: The migration was originally due to start this year, three years after the decision to migrate to Linux was made.
ref: 迁移最初定于今年开始，也就是迁移到Linux的决定做出三年后。

src: Peter Hofmann, the project leader of the migration said the delay was because the "pilot was more important than we first thought and should last longer."
ref: 移民项目负责人彼得·霍夫曼说，推迟是因为“试点比我们最初认为的更重要，应该持续更长时间。”

src: Once the pilot is completed all the departments will eventually be migrated to Linux and OpenOffice.org.
ref: 一旦试点完成，所有部门最终都将迁移到Linux和开源办公.org。

src: On May 28, 2003 Germany's third-largest city, voted to move to open source software.
ref: 2003年5月28日，德国第三大城市投票选择转向开源软件。

src: Munich made the decision to switch after Microsoft discontinued support for their current OS, Windows NT 4.
ref: 在微软停止支持他们当前的操作系统Windows NT 4之后，慕尼黑决定改变。

src: While Suse was very involved in the early phases, Debian was ultimately selected to replace Windows on 14,000 desktops.
ref: 虽然Suse在早期阶段非常投入，但最终选择Debian来替代14000台台式机上的Windows。

src: The migration is estimated to cost between 30 and 34 million euros, once complete would affect approximately 16,000 users.
ref: 迁移估计耗资3000万至3400万欧元，一旦完成将影响约16,000名用户。

src: The first department to migrate to Linux and OpenOffice.org will be the office of the Lord Mayor planed for the middle of 2006, though not all of the department's computers will be immediately migrated.
ref: 第一个迁移到Linux和开源办公.org的部门将是市长大人办公室，该办公室计划在2006年年中部署，尽管不是所有的部门的计算机都将立即迁移。

src: Peter Hofmann said "Some departments will start with OpenOffice on Windows, others will start with OpenOffice on Linux".
ref: 彼得·霍夫曼说：“一些部门将从Windows上的开源办公开始，其他部门将从Linux上的开源办公开始。”

src: The President of the Hellenic Republic, Carolos Papoulias, attended the inauguration ceremony of the Greek Orthodox Church of the Annunciation in Alexandria, Egypt.
ref: 希腊共和国总统卡罗洛斯·帕普利亚斯出席了在埃及亚历山大市举行的希腊东正教天主教会的就职典礼。

src: The ceremony was blessed by the Ecumenical Patriarch of Constantinople, Bartholomew.
ref: 仪式得到了君士坦丁堡普世大主教巴塞洛缪的祝福。

src: Also attending, in addition to the Greek President, were two ministers of the Greek government, a former Prime Minister of Greece, many Greek businessmen and the Orthodox bishops of Africa.
ref: 除希腊总统外，出席会议的还有希腊政府的两位部长、希腊前总理、许多希腊商人和非洲的东正教主教。

src: The development of the Church of the Annunciation in Alexandria has been financed by the Onassis Foundation.
ref: 亚历山大市的天使报喜教会的发展由奥纳西斯基金会资助。

src: Tomorrow, President Papoulias will meet unofficially in Cairo with President Hosni Mubarak of Egypt.
ref: 明天，帕普利亚斯总统将在开罗与埃及总统胡斯尼穆巴拉克非正式会面。

src: The United Nations has confirmed that its convoy in Syria was bombed this afternoon while a human rights group reported a Syrian military attack on civilians at a nearby funeral in the Syrian town of Khan Sheikhoun in Idlib province today.
ref: 联合国今天下午证实其在叙利亚的车队遭到轰炸，而一个人权组织报道今天在伊德利布省汗谢赫恩叙利亚镇附近的一个葬礼上发生了对平民的军事袭击事件。

src: Just prior to the bombing of the UN convoy at around 1400 Eastern European Time (UTC+2), the Syrian military is said to have attacked a funeral procession and reportedly 20 people were killed in that incident.
ref: 就在东欧时间1400左右（UTC+2）轰炸联合国车队之前，据说叙利亚军队袭击了一个送葬队伍，据报道在那次事件中有20人丧生。

src: The attack on civilians by the Syrian military was reported by the Syrian Observatory for Human Rights.
ref: 叙利亚人权观察组织报告了叙利亚军队对平民的袭击事件。

src: According to Martin Nesirky, who is the UN spokesperson for Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon, an IED bomb struck its four-vehicle convoy.
ref: 根据联合国秘书长潘基文发言人马丁·内西尔基的说法，一个简易爆炸装置炸弹袭击了其中四辆车车队。

src: UN personnel had to be left behind after the blast but no UN staff were injured.
ref: 爆炸发生后，联合国工作人员不得不留守，但没有联合国工作人员受伤。

src: Later, the UN sent a patrol to pick up personnel left behind.
ref: 后来，联合国派遣了一支巡逻队来接走留守人员。

src: A video uploaded to the video sharing website YouTube reportedly shows the UN convoy being targeted and bombed.
ref: 据报道，上传到视频分享网站YouTube的视频显示联合国车队遭到袭击和轰炸。

src: About a dozen civilians can be seen surrounding the lead car of the convoy talking to UN observers.
ref: 在联合国观察员的谈话中，车队的主要车辆周围可以看到十几名平民。

src: Several seconds later, a bomb explodes near what appears to be the lead car of the convoy severely damaging the front end of the vehicle and injuring several civilians.
ref: 几秒钟后，一枚炸弹在车队的领头车附近爆炸，严重损坏了车队的前端，造成几名平民受伤。

src: The lead car, still operating, begins to leave the area.
ref: 领头车仍在开动，开始离开该地区。

src: According to reports, several civilians were injured and or killed in the attack.
ref: 据报道，袭击中有几名平民受伤或丧身。

src: The UN has reportedly stated that none of their observers were injured.
ref: 据报道，联合国表示他们的观察员都没有受伤。

src: "We went to observe and after a while shooting occurred; We are safe with the Free Army and we are waiting for a [U.N.] group to pick us up," said UN observers to Reuters.
ref: 联合国观察员对路透社说：“我们去观察了一段时间之后发生了枪击事件；我们和自由军在一起是安全的，我们正在等待一个联合国组织来接我们。”

src: According to reports, the UN is seeking "to remove the observers from the area."
ref: 据报道，联合国正在寻求“从该地区撤走观察员”。

src: It is not yet known who was responsible for the attack on the UN convoy.
ref: 目前尚不清楚是谁应对联合国车队的袭击负责。

src: Governor Tim Pawlenty of Minnesota signed a bill into law on Thursday that requires the state to generate a significant amount of its energy needs from renewable sources.
ref: 明尼苏达州州长蒂姆·波伦蒂周四签署了一项法案，要求该州从可再生能源中获取大量能源。

src: The amount of power generated by wind turbines in the state stands now at 895 megawatts.
ref: 该州风力涡轮机产生的电量现在为895兆瓦。

src: An additional 5,000 megawatts of energy from renewable sources will need to be added to Minnesota's electricity resources, which is roughly eight times more than the amount that currently comes from renewables.
ref: 明尼苏达州的电力资源需要增加5,000兆瓦的可再生能源，这大约是目前可再生能源的八倍。

src: The bill signed by the Governor requires energy companies to provide 25 percent of power from renewable sources by 2025.
ref: 总督签署的法案要求能源公司到2025年提供25％的可再生能源发电。

src: Xcel Energy, which supplies approximately half of the electricity in the state, is required to provide 30 percent from renewable sources by 2020.
ref: Xcel能源公司提供了该州大约一半的电力，到2020年，该公司必须提供百分之30的可再生能源。

src: Wikinews held an exclusive interview with American author and filmmaker Peter John Ross.
ref: 维基新闻独家采访了美国作家兼电影制片人彼得·约翰·罗斯。

src: The head of Sonnyboo Productions, an independent film studio based in Columbus, Ohio, he has made numerous short films as well as co-directed a feature, the World War II B-movie Horrors of War.
ref: 索尼布制作公司总部位于俄亥俄州哥伦布市，是一家独立的电影工作室。作为该公司的负责人，他制作了许多短片，并参与导演了一部故事片《二战中的B级恐怖战争》。

src: He has also written a book on filmmaking, Tales from the Front Line of Indie Filmmaking.
ref: 他还撰写了一本关于电影制作的书，来自独立电影制作前线的故事。

src: He says that it "combines helpful articles for beginning filmmakers with narrative tales based on my experiences raising money for features and the crazy personalities that invade the world of microbudget filmmaking."
ref: 他说，“它把对初期电影制作人有用的文章与根据我为吸引微博电影制作世界的疯狂人物和故事片筹集资金的经验撰写的叙事故事相结合。”

src: When asked why he makes movies, Ross replied, "There is no greater thrill than sitting in a room full of strangers watching the stories unfold with flickering pictures and sound."
ref: 当被问到为什么要拍电影的时候，罗斯回答道，“坐在一个满是陌生人的房间里，看着故事情节以闪烁的图片和声音展开，没有比这更令人激动的了。”

src: "I live for the moments when I can sit there and watch the movies with people I don't know and really feel how they react to what I wrote or directed or edited."
ref: “我活着的时候，我可以坐在那里和我不认识的人一起观看电影，真正感受到他们对我写作，导演或编辑的反应。”

src: The remaining three members of the Bali Nine have been sentenced to life in prison by a Denpasar court.
ref: 巴厘岛九人团伙中的其余三名成员已被登巴萨法庭判处终身监禁。

src: Matthew Norman, 19, Si Yi Chen, 20, and Tan Duc Thanh Nguyen, aged 27 were found guilty of exporting narcotics.
ref: 19岁的马修·诺曼、20岁的陈思逸和27岁的阮晋德青被判出口毒品罪。

src: The court found that the heroin they had been caught with was the same as that found strapped to the bodies of the four others arrested at Denpasar airport.
ref: 法庭发现，他们被捕时携带的海洛因与在登巴萨机场被捕的另外四人身上发现的海洛因相同。

src: The Australian Federal Police have been criticised for allowing the Bali Nine to travel to Indonesia, where it was known they could face the death penalty.
ref: 澳大利亚联邦警察因允许巴厘岛九人团伙前往印尼而受到批评，据悉他们可能在印尼面临死刑。

src: All nine have now been found guilty and sentenced, with seven receiving life in prison, and the two ringleaders being sentenced to death yesterday.
ref: 目前，所有9人都已被判有罪并判刑，其中7人被判终身监禁，两名主谋昨日被判死刑。

src: The first leg of the round of sixteen in the UEFA Cup occurred earlier today, with all eight games being played.
ref: 联盟杯16强的第一回合今天早些时候举行，全部8场比赛都在进行。

src: Spain boasted the most teams in the competition with four (Espanyol, Celta de Vigo, Sevilla, and Osasuna), while England (Tottenham, Newcastle), Portugal (Braga, Benfica), Germany (Bayer Leverkusen, Werder Bremen) and France (Lens, PSG) each had two teams still in the Cup.
ref: 西班牙拥有最多的参赛队伍，有四支球队（西班牙人、维戈、塞维利亚和奥萨苏纳），而英格兰（托特纳姆、纽卡斯尔）、葡萄牙（布拉加、本菲卡）、德国（勒沃库森、云达不莱梅）和法国（伦斯、巴黎圣日耳曼）各有两支球队参加。

src: Other represented countries were Israel (Maccabi Haifa), Scotland (Rangers), Ukraine (Shakhtar Donetsk), and Netherlands (AZ Alkmaar).
ref: 其他代表国家有以色列（马卡比·海法）、苏格兰（流浪者）、乌克兰（顿涅茨克矿工）和荷兰（阿兹·阿尔克马尔）。

src: In a televised Pentagon press briefing Tuesday, U.S. Secretary of Defense Donald Rumsfeld stood by a press release from the Pentagon on Monday that reported explosives and bombs crossed into Iraq from across the Iranian border.
ref: 美国国防部长唐纳德·拉姆斯菲尔德星期二在一次电视直播的五角大楼新闻发布会上支持周一五角大楼发布的一份新闻稿，该新闻稿报道了爆炸物和炸弹从伊朗边境进入伊拉克。

src: It is true that weapons, clearly, unambiguously from Iran have been found in Iraq, Rumsfeld said today.
ref: 拉姆斯菲尔德今天说，确实在伊拉克发现了明确无误地从伊朗获得的武器。

src: Evidence reportedly indicated the quality and sophistication of the weapons was such that they may have been manufactured in Iran, but Rumsfeld was unable or unwilling to describe the weapons further.
ref: 据报道，有证据表明这些武器的质量和复杂程度可能是在伊朗制造的，但拉姆斯菲尔德无法或不愿意进一步描述这些武器。

src: Timing of the Pentagon release coincides with the controversy over Iran restarting its nuclear facilities.
ref: 五角大楼公布这一消息的时间恰逢伊朗重启核设施引发争议之际。

src: Rumsfeld, with the Chairman of the Joint Chief of Staffs, Richard Myers, said the jihadist effort in Iraq was aimed at inciting civil war, since they realize they cannot directly defeat the coalition.
ref: 拉姆斯菲尔德和参谋长联席会议主席理查德·迈尔斯表示，圣战分子在伊拉克的行动旨在煽动内战，因为他们意识到他们无法直接击败联军。

src: Speaking on the issue of border crossings of troops and munitions from Syria and Iran, Rumsfeld implied that those nations don't want progress in to be made in Iraq.
ref: 拉姆斯菲尔德在谈到从叙利亚和伊朗越境运送军队和军火的问题时暗示，这些国家不希望伊拉克取得进展。

src: The two cited progress by the Iraqi government in working toward the August 15 deadline for drafting a new constitution.
ref: 两人提到伊拉克政府在争取8月15日新宪法起草截止日期方面取得的进展。

src: In a nod to the possibility that the deadline will be missed, it was said that the constitution could be amended, and that voting on ratification would occur in October of this year, with a general election to follow in December.
ref: 有人认为可能会错过截止日期，有人说宪法可以修改，批准的投票将在今年10月进行，12月将举行大选。

src: Myers referred to a shift in the Sunni participation in the process, saying, "All indications are that the Sunni leadership in Iraq has made a fundamental decision that they want to be part of the process."
ref: 迈尔斯提到了逊尼派参与这一进程的转变，他说：“所有迹象都表明逊尼派在伊拉克的领导层作出了一项基本决定，他们希望成为这一进程的一部分。”

src: They reasserted previous President Bush statements that there is no clear time-table for an Iraqi withdrawal because it depends on the situation at the time.
ref: 他们重申了布什总统之前的声明，即伊拉克撤军没有明确的时间表，因为这取决于当时的局势。

src: The drawdowns that will occur eventually will obviously be based on those conditions.
ref: 最终将发生的撤军显然将基于这些条件。

src: Further questions by reporters intending to pin down a clear withdrawal time-line were rebuffed.
ref: 记者们试图确定一个明确的撤军时间表，但遭到了断然拒绝。

src: Myers said, "You have economic progress that has to be made; you have political progress that has to be made."
ref: 迈尔斯说：“你必须取得经济进步，你必须取得政治进步。”

src: He added that "173,000 Iraqi security forces" are in place in the country, but along with work on the country's infrastructure, much remains to be done with the training and equipping of their security forces.
ref: 他补充说，该国有“173,000名伊拉克安全部队”，但随着该国基础设施的工作，他们的安全部队的培训和装备仍有许多工作要做。

src: These are figures from a nationwide telephone survey of 1200 individuals conducted by Zogby International from Friday, May 12 through Tuesday, May 16, 2006.
ref: 佐格比国际公司于2006年5月12日星期五至5月16日星期二对1200人进行了一项全国性的电话调查。

src: The results have a margin of sampling error of +/- 2.9.
ref: 结果的采样误差范围为正负2.9。

src: The poll was commissioned by 911truth.org, a single issue website aimed at pinning the blame of 9/11 on the Bush administration.
ref: 这项调查是由911truth.org网站委托进行的。911truth.org是一个专门针对911事件的网站，旨在将责任归咎于布什政府。

src: The results of this Zogby poll were released last Monday (22 May), but went largely unreported by the mass media, possibly due to bias within the source.
ref: 这项佐格比民意测验的结果于上周一5月22日公布，但大部分没有被大众媒体报道，可能是由于消息来源存在偏见。

src: Yesterday the Health Ministry claimed that China issued a national ban on smoking in all indoor public spaces.
ref: 昨天卫生部声称，中国在所有室内公共场所都禁止吸烟。

src: The ban is included in the government's 12th Five-Year Plan.
ref: 该禁令包含在政府的“十二五”规划中。

src: Also banned is smoking in outdoor public areas where pedestrians pass.
ref: 同样禁止在行人经过的户外公共区域吸烟。

src: China, with a third of the world's smoking population at 300 million smokers, is the largest cigarette market in the world.
ref: 中国吸烟人口占世界吸烟人口的三分之一，吸烟人口为3亿，是世界上最大的卷烟市场。

src: Each week approximately 70 percent of non-smoking adults are exposed to second-hand smoke.
ref: 每周约有70％的非吸烟成年人接触二手烟。

src: According the the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention, tobacco-related illnesses kill over one million people annually.
ref: 根据中国疾病预防控制中心的数据，与烟草有关的疾病每年造成100多万人死亡。

src: The World Health Organisation says Chinese smoking-related deaths account for one fifth of deaths from smoking world-wide.
ref: 世界卫生组织称，中国与吸烟有关的死亡人数占全球吸烟死亡人数的五分之一。

src: The number of deaths are predicted to rise to 3.5 million deaths a year by 2030 if no steps are taken, states a report co-authored by Zhao Ping, deputy director general of the Chinese Cancer Foundation.
ref: 据中国癌症基金会副主任赵平共同撰写的报告称，如果不采取措施，预计到2030年死亡人数将增加到每年350万人。

src: Further, there is a spike of new smokers in China as increasingly women, young people and the poor become smokers.
ref: 此外，随着越来越多的女性，年轻人和穷人成为吸烟者，中国新吸烟者人数激增。

src: The posting of logos is being required to alert people not to smoke.
ref: 张贴标识是为了提醒人们不要吸烟。

src: Vending machines selling cigarettes in public places will be banned as will cigarette advertisements and sponsorships.
ref: 在公共场所销售卷烟的自动售货机将被禁止，卷烟广告和赞助也将被禁止。

src: The new regulations include educational measures to inform people about the dangers of tobacco.
ref: 新法规包括教育措施，告知人们烟草的危害。

src: A police station of the Spanish Guardia Civil was attacked today Friday by a car bomb in the Basque city of Durango, injuring two policemen.
ref: 西班牙国民警卫队的一个警察局星期五在巴斯克城市杜兰戈遭遇汽车炸弹袭击，两名警察受伤。

src: It is believed to be the first serious attack of the separatist group ETA since it unilaterally ended a cease-fire in June.
ref: 这被认为是分裂主义组织埃塔自6月单方面结束停火以来的首次严重袭击。

src: The blast caused serious damage to the police barracks in Durango, shattering windows and damaging police cars parked outside.
ref: 爆炸对杜兰戈的警察营房造成了严重破坏，破坏了窗户并破坏了停在外面的警车。

src: Police sources believe the bomb, estimated to contain between 80 and 100 kilograms of explosives, was detonated remotely by one of the two attackers who fled in another vehicle.
ref: 警方消息人士认为，这枚炸弹由乘坐另一辆汽车逃跑的两名袭击者中的一名远程引爆，炸弹估计含有80至100公斤炸药。

src: Another car exploded about one hour later in the town of Amorebieta, possibly the one used by the activists to flee.
ref: 大约一个小时后，另一辆汽车在阿莫列比塔镇爆炸，可能是活动人士用来逃跑的那辆。

src: ETA detonated two small explosive devices on July 25 along the route that the Tour of France used when the race dipped into northern Spain for a few hours.
ref: 埃塔于7月25日引爆了两个小型爆炸装置，爆炸发生在环法自行车赛在西班牙北部进行数小时比赛时使用的路线上。

src: ETA called the cease-fire in March 2006, but grew frustrated with a lack of government concessions in ensuing peace talks, and set off a huge bomb in a parking area at Madrid's airport on December 30, killing two people.
ref: 埃塔组织在2006年3月宣布停火，但由于政府在随后的和谈中没有做出让步，埃塔越来越感到失望。12月30日，埃塔在马德里机场的一个停车场引爆了一枚巨大的炸弹，炸死两人。

src: It insisted then that the truce was still in effect, but finally declared it formally over in June, and Spanish security forces have been on alert ever since.
ref: 当时，西班牙坚称停火协议仍然有效，但最终于6月正式宣布结束，此后西班牙安全部队一直处于戒备状态。

src: Elections in Zimbabwe began with both the ruling and opposition parties predicting victory.
ref: 津巴布韦选举开始时，执政党和反对党都预测将获胜。

src: Current president Robert Mugabe predicts a "mountainous victory" for his party, the Zimbabwe African National Union - Patriotic Front (Zanu-PF).
ref: 现任总统罗伯特·穆加贝预测，他的政党津巴布韦非洲民族联盟爱国阵线将取得“巨大的胜利”。

src: The main opposition — Movement for Democratic Change (MDC) claims the election is being rigged, and despite being allowed to freely campaign, the government's intimidation of voters and moves to hurt opposition supporters will prevent the MDC win.
ref: 主要反对派民主变革运动（MDC）声称选举正在被操纵，尽管被允许自由竞选，政府对选民的恐吓以及伤害反对派支持者的行动将阻止MDC获胜。

src: The government recently withheld food aid from those supporting the MDC, according to a United Nations report.
ref: 根据联合国的一份报告，政府最近向支持MDC的人提供了粮食援助。

src: The UN further reports the government dismissed election officials and poll workers suspected of supporting MDC.
ref: 联合国进一步报道，政府驳回了选举官员，并对涉嫌支持MDC的工人进行了民意调查。

src: Last week, a Catholic archbishop in Zimbabwe urged followers to start a non-violent, popular uprising against Mugabe, and rallies have been common in recent days.
ref: 上周，津巴布韦一位天主教大主教敦促追随者发动一场针对穆加贝的非暴力、民众起义，最近几天集会很普遍。

src: The previous elections, which the MDC almost won, were marred by violence and similar allegations of vote-rigging.
ref: 民主变革运动几乎赢得了前几次选举，但由于暴力和类似的操纵选票的指控，这次选举受到了破坏。

src: More than 5.7 million Zimbabweans are registered to vote, and can cast their ballots at one of the more than 8,000 polling stations.
ref: 超过570万津巴布韦人登记参加投票，他们可以在8千多个投票站中的一个投票站投票。

src: On Sunday, a group of 80 people from Beijing and Shanghai landed at Heathrow to become the first Chinese to arrive in the United Kingdom on tourist visas.
ref: 周日，一群来自北京和上海的80人降落在希思罗机场，成为第一个以旅游签证抵达英国的中国人。

src: After protracted negotiations last year, the UK was granted "Approved Destination Status" (ADS) by the People's Republic of China in January 2005.
ref: 经过去年漫长的谈判，英国于2005年1月被中华人民共和国授予“经批准的目的地地位”（ADS）。

src: The agreement will also allow travel companies to establish offices in China to promote tourism to the UK.
ref: 该协议还将允许旅游公司在中国设立办事处，以促进英国旅游业。

src: Before the signing of the agreement, China allowed only students and people on business trips to visit the country.
ref: 在协议签署之前，中国只允许学生和商务人士访问该国。

src: It is estimated that 135,000 people visited the UK last year — just 0.6% of China's external tourism market.
ref: 据估计，去年有135,000人访问了英国，仅占中国对外旅游市场的0.6％。

src: The 80 tourists are expected to visit London, Oxfordshire, Stratford-upon-Avon and Scotland, where they will meet the First Minister, Jack McConnell, in Edinburgh Castle.
ref: 预计80名游客将访问伦敦、牛津郡、埃文河畔的斯特拉特福德和苏格兰，他们将在爱丁堡城堡会见首席部长杰克·麦康奈尔。

src: The Duke of York is expected to greet the tourists at the Tower of London later today.
ref: 预计约克公爵将于今天晚些时候在伦敦塔迎接游客。

src: Other destinations will include Liverpool (twinned with Shanghai) and Manchester's Old Trafford stadium, where the football team Manchester United play.
ref: 其他目的地还包括利物浦（与上海结成姐妹城市）和曼联足球队的主场曼彻斯特老特拉福德球场。

src: They have a large following in China and are currently on a Far East tour.
ref: 他们在中国有大批粉丝，目前正在进行远东巡演。

src: They are to play Beijing Hyundai in a friendly match tomorrow.
ref: 他们明天将在一场友谊赛中对阵北京现代汽车。

src: The visit comes after the London attacks earlier this month provoked fears by the British tourist industry of a reduction in tourism to the UK.
ref: 此次访问是在本月早些时候伦敦袭击事件引发英国旅游业对英国旅游业减少的担忧之后进行的。

src: The UK tourist industry hopes that by 2020, Chinese tourism to the UK will bring £500 million pounds (about $878 million US dollars) annually to the UK economy.
ref: 英国旅游业希望，到2020年，中国赴英旅游每年能为英国经济带来5亿英镑（约合8.78亿美元）的收入。

src: Radonski promised a shift towards more of a business-friendly stance: "Those who want progress, jobs, well-managed companies, somewhere we can develop small and medium businesses…everyone who wants that kind of country, come and join my bus for progress".
ref: 拉多斯基承诺，将转向更有利于商业的立场：“那些想要进步的人，想要工作的人，想要管理良好的公司的人，想要发展中小企业的人……所有想要那种国家的人，都来加入我的行列，争取进步。”

src: Brett McKenzie is running for the Green Party of Ontario in the Ontario provincial election, in the London North Centre riding.
ref: 布雷特·麦肯齐正在参加安大略省绿党在伦敦北部中心选区的选举。

src: Wikinews' Nick Moreau interviewed him regarding his values, his experience, and his campaign.
ref: 维基新闻的尼克·莫罗就他的价值观、经历和竞选活动采访了他。

src: Abdelbaset al-Megrahi has been buried in the town of Janzur, west of the Libyan capital Tripoli.
ref: 阿卜德尔巴塞特·迈格拉希被埋在利比亚首都的黎波里西部的扬苏尔镇。

src: He was the only individual convicted in association with the Lockerbie bombing of 1988.
ref: 他是唯一一个因与1988年洛克比爆炸案有关而被判有罪的人。

src: The bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 from London to New York resulted in 270 fatalities, including all 259 of the airplane's occupants and eleven individuals on the ground.
ref: 从伦敦飞往纽约的泛美航空103号航班爆炸，造成270人死亡，包括机上259名乘客和11名地面人员。

src: 189 of those who died in the incident were US citizens.
ref: 在事件中死亡的人中有189人是美国公民。

src: The death toll for this terrorist incident is larger than that for any other which has occurred in the United Kingdom thus far.
ref: 这起恐怖事件的死亡人数大于迄今为止在英国发生的任何其他事件。

src: Five years later, senior judges in Scotland were to review his case, but he dropped the appeal.
ref: 五年后，苏格兰的高级法官将复审他的案件，但他放弃了上诉。

src: Due to suffering from prostate cancer, he was granted a compassionate release from Scottish prison two days later.
ref: 由于患有前列腺癌，两天后他从苏格兰监狱被释放。

src: Current UK Prime Minister David Cameron commented on his belief that al-Megrahi "should never have been released from prison" and said his death was an occasion "to remember the 270 people who lost their lives in what was an appalling terrorist act".
ref: 英国现任首相戴维·卡梅伦评论说，他认为迈格拉希“本不应该被从监狱释放”的看法发表了评论，并表示迈格拉希的死是“对270名在可怕的恐怖主义行动中丧生的人的纪念”。

src: According to Alex Salmond, First Minister of Scotland, the investigation into the Lockerbie bombing is ongoing.
ref: 苏格兰首席大臣亚历克斯·萨尔蒙德表示，对洛克比空难的调查仍在继续。

src: Prosecutors, he said, had always thought there were others besides al-Megrahi involved in the attack.
ref: 他说，检察官一直认为除了梅格拉希之外还有其他人参与了袭击事件。

src: US citizen Susan Cohen, the mother of one of those killed in the Lockerbie bombing, thought of al-Megrahi as "a mass murderer" who "deserved to die", adding to CNN: "I feel no pity around him".
ref: 美国公民苏珊·科恩是洛克比空难遇难者之一的母亲，她认为迈格拉希是“一名大屠杀凶手”，“死有余辜”。她向CNN补充道：“我对他一点也不同情。”

src: "My daughter [Theodora], at age 20, died a brutal, horrible death."
ref: “我的女儿（狄奥多拉）在20岁时惨死。”

src: However, UK citizen Jim Swire, father of another victim of the bombing, believes al-Megrahi was not guilty.
ref: 然而，另一名爆炸受害者的父亲、英国公民吉姆·斯怀尔认为，迈格拉希无罪。

src: He described al-Megrahi's death as "a sad time", telling the BBC he was "satisfied for some years that this man was nothing to do with the murder of my daughter".
ref: 他将迈格拉希的死描述为“一段悲伤的时光”，并告诉英国广播公司，他“多年来我一直确信这个人与谋杀我女儿无关”。

src: According to a report released by the South African Broadcasting Corporation (SABC), a warrant has been issued by the South African National Prosecuting Authority (NPA), which operates separately from the police, for the arrest of Jackie Selebi national commissioner of the South African police and president of Interpol.
ref: 根据南非广播公司（SABC）发表的一份报告，南非国家检察当局（NPA）发出了逮捕南非警察国家专员兼国际刑警组织主席杰基·塞莱比的逮捕令，NPA是独立于警察部门运作的。

src: Recent media coverage of the murder of Brett Kebble have raised questions of the close friendship between Jackie Selebi and Glenn Agliotti.
ref: 最近媒体对布雷特·凯布尔谋杀案的报道引发了人们对杰姬·塞莱比和格伦·阿格里奥蒂之间亲密友谊的质疑。

src: Agliotti was later arrested in connection with the murder of Brett Kebble.
ref: 阿格里奥蒂后来因涉嫌谋杀布雷特·凯布尔而被捕。

src: Agliotti is alleged to have strong links with organized crime and racketeering.
ref: 据称，阿格里奥蒂与有组织犯罪有密切联系。

src: Venus Williams triumphed over Marion Bartoli of France 6-4, 6-1 yesterday to win the Women's Singles event at the 2007 Wimbledon Championships.
ref: 昨天维纳斯·威廉姆斯以6比4和6比1战胜了法国的马里昂·巴托利，赢得了2007年温布尔登锦标赛女子单打比赛的冠军。

src: For the first time, an American and Frenchwoman were matched up to compete for the British women's singles title.
ref: 这是美国和法国女性第一次参加比赛，争夺英国女子单打冠军头衔。

src: A Wimbledon champion in 2000, 2001 and 2005, Williams was not the favorite to win the title again this year.
ref: 作为2000年、2001年和2005年的温布尔登冠军，威廉姆斯并不是今年再次夺冠的最佳人选。

src: Currently ranked 23rd in the world, she entered the tournament in the shadow of her sister, Serena Williams.
ref: 目前她在世界排名第23位，她在姐姐塞雷娜威廉姆斯的影响下参加了比赛。

src: At the beginning of the tennis season, Serena stated her own determination to reclaim the No. 1 ranking.
ref: 在网球赛季开始时，塞丽娜表示自己决心重新夺回排名第一的位置。

src: Serena showed better than Venus at the French Open by reaching the quarter finals, and won the Australian Open in January (Venus dropped out due to an injury).
ref: 塞丽娜在法网公开赛上的表现优于维纳斯，进入四分之一决赛，并在1月赢得了澳网（维纳斯因伤退出）。

src: In spite of her initial strength, Serena's hopes to dominate the tournament were cut short when she lost to No. 1 seeded Justine Henin in the quarterfinals.
ref: 尽管她最初的实力，在四分之一决赛中输给第一号种子贾斯汀·海宁使塞雷娜赢得比赛的希望提前终结。

src: Bartoli, the eighteenth seed for this year's championships, had never progressed past the fourth round of any Grand Slam event.
ref: 巴托利，今年锦标赛的第18位种子选手，从未超过任何大满贯赛事的第四轮。

src: However, she progressed to the final by defeating third seed Jelena Janković in the fourth round and Justine Henin in the semifinals in one of the major upsets of Wimbledon history.
ref: 然而，她在第四轮击败三号种子耶莱娜·扬科维奇并在半决赛中击败贾斯汀·海宁，爆出温布尔登历史上一大冷门，进入决赛。

src: As Henin lost to Bartoli in the semifinals, Venus Williams was poised to become the lowest seeded player in recorded history to win the Wimbledon singles title.
ref: 因为海宁在半决赛中输给巴托利，维纳斯·威廉姆斯有望成为历史上获得温布尔登单打冠军的种子选手中排名最低的一位。

src: With powerhouse serves and an aggressive ground strokes battle, she did just that.
ref: 凭借强有力的发球和咄咄逼人的地面击球，她做到了。

src: Williams comfortably knocked out Bartoli in two straight sets, with match point accidentally striking Bartoli in the wrist.
ref: 威廉姆斯轻松地连续两局淘汰了巴托利，赛点是意外击中了巴托利的手腕。

src: Venus was reunited with the Venus Rosewater Dish on Centre Court during the trophy ceremony.
ref: 在颁奖仪式上，维纳斯与中央球场的维纳斯玫瑰水盘重聚。

src: Another first, the All England Club is paying men's and women's singles champions equal prize money.
ref: 另一个第一次是，全英俱乐部支付男子单打冠军和女子单打冠军相同的奖金。

src: Venus was paid $1.407 million, to which she replied "Thank you, All England Club - we're playing under equal terms."
ref: 维纳斯得到了1407万美元的报酬，她回答说：“谢谢你，全英格兰俱乐部-我们在平等的条件下打球。”

src: The men's final takes place later today with first seed and defending champion Roger Federer taking on second seed Rafael Nadal in a repeat of last year's final.
ref: 男子决赛将于今天晚些时候举行，第一种子、卫冕冠军罗杰·费德勒将与第二种子拉斐尔·纳达尔对决，这是去年决赛的重演。

src: The Congressional Hispanic Caucus has blocked voting on legislation that would allow employers to rehire foreign seasonal workers.
ref: 美国国会拉美裔议员团阻止就允许雇主重新雇用外国季节性劳工的立法进行投票。

src: This year, the U.S. government will only issue 33,000 visas for winter workers and 33,000 for summer workers.
ref: 今年，美国政府将只为冬季工人签发33,000份签证，为夏季工人签发33,000份签证。

src: This comes as a stark comparison to 2007, when 120,000 foreign workers entered the U.S. with H-2B visas.
ref: 这与2007年的情况形成鲜明对比，当时有12万名外国工人以H-2B签证进入美国。

src: Currently, the reduction in visas is having profounds effects on both Mexico and U.S.
ref: 目前，签证减少对墨西哥和美国产生了巨大影响。

src: In Tlapacoyan, a Mexican town which in the last 30 years has exported a large seasonal workforce, using H-2B visas, to work in U.S. circuses and carnivals, the effects are already a stark reality.
ref: 在墨西哥的特拉帕科扬镇，在过去30年里，该镇利用H-2B签证出口了大量季节性劳动力，在美国马戏团和嘉年华中工作，其影响已经是一个严峻的现实。

src: The local economy has been paralyzed, and unemployment has reached dramatic highs.
ref: 当地经济陷入瘫痪，失业率达到了极高的水平。

src: The lack of money being pumped into the local economy has caused many businesses to close, and the construction of the town's new church has come to a screeching halt.
ref: 由于缺乏资金进入当地经济，许多企业纷纷关闭，该镇新教堂的建设已经戛然而止。

src: Additionally, residents like Pablo Juarez Mendoza, who last year made $450 working in Texan livestock shows, are having difficulties finding local work.
ref: 此外，像帕布罗·华雷斯·门多萨这样的居民，去年在德州的畜牧展上工作赚了450美元，他们很难找到当地工作。

src: Those that do, are only making an average of $50 per week.
ref: 而那些有工作的人，平均每周只能挣到50美元。

src: U.S. businesses are getting ready to face their own set of economical obstacles caused by the lack of cheap labor.
ref: 美国企业正准备面对由于缺乏廉价劳动力而造成的一系列经济障碍。

src: Many employers are finding creative ways to cut costs, including scaling back operations.
ref: 许多雇主正在寻找创造性的方法来削减成本，包括缩减运营。

src: In Cape Cod, for example, the local chamber of commerce reports that town employers will only receive 15 of the 5,000 visas requested.
ref: 例如，在科德角，当地商会报告说，镇雇主只会收到所要求的5,000份签证中的15份。

src: In response, local Cape Cod business owner, Williman Zammer, has called the situation "a major crisis," and states that what the Hispanic Caucus is doing is "ruthless."
ref: 作为回应，当地的科德角企业主威利曼·扎默称这种情况是“一场严重的危机”，并称拉美裔核心小组所做的是“无情的”。

src: Opponents of the change state that recent legislation blocking is part of the Caucus' efforts to push for comprehensive immigration reform, not seen in the U.S. since the early 1980s.
ref: 反对这项改革的人士说，最近的立法阻碍是移民政策核心小组推动全面移民改革努力的一部分。美国自上世纪80年代初以来就没有出现过全面移民改革。

src: Hispanic Caucus Chairman, Rep. Joe Baca, D-California, hopes that policymakers will place attention not only on helping small businesses, but also on what to do with 12 million illegal immigrants currently residing in the U.S., and improving border security.
ref: 拉美裔核心小组主席、加州民主党众议员乔·巴卡希望，政策制定者不仅要关注帮助小企业，还要关注如何处理目前居住在美国的1200万非法移民，以及改善边境安全。

src: The issue of immigration has become a polarizing subject in the U.S., and one that has been an intrinsic part of the fabric that makes up the American society.
ref: 移民问题已成为美国的一个两极分化的主题，也是构成美国社会的结构的内在组成部分。

src: Since 2006, the U.S. accepts more legal immigrants as permanent residents than any other country in the world.
ref: 自2006年以来，美国接受的合法移民成为永久居民的数量超过了世界上任何其他国家。

src: That same year, a NBC/Wall Street Journal poll revealed that the U.S. public was equally divided on the whether immigration helps or hurts the country.
ref: 同年，美国全国广播公司、华尔街日报的民意调查显示，美国公众对移民是否有助于或伤害国家存在同样的分歧。

src: Forty-four percent said it helped, forty-five percent said it hurt.
ref: 百分之44的人说有帮助，百分之45的人说有伤害。

src: However, a recent Pew Research Center study suggests that the issue will remain at the forefront of the American political agenda for many years to come.
ref: 然而，最近皮尤研究中心的一项研究表明，这个问题将在未来许多年仍然是美国政治议程的重点。

src: The study revealed that by 2050, one in five Americans will be foreign-born, and the overall U.S. population will double to 438 million.
ref: 该研究显示，到2050年，五分之一的美国人将在国外出生，美国总人口将增加一倍，达到4.38亿。

src: The U.S Latino population will account for 30% of the population, while Asians will account for 9%.
ref: 美国拉丁裔人口将占人口的30％，而亚洲人将占9％。

src: Thus, what we see unfolding is a U.S. where minorities will become the majority, and drastic cultural and societal changes seem almost certain.
ref: 因此，我们所看到的是一个少数族裔将成为多数族裔的美国，而剧烈的文化和社会变革几乎是肯定的。

src: The study seems to also hint that this growth is in many ways connected to legislation passed by Congress in 1965, that abolished a quota system that had nearly ended immigration from non-European countries since the 1920s, and consequently caused an immigration surge.
ref: 这项研究似乎还暗示，这种增长在很多方面与1965年国会通过的一项立法有关。1965年，国会废除了一项配额制度，该制度自上世纪20年代以来几乎终止了来自非欧洲国家的移民，并因此导致了移民潮。

src: The United Nations and French peacekeeping forces say they will not leave the Ivory Coast despite orders from incumbent president Laurent Gbagbo to leave the country.
ref: 联合国和法国维和部队表示，尽管现任总统洛朗·巴博下令离开该国，但他们不会离开象牙海岸。

src: Secretary General of the UN Ban Ki-moon said in a statement that the UN in the Ivory Coast will "fulfill its mandate and will continue to monitor and document any human rights violations, incitement to hatred and violence, or attacks on U.N. peacekeepers."
ref: 联合国秘书长潘基文在一份声明中说，联合国在科特迪瓦将“履行其使命，继续监测和记录任何侵犯人权、煽动仇恨和暴力、或袭击联合国维和人员的行为”。

src: He also called the orders for all peacekeeping troops to leave the nation irrelevant and without effect, adding that the UN does not believe Gbagbo is the legal president.
ref: 他还呼吁所有要求维和部队离开该国的命令都无关紧要并且无效，他还补充说联合国不相信巴博是合法总统。

src: "The president-elect is Ouattara and he hasn't asked us to leave," added the UN.
ref: 联合国补充说：“当选总统是瓦塔拉，他没有要求我们离开。”

src: In the United Kingdom, the music video for this Christmas' remake of the charity single Do They Know It's Christmas? was launched simultaneously today (Thursday) on several UK and Irish television channels including BBC One, BBC Two, RTE 1, ITV1, Channel 4, and Sky One.
ref: 在英国，为圣诞节的慈善单曲翻拍的音乐视频“他们知道今天是圣诞节吗？”今天（星期四）在英国和爱尔兰的几个电视频道同时推出，包括BBC 1、BBC 2、RTE 1、ITV1、频道4和Sky 1。

src: The song was originally recorded in 1984 by several of the biggest artists of the time including Bono, Bob Geldof, Paul McCartney and George Michael.
ref: 这首歌最初是在1984年由几个当时最伟大的艺术家录制的，其中包括波诺、鲍勃·盖尔多夫、保罗·麦卡特尼和乔治·迈克尔。

src: This year, in celebration of 20 years since the first single, the song has been remade by over 50 of today's best selling artists, including Coldplay frontman Chris Martin, Robbie Williams, Bono, Justin Hawkins of The Darkness and Dido.
ref: 今年，为了庆祝第一首单曲问世20年，这首歌已经被50多位当今最畅销的艺术家重拍，其中包括酷玩乐队主唱克里斯·马丁、罗比·威廉姆斯、博诺、贾斯汀·霍金斯和迪多。

src: The song, which is in aid of charity, is already tipped to be the Christmas No. 1 in the UK and Ireland.
ref: 这首歌是为慈善事业捐款的，已经被认为是英国和爱尔兰的圣诞歌曲冠军。

src: The song will also be launched as a charity mobile phone ringtone to raise funds for Sudan's troubled Darfur region.
ref: 这首歌也将作为慈善手机铃声推出，为苏丹陷入困境的达尔富尔地区筹集资金。

src: Mycokemusic.com said it was going to put the track on its website from Thursday with all profits to be donated to charity.
ref: Mycokemusic.com表示，它将从周四开始在其网站上播出该曲目，并将所有利润捐赠给慈善机构。

src: The single will be available to buy in shops from the 29 November.
ref: 这首单曲将于11月29日起在商店发售。

src: Pakistani armed forces say they have captured the town of Kotkai on Saturday, the hometown of Taliban Chief Hakimullah Mehsud and one of his top officers, Qari Hussain.
ref: 巴基斯坦武装部队说，他们星期六占领了塔利班首领哈基穆拉·马苏德和他的一名高级官员卡里·侯赛因的家乡科特凯。

src: This comes after a week-long battle was launched on Monday, in part of an operation to curb the influence of the Taliban in South Waziristan.
ref: 此前，巴基斯坦在周一发动了为期一周的战斗，这是遏制塔利班在南瓦济里斯坦影响力的行动的一部分。

src: The operation began the previous Saturday when Pakistani forces approached from three separate areas of South Waziristan.
ref: 上周六，当巴基斯坦军队从南瓦济里斯坦的三个不同地区接近时，该行动开始了。

src: Pakistan plans to trap Taliban within the area while approaching the towns of Makeen and Ladha, both of which are major Taliban strongholds.
ref: 巴基斯坦计划在接近梅肯和拉德哈城镇时将塔利班困在该地区，这两个城镇都是塔利班的主要据点。

src: Major General Athar Abbas, the chief spokesman for the military, said at a news briefing that "we have complete control of Kotkai, a stronghold of the terrorists, where most of the houses had been converted into strong bunkers."
ref: 军方首席发言人阿塔尔·阿巴斯少将在新闻发布会上表示，“我们完全控制了恐怖分子据点的科特凯，大部分房屋都被改建成了强大的掩体。”

src: So far, Pakistani officials have reported that 163 militants have been killed, while the military sustained 23 casualties.
ref: 到目前为止，巴基斯坦官员报告说已有163名武装分子丧生，而军方则造成23人伤亡。

src: The entire area has been closed off, but there have been recent acts of violence which have officials worried.
ref: 整个地区已被关闭，但最近发生的暴力事件令官员们感到担忧。

src: In recent weeks, Pakistan has seen attacks on police centers, military headquarters and a UN building.
ref: 最近几周，巴基斯坦发生了对警察中心、军事总部和联合国大楼的攻击。

src: There have also been five attacks on an Islamic university in Islamabad, the capital.
ref: 在首都伊斯兰堡的一所伊斯兰大学也发生了五起袭击事件。

src: It has been reported that over 21,000 civilian families, an estimated 153,000 individuals, have fled South Waziristan, and have taken refuge in the North-West Frontier Province.
ref: 据报道，有21,000多个平民家庭，估计有153,000人逃离南瓦济里斯坦，并在西北边境省避难。

src: According to an original Reuters report, Venezuela's President Hugo Chavez is moving his Bolivarian Revolution forward by nationalizing more private companies and clamping down against his opponents.
ref: 根据路透社的一份原始报道，委内瑞拉总统乌戈·查韦斯正在推动他的玻利瓦尔革命向前推进，将更多的私营公司收归国有，并打击对手。

src: Some oil service companies were nationalized earlier this month along with other sectors like banking, cement and steel.
ref: 本月早些时候，一些石油服务公司与银行，水泥和钢铁等其他行业被实施了国有化。

src: Cited by Reuters, Chavez said on Saturday "We are proceeding and will continue to proceed with nationalizations of strategic sectors."
ref: 查韦斯周六援引路透社的话说，“我们正在进行并将继续推进战略部门的国有化。”

src: According to The Financial Post, expropriation of oil service companies follows their dispute with Petróleos de Venezuela (PDVSA), the State-owned oil company.
ref: 据英国《金融邮报》报道，石油服务公司的征用是在与国有石油公司委内瑞拉石油公司（PDVSA）发生纠纷之后发生的。

src: Past election victories since 1997 have strengthened Chavez's control and popularity (with more than 60% approval rating).
ref: 自1997年以来的过去选举胜利加强了查韦斯的控制和受欢迎程度（超过60％的支持率）。

src: He won a February referendum amending the constitution and letting him stay in power until he is not re-elected.
ref: 他赢得了2月份修改宪法的公投，并让他继续执政，直到他不再当选为止。

src: Chavez, cited by Reuters, told party activists in April "I've said it before and I repeat, we must keep up the offensive, bulldozing the counter-revolution."
ref: 路透社引用的查韦斯在四月份对党内活动人士所说的话：“我之前已经说过了，我再说一遍，我们必须保持攻势，推翻反革命。”

src: But the financial crisis, especially the low oil prices for the last months, has crippled his social revolution.
ref: 但金融危机，特别是过去几个月的低油价，已经削弱了他的社会革命。

src: During the last years, Chavez relied on high oil prices to push his social agenda.
ref: 在过去的几年里，查韦斯依靠高油价来推动他的社会议程。

src: With the shortening of cash, Chavez cannot use oil revenues anymore to finance his budget.
ref: 随着现金的缩短，查韦斯不再使用石油收入来为他的预算提供资金。

src: This wave of expropriation and the conflicts with oil service companies seems to reflect a desperate move to tackle the crisis, despite Chavez's words that the country is "well-equipped to weather the global recession."
ref: 这波征用浪潮以及与石油服务公司之间的冲突，似乎反映了委内瑞拉为应对危机而采取的绝望行动，尽管查韦斯曾表示，委内瑞拉“完全有能力应对全球经济衰退”。

src: Australian Prime Minister John Howard has announced that leaders of APEC nations have agreed on "aspirational goals" on climate change.
ref: 澳大利亚总理霍华德宣布，亚太经合组织各国领导人已就气候变化达成“理想目标”。

src: The agreement, which Prime Minister Howard calls the Sydney declaration focuses on reducing energy intensity (the amount of energy used to produce a dollar of gross domestic product), reforestation and technology sharing.
ref: 该协议由霍华德总理称之为悉尼宣言，重点是降低能源强度（用于生产一美元国内生产总值的能源数量）、重新造林和技术共享。

src: Despite Australia, the United States and China being non-signatories to the United Nations' Kyoto protocol on greenhouse gas reductions which is set to expire in 2012, the APEC accord calls for "We call for a post-2012 international climate change arrangement ... that strengthens, broadens and deepens the current arrangement and leads to reduced global emissions of greenhouse gases," according to the draft declaration.
ref: 根据宣言草案，尽管澳大利亚、美国和中国不是联合国温室气体减排京都议定书的签署国，该议定书将于2012年到期，但亚太经合组织协议呼吁“我们呼吁作出2012年后的国际气候变化安排……这将加强、扩大和深化当前的安排，并导致全球温室气体排放量减少”。

src: The declaration as agreed upon will be released on Sunday.
ref: 商定的声明将于周日公布。

src: The draft agreement recognised that action was required to "slow, stop and reverse" greenhouse gas emissions; that nations should vow to reduce energy intensity by 25 percent by 2030; that forest cover in the region should be increased by 50 million acres by 2020; and that APEC nations will work with other nations to find a solution to climate change.
ref: 协议草案承认，必须采取行动“减缓、制止和扭转”温室气体排放，各国应承诺到2030年将能源强度降低百分之25，到2020年，该地区的森林覆盖面积应增加5000万英亩，亚太经合组织国家将与其他国家合作，寻找解决气候变化的办法。

src: The declaration is non-binding and is simply a statement of goals to which the nations will try to achieve.
ref: 该声明不具有约束力，只是各国将努力实现的目标声明。

src: Host nation Australia has been criticised by China, Indonesia, Japan and Malaysia for putting climate change on the agenda at the APEC summit, saying they would prefer dialogue on climate change to occur under a United Nationa framework.
ref: 东道国澳大利亚因将气候变化列入亚太经合组织峰会议程而受到中国、印度尼西亚、日本和马来西亚的批评，称它们更愿意在联合国框架下进行气候变化对话。

src: Indonesia's Foreign Minister Hassan Wirayuda said "the APEC meeting does not replace the appropriate forum to deal with climate change."
ref: 印度尼西亚外交部长哈桑·维拉尤达说：“亚太经合组织会议并没有取代应对气候变化的适当论坛。”

src: Mr Wiraydua said that despite Indonesia not being entirely satisfied with the declaration they would "live with it".
ref: 维雷杜亚先生说，尽管印度尼西亚对这一声明并不完全满意，但他们会“接受它”。

src: Environmental group Greenpeace has rejected the APEC statement because it doesn't set firm targets and includes the use of nuclear energy as a replacement for fossil fuels.
ref: 环保组织绿色和平组织拒绝接受APEC声明，因为它没有设定坚定的目标，包括使用核能作为化石燃料的替代品。

src: There were 8 games played in the National Hockey League on February 14, 2008, including the #2 Dallas Stars taking on the Phoenix Coyotes, and the Minnesota Wild and Vancouver Canucks fighting for playoff contention in the Northwest division.
ref: 2008年2月14日，国家曲棍球联盟共有8场比赛，其中包括達拉斯星迎战凤凰郊狼队的2场比赛，明尼苏达野战队和温哥华野战队在西北区争夺季后赛冠军的争夺战。

src: Dozens of people have been killed as a result of flooding in Plateau State, located in the central part of Nigeria.
ref: 由于位于尼日利亚中部的高原州发生洪水，造成数十人死亡。

src: The flooding occurred as the result of a large amount of rainfall close to Jos, a city in the north of the state, causing overflow of a dam.
ref: 洪水发生的原因是靠近乔斯（该州北部城市）的大量降雨，导致大坝溢出。

src: The Red Cross has reported the recovery of 35 corpses, while BBC News Online has placed the death toll at a minimum of 39.
ref: 红十字会报告说，35具尸体已被发现，而英国广播公司新闻网则将死亡人数定在最低39人。

src: A spokesperson for the Red Cross said approximately two hundred houses had been sunk or wrecked.
ref: 红十字会的发言人说，大约有两百所房屋被淹没或毁坏。

src: A significant number of the affected houses had been built of mud.
ref: 大量受影响的房屋都是用泥土建造的。

src: Manasie Phampe, leader of the Red Cross of the state, explained: "Rainwater and water from the Lamingo dam which overflowed swept across several neighbourhoods in the city".
ref: 该州红十字会主席马纳西·哈姆普解释说：“雨水和拉明戈大坝溢出的水席卷了该市的几个街区。”

src: The death toll is anticipated to increase by authorities, with 35 reported missing.
ref: 当局预计死亡人数将增加，有35人失踪。

src: "We are still searching for more bodies as many people have been declared missing," Phampe added.
ref: “我们仍在寻找更多的尸体，因为许多人已经被宣布失踪，”范佩补充说。

src: At least 57 people are now known to have died when a boat designed similar to a traditional dhow capsized one mile of the coast of Bahrain in the Persian Gulf.
ref: 在波斯湾巴林海岸一英里处，一艘设计类似于传统双桅帆船的船只倾覆，造成至少57人死亡。

src: Seventeen were Indian and a further 13 of the dead are British; people of another six nationalities are also known to have died.
ref: 17人是印度人，另有13人是英国人；另外6个国家的人也被认为已经死亡。

src: The passengers were mostly foreigners from the Nass-Murray and Roberts construction company, and were enjoying an evening dinner cruise in celebration of their completion of part of the Bahrain World Trade Centre towers.
ref: 乘客大多是来自NASS默里和罗伯茨建筑公司的外国人，为了庆祝巴林世贸中心部分塔楼的竣工，他们正在享受晚间晚餐巡游。

src: Most who died were dining on the lower deck, and were trapped below.
ref: 大多数死者都是在下层用餐，并被困在下面。

src: Over 130 people were onboard the boat at the time, although some say the boat was only licensed to carry 120.
ref: 当时船上有130多人，尽管有人说这艘船只能携带120人。

src: The boat capsized in calm seas soon after it left, trapping many below.
ref: 这艘船在它离开后不久就在平静的海面倾覆，将许多人困在下面。

src: Helicopters from the US Navy searched for 13 missing persons until Friday morning, when the search was called off.
ref: 来自美国海军的直升机搜寻到13名失踪人员，直到周五早上搜索被取消。

src: The dhow had been modified to have an extra, higher deck making the vessel less stable.
ref: 单桅帆船经过改装，增加了一个更高的甲板，使其不那么稳定。

src: The exact cause is unknown - suggestions from eyewitnesses include the boat suddenly turning left, being hit by a wave, and many of the passengers moving to one side of the boat together.
ref: 确切的原因还不清楚-目击者的建议包括船突然左转，被海浪击中，许多乘客一起移到船的一侧。

src: The Bahrain Interior Ministry is to investigate the accident and establish if the boat was seaworthy.
ref: 巴林内政部将调查事故并确定该船是否适航。

src: Irish Taoiseach Bertie Ahern and British Prime Minister Tony Blair have unveiled a new roadmap for the Northern Ireland devolution process.
ref: 爱尔兰总理伯蒂·埃亨和英国首相托尼·布莱尔公布了北爱尔兰权力下放进程的新路线图。

src: The roadmap sets a target date for a new Northern Ireland Executive to be set up.
ref: 路线图设定了建立新的北爱尔兰行政部的目标日期。

src: The roadmap, known as the Saint Andrews Agreement, came after three days of intense talks in St. Andrews, Scotland.
ref: 该路线图，被称为圣安德鲁斯协议，是在苏格兰的圣安德鲁斯经过3天的激烈谈判后制定的。

src: The agreement gives dates for the steps to devolution culminating on March 26, 2007 when the Executive is to be fully up and running.
ref: 协议规定了权力下放进程的日期，整个进程将于2007年3月26日最终完成，届时行政部完全建立并开始运营。

src: The first deadline is on November 10, 2006 during which time both parties must accept the agreement and for the first time in the history of the party, the Democratic Unionist Party will cast a vote for their rivals, Sinn Fein.
ref: 第一个截止日期是2006年11月10日，在这期间双方必须接受该协议，而且民主统一党将首次为他们的竞争对手新芬党投票。

src: The second deadline is on November 27, 2006 in which the Northern Ireland Assembly, would gather to elect the first minister and deputy first minister of the Executive.
ref: 第二个截止日期是2006年11月27日，这期间北爱尔兰议会将开会选举行政部的首席部长和副首席部长。

src: The first minister is speculated by many to be Ian Paisley, the leader of the Democratic Unionist Party.
ref: 据推测，首席部长可能是民主统一党领袖伊恩·佩斯利。

src: The deputy first minister is speculated to be Martin McGuinness, the deputy leader of Sinn Fein.
ref: 据推测，副首席部长可能是新芬党副领袖马丁·麦吉尼斯。

src: One of the key issues is Sinn Fein's recognition of the Police Service of Northern Island, which replaced the controverisal Royal Ulster Constabulary.
ref: 关键议题之一就是新芬党对北爱尔兰警察部队的认可，它取代了颇具争议的皇家警察部队。

src: In a reassurance to unionists, the governments said they will not transfer duties over to the executive till 2008.
ref: 为了使联合主义者安心，政府表示他们到2008年才会将职权转移给行政局。

src: Sinn Fein demanded an immediate transfer of power, possibly to a Sinn Fein minister.
ref: 新芬党要求在可能的情况下，立即将权力转移给新芬党人担任的部长。

src: "You can't have a democratic society unless the police are given full support," Blair said.
ref: 布莱尔说：“如果不给予警察足够的支持，你们不可能建立民主社会。”

src: After the election of ministers, three steps will take place.
ref: 部长选举结束后，将进行3个步骤。

src: The Democratic Unionists will be given time to observe Sinn Fein and see if they are accepting policing.
ref: 给民主统一党时间观察新芬党，看他们是否接受警察管制。

src: Also, in January, the Independent Monitoring Commission will give another report on the status of the Provisional Irish Republican Army revocation of violence.
ref: 接下来，1月份，独立监察委员会将提交另一份关于临时爱尔兰共和军撤销暴力情况的报告。

src: Finally in March, an electoral endorsement of the Saint Andrews Agreement will take place be it either through election or referendum.
ref: 最后，3月份，将以选举或者公投的形式进行圣安德鲁斯协议的签署。

src: Most of the participants at the summit favored a referendum, except for Ian Paisley, according to an anoynoums source who wished not be identified as he no authorization to release details publicly.
ref: 据匿名消息称，除了伊恩·佩斯利之外，峰会上大多数参会者更倾向于选择公投，消息提供者不希望公开身份，因为他没有向公众公布细节的权力。

src: The last two final steps take place in March 2007.
ref: 最后两个步骤于2007年3月完成。

src: On March 14, the nomination of the Executive will take place.
ref: 3月14日，将进行行政局的任命。

src: Finally, if all goes well, the Northern Ireland Executive power-sharing government and full devolved Northern Ireland Assembly would be revived and take power on March 26, 2007.
ref: 最后，如果一切顺利，北爱尔兰行政局权力共享政府和完成权力移交的北爱尔兰议会将于2007年3月26日恢复职权并开始执政。

src: However, if the parties fail to set up the Executive or fail to agree "at any stage", the Assembly will be dissolved and direct rule from London will continue with input from the Republic of Ireland.
ref: 但是，如果各方未能建立行政局，或者在任何一个阶段未能达成一致，议会将被解散，继续由伦敦直接统治，爱尔兰共和国参与执政。

src: Tony Blair said the essential parts of the agreement are that all parties accept policing and the courts and have a clear agreement on power-sharing.
ref: 托尼·布莱尔说，协议的重要内容就是各方均接受警察和法庭，并达成关于权力共享的明确协议。

src: "So those are the two essential parts of it," Mr Blair said.
ref: “所以这是协议的两项重要内容，”布莱尔说。

src: Ian Paisley, the notorious hardliner evangelist who has made his political career out of saying no to comprehensive reforms, eschewed his trademark fire-brand rhetoric offered a welcome and said that the province is "at a crossroads."
ref: 有名的强硬派传教士伊恩·佩斯利，在其政治生涯中从来不主张进行全面改革，此次避开其叛乱煽动者的身份，对改革表示欢迎，并表示北爱尔兰正处于紧要关头。

src: Paisley said of Ulster, "a place where there is a road to democracy and where there is a road to anarchy."
ref: 佩斯利提到阿尔斯特时说，“它是一个带我们通往民主之路和通往无政府状态之路的地方。”

src: Further adding, "I trust that we will see in the coming days the vast majority of people taking the road to democracy."
ref: 他还说：“我相信在未来的日子里，我们会看到绝大多数人走上通往民主之路。”

src: Blair also added, "We've been through different parts of this process many times over the past few years but I think this is a sound basis to proceed."
ref: 布莱尔也表示：“在过去的几年里，我们多次完成了此进程的不同阶段，但是我认为这是继续完成此进程的坚实基础。”

src: He also said on the possible election of Paisley and McGuinness to their minister positions, "I do not think anybody will find it easy to sit in an executive with people who they are deeply opposed to, or indeed hostile to."
ref: 关于佩斯利和麦吉尼斯可能当选部长职位之事，他还说：“我认为任何人都会觉得在一个全部是他极力反对，甚至敌对的人的行政局任职不是一件容易的事情。”

src: Referring to Sinn Fein, Paisley stated "We will meet the requirements. "
ref: 关于新芬党，佩斯利表示：“我们会满足他们的要求。”

src: "But the IRA-Sinn Fein has got to meet those requirements."
ref: “但是爱尔兰共和军-新芬党必须满足那些要求。”

src: "And when they do, we will really be on the way to peace in Northern Ireland."
ref: “如果他们能做到，我们就真正走上了北爱尔兰和平之路。”

src: Paisley left St. Andrews quickly after attending the press conference in order to be with his family for his fiftieth wedding anniversary.
ref: 参加完记者招待会后，佩斯利迅速离开圣安德鲁斯，赶回家与家人一起庆祝他结婚50周年纪念日。

src: Sinn Fein leader, Gerry Adams offered a guarded welcome of the plans and stated "requires thoughtful consideration and consultation."
ref: 新芬党领袖格里·亚当斯谨慎支持该计划，并表示“该计划需要经过深思熟虑和认真磋商。”

src: However, he stated the restoration of power-sharing was an "an enormous prize. "
ref: 但是，他说恢复权力共享是“一项巨大成果”。

src: "Common sense, political realism and the interests of all sections of our people demand that we achieve this."
ref: “共识、政治现实主义和我们全体人民的利益要求我们要实现这个目标。”

src: Sir Reg Empey, the leader of the Ulster Unionist Party said that the agreement was "Belfast for slower learners."
ref: 北爱尔兰统一党领袖雷吉·恩皮爵士说，该协议是“慢速学习者的贝尔法斯特”。

src: He added "Sinn Fein will sign up to the PSNI being the only force of law and order and Ian Paisley, or a colleague, will share the joint office of first and deputy first minister with Martin McGuinness in a mandatory coalition."
ref: 他还说：“新芬党将签约同意北爱尔兰警察为维护法律与秩序的唯一军队，伊恩·佩斯利或其同僚将与麦吉尼斯结成强制性联盟，共用首席部长和副首席部长的联合办公室。”

src: Leader of the more moderate nationalist Social Democratic and Labour Party, Mark Durkan stated that welcome progress had been made in devolution and that his party would continue working towards this.
ref: 温和的民族主义者社会民主工党的领袖马克·德肯表示政权转移进展顺利，他的政党会继续进行此进程。

src: The leader of the cross-community non-sectarian Alliance Party of Northern Ireland, David Ford said of the summit that the outcome of the summit was a mix of "of challenges and opportunities".
ref: 跨团体非宗教政党北爱尔兰联盟党领袖大卫•福特提到峰会时说，此次峰会的成果是“挑战与机遇”的结合。

src: He added, "Despite all that remains to be done, there is now at least a sense of hope for a shared future."
ref: 他还说：“尽管还有很多遗留工作没有做完，但是至少目前我们感受到了对共同未来的希望。”

src: Direct rule from London has been in place since the Assembly and Executive dissolved in 2002 over allegations of IRA spying ring.
ref: 自2002年议会和行政部因涉嫌北爱尔兰共和军间谍组织而解散后，北爱尔兰一直处于伦敦的直接统治下。

src: Going into the third scheduled day of competition at the IPC Alpine World Championships in La Molina, Spain yesterday, the United States para-alpine team has delivered with a gold medal won by Laurie Stephens in the women's sitting downhill, a silver medal won by men's sit skier Stephen Lawler in the downhill, and bronze medal won by Laurie Stephens in the women's sitting Super-G.
ref: 在西班牙拉莫利纳举行的国际高山滑雪世锦赛昨天进入第3个比赛日，美国滑雪队以劳里·斯蒂芬斯获得女子坐式速降项目金牌，斯蒂芬·劳勒获得男子坐式滑雪项目银牌，劳里·斯蒂芬斯获得女子坐式超级大回转项目铜牌的成绩收官。

src: The United States finished two days of competition fifth overall in the medal count, tied with Russia.
ref: 美国在第2天比赛结束后，位列奖牌榜第五位，与俄罗斯并列。

src: Other Team USA performances in the downhill included a fourth place finish by visually impaired woman skier Danelle Umstead and guide Robert Umstead, a fifth place finish by Christopher Devlin-Young in the men's sitting group, an eighth place finish by Ralph Green in the men's standing group, an eighth place finish by women's standing skier Allison Jones, a ninth place finish by visually impaired Mark Bathum and guide Sean Ramsden, a tenth place finish by Tyler Walker in the men's sitting, and a thirteenth place finish by Heath Calhoun in the men's sitting.
ref: 美国队在速降项目取得的其他成绩包括，盲人女滑雪运动员丹尼尔·乌姆斯特德和向导罗伯特·乌姆斯特德获得第4名，克里斯托弗·德尔文·杨获得男子坐式速降团体赛第5名，拉尔夫·格林获得男子站式速降团体赛第8名，埃里森·琼斯获得女子站式速降第8名，盲人马克·贝瑟姆和向导肖恩·拉姆斯登获得第9名，泰勒•沃克获得男子坐式速降第10名，希思·卡尔霍恩获得男子坐式速降第13名。

src: In the Super-G event on Thursday, Jones finished fourth in the women's standing group, Devlin-Young finished fifth, Stephani Victor finished fourth in the women's sitting group, Umstead and Umstead finished fifth in their group, Bathum and Ramsden finished seventh in their group, Walker finished twelfth in his group, Green finished sixteenth in the men's standing, Jonathan Lujan finished nineteenth in the men's standing, Stephen Lawler finished twentieth in the men's sitting, Heath Calhoun finished twenty-third in men's sitting, and Andrew Earl Kurka finished twenty-fifth in the men's sitting group.
ref: 在星期四进行的超级大回转项目中，琼斯获得女子站式速降团体赛第4名，德尔文·杨获得第5名，斯特凡尼·维克多获得女子坐式速降团体赛第4名，乌姆斯特德和乌姆斯特德在团体赛中获得第5名，贝瑟姆和拉姆斯登在团体赛中获得第7名，沃克在团体赛中获得第12名，格林获得男子站式速降的第16名，乔纳森·卢汉获得男子站式速降第19名，斯蒂芬·劳勒获得男子坐式速降第20名，希思·卡尔霍恩获得男子坐式速降第23名，安德鲁·厄尔·库卡获得男子坐式速降团体赛第25名。

src: A few members of Team USA had difficulties, and were not able to start or finish their races.
ref: 有几名美国队运动员，因有特殊困难，或赛前即退出比赛，或没有坚持到比赛结束。

src: In the downhill and Super-G event, 2010 Winter Paralympics medalist Alana Nichols did not start.
ref: 在速降项目和超级大回转项目中，2010年冬季残奥会奖牌获得者阿兰娜·尼克尔斯赛前退出比赛。

src: LW12-2 women's sit-skier Victor also did not start in the downhill event.
ref: 在速降项目中，LW12-2女子坐式滑雪运动员维克多也在赛前即退出比赛。

src: Visually-impaired B3 classified skier Bathum chatted with his guide, Sean Ramsden, immediately following both his races.
ref: B3级盲人滑雪运动员贝瑟姆赛后立即与其向导肖恩·拉姆斯登交流。

src: While he was unhappy with his downhill run, Bathum was happy with and had fun during his seventh place run in the Super-G event where he finished with a factored time of 1:13.51, only 3.02 seconds slower than the winning time set by Spanish skier Jon Santacana.
ref: 贝瑟姆虽然对这次速降比赛成绩不满意，但是他非常开心能够在超级大回转项目中以1：13.51的成绩获得第7名，仅比西班牙运动员乔恩·沈拉蒙赢得比赛的用时慢3.02秒。

src: United States skiers were scheduled to compete yesterday in the Slalom discipline but the competition was cancelled due to high winds.
ref: 美国滑雪运动员原计划参加昨天的障碍滑雪比赛，但是比赛因大风天气而取消。

src: Several members of Team USA had a pizza party after the slalom cancellation.
ref: 障碍滑雪比赛取消后，美国队的几名运动员举行了一个披萨派对。

src: Friday's scheduled event had been rescheduled as a result of predicted snow and high winds during the day.
ref: 原计划于星期五进行的比赛项目，因白天预计有风雪天气，所以重新调整了比赛时间。

src: No snow arrived until late in the afternoon, where there was limited accumulation.
ref: 直到傍晚时分，才开始下雪，而且雪量不大。

src: Some of the younger members of Team USA took advantage of the night off on Thursday to go bowling before a busy training day Friday.
ref: 在星期五紧张的训练日到来之前，美国队一些年轻的队员，利用星期四晚上的休息时间去打保龄球。

src: In other United States Paralympic news, Sir Philip Craven, the President of the International Paralympic Committee, told a Wikinews reporter the country will have live television coverage of the 2016 Summer Paralympics in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
ref: 据美国其他关于残奥会的新闻称，国际残疾人奥委会主席菲利普·克雷文先生告诉维基新闻的记者，美国将通过电视直播报道于巴西里约热内卢举办的2016年夏季残疾人奥运会。

src: When a member of Team USA competing in La Molina was asked if they heard confirmation of this, they were unable to confirm.
ref: 当一位在拉莫利纳参加比赛的美国队队员被问及是否听说过此消息时，他们无法确认。

src: They did highlight the lack of United States media coverage was frustrating for fans wanting to follow the Games in London.
ref: 但他们的确特别强调，美国缺乏媒体报道，曾令想观看伦敦奥运会的粉丝非常沮丧。

src: According to the skier, many people he knew could only follow the Games by searching for video on sites like YouTube.
ref: 该滑雪运动员称，他认识的很多人只能通过在类似YouTube的网站上搜索视频来观看比赛。

src: Plastic surgeon to the stars Dr. Frank Ryan has died in a car accident at age 50.
ref: 为明星服务过的整形外科医生弗兰克·瑞恩在50岁时因车祸去世。

src: It is reported that the Jeep Ryan was driving crashed over the side of the Pacific Coast Highway and landed on rocks.
ref: 据报道，瑞恩驾驶的吉普车在太平洋海岸公路一侧撞毁并落在岩石上。

src: Lifeguards were first on the scene and unsuccessfully tried to rescue Ryan.
ref: 救生员是第一次出现在现场，并没有成功地营救瑞恩。

src: It is thought that no other vehicle was involved in the incident.
ref: 据说此次事故中没有涉及其他车辆。

src: Dr. Ryan, a celebrity in his own right, performed plastic surgery on several stars including Janice Dickinson, Gene Simmons, Shauna Sand and Adrianne Curry.
ref: 瑞恩医生，凭借自己成为一个名人，给包括珍妮丝·狄金森，吉恩·西蒙斯，绍纳·沙和阿德里安娜·科瑞在内的几位明星进行了整形手术。

src: He appeared on several television shows and became one of the first people to perform plastic surgery on television in 1995.
ref: 他在几个电视节目中露面，并成为1995年第一批在电视上进行整形手术的人之一。

src: A representative for Janice Dickinson released a statement about the death of Ryan.
ref: 珍妮丝·狄金森的代表发表了关于瑞恩死亡的声明。

src: She said "Janice is deeply, deeply anguished! She is stunned and wants the world to know what a genius Dr. Ryan was."
ref: 她说：“珍妮丝对此深感悲痛！她惊呆了，希望全世界都知道瑞安博士是个天才”。

src: Ryan was traveling with his pet dog at the time of the crash; the dog was found seriously injured in the ocean and was transported to a local veterinarian.
ref: 在撞车事故发生时，瑞安和他的宠物狗一起旅行；这只狗在海洋中被发现，它严重受伤，并被送往当地兽医院。

src: Eleven protesters, including five members of Congress, were arrested on charges of disorderly conduct and unlawful assembly.
ref: 包括五名国会议员在内的十一名抗议者因扰乱治安和非法集会被捕。

src: "The Sudanese government has shown total disregard for the wishes of the global, civilized community."
ref: “苏丹政府完全无视全球文明社区的意愿。”

src: " I have no optimism as to the actions of the Sudanese government," Lantos said.
ref: 兰托斯说：“我对苏丹政府的行动并不乐观。”

src: Democratic House members James McGovern and John Olver of Massachusetts, Sheila Jackson Lee of Texas, and Jim Moran of Virginia were among the others arrested and released after paying $50 fines after being arrested in front of the Sudanese embassy.
ref: 民主党众议员詹姆斯·麦戈文和马萨诸塞州的约翰·奥尔弗，德克萨斯州的希拉·杰克逊·李以及弗吉尼亚州的吉姆·莫兰被捕并支付50美元罚款后在苏丹大使馆前被释放。

src: Olver said, "We must hold the Sudanese government accountable for the attacks they have supported on their own citizens in Darfur."
ref: 奥尔弗说：“我们必须让苏丹政府为他们支持在达尔富尔袭击本国公民的事件负责。”

src: Meanwhile, President Bush met with Darfur advocates this Friday in support of rallies all over the US this weekend against the ongoing genocide in western Sudan.
ref: 与此同时，布什总统本周五会见了达尔富尔的支持者们，他们支持这个周末在美国各地举行的反对苏丹西部正在进行的种族灭绝的集会。

src: There will be rallies across our country to send a message to the Sudanese government that the genocide must stop.
ref: 我们将在全国各地举行集会，向苏丹政府发出信息，告诉他们，必须停止种族灭绝。

src: "I want the Sudanese government to understand the United States of America is serious about solving this problem," Bush said.
ref: 布什说：“我希望苏丹政府理解美利坚合众国是严肃解决这个问题的。”
