src: Barack Obama, the junior senator from Illinois and 2008 US presidential candidate has swept all three of today's Democratic contests, two caucuses in Nebraska and Washington and the primary in Louisiana.
ref: 巴拉克•奥巴马，伊利诺斯州参议员，2008年美国总统候选人。他在今天的三场民主党初选，内布拉斯加州和华盛顿州的两场党团会议以及路易斯安那州的初选中获得全胜。

src: Obama also won the tiny United States territory of the United States Virgin Islands.
ref: 奥巴马同时还赢得了美国的小块领土美属维尔京群岛的选举。

src: Obama won nearly 30% more over opponent Hillary Clinton in the Nebraska caucuses.
ref: 奥巴马在内布拉斯加州的预选会议上赢得了超过对手希拉里•克林顿近30％的支持率。

src: Obama also had a major lead over Clinton in the Washington caucuses by a 2-1 margin.
ref: 奥巴马在华盛顿的党团会议上也以2：1领先克林顿。

src: Commentators have noted that Obama seems to perform well in caucus states.
ref: 评论人士指出，奥巴马似乎在党团会议的州表现良好。

src: Louisiana's Democratic primary was also won by Obama in a large margin, winning nearly 53% of the vote over Clinton's 39%.
ref: 奥巴马在路易斯安那州的民主党初选也在很大程度上赢得了胜利，他赢得了近53％的选票，超过了克林顿的39％。

src: The state, which is still suffering from the effects of Hurricane Katrina three years later could play a large role in the election this year.
ref: 三年后仍然遭受卡特里娜飓风影响的州可能在今年的选举中发挥重要作用。

src: Despite these wins it is still a close race between the two Democratic candidates, with Obama showing a lead in pledged delegates, and Hillary Clinton showing a narrow lead when super delegates are taken into account.
ref: 尽管取得了这些胜利，但两位民主党候选人之间仍然是一场激烈的竞选，奥巴马在承诺代表中表现出领先优势，希拉里克林顿在宣誓代表中处于微弱的领先优势。

src: Each candidate needs to win the support of 2,025 delegates to secure the nomination.
ref: 每位候选人都需要赢得2,025名代表的支持才能获得提名。

src: After the voting and caucusing ended yesterday both candidates gave a speech at the Democratic Party's Jefferson and Jackson Dinner in Virginia- Clinton giving her standard stump speech and refusing to talk about what had happened during the day; Obama repeating many of the things he had said earlier in his "Yes We Can" speech, this time with detailed policy proposals as well as "hope-mongering".
ref: 昨天投票和会议结束后，两位候选人在弗吉尼亚州民主党的杰斐逊和杰克逊晚宴上发表演讲，克林顿发表了标准的政治演说，并拒绝谈论白天发生的事情。奥巴马重复了许多他之前在他的“是的，我们可以”演讲中所说的事情，这一次是详细的政策建议以及“希望传播”。

src: The two candidates were in Maine today doing last minute campaigning before tomorrow's Democratic caucuses there and are also preparing for the "Potomac primary" which will involve the nation's capital of Washington, D.C. and the bordering states of Maryland and Virginia to be held on February 12.
ref: 今天两位候选人在缅因州为明天的民主党党团会议做最后一分钟的竞选活动，同时也在为“波托马克初选”做准备。初选将于2月12日在缅因州首府华盛顿特区，邻近的马里兰州和维吉尼亚州举行。

src: India's first lunar mission, the Chandrayaan-1 (meaning 'moon craft' in Sanskrit), reached its destined lunar orbit on Wednesday.
ref: 印度的第一个月球任务月船-1（意为梵语中的“月球船”）于周三到达其预定的月球轨道。

src: It is now in a circular orbit 102 kilometres from the Moon.
ref: 它现在处于离月球102公里的圆形轨道上。

src: It will stay in this orbit for two years and conduct various experiments to gain a better understanding of the Moon.
ref: 它将在这个轨道上停留两年并进行各种实验以更好地了解月球。

src: According to Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) officials, the Moon Impact Probe (MIP), with an Indian flag painted on it, will be dropped late tonight.
ref: 印度空间研究组织（印度空间研究组织）官员表示，月球撞击探测器（MIP）上印有印度国旗，将于今晚降落。

src: The MIP has a mass of 29 kg and it will take 20 minutes to reach the moon's surface.
ref: 月球撞击探测器的质量为29千克，到达月球表面需要20分钟。

src: Two explosions were heard in the city of La Paz, Bolivia on Tuesday night, March 22 and in the early morning Wednesday, March 23.
ref: 3月22日星期二晚上和3月23日星期三凌晨，玻利维亚拉巴斯市发生两起爆炸事件。

src: The first occurred at the Linares Motel, at 21:50 (01:50 UTC), and left two people dead and four injured.
ref: 第一次发生在利纳雷斯汽车旅馆，时间是21：50（格林威治标准时间01：50），造成两人死亡，四人受伤。

src: The second explosion occurred at 01:45 (05:45 UTC) at the Hotel Riosinhio II, less than a block from the La Paz bus terminal, injuring two people.
ref: 第二次爆炸发生在里奥沙克罗二世宾馆，时间是01：45（格林威治标准时间05：45 ），距离拉帕兹巴士总站不到一个街区，造成两人受伤。

src: Hours later, two suspects in the crime were arrested by the police in the city of El Alto.
ref: 几小时后，两名犯罪嫌疑人在阿尔托市被警方逮捕。

src: They were American Claudio Lestat, approximately 30 years old (25 according to some sources) and his partner, Uruguayan Alda Ribeiros, of 35 years (40 according to other sources).
ref: 他们是美国人克劳迪奥·列斯达，大约30岁（根据一些消息来源说是25岁）和他的同伙，乌拉圭人艾达·里贝罗，35岁（根据其他消息来源是40岁）。

src: Dynamite was used in both explosions, according to government attorney Jorge Gutiérrez.
ref: 根据政府律师豪尔赫·古铁雷斯的说法，炸药被用于两次爆炸。

src: President Evo Morales indicated that the promoters of the incidents were "industrialists" and "oligarchists" who, "using external agents", claimed to halt the reforms that have been happening in Bolivia.
ref: 埃沃·莫拉莱斯总统表示，这些事件的推动者是“工业家”和“寡头主义者”，他们“使用外部代理人”声称停止了玻利维亚正在进行的改革。

src: He also suggested that the United States could be behind the incidents: "Is there an effort against terrorism from the government of the United States, or did they send North Americans to commit terrorism in Bolivia?" Despite the accusations, the United States embassy in La Paz announced its cooperation.
ref: 他还暗示美国可能是这些事件的幕后支持者：“美国政府是否有反恐怖主义的努力，或是他们是否派遣北美人在玻利维亚实施恐怖主义？”尽管受到指责，美国驻拉巴斯大使馆宣布了合作。

src: However, authorities have not ruled out religious motives, because Lestat is a self-proclaimed "minister of pagan rites".
ref: 然而，当局并没有排除宗教动机，因为莱斯特是一位自称为“异教仪式的部长”。

src: Police also announced that the Chilean consulate in the Bolivian capital was also a target, to be attacked on Saturday the 25th.
ref: 警方还宣布，玻利维亚首都的智利领事馆也是目标，将于周六25日遭到袭击。

src: The People's Republic of China (PRC) in recent years has begun an effort to reform its judicial system and make trials more fair and accountable, according to its state-run People's Daily.
ref: 据中国人民日报报道，为使审判更加公平和负责，近年来，中华人民共和国（PRC）已开始努力改革其司法制度。

src: Those efforts came to a head today with the official May 1 start of jury duty by more than 27,000 newly qualified jurors.
ref: 今天，由于超过27,000名新合格陪审员在5月1日开始担任陪审团职务，使得这些努力达到了顶峰。

src: According to People's Daily, "It is the first time in Chinese history that the people's juries are appointed in a uniformed way by the people's congresses at all levels."
ref: 据“人民日报”报道称，“这是中国历史上第一次人民陪审团是由各级人民代表大会以穿着制服方式任命的。”

src: Two jurors and a judge will be sitting on each three-person panel, and decide both criminal and civil cases.
ref: 两名陪审员和一名法官将坐在每个三人小组，并决定刑事和民事案件。

src: The juries will be available when requested by litigants and also in cases "with considerable social repercussions", which appears to mean major cases.
ref: 当诉讼人提出要求时，以及“具有相当大的社会影响”的情况下，陪审团都是可用的，这似乎意味着重大案件。

src: The jurors are not chosen for each trial but will serve a five-year term in the jury pool working on different cases from time to time.
ref: 陪审员不是为每次审判而被选中，而是将在陪审团中任职五年，不时处理不同的案件。

src: Jurors have been provided for in the Chinese Constitution since 1954, but their role in the system was not well-defined by law until now.
ref: 自1954年以来，中国宪法一直提及陪审员，但直到现在，他们在法律中的角色尚未得到明确定义。

src: The changes to the jury system are part of a long-term planned reform of China's judicial system that was announced in 1999 by China's top judge, Xiao Yang.
ref: 陪审团制度的变化是中国司法系统长期计划改革的一部分，该改革由中国最高法官肖扬于1999年宣布。

src: In addition to jury reforms, the plan addressed trial procedures and court structure and supervision.
ref: 除了陪审团改革，该计划还涉及审判程序和法院结构和监督。

src: The goal was to "perfect the socialist judicial system with Chinese characteristics...in accordance with the Constitution and laws, and [without] judicial independence and supremacy, which exist in many Western countries," according to Xiao Yang as reported by the People's Daily in 1999.
ref: 根据1999年人民日报中肖扬的说法，目标是“完善中国特色的社会主义司法制度……符合宪法和法律，以及【没有】司法独立和至高无上的地位，这存在于许多西方国家。”

src: "Court reform represents a major part of China's reform of the judicial system and political restructuring."
ref: “法院改革是中国司法制度改革和政治体制改革的重要组成部分。”

src: The essence of judicial reform is judicial fairness, which is crucial to the country's rule of law," Xiao Yang said back then.
ref: 当时肖扬说，“司法改革的实质是司法公正，这对国家的法治至关重要。”

src: In August 2004, the 10th National People's Congress (NPC) Standing Committee approved a "resolution on improving the people's jury system", which took effect today.
ref: 2004年8月，第十届全国人大常委会通过了“关于改善人民陪审员制度的决议”，该决议于今天生效。

src: The system specifies that either by recommendation of local work units or by self-application, potential jurors can take qualifying examinations and be presented to standing committees of the NPC for appointment as jurors.
ref: 该系统规定，无论是通过当地工作单位的推荐还是通过自我申请，潜在的陪审员都可以参加资格考试，并被提交给全国人大常委会任命为陪审员。

src: The first batch of 1,342 jurors were tested in Beijing under the new law on April 23, 2005.
ref: 根据新法，2005年4月23日，首批1,342名陪审员在北京接受了测试。

src: Those who were certified to begin service on May 1 are said to "participate in all hearing activities of people's courts according to the law, enjoying the same rights as do the judges except that for a presiding judge after their assumption of the post," according to the People's Daily.
ref: 人民日报称，那些被证明可以在5月1日开始服务的人被称为“依法参与人民法院的所有听证活动，享有与法官相同的权利，但主审法官在担任该职位后享有同样的权利，”。

src: This is an important move to upgrade and strengthen the system of people's jurors, Xiao Long of Beijing People's Court said to China Daily on April 24.
ref: 北京市人民法院4月24日在中国日报中表示，这是升级和加强人民陪审员制度的重要举措。

src: The implementation of the NPC's decision will add more transparency and justness to the country's judicial system, he added.
ref: 他补充说，全国人大决定的实施将增加国家司法系统的透明度和公正性。

src: China has one of the world's largest prison systems with over 1 million prisoners, similar to Russia.
ref: 中国拥有世界上最大的监狱系统之一，拥有100多万名囚犯，与俄罗斯相似。

src: It has received criticism over the years from the U.S. State Department and others for its arbitrariness and its treatment of political prisoners.
ref: 多年来，美国国务院和其他组织因其任意性和政治犯待遇受到了批评。

src: The United States, however, is the world's largest jailer, with a staggering 2 million prison inmates, out of 9 million total around the entire globe.
ref: 然而，美国是世界上最大的狱卒，惊人的拥有200万监狱囚犯，而全球总共有900万囚犯。

src: The newly formed Icelandic coalition interim government will take office today, according to a coalition leader.
ref: 据联盟领导人称，新成立的冰岛联盟临时政府将于今天上任。

src: On January 27, it was announced that the nation's coalition government had collapsed and dissolved following a banking financial crisis.
ref: 1月27日，该国的联合政府在银行业金融危机后被宣布垮台并解散。

src: In October of 2008, Iceland's banking sector collapsed and was largely nationalised.
ref: 2008年10月，冰岛的银行业崩溃，并在很大程度上被国有化。

src: Iceland's interest rate is now 18%, with GDP expected to fall 9.6% this year.
ref: 冰岛的利率目前为18％，今年国内生产总值预计将下降9.6％。

src: Just before the announcement of the government taking office, nearly 1,500 people were protesting outside the parliament building over the collapsed government and the recent financial crisis, but protesters seemed happy about the change.
ref: 就在宣布政府上任之前，近1500名议员在议会大楼外抗议政府倒台和最近的金融危机，但抗议者似乎对这一变化感到高兴。

src: Therefore "today is a celebration," said protest organizer Hordur Torfason to the crowd who were cheering about hearing the news.
ref: 因此，抗议活动组织者豪多·托法森在对听到这个消息而欢呼雀跃的人群说道，“今天是庆祝活动”。

src: The new minority coalition will consist of Jóhanna's Social Democratic Alliance and the Left-Green Movement with backing from the Progressive Party.
ref: 新的少数民族联盟将由约翰娜的社会民主联盟和左翼绿色运动组成，并得到进步党的支持。

src: He criticizes her appointment because he believes she will not help the economic crisis, resulting in more government spending.
ref: 他批评她的任命，因为他认为她不会对经济危机有帮助，会导致更多的政府支出。

src: The quick appointment of the new government also means an early election, which is scheduled to take place on April 25.
ref: 新政府的快速任命也意味着选举计划提前到4月25日举行。

src: Israel's Central Election Committee voted yesterday to disqualify two Arab political parties from running in the country's general elections scheduled for February 10th.
ref: 以色列中央选举委员会昨天投票决定取消两个阿拉伯政党参加2月10日举行的全国大选。

src: Tibi condemned the ruling saying, "It was a political trial led by a group of fascists and racists who are willing to see the Knesset without Arabs and want to see the country without Arabs."
ref: 蒂比谴责这一裁决说：“这是一个由一群法西斯主义者和种族主义者领导的政治审判，他们希望看到没有阿拉伯人的议会，并希望看到没有阿拉伯人的国家。”

src: Arabs constitute one fifth of the population in Israel but only have twelve of 120 parliamentary seats.
ref: 阿拉伯人占以色列人口的五分之一，但只有120个议会席位中的12个。

src: Other parties associated with the Arab-Israeli minority, such as Hadash, are not affected by the committee's decision.
ref: 与阿拉伯、以色列少数民族有关的其他组织，如哈达什，不受委员会决定的影响。

src: Israel's High Court of Justice reversed a similar attempt to ban Balad in 2003, and has until Friday to rule on yesterday's votes.
ref: 以色列高等法院在2003年撤销了类似的禁止巴拉德的企图，直到周五才对昨天的选票作出裁决。

src: Alabama Gov. Bob Riley beat back a Republican primary challenge from Roy Moore, the former judge who tried to put up a Ten Commandments monument in his courthouse.
ref: 阿拉巴马州州长鲍勃·莱利击败了前法官罗伊·摩尔的共和党初选挑战，他试图在他的法院建立一个十诫纪念碑。

src: In the weeks leading to Alabama's gubernatorial primaries, polls showed Riley had pulled ahead of Moore, the former state chief justice who became a hero to the religious right in 2003 when he was ousted over his refusal to remove a 5,300-pound Ten Commandments monument from the state judicial building.
ref: 在阿拉巴马州州长初选的前几周。民意调查显示，赖利领先于摩尔。摩尔是佛罗里达州州长，2003年因拒绝从国家司法大楼上移走一枚5300英镑的十诫纪念碑而被赶下台，成为宗教右翼的英雄。

src: Moore conceded in his hometown of Gadsden, telling supporters, "God's will has been done."
ref: 摩尔在他的家乡加兹登承认，告诉支持者，“上帝的旨意已经完成。”

src: Gale force winds ripped through Sydney and the South Coast of New South Wales late on Saturday night, causing widespread damage and extensive power outages, with up to 30,000 homes going without electricity at one point.
ref: 星期六晚上，强风席卷悉尼和新南威尔士南海岸，造成大面积破坏和大面积断电，多达30,000户家庭停电。

src: The strong winds caused trees to be uprooted, in one instance crashing down upon an unsuspecting motorist, killing a man in his 60's and severely injuring his wife.
ref: 强风导致树木被连根拔起，有一次撞倒了一位毫无防备的摩托司机，杀死了一名60多岁的男子，他的妻子受重伤。

src: The State Emergency Service (SES) has responded to over 800 calls for help to repair damage caused by the storms, however the storms have subsided somewhat and flood warnings around Bega and Moruya have been withdrawn.
ref: 国家紧急服务中心回应了800多次呼救，以帮助修复风暴造成的损害，但风暴已经有所减弱，贝加和莫拉瓦周围的洪水警告已被解除。

src: The United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is deploying its new Homeland Security Information Network - Secret (HSIN-Secret) in all 50 state Emergency Operations Centers as well as 18 additional state and local law enforcement sites.
ref: 美国国土安全部正在所有50个州的紧急行动中心以及另外18个州和地方执法站点部署其新的国土安全信息秘密网络。

src: The secret network is a component of the HSIN, which is the primary conduit for DHS to share information on terrorist threats, suspicious activity and incident management with state, local, tribal and private-sector officials.
ref: 秘密网络是网络信息安全的一个组成部分，网络信息安全是美国国土安全部与州，地方，部落和私营部门官员分享恐怖威胁，可疑活动和事件管理信息的主要渠道。

src: Development on this $350 million system by Northrop Grumman Corporation was begun in March of 2004 with basic operation achieved in just 4 months.
ref: 诺斯罗普·格鲁曼公司于2004年3月开始开发这个价值3.5亿美元的系统，仅用了4个月便实现了基本操作。

src: "The Homeland is more secure when each hometown is more secure," said Secretary of Homeland Security Tom Ridge in DHS's February 24, 2004 press release that launched the program.
ref: 国土安全部部长汤姆·里奇在2004年2月24日发布该计划的新闻发布会上说道，“当每个家乡更加安全时，国土会更加安全。”

src: Future program expansion will include the county level, communication at the classified SECRET level, and the involvement of the private sector.
ref: 未来的扩展计划将包括县级，分类秘密级别的交流以及私营部门的覆盖。

src: With the "Secret" component in place, classified information can now be disseminated to authorized individuals at all levels of government and business throughout the country almost instantly.
ref: 随着“秘密”组件的到位，现在几乎可以立即将分类信息传播给全国各级政府和企业的授权人员。

src: HSIN lets most government agencies as well as many private companies doing business with the government share information on the whereabouts and suspicious activities of anyone that comes to their attention.
ref: 网络信息安全让大多数政府机构以及与政府有业务往来的许多私营公司分享有关他们注意到的任何人的行踪和可疑活动的信息。

src: Internal policies and the judgement of the system's users provide privacy and civil rights protections, while who can access the system is determined by DHS.
ref: 内部政策和系统用户的判断提供隐私和民权保护，而谁可以访问系统由美国国土安全部来决定。

src: A passenger train carrying at least 250 people, many of whom were children, derailed in Serbia-Montenegro and drove into a ravine Tuesday afternoon.
ref: 周二下午，一列载有至少250人，其中许多是儿童的客运列车在塞尔维亚和黑山境内出轨，掉进了一个山谷中。

src: Close to 200 have been injured and the death toll has risen to 44.
ref: 近200人受伤，死亡人数上升至44人。

src: Most of the passengers were schoolchildren returning from a ski trip.
ref: 大多数乘客是从滑雪旅行返回的学童。

src: "The accident occurred because of a failure of the train's braking system," said Interior Minister Jusuf Kalomperovic.
ref: 内政部长尤素夫·卡罗姆佩罗维奇说，“事故发生的原因是火车制动系统失灵。”

src: At about 4 p.m. the four-car train derailed near Bioče, a small village nearly 15 kilometers northeast of Podgorica as it was emerging from a tunnel above the Moraca River.
ref: 下午4点左右，当它正从莫拉卡河上方的一条隧道中出现时，这列四车厢的火车在波德戈里察东北约15公里的一个小村庄比欧切附近出轨。

src: "The train simply went wild, out of control," said one injured passenger.
ref: 一名受伤的乘客说：“火车简直是疯了，完全失控了。”

src: "I was fine because I was in a back compartment, those in the front got the worst of it."
ref: “我很好，因为我在后面的隔间，前面的人最糟糕。”

src: "It was horrible, I saw many dead and wounded around me," said another passenger from Hungary, Karman Chofu.
ref: 另一名来自匈牙利的乘客卡曼·乔夫说，“这太可怕了，我看到很多人在我身边死伤。”

src: "I had fallen asleep when a loud noise woke me," said Stanislava Bukovic, 60, another injured passenger.
ref: 另一名60岁的受伤乘客斯坦尼斯拉瓦·布科维奇说，“我被大声吵醒，我之前是睡着了的。”

src: Miodrag Djurovic, the head of the main Podgorica hospital, stated that another five passengers had died overnight.
ref: 波德戈里察医院的主要负责人米奥德拉格·杜文峥表示，另外五名乘客在一夜之间死亡。

src: Djurovic also said at least 198 people, 90 of them children, have been treated at the hospital.
ref: 德约洛维奇还说至少有198人，其中90人是儿童，已在医院接受治疗。

src: "The children's hospital admitted 90 children, 34 of them are still there, six have undergone surgery," Djurovic said.
ref: 德约洛维奇说，“儿童医院收治了90名儿童，其中34人躺在那里，其中6人接受了手术。”

src: Earlier Deputy Prime Minister Miroslav Ivanisevic told the media that the death toll stood at 30 and the amount injured at 135, but said those figures could rise as rescuers continue to reach victims.
ref: 早些时候副总理米罗斯拉夫·伊万尼塞维奇告诉媒体，死亡人数为30人，受伤人数为135人，但随着救援人员不断找到更多的受害者，这些数字可能会继续上升。

src: Ivanisevic described the wreck "as the worst rail accident in the history of Montenegro," Ivanisevic also said.
ref: 伊万尼塞维奇称这起灾难“是黑山历史上最严重的铁路事故”。

src: President Filip Vujanovic and Prime Minister, Milo Djukanovic also rushed to the site.
ref: 总统菲利普·武亚诺维奇和总理米洛·久卡诺维奇也冲到了现场。

src: "A terrible tragedy happened at Bioče and everything is being done to reduce the number of casualties as much as possible," Vujanovic told reporters.
ref: 武亚诺维奇告诉记者，“在比欧切发生了可怕的悲剧，要尽一切可能减少伤亡人数。”

src: Because of the accident, Montenegro's transport minister, Andrija Lompar, and National Railways chief Ranko Medenica resigned.
ref: 由于这次事故，黑山的交通部长安德鲁·拉姆帕和国家铁路局局长兰科·莫丹尼卡辞职。

src: The driver of the train has been arrested because of suspicion of negligence.
ref: 火车司机因涉嫌疏忽而被捕。

src: The train was heading from the northeastern town of Bijelo Polje to the Montenegrin coastal city of Bar.
ref: 火车从东北部城镇比耶罗波列前往黑山沿海城市巴尔。

src: The Houston Astros have fired manager Phil Garner and general manager Tim Purpura less than two years after leading the team to its first World Series appearance (2005).
ref: 在带领球队首次参加世界大赛（2005年）之后不到两年经理菲尔·加纳和总经理蒂姆·普尔普拉就遭到了休斯敦太空人队的解雇。

src: Bench coach Cecil Cooper was appointed interim manager and team president Tal Smith will serve as interim general manager.
ref: 板凳教练塞西尔库珀被任命为临时经理，球队总裁塔尔史密斯将担任临时总经理。

src: "I felt this was the time for a change," owner Drayton McLane said.
ref: “我觉得这是改变的时候，”老板德雷顿·麦克雷恩说道。

src: Garner took over the Astros in the middle of the 2004 season after Jimy Williams was fired.
ref: 在吉米·威廉姆斯被解雇后，加纳在2004赛季中期接管了太空人队。

src: The Astros went 48-26 in the second half and won 36 of their last 46 games to win the NL wild card, then defeated Atlanta in the first round of the playoffs before losing to St. Louis in Game 7 of the NL Championship Series.
ref: 太空人队在下半场以48：26的成绩赢得了过去46场比赛中的36场从而赢得了NL外卡，然后在季后赛第一轮击败亚特兰大，之后在NL锦标赛系列赛第7场输给了圣路易斯。

src: He has a 985-1,054 career record as a major league manager, including 277-252 with the Astros.
ref: 作为一名大联盟经理，他有985：1,054的职业生涯记录，包括太空人队的277：252。

src: Purpura joined the organization in 1994 and directed player development and the Astros' six minor league affiliates before taking over from Gerry Hunsicker as GM before the 2005 season.
ref: 普尔普拉于1994年加入该组织，并指导球员发展和太空人队的六个小联盟分支机构，然后在2005赛季之前接替格里·汉斯克的职位。

src: The Astros are currently in fifth place in the National League Central with a record of 58-73.
ref: 太空人队目前在国家联盟中部赛区排名第五，战绩为58：73。

src: The New Zealand government has now introduced graphic health warnings on cigarette packs.
ref: 新西兰政府现在已经在卷烟包装上引入了图形健康警告。

src: The new warnings, which replace the text warnings, will show images of gangrenous toes, rotting gums and teeth and diseased lungs and will also include the quit smoking Quitline number.
ref: 新警告取代了文字警告，将显示坏疽脚趾，牙龈和牙齿腐烂以及患病肺部的图像，还将包括戒烟热线号码。

src: The new warnings will cover 30% of the front side and 90% of the back.
ref: 新警告将覆盖正面的30％和反面的90％。

src: The new warnings will come into effect January 2007 but the manufacturers will not have to produce the new warnings until February 27, 2008 and retailers have till August 2008 to clear all their old stock.
ref: 新警告将于2007年1月生效，但制造商将不必在2008年2月27日之前生产新警告，零售商将在2008年8月之前将所有旧库存清空。

src: Damien O'Conner, associate minister of health and ex-smoker, said: "Pictures were more effective than written warnings."
ref: 健康和戒烟联合部副部长达米安·奥康纳说：“图片比书面警告更有效。”

src: Actually seeing what it does to you is probably more acute than just reading the words on a cigarette packet.
ref: 实际上，看到它对你的影响可能比阅读香烟盒上的文字更为严重。

src: The approach is designed to shock people into realising smoking kills and causes serious illness.
ref: 该方法旨在让人们意识到吸烟导致严重疾病并致死。

src: "Using powerful imagery to remind people of the real and horrific effects of smoking will act to deter smokers and discourage New Zealand's young from starting the habit in the first place."
ref: “利用强大的图像来提醒人们吸烟的真实和可怕的影响，这将起到阻止吸烟者的作用，并首先阻止新西兰的年轻人开始养成这种习惯。”

src: Other countries which also show graphic warnings include Australia and Canada; they say that the warnings are effective.
ref: 其他也出现图形警告的国家包括澳大利亚和加拿大，并且他们说警告是有效的。

src: Chris Laurenson, Health Ministry team leader national drug policy, said that international evidence was strong.
ref: 卫生部负责国家毒品政策的克里斯·劳伦森说，国际证据很有说服力。

src: "That was confirmed by research in New Zealand which supported the effectiveness of pictorial labelling."
ref: “新西兰的研究证实了这一点，它认同了图片标签的有效性。”

src: Altogether there will be fourteen images, of which seven will be released first, with rest following.
ref: 总共将有十四张图片，其中七张将首先发布，其余的将随后发布。

src: Mr O'Connor said: "The images were horrific; but they are what happen to people who smoke in this country."
ref: 奥康纳先生说：“这些图像太可怕了，但这些都是在这个国家吸烟的人身上发生的事情。”

src: However, according to Mr O'Conner, one company had used removable sticker that were later removed due to consultation.
ref: 然而，根据奥康纳先生的说法，一家公司使用了可移动贴纸，后来经过磋商后贴纸被去除。了。

src: The industries will not be reimbursed for any cost that may occur.
ref: 不会对行业补偿可能产生的任何费用。

src: "They understand what it might mean if they don't and I'm confident that they will," Mr O'Connor said.
ref: 奥康纳先生说，“他们明白如果他们不这样做可能意味着什么，并且我相信他们会这样做。”

src: "They have already been implemented in other countries and the NZ tobacco industry has the technology to print the new packets within weeks," Becky Freeman, the Action on Smoking and Health director said.
ref: 吸烟和健康行动主管贝基·弗里曼说，“它们已经在其他国家得到实施，新西兰烟草业已经拥有在几周内打印新包装的技术。”

src: World Heath Organization rules make New Zealand obliged to increase the warning sizes on packets.
ref: 世界卫生组织规则使新西兰有义务增加包装上警告图的大小。

src: Pirates have seized control of the Sirius Star, a Saudi-owned oil tanker off the coast of Kenya and are steering her towards Somalia, reports the US Navy.
ref: 据美国海军报道，海盗已经控制了肯尼亚海岸附近沙特拥有的“天狼星号”油轮，并将其驶向索马里。

src: The ship was captured roughly 830 kilometers south-east of Mombasa and is reportedly heading towards the Somali port of Eyl.
ref: 该船在蒙巴萨东南约830公里处被捕，据报道它正驶向索马里的伊尔港。

src: The oil tanker was carrying over 2 million barrels of oil at the time of her capture, and was on her way to the United States via Cape Town.
ref: 这艘油轮在被截获时携带了200多万桶石油，并且正在途径开普敦前往美国的途中。

src: Reuters claimed that news of the attack raised crude oil prices around the world.
ref: 路透社声称，此次袭击的消息提高了全球原油价格。

src: Vela International Marine, the ship's owner, has said the Sirius Star is fully loaded.
ref: 该船的所有者维拉国际物流表示天狼星号游轮已经满载。

src: The US Navy reports that all 25 crew from the United Kingdom, Croatia, the Philippines, Poland, and Saudi Arabia are 'safe'.
ref: 美国海军报告说，来自英国，克罗地亚，菲律宾，波兰和沙特阿拉伯的所有25名船员都是“安全的”。

src: The area off the East coast of Africa has seen a significant amount of piracy.
ref: 非洲东海岸附近地区出现了大量海盗行为。

src: In 2007, one-third of the world's piracy incidents occurred in this region.
ref: 2007年，全球三分之一的海盗事件发生在该地区。

src: Hijacking off the coast of Somalia has become increasingly common over the last decade.
ref: 在过去十年中，劫持索马里沿海地区的情况越来越普遍。

src: Over the last year multiple countries have expressed concern or committed their navies to dealing with Somali pirates.
ref: 在过去一年中，多个国家表达了对海军处理索马里海盗的担忧或承诺。

src: Most recently, South Korea has announced intentions to send one of its destroyers after five South Koreans were kidnapped in a Japanese cargo ship hijacking.
ref: 最近，韩国宣布打算派遣其中一艘驱逐舰，此前有五名韩国人在一艘日本货船上被绑架劫持。

src: The Sirius Star is the largest ship captured by pirates in the area to date.
ref: 天狼星号游轮是迄今为止该地区海盗捕获的最大船只。

src: This also sets a record for the farthest from the shore that pirates have struck.
ref: 这也创下了海盗袭击海岸最远的记录。

src: California governor Arnold Schwarzenegger announced his support for Arizona Senator John McCain's presidential bid Thursday morning.
ref: 加州州长阿诺德·施瓦辛格周四早上宣布支持亚利桑那州参议员约翰·麦凯恩的总统竞选。

src: Schwarzenegger called McCain "a great American hero and an extraordinary leader" and praised him for his ability to cross party lines.
ref: 施瓦辛格称麦凯恩是“伟大的美国英雄和非凡的领袖”，并称赞他有能力跨越政党路线。

src: "I think Senator McCain has proven over and over again that he is reaching across the aisle to get things done," Schwarzenegger said.
ref: 施瓦辛格说：“我认为参议员麦凯恩已经一次又一次地证明他正在把任务做完。”

src: Also present was former New York City mayor Rudy Giuliani, who recently dropped out of the race and pledged to support McCain.
ref: 出席的还有前纽约市市长鲁迪·朱利亚尼，他最近退出竞选并承诺支持麦凯恩。

src: "This is a man who is moving us into our future," Giuliani said.
ref: “这是一个将我们带入未来的人，”朱利安尼说。

src: "He understands how to do it and also understands how to keep us safe in a time of peril."
ref: “他了解如何做到这一点，并了解如何在危险时刻保证我们的安全。”

src: Schwarzenegger said he also admires Giuliani and only decided to endorse McCain after Giuliani had dropped out.
ref: 施瓦辛格表示，他也很钦佩朱利安尼，并且在朱利安尼退出后才决定支持麦凯恩。

src: "Both of them are friends of mine and this is why I really didn't want to endorse anybody," Schwarzenegger said.
ref: 施瓦辛格说，“他们两人都是我的朋友，这就是为什么我真的不想支持任何人。”

src: McCain used this as an opportunity to discuss his views on greenhouse gas emissions and environmental technology, which have come under criticism from others in the Republican Party.
ref: 麦凯恩以此为契机，讨论他对温室气体排放和环境技术的看法，这些看法受到了共和党内其他人的批评。

src: "We don't have to have increased costs to Americans," McCain said.
ref: “我们不必为美国人增加成本，”麦凯恩说。

src: "In fact, with the development of green technologies, we can have reduced costs to the American consumer with the development of new technologies."
ref: “事实上，随着绿色技术的发展，我们可以通过开发新技术降低美国消费者的成本。”

src: California is one of the 24 states whose primary will be held on February 5, also known as Super Tuesday.
ref: 加利福尼亚州是24个州之一，其主要将于2月5日举行初选，也因为超级星期二而闻名。

src: Nearly 15% of the delegates needed to receive the Republican nomination will come from California.
ref: 接受共和党提名的近15％的代表将来自加利福尼亚州。

src: Democrats Hillary Clinton and Barack Obama were also campaigning in the state on Thursday.
ref: 民主党人希拉里克林顿和巴拉克奥巴马周四也在该州竞选。

src: Two people were killed in a magnitude 5.9 earthquake in Turkey shortly before midnight local time on Thursday.
ref: 周四当地时间午夜前不久，两人在土耳其发生的5.9级地震中丧生。

src: Officials said two people were killed;
ref: 官员称有两人遇难。

src: one was thought to have suffered a heart attack and the other died after jumping from a window in panic.
ref: 一人被认为心脏病发作，另一人在恐慌中从窗户跳下后死亡。

src: Emergency services dispatched search and rescue crews and gave out blankets, food and water.
ref: 紧急服务部门派遣搜救人员，并发放毯子，食物和水。

src: Officials said a wastewater dam had not been damaged by the earthquake, and it posed "no risk."
ref: 有关官员说，地震没有损坏污水坝，并且“没有风险”。

src: The earthquake was felt as far away as the Aegean province of İzmir, the northwestern provinces of Bursa and İstanbul, and even the city of Edirne, not far from the Bulgarian and Greek and borders, because the depth was very shallow.
ref: 远在爱琴海的伊兹密尔省、西北部的布尔萨省和伊斯坦布尔，甚至离保加利亚和希腊边境不远的埃尔德涅城都有震感，因为它的深度很浅。

src: More than 18,000 people died following two earthquakes with a magnitude of more than 7.0 in northwestern Turkey in 1999.
ref: 1999年土耳其西北部发生两次超过7.0次地震后，超过18,000人死亡。

src: Mosaic Fashions, a UK clothing firm, is set to make history as it becomes the first foreign company to list on the Iceland Stock Exchange (ISE).
ref: 英国服装公司马赛克时尚公司将成为第一家在冰岛证券交易所上市的外国公司。

src: Mosaic, which owns the clothing brands Oasis, Karen Millen, Coast and Whistles, operates 600 stores and is majority owned by retail investment group Baugur.
ref: 马赛克拥有服装品牌绿洲，凯伦•米伦，海岸和哨子，经营600家商店，并由零售投资集团博格集团拥有多数股权。

src: Mosaic employs approximately 5,400 staff throughout the UK and Ireland.
ref: 马赛克在英国和爱尔兰拥有约5,400名员工。

src: The exchange was founded in 1985 and has since grown to encompass 34 firms with a combined value of over US$21bn (€16.3bn; GBP11.1bn).
ref: 该交易所成立于1985年，现已发展到34家公司，总价值超过210亿美元（163亿欧元，111亿英镑）。

src: A red tide continues along South Padre Island and into Mexico, according to officials with the Texas Parks and Wildlife Department.
ref: 德克萨斯公园和野生动物部门的官员表示，赤潮沿着南帕德雷岛继续流入墨西哥。

src: Effects include stinging eyes, respiratory difficulties, and dead marine life.
ref: 影响包括眼睛刺痛，呼吸困难和海生物死亡。

src: Red tide is caused by a higher than normal concentration of Karenia brevis, a naturally-occurring single-celled marine organism.
ref: 赤潮是由高于正常浓度的腰鞭毛藻引起的，腰鞭毛藻是一种天然存在的单细胞海洋生物。

src: Natural factors can intersect to produce ideal conditions, allowing this algae to increase in number dramatically.
ref: 自然因素可以交叉产生理想条件，使藻类数量急剧增加。

src: The algae produces a neurotoxin that can disable nerves in both humans and fish.
ref: 藻类产生神经毒素，可以使人类和鱼类的神经致病。

src: Fish often die because of the high concentrations of the toxin in the waters.
ref: 由于水中的毒素浓度很高，鱼经常会死亡。

src: Humans can be affected by breathing affected water taken into the air by wind and waves.
ref: 水和波浪通过风的作用而带到空气中，从而使人受到影响。

src: Also, South Padre officials are investigating a paralyzed cat and deceased coyote who may have consumed fish killed by the red tide.
ref: 此外，南帕德雷官员正在调查一只瘫痪的猫和死去的土狼，他们可能吃了被赤潮杀死的鱼。

src: This bloom has lingered almost three weeks, and affects waters parallel to South Padre Island for about 25 miles, and may extend as far as 10 miles along Mexico beaches.
ref: 这种强势的赤潮已经持续了将近三周，影响到与南帕德雷岛平行的水域约25英里，并且可能沿着墨西哥海滩延伸至10英里。

src: Financial analysts say Google is planning an e-wallet service that could eventually compete with eBay's payment service PayPal.
ref: 金融分析师表示，谷歌正在计划一项电子钱包服务，最终可能与易趣的支付服务贝宝竞争。

src: The rumor is a first sign of Google's expected expansion of revenue sources to capitalize on its advertising customer base and search-engine traffic.
ref: 这一传言是谷歌充分利用其广告客户群和搜索引擎流量来预计扩大收入来源的第一个迹象。

src: What form that expansion will take has been a hotly debated subject for the company whose stock valuation momentarily made it the world's biggest media company on June 7, 2005.
ref: 这种扩张将采取何种形式一直是该公司激烈争论的主题，该公司的股票估值暂时使其成为2005年6月7日全球最大的媒体公司。

src: Even Microsoft has been mentioned as a possible future competitor.
ref: 甚至微软也被提到可能成为未来的竞争对手。

src: Ebay's stock valuation dipped more than 2% on the news.
ref: 易趣的股价估值下跌超过2％。

src: But one business analyst saw potential benefit for Paypal , depending on exactly how the "Google Wallet" takes shape.
ref: 但是，一位商业分析师看到了贝宝的潜在好处，这取决于“谷歌钱包”究竟是如何形成的。

src: The uncertainty underlined the lack of substantive information behind the rumor.
ref: 不确定性强调了传言背后缺乏实质性信息。

src: According to the New York Times, the CEO of a major online merchant, who spoke on the condition of anonymity, was approached by Google to take part in this service.
ref: 根据“纽约时报”的报道，一位不愿透露姓名的主要在线商家的首席执行官接洽并参与谷歌此项服务。

src: China looks to launch it's second manned space mission in October, two years after it's first flight, a newspaper reported Friday.
ref: 周五据一家报纸报道，中国计划于10月第二次启动载人航天飞行任务。

src: The government planned to launch a two-man crew into orbit in September or October on a five to six day flight.
ref: 政府计划在9月或10月以5至6天的时间将两名机组人员送入太空轨道。

src: The Shenzhou VI capsule will "preferably be launched in early October," said Sun Weigang the director of the Space Department of the China Aerospace Science and Technology Corp, said in the report in the China Daily newspaper.
ref: 中国航天科技集团航天部主任孙伟刚在“中国日报”的报道中说，神舟六号舱“最好在十月初发射”。

src: Chinese officials say to they plan to land an unmanned probe on the moon by 2010 and operate a space station.
ref: 中国官员表示，他们计划到2010年在月球上登陆无人探测器，并运营一个空间站。

src: Iraqi Brigadier General Qassim Atta al-Mussawi reported that Operation Law and Order (Arabic: Fardh Al-Qanoon) has been successful in curbing violence in the capital.
ref: 伊拉克准将卡西姆·阿塔·穆萨维报告说，“行动法和秩序”（阿拉伯语：法德赫·阿尔-卡农）成功地遏制了首都的暴力事件。

src: Coalition forces have swept through various Baghdad neighborhoods in the past few months.
ref: 在过去几个月里，联军已经巡逻了巴格达的各个街区。

src: Atta, a spokesperson for the operation cited comparative statistics for the four-week periods of mid-January to mid-February versus mid-February to mid-March: * Civilian killing: 1440 to 265 * Roadside bombings: 163 to 102 * Carbombs: 56 to 36 * Mortar attacks: 204 to 109 * Assassination incidents: 519 to 22 * Kidnappings: 98 to 10
ref: 该行动发言人阿塔引用了1月中旬至2月中旬对2月中旬至3月中旬这四周的比较统计：*平民死亡：1440对265 *路边炸弹爆炸：163对102 * 汽车炸弹：56对36 *迫击炮袭击：204对109 *暗杀事件：519对22 *绑架：98对10。

src: It is not clear what these numbers are based on, and independent estimates of the death toll are much higher.
ref: 目前尚不清楚这些数字是根据什么得来的，并且对死亡人数的独立估计要高得多。

src: According to data compiled by Iraq Body Count (IBC), a volunteer project that maintains a database of civilian deaths in Iraq from media reports, at least 393 people died in and around Baghdad between February 15 and March 11.
ref: 根据伊拉克尸体统计编制的数据，这是一个志愿者项目，从媒体报道中建立一个伊拉克平民死亡数据库，2月15日至3月11日期间，至少有393人在巴格达及其周边地区死亡。

src: The New York Times estimates 450 Iraqi civilian deaths in and around the capital in the period, using initial reports provided by hospitals and the Iraqi Interior ministry.
ref: 据纽约时报报道，利用医院和伊拉克内政部提供的初步报告，估计该时期首都及周边地区有450名伊拉克平民死亡。

src: The Associated Press reports that deaths from bombings have dropped by a third (528 to 370) after the start of the operations.
ref: 据美联社报道，在行动开始后，爆炸造成的死亡人数减少了三分之一（528至370）。

src: It also reports that the number of bodies found in Baghdad, believed to be victims of sectarian death squads, has dropped from more than 200 a week to about 80 a week.
ref: 报告还说，在巴格达发现的被认为是宗派敢死队的受害者的尸体数量已经从每周200多具减少到每周80具左右。

src: At a separate news-conference, US military spokesperson Major General William Caldwell said the security plan is showing signs of progress.
ref: 在另一场新闻发布会上，美国军方发言人威廉·考德威尔少将表示，安全计划显示出了进步的迹象。

src: "The murders and executions have come down by over 50 percent," Caldwell said.
ref: “谋杀和处决已经下降了50％以上，”考德威尔说。

src: All this comes as the United States Congress is debating resolutions on re-deploying troops from Iraq.
ref: 所有这一切都发生在美国国会正在就重新部署伊拉克部队的决议进行辩论时。

src: The troop surge has also been in recent debate on whether or not it is the right move as of now.
ref: 在最近的争论中，增兵计划最近也引发了关于增兵计划是否正确的争论。

src: Meanwhile the United Kingdom announced that it would start withdrawing soon.
ref: 与此同时，英国宣布将很快撤出。

src: Security in Copenhagen, the capital of Denmark, was tightened after the attacks on London Thursday when 49 people were killed.
ref: 周四伦敦发生袭击事件后，丹麦首都哥本哈根的安全吃紧，49人遇难。

src: Denmark supported the U.S.-led war on Iraq and fears of an attack are rising.
ref: 丹麦支持美国领导的伊拉克战争，并且对袭击的恐惧正在上升。

src: "It's not a question of if we'll be attacked, but when" said security specialist Mikkel Vedby at the University in Copenhagen.
ref: “这不是我们是否会受到攻击的问题，而是什么时候”安全专家迈克尔·韦迪比在哥本哈根大学哥本哈根哥本哈根大学的大学说到。

src: "This is how the world has become in the 21st century."
ref: “这就是21世纪世界的现状。”

src: "There are people out there that want to harm us."
ref: “那里有人想伤害我们。”

src: "They are at war with us and it seems we're in war with them."
ref: “他们与我们交战，似乎我们正与他们交战。”

src: "We might be safe tomorrow or the next ten years."
ref: “明天或未来十年我们可能会安全。”

src: He later added that Denmark needed to get ready to face a major terrorist attack.
ref: 他后来补充说，“丹麦需要准备好面对重大的恐怖袭击。”

src: The group that has claimed responsibility for the attacks on London, the "Secret Organisation Group of Al-Qaeda of Jihad Organisation", issued a statement yesterday where attacks on countries that supported the "crusades" against Iraq and Afghanistan are threatened.
ref: 声称对伦敦袭击事件负责的组织，即圣战组织基地组织的秘密组织集团，昨天发表了一份声明，在声明中，对那些支持“十字军东征”与伊拉克和阿富汗作对的国家发动的袭击是致命的。

src: A suicide car bomber partly demolished an Anti-Terrorist Squad (ATS) building in the Pakistani capital Islamabad.
ref: 一名自杀式汽车炸弹袭击者摧毁了巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡的反恐怖小队的大楼的一部分。

src: The bomb blast rocked I-11 and its neighboring sectors, injuring seventeen people.
ref: 炸弹爆炸震动了I-11及其邻近地区，造成17人受伤。

src: The number of dead is not certain, with numbers ranging from none to eight.
ref: 死亡人数不确定，也许从零到八人不等。

src: "Everybody started running away from where the sound came," said eyewitness Amanat Khan while describing the event.
ref: 目击者阿马纳特·汗在描述这一事件时表示“所有人都开始逃离声音传出的地方。”

src: "I saw black smoke rising and the sound of a building crashing down".
ref: “我看到黑烟升起，听到建筑物坍塌了的声音”。

src: Police quickly closed off the area and declared an emergency in all hospitals.
ref: 警方迅速封锁了该地区，并在所有医院宣布紧急情况。

src: Those injured were taken to the nearby PIMS and Holy Family hospitals.
ref: 受伤的人被带到附近的个人管理信息中心和神圣家庭医院。

src: The suicide bomber had convinced guards he was making a delivery of candy before taking his life and destroying much of the building.
ref: 这名自杀式炸弹袭击者说服了守卫说他在送糖果，然后杀死了他并炸毁了部分建筑。

src: The attack was only six miles from the Pakistani Parliament, where intelligence and military chiefs were briefing lawmakers on the campaign against terrorism.
ref: 这次袭击距离巴基斯坦议会只有6英里，那里的情报和军事领导人正在向立法者阐述反恐运动。

src: Investigators suspect the involvement of a Bajaur-based militant group, Jaish-e-Islami Pakistan (JIP), whose commander was recently injured after an attack on its headquarters.
ref: 调查人员怀疑巴基斯坦一个激进组织巴基斯坦犹太教e-伊斯拉米的参与，其指挥官最近在其总部被袭击后受伤。

src: The suicide bomber had entered the office and placed a bag of 'sweets' on a desk, with a note threatening continued attacks if Pakistan continued to aid the US.
ref: 这名自杀式炸弹袭击者已经进入办公室并在桌子上放了一袋“糖果”，和一张有威胁留言的字条，如果巴基斯坦继续向美国提供援助，就会继续遭到袭击。

src: Prime Minister Syed Yousuf Raza Gilani and President Asif Ali Zardari both strongly condemned the suicide attack.
ref: 总理赛德·优素福·拉扎·吉拉尼和总统阿西夫·阿里·扎尔达里都强烈谴责自杀式袭击事件。

src: Almost exactly one year ago, on March 7, Garuda Indonesia Flight 200 crashed during landing at Adisucipto International Airport, near Yogyakarta, after a scheduled domestic Indonesian passenger flight.
ref: 几乎就在一年前，即3月7日，原定于印度尼西亚国内的客运航班印尼鹰航航空公司200航班在日惹附近的日惹国际机场降落后坠毁。

src: 21 people - 16 Indonesians and five Australians - were killed when the Boeing 737-400 overshot the runway, crossed a road, struck an embankment and burst into flames in a rice paddy.
ref: 当波音737-400超越跑道，越过一条道路，撞到路堤并在稻田中燃烧时，21人-16名印度尼西亚人和5名澳大利亚人遇害。

src: Overall, the plane had traveled 252m beyond the extreme end of the runway.
ref: 总体而言，这架飞机已超出跑道的最末端252米。

src: The final report, released in October, blamed pilot error for the disaster.
ref: 10月份发布的最终报告灾难归咎于飞行员错误。

src: The report stated that the aircraft had approached at a speed far exceeding that at which the wing flaps could properly operate, and attempted to execute a landing at 408 kph (254 mph), which is 160 kph (100 mph) above the safe speed.
ref: 报告指出，飞机接近的速度远远超过机翼襟翼能够正常运行的速度，并试图以408公里每小时（254英里每小时）的速度执行着陆，这比安全速度高160公里每小时（100英里每小时）。

src: It also found that captain Marwoto Komar had ignored fifteen activations of the Ground Proximity Warning System (GPWS) informing Mr Komar that the aircraft was flying at a speed beyond that at which it could safely land, but he failed to abort.
ref: 它还发现船长马沃托·科马尔忽略了15次地面接近警告系统的激活，通知科尔马先生飞机的飞行速度超过了它可以安全降落的速度，但他没有终止。

src: It also commented that he missed one further opportunity for emergency evasive action when the airliner struck the runway and bounced into the air, at which point co-pilot Gagam Rochmana requested a 'go-around' procedure be initiated, but was also ignored.
ref: 评论还说，当飞机撞上跑道并反弹到空中时，他错过了一次紧急避让行动的机会，此时副驾驶加加姆·罗奇马纳要求启动“复飞”程序，但也被忽略了。

src: It further criticised Mr Komar for singing during final approach, a direct violation of the Garuda Basic Operations Manual, which calls for activation of the Sterile Cockpit Rule at 10,000 feet and below.
ref: 还进一步批评科马尔先生在最后降落时在唱歌，直接违反了哥鲁达基本操作手册规则，该手册要求在10,000英尺及以下激活无菌驾驶舱规则。

src: Mr Rochmana was also criticised for his failure to take control away from Mr Komar when it became apparent that the aircraft was being operated in an unsafe manner.
ref: 罗奇马纳先生也被批评是因为当飞机显然以不安全的方式操作时，他未能从科马尔先生手中夺走控制权。

src: However, the report did note that Garuda Indonesia had failed to give him any simulator training replicating a situation whereby the co-pilot would take over control duties from the pilot in charge due to unsafe handling of the plane.
ref: 然而，该报告确实指出，印尼鹰航没有给他任何模拟器培训，即由于对飞机的不安全处理时，此种情况下，副驾驶将接管负责飞行员的控制任务。

src: in fact, training was found to be inadequate for both members of the cockpit crew.
ref: 事实上，发现训练对于驾驶舱人员都不充足。

src: Further criticisms were also leveled at airport and governmental authorities for failures in their respective roles to provide safety features and to enforce regulations.
ref: 对机场和政府当局也提出了进一步的批评，指出它们各自在提供安全功能和执行法规方面的失败。

src: However, the Indonesian authorities have recently generated intense controversy by deciding to prosecute Mr Komar for his role in the disaster.
ref: 然而，印度尼西亚当局最近因决定起诉科尔马先生在灾难中的作用而产生了激烈的争议。

src: The move has been pushed for by some, but met with opposition by others.
ref: 一些人推动了此举措，但遭到其他人的反对。

src: Alexander Downer, Australian foreign minister at the time of the crash, immediately said "...I am very glad that they have reached a point now where they have charged the captain of the aircraft."
ref: 坠机事件发生时，澳大利亚外交部长亚历山大·唐纳立即表示“……我很高兴他们现在已经达成共识要指控机长。”

src: The unusually high number of Australians amongst the 140 passengers on board was attributable to a visit by Mr Downer.
ref: 在飞机上的140名乘客中，异常多的澳大利亚人是归因于唐纳先生的访问。

src: One of those was Morgan Mellish of the Australian Financial Review, who died in the crash.
ref: 其中一个是澳大利亚金融评论的摩根·梅里什，他在飞机失事中丧生。

src: His sister, Caroline Mellish, had specifically called for prosecution to be avoided, saying "I think having 21 deaths on your conscience is probably enough."
ref: 他的妹妹卡罗琳·梅里什特别呼吁避免起诉，并说“我认为你的良心里有21人死亡了就可能已经足够了。”

src: "I don't think prosecuting the man is going to make any difference."
ref: “我认为起诉这名男子不会有任何作用。”

src: There were fierce calls for prosecution of both pilots immediately after the report's release, with Downer himself pressuring the Indonesian authorities, citing the "very credible report" and saying "I've asked our ambassador today (October 24) to make it absolutely clear to the Indonesians that we want people prosecuted for this accident."
ref: 在报告发布后，立即强烈要求对这两名飞行员进行起诉，唐纳本人向印度尼西亚当局施加压力，引用了“非常可靠的报告”并说“我今天（10月24日）已经要求我们的大使明确告知印度尼西亚人，我们希望对造成这次事故的人进行起诉。”

src: "I want to see people who have negligently allowed Australians … to be killed."
ref: “我想见见那些因为疏忽让澳大利亚人被杀的人。”

src: Australian Opposition Leader Kevin Rudd also made clear a desire for prosecutions, saying he had telephoned secretary-general of Indonesia's foreign affairs department and former ambassador to Australia Imron Cotan, telling him that he wanted those responsible "prosecuted to the absolute full".
ref: 澳大利亚反对党领袖陆克文也明确要求起诉，称他曾打电话给印度尼西亚外交部秘书长和前任驻澳大利亚大使伊姆龙科坦，告诉他们，他希望那些责任人“满满的控诉”。

src: "This is a serious matter," he said.
ref: “这是一个严重的问题，”他说。

src: National Transport Safety Committee chairman Tatang Kurniadi said at the time that no information from the report could be used in any criminal or civil liability investigations.
ref: 国家运输安全委员会主席塔坦·库尼亚迪当时表示，报告中的任何信息都不能用于任何刑事或民事责任调查。

src: "I would like to go back to the objective of this", he said.
ref: “我想回到这个目标”，他说。

src: "If any institution wants to ... follow up that accident, that's their own decision."
ref: “如果任何机构想……跟进那次事故，那就是他们自己的决定。”

src: "The report contained the results from the cockpit voice recorder and flight data recorder, but according to international regulations on aviation these black boxes are not allowed to be used for... liability purposes."
ref: “该报告载有驾驶舱录音机和飞行数据记录仪的结果，但根据国际航空规定，这些黑匣子不得用于……责任目的。”

src: "We will not give police or any institution (information) other than for safety purposes only."
ref: “除了出于安全目的，我们不会给予警察或任何机构（信息）。”

src: "it's in international regulations and we want to follow those regulations."
ref: “这符合国际法规，我们希望遵守这些法规。”

src: He also confirmed that investigators cannot speak to the police, with the only permitted testimony under the legislation being to testify at a court hearing, and pointed out that the document does not actually appoint any blame.
ref: 他还证实，调查人员不能与警方交谈，根据法律允许的唯一证词是在法庭听证会上作证，并指出该文件实际上没有任何指责。

src: The international legislation he was referring to is probably the Convention on International Civil Aviation, which stipulates that accident reports and related material, specifically transcripts of interviews, communications with crew and cockpit voice recorder and flight data recorder (collectively known as black boxes) readouts, must not be used for any purpose other than determining the cause of an accident or incident.
ref: 他所指的国际立法可能是“国际民用航空公约”，其中规定了事故报告和相关材料，特别是访谈记录，与驾驶员和驾驶舱语音记录器和飞行数据记录器（统称为黑匣子）读数的通信，除了确定事故或事故原因外，不得将其用于任何其他目的。

src: The only possible exception to this is where potential benefit would outweigh the "adverse domestic and international impact" on the investigation in question or any other either in progress or in the future.
ref: 唯一可能的例外是，潜在的利益将超过对有关调查或正在进行或将来的任何其他调查“不利的国内和国际影响”。

src: This legislation is in place to provide protection to witnesses on the basis that without it they may be less likely to cooperate with investigational procedures.
ref: 这项立法是为了向证人提供保护，因为没有证据，他们可能不太可能配合调查程序。

src: Aridono Sukman, the police member in charge of the criminal investigation, said that the contents of the black box were vital evidence.
ref: 负责刑事调查的警察阿里多诺·苏克曼说，黑匣子的内容是至关重要的证据。

src: Officials commented that some relatives had expressed their frustration over the legal challenges involved in the prosecution effort.
ref: 官员评论说，一些亲属对控方起诉所涉及的法律挑战表示沮丧。

src: Early in February Mr Komar was arrested;
ref: 2月初，科马尔先生被捕。

src: he has subsequently been charged with manslaughter charges which carry a maximum sentence of five years' imprisonment.
ref: 他后来被指控犯有过失杀人罪，最高刑罚为五年监禁。

src: The London-based International Federation of Air Line Pilots Associations (IFALPA) issued a press release condemning this move, saying that further investigations are needed into the crash, and that criminal proceedings could prevent an accurate version of events from ever being known.
ref: 总部位于伦敦的国际航线飞行员协会联合会发布了一份新闻稿，谴责这一举动，并表示需要对坠机事件进行进一步调查，并且刑事诉讼程序可能会阻止对事件的准确版本的了解。

src: Specifically, the release said that "IFALPA believes that the circumstances of the accident as set forth in the final report of the Indonesian investigation authority leaves many serious questions concerning the crew actions prior to the accident."
ref: 具体而言，该发布说“国际航线飞行员协会联合会认为，印度尼西亚调查机关最终报告中提到的事故情况在事故发生前留下了许多关于机组人员行为的严重问题。”

src: "Central to these concerns are the underlying reasons for the reported behavior of Captain Marwoto Komar."
ref: “这些问题的关注点的核心是马沃托·科马尔机长在报告中行为的影响因素。”

src: "Experienced pilots have considerable difficulty in attempting to explain what is reported in the context of normal airline operations."
ref: “经验丰富的飞行员在试图解释航空公司正常运营情况下所报告的内容方面存在相当大的困难。”

src: "The Federation believes that the explanations proffered by the report do not square with the collective experience of our members."
ref: “联合会认为报告提供的解释与我们成员的共同经验不符。”

src: The release went on to state the opinion that prosecution may bring total foreclosure to the case and could only be counterproductive.
ref: 这份文件还指出，起诉可能会导致整个案件的止赎权全部丧失，而且可能不会起到任何作用。

src: It also said "He remains a professional who was involved in an unfortunate tragedy."
ref: 它还说“他仍然是一个被卷入不幸悲剧的专业人士。”

src: One possible explanation had previously been suggested by the head of the Garuda pilots association, Stephanus Geraldus.
ref: 印尼鹰航航空飞行员协会负责人斯蒂芬纳斯·杰拉尔德先前提出了一个可能的解释。

src: He said that marital problems between Mr Komar and his wife Norma Andriani were "common knowledge" and was backed up by an industry analyst and pilot who said he believed the couple had been arguing late into the night, and expressed concern that the report had not addressed psychological issues.
ref: 他说，科尔马先生和他的妻子诺尔玛·阿德里亚诺之间的婚姻问题是“常识”，并得到了一位行业分析师和飞行员的支持，他说他相信这对夫妇一直在争论到深夜，并表示关心报告没有解决心理问题。

src: Mr Geraldus also said sleep deprivation could have contributed, with the flight crew reporting for duty at 4:30 am and the flight departing an hour and a half later.
ref: 杰拉尔德斯先生还说睡觉剥夺可能是原因之一。机组人员于凌晨四时三十分报到值勤，航班在一个半小时后离开。

src: The report had hinted at problems, saying "The pilot was probably emotionally aroused because his conscious awareness moved from the relaxed mode "singing"to the heightened stressfulness of the desire to reach the runway by making an excessively steep and fast, unstabilised approach,"
ref: 该报告暗示了问题，并称“领航员很可能是情绪激动，因为他的意识从放松的‘唱歌’模式转移到了高度紧张的状态，他想通过不稳定的，快速而陡峭的飞行方式到达跑道。”

src: It is also known that Mr Komar had been under police surveillance, during which time he was receiving psychological treatment.
ref: 众所周知，科马尔先生一直受到警方的监视，在此期间他接受了心理治疗。

src: The Indonesian Pilot's Association has also said that the criminal prosecution should be avoided, arguing that the only people who can judge whether mistakes were made in aviation are those professionally involved and not the police.
ref: 印度尼西亚飞行员协会也表示应该避免刑事诉讼，认为只有那些能够判断是否在航空方面犯过错误的人才是专业人士，而不是警察。

src: There were protests in Jakarta demanding his release and dozens of pilots across the nation also campaigned.
ref: 雅加达有要求释放飞行员的抗议活动，全国数十名飞行员也参加了抗议活动。

src: Meanwhile, two survivors, Adrianus Meliala and Retno Gunowati, went to the House of Representatives (DPR) to challenge those opposed to legal processes against the pilot.
ref: 与此同时，两名幸存者阿德里亚诺·梅丽拉和吉诺·瓦提前往众议院挑战那些反对针对飞行员的法律程序的人。

src: Mr Komar was released on police bail on February 15, and is currently awaiting trial.
ref: 科马尔先生于2月15日获得警方保释，目前正在等待审判。

src: He was forced to resign late in February with being fired his only alternative, and his licence has been suspended.
ref: 他被迫在2月末辞职，被解雇是唯一的替代方案，并且他的执照被暂停。

src: He is believed to be the only man ever prosecuted in Indonesian history over an airliner crash.
ref: 他被认为是印度尼西亚历史上唯一一个因飞机失事而被起诉的人。

src: Eva Avila, 19, of Gatineau, Quebec was crowned this years winner of Canadian Idol.
ref: 19岁的魁北克加蒂诺的伊娃·阿维拉被加冕为加拿大偶像冠军。

src: Craig Sharpe, 16, of Upper Island Cove, Newfoundland and Labrador was the runner up.
ref: 来自上岛湾，纽芬兰和拉布拉多的16岁的克雷格·夏普是亚军。

src: The show was aired in the Air Canada Centre in Toronto and lasted two hours.
ref: 该节目在多伦多加拿大航空中心持续播出了两个小时。

src: Former Canadian Idol winner Melissa O'Neil sang her new hit single Speechless.
ref: 前加拿大偶像冠军梅丽莎·奥尼尔演唱了她的新单曲“懦弱”。

src: O'Neil was presented with a multi-platinum record for her single Alive by Craig Sharpe earlier in the show.
ref: 奥尼尔在演出前期为她的单曲《为克雷格·夏普而活》颁发了多白金唱片。

src: Eva Avila also gave her a muti-platinum record for her self-titled album Melissa O'Neil.
ref: 伊娃·阿维拉还为她的同名专辑《梅丽莎·奥尼尔》颁发了多项白金唱片。

src: Nelly Furtado sang her new hit single Maneater from her new album Loose.
ref: 妮莉·费塔朵在她的新专辑《失去》中演唱了她的新单曲《食人者》。

src: The African Children's Choir also sang on stage with this years Top 10.
ref: 今年非洲儿童合唱团也在舞台上演唱了今年的前10热门歌曲。

src: Newfoundland and Labrador Premier Danny Williams and St. John's MP Loyola Hearn were in the audience to lend their support for Craig.
ref: 纽芬兰和拉布拉多总理丹尼·威廉姆斯和圣·约翰的国会议员洛约拉·赫恩都在观众席上为克雷格支持加油。

src: Avila won by approximately 131,000 votes, a margin of just over three per cent of the four million votes cast in the final.
ref: 阿维拉赢得了大约131,000张选票，在决赛中投票的400万张选票中仅略高于3％。

src: "I'm just one tiny person on this planet but thanks to you guys, I'm feeling like I'm sitting on top of the world," Avila said Sunday.
ref: 阿维拉在星期天说，“我只是这个星球上的一个小人物，但多亏你们，我觉得我坐在世界之巅。”

src: Avila sang what will be the first single of her upcoming album: Meant to Fly, co-written by Chantal Kreviazuk and her husband Raine Maida.
ref: 阿维拉演唱了她即将发行的专辑“想要飞”的第一首单曲，由香岱儿·克雷威亚朱科和她的丈夫雷恩·梅达共同创作。

src: Sony BMG Music Canada is the record label that will be releasing her single on September 26.
ref: 索尼BMG加拿大音乐是将于9月26日发行单曲的唱片公司。

src: Her new recording was on the radio airwaves at 12 am. today.
ref: 她的新录音是在今天12点的无线电广播中播出的。

src: "The fact that all Canada is voting and the votes were so close …"
ref: “事实上，所有加拿大人都在投票，投票如此接近……”。

src: "I mean, I'm sad that I lost, but we are different and she's just amazing," Craig Sharpe said.
ref: “我的意思是，我很伤心，我输了，但我们是不同的，她只是令人吃惊的，”克雷格·夏普说。

src: Canadian Idol host Ben Mulroney announced Sunday that Cyndi Lauper has agreed to produce one track for Avila's future album.
ref: 加拿大偶像主持人本·穆罗尼周日宣布，辛蒂·罗波已同意为阿维拉未来专辑制作一首曲目。

src: Country singer Martina McBride has invited Avila to join her on her Canadian tour in summer 2007.
ref: 乡村歌手玛蒂娜·麦克布赖德邀请阿维拉在2007年夏天加入她的加拿大之旅。

src: A ban on smoking in enclosed public places in England is in effect as of 0600 BST today, bringing the country into line with similar laws already introduced in other parts of the United Kingdom.
ref: 英国封闭式公共场所禁止吸烟的法令自英国夏令时间0600起生效，使该国符合英国其他地区已经引入的类似法律。

src: The aims of the ban are to reduce the risks associated with passive smoking and to reduce the number of smokers overall.
ref: 该禁令的目的是降低与被动吸烟相关的风险，并减少整体吸烟者的数量。

src: The government estimates that 600,000 of the 10 million smokers in Britain will give up as a result.
ref: 政府估计，英国1000万吸烟者中有60万人会因此而放弃。

src: Health Secretary Alan Johnson welcomes the ban, saying that "A smoke-free country will improve the health of thousands of people, reduce the temptation to smoke, and encourage smokers to quit."
ref: 卫生部长艾伦·约翰逊对这项禁令表示欢迎，称“无烟国家将改善成千上万人的健康，减少吸烟的诱惑，并鼓励吸烟者戒烟。”

src: The ban is not being welcomed by all citizens, however.
ref: 但是，禁令并未受到所有公民的欢迎。

src: Activist group Freedom To Choose is challenging the law at the High Court saying it is in violation of the European Convention on Human Rights.
ref: 激进组织“自由选择”组织正在挑战高等法院的法律，称其违反了“欧洲人权公约”。

src: The business community is expressing concerns about the impact on pubs and similar establishments.
ref: 商界对于对酒吧和类似场所的影响表示担忧。

src: Research by Nielsen estimates that the sale of beer in England and Wales could fall by 200 million pints yearly.
ref: 尼尔森的研究估计，英格兰和威尔士的啤酒销售量每年可减少2亿品脱。

src: However, a survey by the Campaign for Real Ale suggests 840,000 people who do not regularly go to the pub would do so following the introduction of the ban and that England's 6.2 million regular drinkers would be more likely to visit pubs and bars.
ref: 然而，真实啤酒运动组织的一项调查表明，在实施禁令后，84万人不经常去酒馆的人会去酒馆，而且英国的620万常规饮酒者更有可能去酒馆和酒吧。

src: Smoking kills 100,000 people in Britain each year through cancer, lung conditions, and heart problems.
ref: 吸烟导致英国每年10万人因癌症，肺部疾病和心脏病而死亡。

src: Approximately 1,000 people a day in England are admitted to hospital with an illness related to smoking, costing the National Health Service an estimated £1.5 billion.
ref: 在英格兰，每天大约有1000人因吸烟而入院治疗，用在国民健康服务中心的费用估计为15亿英镑。

src: Poland came from behind with two set-piece goals to beat Costa Rica in Group A, Tuesday.
ref: 周二，波兰队在A组以两个定位进攻射门击败哥斯达黎加队，扭转劣势。

src: The result of the match gave Poland three points but they did not qualify for the next round of the Fifa World Cup as Ecuador had six and Germany nine.
ref: 这场比赛的结果给了波兰三分，但他们没有资格参加下一轮国际足联世界杯，因为厄瓜多尔有六分，德国有九分。

src: Costa Rica left the 2006 World Cup without a victory in three games.
ref: 哥斯达黎加在三场比赛中没有一场取得胜利而离开2006年世界杯。

src: Though the pace of the game was rather slow in the heat the outcome did seem to matter to the two teams who both wanted a World Cup win.
ref: 虽然比赛节奏相当缓慢但结果似乎对两队都很重要，他们都希望赢得世界杯。

src: During a Palestinian rally in Qalqilyah in the West Bank against Israeli attacks on Gaza, Mufid Saleh Walweel, 22, was shot and killed Sunday by Israeli forces, according to Palestinian medical officials.
ref: 据巴勒斯坦医务官员称，在西岸盖勒吉利耶巴勒斯坦人集会反对以色列袭击加沙期间，22岁的Mufid Saleh Walweel星期天遭以色列军队开枪打死。

src: Meanwhile protests around the world took place in response to Israel's latest attacks and ground assault on Gaza.
ref: 与此同时，世界各地发生了抗议活动，以回应以色列最近的袭击和对加沙的地面袭击。

src: On Friday in Chicago, 4,000 people marched from Tribune Plaza to the Israeli Consulate demanding an end to the occupation of Palestine, and to the raids on Gaza.
ref: 星期五在芝加哥，有4,000人从论坛报广场游行到以色列领事馆，要求结束对巴勒斯坦的占领以及对加沙的袭击。

src: Another 40,000 people gathered in Morocco to protest what they saw as the complicity of the Arab regimes in the attack.
ref: 另有40,000人聚集在摩洛哥，抗议他们所看到的阿拉伯政权在袭击事件中的共谋。

src: On Saturday, thousands of protesters in Indonesia asked the Indonesian government to send troops to Gaza to fight against the Israelis who they called a "terrorist" force.
ref: 星期六，印度尼西亚数千名抗议者要求印度尼西亚政府派兵到加沙与他们称之为“恐怖分子”的以色列人作战。

src: On the same day in Toronto, Canada, 1,000 people gathered in the business district to protest Israeli actions.
ref: 同一天，在加拿大多伦多，有1000人聚集在商业区，抗议以色列的行动。

src: In addition 10,000 people marched past United Kingdom Prime Minister Gordon Brown's residence in London, hurling hundreds of shoes at his home.
ref: 此外，还有一万人游过英国首相戈登布朗在伦敦的住所，向他家中投掷了数百双鞋子。

src: Louis Michel, the European Union's humanitarian aid commissioner said in a statement on Sunday that "blocking access to people who are suffering and dying is also a breach of humanitarian law."
ref: 欧盟人道主义援助专员路易斯·米歇尔周日在一份声明中表示，“阻止遭受痛苦和死亡的人也是违反人道法的行为。”

src: The statement promised 3 million euros of emergency EU aid to the people of Gaza.
ref: 该声明承诺向加沙人民提供300万欧元的紧急欧盟援助。

src: Al Jazeera says that 507 Palestinians have been killed and 2,700 wounded since Israeli bombardments on the Gaza Strip began in late December.
ref: 半岛电视台说，自12月底以色列对加沙地带的轰炸开始以来，已有507名巴勒斯坦人被杀，2700人受伤。

src: Four Israelis were killed in that same time by Hamas rockets fired out of Gaza.
ref: 在同一时间，哈马斯从加沙发射的火箭弹炸死了四名以色列人。

src: Two Long Island, New York teenagers, aged 15 and 17, have been charged for their alleged involvement in a suspected plot to attack their school next April, on the ninth anniversary of the Columbine High School shooting massacre.
ref: 纽约长岛两名15岁和17岁的青少年被控涉嫌参与明年4月哥伦比亚高中枪击案9周年之际袭击他们学校的阴谋。

src: The plot was uncovered when the 15-year-old suspect lost his journal at the McDonalds restaurant where he worked.
ref: 当这名15岁的嫌疑人在他工作的麦当劳餐厅丢失他的日志时，计划被揭穿。

src: The journal was found by a fellow classmate of the teenagers' school, who quickly turned it over to school officials.
ref: 该日志是由该少年同一学校的一位同学发现的，他很快将其转交给学校官员。

src: The journal is alleged to have outlined the teenagers' plan to attack the school with guns and home-made bombs.
ref: 据称该日志概述了青少年用枪支和自制炸弹袭击学校的计划。

src: The 15-year-old suspect's home and computers were searched and evidence was collected, which revealed that he allegedly tried to purchase black powder explosives and machine guns over the Internet.
ref: 这名15岁的嫌疑人的房屋和电脑被搜查，并收集了证据，据称他曾试图通过互联网购买黑色粉末爆炸物和机枪。

src: A video was also found in which the same teenager allegedly names some students and staff he would like to attack at the school.
ref: 还发现了一个视频，其中据称同一名少年列出了他想在学校攻击的学生和工作人员。

src: The 17-year-old was allegedly planning to aid in the attack on the school.
ref: 据称，那名17岁的男子计划援助袭击学校。

src: The two teens were arrested and held in Long Island jail on misdemeanor conspiracy, which is punishable by up to one year in prison.
ref: 这两名青少年因涉嫌轻罪阴谋而被长期监狱关押在长岛监狱，最高可判处一年徒刑。

src: The 15-year-old will appear in juvenile court on Friday and the 17-year-old suspect is expected to plead not guilty at a hearing.
ref: 这名15岁的男子将于周五出现在少年法庭，而这名17岁的嫌犯将在听证会上辩护无罪。

src: Industry Canada announced today that the government, through the Privy Council Office, has effectively overturned a decision by the Canadian Radio-Television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) regarding the status of Globalive Wireless Management Corporation, which was set to launch in November under the WIND Mobile brand.
ref: 加拿大工业部今天宣布，政府通过枢密院办公室有效推翻了“加拿大广播电视和电信委员会”（CRTC）关于全球化无线管理公司定位的决定，而该公司已预定于11月以万德移动品牌展开事业。

src: In a release issued this morning, Tony Clement, Minister of Industry is quoted as saying "Globalive is a Canadian company, and meets Canadian ownership and control requirements under the Telecommunications Act," differing with the CRTC's decision, where they ruled that control-in-fact of Globalive was with Cairo-based Orascom Telecom Holding S.A.E., the corporation holding much of Globalive's equity and debt.
ref: 在今天上午发布的一份新闻稿中，工业部长托尼·克莱门兹称，“全球化无线管理公司是一家加拿大公司，符合电信法案规定的加拿大所有权和控制要求，”该声明与CRTC的决定不同，CRTC裁决全球化无线管理公司的实际控制权与总部位于开罗的奥拉斯科姆电信有限公司有关，该公司持有全球化无线管理公司的大部分股权和债务。

src: A decision had been rendered under Canadian Ownership and Control regulations by Industry Canada at the time of the Advanced Wireless Spectrum (AWS) auction held in 2007-2008, at which time they had ruled that Globalive did meet the tests of ownership and control under the same regulation, as referenced by the Order-in-Council included with the government's announcement this morning.
ref: 加拿大工业部在2007-2008年举行的先进无线频谱（AWS）拍卖会期间，根据加拿大的所有权和控制权规定做出了此项决定。当时他们裁定，全球化无线管理公司确实符合同一条规定下的所有权和控制权测试，如同包括政府今晨发布公告在内的枢密院令所指。

src: With the decision by the government, Globalive is now permitted to launch their wireless service, which is expected to occur in the Calgary and Toronto markets in time for the busy holiday shopping season.
ref: 因政府的决定，全球化无线管理公司现在获准推出无线服务，预计将能及时在卡拉里和多伦多的市场推出，以对应繁忙的假日购物季节。

src: "This holiday season we will start to provide Canadians with the competitive choice that they want and deserve," said Anthony Lacavera, Chairman and CEO of Globalive Communications Corporation, in a release sent out today.
ref: 全球化管理通讯公司董事长兼首席执行官安东尼·拉可维拉在今天发布的一份新闻中表示“这个假期我们将开始为加拿大人提供他们想要和应得的竞争选择”。

src: Not everyone was quite as enthusiastic however, with Michael Hennessey, Senior VP of Regulatory and Government Affairs for TELUS Communications quoted as saying "If Wind is Canadian then so was King Tut," in a comment posted to Twitter, according to the CBC.
ref: 然而，不是每个人都非常感兴趣，据英国广播公司报道，泰勒斯电信通讯的监管和政府事务高级副总裁迈克尔·亨尼西在发布的一条评论中称，“如果万德是加拿大人，那么图坦卡国王也是了。”

src: TELUS had led the charge in requesting the CRTC review the ownership structure of Globalive/WIND, and had received support from Shaw Communications, along with new entrant Public Mobile, all of whom were reported to have signed an open letter to Industry Minister Clement published in Parliament Hill newspaper The Hill Times upon the announcement that he would be reviewing said decision by the CRTC.
ref: 泰勒斯电信公司曾主导一场控诉，要求CRTC审查全球化无线管理公司万德的所有权结构，并得到了萧氏通讯以及新参入之公共移动公司的支持，据报道，所有公司都签署了一份致工业部长克列芒特的公开信。这封信刊载于国会山报“山丘时报”上，并宣告他将审查上述CRTC的决定。

src: There is no word yet on whether TELUS or other carriers will attempt to appeal the ruling.
ref: 目前还没有关于泰勒斯电信或其他通讯公司是否会试图对该裁决提出上诉的消息。

src: The northern port of Thessaloniki, Greece's second biggest city, will host the Inter-Balkan co-operation Summit, on the 3rd and 4th of May 2006.
ref: 希腊第二大城市塞萨洛尼基北部港口将于2006年5月3日和4日举办巴尔干国家间合作峰会。

src: The countries of southeast Europe who are part of the Inter-Balkan Cooperation; Greece, Turkey, Bulgaria, Serbia-Montenegro, Romania, Albania, Croatia, Bosnia and FYROM will be represented by their leaders, Prime ministers and Ministers of foreign affairs.
ref: 参与巴尔干国家间合作的东南欧国家，希腊、土耳其、保加利亚、塞尔维亚黑山、罗马尼亚、阿尔巴尼亚、克罗地亚、波斯尼亚和费罗的领导人、总理和外交部长将出席会议。

src: The Inter-Balkan Cooperation Summit will focus on all the developments, both economic and political, in the area of southeast Europe, with the main topic being the situation in Kosovo.
ref: 巴尔干国家间合作峰会将聚焦于东南欧地区的所有经济和政治发展，其主要议题则是科索沃局势。

src: On the sidelines of the Inter-Balkan Cooperation Summit, which will take place at the Hyatt Regency Hotel of Thessaloniki, Greek Premier Kostas Caramanlis will meet with his Turkish counterpart Recep Tayyip Erdogan on Thursday in order to discuss bilateral issues, including the Cyprus problem.
ref: 这次峰会将在塞萨洛尼基的凯悦酒店举行。在合作峰会期间，希腊总理科斯塔·斯卡拉曼利斯将于周四会见土耳其总理雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安，讨论包括塞浦路斯问题在内的双边议题。

src: For the safety of the leaders as well as for the convenience of city's traffic during possible demonstrations, a security plan has been prepared according to local police.
ref: 为了保证领导人的安全以及在可能发生示威行动时确保城市交通方便，已根据当地警方制定了安全计划。

src: Three years ago, Thessaloniki was the host city of the 2003 European Union Summit.
ref: 三年前，塞萨洛尼基是2003年欧盟峰会的主办城市。

src: Corus, the fifth largest steelmaker in the world, is set to cut 2000 jobs in both the United Kingdom and The Netherlands.
ref: 康力斯集团是世界第五大钢铁制造商，将在英国和荷兰裁掉2000个工作岗位。

src: 123 jobs are reported to be going in the Netherlands with the remainder from the United Kingdom.
ref: 据报道，荷兰将裁掉123个工作岗位，其余则裁自英国。

src: Corus have blamed the move on the "further deterioration" of the demand for steel in both the United States and Europe.
ref: 康力斯集团将此举归咎于美国和欧洲对钢铁需求的“进一步恶化”。

src: Corus Chief Executive Kirby Adams stated, "Any recovery in Europe appears to be some time off".
ref: 康力斯集团首席执行官柯比·亚当斯表示，“欧洲任何复苏似乎都需要一段时间”。

src: He added that Corus have to achieve "long-term sustainable competitiveness in a global and over-supplied steel market".
ref: 他补充说，康力斯集团必须在全球和供应过剩的钢铁市场实现“长期稳定的竞争力”。

src: In January of this year Corus cut approximately 3,500 staff worldwide; 2,500 of them in Britain.
ref: 今年1月，康力斯集团在全球裁员约3,500人，其中2,500人在英国。

src: Peter Hogg, a commercial director at Corus, reported that the company was surprised at the extent of the global recession.
ref: 康力斯集团的商业总监彼得·霍格报告说，“该公司对全球经济衰退的程度感到惊讶。”

src: He added that it is clear a full recovery is years away.
ref: 他补充说，“很明显，完全恢复还需要几年的时间。”

src: Scunthorpe will lose 500 members of staff, with 379 going at Stocksbridge and 377 at Rotherham.
ref: 斯肯索普将失去500名员工，其中379人在斯托克斯桥，377人在罗瑟勒姆。

src: Corus will also reduce operations at Hartlepool, Skinningrove and their Teesside Beam Mill, in Cleveland, where an additional 2,000 already face redundancy.
ref: 康力斯集团还将减少位于克利夫兰的哈特尔普尔、斯尼格罗夫及其提兹塞德大学梁厂的运营，此外还有2,000人已经面临裁员。

src: A total of 11 plants in the United Kingdom are affected.
ref: 英国共有11家工厂受到影响。

src: Elliot Morley, Labour Member of Parliament for Scunthorpe, told the BBC that he was disappointed with the job cuts and said he had previously told Corus that they should be a last resort.
ref: 斯肯索普议会工党议员埃利奥特·莫莉告诉英国广播电视台，他对裁员感到失望，并说他之前告诉康力斯集团那应该是最后的选择。

src: He added that this was a "sad day" for Scunthorpe.
ref: 他补充说，对于斯肯索普来说，这是一个“悲伤的一天”。

src: The Community union general secretary Michael Leahy said that it was "devastating news" and spoke of his concerns for the integrity of the British steel industry.
ref: 社区工会总书记迈克尔·莱希说，这是“毁灭性的新闻”，并谈到了他对英国钢铁业诚信的担忧。

src: The company was bought in 1999 by Tata Steel, part of India's Tata Group.
ref: 该公司于1999年被印度塔塔集团旗下的塔塔钢铁公司收购。

src: Faithless, an electronica band from the United Kingdom, have made the announcement that they are to separate at the end of their current tour.
ref: 来自英国的电子乐队“无信念”宣布，他们将在目前的巡演结束后解散。

src: Their current tour is expected to conclude at the O2 Academy, Brixton on April 8, 2011.
ref: 他们目前的巡回演出预计将于2011年4月8日在布里克斯顿的O2学院结束。

src: It consisted of three members, known as Maxi Jazz, Sister Bliss and Rollo Armstrong.
ref: 该乐队由三名成员组成，分别名为马克西·爵士、西斯特·布利斯和若罗·阿姆斯特朗。

src: Insomnia, God Is a DJ and We Come 1 are amongst the most famous muscial works that have been released from Faithless.
ref: “失眠”、“上帝是DJ”和“我们来做第一”是无信念乐队发行的最着名的音乐作品。

src: Wikinews held an exclusive interview with James Burns, one of the candidates for the Libertarian Party nomination for the 2008 U.S. presidential election.
ref: 詹姆斯·伯恩斯是争取2008年美国总统大选自由党提名的候选人之一，维基新闻对詹姆斯·伯恩斯进行了专访。

src: Burns, the former chairman of the Nevada Libertarian Party, was asked if he thinks he has a good shot at winning the Libertarian nomination and ultimately the presidency.
ref: 前内华达州自由党主席伯恩斯被问到，他是否认为自己有很好的机会赢得自由党的提名，并最终成为总统。

src: He replied, "My chances of winning are not all in my hands."
ref: 他回答说：“我获胜的机会并不全在我手中。”

src: "I shall do my best, but it comes down to what others will do."
ref: “我将尽我所能，但这取决于别人会做什么。”

src: When asked about America's shrinking middle class he said, "The economic policies of the US government are the cause our troubles."
ref: 当被问及美国萎缩的中产阶级时，他说：“美国政府的经济政策是造成我们麻烦的原因。”

src: "When I am President, the only economic policy I shall pursue is to be frugal with the funds of the United States."
ref: “当我担任总统时，我唯一要追求的经济政策就是要节省美国的资金。”

src: Burns believes that the President "is not 'the leader of the free world,' rather....a person who attempts to protect our rights to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness."
ref: 伯恩斯认为，总统“不是‘自由世界的领导者’，而是……一个试图保护我们的生命权、自由权和追求幸福权的人。”

src: Fifty people are feared to have drowned after a boat capsized in the Bagmati, an Indian river, on Tuesday, according to the government.
ref: 根据政府的说法，周二在印度巴加马人河上翻船后，恐怕已有50人被淹死。

src: 75 people, mainly women and children, were aboard the vessel when it flipped over during a storm.
ref: 当该船在暴风雨期间翻覆时，船上载有75人，主要是妇女和儿童。

src: They had been returning from a fair that marked the end of the Durga Puja, an annual Hindu festival that celebrates the worship of the Hindu goddess Durga.
ref: 他们正从一个标志着杜尔迦供结束的集市返回，这是一年一度的印度教节日，庆祝对印度教女神杜尔加的崇拜。

src: Fifteen people were able to swim to safety, but it is unlikely the other passengers of the boat were able to survive, according to a report.
ref: 据一份报告称，有15人得以游至安全地，但船上的其他乘客似乎很难存活。

src: An official from the district where the accident occurred said that "we have recovered 11 bodies so far and search is on for 40 other missing people."
ref: 事故发生地区的一名官员表示，“到目前为止，我们已经收回了11具尸体，并正在持续搜索其他40名失踪人员。”

src: A search operation was launched by the Indian National Disaster Response Force, but efforts were hampered by nightfall.
ref: 印度国家灾害响应部队发起了一次搜索行动，但因夜幕降临而使努力受到了阻碍。

src: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has hiked the repo rate by 0.25 percent to 7.25 percent, keeping the reverse repo rate unchanged at 6%.
ref: 印度储备银行（RBI）将回购利率上调0.25％至7.25％，将反向回购利率维持在6％不变。

src: The Bank rate and the cash reserve ratio are left unchanged at 6% and 5% respectively.
ref: 银行利率和现金准备金率分别维持在6％和5％不变。

src: In its mid-year review of monetary and regulatory policy, the Reserve Bank has forecast an annual GDP growth of 8.0%, as against the 7.5-8.0% forecast earlier in its annual policy statement and first quarter review.
ref: 在对货币和监管政策的年中回顾中，储备银行预测年度GDP增长率为8.0％，而其年度政策声明和第一季度审核中的预测为7.5-8.0％。

src: The Reserve Bank indicated that inflation will be contained between 5.0-5.5%, during the year 2006-07.
ref: 储备银行表示，在2006-2007年度，通胀率将控制在5.0-5.5％之间。

src: The Reserve Bank estimated real GDP growth in the first quarter of 2006-07 at 8.9%, up from 8.5% last year.
ref: 储备银行估计2006-2007年第一季度的实际GDP增长率为8.9％，高于去年的8.5％。

src: An annual survey done by the New Zealand Consumers' Institute has shown that there has been a dramatic decline in satisfaction with the respondents' Internet service providers (ISP).
ref: 新西兰消费者协会进行的年度调查显示，受访者对互联网服务提供商（ISP）的满意度大幅下降。

src: Of the over 10,000 Internet users who participated in the survey, only 66% said they were either satisfied or very satisfied with their current ISP.
ref: 在参与调查的10,000多名互联网用户中，只有66％表示他们对目前的互联网服务提供商感到满意或非常满意。

src: This is compared to the 2005 survey which was at 82%.
ref: 这被拿来与2005年的调查结果相比，2005年的调查结果为82％。

src: The reason, according to the Consumers' Institute, is because of national ISP, Xtra dragging down the ratings.
ref: 根据消费者协会的消息，原因在于国家互联网服务提供商，Xtra拖慢了额定值。

src: Only 55% of Xtra's customers said they were satisfied or very satisfied with Xtra, it was 78% last year.
ref: 只有55％的Xtra客户表示他们对插件感到满意或非常满意，去年这一比例为78％。

src: Nick Brown, spokesman, said: "Xtra will be working to improve its ranking."
ref: 发言人尼克布朗说：“Xtra将努力提高其等级”。

src: The best ISP, as voted by the survey respondents, was Inspire, the third consecutive time they have won.
ref: 调查受访者投票选出的最佳互联网服务供应商是灵感，这是他们连续第三次获胜。

src: 97% of Inspire's users said that its performance was either good or very good.
ref: 97％的灵感用户表示其表现不错或非常好。

src: David Russel, chief executive of the Consumers' Institute, said: "The wonderful world of cyberspace has a long way to go in New Zealand in terms of providing customer satisfaction."
ref: 消费者协会首席执行官大卫•拉塞尔表示：“在提供客户满意度方面，新西兰网络空间的美好世界还有很长的路要走”。

src: Providers must sharpen up on their advertising and improve the performance of their service desks.
ref: 提供商必须加强广告宣传并提高服务台的性能。

src: "Broadband speed and the price people are paying are the biggest bones of contention."
ref: “宽带速度和人们付出的代价是争论的最大争议点”。

src: Mr. Russell added: "Support, both online and offline is a key factor in satisfaction with your ISP."
ref: 拉塞尔先生补充说：“在线和离线支持是对您的互联网服务供应商是否满意的关键因素”。

src: Speaker of the U.S. House John Boehner announced yesterday that he would agree to a two-month extension of the payroll tax cut.
ref: 美国众议院议长约翰·博纳昨天宣布，他将同意将工资税减免延长两个月。

src: In an effort to end the impasse between the House and Senate, Boehner told Senate Democratic leader Harry Reid that he would schedule a House vote on the Senate version of the bill that would extend the tax cut, which was due to expire at the end of the year.
ref: 为了结束众议院和参议院之间的僵局，博纳告诉参议院民主党领袖哈里·里德，他将安排众议院对参议院版本的法案进行投票，该法案将延长减税期限，减税期限于年底到期。

src: Speaker Boehner announced the agreement in a brief statement: "Senator Reid and I have reached an agreement that will ensure taxes do not increase for working families on January 1".
ref: 发言人博纳在一份简短的声明中宣布了该协议：“参议员里德和我达成了一项协议，将确保1月1日工薪家庭的税收不增加”。

src: Boehner informed other congressmen of the deal in a conference call yesterday evening.
ref: 昨天晚上，博纳在电话会议上向其他国会议员通报了这个协议。

src: The House may pass the bill via unanimous consent today, which would not require the presence of all members.
ref: 众议院今天可以一致同意并通过该法案，这不需要所有成员在场。

src: Boehner and Reid also agreed to a bipartisan negotiation committee to sort out differences and extend the tax cut for an entire year, a goal recently sought by Republicans in the House.
ref: 博纳和霍夫曼还同意一个两党谈判委员会来解决分歧，并将减税延长一年，这是共和党人最近在众议院寻求的目标。

src: The extension of the payroll tax cut, which would prevent approximately 160 million Americans from seeing a tax increase in 2012, had already been passed by the Senate last weekend.
ref: 上周末参议院已经通过了延长的工资税减免政策，这将阻止大约1.6亿美国人在2012年经受加税。

src: Earlier yesterday, Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell joined several other Republican Senators in encouraging the House to pass the extension.
ref: 昨天早些时候，参议院共和党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔与其他几位共和党参议员一起鼓励众议院通过延期。

src: Senate Democratic leader Harry Reid said that once the House acts, he "will be happy to restart the negotiating process to forge a yearlong extension."
ref: 参议院民主党领袖哈里·里德说，一旦众议院采取行动，他“将很乐意重启谈判进程，以便进行为期一年的延期。”

src: At a news conference, Speaker Boehner issued a statement: "We have fought the good fight."
ref: 在新闻发布会上，议长博纳发表声明：“我们已经打了胜仗。”

src: "Why not do the right thing for the American people even though it's not exactly what we want."
ref: “尽管这不是我们想要的，为什么不为美国人做正确的事情呢”。

src: President Obama also responded to the development in a statement: "This is good news, just in time for the holidays."
ref: 奥巴马总统还在一份声明中回应了这一发展：“这是好消息，正好赶上假期。”

src: This is the right thing to do to strengthen our families, grow our economy, and create new jobs.
ref: 这是加强家庭、发展经济和创造新工作的正确方法。

src: "This is real money that will make a real difference in people's lives."
ref: “这是将对人们的生活产生真正的影响的实在的金钱。”

src: The tax cut extension impasse began when the House effectively rejected the Senate-approved version of the bill on Tuesday after being faced with opposition from House Republicans, specifically those associated with the Tea Party movement, who advocated for spending cuts and the controversial Keystone XL oil pipeline.
ref: 减税延长计划陷入僵局的原因是，众议院在面对众议院共和党人的反对后，于星期二正式通过了参议院通过的减税法案。特别是那些与茶党运动有关的人和主张削减开支和有争议的XL拱顶石输油管道。

src: The fourteenth Quiksilver Ceremonial Punta de Lobos Big Wave Invitational surf championship took place on Saturday in the Chilean city of Pichilemu, often called the "Capital of the Surf."
ref: 第14届奎克西尔弗仪式蓬德罗布斯大浪邀请冲浪锦标赛于周六在智利城市匹兹勒姆举行，匹兹勒姆通常被称为“冲浪之都”。

src: In this year's competition, 24 surfers from countries such as South Africa, Peru, Chile, the United States, and Argentina participated in the championship, including Pichileminians Ramón Navarro and Cristian Merelló, and Hawaiian Köhl Christensen.
ref: 在今年的比赛中，来自南非、秘鲁、智利和阿根廷等国家的24名冲浪选手参加了比赛，包括Pichileminians Ramón Navarro、Cristian Merelló以及Hawaiian Köhl Christensen。

src: APEC Australia 2007 has officially closed in Sydney, with Australian Prime Minister John Howard delivering APEC's final declaration.
ref: 2007年，澳大利亚亚太经合组织在悉尼正式闭幕，澳大利亚总理约翰·霍华德发表了亚太经合组织的最后声明。

src: The final leader's declaration said that APEC member economies will support the Doha trade talks and that the leaders examined a series of measures to deal with terrorism, pandemics, contaminated food, energy security and natural disasters.
ref: 最终的领导人声明说，亚太经合组织成员经济体将支持多哈贸易谈判，领导人审查了一系列措施，以应对恐怖主义、流行病、污染食品、能源安全和自然灾害问题。

src: Mr Howard said that the APEC members had decided to make "An urgent request to all countries involved in the Doha process to renew their efforts to achieve an outcome, emphasizing that agriculture and industrial products are the two priority areas".
ref: 霍华德先生表示，亚太经合组织成员决定“向参与多哈进程的所有国家提出紧急要求，重新努力取得成果，强调农业和工业产品是两个优先领域”。

src: The leaders wish for Doha to enter its final phase this year.
ref: 领导人希望多哈今年进入最后阶段。

src: Talks have been stalled due to disagreements between the European Union and United States over subsidies and tariffs for the agricultural sector.
ref: 由于欧盟和美国在农业补贴和关税问题上存在分歧，谈判被搁置。

src: A plan by the United States to establish an APEC free trade zone received a mixed reception with some members believing that such a move would weaken the group's commitment to the Doha round.
ref: 美国提出的建立亚太经合组织自由贸易区的计划受到了不同程度的欢迎，一些成员认为此举将削弱该组织对多哈回合的承诺。

src: They did agree that if the WTO's Doha talks were not completed by the end of the year, the APEC zone would be examined.
ref: 他们同意如果世贸组织的多哈谈判未在年底前完成，将对亚太经合组织区域进行审查。

src: Speaking to CNBC, the head of the World Trade Organisation, Pascal Lamy said that negotiations taking place in Geneva were making progress.
ref: 世界贸易组织负责人帕斯卡尔·拉米在接受美国全国广播公司财经频道采访时表示，日内瓦的谈判正在取得进展。

src: "There is a strong sense that it is a make-or-break moment."
ref: “有一种强烈的感觉，那是一个成败的时刻。”

src: It may take a few weeks, but my sense is that there is a lot of focus and energy," Mr Lamy said.
ref: 拉米先生说，“这可能需要几个星期，但我的认为是有很多关注和力量”。

src: In the area of health, the final declaration also promised to share influenza samples and provide equitable access to vaccines.
ref: 在健康领域，最终宣言还承诺分享流感样本并提供公平获得疫苗的机会。

src: Security related issues were a commitment to rooting out terrorism and a recognition of the danger proliferation of weapons of mass destruction poses to the region.
ref: 与安全有关的问题是致力于铲除恐怖主义和承认大规模毁灭性武器扩散对该区域构成的危险。

src: Despite interest from India and Pakistan in joining the group, it was announced that additional members will be considered in 2010.
ref: 尽管印度和巴基斯坦有兴趣加入该集团，但宣布将在2010年考虑增加其他成员。

src: The final declaration also reaffirmed the Sydney Declaration on climate change, which had been agreed upon on Saturday.
ref: 最后宣言还重申了星期六商定的关于气候变化的悉尼宣言。

src: NASA has held a memorial ceremony to mark the fifth anniversary of the Space Shuttle Columbia disaster.
ref: 美国宇航局举行纪念哥伦比亚号航天飞机遇难五周年纪念仪式。

src: All seven astronauts were killed when their spacecraft broke up on re-entry over Texas on February 1, 2003, 16 minutes prior to scheduled landing time at Florida.
ref: 2003年2月1日，在佛罗里达州的预定着陆时间前16分钟，七名宇航员在他们的宇宙飞船重新进入德克萨斯州时全部遇难。

src: Columbia had been damaged by a chunk of loose foam during takeoff 16 days earlier.
ref: 16天前哥伦比亚号起飞后，被一大块松散的泡沫材料损坏。

src: NASA officials, astronauts, schoolchildren and family members attended the ceremony, which was held just miles from Columbias intended landing site.
