ref: 法拉利车手菲利佩·马萨在2007年国际汽联一级方程式马来西亚雪邦国际赛道大奖赛中获得杆位。

src: McLaren-Mercedes driver Fernando Alonso stayed in the lead for the most part of the third qualifying session, but was closely pursued by his rivals from Ferrari and by his teammate Lewis Hamilton who, after the fantastic debut in the previous race, surely has ambitions for the World Champion title.
ref: 迈凯轮梅赛德斯车手费尔南多·阿隆索在第三轮排位赛的大部分时间里都处于领先地位，但他的对手法拉利和队友刘易斯·汉密尔顿在前一场比赛中精彩的首次亮相后，对世界冠军头衔充满了雄心。

src: A new interesting feature of the F1 cars was presented by Bridgestone, the tyre supplier.
ref: 轮胎供应商普利司通提出了F1汽车的一个新的有趣特点。

src: All tyres of softer compound will be marked by a white stria along the tyre groove starting from this race onwards.
ref: 从本次比赛开始，所有较软化合物的轮胎都将沿着轮胎凹槽标记白色条纹。

src: As intended, this will help audience to distinguish the tyres, it will be more helpful than the previous white heavy dot on the outer side of the tyre.
ref: 如预期的那样，这将有助于观众区分轮胎，它将比以前在轮胎外侧的白色重点更有帮助。

src: The two Australian mine-workers, who were trapped for 14 days underground in a collapsed mine, have signed a media deal reportedly worth AUD$2 million for their story of survival.
ref: 这两名澳大利亚矿工被困在一个倒塌的矿井地下14天，据报道他们与媒体签署了一份价值200万澳元的生存协议。

src: Local media reports that the lucrative deal, announced by the Nine Network, is believed to be the "highest ever paid to secure news talent".
ref: 据当地媒体报道，这项由第九电视网宣布的利润丰厚的交易被认为是“有史以来为确保新闻人才而支付的最高报酬”。

src: A planned TV special will be the outcome of a deal secured by Publishing and Broadcasting Limited (PBL), which owns the Nine Network.
ref: 一个计划中的电视特别节目将是由拥有第九电视网的出版和广播有限公司（PBL）担保的一项交易的结果。

src: Miners Todd Russell and Brant Webb were entombed nearly a kilometre underground following a cave-in on April 25 at the Beaconsfield Gold Mine in Tasmania.
ref: 矿工托德·拉塞尔和布兰特·韦伯在4月25日塔斯马尼亚比肯斯菲尔德金矿的一个洞穴后被埋在地下近一公里处。

src: A third miner, Larry Knight, was killed in the rock-fall.
ref: 第三名矿工拉里·奈特因坠落的岩石而丧生。

src: The two survivors trapped in a wire cage, survived by drinking water seeping through rocks until rescuers managed to dig a small tunnel to deliver fresh food and water.
ref: 两名幸存者被困在一个铁丝笼中，靠饮用从岩石中渗出水，他们得以幸存，直到救援人员设法挖了一条小隧道来运送新鲜的食物和水。

src: Their tale has captured the attention of the nation, with media corporations fighting for exclusive rights to the miners' story.
ref: 他们的故事引起了全国的关注，媒体公司为矿工的故事争取独家报道。

src: The Nine Network's chief executive Eddie McGuire said under the PBL deal, Woman's Day, the Australian Women's Weekly and the Bulletin magazines would also have access to the men.
ref: 第九电视网的首席执行官埃迪·麦奎尔说，根据PBL协议，《女性之日》、《澳大利亚女性周刊》和《公告》杂志也将与这些男性进行接触。

src: The Nine Network has announced it would broadcast a two-hour special with entitled "The Great Escape."
ref: 第九电视网宣布将播放一个名为“大逃亡”的两小时特别节目。

src: Another deal is expected to be brokered with U.S. media.
ref: 预计另一笔交易将与美国媒体合作。

src: Mr McGuire said the deal would not restrict the pair from selling their story to CNN, the US Today Show and Good Morning America, who have all reportedly made contact with Mr Russell and Mr Webb this week.
ref: 麦奎尔先生表示，这笔交易并不会限制他们将这些故事卖给美国有线电视新闻网，今日美国节目和早安美国，他们本周都与罗素先生和韦伯先生有过接触。

src: Under the PBL deal, Woman's Day, the Australian Women's Weekly and the Bulletin magazines would also have access to the men, Mr McGuire said.
ref: 麦奎尔先生说，根据PBL协议，《女性之日》、《澳大利亚女性周刊》和《公告》杂志也将与这些男性进行接触。

src: Nine says it also wants the footage and photographs taken by the miners during their ordeal.
ref: 第九电视网说他们还希望能够得到矿工遇难时的影像记录。

src: The footage remains in the hands of the mining company.
ref: 影像记录仍然在采矿公司的手中。

src: The men, who were rescued on May 9, have not spoken publicly about the time they spent trapped underground.
ref: 5月9日获救的这些人没有公开谈论他们被困在地下的时间。

src: Redwood City, California - The jury in the Scott Peterson trial suggest that Peterson receive the death penalty.
ref: 加利福尼亚州雷德伍德城。斯科特・彼得森审判中的陪审团表示，彼得森将被判处死刑。

src: Peterson was found guilty of murdering his pregnant wife Laci and their unborn child.
ref: 彼得森因谋杀怀孕的妻子拉奇及其未出生的孩子而被判有罪。

src: The official sentence will be announced on February 25th, 2005.
ref: 官方判决将于2005年2月25日公布。

src: The Netherlands lost to the Russia national football team in a quarter-final match of UEFA Euro 2008.
ref: 荷兰队在2008年欧洲杯四分之一决赛中输给了俄罗斯国家足球队。

src: Roman Pavlyuchenko opened the scoring in main play, a goal that was matched by Ruud van Nistelrooy after only 30 minutes.
ref: 罗马·帕夫柳琴科在主打中首开纪录，在30分钟后被；路德·范·尼斯特鲁伊扳回比分。

src: Then it was a hardy play-off for both teams, especially the Dutch, but Torbinsky and Arshavin scored goals, effectively put an end to the match.
ref: 这对两支球队来说都是一场艰苦的比赛，尤其是荷兰队，但是托宾斯基和阿尔沙文的进球，有效地结束了这场比赛。

src: Now it will be the first major semi final for Russia since the break up of the USSR.
ref: 现在，这将是自苏联解体以来俄罗斯第一次进入半决赛。

src: India have beaten England by nine runs in the second One-Day International of the series at the County Ground, Bristol, England.
ref: 印度队在英格兰布里斯托尔郡球场举办的单日性国际比赛系列赛的第二场中以九分之差击败英格兰队。

src: India, having won the toss and elected to bat first, raced to 113 runs after the first twenty overs.
ref: 印度队在掷骰子中获胜，并选择先击球，在头20节比赛中获得113分。

src: Sourav Ganguly was caught off the bowling of Andrew Flintoff, who finished the innings as the top performing England bowler, taking 5-56.
ref: 苏拉夫·甘古利接飞了安德鲁·弗林托夫的击球，作为英格兰表现最佳的投球手在一个击球局中他以5-56的比分完成了比赛。

src: Sachin Tendulkar fell just short of a century, being caught behind on 99 runs.
ref: 萨钦·坦杜卡尔在不到中场就落败了，以99分落后。

src: Tendulkar was surprised at the decision, and television replays were inconclusive as to whether the ball had hit his glove or not.
ref: 特努尔卡对这一决定感到惊讶，电视重播无法确定球是否击中了他的手套。

src: Yuvraj Singh and Rahul Dravid added 63 runs before Singh was dismissed for 49.
ref: 尤夫拉吉·辛格和拉胡尔·德拉维德增加了63分，之后辛格以49分下场。

src: Dravid finished on 92 not out, helping India to an imposing total of 329-7 after fifty overs.
ref: 德拉维德在92场比赛中没有出局，帮助印度在50多场比赛后以329比7的优势获胜。

src: In reply England started quickly, recording 75 runs off the first ten overs.
ref: 作为回应，英格兰队开始很快，在前十节比赛中取得了75分。

src: However Munaf Patel took two wickets in two balls to dismiss both the England opening batsmen.
ref: 然而，穆纳夫·帕特尔在两个球中拿下两个三柱门，从而将英格兰首发的两名击球手击杀出局。

src: The England wickets fell regularly after that, with Kevin Pietersen and Paul Collingwood bowled by Piyush Chalwa for 25 and 27 runs respectively.
ref: 此后，英格兰的三柱门经常失守，凯文·彼得森和保罗·科林伍德分别被皮尤斯·查瓦投了25分和27分。

src: Andrew Flintoff was dismissed for just nine runs, and despite 64 runs from Ian Bell, England needed 90 runs from the last eight overs with just three wickets remaining.
ref: 安德鲁·弗林托夫只得了9分就被罚下场，尽管伊恩·贝尔得了64分，英格兰还是需要从还剩三个三柱门的最后8节中得90分。

src: Dimitri Mascarenhas hit 52 runs, including five sixes, and Stuart Broad hit 20 runs off the final over, but it came too late and England fell ten runs short of the 330 run target.
ref: 迪米特里·马斯卡雷纳打出52分，其中包括5个六分球，斯图尔特·布罗德在最后一节时打出20分，但为时已晚，英格兰落后于330分的目标10分。

src: The third match will be played at Edgbaston, Birmingham, on August 27.
ref: 第三场比赛将于8月27日在伯明翰的埃格巴斯顿举行。

src: On November 13, Torontoians will be heading to the polls to vote for their ward's councillor and for mayor.
ref: 11月13日，多伦多人将前往投票站，投票选出他们选区的议员和市长。

src: This ward's candidates include Francis Ahinful, Ted Berger, Anthony Caputo, Suzan Hall (incumbent), Andre Lucas, Rosemarie Mulhall, Brian Prevost, and Sonali Verma.
ref: 该区的候选人包括弗朗西斯·阿辛福尔、泰德·伯杰、安东尼·卡普托、苏珊·霍尔（现任）、安德烈·卢卡斯、罗斯玛丽·穆霍尔、布莱恩·普雷福斯特和索纳利·维玛。

src: For more information on the election, read Toronto municipal election, 2006.
ref: 有关选举的更多信息，请参阅2006年多伦多市政选举。

src: Kevin Rudd has been elected as leader of the Labor party by the party's caucus.
ref: 陆克文被党的核心小组选为工党领袖。

src: His running-mate Julia Gillard was elected unopposed to the deputy leadership.
ref: 他的竞选伙伴朱莉娅·吉拉德当选为无人反对的副领导。

src: The vote was called on Friday after Kevin Rudd challenged former leader Kim Beazley for the leadership.
ref: 周五，陆克文挑战前领导人金·比兹利的领导权，并被召集进行投票。

src: Rudd becomes the party's third leader since the 2004 election, where the Howard government won a fourth consecutive term in government.
ref: 陆克文成为该党自2004年大选以来的第三任领导人，霍华德政府连续第四次赢得政府任期。

src: Long-serving deputy leader Jenny Macklin did not contest the deputy leadership following the defeat of Mr Beazley.
ref: 在比兹利被失败后，长期任职的副领导人珍妮·麦克林没有与副领导人竞争。

src: Mrs Macklin has been deputy leader under three leaders since 2001.
ref: 麦克林女士自2001年以来一直担任三位领导人的副领导。

src: The party will elect its shadow ministry in a separate ballot on Thursday.
ref: 该党将在周四的单独投票中选出影子内阁。

src: Premier of Queensland Peter Beattie has said that the leadership change "will herald in a new period of stability for the party."
ref: 昆士兰总理彼得·比蒂表示，领导层的更迭“将预示着该党进入一个新的稳定时期”。

src: "It's important that if you have good policy and good government, it's important you also have stability in leadership," said Beattie.
ref: 比蒂说：“重要的是，如果你有良好的政策和良好的政府，你的领导能力也必须保持稳定。”

src: "I'd urge everyone to get behind Kevin - having a Queenslander as the alternative prime minister is good for the state and good for Australia."
ref: “我敦促每个人都支持凯文-让一位昆士兰人作为代理总理对国家有利，对澳大利亚有利。”

src: Labor MP Dick Adams said even though he voted for Beazley to remain as leader, he supports the party's new leadership.
ref: 工党下院议员迪克·亚当斯说，尽管他投票支持比兹利继续担任领导人，但他支持该党的新领导层。

src: "There'll be a lot more harmony and a lot more opportunity of ideas," he said.
ref: 他说：“会有更多的和谐和想法的机会。”

src: "I think the new ideas need to flow and I think if it's opened up, as some people have said, they want those ideas to come forward, but I think we'll have some interesting policy direction to take to the people."
ref: “我认为新的想法需要流动，我认为如果像一些人所说的那样开放，他们希望这些想法能被提出，但我认为我们将有一些有趣的政策方向来引导人们。”

src: Sharan Burrow, the president of the ACTU - the peak union body in Australia said Mr Rudd will be a strong leader.
ref: 澳大利亚最高工会组织主席沙兰·伯罗表示，陆克文将是一位强有力的领导人。

src: "I have no doubt that Kevin Rudd will say that these laws have to go, that they will be replaced by a policy that reinstates rights," Ms Burrow has told Sky News.
ref: “我毫不怀疑陆克文会说这些法律必须废除，它们将被恢复权利的政策所取代，”伯罗告诉天空新闻。

src: Government MP, Christopher Pyne said that the new leadership was a poor choice for the party.
ref: 政府下院议员克里斯托弗·派恩说，新的领导层对该党来说是一个糟糕的选择。

src: "The combination of Kevin Rudd and Julia Gillard will have all the hallmarks of the mongoose and the cobra.
ref: 陆克文和茱莉亚·吉拉德的组合将具有猫鼬和眼镜蛇的所有特征。

src: It shows Labor is obsessed about leadership rather than policy and strategy," Mr Pyne said.
ref: 这表明工党对领导能力而不是政策和战略很着迷。”派恩先生说。

src: In a poll released by Newspoll today, a Rudd-Gillard leadership team had 48 percent support of the public, compared to the outgoing Beazley-Macklin team's 27 percent.
ref: 在今天由NewsPoll发布的一项民意调查中，陆克文-吉拉德领导团队获得了48%的公众支持，而即将离任的比兹利·麦克林领导团队则获得了27%的支持。

src: At 10:30pm on November 23, 2008, near the airport in McGregor, Texas, Space Exploration Technologies Corporation (SpaceX) tested their new Falcon 9 rocket at full thrust for nearly 3 minutes (160 seconds).
ref: 2008年11月23日晚上10：30，在德克萨斯州麦格雷戈机场附近，空间探索技术公司（SpaceX）对他们的新猎鹰9号火箭进行了近3分钟（160秒）的全推力测试。

src: The engineers then shut down two of the nine engines — in order to limit potential damage to the launch pad — and continued the test for 18 more seconds before finally shutting the rocket down.
ref: 工程师们随后关闭了九台发动机中的两台，以限制对发射台的潜在损坏，并在最后关闭火箭之前继续测试18秒。

src: "We ran the engines just like they would run during flight, but instead of being up in the air, they were held down.
ref: “我们像在飞行中那样运行发动机，但发动机没有升到空中，而是被压在了地上。

src: They weren’t moving," said Lauren Dreyer, SpaceX's manager for business development.
ref: 他们没有动，”SpaceX业务发展经理劳伦·德雷尔说。

src: This was the Falcon 9's first major test firing, and it marks a milestone for the company in its plans to capture a section of the commercial launch market.
ref: 这是猎鹰9的首次重大测试，它标志着该公司计划进军商业发布市场的一个里程碑。

src: The test reportedly shook the windows of houses 5 miles away, causing agitation among residents who felt that they had not received adequate warning.
ref: 据报道，测试震动了5英里外的房屋窗户，引起居民的不安，他们觉得自己没有得到足够的警告。

src: "I appreciate the fact that the company notified [the City of] McGregor, but did they not think the test would affect the surrounding communities?" asked commenter Lorena Resident on the website for the Waco Tribune-Herald.
ref: “我很感激公司通知麦格雷戈【市】的事实，但他们认为测试不会影响周围社区吗？”瓦科论坛网站的评论员洛伦娜说。

src: The Falcon 9 rocket, and its smaller sibling the Falcon 1, are the first rockets capable of entering Low Earth Orbit (LEO) to have their design be privately funded in its entirety.
ref: 猎鹰9号火箭及其较小的型号的猎鹰1号，是第一批能够进入近地轨道（LEO）的火箭，其设计全部由私人出资。

src: According to SpaceX the Falcon 9 can generate 4 times the maximum thrust of a Boeing 747 while firing in a vacuum, and will eventually be able to perform interplanetary missions in addition to its initial role as an orbital launch vehicle.
ref: 根据SpaceX的说法，“猎鹰9号”在真空中发射时，可以产生波音747最大推力的4倍推力，除了最初作为轨道运载火箭的作用外，还将最终能够执行行星际任务。

src: SpaceX is also designing a crew and cargo capsule for the Falcon 9, which it has named the "Dragon".
ref: SpaceX还为猎鹰9号设计了一个船员和货舱，并将其命名为“龙”。

src: SpaceX is a contender for future commercial contracts from various government run space agencies, with NASA expressing particular interest.
ref: SpaceX是未来各种政府运营的航天机构签订商业合同的竞争者，美国国家航空和宇宙航行局对此表示特别关注。

src: NASA will be retiring their fleet of Columbia Class Space Shuttles in 2010, but will not have the Shuttles' replacements (the Ares I and Ares V rockets) ready until at least 2014.
ref: 美国国家航空和宇宙航行局将于2010年退役哥伦比亚级航天飞机，但至少到2014年才准备好航天飞机的替代品（战神一号和战神五号火箭）。

src: NASA hopes to fill some of this gap using commercial launches from companies such as SpaceX.
ref: 美国国家航空和宇宙航行局希望通过SpaceX等公司的商业发布填补这一空白。

src: SpaceX has already reached an agreement with NASA to conduct three test flights of the Dragon capsule in conjunction with the Falcon 9.
ref: SpaceX已经与美国宇航局达成协议，将与猎鹰9号一起进行三次“龙”太空舱的试飞。

src: Elon Musk, CEO and CTO of SpaceX, said, "The full mission-length test firing clears the highest hurdle for the Falcon 9 first stage before launch.
ref: SpaceX首席执行官兼首席技术官埃隆·马斯克表示：“整个任务长度的试射为猎鹰9号发射前的第一阶段扫清了最高障碍。

src: In the next few months, we will have the first Falcon 9 flight vehicle on its launch pad at Cape Canaveral, preparing for lift-off in 2009."
ref: 在接下来的几个月里，我们将在卡纳维拉尔角的发射台上安装第一架猎鹰9号飞行器，准备在2009年发射升空。”

src: An Airbus A320 airliner owned by Air New Zealand crashed into the Mediterranean Sea near Perpignan, killing at least two of a crew of seven, French officials reported on Thursday.
ref: 据法国官员周四报道，新西兰航空公司旗下的一架空客A320客机在佩皮尼昂附近坠入地中海，造成7名机组人员中至少2人死亡。

src: The aircraft crashed at about 5 p.m. local time (1600 UTC) during a test flight.
ref: 飞机在当地时间下午5点（世界标准时间16：00）试飞时坠毁。

src: The twin-engine jet airliner had just undergone maintenance at Perpignan in preparation for its return to Air New Zealand by German airline XL Airways, which had been operating it on lease.
ref: 这架双引擎喷气式客机刚刚在佩皮尼昂进行了维修，准备由德国航空公司XL航空公司返回新西兰航空公司，该公司一直在租赁该飞机。

src: The seven on board included two XL Airways crew, Civil Aviation Authority inspector Jeremy Cook of Wellington, and four Air New Zealand personnel.
ref: 机上七名机组人员包括两名XL航空公司机组人员、威灵顿民航局检查员杰里米·库克和四名新西兰航空公司人员。

src: Air New Zealand has identified involved personnel as Captain Brian Horrell and Murray White of Auckland, and Michael Gyles and Noel Marsh of Christchurch.
ref: 新西兰航空公司已确认相关人员为奥克兰的布莱恩·霍雷尔机长和默里·怀特，以及克赖斯特彻奇的迈克尔·吉尔斯和诺埃尔·马什。

src: No additional passengers were on board for the flight, which was part of a maintenance test procedure.
ref: 飞机上没有其他乘客，这是维护测试程序的一部分。

src: Though rescue efforts persisted into the night, there is no hope of the remaining five crew members being found alive, according to French officials.
ref: 据法国官员称，尽管救援工作一直持续到深夜，但剩下的五名机组成员已无生还希望。

src: The pilots may have attempted an emergency landing on water.
ref: 飞行员可能试图在水上紧急着陆。

src: French, German, and New Zealand aviation authorities and investigators have been dispatched to the site to investigate the incident.
ref: 法国、德国和新西兰航空当局和调查人员已被派往现场调查这一事件。

src: Manufacturer Airbus, based in Toulouse, will aid the investigation, Airbus spokespersons stated.
ref: 空客发言人说，总部设在图卢兹的空客制造商将协助调查。

src: A Civil Aviation Authority spokesperson stated that the incident does not cast any doubt on the airworthiness of the A320 design, a popular aircraft which has been involved in only ten fatal accidents since its introduction in 1987.
ref: 民航局发言人说，这起事故并不会引起对A320设计上的怀疑，该经典机型自1987年被引入以来，只发生过10起致命事故。

src: The Thai Prime Minister, Thaksin Shinawatra, despatched an additional 1,000 troops to the south of the country to help deal with the widespread violence.
ref: 泰国总理他信·西那瓦向该国南部派遣了另外1000名士兵，以帮助处理大范围的暴力事件。

src: This brings the total number of security forces operating in the three troubled provinces to approximately 30,000.
ref: 这使得三个陷入困境的省份的安全部队总数达到了大约30000人。

src: Mr. Shinawatra's recent visit to the region was followed by further shootings.
ref: 西那瓦最近访问了该地区，随后又发生了枪击事件。

src: In Narathiwat Province a 40 year old village worker was shot while helping a neighbour repair a fence.
ref: 在纳拉提瓦特省，一名40岁的村民在帮助邻居修理栅栏时被枪击。

src: Friday saw the shooting of an assistant village head in Yala Province, and an elderly couple were shot in Pattani Province whilst returning from a local market.
ref: 上周五，雅拉省一名助理村长被枪杀，一对老年夫妇在从当地市场返回时在芭堤尼省被枪杀。

src: The insurgency and campaign for an independent Muslim state in the southern provinces has resulted in an exodus from the area.
ref: 企图建立一个独立的穆斯林国家的叛乱引发了南方省份的大规模逃难。

src: Estimates put the number of Thai Buddhists who have fled the area at 34,000.
ref: 据估计，逃离该地区的泰国佛教徒人数为34000人。

src: There are also some reports that Muslim inhabitants of the area have been seeking refuge in Malaysia.
ref: 还有一些报道称，该地区的穆斯林居民一直在马来西亚寻求庇护。

src: The state of emergency imposed last month has had a mixed reception.
ref: 上月实施的紧急状态喜忧参半。

src: Largely favoured by Buddhists in the provinces, this grants additional powers to the Prime Minister and follows on from martial law having been in place since January 2004.
ref: 这在很大程度上受到各省佛教徒的青睐，授予总理额外的权力，并从2004年1月开始实施戒严。

src: Despite these security measures, over 1,000 people have died in the insurgency.
ref: 尽管采取了这些安全措施，仍有1000多人在叛乱中丧生。

src: Thousands of Greeks gathered last night in Syntagma square in front of the parliament building in Athens to protest over the political response to the fires.
ref: 昨晚，数千希腊人聚集在雅典议会大楼前的宪法广场，抗议对火灾的政治反应。

src: An estimated 8,000 people attended, after a call for a silent protest had been distributed through e-mail, text messages and eventually the media.
ref: 据估计，在通过电子邮件、短信和媒体发布了一个无声抗议呼吁之后，有8000人参加了这次抗议活动。

src: Although general elections are taking place in two and a half weeks time, the protest was meant to be apolitical.
ref: 尽管大选将在两周半的时间内举行，但这次抗议无关政治。

src: Some protesters taunted riot police, who responded with stun grenades.
ref: 一些抗议者嘲弄防暴警察，防暴警察用眩晕手榴弹回应。

src: Wikipedia, one of the top ten websites on the internet, will soon be receiving a face lift.
ref: 维基百科，互联网十大网站之一，很快将改头换面。

src: The first part of the change is a new skin called Vector.
ref: 变化的第一部分是一个叫做“矢量”的新皮肤。

src: This skin, currently used on Wikinews, will be enabled for Wikipedia on April 5th and provide a more updated look and feel.
ref: 这个皮肤，目前用于维基新闻，将在4月5日为维基百科启用，将带来一个更为全新的外观和体验。

src: The second part will change the toolbar when editing, and is intended to ease common tasks.
ref: 第二部分将在编辑时更改工具栏，以简化常见任务。

src: Both changes are important to encourage new people to edit and update content.
ref: 这两项更改对于鼓励新人编辑和更新内容都很重要。

src: The improvements have been tested by more than 500,000 beta-testers.
ref: 这些改进经过了50多万个测试人员的测试。

src: The wiki code will also be altered; editors will be able to change tables data and other elements with what is intended as an easier form, in addition to editing an article while watching it.
ref: 维基的代码也将被修改；除了可在观看文章的同时编辑文章之外，编辑们还可以用更简单的形式更改表格数据和其他元素。

src: On the other hand, the staff of Wikimedia requested more editors to add and update articles in their wikis.
ref: 另一方面，维基媒体的工作人员要求更多的编辑在他们的维基中添加和更新文章。

src: Wikipedia is a website maintained by users in unprecedented numbers.
ref: 维基百科是一个由数量空前的用户来维护的网站。

src: Maintenance and updating processes are dependent on just one percent of their users.
ref: 维护和更新过程仅依赖于其百分之一的用户。

src: Based on some statements, fewer than a thousand users do the maintenance and updating work.
ref: 据一些声明称，只有不到1000个用户在进行维护和更新工作。

src: According to family, former United States senator for Texas and former Treasury Secretary, Lloyd Bentsen has died at the age of 85 in his home located in Houston, Texas.
ref: 据美国前德克萨斯州参议员、前财政部长劳埃德·本特森的家人说，他在位于德克萨斯州休斯顿的家中去世，享年85岁。

src: Bentsen is most famous for his words during a Vice Presidential debate on October 5, 1988.
ref: 本特森最著名的是他在1988年10月5日的副总统辩论中所说的话。

src: Indiana Senator Dan Quayle, the Republican candidate for Vice President, compared his congressional experience to that of former President John F. Kennedy when he sought the presidency.
ref: 印第安纳州参议员丹·奎尔，共和党副总统候选人，将他的国会经验与前总统约翰·肯尼迪竞选总统时的经验进行了比较。

src: The sharp rebuke, however, didn't save Bentsen, as George H.W. Bush and Quayle defeated Michael Dukakis and Bentsen in the 1988 elections.
ref: 然而，尖锐的指责并没有拯救本特森，因为乔治H.W.布什和奎尔在1988年的选举中击败了迈克尔·杜卡基斯和本特森。

src: In 1998, Bentsen suffered a small stroke, which he said was caused by a 3-month long trip to 15 different nations.
ref: 1998年，本特森患了一次小中风，他说这是因为他到15个不同的国家进行了长达3个月的旅行。

src: Bentsen was born on February 11, 1921 and represented the state of Texas for 28 years.
ref: 本特森出生于1921年2月11日，曾在28年内作为德克萨斯州的代表。

src: Veteran striker Pat "Bam Bam" Healy put an end to the undefeated streak of Lyle "Fancy Pants" Beerbohm in a close main event fight that went to the judges' decision at the Strikeforce Challengers 14 event at Cedar Park Center in Cedar Park, Texas on Friday night.
ref: 周五晚上，在德克萨斯州雪松公园中心举行的“打击力量挑战者”第14场赛事中，资深打手“砰砰”帕特·希利终结了“花花短裤”莱尔·比尔博姆的不败纪录。

src: Veteran fighter Carlo "Neo" Prater also prevailed in his Strikeforce debut against Bryan Travers.
ref: 老牌拳手“尼奥”卡洛·普拉特也战胜了新秀莱恩·特拉弗斯。

src: Ryan Couture, son of MMA legend Randy Couture, remained undefeated in his second-ever bout.
ref: MMA传奇人物兰迪·库卓之子，莱安·库卓，在他的第二场比赛中继续保持不败纪录。

src: Lyle Beerbohm came into the main event bout with an undefeated 15-0-0 record, in addition to his 8-0-0 amateur record.
ref: 莱尔·比尔博姆凭借15胜0平0败，以及新人赛8胜0平0败的不败战绩，挺进了主赛事。

src: "This is going to be a fun, tough, hard fight that I expect will go everywhere," stated Beerbohm in a pre-fight media workout on Wednesday.
ref: 比尔博姆在周三的一次赛前媒体训练中说“如我期待，有趣并艰苦的战斗将无处不在，”。

src: "My time has come and I am really looking forward to the fight."
ref: “我的时间到了，我期待着这场战斗。”

src: Beerbohm also stated he wanted to eventually fight for a Strikeforce Lightweight title, but recognized that he first needed to move past his veteran opponent, Pat Healey, who came into the fight with a record of 25-17-0, who was making his return to action since his loss to Josh Thompson via submission in 2010.
ref: 比尔博姆还表示，他希望最终夺取打击力量轻量级冠军头衔，但他认识到，他首先需要战胜他的老对手帕特·希利，希利以25胜17平0败的战绩进入主赛，这是他在2010年输给乔希·汤普森之后的复出赛。

src: The bout was very close, going the distance through all three rounds.
ref: 这场比赛非常接近，经过了三个回合。

src: While Beerbohm pushed a lot of the action, especially with grappling on the ground, Healey was able to land more effective strikes and weathered persistent take-down attempts from Beerbohm.
ref: 虽然比尔博姆十分主动的进攻，尤其是在地面擒技上占据主动，但希利总能进行更有效的攻击，察觉并化解比尔博姆的攻击意图。

src: The action was back-and-forth, neither fighter never able to clearly dominate the other.
ref: 战斗有来有回，双方都无法占据明显优势。

src: The last few minutes of the fight proved to be the best for Healey, who wore down Beerbohm's strength and left him gasping for air, allowing Healey to attempt more submissions on the ground.
ref: 战斗的最后几分钟变得对希利极其有利，他已经耗尽了比尔博姆的体力，让他气喘吁吁，这让希利在地面战上获取了优势。

src: The three judges scored the bout 29-28, 29-28, and 29-28 to give Healey the unanimous decision win.
ref: 三位裁判均打出了29比28的比分，一致决定希利获得了比赛的胜利。

src: After the match, Beerbohm was upbeat, but felt he had won the bout.
ref: 赛后，比尔博姆仍很乐观，他认为他赢了这场比赛。

src: "I thought going into the third we'd each won a round, but I definitely thought I won that last round."
ref: “我本以为比赛会因前两局平手而进入第三局，我真的认为我在第二局中获胜了。”

src: "But that's what happens when you let it go to the hands of the judges."
ref: “但当让裁判进行判决时，这种事也是会发生的。”

src: Healey complimented his opponent, "Beerbohm fought a good fight but I think I outworked and outhustled him."
ref: 希利称赞他的对手：“比尔博姆打得很好，但我觉得我比他打得好，也比他强。”

src: Healey also welcomed the idea of a rematch, stating, "He talked a lot of trash, but if he wants a rematch, I'll give him one anytime."
ref: 希利对重赛的想法也很欢迎，他说：“他说了很多废话，但如果他想重赛，我随时奉陪。”

src: Asked who he wanted to face next, Healey stated he wanted to fight the winner of the Billy "Cyborg" Evangelista and Jorge "Gamebred" Masvidal on March 5, noting that both fighters had previously defeated his brother, Pat Healey.
ref: 当被问及接下来要面对谁时，希利表示他想在3月5日与“生化人”比利·伊万杰里和“纯种”豪尔赫·马斯威达尔之间的胜者战斗，并指出这两人都曾战胜过他的兄弟帕特·希利。

src: The co-main event for the show featured Carlo "Neo" Prater, a veteran fighter with a 25-10-1 record making his Strikeforce debut against the 14-3-0 Bryan Travers.
ref: 另一场主要赛事是有着25胜10平1败战绩的老将“尼奥”卡洛·普拉特对阵有着14胜3平0败战绩的，在打击力量主赛首次亮相的新秀布赖恩·特拉弗斯。

src: The bout was over in just 38 seconds as Prater used his superior reach to jab Travers several times before using a trip to take Travers to the ground and submitting him with an Anaconda Choke.
ref: 比赛在短短的38秒内结束，普拉特利用他的优势多次逼近猛击特拉弗斯，随后将他绊倒在地，最后以水蟒绞制服了对手。

src: Prater showed a lot of emotion in his post-fight interview.
ref: 普拉特在赛后的采访中表现了很多情绪。

src: "My record shows I'm not a perfect fighter, but when you're down you get up," Prater said.
ref: 普拉特说：“我的记录显示我不是一个完美的战士，但当你倒下的时候，你就得爬起来。”

src: "This was a good win, I'll get better off this fight, but I'll be right back in the gym soon."
ref: “这是一场很好的胜利，我会在这场比赛中有所改善，但我现在得回健身房了。”

src: Ryan Couture, the son of MMA legend Randy "the Nature" Couture, pushed his fight record to 2-0-0 with a victory over 2-0-0 opponent Lee Higgins.
ref: MMA传奇人物“大自然”兰迪·库卓的儿子莱安·库卓，战胜了有着2站全胜记录的对手李·希金斯，将他的战绩提升至2胜0平0败。

src: Most of the first round featured very little action until Higgins attempted to take down Couture, and found himself fighting off Guillotine Choke and a D'Arce Choke in the last minute of the round.
ref: 第一局的大部分时间双方都没有什么举动，直到希金斯试图击倒库卓，结果导致他直至该局的最后一刻都在试图挣脱库卓的断头台与达斯绞。

src: Couture dominated nearly all of the second round with superior stand-up striking and ground control.
ref: 库卓凭借出色的站立打击和地面控制技，几乎占据了整个第二局的主导。

src: Higgins fared little better in the third, as Couture was able to put Higgins against the cage and stop Higgins' take-down attempts, and then eventually control Higgins on the ground before submitting him with a Rear Naked Choke with 20 seconds left in the bout.
ref: 希金斯在第三局也未能有更好表现，库卓将希金斯逼至笼边，让他无法试图击倒库卓。最终库卓将希金斯控制在地面上，并在比赛的最后20秒以裸绞将其制服。

src: The main card was broadcast in the United States on premium broadcast network Showtime.
ref: 主赛事在美国高级广播网络“演出时间”上播放。

src: The Showtime Strikeforce Challengers series highlights mixed martial arts fights between up-and-coming fighters as well as veteran fighters who are looking to move up towards the larger Strikeforce events.
ref: “演出时间”的“打击力量挑战者”系列综合格斗赛事为初露头角的战士和期待在进军更高级“打击力量”赛事的资深战士提供了舞台。

src: Mauritanians voted in favour of a new Constitution by an overwhelming majority in a referendum held on June 26, according to results announced by Interior Ministry officials today.
ref: 根据内政部官员今天宣布的结果，毛里塔尼亚在6月26日举行的全民公投中，新宪法以绝对多数的赞同票获得通过。

src: The new Constitution sets limits on the number of presidential terms a leader can serve, in contrast to several sub-Saharan countries, where several leaders have amended their Constitutions to retain power.
ref: 新宪法对总统连任任期进行了限制，这一点和其他一些撒哈拉以南的国家不同，那些国家的领导者修改了他们的宪法以维持自己的权力。

src: The Interior Minister, Mohamed Ahmed Ould Mohamed Lemine said that over 96 percent votes cast were in favour of the new Constitution.
ref: 内政部长穆罕默德·艾哈迈德·乌尔德·穆罕默德·莱明称，超过百分之96的选票支持新宪法。

src: The turnout was over 76 percent of the close to One million registered voters, who constitute about a third of the country's population.
ref: 占全国人口约三分之一的100万注册选民中，有76%参与了投票。

src: The referendum will now lead to municipal and legislative elections to be held in November, followed by elections to the parliamentary upper house and the President's post in 2007.
ref: 公投之后市政与立法选举将于11月进行，随后将在2007年进行议会上议院与总统选举。

src: The new Constitution provides for a presidential form of government, with the President commanding significant powers, including the appointment of the prime minister.
ref: 新宪法规定了总统式政府，总统拥有包括任命总理在内的重要权力。

src: The Parliament though, can vote for no confidence in the government or censure it.
ref: 尽管如此，议会还是可以发起对政府的不信任投票，或是谴责政府。

src: The Constitution disallows members of the present junta from running for the President's post and requires future leaders to swear on the Qur'an that they will not amend the Constitution to stay in power.
ref: 宪法禁止现任军政府成员竞选总统，并要求未来的领导人向古兰经发誓，他们不会修改宪法以维持权力。

src: International observers from the African Union and the Arab League said that the referendum appeared to have gone smoothly, but have yet to make their final reports.
ref: 来自非洲联盟和阿拉伯联盟的国际观察员说，公投似乎进展顺利，但尚未作出最后报告。

src: President Ely Ould Mohamed Vall, who also voted in the referendum said, "This is a great day and a rebirth for Mauritania ..."
ref: 同样在公投中投票的总统埃利·乌尔德·穆罕默德·瓦尔说：“今天是伟大的一天，毛里塔尼亚获得了重生……”。

src: "I am sure that all Mauritanians feel the same way and that for this reason the Constitution will receive massive support."
ref: “我确信所有毛里塔尼亚人都有同样的感受，因此宪法将获得大量支持。”

src: The Constitution has the backing of most civic and political groups, though two small parties called for a boycott of the referendum, saying the proposed Constitution ignores slavery, which is officially banned but still persists according to activists; and issues of "cohabitation between the different national communities" (such as Blacks and Arabs).
ref: 尽管宪法获得了大多数公民与政治团体的支持，但仍有两个小党派抵制公投结果，他们声称拟议的宪法忽略了奴隶制问题，虽然奴役在官方来说是被禁止的，但它在毛里塔尼亚依然存在；除此之外，还有“不同民族社区的共同定居”问题（如黑人与阿拉伯人）。

src: An Australian man arrested last December near the Cambodian border in Vietnam, Trinh Huu, has been sentenced to death by a Vietnamese People's Court for smuggling 2kg of heroin.
ref: 一名澳大利亚籍男子郑有去年12月在越南柬埔寨边境附近被捕，并因走私2公斤海洛因被越南人民法院判处死刑。

src: Amnesty International has urged the Australian Federal Government to do everything it can to help the man.
ref: 大赦国际组织敦促澳大利亚联邦政府尽一切可能帮助这名男子。

src: The Australian Department of Foreign Affairs has said that Trinh was receiving consular assistance, but that it was too early to negotiate for clemency as his case is still subject to appeal.
ref: 澳大利亚外交部曾表示，郑正在接受领事援助，但由于他的案件仍将受到上诉，因此谈判寻求宽大处理为时过早。

src: The government has reiterated its long standing opposition to the death penalty.
ref: 澳大利亚政府重申其反对死刑的长期立场。

src: The National Socialist Movement is, according to its website, the largest and most active Nazi party in the United States.
ref: 根据其网站，国家社会主义运动是美国规模最大，最活跃的纳粹党派。

src: Accordingly, it refers to itself as 'America's Nazi Party' and aims to instigate major change in the US.
ref: 因此，它将自己称为“美国纳粹党”，旨在美国煽动重大变革。

src: Wikinews was able to conduct an interview with the head of the party, Commander Jeff Schoep.
ref: 维基新闻对党的领导人，指挥官杰夫·肖普进行采访。

src: Fresh back from a march in Missouri, Commander Schoep told Wikinews his views on Barack Obama, the economy and much more.
ref: 刚从密苏里州的一次游行回来，指挥官肖普告诉了维基新闻他对巴拉克·奥巴马，经济以及更多问题的观点。

src: Swindon, England, has an unusual new twin town: Walt Disney World in Florida.
ref: 英国斯温登有一个不寻常的双子城：佛罗里达的沃尔特迪斯尼世界。

src: The Wiltshire town beat 24 others in a competition to become the first ever to be twinned with the famous resort.
ref: 威尔特郡在一场比赛中击败了其他24个城镇，成为第一个与这个著名的度假胜地结为姐妹的城市。

src: Rebecca Warren, a local building society worker, created a poem and video praising Swindon which won over the judges.
ref: 当地建筑协会的工作人员丽贝卡·沃伦创作了一段赞美斯温登的诗和视频，赢得了评委的支持。

src: Among other features she highlighted the town's well-known Magic Roundabout, a complicated junction composed of five interlinked mini-roundabouts, comparing it to Disney World's teacup rides.
ref: 除了其他特色外，她还强调了该镇著名的魔法环岛，一个由五个相互连接的迷你环岛组成的复杂交叉点，将其与迪斯尼世界的茶杯游乐设施进行了类比。

src: A sign marking the twinning is planned for the roundabout.
ref: 计划在环形交叉路口设置一个标志牌，用以标识双子城的关联。

src: Ms. Warren will travel to Florida with her eleven-year-old nephew and five-year-old niece to unveil a similar sign at the resort.
ref: 沃伦将和她11岁的侄子和5岁的侄女一起前往佛罗里达，在度假胜地揭开一个类似的标志。

src: A celebration will be held in Swindon in January, and it will also be the focus of an exhibit at Walt Disney World's Epcot park.
ref: 今年1月将在斯温顿举行一场庆祝活动，这也是沃尔特·迪斯尼世界艾普科特公园展览的焦点。

src: "Britain clearly has a love for Walt Disney World and long-standing affinity with the parks and their magic, which is probably why the number and quality of entries received was so high," said Disney's Hugh Wood.
ref: 迪士尼的休·伍德说：“英国显然对迪士尼乐园有着浓厚的热爱，公园和它们的魔力有着长期的亲和力，这可能就是为什么参赛作品的数量和质量如此之高的原因。”

src: Other towns shortlisted in the competition included Aberdeen, Blackpool, Milton Keynes, and Cambridge.
ref: 其他入围的城镇包括阿伯丁、布莱克浦、米尔顿凯恩斯和剑桥。

src: The jury in the Isiah Thomas sexual harassment trial revealed a guilty verdict Tuesday, ruling that the current New York Knicks coach subjected former Madison Square Garden executive Anucha Browne Sanders to unwanted sexual advances and verbal insults.
ref: 伊西娅·托马斯性骚扰案的陪审团星期二宣布了一项有罪判决，裁定现任纽约尼克斯队教练让前麦迪逊广场花园队执行官阿努查·布朗·桑德斯遭受不必要的性骚扰和言语侮辱。

src: In a minor victory for Thomas, the ruling also said that Thomas will not have to pay punitive damages.
ref: 不过对于托马斯来说还是有些许的小胜，判决说托马斯将不必支付惩罚性赔偿金。

src: However, Thomas' employer, Madison Square Garden, was also found guilty of harassment and will have to pay millions dollars worth of punitive damages to Browne Sanders.
ref: 然而，托马斯的雇主，麦迪逊广场花园队，也被判犯有骚扰罪，将不得不向布朗·桑德斯支付数百万美元的惩罚性赔偿金。

src: The ugly three-week trial originated with a US$10 million lawsuit filed by Browne Sanders, the former senior vice president of marketing and business operations for the Knicks.
ref: 这场为期三周的难看审判是由尼克斯队前营销和商业运营高级副总裁布朗·桑德斯以1000万美元的诉讼费提起的。

src: She was fired by the team in December of 2006, and following her dismissal she filed the explosive lawsuit alleging that Madison Square Garden fostered an environment of sexism and inequality, personified by the conduct of Isiah Thomas.
ref: 2006年12月，她被队伍解雇，在被解雇后，她提起了爆炸性诉讼，指控麦迪逊广场花园队营造了一个性别歧视和不平等的环境，伊西娅·托马斯的行为就是其代表。

src: She stated that Thomas repeatedly called her a "bitch" and a "ho", and pressured her to kiss him and said that he loved her.
ref: 她说托马斯反复叫她“婊子”和“妓女”，说他爱她并强迫她吻他。

src: She also stated that the firing was the result of her filing a complaint about Thomas.
ref: 她还说，解雇是她投诉托马斯的结果。

src: Madison Square Garden, and the coach known for his charismatic and emotional demeanor, denied the charges.
ref: 麦迪逊广场花园队和以其魅力和情感风范而闻名的教练否认了指控。

src: After the guilty verdict was read, a relieved Browne Sanders hugged her family and friends who were present at the trial.
ref: 在宣读有罪判决后，布朗·桑德斯松了一口气，拥抱了在场的家人和朋友。

src: Thomas met with his lawyers, and while leaving the courthouse stated, "I'm innocent, very innocent, and I did not do the things she has accused me in this courtroom of doing."
ref: 托马斯会见了他的律师，在离开法院时说：“我是清白的，非常清白，我没有做她在法庭上指控我做的事情。”

src: "I'm extremely disappointed that the jury did not see the facts in this case."
ref: “陪审团没有看到此案的事实，我非常失望。”

src: "I will appeal this, and I remain confident in the man that I am and what I stand for and the family that I have."
ref: “我会上诉的，我对我所属的人，我所代表的人，以及我所拥有的家庭仍然充满信心。”

src: Madison Square Garden is also expected to appeal the decision.
ref: 麦迪逊广场花园队预计也将提起上诉。

src: President Bush is lobbying the U.S. House of Representatives to pass the Central America Free Trade Agreement (CAFTA), which is scheduled for a vote Wednesday night.
ref: 布什总统正在游说美国众议院通过中美洲自由贸易协定（CAFTA），该协定定于周三晚上进行投票。

src: Similar to the existing North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) among the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, CAFTA would create a free trade zone putting an end to most trade barriers between the United States and six additional countries, including Costa Rica, El Salvador, Honduras, Guatemala, Nicaragua, and the Dominican Republic.
ref: 与美国、加拿大和墨西哥之间现有的北美自由贸易协定（NAFTA）类似，CAFTA将建立一个自由贸易区，以结束美国与其他六个国家（包括哥斯达黎加、萨尔瓦多、洪都拉斯、危地马拉、尼加拉瓜和多米尼加共和国）之间的大多数贸易壁垒。

src: Many Republicans who represent agricultural Corn Belt or industrial Rust Belt and southern textile states in Congress also have stated opposition to the bill.
ref: 国会中许多代表农业玉米带或工业锈带和南方纺织州的共和党人也表示反对该法案。

src: But with a Republican majority in the House large enough to ensure passage of CAFTA, party leaders are trying to shore up enough votes to ensure CAFTA's passage.
ref: 但是，由于共和党在众议院的多数席位足以确保通过CAFTA，政党领导人正试图获得足够的选票，以确保通过CAFTA。

src: This has prompted last minute action by the President to lobby individual members of the House, reminding them that Central American countries have committed troops and other resources to fight the U.S. War on Terror.
ref: 这促使总统在最后一刻采取行动游说众议院的个别成员，提醒他们中美洲国家已投入军队和其他资源协助美国的反恐战争。

src: Other Republican leaders have been using the party's traditional pro-business message and linking it to homeland security issues.
ref: 其他共和党领导人一直在利用该党传统的亲商业信息，并将其与国土安全问题联系起来。

src: "Trade creates jobs and lifts people out of poverty and there's nothing like a stable society to fight terrorism and strengthen democracy, freedom and rule of law," Dennis Hastert, Speaker of the House, reportedly said at a news conference Tuesday.
ref: 据报道，众议院议长丹尼斯·哈斯特尔特周二在新闻发布会上说：“贸易创造了就业机会，使人们摆脱贫困，没有什么比一个稳定的社会更能打击恐怖主义，加强民主、自由和法治。”

src: CAFTA is "a bad deal for Central Americans and also for Latinos in this community... (with CAFTA) the exploitation of workers will continue in Central America," Democrat Representative Hilda Solis of Los Angeles said.
ref: CAFTA“对中美洲人和这个地区的拉丁裔人来说并不是什么好的协定……（与CAFTA）对工人的剥削将继续在中美洲进行，”来自洛杉矶的民主党代表希尔达·索利斯说。

src: Her views are common among Democrats, who are overwhelmingly against the treaty.
ref: 她的观点在绝大多数反对该条约的民主党人中很普遍。

src: According to opponents of CAFTA, the current trend of American jobs being sent to foreign countries, particularly in the information technology sector, would greatly expand under the treaty.
ref: CAFTA的反对者称，目前美国就业机会被吸引至外国的趋势，特别是在信息技术产业，将因为该协定大大提升。

src: "This will be a vote in the middle of the night."
ref: “这将是在午夜的投票。”

src: "They'll keep the vote open for several hours, in violation of the rules."
ref: “他们会违反规定，让投票持续几个小时。”

src: "If it passes, it will be by fewer than five votes," predicted Rep. Sherrod Brown, a Democrat from Ohio, according to a Washington Post report.
ref: 据《华盛顿邮报》报道，来自俄亥俄州的民主党众议员谢罗德·布朗预测：“如果投票通过的话，那总票数一定少于5票。”

src: The Canadian House of Commons will re-open the debate on same-sex marriage next Wednesday, December 6th, when it debates a resolution to reconsider the Civil Marriage Act that was passed by the previous Liberal-led parliament in 2005.
ref: 加拿大下议院将于12月6日星期三重新开启关于同性婚姻的辩论，届时将讨论重新考虑2005年前自由党领导的议会通过的“民事婚姻法”的决议。

src: In the intervening election, the victorious Conservatives promised that if they were elected parliament would hold a free vote on whether to amend or repeal the Act.
ref: 在干预选举中，胜利的保守党承诺，如果他们当选，议会将就是否修改或废除该法案进行自由投票。

src: Several surveys have suggested that MPs in the minority parliament will overwhelmingly reaffirm support for same-sex marriage once a vote has held.
ref: 几项调查显示，一旦举行投票，少数派议会的议员们将以压倒性优势重申对同性婚姻的支持。

src: The pro-same sex marriage group Canadians for Equal Marriage estimates that the motion will be defeated by at least 35 votes.
ref: 支持同性婚姻的加拿大人争取平等婚姻组织估计，该动议将被至少35票否决。

src: This has prompted supporters of same-sex marriage to urge that a vote be held as soon as possible while opponents of gay marriage have been urging the government to delay the vote until the next election, expected early in 2007, in hopes of the election of a Conservative majority that would repeal the act.
ref: 这促使同性婚姻的支持者敦促尽快举行投票，而同性婚姻的反对者则敦促政府将投票推迟到2007年初预期的下一次选举，希望通过保守党多数派的选举来废除该法案。

src: A number of Conservative MPs and strategists have supported an early vote, however, in the belief that the same-sex issue would hurt the Tories in an election campaign by emphasizing a social conservative agenda that is unpopular in urban areas and Quebec.
ref: 然而，一些保守党议员和战略家支持提前投票，他们认为同性问题会在竞选中损害保守党的利益，因为它强调了一项在城市地区和魁北克不受欢迎的社会保守派议程。

src: A Florida man was killed and another man hospitalized after their boat sank off Cape May, New Jersey, US.
ref: 在他们的船在美国新泽西州五月角沉没后一名佛罗里达男子死亡，另一名男子住院治疗。

src: The Sea Wolf sent a distress signal via emergency satellite beacon at about 1:35 AM on Thursday, seven miles off Cape May.
ref: 周四凌晨1点35分左右，“海狼”号通过应急卫星信标发出了遇险信号，距离五月角7英里。

src: A member of the State Police informed the Coast Guard who sent out an MH-65 rescue helicopter and two rescue launches.
ref: 一名州警察通知海岸警卫队派出了一架MH-65救援直升机和两艘救援艇。

src: The helicopter managed to save Steve Hopkins of the District of Columbia but was unable to do the same for Gregory Arlotta of Florida.
ref: 这架直升机成功地拯救了哥伦比亚特区的史蒂夫·霍普金斯，但却无法拯救佛罗里达州的格雷戈里·阿洛塔。

src: The 62 year old disappeared among the debris in eight-foot waves.
ref: 这位62岁的老人在八英尺高的海浪中消失了。

src: Arlotta had recently bought the vessel in New York; its previous owner was in his seventies and had decided to sell the ship.
ref: 阿洛塔最近在纽约买了这艘船，之前的船主已经70多岁，决定卖掉这艘船。

src: The Sea Wolf had been operating for a couple of decades prior to the sinking, and was described by one local as unfit for the voyage it was undertaking to New Orleans.
ref: “海狼号”在沉没前已经航行了几十年，当地的一位居民认为它不适合前往新奥尔良。

src: A 1963 Gilligan, it was designed for use within ten miles of shore for fishing.
ref: 1963年的吉利根号，设计用于离海岸十英里以内的捕鱼。

src: Mark Webber set up a third place for Red Bull, while his team-mate Sebastian Vettel was out of the race due to problems with the car's suspension.
ref: 马克·韦伯为红牛车队创造了第三名的成绩，而他的队友塞巴斯蒂安·维特尔则因为赛车的悬架问题退出了比赛。

src: Nico Rosberg drove his Williams up to fourth place, while the second McLaren of Heikki Kovalainen came fifth.
ref: 尼科·罗斯伯格驾驶他的威廉姆斯车队升至第四名，而迈凯轮车队的第二名海基·科瓦莱宁名列第五。

src: Championship leader Jenson Button gained two points for Brawn by finishing 7th and is now 18.5 points ahead of Webber, who has moved into second place ahead of Vettel.
ref: 冠军领跑者简森·巴顿以第七名的成绩为布朗拿下两分，现在领先韦伯18.5分，韦伯已经超越维特尔排名第二。

src: He split the two Toyota cars of Timo Glock and Jarno Trulli, who completed the top eight.
ref: 他将丰田的蒂莫·格洛克和雅诺·特鲁利的两辆车分成两组，这两辆车都进入了前八名。

src: The International Football Association Board (IFAB), the body that decides on the laws of the game, has decided to discontinue all experiments involving technology, and for the first time has also decided on the exact size of a soccer field.
ref: 国际足球协会理事会（IFAB）是决定足球比赛规则的机构，它决定停止所有涉及技术的实验，并首次决定足球场的确切大小。

src: Instead of pursuing the idea of using cameras or microchips in the ball to see if it has crossed the goal-line, the International Board wants to see if the introduction of two extra assistant referees can improve the quality of referee's decisions.
ref: 国际足联并不打算在球上安装摄像头或微芯片来检测球是否越过了球门线，而是希望增加两名助理裁判，以提高裁判的判罚质量。

src: FIFA general secretary Jerome Valcke declared: "We have decided to freeze for the time being the goal-line technology and all technology experiments."
ref: 国际足联秘书长杰罗姆·瓦尔克宣布：“我们已经决定暂时冻结球门线技术和所有技术实验。”

src: "We will look on these two additional referees and we avoid considering any goal-line technology during this time."
ref: “我们会考虑另外两名裁判，在此期间我们不会考虑任何球门线技术。”

src: FIFA President Sepp Blatter said the move was necessary to maintain the universal spirit of the game: "We have 260 million people directly involved in the game."
ref: 国际足联主席塞普·布拉特表示，这一举措对于保持比赛的普遍精神是必要的：“我们有2.6亿人直接参与比赛。”

src: "If we maintain the laws of the game ... it's so easy to understand ..."
ref: “如果我们维持比赛规则……这很容易理解……”。

src: "We have to live with errors, football has to keep its human face."
ref: “我们必须忍受错误，足球必须保持人性化。”

src: "We have to maintain the laws of the game in their simplicity."
ref: “我们必须以简洁的方式维护比赛规则。”

src: "Do you want technical devices to take decisions? That's why, after three years of tests with no conclusions, I am in favour of putting the whole thing on ice," Blatter explained.
ref: “你想让技术设备做出决定吗？”这就是为什么在三年的测试没有得出任何结论之后，我倾向于把整个事情搁置一边，布拉特解释道。

src: UEFA president Michel Platini agreed: "Football should stay human, but two more officials can help, especially around the goal."
ref: 欧足联主席普拉·蒂尼同意：“足球应该保持人性，但另外两名官员可以提供帮助，尤其是在球门附近。”

src: Platini made the suggestion to freeze all investigations into technology and to try two additional assistants behind each goal.
ref: 普拉·蒂尼建议冻结对技术的所有调查，并在每个球门后面再增加两名助手。

src: Blatter said the system using the microchip "was very complicated, needing electrified lines on the field of play and other devices including antennae and when we tested it in Tokyo last year there was one mistake during the seven matches we used as an experiment at the Club World Championship."
ref: 布拉特表示，使用这种微芯片的系统“非常复杂，需要在赛场上安装电气化线路，以及包括天线在内的其他设备。去年我们在东京测试时，我们在俱乐部世界锦标赛上用作实验的七场比赛中出现了一个错误。”

src: With regards to the system using cameras, he pointed to "problems with players obscuring the views of the cameras, or of flares or weather conditions."
ref: 关于摄像机使用系统，他指出存在“运动员遮挡摄像机视野，耀斑或天气状况等问题。”

src: The system of the extra referees will be tested at an upcoming FIFA or UEFA tournament, and a final ruling is expected at next year's meeting, according to FIFA's Jerome Valcke.
ref: 根据国际足联的杰罗姆·瓦克的说法，在即将举行的国际足联或欧洲足联锦标赛上，将对额外裁判员的制度进行测试，最终裁决将在明年的会议上做出。

src: Hawk-Eye, the company that was working on the goal-line technology that is already being used for line calls in tennis, reacted with disappointment: "I'm livid, it is completely out of the blue..."
ref: 鹰眼是一家致力于球门线技术的公司，该技术已经在网球比赛中被用于出线呼叫。鹰眼公司相关人士对此表示失望：“我脸色铁青，这完全出乎意料……”。

src: "A year ago they met and gave us four criteria to meet and we have met all of them, yet they have kicked it out now..."
ref: “一年前，他们达到了标准，给了我们四个标准，我们都达到了，但现在他们把它踢了出去……”。

src: "We have invested an awful lot of money and now we have no return on that investment," director Paul Hawkins said.
ref: “我们投入了大量资金，现在却没有任何回报”主管保罗·霍金斯说。

src: He said he was encouraged to continue research on the project only 10 days ago at a private showing for IFAB members at Reading's Madejski Stadium.
ref: 他说，就在10天前，在雷丁马代斯基体育场举行的IFAB成员私人展览上，他还被鼓励继续研究这个项目。

src: While the Welsh FA were also against the idea, the English Football Association supported the use of technology and was hoping to start using it by next season.
ref: 虽然威尔士足协也反对这一想法，但英国足球协会支持使用技术，并希望在下个赛季开始使用它。

src: The FA clubs and referees supported the use of Hawk-Eye technology, said Mike Foster, general secretary of the English Premier League.
ref: 英足总秘书长迈克·福斯特表示，英足总各俱乐部和裁判都支持鹰眼技术的使用。

src: A spokesperson of the Premier League said that "A lot of time, money and effort has gone into developing a system that meets all the criteria laid down last year."
ref: 英超联赛的一位发言人表示，“我们投入了大量的时间、金钱和精力来开发一个符合去年制定的所有标准的体系。”

src: The Scottish and Northern Irish FA also voted in favour of the goal-line technology.
ref: 苏格兰和北爱尔兰足协也投票赞成球门线技术。

src: FA chief executive Brian Barwick expressed his disappointment at the annual meeting of the IFAB in Gleneagles, Scotland: "We were in favour of goal-line technology but there will be no more experiments and it will not be back on the agenda next year, or in the foreseeable future."
ref: 英足总首席执行官布莱恩·巴威克在苏格兰格伦伊格尔斯举行的IFAB年会上表达了他的失望：“我们支持球门线技术，但不会再有更多的实验，它也不会在明年或可预见的未来重返议程。”

src: FIFA President Blatter denied ulterior motives for the decision: "There has been no change of heart."
ref: 国际足联主席布拉特否认了这一决定是别有用心的：“没有人改变主意。”

src: "I have defended goal-line technology but it has become clear that such systems are too complicated and very costly."
ref: “我一直在为球门线技术辩护，但很明显，这样的系统过于复杂，成本也非常高昂。”

src: "Nor would they necessarily add anything positive to the game and could harm the authority of the referee."
ref: “他们也不一定会给比赛增加任何积极的东西，而且可能会损害裁判的权威。”

src: Gidget, the chihuahua featured in the Taco Bell adverts in the United States has died from a stroke.
ref: 美国塔可钟广告中的吉娃娃吉吉特死于中风。

src: The dog died at the age of 15 on Tuesday night.
ref: 周二晚上，这只15岁的狗死了。

src: Sue Chipperton, the owner and trainer of Gidget commented saying, "She made so many people happy."
ref: 吉吉特的老板兼教练苏·奇普顿评论说：“她让很多人都很开心。”

src: The dog was featured in the 1990s adverts that ran from 1997 to 2000.
ref: 这只狗出现在上世纪90年代的广告中，广告从1997年持续到2000年。

src: Gidget was portrayed as a male dog and is remembered for the dubbed saying "Yo quiero Taco Bell" which is Spanish for "I want Taco Bell."
ref: 吉吉特被描绘为一只公狗，并且因为这句话“Yo quiero Taco Bell”而被人们记住，这是西班牙语“我想要塔可钟”的意思。

src: The advert was meant to be shown only once but was turned into a campaign.
ref: 这则广告本打算只播放一次，但却变成了一场宣传活动。

src: Gidget was also featured in Legally Blonde 2 and adverts for the board game Trivial Pursuit.
ref: 吉吉特还出现在《律政俏佳人2》和棋盘游戏《平凡的追求》的广告中。

src: Israeli soldiers are in the process of removing Jewish protesters from synagogues in Neve Dekalim and Kfar Darom in the Gaza Strip as part of an operation to force the evacuation of settlements.
ref: 以色列士兵正在把加沙地带内夫·德卡里姆和法尔·达罗姆犹太教堂的犹太抗议者赶出去，这是迫使定居点撤离行动的一部分。

src: The settlement of Neve Dekalim was founded in 1983 and was home to 500 Orthodox Jewish families.
ref: 内夫·德卡里姆定居点建于1983年，是500个正统犹太家庭的家园。

src: It also was occupied earlier before back in the 1940s, settled by a couple Jewish families who were able to hold off the Eygptian army.
ref: 早在20世纪40年代它就被占领了，由一对犹太家庭定居下来，他们阻止了埃及军队的进攻。

src: Around 1,500 protesters inside the synagogue refused to leave despite warnings from the soldiers.
ref: 尽管士兵发出警告，但犹太教堂内约有1,500名抗议者拒绝离开。

src: Many protesters have been retaliating to the soldiers' commands, and have even started shoving and punching a few guards.
ref: 许多抗议者对士兵的命令进行了报复，甚至开始推搡和殴打一些警卫。

src: The protesters have linked their arms in a chain to attempt to prevent themselves being removed.
ref: 抗议者们手拉手连在一起，试图阻止自己被驱赶出去。

src: The protesters are mostly not Gaza settlers, but are extremist youths from the West Bank and Israel.
ref: 抗议者大多不是加沙定居者，而是来自约旦河西岸和以色列的极端青年。

src: After several hours of unsuccessful negotiations unarmed security forces entered the complex to begin removing people to buses waiting outside.
ref: 经过几个小时的不成功谈判，非武装的安全部队进入综合大楼，开始将人员送到外面等候的公共汽车上。

src: Those who did not go as instructed were usually escorted by two or three guards each to the buses.
ref: 那些没有按照指示行事的人通常由两三个警卫护送到公共汽车上。

src: Meanwhile, all male protesters have been removed from the building while the female protesters are still inside the synagogue.
ref: 与此同时，所有男性抗议者都被赶出了大楼，而女抗议者仍然在犹太教堂内。

src: In another Gaza town, Kfar Darom, protesters are also making their last stand in a synagogue, and thousands of troops have surrounded the buildings.
ref: 在加沙的另一个城镇法达罗姆，抗议者也在犹太教堂进行最后的抵抗，数千名军队包围了这些建筑。

src: There, soldiers entered the synagogue as well and are dragging protesters out of the building.
ref: 在那里，士兵也进入了犹太教堂，并将抗议者拖出大楼。

src: They were, however, hampered by protesters on the roof, who, among other things, threw caustic soda at the soldiers.
ref: 然而，他们受到屋顶上抗议者的阻挠，他们向士兵们投掷烧碱等物品。

src: Consequently, the rooftop was taken by security forces as well.
ref: 因此，屋顶也被安全部队占领。

src: Seventy seven people have been injured, two moderately on the roof of the synagogue.
ref: 有77人受伤，其中两人在犹太教堂屋顶受伤。

src: Nearly 330,000 people in San Diego County, California located in the United States are being ordered to evacuate after massive wildfires started to spread and grow.
ref: 在大规模野火开始蔓延和火势变猛之后，美国加州圣地亚哥近33万人被命令撤离。

src: As a result, U.S. President George W. Bush has declared a state of emergency in California clearing the way for federal aid assistance.
ref: 结果，美国总统乔治·W·布什宣布加州的紧急状态为联邦援助扫清了道路。

src: "All of us across this nation are concerned for the families who have lost their homes and the many families who have been evacuated from their homes."
ref: “全国人民都为那些失去家园的家庭和许多被迫撤离家园的家庭感到担忧。”

src: "We send the help of the federal government," said Bush in a statement to the press.
ref: “我们提供联邦政府援助，”布什在向媒体发表的声明中表示。

src: Almost 1,500 houses have been burned to ashes and fires continue to threaten nearly 60,000 more.
ref: 将近1500所房屋被烧成灰烬，火灾继续威胁到近6万所房屋。

src: Firefighters now fear that the fires could merge into one giant blaze if the Santa Ana Winds continue sending close to if not over 500,000 people running for safety.
ref: 消防队员现在担心，如果圣安娜风继续使近50万人，即使不超过50万人，为了安全而奔跑，大火可能会演变成一场大型火灾。

src: One person has died as a result of the fires with 42 injured.
ref: 火灾造成一人死亡，42人受伤。

src: 16 of those are reported to be firefighters who were battling the blazes.
ref: 据报道，其中16人是与火焰作斗争的消防员。

src: "It will not end ... until it reaches the ocean or the winds turn around," said San Diego County Fire Battalion Chief, Bruce Cartelli.
ref: “这不会结束……直到它到达海边或风向逆转，”圣地亚哥县消防营长布鲁斯·卡特利说。

src: At least 13 wildfires have burned more than 356,000 acres (142,400 hectares) in areas stretching from San Diego, near the border with Mexico, to Malibu, near Los Angeles.
ref: 在从墨西哥边境附近的圣地亚哥到洛杉矶附近的马里布，至少有13场野火烧毁了超过356,000英亩（142,400公顷）的土地。

src: Air Station Miramar for the U.S. Air Force is also being evacuated with the base's planes and other military equipment being transported away from the raging fires to Arizona and places far north of the fires in California.
ref: 美国空军米拉玛空军基地也在撤离，基地的飞机和其他军事设备也被从熊熊大火中转移到亚利桑那州和加利福尼亚州大火以北的地方。

src: The Speaker of the Bundestag, Wolfgang Thierse, welcomed the decision and urged the parties to conduct fair campaigns.
ref: 德国联邦议院议长沃尔夫冈·蒂尔斯对这一决定表示欢迎，并敦促两党开展公平的竞选活动。

src: Chancellor Schröder also paid his respect to Köhler, calling his decision confident and again expressed that he intents to resume the good way on which Germany is heading under his leadership.
ref: 施罗德总理也对科勒表示敬意，称他的决定充满信心，并再次表示，他有意恢复德国在他的领导下前进的良好道路。

src: The Chair of the conservative Christian Democrats (CDU) and her party's candidate for chancellor, Angela Merkel, welcomed the call for early elections and wants to get Germany on the right track if her party gets to power in September.
ref: 保守的基督教民主联盟（CDU）主席和她所在政党的总理候选人安格拉·默克尔对提前选举的呼吁表示欢迎，并希望如果她的政党在9月掌权，能让德国走上正轨。

src: The dissolving is the result of a long political muddle that began on May 22th when Schröder's Social Democrats (SPD) lost the most populous state of Germany, North Rhine-Westphalia, to the CDU, the biggest opposition party.
ref: 解散是一场长期的政治混乱的结果，这场混乱始于5月22日，当时施罗德的社会民主党（SPD）在人口最多的德国北莱茵-威斯特伐利亚州输给了最大的反对党CDU。

src: Minutes after the early projections were in, SPD chair Franz Müntefering announced that his party would seek re-election in fall of 2005.
ref: 在初步预测公布几分钟后，社民党主席弗朗茨·芒特费林宣布，社民党将在2005年秋季寻求连任。

src: However, the Basic Law of Germany does not permit the self-dissolving of the Bundestag.
ref: 但是，德国的“基本法”不允许联邦议院自行解散。

src: The only way to achieve early elections is when the chancellor loses a motion of confidence.
ref: 实现提前选举的唯一途径是总理失去一项信任动议。

src: All major parties, including the opposition, support the call for early election.
ref: 所有主要政党，包括反对派，都支持提前选举的呼吁。

src: Polls also indicate that 75% of the population support going to the ballots in September.
ref: 民调还显示，百分之七十五的民众支持9月份的投票。

src: However, some MP's, most notably Werner Schulz of SPD's coalition partner, The Greens, say that the procedure was unconstitutional because the loss of confidence was orchestrated.
ref: 然而，一些议员，尤其是社民党的联合伙伴绿党的沃纳·舒尔茨表示，这一程序违宪，因为信心的丧失是精心策划的。

src: They announced that they will sue against the dissolving before the Constitutional Court of Germany.
ref: 他们宣布将向德国宪法法院提起诉讼，反对解散。

src: Germany has been struggling with high unemployment for several years and the reforms Schröder introduced were criticized as being neo-liberalistic by unions and also by members of his own party.
ref: 多年来，德国一直在努力应对高失业率，施罗德所引入的改革被工会以及他自己党派的成员批评为新自由主义者。

src: Current polls see the CDU at 44%, while the SPD can only expect 27%.
ref: 目前的民意调查显示CDU为44％，而SPD只达到27％。

src: The liberal FDP, CDU's possible coalition partner, can expect 7%, The Greens 8% and the Party of the Left (formerly PDS) 11%.
ref: 基民盟可能的联合伙伴自由民主党FDP的支持率预计为百分之七，绿党为百分之八，左翼党（前PDS）为百分之十一。

src: The governing SPD-Green coalition is faced with an overwhelming opposition majority in the Bundesrat, the upper chamber, that is able to block most bills.
ref: 执政的社民党-绿党联盟在上议院联邦参议院面临着压倒性的多数反对意见，能够阻止多数法案的通过。

src: Schröder claims that the CDU is engaging in a policy of blockade rendering him unable to make laws and implement policy changes while Angela Merkel, says that Schröder's government is simply incapable to take action.
ref: 施罗德声称，基民盟实行的封锁政策使他无法制定法律和实施政策改革，而安格拉·默克尔则表示，施罗德政府根本无力采取行动。

src: The Albuquerque Academy eighth grade basketball team used tough defense to close out the 2005-2006 season with a win, 46-30 over Los Lunas.
ref: 阿尔伯克基学院八年级篮球队在2005-2006赛季以46-30大胜洛斯卢纳斯，用强硬的防守结束了赛季。

src: The Chargers spread things evenly in the first quarter; five players scored for the team in the period.
ref: 该学院的冲锋者队在第一节一切都很顺利；在此期间有五名球员为球队得分。

src: Both forward Jon Cabarrus and guard Dylan Gordon followed their own shots and scored on putbacks.
ref: 前锋乔恩·卡巴鲁斯和后卫迪伦·戈登都在投篮后进行跟进并补篮得分。

src: Forwards Xavier Moya and Chris Thompson provided tough inside defense on one possession.
ref: 前锋泽维尔·莫亚和克里斯·汤普森在一次进攻中提供了强硬的内线防守。

src: While Los Lunas managed several rebounds, they were unable to get any baskets over the outstretched arms of Moya and Thompson.
ref: 虽然洛斯卢纳斯队抢下了几个篮板，但他们没能从莫亚和汤普森伸出的手臂上投篮得分。

src: Cabarrus scored on another putback for his fourth points of the game late in the quarter, helping Academy to a twelve to eight lead at the end of the first.
ref: 卡巴鲁斯在本节比赛的尾段补篮得到了本场比赛的第四分，帮助阿尔伯克基学院队在第一节结束时以12比8领先。

src: The second period was a low scoring one for both teams.
ref: 对于两支球队来说，第二节的得分都很低。

src: The Chargers scored just nine points, but also held Los Lunas to only three.
ref: 冲锋者队仅得到9分，但也只让洛斯卢纳斯队拿到了3分。

src: Both offenses were struggling when guard Andrew Matthew stole the ball and made a pass to Gordan, who threw another pass to fellow guard Jordan Fleisher, who took the ball and scored on a layup.
ref: 双方进攻都非常拼，此时后卫安德鲁·马修把球抢断并把球传给戈登，后者又把球传给队友后卫乔丹·弗莱舍，然后带球上篮得分。

src: With a minute in the half, reserve Matt Brown took a pass and drove the length of the court for a layup.
ref: 半场结束前一分钟，替补队员马特·布朗接到一个传球，在全场带球上篮。

src: Academy ended the second half with a twenty-one to eleven lead.
ref: 学院队在上半场结束时以21比11领先。

src: Academy again spread the ball around in the second half, with eight Charger players scoring.
ref: 下半场，学院队再次全场拉开传球，有八名球员得分。

src: Leading the way in the second half was Patrick Zacharias, who scored seven points in the half.
ref: 帕特里克·扎卡里亚斯控制了下半场的比赛，他贡献了7分。

src: Gordon connected with Thompson on a play that gave Thompson a layup.
ref: 戈登与汤普森做了一个配合并由汤普森上篮得分。

src: Gordon stole the ball away from Los Lunas and made a pass to Thompson while sandwiched between two Los Lunas defenders.
ref: 戈登从洛斯卢纳斯队员手中抢断球，在两名洛斯卢纳斯后卫的夹击中把球传给汤普森。

src: Thompson received the pass under the basket and scored on a layup.
ref: 汤普森在篮下接到传球并上篮得分。

src: Los Lunas came back with a three pointer by #24 and some layups by other players.
ref: 洛斯卢纳斯队回过神来，由24号投进了一个三分，其他球员也上篮得分。

src: The quarter ended with Academy still holding the lead, 33-22.
ref: 本节结束时学院队仍以33-22领先。

src: AA was again playing tough defense midway through the fourth quarter until #32 hit a three pointer, sparking a small Los Lunas rally, but it was not enough to overcome the offense and defense of the Chargers.
ref: AA（阿尔伯克基学院）队在第四节中段为止一直打出了强硬的防守，直到对方32号投中一个三分，并带动洛斯卢纳斯队打出一个得分高潮，但这还不足以战胜冲锋者队的进攻和防守。

src: Zacharias scored on a tip in of a Gordon shot that hung on the rim and fell out.
ref: 戈登的投篮碰到篮筐偏出，扎卡雷斯用手轻点得分。

src: Zacharias was also fouled on the shot and made the free throw to complete the three point play.
ref: 扎卡利亚斯在投篮时被犯规，由他罚球完成了三分得分。

src: Team manager Lincoln Stanfield also saw action in the game, and even scored his first points of the season at the end of the fourth quarter.
ref: 球队经理林肯·斯坦菲尔德也在比赛中表现出色，甚至在第四节结束时拿到了本赛季的第一次得分。

src: With less than fifteen seconds left, Stanfield received a pass underneath the basket.
ref: 还剩不到15秒，斯坦菲尔德在篮下接到一个传球。

src: His shot didn't fall, but he was fouled with seven seconds left.
ref: 他的投篮没有命中，但他在还剩7秒时被犯规。

src: Stanfield's first free throw bounced up after hitting the rim but didn't fall through.
ref: 斯坦菲尔德的第一个罚球击中篮筐后弹了起来，但没有掉进篮筐。

src: His second shot bounced high in the air two times before falling through the hoop.
ref: 他的第二次罚篮高高地在空中弹了两下才落入篮筐。

src: Stanfield threw his arms up in celebration over his made shot, putting an end to Academy's 14-1 season.
ref: 斯坦菲尔德举起双手庆祝他的得分，以14-1的战绩结束了学院队的赛季。

src: Arung Samudera, the Indonesian naval tall ship that was recently grounded off Queensland, Australia, has been salvaged from the beach at Inskip Point and is currently being towed to Brisbane for repairs.
ref: 最近在澳大利亚昆士兰州搁浅的印尼海军“阿荣萨穆德拉号”高船，已在因斯基普角的海滩被打捞上来，目前正被拖往布里斯班进行维修。

src: The 35m vessel has been stranded since last Thursday, when she was grounded whilst on her way to the APEC meeting in Sydney.
ref: 这艘35米长的船只自上周四以来一直搁浅，当时它正在前往悉尼参加亚太经合组织会议的途中。

src: The ship is expected to berth in Brisbane near the naval barracks at approximately 11 a.m. (AEST).
ref: 该船预计将于上午11点（澳大利亚东部标准时间）在布里斯班靠近海军营房停泊。

src: The tri-masted sailing training vessel, built in New Zealand, is believed to be seaworthy, but has serious damage to her keel and rudder.
ref: 在新西兰建造的三桅帆船训练船被认为是适航的，但龙骨和方向舵有严重损伤。

src: After the completion of repairs, the ship is expected to continue to Sydney, although it will not reach it in time for the APEC meeting.
ref: 维修完成后，预计该船将继续驶往悉尼，但赶不上悉尼APEC会议。

src: The ship's 18-man crew are said to be "very happy" with developments.
ref: 据称，这艘船的18名船员对事态发展“非常满意”。

src: According to the Australian Navy's Commander Forbes Peters, Indonesian officials are as pleased as the ships crew, with Peters saying "The naval attache and the first secretary to the ambassador are on site here and they cuddled Lieutenant Commander Larry Cook."
ref: 据澳大利亚海军司令福布斯·彼得斯称，印尼官员和船员们一样高兴，彼得斯说：“海军专员和大使第一秘书都在现场，他们拥抱了海军中将拉里·库克。”

src: "They are over the moon and I'm sure the commanding officer is as well, even though he's currently at sea on his ship."
ref: “他们非常高兴，我相信指挥官也非常高兴，尽管他目前正在他的船上航行。”

src: Palestinian gunmen have reportedly kidnapped two foreign journalists working for Fox News, a news company owned by parent-company News Corp.
ref: 据报道，巴勒斯坦枪手绑架了两名为福克斯新闻公司工作的外国记者，福克斯新闻公司是母公司新闻集团旗下的新闻集团。

src: A Palestinian witness who worked with the journalists, said that American reporter Steve Centanni, and Olaf Wiig, a cameraman from New Zealand were taken against their will.
ref: 与记者一起工作的一名巴勒斯坦目击者说，美国记者史蒂夫·森坦尼和来自新西兰的摄影师奥拉夫·韦格被强行带走。

src: New Zealand Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade spokeswoman Helen Tunnah said that the ministry had not received any information on the kidnapping.
ref: 新西兰外交和贸易部发言人海伦·图纳说，外交部没有收到任何关于绑架的信息。

src: Fox News said that they did not know who captured the journalists but said that "We can confirm that two of our people were taken against their will in Gaza," and that "negotiations were under way to secure their release."
ref: 福克斯新闻表示，他们不知道是谁逮捕了这两名记者，但表示，“我们可以证实，我们的两名人员在加沙被强行带走”，“有关方面正在进行谈判，以确保他们获释。”

src: The incident began when two vehicles blocked the transmission truck, labelled 'TV', and their bodyguard was forced to the ground at gunpoint by a masked man.
ref: 事件起因是两辆车挡住了标有“TV”字样的传输卡车，他们的保镖被一名蒙面男子用枪逼倒在地。

src: Hamas, the Islamic militant group that heads Gaza's government, did not claim responsibility, and condemned the kidnapping.
ref: 领导加沙政府的伊斯兰激进组织哈马斯没有宣称对此负责，并谴责绑架事件。

src: Fox News Vice President John Moody said in an internal message to Fox News personnel that "The rumors are true: two of our employees have been abducted in Gaza."
ref: 福克斯新闻副总裁约翰·穆迪在给福克斯新闻工作人员的内部消息中说，“谣言是真的：我们的两名员工在加沙被绑架了。”

src: "Do not comment officially and of course, not on the air, about it."
ref: “不要正式发表评论，当然，也不要在电视上发表评论。”

src: Parties to a lawsuit against Amazon.com agreed September 25 to a proposed settlement resolving claims that Amazon unlawfully deleted content from users' Kindle reading devices.
ref: 9月25日，针对亚马逊的诉讼各方同意一项拟议的和解协议，解决有关亚马逊非法删除用户Kindle阅读设备内容的指控。

src: Justin Gawronski, a Michigan high school senior, and Antoine Bruguier, a California engineer, had sued on July 30, after Amazon deleted George Orwell's Nineteen Eighty-Four from their Kindles.
ref: 密歇根高中四年级学生贾斯汀·加沃伦斯基和加州工程师安托万·布鲁吉尔于7月30日起诉亚马逊，此前亚马逊将乔治·奥威尔的《一九八四》从Kindles上删除。

src: Gawronski also said his digital notes lost value because they were no longer associated with the relevant text.
ref: 加夫龙斯基还说，他的数字笔记失去了价值，因为它们不再与相关文本相关联。

src: The plaintiffs argued that Amazon had breached its terms of service and violated the Computer Fraud and Abuse Act and Washington Consumer Protection Act.
ref: 原告辩称，亚马逊违反了其服务条款，违反了“计算机欺诈和滥用法案”和“华盛顿消费者保护法”。

src: Amazon had first claimed it was forced to delete the books when it learned it did not have the right to sell them.
ref: 亚马逊首先声称，当它了解到没有权利出售书籍时，它被迫删除了这些书籍。

src: However, it apologized on July 23 and on September 7 offered affected customers either US$30 or a copy of the deleted book.
ref: 但是，它在7月23日和9月7日道歉，向受影响的客户提供了30美元或已删除书籍的副本。

src: The proposed settlement includes a commitment that Amazon will only delete e-books remotely under four circumstances: the user consents, the user fails to pay or gets a refund, the government mandates it, or the deletion is necessary to "protect" the consumer, device, or network.
ref: 这份和解协议包括，亚马逊将在以下四种情况下远程删除电子书：用户同意、用户未能付款或退款、政府强制要求删除，或者删除是为了“保护”消费者、设备或网络。

src: Amazon would also pay KamberEdelson, the plaintiffs' firm, US$150,000 in legal fees, with the proviso that it go to charity.
ref: 亚马逊还将向原告公司坎贝雷德森支付15万美元的诉讼费，但附带条件是要捐给慈善机构。

src: Michael Aschenbrener, an attorney at KamberEdelson, described the agreement as a "great settlement" that "provides protection for Kindle users and provides confidence to them that the books, newspapers and magazines they purchase will not be subject to remote deletion by Amazon."
ref: 坎贝雷德森律师迈克尔·阿森布伦纳称，该协议是一项“伟大的和解”，“为Kindle用户提供了保护，并让他们相信，他们购买的书籍、报纸和杂志不会被亚马逊远程删除。”

src: "It sends a message to digital media purveyors of all kinds that sellers really need to respect users' rights to that content."
ref: “它向各类数字媒体供应商发出了一个信息，那就是卖家真的需要尊重用户对这些内容的权利。”

src: An 18-year-old UK student suspected of throwing a fire extinguisher from the roof of the headquarters of the Conservative Party ('Tories'), 30 Millbank, London, was arrested on Monday.
ref: 周一，伦敦米尔班克30号，一名18岁的英国学生因涉嫌从保守党总部楼顶投掷灭火器而被捕。

src: He was today released on bail after a court appearance.
ref: 他在今天出庭后获准保释。

src: Edward Woollard, who is studying A-levels in Philosophy, Politics, and Classics, at Brockenhurst College in the New Forest, attended last Wednesday's student protests in London, before following a crowd of around 200 students into the Tory HQ and making it to the building's roof, whilst the rest of the building was vandalised.
ref: 爱德华·伍拉德正在新森林的布罗肯赫斯特学院学习哲学、政治和古典文学的A级课程，他参加了上周三在伦敦举行的学生抗议活动，随后跟随大约200名学生进入保守党总部，到达大楼的屋顶，而大楼的其余部分遭到破坏。

src: Watched by thousands of students gathered outside, a fire extinguisher was thrown from the roof, giving glancing blows to two police officers on the ground 70 feet (21 metres) below.
ref: 在数千名学生聚集在外面的注视下，一个灭火器从屋顶上被扔了下来，砸向70英尺（21米）以下地面上的两名警官。

src: Over sixty arrests have been made in conjunction with the protest.
ref: 与抗议活动有关的60多人被逮捕。

src: The sixth-form student, who was wanted on suspicion of attempted murder earlier this week, handed himself in at his local police station and was taken to Belgravia police station for questioning.
ref: 这名六年级学生本周早些时候因涉嫌谋杀未遂而被通缉，他在当地警察局自首，随后被带到贝尔格拉维亚警察局接受审问。

src: Today, he appeared at Westminster Magistrates' Court charged with violent disorder, speaking only to confirm his name age and address.
ref: 今天，他在威斯敏斯特地方法院出庭，被指控有暴力行为，但他只是确认了自己的姓名、年龄和地址。

src: His lawyer, Matthew Foot, sought adjournment to examine video evidence, and the trial was adjourned until 24 November.
ref: 他的律师马修·富特要求休庭以审查录像证据，审判被推迟到11月24日。

src: Until then, Woollard has been granted bail, on condition that he remains at his current address, and does not enter the City of Westminster.
ref: 在此之前，伍拉德已经获准保释，条件是他必须留在目前的住所，而且不能进入威斯敏斯特市。

src: A series of explosions have hit an Albanian arms depot near Tirana, leaving at least 155 people injured.
ref: 阿尔巴尼亚首都地拉那附近的一个军火库发生一系列爆炸，造成至少155人受伤。

src: Juela Mecani, spokesperson for Albamian PM Sali Berisha, said to Reuters "We do not know the exact number (of casualties) but we fear the worst for the three teams, each of 21 people, working there at the time."
ref: 阿尔巴缅总理萨利·贝里沙的发言人朱埃拉·梅卡尼对路透社说：“我们不知道确切的伤亡人数，但是我们担心当时在那里工作的三个小组，每个小组有21人，他们的情况会更糟。”

src: The three teams referred to were dismantling obsolete munitions stored there, as part of a programme to remove Stalinist era arms and modernize the military in order to qualify for an invitation to join NATO next month.
ref: 被提到的三个小组正在拆除储存在那里的陈旧弹药，作为拆除斯大林时代武器和使军队现代化的计划的一部分，以便有资格获得下个月加入北约的邀请。

src: Injured people have been rushed to hospitals amid ongoing explosions, which Interior Ministry spokesman Avni Neza says have prevented helicopters landing in the area.
ref: 在持续发生的爆炸中，受伤人员被迅速送往医院，内政部发言人艾夫尼·内扎说，爆炸阻止了直升机降落在该地区。

src: The wounded are suffering from burns, concussion, broken limbs and shrapnel injuries.
ref: 伤者患有烧伤、脑震荡、四肢骨折和弹片伤。

src: Meanwhile, Neza says police and army units are attempting to reach the area in armored cars.
ref: 与此同时，内扎说，警察和军队部队正试图乘坐装甲车抵达该地区。

src: Albanian health minister Nard Ndoka said that the 155 known to be hospitalized so far had to make their way to nearby villages as the ongoing explosions had also prevented road ambulances reaching the scene.
ref: 阿尔巴尼亚卫生部长纳尔德·恩多卡说，到目前为止，目前已知的155名住院患者不得不前往附近的村庄，因为持续的爆炸也阻止了公路救护车到达现场。

src: Tirana Airport spokesman Arlinda Causholli said glass windows and doors at the airport, a few kilometers from the site, were shattered by the initial series of explosions.
ref: 地拉那机场发言人阿林达·考索利说，距离现场几公里远的机场玻璃门窗被最初的一系列爆炸震碎。

src: "We evacuated passengers from the affected area and suspended flights for around 30 minutes," he said.
ref: 他说：“我们从受灾地区疏散了乘客，并暂停了大约30分钟的航班。”

src: "Terrified people are leaving the area on foot along the highway, women and children…"
ref: “惊恐的人们沿着高速公路步行离开该地区，妇女和儿童……”。

src: "Cars with broken windows have been abandoned on the highway."
ref: “窗户被打破的汽车被遗弃在高速公路上。”

src: Local media reports Tirana residents rushing to donate blood to help with the emergency.
ref: 当地媒体报道说，地拉那的居民纷纷献血，帮助应对紧急情况。

src: Explosions were felt in Tirana and in Durres, 20km (12 miles) from the base.
ref: 距基地20公里（12英里）的地拉那和杜尔斯都能感受到爆炸。

src: In the nearby village of Gerdec, some residents fled to the hills, while others sought shelter in concrete bunkers built by late Stalinist leader Enver Hoxha.
ref: 在附近的格德克村，一些居民逃到山上，其他人则躲在已故斯大林主义领导人恩维尔·霍克沙建造的混凝土掩体里。

src: The initial blast was heard 150km away in Macedonia and Serbia
ref: 在150公里外的马其顿和塞尔维亚都听到了最初的爆炸声。

src: The City of Brampton in Ontario, Canada, and Marikina in the Philippines have recently been "twinned".
ref: 加拿大安大略省的布兰普顿市和菲律宾的马里基纳市最近结成了“姐妹市”。

src: Both cities are roughly the same size, both have female mayors, both are near urban destinations (one of Toronto, the other Manila) and feel they can benefit economically with each other.
ref: 这两个城市的面积大致相同，都有女市长，都靠近城市目的地（一个是多伦多，另一个是马尼拉），都觉得彼此可以在经济上受益。

src: Mayor Susan Fennell of Brampton commented "This twinning agreement between Brampton and Marikina City will not only provide new and exciting economic possibilities, but it is an excellent chance to recognize and celebrate the Filipino community in Brampton."
ref: 布兰普顿市长苏珊·芬内尔评论说：“布兰普顿市和马里基纳市之间的这一友好协议不仅将提供新的、令人兴奋的经济机会，而且是认可和赞扬布兰普顿菲律宾社区的绝佳机会。”

src: "As one of Canada's most diverse cities, Brampton is home to more than 8,000 Filipino residents with a distinct culture, and I am pleased to be able to celebrate that culture with this agreement."
ref: “作为加拿大最多样化的城市之一，布兰普顿有8000多名菲律宾居民，他们有着独特的文化，我很高兴能够通过这项协议来赞扬这种文化。”

src: The Philippine economy grew by 5.9%, annual rate, during the second quarter of 2012 which is less than the first quarter's figure of more than 6% annual rate, as reported by The Associated Press.
ref: 据美联社报道，2012年第二季度菲律宾经济同比增长百分之5.9，低于第一季度百分之6以上的增速。

src: According to Economic Planning Secretary Arsenio Balisacan, strong domestic demand from the services sector and spending from money remitted by expatriate Filipinos helped boost the nation's economy despite the ongoing global economic crisis.
ref: 据经济规划部长阿塞尼奥·巴利萨坎称，尽管全球经济危机持续，但服务业强劲的国内需求和菲律宾侨民汇来的资金支出帮助提振了该国的经济。

src: In spite of this growth, numerous risks still lurk around the corner, said Balisacan.
ref: 巴利萨坎说，尽管有这种增长，但仍有许多风险潜伏在隐秘处。

src: He said that changes in China and the El Niño remain as the biggest challenges to the economy.
ref: 他说，中国的变化和厄尔尼诺现象仍然是经济面临的最大挑战。

src: Balsican also noted that poor infrastructure may also have a negative impact although spending on infrastructure, which may cost nearly $200 million in investment, may contribute to growth.
ref: 巴利萨坎还指出，基础设施薄弱也可能会产生负面影响，尽管基础设施的投资可能会导致增长，这可能需要近2亿美元的投资。

src: The Philippines central bank has cut key interest rates three times already this year in order to continue this economic expansion.
ref: 菲律宾央行今年已经三次下调基准利率，以继续经济扩张。

src: Analysts, such as economist Eugene Leow of Singapore-based DBS bank, agree that, "There is definitely room to further cut rates if needed," in order to promote further growth.
ref: 新加坡星展银行经济学家尤金·利奥等分析师一致认为，“如果需要，肯定有进一步降息的空间”，以促进进一步增长。

src: The unemployment rate in the Eurozone, or the sixteen countries in which the euro is used, reached ten percent last December, for the first time since the euro was introduced in 1999.
ref: 去年12月，欧元区16个使用欧元的国家的失业率达到百分之10，这是自1999年引入欧元以来的首次。

src: A ten-percent jobless rate was initially recorded in November, although that was later revised down to 9.9%.
ref: 在11月失业率最初记录为百分之十，尽管后来被修正为百分之9.9。

src: According to Eurostat, 15.8 million people now are without jobs in the Eurozone.
ref: 据欧盟统计局统计，目前欧元区有1580万人没有工作。

src: For all 27 countries in the European Union, 23 million people collectively are unemployed.
ref: 对于欧盟的所有27个国家，共有2300万人失业。

src: Eurostat reports that 87,000 jobs were lost throughout the eurozone in December, the smallest loss since May.
ref: 欧盟统计局报告称，整个欧元区12月份共有8.7万人失业，这是自5月份以来的最小降幅。

src: Latvia had the highest jobless rate for the EU, at 22.8%, whilst Spain has the highest for the eurozone, at 19.5%.
ref: 拉脱维亚的失业率最高，为22.8％，而西班牙是欧元区最高的失业率，为19.5％。

src: The two countries with the lowest unemployment rates were the Netherlands and Austria, with jobless figures of 4% and 5.4%, respectively.
ref: 失业率最低的两个国家是荷兰和奥地利，失业率分别为4％和5.4％。

src: An analyst for IHS Global Insight, Howard Archer, commented on the figures.
ref: IHS全球洞察力的分析师霍华德·阿彻对这些数据发表了评论。

src: "Although the rise in eurozone unemployment has slowed in recent months, it still seems poised to trend higher during much, if not all, of 2010," he noted.
ref: 他指出：“尽管最近几个月欧元区失业率的上升有所放缓，但在2010年的大部分时间里，如果不是全部的话，失业率似乎仍有上升趋势”。

src: Leader of the Japanese opposition Democratic Party of Japan, Yukio Hatoyama, won a majority of votes in the House of Representatives of Japan in the Japanese general election on Sunday.
ref: 日本反对党民主党领导人鸠山由纪夫周日在日本大选中获得日本众议院多数票。

src: He will be named the 93rd Prime Minister of Japan.
ref: 他将被任命为日本第93任首相。

src: Hatoyama ran against now former Prime Minister of Japan and Liberal Democratic Party leader Taro Aso.
ref: 鸠山由纪夫的对手是日本前首相、自民党党魁麻生太郎。

src: The results of the election were announced today, less that two and a half hours after polling stations closed, and end 54 years of nearly unbroken rule by the LDP.
ref: 选举结果今天公布，距离投票站关闭不到两个半小时，结束了自民党54年几乎没有间断的统治。

src: It has been estimated that roughly 30% of LDP supporters voted for the victorious DPJ, mainly due to the current economic climate.
ref: 据估计，大约30％的自民党支持者投票支持胜利的民主党，主要是由于目前的经济环境。

src: The Liberal Democratic Party was left with just 57 of 480 total seats.
ref: 自由民主党在480个席位中仅剩57个席位。

src: Outgoing Prime Minister Taro Aso has promised to resign as party leader, saying, "I believe this is the judgement of the public and we have to accept that and reflect on what we did."
ref: 即将卸任的首相麻生太郎已承诺辞去党的领导职务，并表示，“我相信这是公众的判断，我们必须接受这一点并反思我们所做的事情。”

src: "The people have shown their disappointment with the party and I have to accept that as my destiny."
ref: “人们已经表现出对党的失望，我不得不接受这一点作为我的命运。”

src: Aso also said that he will stay on as leader until a new one is chosen.
ref: 麻生太郎还表示，在选出新的领导者之前他将继续担任领导者。

src: The Democratic Party has already informally allocated a number of cabinet positions and has set to work drafting improvements to the existing stimulus package.
ref: 民主党已经非正式地分配了一些内阁职位，并着手起草对现有刺激方案的改进方案。

src: The newly elected party also pledges to focus spending on households, especially rural families and those with children.
ref: 新当选的民主党还承诺将把支出重点放在家庭上，尤其是农村家庭和有孩子的家庭。

src: Tokyo economist Koichi Haji predicts that the hope instilled in the Japanese people by the election result will stimulate the economy, causing stock prices to rise.
ref: 东京经济学家Koichi Haji预测，选举结果给日本人民灌输的希望将刺激经济，导致股价上涨。

src: However, questions have been raised about the Democratic Party's stability, due to the wide spectrum of views and ideologies the party encompasses.
ref: 然而，由于民主党拥有广泛的观点和意识形态，人们对民主党的稳定性提出了质疑。

src: The mother of a firefighter who died in his duties fighting the blaze in southern California, has pleaded to the arsonist responsible for the 40,450 acre inferno to give himself up, and that she will not judge him.
ref: 一名消防队员在南加州救火时殉职，他的母亲请求负责40450英亩火海的纵火犯自首，她不会批评他。

src: Bonnie McKay, mother to 27-year-old Jason McKay, said "I firmly believe you didn't believe that things were going to turn out the way they did, but they did."
ref: 27岁的杰森·麦凯的母亲邦尼·麦凯说：“我坚信你不相信事情会发展成现在的样子，但事实确实如此”。

src: The fire, which has claimed the lives of four firefighters and caused 95% burns to a fifth, is now 60% contained.
ref: 这场夺去四名消防员的生命，造成五分之一的人烧伤率在百分之95的大火，现在百分之60已经得到控制。

src: There is a massive aerial attack on the fire in progress, making use of fire helicopters and planes to dump thousands of gallons of water onto the blaze over the canyons of Riverside County.
ref: 一场大规模的空中灭火正在进行中，消防直升机和飞机将数千加仑的水倾倒在河滨县的峡谷上。

src: The blaze has now destroyed as many as 27 homes, and has forced the evacuation of 500 more.
ref: 大火现在已经摧毁了多达27所房屋，并迫使500多人撤离。

src: Round 6 of the Hyundai A-League produced an interesting first for the competition in its short existence, and something which has been totally against the grain so far this season.
ref: 现代A联赛的第6轮的比赛在其短暂的存在中产生了一个有趣的第一次，这是本赛季到目前为止完全违背常规的事情。

src: In the 20 games so far this season, only three home wins had been recorded, but for the first time ever in the league, all four home teams won their respective matches in a single round.
ref: 在本赛季迄今为止的20场比赛中，只有三场主场胜利被记录在案，但这是联盟有史以来第一次，所有四支主场球队都在一轮比赛中赢得了各自的比赛。

src: The Mariners stay four points clear at the top despite losing its first game of the season against Adelaide, while Wellington had their first taste of victory at home, with the Phoenix smashing Perth 4-1.
ref: 尽管在本赛季的第一场比赛中输给阿德莱德，但水手队仍然以4分的优势领先，而威灵顿队则在主场首次尝到了胜利的滋味，菲尼克斯以4-1大胜珀斯队。

src: Melbourne and Sydney are set for a blockbuster in Sydney next week, after both had hard fought wins.
ref: 墨尔本和悉尼将于下周在悉尼上演重磅的比赛，此前两场比赛都取得了艰苦的胜利。

src: In the morning of 30 October 2005, Romania with other countries from Europe will switch to Official Winter Time.
ref: 2005年10月30日上午，罗马尼亚和其他欧洲国家将正式改用官方冬令时。

src: Thus, 04:00 AM will become 03:00 AM and will be valid until 26 March 2006 when the Official Summer Time will be again used.
ref: 因此，04：00AM将变为03：00AM，有效期至2006年3月26日，届时将再次使用官方的夏令时。

src: Following Romanian Government's Decision nb. 20 from 1997, Romania adopts Winter Time and Summer Time in the same day with the states of European Union and other countries part of this deal.
ref: 继罗马尼亚政府1997年nb20号决定后，罗马尼亚与欧盟等国家在同一天采用冬令时和夏令时作为该协议的一部分。

src: Official Winter Time is adopted in the last Sunday of October and the Summer Time in last Sunday of March.
ref: 官方的冬令时是在10月的最后一个星期日，夏令时是在3月的最后一个星期日。

src: Usually, the official time of a country is Winter Time.
ref: 通常，一个国家的官方时间是冬令时。

src: Summer Time is a legal time adopted by some countries or territories during a part of a year.
ref: 夏令时是一些国家或地区在一年中某段时间内采用的法定时间。

src: Summer Time is usually one hour in front of Standard Official Time.
ref: 夏令时通常比标准的官方时间提前一小时。

src: During summer months, the time is moved forward in order to use as much sunlight for human activities, as well as to save electric energy used for lighting.
ref: 在夏季的几个月里，时间被提前，以便为人类活动使用尽可能多的阳光，以及节省用于照明的电能。

src: Until 1939 this worked yearly from the first Sunday of April (in 1932: 22 May) 00:00 AM and the first Sunday of October 01:00 AM (local time).
ref: 1939年以前，每年从4月的第一个星期日（1932年5月22日）上午00：00和10月的第一个星期日上午01：00（当地时间）开始实行。

src: From 1 April 1940 00:00 AM and 2 November 1942 03:00 AM, Summer Time was permanent in Romania.
ref: 从1940年4月1日凌晨00：00到1942年11月2日凌晨03：00，夏令时在罗马尼亚是永久性的。

src: From 1943 the Summer Time was suspended and Romania used just Official Time (Winter Time).
ref: 从1943年起，夏令时暂停，罗马尼亚仅使用官方时间（冬令时）。
