src: A 70 centimeter (27.6 in) zander on Lake Maggiore, Switzerland was killed by police divers after it attacked several swimmers over the weekend.
ref: 瑞士马焦雷湖上一个70厘米（27.6英寸）的梭鲈在周末袭击了几名游泳运动员后被警察潜水员杀死。

src: The fish bit six bathers, two of whom required emergency medical treatment for bite wounds up to 10 centimeters (3.9 in) long.
ref: 这条鱼咬伤了6名游泳者，其中2人的伤口长达10厘米（3.9英寸），需要紧急治疗。

src: Fish warden Fabio Croci said, "It is quite unusual for Zanders to bite humans".
ref: 鱼类管理员法比奥·克罗奇说：“梭鲈咬人是很不寻常的”。

src: It is suspected the fish's aggression could have been a result of a hormonal imbalance.
ref: 人们怀疑这种鱼的攻击性可能是荷尔蒙失衡的结果。

src: After attempts to capture the Zander with a net failed, police divers resorted to harpooning it.
ref: 在试图用网捕获这只梭鱼失败后，警方潜水员只好用鱼叉将其捕获。

src: Meat from the fish was later served to tourists around the lake.
ref: 鱼的肉后来被供应给湖边的游客。

src: Pakistani military agreed to help in the rescue mission of Slovenian alpinist Tomaž Humar.
ref: 巴基斯坦军方同意协助斯洛文尼亚登山运动员托马胡马尔的营救任务。

src: Humar was on his paramount course mission on the 4700 meter high south rock wall of the 8125 meter high Nanga Parbat mountain (the utmost west of the mountain chain) in the Himalaya mountains, being trapped in the ice-hole at an approximate height of 5900 meters for five days.
ref: 胡马尔在喜马拉雅山脉南加帕尔巴特山（山脉最西端）海拔8125米的南岩壁上执行他的首要任务，在大约5900米的冰洞中被困5天。

src: The rescue mission with the military helicopter is planned for Monday morning local time, August 8, 2005.
ref: 直升机救援任务定于当地时间8月8日星期一上午进行。

src: The rescue team managed to locate Humar on face on Sunday, but said they need a better helicopter for the actual rescue mission.
ref: 周日，救援队成功找到了胡马尔的位置，但表示他们需要一架更好的直升机来执行实际的救援任务。

src: Swiss Air Zermatt rescue pilots offered their help in the effort.
ref: 瑞士泽马特航空公司的救援飞行员在救援行动中提供了的帮助。

src: A truck carrying 35,500 pounds (16,100 kg) of explosives used in mining and seismic exploration overturned and exploded on a rural mountain section of U.S. Highway 6 in Utah's Spanish Fork Canyon Thursday afternoon.
ref: 星期四下午，一辆载有35,500磅（16,100千克）炸药的卡车在犹他州西班牙岔口峡谷美国6号公路的一个乡村山区发生翻车和爆炸。

src: The wreck occurred shortly after 2 pm, as driver Travis Stewart, 30, of Rexburg, Idaho, was leaving Ensign-Bickford Co., a commercial explosives manufacturing plant at the mouth of the canyon.
ref: 事故发生在下午2点后不久，当时爱达荷州雷克斯堡市30岁的司机特拉维斯·斯图尔特正从峡谷口的一家商业炸药制造厂海军少尉比克福德公司离开。

src: Witnesses said Mr. Stewart appeared to lose control of the truck after entering a curve in the road at a high rate of speed.
ref: 目击者称斯图尔特先生在高速行驶进入道路弯道后似乎失去了对卡车的控制权。

src: Utah Highway Patrol Lt. Ken Peay said, "speed was a factor" in the wreck of the truck but refused to speculate on how fast the truck was traveling when it wrecked.
ref: 犹他州公路巡逻队中尉肯·皮伊说，“速度是造成卡车失事的一个因素”，但拒绝推测卡车失事时的行驶速度。

src: Lt. Peay said the posted speed limit on the road is 60 mph, but the advised speed is 40.
ref: 皮伊中尉说，公路上的限速是每小时60英里，但建议的限速是每小时40英里。

src: At least 17 people received minor injuries and the explosion left a 35 foot deep crater in the highway.
ref: 至少17人受轻伤，爆炸在高速公路上留下了一个35英尺深的弹坑。

src: The driver was transported via helicopter to a hospital, where he was listed in fair condition, and was later released.
ref: 这名司机通过直升机被送往医院，他在医院的情况良好，随后被释放。

src: The co-driver Troy Lysfjord, 37, of Blackfoot, Idaho, was helped from the wreck by passers by and listed in fair condition at Utah Valley Regional Hospital in Provo.
ref: 来自爱达荷州布莱克富特的37岁的副驾驶特洛伊·莱斯峡湾在过路人的帮助下从残骸中爬了出来，目前在普罗沃的犹他谷地区医院接受治疗，情况良好。

src: The wreck site occurred on a major thoroughfare between Denver and Salt Lake City - about 60 miles south of Salt Lake City - was already under reconstruction by nightfall, as road crews began installing 10 inches of asphalt on the two lane road.
ref: 失事地点位于丹佛和盐湖城之间的一条主干道上，位于盐湖城以南约60英里。夜幕降临前，道路工作人员已经开始在这条双车道公路上铺设10英寸长的沥青，重建工作正在进行中。

src: Utah Department of Transportation spokesman Tom Hudachko said officials hoped to have the road fully repaired by Friday afternoon, adding that, "When you take a look at that hole that was there 24 hours ago, I think it's amazing the progress that was made."
ref: 犹他州交通部发言人汤姆·胡达科表示，官员们希望在周五下午之前完全修复这条公路，并补充说，“看看24小时前的那个洞，我认为取得的进展是惊人的”。

src: As of press time, the mouth of the canyon was reopened to traffic, while traffic at the accident site was impassible, and rerouted nearby.
ref: 截至发稿时，大峡谷口已重新开放，事故现场交通仍无法通行，且在附近改道。

src: The explosion consumed all but about 60 pounds of explosives, and loosened some boulders on the north side of the highway, damaged railroad tracks and some fiber optic lines buried along the roadway.
ref: 这次爆炸消耗了大约60磅炸药，导致公路北侧的一些巨石松动，铁轨受损，一些埋在公路沿线的光纤线路受损。

src: Amtrak and Union Pacific reported delays resulting from the wreck.
ref: 美铁和联合太平洋铁路公司报告说，失事导致列车延误。

src: Uinta National Forest spokesman Loyal Clark said forest firefighters were unable to respond to several small fires nearby that were apparently started by flying debris, and that helicopters dropped water to extinguish them.
ref: 乌因塔国家森林发言人洛亚尔·克拉克说，附近发生的几起小火灾显然是由飞出的碎片引起的，森林消防员无法应对，直升机空投了水来灭火。

src: High humidity and lack of fuel from a previous fire delayed the fire's spread.
ref: 前一场火灾造成的高湿度和燃料短缺推迟了火势的蔓延。

src: The cost of repairs, while paid immediately by the state, will ultimately be borne by the trucking company's insurance carrier.
ref: 维修费用由国家立即支付，最终将由货运公司的保险公司承担。

src: The truck is registered to R&R Trucking of Duenweg, Missouri.
ref: 这辆卡车登记在密苏里州杜恩威的R&R卡车运输公司。

src: UHP Lt. Peay said the investigation findings will be turned over to Utah County Attorney Kay Bryson whom would make any final decision about what charges, if any, would be pressed.
ref: 惠普公司的皮伊说，调查结果将移交给犹他州的检察官凯·布莱森，布赖森将对将提出的指控做出最终决定。

src: A cork was temporarily used to fix a fuel leak on a British passenger train.
ref: 软木被临时用于修复英国旅客列车上的燃油泄漏。

src: The leak was created when the train struck a concrete block that vandals left on the tracks.
ref: 泄漏是由于火车撞上了一个破坏公物的人留在铁轨上的混凝土块造成的。

src: Train service on the Paddington to Exeter line was stopped around Bath.
ref: 帕丁顿至埃克塞特线的列车服务在巴斯附近停止。

src: This abrupt stop created a hole in the sightglass which helps monitor fuel levels.
ref: 这一突然的停车在观察镜上形成了一个孔，这个观察镜是帮助监测燃油油位的。

src: Worried the incident could cause a fuel leak, staff decided to use the cork of a wine bottle found in the buffet car, to block the hole.
ref: 由于担心这一事故会导致燃油泄漏，工作人员决定用餐车里发现的一个酒瓶的软木塞堵住这个洞。

src: An incident that people worried would cause a delay of hours, was cleared up in around 20 minutes.
ref: 人们担心会导致数小时延迟的事件在大约20分钟内被解决。

src: Around 50 people have been arrested ahead of a planned human rights protest in Swaziland.
ref: 在斯威士兰，一场有计划的人权抗议开始之前，已经有大约50人左右被逮捕。

src: The protest had been planned against the monarchy of Swaziland to call attention to the country's alleged lack of human rights.
ref: 此次抗议的目的是反对斯威士兰的君主政体，呼吁人们关注该国存在的缺乏人权的问题。

src: Many of those arrested have been released but several people remain in custody.
ref: 很多被逮捕的人已经被释放，但是还有几个人在押。

src: The King of Swaziland, Mswati III, has come under pressure for living in luxury with his thirteen wives while many Swazi people are on the poverty line.
ref: 斯威士兰国王姆斯瓦蒂三世面临很大压力，因为他与他的13个妻子过着奢华的生活，而许多斯威士兰人民还生活在贫困线下。

src: He has also faced criticism for having a high number of sexual partners, when 26% of 15 to 49 year olds are HIV positive.
ref: 他还因为配偶数量过多，而且因其中百分之26的15-49岁配偶艾滋病测试呈阳性而受到批判。

src: Several South African trade unionists were included in the protesters arrested.
ref: 被逮捕的抗议者中还包括几名南非工会会员。

src: A spokesman for Cosatu, the South African trade union federation, said that two of the unionists had not been released and their current whereabouts are unknown.
ref: 南非工业联盟的一位发言人称，其中两名工会会员还未被释放，目前下落不明。

src: Human rights group Amnesty International has commented on the events saying that, "The arbitrary arrest of these political activists, lawyers, trade unionists and journalists is nothing short of police harassment and intimidation."
ref: 人权组织大赦国际对此事发表评论称：“对政治活动家、律师、工会会员和新闻记者的擅自逮捕无异于警察骚扰和恐吓。”

src: Swaziland is the last country in Africa to hold an absolute monarchy.
ref: 斯威士兰是非洲最后一个实行君主专制政体的国家。

src: Pakistani Prime Minister Yousaf Raza Gilani announced that the military operation targeting Taliban militants based in the South Waziristan tribal region is now over, after nearly two months.
ref: 巴基斯坦总理尤萨夫•拉扎•吉拉尼宣布针对驻扎在南瓦济里斯坦的塔利班武装分子的军事行动在进行了将近两个月之后，目前已经结束。

src: He commented that the military is now focusing on the nearby Orakzai tribal region, in order to pursue the Pakistani Taliban leadership that is believed to have fled there from South Waziristan.
ref: 他说军队目前将精力集中在附近的奥拉克兹部落地区，目的是追踪巴基斯坦塔利班的领导人，据说他已经从南瓦济里斯坦逃到了奥拉克兹。

src: There recently have been heavy artillery and air strikes in the area.
ref: 最近该地区已经出现了重型火炮和空袭。

src: "Now there are talks about Orakzai," Gilani said earlier today to reporters in a televised speech
ref: 今天早些时候吉拉尼在电视讲话中对记者说：“现在有很多关于奥克拉兹的议论。”

src: In mid-October, Gilani ordered Pakistan's military to conduct the offensive, known as Operation Rah-e-Nijat or "Road to Deliverance."
ref: 10月中旬，吉拉尼命令巴基斯坦军队发起攻击，此次攻击被称为“拯救之路”行动。

src: Military officials say more than 600 Taliban members and some 80 soldiers have been killed in the operation near the Afghan border.
ref: 军事官员称，600多名塔利班成员和大约80名军人在阿富汗边境附近发生的军事行动中丧生。

src: These numbers have not been independently verified because, except for a few military-organized trips, the military has largely closed the area to journalists and aid agencies.
ref: 这些数据尚未经过独立查证，因为除了几次军队组织的行军之外，军队基本不允许记者和援助机构进入该地区。

src: The United Nations reported that about 40,000 of people have fled the region, and need humanitarian aid.
ref: 据联合国消息称，大约有4万人逃离了该地区，需要人道主义援助。

src: Pakistani officials have blamed Mehsud's organization for a series of high profile attacks across the country that has killed more than 500 people since the beginning of October.
ref: 自10月初以来在全国范围内发生的一系列高调攻击已造成500多人死亡，巴基斯坦官员将此归咎于马苏德组织。

src: Three days after a US Navy helicopter collided with a US Coast Guard airplane off the coast of California, a search and rescue mission is ongoing for the nine crew onboard the two aircraft.
ref: 一架美国海军直升机与一架美国海岸警卫队飞机在加利福尼亚海岸相撞三天后，寻找两架飞机上的9名乘员的搜救行动正在进行中。

src: The two on board the AH-1W SuperCobra attack helicopter and seven on the C-130 Hercules transport plane were trained in survival and described as being in good physical condition, meaning rescuers maintain hope of finding them alive.
ref: AH-1W超级眼镜蛇直升机上的两名乘员和C-130运输机上的7名乘员都参加过生存训练，而且据说身体状况非常好，这就意味着他们有生还的希望。

src: They all had heat-retaining drysuits but it was unknown if they were wearing them at the time.
ref: 他们都有保温潜水衣，但是不知道当时是否穿在身上。

src: The accident occurred at 7:10 p.m. on Thursday in an area of military airspace that is sometimes closed to the public, although its status at the time of the accident was not known.
ref: 事故于星期四晚上7：10发生在时常对公众关闭的军事领空，但是事故发生时该区域处于什么状态尚不清楚。

src: The helicopter had been in formation with two transports and another SuperCobra to practise night flying, while the Coast Guard plane was conducting search and rescue for 50-year-old boater David Jines.
ref: 那架直升机当时正与两架运输机和另一架超级眼镜蛇直升机练习夜间飞行，而那架海岸警卫队飞机正在对50岁的船工大卫·姬妮斯进行搜救。

src: The search for Jines ends today whether he is found or not.
ref: 无论是否找到，对姬妮斯的搜救今天结束。

src: After searching 644 square miles of ocean with nine aircraft debris has been located from both the aircraft, but no trace has been found of those on board.
ref: 经过在海上644平方英里的范围内进行搜索，找到了9片属于这两架飞机的残骸，但是没有找到机上乘员的踪迹。

src: Operations are currently focusing near the military's San Clemente Island, where an area of about 50 miles of floating wreckage is located.
ref: 目前搜救主要集中在军队的圣克利门蒂岛，岛上约50英里范围内找到了漂浮的飞机残骸。

src: British murderer Gordon Park was found dead today in his cell at a prison in Lancashire, England.
ref: 英国杀人犯戈登〮帕克今天被发现死在英格兰兰开夏郡某监狱关押他的牢房中。

src: Park, whose 66th birthday was today, was convicted nearly five years ago of the murder of his wife, Carol, in 1976.
ref: 今天是帕克66岁生日，他大概5年前因在1976年谋杀其妻子卡罗尔被判刑。

src: Her body was found over twenty years later in Coniston Water, in the Lake District, Northern England, leading to her being dubbed the "Lady in the Lake" by police, after the Raymond Chandler novel.
ref: 她的尸体于20多年后在英格兰北部湖泊地区的科尼斯顿湖被发现，因此警方联想到雷蒙德·钱德勒的小说，称她为“湖底女人”。

src: The Prison Service state Park was found hanging in his cell at Garth Prison, unconscious, at 8am local time.
ref: 监狱服务机构称帕克于当地时间上午8点被发现在加思监狱上吊，不省人事。

src: "Staff and paramedics attended but Mr Park was pronounced dead at 9.40am", a spokesman added.
ref: 一位发言人补充说：“工作人员和医务人员到达现场，但是上午9：40帕克先生被宣布死亡。”

src: An investigation has been launched by the Prisons and Probation Ombudsman, responsible for investigating deaths in custody; but suicide is suspected.
ref: 监狱和负责调查服刑期间死亡案件的缓刑监察专员开始进行调查，但是怀疑帕克是自杀。

src: His son, Jeremy, who had been fighting for his father's release, said "[w]e are all completely devastated and still believe his innocence 100%."
ref: 他的儿子杰里米，一直在为他的父亲争取脱罪，他说“我们都悲痛欲绝，我们仍然相信他是百分之百清白的。”

src: Park was jailed for life in January 2005, with a minimum period of fifteen years, for his wife's murder after a ten-week trial at Manchester Crown Court.
ref: 在曼彻斯特刑事法庭经过10周的审讯之后，帕克于2005年1月因谋杀其妻子而被判终身监禁，至少要15年时间。

src: Carol Park was killed with an ice axe, then her body concealed in Coniston Water.
ref: 卡罗尔〮帕克是被人用冰镐杀害，然后将她的尸体藏于科尼斯顿湖中。

src: She was not found until August 1997, when divers found her weighted corpse 70 feet deep.
ref: 直到1997年8月，她才被发现，是潜水员在70英尺深的湖底发现了她沉重的尸体。

src: Park had claimed that his wife had left him for another man.
ref: 帕克声称他的妻子为了另一个男人离开了他。

src: His appeal against conviction was turned down in 2008, with the Court of Appeal saying that the geological evidence he wished to challenge was only one factor of the "strong circumstantial case" proving his guilt.
ref: 他对其有罪判决的上诉于2008年被驳回，上诉法院称，他所质疑的地质证据只是证明其有罪的“强有力的间接证据”中的一个因素。

src: Sri Lanka have beaten Kenya by 172 runs in Group C of the 2007 Twenty20 World Championship at Wanderers Stadium, Johannesburg, South Africa.
ref: 在南非约翰内斯堡的流浪者体育场举行的2007年二十20板球世界锦标赛C组比赛中，斯里兰卡队以172分的成绩击败肯尼亚队。

src: Sanath Jayasuriya scored 88 runs off 44 balls as Sri Lanka raced to 260-6 off 20 overs, the highest total made in a Twenty20 international.
ref: 斯里兰卡队通过20回合的比赛得分260-6，Sanath Jayasuriya击球44个得88分，是二十20国际比赛中总得分最高者。

src: Mahela Jayawardene scored 65 runs before falling lbw to Jimmy Kamande, who took 3-48, bowling Kumar Sangakkara for 30 and Tillakaratne Dilshan for just three runs.
ref: Mahela Jayawardene在以腿截球攻击Jimmy Kamande之前获得65分，Jimmy Kanmande得分3-48，给Kumar Sangakkara投球得30分，给Tillakaratne Dilshan投球得3分。

src: Jehan Mubarak smashed 46 off 13 balls as Sri Lanka set a formidable target for Kenya.
ref: Jehan Mubarak在13个击球中扣杀得分46分，至此斯里兰卡为肯尼亚设置了一个难以达到的目标。

src: Chaminda Vaas immediately made a breakthrough, dismissing opening batsman Maurice Ouma for a duck.
ref: Chaminda Vaas立刻作出调整，把首位击球员Maurice Ouma替换下场，因为他得了零分。

src: Kenya never recovered, and were reduced to just 88 runs in the 20th over as Sri Lanka dismissed their batsmen cheaply.
ref: 肯尼亚再也没有追回比分的机会，在第20个回合分数降至仅88分，此时斯里兰卡队毫不费力气地把其击球手替换下场。

src: The win, by 172 runs, is the largest margin of victory in a Twenty20 international.
ref: 以172分获胜，这是二十20国际比赛中领先优势最大的一次。

src: Seven unknown men armed with guns invaded the Terra Prometida camp, in Felisburgo city, Minas Gerais, Brazil, and killed five members of the Brazilian Landless Workers Movement movement (MST).
ref: 7名不知名持枪男子入侵位于巴西米纳斯吉拉斯州费利斯堡市的特拉普罗美替达营地，杀死5名巴西无地工人运动（MST）的成员。

src: The Terra Prometida camp had been invaded by the MST in May 2002 and there were about 200 MST families living there at the time of the attack.
ref: 特拉普罗美替达营地曾于2002年5月被侵袭过，当时有大约200个参加无地工人运动的家庭居住在那里。

src: According to MST camp leaders the gunfighters set fire to MST tents and started shooting.
ref: 据无地工人运动营地的领导人称枪手对准无地工人运动的帐篷开始射击。

src: The Workers Party (PT) has demanded the gunfighters' arrest and punishment.
ref: 劳工党（PT）要求逮捕并惩罚枪手。

src: The MST is an ideologically diverse movement of agricultural workers in Brazil officially founded in 1984.
ref: 无地工人运动是1984年正式发起的巴西农工的一项思想多元化运动。

src: According to MST, in 2003 there were about 632 MST camps in Brazil.
ref: 据无地工人运动的消息称，2003年在巴西有大约632个无地工人运动的营地。

src: MST is a large organization with many bases throughout Brazilian cities.
ref: 无地工人运动是一个在巴西各城市都有基地的大型组织。

src: Their most visible tactic has been the occupation of mostly privately-held plantations and landholdings, sometimes armed with carving knifes and scythes.
ref: 他们最明显的战术是占领主要由私人持有的种植园和土地所有权，有时候他们会手持切肉刀和长柄镰刀。

src: Currently, MST receives help from the Brazilian government and donations from international organizations.
ref: 目前，无地工人运动得到巴西政府的帮助以及国际组织的捐助。

src: The movement also receives funds by selling videos of their invasions.
ref: 该运动还通过出售他们的侵略视频来获得资金。

src: Overall, a recent report on labor standards in Brazil has shown that conditions for laborers are poor.
ref: 总的来说，近期的一份关于巴西劳工标准的报告显示工人的条件是很差的。

src: As many as 3,200 mine workers became trapped in the in Elandsrand mine, a gold mine in South Africa about 50 miles (80 km) west of Johannesburg in Carletonville, Gauteng, after an incident on October 3.
ref: 10月3日，南非豪滕市约翰内斯堡以西约50英里（80公里）处的伊兰德斯兰德金矿发生事故，多达3200名矿工被困井下。

src: All miners have been rescued, and none of them were injured.
ref: 所有矿工都获救，没有人受伤。

src: The mining company says that a lift electrical cable broke on a basket that was carrying miners, trapping thousands at least 2,200 meters (1.3 miles) below the earth's surface.
ref: 这家采矿公司表示，一辆载有矿工的吊篮上的一条电梯电缆断裂，困在地表以下至少2,200米（1.3英里）处。

src: Reports from MSNBC and the Guardian Unlimited say that the shaft may have collapsed when a water or air pipe burst.
ref: 来自微软全国有线广播电视公司和英国卫报的报道称，当水管或空气管爆裂时，竖井可能已经坍塌。

src: The rescue operation went well with no complications, with the rescue taking just under 24 hours to complete.
ref: 救援行动进展顺利，没有任何意外发生，救援工作不到24小时即可完成。

src: "They were underground when the accident happened and they were not able to surface because an electric feeder cable that is connected to the mine lift was severed," said a spokeswoman for the mining company, Amelia Soares.
ref: “当事故发生时他们就在地下，他们无法上来，因为连接到矿井升降机的电力馈线被切断，”矿业公司发言人阿米莉亚·苏雷亚斯表示。

src: The snap was caused by a "fatigued" air pipe which burst and fell down the shaft damaging the "steelwork and electrical feeder cords," added Soares.
ref: 断裂是由一根“疲劳”的空气管引起的，该空气管爆裂并从竖井上掉下来，损坏了“钢结构和电力馈线”，苏雷亚斯补充道。

src: "There have been no injuries or deaths," said CEO of Harmony mining, Graham Briggs who also said that the miners were previously contacted and were given "food and water."
ref: 和谐矿业公司首席执行官格雷厄姆·布里格斯说：“没有人员伤亡。”他还表示矿工之前曾联系上，并获得“食物和水”。

src: Earlier reports had stated that Lesiba Seshoka, a spokesman with the National Union of Mineworkers, said that the miners have not been heard from for hours and that they could have been enduring temperatures as high as 105 degrees Fahrenheit (40 degrees Celsius).
ref: 早些时候的报道称，全国矿工工会的发言人莱斯巴·塞绍卡表示，矿工们已经好几个小时都没有消息了，并且他们可能已经忍受了好几个小时的105华氏度（40摄氏度）的高温。

src: "The only exit is blocked, probably by a fall of ground," said Seshoka.
ref: 塞绍卡说：“唯一的出口可能因地面坍塌而被堵塞。”

src: Rescue workers used a mine shaft that is next to the damaged one in an attempt to reach the trapped miners, and lifted them out, 75 at a time.
ref: 救援人员试图从受损矿井旁边的一个矿井救出被困的矿工，然后一次救出75个人。

src: There was no emergency exit in the shaft which is reported to have "not been maintained for ages," added Seshoka.
ref: 塞绍卡补充说，竖井内没有紧急出口，据称竖井“长时间没进行维护”。

src: "An escape route is the most important thing and they have failed miserably."
ref: “逃生路线是最重要的，可悲的是，它们已经失败了。”

src: "Our main worry is for more than 3,000 people who are underground," said National Union of Mineworkers for S. Africa chairman, Deon Boqwana.
ref: “我们主要担心的是3000多名地下人员，”南非全国矿工工会主席迪翁·波克瓦纳说。

src: Current reports say that "negligence" was the initial cause for the pipe burst and that there has been a history of negligence from the mine.
ref: 目前的报道称，“疏忽”是造成管道爆裂的最初原因，而且矿井也有疏忽的历史。

src: "Because of continuous operations there is no time to make adequate checks," said the President of the Miners union, Senzeni Zokwana to reporters during a news conference.
ref: “由于持续运营，没有时间进行充分的检查，”矿工工会主席森兹尼·祖瓦纳在新闻发布会上对记者说。

src: The Elandsrand mine is currently under development and has been since February 2001 when Harmony bought the mine.
ref: 伊兰德斯兰德矿山目前正在开发中，自2001年2月和谐公司购买该矿以来一直在开发。

src: Officials state that the mine will remain closed for a minimum of six weeks, while an investigation is performed, and the mine is deemed safe for miners to continue working in it.
ref: 官员们表示，该矿将至少关闭六周，同时进行调查，以确保矿井是安全的，矿工可继续在该矿工作。

src: The mine is located in the Witwatersrand Basin of South Africa, which is said to be the location of the largest area of raw gold on the planet.
ref: 该矿位于南非的威特沃特斯兰德盆地，据说这是地球上最大的原始黄金产地。

src: The results of the appeals in the massive Italian football match-fixing scandal have today been announced by the Italian federal court.
ref: 意大利联邦法院今天公布了大规模意大利足球假球丑闻的上诉结果。

src: Juventus originally were relegated to Serie B with a thirty-point deduction.
ref: 尤文图斯最初以三十分的成绩被降级到乙级联赛。

src: Their appeal still sees them in Italian football's second division, but with their points deduction almost halved to seventeen.
ref: 他们的申诉仍然使得他乙级联赛，但他们的积分几乎减半，被降至17分。

src: They will still have their last two Scudettos stripped off them and the 2005-06 title will not be assigned to anyone.
ref: 他们仍然会被剥夺最后两个联赛的冠军，而2005-06赛季的冠军将不会颁发给任何队。

src: They will also have to play three games behind closed doors.
ref: 他们还必须秘密地打三场比赛。

src: AC Milan will remain in Serie A and with their points deduction reduced from fifteen to just eight.
ref: AC米兰将留在意甲，但他们的积分将会从十五减到八。

src: However, importantly, they have been reinstated into the Champions League, but will have to play in the third qualifying round.
ref: 然而，重要的是，他们已经重返欧洲冠军联赛，但必须参加第三轮资格赛。

src: Fiorentina and Lazio have been reinstated into Serie A, having been demoted into Serie B originally.
ref: 佛罗伦萨和拉齐奥已经重返意甲，而他们原本被降级为乙级联赛。

src: However, both clubs have had their points deductions increased, in Fiorentina's case the deduction was twelve points and Lazio will start the season with -11 points having originally had a seven-point penalty.
ref: 然而，两个俱乐部的扣分都有所增加，佛罗伦萨扣除12分，而拉齐奥将在本赛季开始时被扣除11分，而之前的罚分是7分。

src: Both clubs will not be allowed to play in European competitions next season and will have stadium bans.
ref: 两个俱乐部下赛季都不被允许参加欧洲比赛，并且将被禁赛。

src: Fiorentina must play three games behind closed doors and for Lazio it's two.
ref: 佛罗伦萨必须秘密地再进行三场比赛，拉齐奥则要参加两场。

src: Carlos Ortega, one of the top opposition leaders in Venezuela, has been sentenced to 15 years in jail for inciting civil unrest during a strike.
ref: 委内瑞拉最高反对派领导人之一卡洛斯·奥尔特加因罢工期间煽动内乱而被判处15年监禁。

src: Following a military coup d'etat in 2002, the two-month strike battered the country's oil industry in a effort to oust the elected president Hugo Chavez.
ref: 在2002年的军事政变之后，为期两个月的罢工袭击了该国的石油工业，以便推翻当选的总统乌戈·查韦斯。

src: "From prison, I'll keep working, I'll keep fighting to preserve the freedom, democracy and unity of the people," said Mr Ortega in a telephone interview.
ref: 奥尔特加先生在接受电话采访时说：“在监狱里，我会继续工作，我会继续努力维护人民的自由，民主和团结。”

src: "I'm no conspirator or coup plotter and I didn't betray my country."
ref: “我不是阴谋家或政变策划者，我没有背叛我的国家。”

src: While Ortega had initially fled Venezuela following the issuing of an arrest warrant in 2003, the BBC reports that he had returned to Venuzuela from Costa Rica last August.
ref: 虽然奥尔特加在2003年发出逮捕令后最初逃离了委内瑞拉，但英国广播公司报道他去年8月从哥斯达黎加返回了委内瑞拉。

src: Supporters of Mr Ortega have claimed the verdict is 'politically motivated' according to BBC reports, with an appeal being planned.
ref: 根据BBC报道，奥尔特加先生的支持者声称该判决具有“政治动机”，并且正在计划上诉。

src: Mr Ortega's opposition to current Venezuelan president Hugo Chavez is well known.
ref: 奥尔特加先生对现任委内瑞拉总统乌戈·查韦斯的反对是众所周知的。

src: Chavez himself attempted (and failed) to carry out a military coup in 1992.
ref: 查韦斯本人曾试图（并且未能）在1992年进行军事政变。

src: Since then, Chavez was democratically elected president in 1998, 2000, and survived a recall referendum against him in 2004, and the constitutional reform referendum which he supported was supported by over 70% of the population in 1999.
ref: 从那时起，查韦斯于1998年，2000年成为民主选举产生的总统，并在2004年对他进行的召回公投中幸存下来，他支持的宪法改革公投在1999年得到了70％以上的群众的支持。

src: Pakistani militants killed ten soldiers and injured fifteen more during an attack on PNS Mehran, a military base in Karachi, in a revenge strike after the killing of Osama bin Laden.
ref: 在奥萨马·本·拉登被击毙后，巴基斯坦武装分子在对卡拉奇的一个军事基地迈兰赫海军的袭击期间杀死了十名士兵，并造成十五人受伤。

src: Commandos have cleared the base of militants; three of the attackers were reported also to have been killed.
ref: 突击队已经清除了武装分子的基地；据报道，有三名袭击者也被杀死。

src: The militants reportedly took hostages inside the base but officials said they all had been rescued unharmed.
ref: 据报道，武装分子在基地内劫持了人质，但官员说他们都没有受到伤害，并且已被营救下来。

src: Military forces continued to fight off the militants on Monday morning, hours after the attack began the night before when as many as twenty militants stormed hangars at the base and used rocket-propelled grenades to destroy a number of military aircraft, including a P-3C Orion.
ref: 星期一早上，军方继续与武装分子作战，就在袭击前一晚开始的几小时后，当时多达20名武装分子袭击了基地的机库，并使用火箭推进式手榴弹摧毁了一些军用飞机，包括一架P-3C猎户座。

src: Witnesses reported hearing a number of loud explosions and heavy gunfire as the militants continued to attack the base.
ref: 目击者报告说，当武装分子继续袭击基地时，他们听到了巨大的爆炸声和猛烈的枪声。

src: "They were carrying guns, rocket-propelled grenades and hand grenades," a spokesperson for the Pakistan navy said.
ref: “他们携带枪支，火箭推进式手榴弹和手榴弹，”巴基斯坦海军发言人说。

src: Yusuf Raza Gilani, the prime minister, said the attack was a "cowardly act of terror".
ref: 总理优素福•拉扎•吉拉尼说，这次袭击是“怯懦的恐怖行为”。

src: Reports last night indicated hostages may have been taken at the base, but officials have confirmed all foreigners at the base are safe and any hostages taken have been freed.
ref: 昨晚的报道显示，人质可能是在基地被捕的，但官员们已经确认所有在基地的外国人都是安全的，所有被扣押的人质都已被释放。

src: Commandos moved in after the attack begun and fighting continued throughout the night, and more loud explosions and gunfire were heard in the base on Monday morning.
ref: 突击队在袭击开始后进入，整个晚上都在持续战斗，星期一早上在基地听到更大声的爆炸和枪声。

src: Tehrik-i-Taliban Pakistan has claimed responsibility for the attack; a spokesperson said it was a revenge attack for the killing of Osama bin Laden by U.S. special forces earlier this month.
ref: 巴基斯坦塔利班运动组织声称对此次袭击负责；一位发言人说，这是对本月早些时候美国特种部队杀害奥萨马·本·拉登的报复性攻击。

src: "It was the revenge of martyrdom of Osama bin Laden," the spokesperson said.
ref: 发言人说：“这是对奥萨马·本·拉登殉难的报复。”

src: "It was the proof that we are still united and powerful."
ref: “这证明我们仍然团结而强大。”

src: The group warned after the death of bin Laden that they would attack Pakistani military targets.
ref: 该组织在本拉登去世后警告他们将袭击巴基斯坦的军事目标。

src: With the actual poll only days away, Thailand's Administrative Court has ruled against a new requirement introduced by the country's Election Commission.
ref: 由于距离实际投票只有几天，泰国行政法院作出裁决，反对该国选举委员会提出的一项新要求。

src: Voters will not be forced to complete ballots with a rubber stamp and may instead use a pen.
ref: 选民不会被迫用橡皮图章完成投票，而是可以使用钢笔。

src: Ruling that the change to require the use of a rubber stamp is in contravention of election law, Judge Anuwat Tharasawaeng highlighted that election law does not mandate how a mark must be made on the ballot.
ref: 法官阿努瓦特·塔拉萨旺判决，要求使用橡皮图章的变更违反选举法，并强调选举法并未规定如何在选票上作出标记。

src: A rainy day in Victoria, the provincial capital of British Columbia, failed to dampen the spirits of protesting teachers and their labour union supporters on Monday as thousands turned out to make their voices heard and, incidentally, shut down the city's transportation services.
ref: 周一，不列颠哥伦比亚省省会维多利亚下起了雨，大雨未能抑制抗议教师及其工会支持者的激动情绪，成千上万的人出来表达他们的心声，不可避免地造成该市的交通服务处于停工状态。

src: The local transit union was not involved in the strike, their offices were picketed by striking Telus workers.
ref: 当地的运输工会没有参与罢工，他们的办公室被罢工的泰勒斯电信工人所包围。

src: Across northern B.C. thousands of Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) members are off the job in solidarity with the teachers.
ref: 在不列颠哥伦比亚省北部，成千上万的加拿大公务员工会（CUPE）成员为了声援教师而罢工。

src: In Prince George a rally is planned to be held in front of the office of Education Minister Shirley Bond.
ref: 乔治王子的集会计划在教育部长雪莉·邦德的办公室前举行。

src: "If solutions aren't found, on Wednesday of this week, another massive shutdown in a different area of this province will take place," shouted Jim Sinclair, B.C. Federation of Labour president, to a crowd gathered on the lawn of the Legislature yesterday.
ref: “如果找不到解决办法，本周星期三，本省另一个地区将发生另一次大规模停工，”不列颠哥伦比亚省劳工联合会主席吉姆·辛克莱尔昨天对聚集在立法机关草坪上的人群喊道。

src: Inside, the opposition NDP used Question Period to repeatedly probe the ruling Liberal party's decision to not speak with the BC Teacher's Federation (BCTF).
ref: 在议会内部，反对党新民主党利用提问时间反复探讨执政的自由党决定，他们决定不与不列颠哥伦比亚省教师联合会（BCTF）交谈。

src: Carol James asked Gordon Campbell what the difference was between this strike and that held by the Hospital Union (HU) in 2004 - also an illegal strike.
ref: 卡罗尔·詹姆斯问戈登·坎贝尔，这次罢工和2004年医院工会（HU）举行的罢工有什么不同-那次罢工也是非法的。

src: The Premier's response was that he personally did not negotiate with the HU, and the rule of law was supreme: teachers must return to the classroom before negotiations over a bargaining process for next year's contract may begin.
ref: 首相的回应是他个人没有与医院联盟谈判，因为法治至上：教师必须回到教室，才能开始就明年合同的商讨过程进行谈判。

src: The strike is back in court again this week, with Supreme Court Judge Brenda Brown saying she will rule Friday on requests the union be slapped with additional fines for refusing to call off the strike after the civil contempt of court ruling last week.
ref: 罢工人员本周再次出庭，最高法院法官布伦达·布朗表示，她将于周五就工会因在上周民事藐视法庭裁决后拒绝取消罢工而被处以额外罚款的请求做出裁决。

src: The union and leaders may also face criminal charges after the government appointed Len Doust as an independent special prosecutor to assess whether criminal contempt charges may be brought.
ref: 在政府任命莱恩·多斯特为独立的特别检察官，以评估是否会提出藐视法庭罪指控后，工会和领导人也可能面临刑事指控。

src: India's former External Affairs Minister Natwar Singh has, for the first time, been directly accused by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) for his involvement in the Iraq oil scam.
ref: 印度前外交部长纳特瓦尔·辛格第一次直接被执法局（ED）指控参与伊拉克石油骗局。

src: The ED, which is responsible for enforcing foreign exchange control laws, has alleged that Singh, along with his son Jagat Singh and three others, acquired foreign exchange worth $8.9 lakh illegally.
ref: 负责执行外汇管制法的执法局声称，辛格和他的儿子贾格特·辛格以及其他三人非法获得了价值89万美元的外汇。

src: The 18-page show-cause notice issued by the ED says the money was acquired by the accused, in violation of U.N regulations, in exchange for two oil contracts awarded to Iraq's State Oil Marketing Organisation (SOMO).
ref: 由执法局发布的18页的“诉因公告”说，这笔钱是被告违反联合国的规定，以换取伊拉克国家石油销售组织（SOMO）的两份石油合同而获得的。

src: Of the $8,90,000, $7,48,550 was allegedly transferred by them to an account in the Jordan National Bank, the remaining $1,46,247.23, which was the commission for the oil-contracts, was deposited with Barclays Bank, in the Channel Islands.
ref: 据称，在890,000美元中，有748,550美元被转移到约旦国家银行的一个账户，其余的146,247.23美元是石油合同的佣金，存放在海峡群岛的巴克莱银行。

src: The money was transferred to an account in the name of Indus Trading Company, which itself is owned by Andaleeb Sehgal, a friend of Mr. Singh.
ref: 这笔钱被转移到一个以印度贸易公司的名义开设的账户中，该公司的所有者是辛格先生的朋友安达利布·塞加尔所有。

src: The accused are required to respond to the show-cause notice (issued on the 2nd of September), which Natwar says is an attempt by the ED to "defame" him, within 30 days.
ref: 被告被要求在30天内回复（9月2日发布的）诉因公告，纳特瓦尔说这是执法局试图“诽谤”他。

src: The independent Pathak Commission's report had stated that there was "no material evidence to show that Natwar Singh derived any financial or other personal benefits from the contracts."
ref: 独立的帕萨克委员会的报告指出，“没有任何实质证据表明纳特瓦尔·辛格从合同中获得任何财务或其他个人利益。”

src: A new strain of Avian Flu or Bird Flu has been discovered in China and has also infected some humans.
ref: 在中国发现了一种新的禽流感病种，并且感染了一部分人。

src: The virus also "spreads fast" and has covered a "big geographic region" according to Chinese health officials.
ref: 据中国卫生官员称，该病毒还“快速传播”并覆盖了一个“很大的地理区域”。

src: It is not known how dangerous the new virus is and whether it is stronger or deadlier than the current H5N1 virus.
ref: 目前尚不清楚新病毒有多危险，以及它是否比目前的H5N1病毒更强或更致命。

src: Despite being detected in humans, no evidence has turned up to suggest that the virus can be spread easily from human to human.
ref: 尽管在人类身上发现了这种病毒，但还没有证据表明这种病毒可以轻易地在人与人之间传播。

src: "The new variant doesn't indicate any increased risk for people other than the fact it seems to be pretty widespread," said World Health Organization's [WHO] Global Influenza Program, which is located in Zurich, Switzerland, Doctor Michael L. Perdue.
ref: 位于瑞士苏黎世的世界卫生组织【WHO】全球流感计划的迈克尔·L·柏杜博士说：“这种新病毒的变异并没有显示出对人类有任何增加的风险，只是表明它似乎相当普遍。”

src: "This virus seemed to spread very fast over a big geographic region."
ref: “这种病毒在一个大的地理区域似乎传播得非常快。”

src: "However, we don't have any evidence to show whether this virus is more dangerous or less dangerous than any other H5N1 viruses," said State Key Laboratory of Emerging Infectious Diseases at the University of Hong Kong in China director, Yi Guan.
ref: “但是，我们没有任何证据证明这种病毒是否比任何其他H5N1病毒更危险或更不危险，”香港大学中国区新发传染病国家重点实验室主任易观说。

src: The strain was discovered during April and June of 2006 in China's Fujian Province when Guan's team examined ducks, chickens, geese and other birds at a market in the province.
ref: 该毒株于2006年4月和6月在中国福建省被发现，当时易观的研究小组在福建省的一个市场上检测了鸭子、鸡、鹅和其他鸟类。

src: At least 95% of the birds Guan and his team looked at were infected with the new strain and vaccines formulated to fight the H5N1 virus have not worked.
ref: 易观和他的研究小组观察的禽类中，至少95%感染了这种新型病毒，而为对抗H5N1病毒而研制的疫苗也没有发挥作用。

src: "This novel variant may have become dominant ... because it was not as easily affected as other strains by the avian vaccine used to prevent H5 infection."
ref: “这种新型变种可能已成为主导……因为它不像其他菌株那样容易受到用于预防H5感染的禽流感疫苗的影响。”

src: The team is continuing surveillance on the area where the strain was discovered and according to Guan the virus "is not causing widespread infection outside of our surveillance area" but the new strain is reported in Thailand, Laos, Hong Kong and Malaysia.
ref: 该小组正在继续对发现该毒株的地区进行监测，据易观说，该病毒“没有在我们的监测区域之外造成广泛感染”，但在泰国、老挝、香港和马来西亚报告了新毒株。

src: Scientists also say that current vaccines used in birds for the H5N1 virus might have caused the new strain to develop.
ref: 科学家还说，目前用于禽类的H5N1病毒疫苗可能导致了新毒株的产生。

src: On October 14, 2008, Canadians will be heading to the polls for the federal election.
ref: 2008年10月14日，加拿大人将前往投票站参加联邦选举。

src: Christian Heritage Party candidate Steven Elgersma is standing for election in the riding of Haldimand—Norfolk.
ref: 基督教传统党候选人史蒂文·埃尔格斯玛正在代表霍尔德曼德-诺福克郡参加竞选。

src: Wikinews contacted Steven Elgersma, to talk about the issues facing Canadians, and what they and their party would do to address them.
ref: 维基新闻联系了史蒂文·埃尔格斯玛，讨论了加拿大人面临的问题，以及他们和他们的政党将如何解决这些问题。

src: Wikinews is in the process of contacting every candidate, in every riding across the country, no matter their political stripe.
ref: 维基新闻正在联系全国各地的每一位候选人，无论他们的政治倾向如何。

src: All interviews are conducted over e-mail, and interviews are published unedited, allowing candidates to impart their full message to our readers, uninterrupted.
ref: 所有访谈都通过电子邮件进行，访谈也都是未经编辑就发表的，这样候选人就可以不间断地向我们的读者传达他们的全部信息。

src: Fiji's national airline Air Pacific has now officially returned to its original name: Fiji Airways.
ref: 斐济国家航空公司太平洋航空现已正式恢复原名：斐济航空公司。

src: Fiji Airways adopted the Air Pacific name in 1971, slightly prior to its first international flight on June 3, 1973.
ref: 斐济航空公司于1971年采用了太平洋航空公司的名称，稍微早于1973年6月3日首次开通的国际航班。

src: The re-brand was described by interim CEO Aubrey Swift as allowing the airline to align itself "closer with Fiji as a destination".
ref: 临时首席执行官奥布里・斯威夫特描述了品牌重塑为的是让该航空公司“与作为目的地的斐济保持更为亲密”。

src: The name change is designed in part to reduce the confusion which surrounded the name Air Pacific.
ref: 名称更改部分是为了减少太平洋航空名称所造成的混乱。

src: Swift noted that "Air Pacific just didn’t resonate with our customers" and said that same people "thought we were an air conditioning company".
ref: 斯威夫特指出，“太平洋航空公司并没有引起我们客户的共鸣”，并说同样的人“以为我们是一家空调公司”。

src: Along with the name change, the airline has redesigned its website, and changed the name of each of its classes of service.
ref: 随着名称变更，航空公司重新设计了其网站，并更改了每个服务类别的名称。

src: Pacific Voyager and Tabua Class have been replaced with economy and business class respectively.
ref: Pacific Voyager和Tabua Class分别被经济舱和商务舱取代。

src: The airline has also introduced plans to overhaul its fleet of older Boeing 747s with Airbus A330s.
ref: 该航空公司还推出了使用空中客车A330改进其旧版波音747飞机的计划。

src: It has said that the completion of this overhaul and the re-branding efforts will be completed by the end of the year.
ref: 它表示，这次大修的完成和品牌重塑工作将在年底前完成。

src: The airline's new brand-mark and livery features a masi design created by Fijian artist, Makereta Matemosi.
ref: 该航空公司的新品牌标志和制服采用由斐济艺术家马克热塔马特摩西创作的马西设计。

src: The new identity is to "symbolises the airline's new identity and epitomises all that Fiji Airways represents."
ref: 新的品牌“象征着航空公司的新身份，并体现了斐济航空所代表的一切。”

src: "It is authentic, distinctive, and true to the airline's Fijian roots", the airline said.
ref: 该航空公司表示，“这是航空公司扎根于斐济的真实，独特，真正的体现”。

src: Food deliveries from the RMT were allowed into the Vestas plant in Newport, England yesterday, but were cut off by Vestas management this afternoon.
ref: 来自RMT的食品被允许进入英格兰纽波特的维斯塔斯工厂，但今天下午被维斯塔斯管理部门拒绝。

src: Protesters at the Isle of Wight factory celebrated the delivery of supermarket bags filled with groceries, which entered with a police escort.
ref: 怀特岛工厂的抗议者庆祝装满杂货的超市购物袋的送达，这些袋子由警察护送进入。

src: This morning, the sixteen remaining occupiers were told to prepare a list of items for future deliveries.
ref: 今天上午，剩下的16名占领者被告知准备一份未来交付的物品清单。

src: But, according to "Mark", an occupier in the Vestas plant, this afternoon Vestas management reversed their decision, terming the August 1 food delivery a one-time "goodwill gesture" and saying food would no longer be allowed in.
ref: 但是，根据维斯塔斯工厂的占领者“马克”的说法，今天下午维斯塔斯管理层改变了他们的决定，称8月1日的食品交付是一次性的“善意姿态”，并说不再允许食品进入。

src: The food delivery followed a formal complaint by the RMT that denying the occupiers food was a violation of their human rights.
ref: RMT正式投诉拒绝占用者的食物交付是对他们人权的侵犯。

src: The people inside the factory have been conducting their occupation since July 20, in protest against the closure of the factory, which produces wind turbine blades for the generation of wind power, and the loss of 625 jobs in the Isle of Wight and nearby areas.
ref: 自7月20日以来，工厂内的人员一直占据着工厂，以抗议工厂的关闭，以及在怀特岛和附近地区失去625个工作岗位。该工厂生产用于风电的风力涡轮机叶片。

src: Mark went on to praise the "brave people" who have circumvented the security ring around the plant in order to get food and other items to the occupiers.
ref: 马克接着称赞那些绕过工厂周围安全环以便向占领者提供食品和其他物品的“勇敢的人”。

src: An electric kettle thrown at the end of a rope up to the occupiers is said to be working well.
ref: 据说拴在绳索末端抛给占领者的电热水壶效果很好。

src: Mark also noted that Louise Christian, a prominent British human rights lawyer, is now representing the Vestas occupiers.
ref: 马克还指出，英国著名人权律师路易斯·克里斯蒂安现在代表维斯塔斯的占领者。

src: While the number of occupiers at the Vestas plant — originally nearly thirty, now only sixteen — have dwindled, Mark says the ones who remain are "very determined" and furthermore hold no ill will toward their co-workers who have left the occupation.
ref: 虽然占领维斯塔斯工厂的人数由原本的三十左右减少到只有十六人，但马克说留下来的人“非常坚定”，并且对离开的同事也没有任何恶意。

src: In particular, the occupiers offered sympathy for Luke Paxton, who they say left the occupation due to a combination of personal issues and malnutrition brought on by the deprivation of food.
ref: 占领者对卢克·帕克斯顿还表示了特殊的同情，他们说，由于食物匮乏导致的个人问题和营养不良，使他们离开了占领区。

src: Paxton, Mark said, has the remaining occupiers' "full support" and continues to campaign for the Vestas workers.
ref: 马克说，帕克斯顿拥有剩下占领者的“全力支持”，并继续为维斯塔斯工人斗争。

src: In contrast to claims that green socialist group Workers' Climate Action were behind the occupation, Mark presented a more nuanced picture: the Vestas workers' initial contacts were with veterans of the occupation of Visteon's auto parts plants, with the AWL, SWP and Socialist Party becoming involved later with "quite a big involvement" from all groups.
ref: 与声称绿色社会主义团体工人的气候行动是占领的幕后支持者相比，马克提出了一个更细致的画面：维斯塔斯工人最初的应援团体是占领过伟世通汽车零部件工厂的人。之后，AWL，SWP和社会党才参与进来，并且有很高的参与度。

src: Members of Workers' Climate Action attended Vestas workers' meetings and gave their opinions, but, Mark says, a committee organised by the workers and composed of workers was making all the decisions.
ref: 工人气候行动的成员参加了维斯塔斯工人会议并发表了他们的意见，但马克说，由工人组织并组成的委员会制定决策。

src: Mark also strongly rejected the support of Solidarity, a "nationalist trade union" closely associated with the BNP.
ref: 马克还强烈反对团结工会的支持，这是一个与民族主义联盟密切相关的“民族主义工会”。

src: In a July 24 statement, Solidarity backed the Vestas workers, with union executive member David Kerr saying "We are behind the Vestas workers 100 per cent.
ref: 在7月24日的声明中，团结工会支持维斯塔斯的工人，工会执行委员大卫·克尔说：“我们是维斯塔斯工人百分之百的后盾。

src: Mark, in reply, told Wikinews: "We do not want their support...they go against a lot of the things people believe in here.
ref: 马克在维基新闻上回应说：“我们不希望得到他们的支持……他们反对人们相信的很多东西。

src: Most of the Vestas occupiers remain independent of trade unions, with only three of the sixteen people inside being members of any union.
ref: 大多数维斯塔斯占领者仍然独立于工会，十六人中只有三人是相关工会的成员。

src: Mark closed with a message of solidarity with the occupiers of two Thomas Cook branches in Dublin, Ireland, whose employees began a sit-in at their offices on Friday after the announcement of surprise closures.
ref: 马克引用了团结工会的一句话，这句话是对占领托马斯库克公司都柏林、爱尔兰分公司的员工说的，他们在周五突然得知公司要关闭后，开始静坐示威。

src: "Don't back down...do not be pushed around, do not be intimidated".
ref: “不要退缩……不要被推倒，不要被吓倒”。

src: The Vestas occupiers have also exchanged messages of solidarity with SsangYong Motor Company in South Korea.
ref: 维斯塔斯的占领者还与韩国的双龙汽车公司交换了声援信息。

src: Workers at SsangYong have been occupying their factory since May 22 in protest against a 36% cut in employees there.
ref: 自5月22日起，双龙的工人一直在工厂，抗议当地员工被裁员36％。

src: The occupation continues accompanied by a warning of increased union unrest in Britain.
ref: 伴随着英国工会骚乱加剧的警告，占领仍在继续。

src: Neil O'Brien of centre-right think tank Policy Exchange told The Daily Telegraph that, while labour unrest had increased, the current state of affairs is "nothing compared to what is going to happen once the brakes are slammed on public spending."
ref: 中右翼智囊团政策交易所的尼尔·奥布莱恩告诉《每日电讯报》，尽管劳工骚乱有所加剧，但目前的状况“与一旦公共开支受到严重阻碍后将发生的情况相比，根本算不上什么”。

src: The Ministry of Defence has announced that a British soldier has been killed in an explosion in the Helmand Province of Afghanistan.
ref: 国防部宣布，一名英国士兵在阿富汗赫尔曼德省爆炸中丧生。

src: With this announcement, the total number of military personnel that has been killed in Afghanistan has now increased to 231.
ref: 随着这一事件的宣布，在阿富汗遇害的军事人员总数现已增至231人。

src: The man was killed on Saturday afternoon after an explosion near the town of Sangin.
ref: 星期六下午，在桑金镇发生爆炸后，这名男子被杀。

src: He came from 2nd Battalion, The Rifles, and was serving with 4th Battalion, The Rifles.
ref: 他来自步枪第2营，并在步枪第4营任职。

src: The soldier's family have now been informed of the death, the Ministry said.
ref: 国防部说，这名士兵的家人现已被告知死亡事件。

src: Lieutenant Colonel David Wakefield is the spokesperson for Task Force Helmand.
ref: 大卫·韦克菲尔德中校是特遣部队赫尔曼德的发言人。

src: "He died a soldier, doing his duty and among his fellow soldiers," he said.
ref: “他作为一名士兵牺牲，履行着自己的职责，并将存在于战友们的心中，”他说。

src: A UCLA team, headed by Brian Naranjo, has observed the nuclear fusion of deuterium nuclei in a tabletop device.
ref: 由布莱恩·纳兰霍领导的加州大学洛杉矶分校的一个研究小组观察到了桌面装置中氘核的核聚变。

src: The device uses a lithium tantalate (LiTaO3) pyroelectric crystal to ionize deuterium atoms and accelerate the ions towards a stationary erbium deuteride (ErD) target.
ref: 该装置使用钽酸锂（LiTaO3）热电晶体来电离氘原子并将离子加速到固定的铒氘（ErD）靶。

src: Fusion of two deuterium nuclei results in the emission of helium nuclei (alpha particles), neutrons and gamma rays.
ref: 两个氘核的融合导致氦原子核（α粒子），中子和伽马射线的发射。

src: The team anticipates applications of the device as a tabletop neutron generator, or in "microthrusters" for space propulsion.
ref: 该团队期望将该设备应用为桌面中子发生器，或用于空间推进的“微型推进器”。

src: It is possible that there may be applications related to nuclear weapons, although this possibility is not discussed in the research paper.
ref: 有可能存在与核武器有关的应用，尽管这一可能性在研究论文中没有讨论。

src: This development is not related to earlier claims of tabletop fusion or "cold fusion" having been observed during sonoluminescence.
ref: 这一进展与先前在声致发光过程中观察到的桌面融合或“冷融合”的说法无关。

src: In fact, the leader of the team behind this development was one of the main critics of earlier low-temperature fusion claims.
ref: 事实上，这一发展背后的团队领导者是早期低温融合主张的主要批评者之一。

src: This device is not the first reliable tabletop fusion device; the Farnsworth-Hirsch fusor, developed in the early 1960s in the laboratory of Philo T. Farnsworth who was instrumental in developing television, is sold commercially as a neutron source.
ref: 该设备不是第一个可靠的桌面融合设备。在20世纪60年代早期在费罗T.法恩斯沃思实验室研发的法恩斯沃思-赫舍静电约束核聚变装置曾在电视开发方面发挥了重要作用，现在作为中子源在商业上出售。

src: Research by Dr. Todd Rider of MIT suggests that the kind of non-equilibrium fusion produced in these sources will never be usable as an energy source (see his PhD thesis).
ref: 麻省理工学院的托德·莱德博士的研究表明，在这些来源中产生的那种非平衡融合将不能用作能源（参见他的博士论文）。

src: Irish airline Ryanair took a 12% slump in this morning’s trade, further intensifying concern about poor market conditions amid recessionary fears.
ref: 爱尔兰航空公司瑞安航空的股票价格在今早的交易中下跌12％，进一步加剧了市场对经济衰退下糟糕的市场状况的担忧。

src: Today, Ryanair announced a 27% drop in pre-tax profits in its third quarter net profits.
ref: 今天，瑞安航空宣布其第三季度净利润税前利润下降27％。

src: Further falls are predicted for the company in its next fiscal year.
ref: 预计公司下一财年利润将进一步下滑。

src: "With oil prices at $90 a barrel and fear of recession in the UK and many other European economies, the current outlook for the coming fiscal year is poor."
ref: “由于油价达到每桶90美元，并担心英国和许多其他欧洲经济体出现衰退，因此预计下一财年的前景不佳。”

src: "While it is impossible to accurately forecast full year fuel prices and yields this far in advance, there is now a significant chance that profits may decline next year," Ryanair CEO Michael O'Leary cautioned.
ref: 瑞安航空首席执行官迈克尔•奥利里警告说：“虽然目前无法准确预测全年燃油价格和收益率，但现在利润很有可能在明年下降。”

src: Ryanair said that it is not hedged against oil price increases for the next fiscal year.
ref: 瑞安航空表示，它不会对冲下一财年的油价上涨。

src: However, Ryanair is not the only airline to suffer from the economic downturn.
ref: 然而，瑞安航空不是唯一遭受经济衰退影响的航空公司。

src: However shrewd, Mr. O’Leary has plans to spend up to 200 million purchasing back shares in the company, which equates to 3% of the company share capital.
ref: 奥利里先生计划花费2亿美元回购公司股票，这相当于公司股本的3％。

src: The Free State Cheetahs and the Blue Bulls will meet next week in the 2006 Currie Cup final, South Africa's domestic club rugby competition.
ref: 自由邦猎豹队和蓝牛队将于下周在2006年科里杯决赛中相遇，这是南非国内俱乐部橄榄球比赛。

src: The Bulls were the first to go through, winning the first semi final against rivals Western Province, and the Cheetahs won their semi against the Sharks.
ref: 蓝牛队是第一个晋级的，赢得对阵西部队的半决赛，猎豹队在与鲨鱼的半决赛中获胜。

src: The Blue Bulls hosted WP at home, at Loftus Versfeld in Pretoria.
ref: 蓝牛队在比勒陀利亚的洛夫特斯维斯菲尔德主场迎战西部省队。

src: The Blue Bulls led WP 20 to nine at half time.
ref: 蓝牛队在半场结束时以20比9领先西部省队20分。

src: The gap was closed to 23-16 in the second half, but the home team eventually ran away with the game, in the end, winning 45 points to 23.
ref: 下半场差距缩小至23-16，但主队最终以45分比23分拿下了比赛。

src: At the second semi-final at Bloemfontein, the Cheetahs hosted the Sharks at the Free State Stadium.
ref: 在布隆方丹的第二场半决赛中，猎豹队在自由州体育场对阵了鲨鱼队。

src: The Free State were up 17 to nil during the first half.
ref: 上半场比分是17比0。

src: The score was furthered to 24 points, but the Sharks' JP Pietersen scored minutes before the half finished to give the Sharks their first points, and the game went onto halftime, Cheetahs leading 24-7.
ref: 比分进一步提高到24分，但鲨鱼队的皮耶特森在半场结束前几分钟得分，给鲨鱼队得到第一分，比赛进入中场，猎豹队以24-7领先。

src: The Cheetahs will host the final next week, being the highest place finalist (first, the Blue Bulls were second).
ref: 猎豹队最为积分排名最高的决赛队伍将在下周迎来主场决赛，（排名第一是猎豹队，第二是蓝牛队）。

src: The final will be the third Blue Bulls/Cheetahs affair in a row, and the fifth Blue Bulls appearance in a row.
ref: 决赛将是连续第三届蓝牛对猎豹队的比赛，蓝牛队第五次连续亮相。

src: Kenya's livestock minister, Mohammed Kuti, said today that cattle rustlers have killed eleven people near the central town of Isiolo.
ref: 肯尼亚畜牧部长默罕默德·库提今天表示，在中部城镇伊西奥罗附近，偷牛贼已经造成11人死亡。

src: Kuti, who is also the member of parliament for Isiolo, said the rustlers raided in a village in the area early in the day.
ref: 库提也是伊西奥罗的议会议员。他说，盗贼当天早些时候袭击了该地区的一个村庄。

src: "The eleven people were killed when rustlers stormed a village in Kisima area early this morning," he commented.
ref: 他说：“今天清晨，盗贼袭击了基西马地区的一个村庄，造成11人死亡。”

src: The state-owned Kenya Broadcasting Corporation puts the number of attackers at 300, and stated that they stole an unknown number of livestock.
ref: 国有的肯尼亚广播公司估计袭击者人数为300人，并表示他们偷走了数量未知的牲畜。

src: Cattle rustling is common in Kenya, and the extended drought has heightened competition for scarce sources of food.
ref: 在肯尼亚，偷牛的现象很常见，而持续的干旱加剧了对稀缺食物来源的竞争。

src: In mid-September, 30 people were killed in a shootout as rustlers from the Pokot tribe attacked the Samburu tribe and made off with hundreds of cattle.
ref: 9月中旬，波克特部落的盗贼袭击了桑布鲁部落，偷走了数百头牛，30人在枪战中丧生。

src: Sri Lankan government troops are claiming their first significant victory since the peace accord went into effect four years ago, capturing the rebel-held enclave of Sempur in the country's embattled east.
ref: 斯里兰卡政府军宣布取得和平协议生效4年来的首次重大胜利，夺取了被反叛分子占领的塞姆普尔飞地。塞姆普尔飞地位于四面受敌的斯里兰卡东部。

src: "We captured the main Sampur artillery position of the Tigers, We suspect they dismantled the guns or pulled them back.
ref: “我们占领了猛虎组织在萨姆普尔的主要炮兵阵地，我们怀疑他们拆除了大炮，或者把大炮撤走了。

src: Rambukwella noted that the government's troops received little or no resistance as they took the 10-km swath of land.
ref: 兰布奎拉指出，政府军在占领10公里长的土地时几乎没有受到抵抗。

src: Overnight shelling and mortar attacks from the Tamil Tigers, the main rebel group involved in the fighting, killed one government soldier and injured several others.
ref: 参与战斗的主要反叛组织泰米尔猛虎组织连夜发动炮击和迫击炮袭击，造成一名政府军士兵死亡，多人受伤。

src: The objective of the incursion, said Rambukwella, was to neutralize the use of three Tamil Tiger guns aimed on government troops to the south.
ref: 兰布奎拉说，这次入侵的目的是压制三泰米尔猛虎组织的对南部政府军的的武力袭击。

src: Tamil Tigers are claiming that they have not fled the area, and are continuing to engage government troops.
ref: 泰米尔猛虎组织声称他们没有逃离该地区，并继续与政府军交战。

src: On a CNN Wolf Blitzer Late Edition broadcast Sunday, U.S. Senators George Allen (R-VA) and Barbara Boxer (D-CA) both told Blitzer that in the furore created by the protest they believe President Bush should personally meet with Cindy Sheehan.
ref: 星期天，美国参议员乔治·艾伦（R-VA）和芭芭拉·博克瑟（D-CA）在美国有线电视新闻网沃尔夫·布利泽晚间播出的一则新闻中都对布利泽说，在抗议活动引发的狂怒中，他们认为布什总统应该亲自会见辛迪·希恩。

src: She is the mother of a soldier son killed in Iraq in April 2004, and leader of a protest march now camped near the presidential ranch in Crawford, Texas.
ref: 她是2004年4月在伊拉克阵亡的一名军人儿子的母亲，也是一场抗议游行的领导者，现在在德克萨斯州克劳福德的总统牧场附近扎营。

src: After returning from commercial break, Blitzer told his guests that CNN had just received a news bulletin from the White House.
ref: 广告结束后，布利泽告诉他的客人，CNN刚刚收到来自白宫的新闻简报。

src: The bulletin said that Bush had met previously with Sheehan in the summer of 2004.
ref: 该公报说，布什曾在2004年夏天与希恩会面。

src: Both Senators and Blitzer withheld further comment on the matter during the remaining segment of the show.
ref: 在节目的剩余部分，参议员和布利泽都没有就此事发表进一步评论。

src: Later that day, Cindy Sheehan herself appeared on CNN Sunday with Blitzer and said she did meet with Bush in Seattle with fifteen or sixteen other families.
ref: 当天晚些时候，辛迪·希恩本人也出现在周日的CNN新闻节目中，与布利策一同露面。她说，她确实与布什总统以及其他十五六个家庭在西雅图会面。

src: She defended her current protest by saying, "The whole meeting was simply bizarre and disgusting."
ref: 她为自己目前的抗议辩护说：“整个会议都是奇怪而令人作呕的。”

src: Sheehan said that Bush entered the meeting chamber with an insensitive comment to those present, "Who we'all honorin' today?"
ref: 希恩说，布什进入会议厅时对在场的人说了一句不带感情的话，“我们今天都尊敬谁？”

src: She added, "His mouth kept moving, but there was nothing in his eyes or anything else about him that showed me he really cared or had any real compassion at all."
ref: 她补充说，“他的嘴一直在动，但他的眼睛或其他任何东西都没有显示出他真的关心我，或有任何真正的同情。”

src: "This is a human being totally disconnected from humanity and reality."
ref: “这是一个完全脱离人性和现实的人。”

src: The angry mother of the fallen U.S. soldier on Saturday led a protest march of nearly 50 on the Bush ranch.
ref: 星期六，阵亡美军士兵的母亲愤怒地在布什农场领导了近50人的抗议游行。

src: Cindy Sheehan of Vacaville, California demanded, but was denied, the chance to speak with Bush and personally ask him, "'Why did you kill my son? "
ref: 来自加州瓦卡维尔的辛迪·希恩要求布什总统给她一次机会，并亲自问他：“你为什么要杀我的儿子？”，但此要求被拒绝了。

src: "What did my son die for?"
ref: “我的儿子为什么而死？”

src: Sheehan was met outside the ranch, after progress of the march was stopped by Texas troopers and the Secret Service, by national security adviser Steve Hadley and deputy White House chief of staff Joe Hagin.
ref: 在游行的进程被德州警察、特勤局、国家安全顾问史蒂夫·哈德利和白宫副幕僚长乔·哈金阻止后，希恩在牧场外与他会面。

src: Sheehan, unsatisfied with the meeting, vowed to remain camped outside the ranch until she is granted a personal interview with Bush.
ref: 希恩对这次会面并不满意，她发誓要继续在牧场外扎营，直到得到布什的私人接见。

src: Meanwhile, Bush arrived in Albuqerque, New Mexico Monday where he signed into law the new energy bill.
ref: 与此同时，布什星期一抵达新墨西哥州的阿尔伯克基，在那里签署了新能源法案。

src: He will travel back to his Texas ranch this week to meet with his defense and economic advisers, then later, he will travel to Illinois to sign a highway bill.
ref: 本周，他将回到德克萨斯州的农场，与国防和经济顾问会面，之后，他将前往伊利诺伊州签署一项高速公路法案。

src: Cindy Sheehan said Sunday that she plans to hold the roadside peace protest near Bush's ranch until he talks to her again.
ref: 辛迪·希恩星期天说，她计划在布什农场附近举行路边和平抗议活动，直到布什再次与她交谈。

src: Cindy's current comments are a drastic change from her comments in a 2004 interview with THE REPORTER of Vacaville, CA.
ref: 辛迪目前的言论与她2004年接受加州瓦卡维尔记者采访时的言论相比发生了巨大的变化。

src: "I now know he's sincere about wanting freedom for the Iraqis," Cindy said after their meeting.
ref: 辛迪在会晤后说：“我现在知道，他真心希望伊拉克人民获得自由。”

src: "I know he's sorry and feels some pain for our loss."
ref: “我知道他很抱歉，也为我们的损失感到痛苦。”

src: Xtra, owned by New Zealand telecommunication monopoly company Telecom, has created a joint venture between themselves and Yahoo!7, creating Yahoo Xtra.
ref: 新西兰电信垄断公司Telecom旗下的Xtra已经与雅虎创建了一家合资企业，创建了雅虎Xtra。

src: Yahoo!7 is the joint venture between Yahoo! and Australian network, Seven.
ref: 雅虎！7是雅虎！和澳大利亚网络7的合资企业。

src: The joint venture replaces the current and long-lasting partnership between Microsoft and Xtra, called XtraMSN.
ref: 这家合资企业取代了微软和Xtra目前的长期合作伙伴关系，称为Xtramsn。

src: The current partnership's contract will expire at the end of this year.
ref: 目前合伙企业的合同将于今年年底到期。

src: Telecom chose to change the partnership because Yahoo! has worked together with BT Group, Verizon and Rogers Communications.
ref: 电信选择改变合作关系是因为雅虎曾与英国电信集团、威瑞森和罗杰斯通信公司合作。

src: The new site, along with new online content will go online on around March 1, 2007.
ref: 新网站以及新的在线内容将于2007年3月1日左右上线。

src: The partnership will result in Yahoo!7 taking 51% control of the partnership and Xtra taking the remaining 49%.
ref: 合作关系将导致雅虎！7占合伙企业百分之五十一的控制权，Xtra占其余百分之四十九。

src: Kevin Kenrick, chief operating officer of Telecom, said that they will now be able to target the underdeveloped online advertising community.
ref: 电信首席运营官凯文·肯里克表示，他们现在将能够瞄准不发达的在线广告社区。

src: "We see there is a fantastic opportunity to grow online advertising and the share of the online market."
ref: “我们看到，这是一个增长在线广告和在线市场份额的绝佳机会。”

src: "Online advertising in New Zealand is getting to a tipping point of growth where there is a critical mass of online connections, broadband connections and an increase in the amount of time people are spending online."
ref: “新西兰的在线广告正接近一个增长的临界点，那里有大量的在线连接、宽带连接，人们在网上花费的时间也在增加。”

src: When the new site is launched, it will include a range of news, sport, weather, enhanced e-mail spam and virus protection, photo sharing, and internet radio.
ref: 当新网站推出时，它将包括一系列新闻，体育，天气，增强的电子邮件垃圾邮件和病毒防护，照片共享和互联网广播。

src: Theresa Gattung, chief executive of Telecom, said: "The Yahoo Xtra joint venture will provide New Zealanders with access to the world's best online services in a localised way."
ref: 电信首席执行官特里萨·加顿表示：“雅虎与Xtra的合资企业将为新西兰人提供本地化的全球最佳在线服务。”

src: Ian Smith, chief executive of Yahoo!7, said: "The company was achieving market growth of online advertising of between 50 and 60 per cent a year in Australia and believed it could do the same in New Zealand."
ref: 雅虎7！首席执行官伊恩·史密斯表示：“该公司在澳大利亚的在线广告市场实现了每年百分之五十至百分之六十的增长，相信在新西兰也能实现同样的增长。”

src: He said that the partnership will give them a great opportunity to showcase its tools, technology and platforms in New Zealand.
ref: 他表示，合作伙伴关系将为他们提供一个在新西兰展示其工具，技术和平台的绝佳机会。

src: Mr Kenrick said that the reason they had gotten a partnership with Yahoo!7 was that it is very difficult for a small player to develop its services in a New Zealand size market.
ref: 肯里克先生说，他们与雅虎！7建立合作关系的原因是，对于一个小公司来说，在一个新西兰规模的市场上发展自己的服务是非常困难的。

src: One other online company Xtra had considered for the partnership was Google, among others.
ref: 除了别的之外，Xtra曾考虑过的另一家在线公司是谷歌。

src: The reason they chose Yahoo!7 over other companies was because Yahoo!7 has the top position in big fields such as TV and video.
ref: 他们之所以选择雅虎！7而不是其他公司，是因为雅虎！7在电视和视频等大型领域中处于领先地位。

src: Mr Kenrick said: "The whole area of content management is one we thought would benefit from others with greater expertise and more scope."
ref: 肯里克表示：“我们认为，内容管理的整个领域都将受益于其他拥有更大专业知识和更大范围的领域。”

src: Protests have continued after Manchester United defeated Lille in the Champions League round of 16.
ref: 曼联在16强冠军联赛中击败里尔后，抗议活动仍在继续。

src: A free kick by Ryan Giggs in the second half of the game caused great controversy, as Lille was setting up their wall as the ball went into the back of the net.
ref: 下半场瑞恩·吉格斯的任意球引起了很大的争议，因为里尔队在布置人墙时球就进了球网后部。

src: Lille players nearly walked off the pitch at the time, but they were goaded back onto the field, and the game ended 1 - 0 for Manchester United.
ref: 里尔球员当时差点离开球场，但是他们又回到场上，曼联以1比0结束了比赛。

src: Lille made one protest to UEFA, asking for a replay of the match, but the appeal was turned down, and the decision of referee Eric Braamhaar stood for the time.
ref: 里尔向欧足联提出抗议，要求重赛，但上诉被驳回，裁判埃里克·布拉马尔的决定暂时搁置。

src: Lille has made a second protest, claiming a technical error on the referee's part, as the kick was taken without the whistle being blown.
ref: 里尔做出了第二次抗议，声称裁判的技术失误，因为点球是在没有吹哨子的情况下就罚出。

src: UEFA has rejected their appeal again, saying no proof of a technical error has been presented.
ref: 欧足联再次拒绝了他们的上诉，称没有提出技术错误的证据。

src: Lille will have 3 days after receiving notice from UEFA to lodge another appeal to the Court of Arbitration for Sport, or the claim will be dismissed in full.
ref: 里尔将在收到欧足联的通知后3天内再次向体育仲裁法庭提起上诉，否则将被全部驳回。

src: The second leg game between United and Lille will take place next Wednesday at Old Trafford.
ref: 曼联和里尔的第二回合比赛将于下周三在老特拉福德进行。

src: South Auckland Tyndale Park Christian School have been asking parents of the pupils for permission to administer corporal punishment.
ref: 南奥克兰丁道尔公园基督教学校一直要求学生家长允许他们实施体罚。

src: The parents are informed that corporal punishment is illegal in New Zealand schools but it quotes the Bible "we ought to serve God rather than men".
ref: 父母被告知新西兰学校的体罚是非法的，但学校引用了圣经教条“我们应该服务上帝而不是人”。

src: Today the New Zealand Herald reported that they had obtained documents that outline the school's "corporal correction" policy.
ref: 今天，新西兰先驱报报道他们已经得到了阐述学校“体罚纠正”政策的文件。

src: The policy states that the strap must be given on the hand after consultation with another staff member and while that staff member is present.
ref: 该政策规定，体罚只能鞭打手，而且要与另一工作人员协商，执行时该工作人员也必须在场。

src: The child will then either be spoken to, prayed with or both.
ref: 然后，孩子将被告知情况，或与他们一起祷告，或两者兼而有之。

src: Bradford said: "A full investigation was needed to ascertain whether any students at the school had been assaulted."
ref: 布拉德福德说：“需要进行全面调查，以确定学校的学生是否遭到殴打。”

src: Tyndale Park Christian School is a private Christian school that caters for students ranging from Year 1 to Year 13.
ref: 丁道尔公园基督教学校是一所私立基督教学校，适合1至13岁的学生。

src: Jan Brinkham, school manager, said: "Our enrollment policy is between the parents who enroll children here and ourselves."
ref: 学校经理简·布林克汉姆说：“我们的入学政策只适用于学校和将孩子送到这里来的父母之间。”

src: "We are not a state school; we are not bound by a particular enrollment policy."
ref: “我们不是州立学校，不受特定入学政策的约束。”

src: "This is between the parents that enrol their children at our school and that is where the buck stops."
ref: “招收他们的孩子在我们学校上学，这是父母之间的事，这就是责任所在。”

src: "It's got nothing to do with anyone else except our parents," he added.
ref: “除了这些父母，此事与他人没有任何关系，”他补充道。

src: The Education Review Office (ERO) and the Ministry of Education said that they were unaware of the policy and that private schools are not legally obliged to produce documents to government bodies.
ref: 教育评论办公室（ERO）和教育部表示，他们不了解这项政策，私立学校没有法律义务向政府机构出示文件。

src: ERO last year said in a report: "The school manager should ensure that parents are clearly informed that the school administers no corporal punishment."
ref: ERO去年在一份报告中说：“学校经理应该确保家长被明确告知学校不会实施体罚。”

src: Charlene Scotti, ERO area manger of review services said: "Some schools had policies to call parents in for cases where corporal punishment was required, but were careful not to include staff in punishing students."
ref: ERO审查服务区负责人沙琳·斯科蒂说：“有些学校有政策要求父母参加需要体罚的事件，但却很谨慎地避免学校职员参与体罚。”

src: Bruce Adin, Ministry of Education northern regional manager, said: "The legality of the Tyndale Park document was unclear, but if school staff strapped a student it would be illegal."
ref: 教育部北区区域经理布鲁斯·阿丁说：“丁道尔公园学校文件的合法性尚不清楚，但如果学校工作人员鞭打学生，将是非法的。”

src: "Corporal punishment in schools was made illegal years ago because it was considered to be brutal and unnecessary," Bradford said.
ref: 布拉德福德说：“多年前，学校的体罚行为已是非法的，因为这样比较凶残而且也没有必要。”

src: Apple sued HTC, a Taiwanese manufacturer of mobile phones, on Tuesday, in a lawsuit claiming 20 different patent infringements, largely relating to the user interface of the iPhone, which is manufactured by Apple.
ref: 周二，苹果公司起诉台湾移动电话制造商HTC，该诉讼声称有20项不同的专利侵权，主要涉及由苹果公司生产的iPhone用户界面。

src: According to the lawsuit, filed with both the United States District Court in Delaware and the United States International Trade Commission, HTC violated Apple patents pertaining to both multi-touch gestures, which allow users to interact with a device's touchscreen using multiple fingers, as well as patents involving more general touch features.
ref: 根据向特拉华州美国地方法院和美国国际贸易委员会提起的诉讼，HTC违反了苹果公司多项触控手势的专利包括允许用户使用多个手指与设备的触摸屏进行交互的专利和涉及更多触摸功能的专利。

src: Devices mentioned in the suit are all phones manufactured by HTC that use Google's Android software.
ref: 诉讼中提到的设备都是由HTC制造的使用谷歌Android软件的手机。

src: The lawsuit says that HTC, in selling the phones, knowingly induced those using the mentioned products to violate patents owned by Apple, some of which were filed in the mid-1990s.
ref: 该诉讼称HTC在出售手机时故意诱使那些使用上述产品的顾客侵犯苹果公司拥有的专利，其中一些专利是在20世纪90年代中期提起的。

src: Although the lawsuit named only HTC as a defendant, many viewed the action as an indirect challenge to Google, as the lawsuit only covered HTC devices running Google's Android software.
ref: 尽管这起诉讼的被告只是HTC，但许多人认为此行为是对谷歌的间接挑战，因为该诉讼仅涉及运行谷歌安卓软件的HTC设备。

src: The operating system has seen increasing popularity in the last year, and has increasingly included multi-touch input of the type mentioned in the lawsuit.
ref: 操作系统在去年越来越受欢迎，并且越来越多的系统包含诉讼中提到的多点触控输入功能。

src: One analyst, from Kaufman Brothers, said, "I think this is kind of an indirect lawsuit against Google."
ref: 来自考夫曼兄弟的一位分析师表示，“我认为这是对谷歌的间接诉讼。”

src: Others said that Apple was suing HTC instead of Google because the phone manufacturer was an easier target than Google.
ref: 其他人表示苹果公司起诉HTC而非谷歌是因为手机制造商比谷歌更容易下手。

src: Another analyst from MKM Partners said that "HTC is an optimal target for Apple-it's a relatively small vendor with a weak brand."
ref: MKM公司的另一位分析师表示，“HTC是苹果公司的最佳目标-它是一个品牌较弱规模较小的供应商。”

src: In the documents, Apple said that their goal was to permanently block HTC from importing and selling devices that had the offending qualities, as well a significant cash payment in damages.
ref: 在文件中，苹果公司表示他们的目标是永久阻止HTC进口和销售具有违规品质的设备，以及赔偿大额损失。

src: An ATM in Virginia Beach, Virginia was cracked so it would give out 4 times as much money as it was supposed to; and this was done just by entering numbers into the keypad.
ref: 弗吉尼亚州弗吉尼亚海滩的一台自动取款机被破解，使得它可以取出4倍于输入值的现金，而破解过程只需要使用键盘输入数字。

src: A man bought a pre-paid card and used it in the ATM.
ref: 一名男子买了一张预付卡并在自动取款机上使用它。

src: The attack consisted of a magic number which was entered in the PIN keypad, which caused the machine to disburse $20 bills when it recorded giving out $5 dollar bills.
ref: 攻击需要在密码键盘上输入“万能数字”，这可以使原本5美元的取款请求，变成20美元。

src: No one in authority noticed for nine days, until an honest ATM user reported the machine was giving out too much money.
ref: 在一个诚实的用户报告机器吐出过多金额前，九天时间里竟没有相关人员发现这个问题。

src: News agency AAP reported last Thursday that George H. W. Bush would be attending the Forbes Global CEO Conference, which starts this Tuesday.
ref: 新闻机构AAP上周四报道，乔治·H·W·布什将出席本周二开始的福布斯全球CEO大会。

src: These reports have now been revealed to be a hoax.
ref: 现在已经发现这些报道是一个骗局。

src: They were based on a media release and associated website, and reported in Wikinews, as well as a number of print publications in Australia.
ref: 这些报道是基于一则媒体发布和其相关网站的消息，并在维基新闻以及澳大利亚的一些印刷出版物上报道。

src: The president and publisher of Forbes Asia, William Adamopoulos, has confirmed that Mr Bush will not be attending.
ref: 福布斯亚洲区总裁兼出版商威廉姆·亚当莫普洛斯证实布什不会参加。

src: "Mr Bush, Sr. is definitely not attending the conference," he said.
ref: “老布什先生肯定不参加会议，”他说。

src: Mr Adamopoulos said that he is considering pursuing legal action against the originators of the hoax.
ref: 亚当莫普洛斯先生说，他正在考虑对骗局的发起人采取法律行动。

src: According to reports, the media release and website used the Forbes name.
ref: 据报道，该媒体发布和网站使用了福布斯的名字。

src: "While we would not wish to oppose free speech in any way - for free speech is one of the things that unites both Australia and the United States - we are investigating what legal action could be open to us," he said.
ref: “虽然我们不希望以任何方式反对言论自由 - 因为言论自由是澳大利亚和美国联合的原因之一- 我们正在调查可以采取的法律行动，”他说。

src: Two Australian broadsheets fell for the hoax put out by the 30A protest network.
ref: 由于30A抗议网络制造的骗局，两份澳大利亚报纸销量遭遇下跌。

src: The network sent out a press release purporting to be from the organisers of the Annual Forbes Conference, claiming that former US President George H. W. Bush was to attend the conference.
ref: 该网络发布了一份据称来自年度福布斯会议组织者的新闻稿，声称前美国总统乔治·H·W·布什将出席会议。

src: Bruce Knobloch of the 30A network indicated that the purpose of the hoax was to show how shallow the media coverage of the conference and the protest is.
ref: 30A网络的布鲁斯·科诺布赫洛表示，骗局的目的是表明媒体对会议和抗议的报道有多浅薄。

src: The hoax was originally reported by AAP, who checked the claim with a telephone number provided on the press release before publishing it.
ref: 这个骗局最初由AAP报道，AAP在发布之前用新闻稿上提供的电话号码检查了真实性。

src: The hoax was then picked up by several internet news sites, including this one.
ref: 然后，包括这个网站在内的几个互联网新闻网站都选择了这个骗局。

src: AAP quickly published a retraction, however that didn't stop the hoax making its way into the paper versions of two of Australia's most respected broadsheets, The Sydney Morning Herald, and The Australian.
ref: AAP很快就撤了稿，但这并没有阻止这种骗局进入澳大利亚最受尊敬的两份报纸“悉尼先驱晨报”和“澳大利亚人”的印刷版。

src: The Forbes conference will take place at the Sydney Opera House, and will be attended by hundreds of CEOs from around the world, as well as Australian Prime Minister John Howard, former New York Mayor Rudolph Giuliani, and Steve Forbes himself.
ref: 福布斯会议将在悉尼歌剧院举行，来自世界各地的数百名首席执行官以及澳大利亚总理约翰·霍华德、前纽约市长鲁道夫·朱利安尼和史蒂夫·福布斯本人将出席。

src: There is a protest planned to coincide with the conference.
ref: 有一个抗议活动计划在会议期间举行。

src: Protest organisers have called for people to assemble at Customs Square at Circular Quay at 5pm on Tuesday 30 August.
ref: 抗议组织者呼吁人们于8月30日星期二下午5点在环形码头的海关广场集合。

src: The protest was originally planned for the Opera House forecourt, however police have declared this area to be an exclusion zone.
ref: 抗议最初计划在歌剧院的前院进行，但警方已宣布该地区为禁区。

src: A man has been charged with the murder of a 64-year old British woman in Hong Kong.
ref: 一名男子被控在香港谋杀一名64岁的英国女子。

src: Janet Gilson's body was found dead in a flat on Lamma Island on Saturday.
ref: 周六，珍妮特·吉尔森被发现死在南丫岛的一个公寓内。

src: She had been in Hong Kong since March 6th and was staying with her niece.
ref: 她从3月6日开始在香港和她的侄女住在一起。

src: It is believed the man who has been charged with her murder was the estranged husband of her niece.
ref: 据信被指控犯有谋杀罪的男子是她侄女已分居的丈夫。

src: Police in Hong Kong would not confirm the identity of the suspect but have said that he was an "expatriate".
ref: 香港警方可能不会向外界证实嫌疑人的身份，但称他是“外籍人士”。

src: Gilson's niece Julia Fareed told the South China Morning Post that the man police are questioning is her estranged husband who is originally from the Maldives.
ref: 吉尔森的侄女朱莉娅·法瑞德告诉南华早报，警察正在质疑的是她已分居的丈夫，他来自马尔代夫。

src: An official cause of death has not been released but it has been reported that Gilson did receive head injuries.
ref: 官方的死亡原因尚未公布，但据报道，吉尔森确实头部受到了伤害。

src: Regional director for the Salvation Army Major Carol Bailey paid tribute to Gilson, saying, "She was a deeply spiritual woman and was highly respected and loved by all those with whom she came into contact."
ref: 救世军区域主任卡罗·贝利少校向吉尔森表示敬意，他说：“她是一位思想深刻的女性，受到所有与她接触过的人的尊重和喜爱。”

src: As the National Disaster Coordinating Agency continues to evaluate the reports coming from regions all over the Philippines, bodies of those who drowned or perished while at sea have started to float into the shores of islands in Central Philippines.
ref: 当国家灾害协调机构持续评估来自菲律宾各地区的报告时，那些在海上淹死或失踪者的尸体已经开始漂浮至菲律宾中部岛屿的海岸。

src: On Thursday, the Philippines Coast Guard reported that villagers recovered 124 bodies whose identities are still uncertain.
ref: 周四，菲律宾海岸警卫队报告说，村民收回了124具身份尚不确定的尸体。

src: Advanced decomposition has made identification difficult for authorities and, fearing a health epidemic, all of the bodies were immediately buried in makeshift graves.
ref: 严重的腐烂使当局难以鉴定身份，由于担心传染病，所有尸体都立即被埋在临时坟墓中。

src: The identification of the victims has caused a stir among relatives looking for their missing family members, as forensic investigators were rendered helpless in proceeding to the scattered locations where bodies have been washing ashore.
ref: 鉴定牺牲者的工作在寻找失踪家人的亲属中引起了骚动，因为法医调查员在尸体被冲上岸的各分散地点起不到作用。

src: Over 100 divers from the combined Philippines and United States naval forces have been working overtime to retrieve the bodies of passengers trapped inside the capsized MV Princess of the Stars.
ref: 来自菲律宾和美国联合海军的100多名潜水员一直在加班加点，以搜寻被困在倾覆了的星光公主号中的乘客尸体。

src: Disaster management officials in the country announced that the dead from the weekend battering from Typhoon Fengshen could reach to a high of 1,300 people nation-wide.
ref: 该国的灾害管理官员宣布，周末台风风神袭击后的死者在全国可能高达1300人。

src: State officials reported that some 2.4 million Filipinos were affected by the disaster, putting property damage at a conservative estimate of $125 million.
ref: 国家官员报告说，大约240万菲律宾人受到这场灾难的影响，财产损失保守估计为1.25亿美元。

src: Relatives of missing passengers were finally brought near the site where the ferry capsized.
ref: 失踪乘客的亲属最终被带到渡轮倾覆的地点附近。

src: On board a tug boat, relatives became severely emotional after a Roman Catholic mass was celebrated to commemorate the memory of those lost at sea.
ref: 在一艘拖船上，追思海上失踪人员的天主教弥撒仪式使得相关家属情绪激动。

src: The Government of the United Kingdom has assumed direct rule over the Turks and Caicos Islands in the Caribbean, after an enquiry discovered what it alleges to be corruption and "serious dishonesty" at the highest levels.
ref: 英国政府在一次调查中发现了最高级别的腐败和“严重不诚实”后，对加勒比的特克斯和凯科斯群岛实行了直接统治。

src: The islands' administration and Premier have been suspended for up to two years and their powers transferred to the UK-appointed Governor.
ref: 这些岛屿的政府官员和首相已被停职长达两年，其权力已移交给英国任命的州长。

src: The British Government has taken the unusual step because it alleges that former Premier Michael Misick and members of his cabinet have enriched themselves through the selling of crown land and other corrupt practices, and that the limits to suffrage in the islands make it impossible to form a jury immune to the influence of the accused.
ref: 英国政府采取了不同寻常的举措，因为它声称前首相迈克尔·米西克及其内阁成员通过出售王室土地和其他腐败行为来满足自己的利益，而岛上的选举权限制，使其无法成立一个不受被指控人士影响的陪审团。

src: "This is a serious constitutional step which the UK government has not taken lightly, but these measures are essential in order to restore good governance and sound financial management", said the Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs Chris Bryant.
ref: 议会副国务卿克里斯·布莱恩特说：“这是一个严肃的宪法手段，英国政府并不是轻易执行这一措施，这些措施对于恢复善政和健全的财务管理至关重要”。

src: However the reaction by the local government have been hostile, with the action being described as a "coup" by deposed Premier Galmo Williams.
ref: 然而，当地政府的反应一直是敌对的，被罢免的首相加尔莫·威廉姆斯将该举措描述为“政变”。

src: He told the BBC, "A coup is anything that has been done without the will of the people and being a colony anything the British government wants to do to us they can do to us."
ref: 他告诉英国广播公司，“政变是任何在没有人民意愿的情况下完成的事件。作为殖民地，英国政府可以对我们为所欲为。”

src: The Turks and Caicos Islands have been British overseas territories since 1799, and since achieving self-governance in 1976 have significantly developed offshore banking and tourism industries.
ref: 自1799年以来，特克斯和凯科斯群岛一直是英国的海外领土，自1976年实现自治以来，这里已经大大发展了离岸银行业和旅游业。

src: The U.S. economy and its currency as an instrument of world trade has suffered a series of major setbacks in recent months.
ref: 近几个月来，美国经济及其作为世界贸易工具的货币遭遇了一系列重大挫折。

src: Some analysts say that the Federal Reserve's September 18th dramatic rate cut to 4.75% from 5.25% may be a case of "too little, too late", or that it was excessive and dooms the dollar.
ref: 一些分析师表示，美联储9月18日从5.25％降至4.75％的戏剧性降息，可能仍然“太少，太晚”，或者太过度而使美元崩溃。

src: Today, Saudi officials declined to cut interest rates in lockstep with the US Federal Reserve for the first time in decades.
ref: 今天，沙特官员几十年来首次拒绝与美国联邦储备委员会同步降息。

src: According to Ambrose Evans-Pritchard, International Business Editor for The Daily Telegraph, "it's a signal that the oil-rich Gulf kingdom is preparing to break the dollar currency peg in a move that risks setting off a stampede out of the dollar across the Middle East."
ref: “每日电讯报”国际商业编辑安布罗斯·埃文斯·普里查德表示，“这是一个信号，表明石油资源丰富的海湾王国正在准备打破盯住美元的汇率制度，此举有可能引发整个中东地区的美元恐慌。”

src: Hans Redeker, the Currency Chief at BNP Paribas, also stated today that Saudi Arabia's move to not adjust their own interest rates in sync with the Fed's cuts is a very dangerous situation for the US dollar.
ref: 法国巴黎银行首席货币执行官汉斯·雷德克今天也表示，沙特阿拉伯不因美联储的削减同步调整自己的利率，这对美元来说是非常危险的。

src: Redeker points out that "Saudi Arabia has $800bn (£400bn) in their future generation fund, and the entire region has $3,500bn under management.
ref: 雷德克指出，“沙特阿拉伯在其未来基金中拥有8000亿美元（4000亿英镑），整个地区管理着3.5万亿美元的资金。

src: They face an inflationary threat and do not want to import an interest rate policy set for the recessionary conditions in the United States."
ref: 他们面临通货膨胀威胁，不想为美国的经济衰退条件输入一套利率政策。

src: Saudi central bank officials said that "appropriate measures" would be taken to stop the large capital inflows into the country.
ref: 沙特中央银行官员表示，将采取“适当措施”来阻止大量资本流入该国。

src: The Federal Reserve's half-point rate cut has already caused a plunge in the world dollar index to a fifteen-year low, reaching the weakest level ever against the Euro at just under $1.40.
ref: 美联储的半点降息已导致世界美元指数暴跌至十五年来的低点，兑欧元汇率跌至最低水平，1欧元接近1.40美元。

src: The Fed hopes that by making it cheaper to borrow, people will start spending and investing more.
ref: 美联储希望通过降低借贷成本，人们将开始消费和进行更多投资。

src: However, some analysts fear the cut will worsen inflation, making it harder to get personal loans, and further decrease confidence in the dollar around the world.
ref: 然而，一些分析师担心此次降息将加剧通货膨胀，使得获得个人贷款变得更加困难，并进一步降低全球对美元的信心。

src: There are already signs that global investors have started rejecting U.S. Treasury securities, and recent U.S. government data on foreign holdings show a decline in purchases of US securities from $97bn to just $19bn in July.
ref: 已经有迹象表明，全球投资者开始拒绝购买美国国债，而美国政府最近公布的海外持股数据显示，7月份购买美国国债的规模从970亿美元降至190亿美元。

src: In response to Ben Bernanke's statements today about a potential mortgage and housing market crisis, CNN anchor Wolf Blitzer said, "If adjustable mortgage rates go up, people may not be able to afford their mortgage payments."
ref: 为了回应本·伯南克今天关于潜在抵押贷款和房地产市场危机的声明，CNN主播沃尔夫·布利泽说：“如果可调整的抵押贷款利率上升，人们可能无法负担抵押贷款的偿还。”

src: Former Federal Reserve chief Alan Greenspan said earlier this week that housing prices may fall by "double digits" as the subprime crisis bites harder, prompting households to cut back sharply on spending.
ref: 本周早些时候美联储前首席执行官艾伦·格林斯潘表示，由于次贷危机更加严重，房价可能下跌“两位数”，促使家庭大幅削减开支。

src: Jim Rogers, the economic commentator and former partner of George Soros, stated, "If Ben Bernanke starts running those printing presses even faster than he's already doing, we are going to have a serious recession.
ref: 经济评论员并是乔治·索罗斯前合伙人的吉姆·罗杰斯表示，“如果本•伯南克继续加快印钞，那么我们将面临严重的经济衰退。

src: The dollar's going to collapse, the bond market's going to collapse.
ref: 美元将崩溃，债券市场将崩溃。

src: In recent months, the U.S. dollar has taken several other significant hits including Kuwait's decision in May to also break its dollar peg, and threats by China to interfere with the U.S. economy, calling it their nation's "nuclear option".
ref: 最近几个月，美元还遭受了其他一些重大打击，其中包括科威特5月份亦决定打破其盯住美元的政策，以及中国干涉美国经济的威胁，中国称此举为国家的“终极选择”。

src: According to public sources, the Chinese government has begun a concerted campaign of economic threats against the United States, hinting that it may liquidate its vast holding of US treasuries if Washington imposes trade sanctions that seek to force a Yuan revaluation.
ref: 据公众消息，中国政府已经开始了一场针对美国的经济威胁的联合行动，暗示如果华盛顿实施旨在迫使人民币升值的贸易制裁，中国政府可能会清算其持有的大量美国国债。

src: NASA has successfully launched Space Shuttle Discovery after over a month of delays.
ref: 经过一个多月的延误后，NASA成功发射了航天飞机“发现号”。

src: Discovery lifted off at 7:43 p.m. (EDT) from Cape Canaveral Air Force Station in Florida in the United States after NASA declared the weather to be "100% go for launch".
ref: 在NASA宣布天气完全适合发射后，“发现号”于美国东部夏令时间（EDT）晚上7：43在佛罗里达州卡纳维拉尔角空军基地起飞。

src: "The clouds broke up and that's why we were go for launch," stated mission control on NASA TV.
ref: “因为云层散开了，所以我们决定发射，”NASA电视台的调度中心说。

src: A crystal clear blue sky could be seen in Discovery's background about 40 minutes before launch.
ref: 在发射前的40分钟，可以看到“发现号”背后清澈的蓝天。

src: NASA earlier had made jokes about a small black bat attached to the rear of the external fuel tank delaying launch, but NASA assured it would not be a problem for launch.
ref: NASA早些时候开玩笑说，因为一只黑色的小蝙蝠碰到了外侧油箱的后部，导致了发射延期，但是NASA保证它将不会成为发射的问题。

src: NASA also said that there was a bat on STS-72 which managed to fly away just before the shuttle launched.
ref: NASA还表示，STS-72上有一只蝙蝠在航天飞机发射前就成功飞走了。

src: The current scheduled mission, STS-119, is set to fly the Integrated Truss Structure segment ("S" for starboard, the right side of the station, and "6" for its place at the very end of the starboard truss) and install the final set of power-generating solar arrays to the International Space Station.
ref: 目前的预定任务STS-119将飞向综合桁架结构部分（“S”表示右舷，即空间站的右侧，“6”表示具体位置编号，即右桁架末端），并安装国际空间站的最后一组太阳能发电阵列。

src: The arrays consist of two 115-foot-long arrays, for a total wing span of 240 feet, including the equipment that connects the two halves and allows them to twist as they track the sun.
ref: 发电阵列由两组115英尺长的阵列组成，总翼展长度为240英尺，其中包括连接两部分的设备在内，这些设备使得它们在追踪太阳时能够扭动。

src: Altogether, the four sets of arrays can generate 84 to 120 kilowatts of electricity – enough to provide power for more than 40 average homes.
ref: 这四组阵列总共可以产生84到120千瓦的电力，足以为40多个普通家庭提供电力。

src: Commander Lee Archambault will lead Discovery's crew of seven, along with Pilot Tony Antonelli, and Mission Specialists Joseph Acaba, John Phillips, Steve Swanson, Richard Arnold, and Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency astronaut Koichi Wakata.
ref: 指挥官李·阿查姆曼堡尔特将带领“发现号”的七名船员执行此次任务，船员包括飞行员托尼·安东内利、任务专家约瑟夫·阿卡巴、约翰·菲利普斯、史蒂夫·斯万森、理查德·阿尔诺德和日本宇航研究开发局的宇航员若田光一。

src: The next change scheduled the liftoff date for February 12, 2009.
ref: 下一次的任务原本安排在2009年2月12日升空执行。

src: It was then delayed until February 27, but was then delayed indefinitely on February 20 after NASA discovered an issue with the hydrogen control valves.
