ref: 此后该任务推迟到了2月27日，但在NASA发现氢控制阀出现问题后，于2月20日开始无限延迟。

src: A power outage in Indonesia that left about 100 million people without electricity has caused a political crisis.
ref: 印度尼西亚停电造成约1亿人无电，导致政治危机。

src: The country's state-owned energy monopoly, PLN, has not determined the immediate cause, and the country's president has ordered the national intelligence agency and police to investigate.
ref: 该国的国有能源专卖局PLN尚未确定其直接原因，该国总统已下令国家情报机构和警方进行调查。

src: The blackout appears related to deficiencies in Indonesia's power generation capacity.
ref: 停电似乎与印度尼西亚发电能力的不足有关。

src: The power failure follows attempts to deal with the country's growing energy crisis, including conservation and trying to allow private companies to provide energy, which was ruled unconstitutional in 2004.
ref: 电力故障发生在应对该国不断增长的能源危机的尝试之后，包括节约和试图允许私营公司提供能源，但这在2004年被裁定为违宪。

src: In January, the Indonesian government held a special energy summit to attract investment in their energy infrastructure.
ref: 1月，印度尼西亚政府举行了一次特别能源峰会，以吸引对其能源基础设施的投资。

src: At the summit they set the goal of adding 22,000 megawatts to Indonesia's present capacity of 23,000 megawatts, in order to support the country's growth.
ref: 在峰会上，他们设定目标，在印度尼西亚现有的23,000兆瓦发电量基础上增加22,000兆瓦，以支撑该国的发展。

src: The World Bank and others have warned that without more investment in the country's energy infrastructure an energy deficit will result.
ref: 世界银行及其他机构曾警告说，如果不对该国的能源基础设施进行更多投资，将导致能源短缺。

src: "The power outage has resulted in worries over an energy crisis which could hurt the nation's industrial sector," said a trader on Indonesia's stock market.
ref: 印度尼西亚股市的一位交易员表示，“停电导致了对能源危机的担忧，这可能会损害国家的工业部门。”

src: The outage began at 10:23 a.m. local time, August 18, 2005, when power failed along the electrical system that connects Java, Bali, and Madura, causing outages in Java and Bali.
ref: 停电于当地时间2005年8月18日上午10点23分开始，当时连接爪哇岛、巴厘岛和马杜拉的电力系统发生电力故障，导致爪哇岛和巴厘岛停电。

src: Almost half of the country depends on the electrical grid that experienced failures.
ref: 几乎半个国家都依赖于这条故障的电网系统。

src: The blackout caused traffic jams in Jakarta, forced cancellation of several international and domestic flights at Jakarta's Soekarno-Hatta International Airport, shut down Jakarta's electric train service, and disrupted hospital operations.
ref: 大停电导致雅加达的交通拥堵，雅加达苏加诺-哈达国际机场的部分国际和国内航班被迫取消，雅加达的电力火车服务被关闭，医院的运营也受到了影响。

src: Some larger hospitals were forced to delay surgeries while many smaller hospitals could not receive patients.
ref: 一些较大的医院被迫推迟手术，而许多较小的医院无法接诊病人。

src: About 1,800 officers were called into action by Jakarta's metropolitan police to deal with short-term problems caused by the power failure.
ref: 雅加达市政府警方约有1,800名警官出动，处理因停电造成的短期问题。

src: Candles used in place of electric lighting started six fires in Jakarta alone.
ref: 因使用蜡烛代替电灯，仅仅在雅加达就发生了六起火情。

src: Mulyo Aji, a PLN official, said more power failures are likely in the future as energy demand increases, without any corresponding new supplies of electricity scheduled to come online soon.
ref: PLN官员穆约·阿吉表示，随着能源需求不断增加，而新的电力供应计划不能快速就位，未来可能会出现更多电力故障。

src: Voting polls opened in Kosovo at 7am (0600 UTC); the first time since declaring independence from Serbia last year.
ref: 科索沃投票站于早上7点（UTC0600）开放；这是其去年宣布自塞尔维亚独立出来后的第一次。

src: Both ethnic Albanians and the minority Serb population may vote for local mayors and councillors, a move seen as testing the government's capacity to organise its own democratic elections.
ref: 阿尔巴尼亚族和少数族群的塞尔维亚人都可以投票选举地方市长和地方议员，此举被视为对政府组织自己的民主选举能力的考验。

src: The territory was run by the United Nations mission before its split from Serbia in February 2008.
ref: 该地区在2008年2月脱离塞尔维亚之前由联合国使团管理。

src: The Kosovo police have tightened security, and the 13,000 Kosovo Force troops — a NATO-led peacekeeping force — are on standby, according to its commander, General Markus Bentler.
ref: 科索沃警察已经加强了安全，据其指挥官马库斯·本特勒将军说，由北约领导的维和军力的1.3万科索沃部队正在待命。

src: The main concern is the number of citizens who will vote, as only a 40% turnout level is expected.
ref: 主要担心的是参加投票的公民人数，因为预计投票率只有百分之40。

src: According to the BBC, most of the 120,000 Serbs oppose Kosovo's independence.
ref: 据BBC报道，12万塞尔维亚人中大多数反对科索沃独立。

src: The government in Belgrade and the Serbian Orthodox Church have called for a boycott.
ref: 贝尔格莱德政府和塞尔维亚东正教呼吁抵制。

src: Polling stations are due to close at 7pm (1800 UTC); the first unofficial results are expected late Sunday evening.
ref: 投票站定于下午7时（UTC1800时）关闭；第一批非官方结果预计将于周日晚间公布。

src: At least three people are dead after two small planes collided in a remote area of Wyoming in the United States.
ref: 两架小型飞机在美国怀俄明州偏远地区相撞，至少有三人死亡。

src: The collision occurred between a Cirrus SR22 and a Cessna 172 near Rock Springs just before 12:30 p.m. on Sunday afternoon.
ref: 周日下午12点30分，一架卷云SR22和一架塞斯纳172飞机在罗克斯普林斯附近相撞。

src: The Cirrus was carrying two people, both of whom died, and was traveling from Polson, Montana to Rock Springs.
ref: 卷云载着两人从蒙大拿州的波尔森前往罗克斯普林斯，两人都已死亡。

src: The Cessna had one person on board who also died, but its destination is not yet known.
ref: 塞斯纳飞机上载有的一人也已死亡，但其目的地尚不清楚。

src: One deployed parachute is reported to have been seen near the wreckage, but reports state it does not appear to have been deployed by a survivor.
ref: 据报道，在飞机残骸附近发现了一个降落伞，但报道说，降落伞似乎不是由幸存者打开的。

src: FOX News quotes KSL in Salt Lake City, Utah as saying that debris from the collision was scattered over five acres in an area that made it difficult for emergency officials to get to.
ref: 福克斯新闻援引犹他州盐湖城KSL电视台的话说，碰撞产生的碎片散落在5英亩的区域内，使得紧急救援人员难以到达。

src: The names of the deceased have not been released, pending the notification of family members.
ref: 死者的姓名尚未公布，等待家属通知。

src: An inquest was held this week after a 10-year-old boy died after being shot with an air rifle in Swansea, Wales.
ref: 本周，威尔士斯旺西市一名10岁男孩被气枪击中身亡，随后警方进行了调查。

src: On September 27, 2009, Rhys Johnson and his friend, aged 12, took, without permission, an air gun which belonged to Rhys' father.
ref: 2009年9月27日，里斯·约翰逊和他12岁的朋友未经允许，拿走了里斯父亲的气枪。

src: The two boys played with it near to the location of the Johnson house in the district of Llansamlet.
ref: 这两个男孩在兰萨姆雷特区的约翰逊住家附近玩耍。

src: They were unsupervised when they were shooting the gun at a bucket that was hanging in a tree and a tin can that was placed on a box.
ref: 在无人监管的环境里，他们用气枪射击挂在树上的水桶和放在盒子上的锡罐。

src: The friend, who has remained anonymous, shot Rhys Johnson in the heart with the .22 caliber Webley Vulcan air gun at close range.
ref: 这名不愿透露姓名的朋友近距离用口径为0.22的韦伯利·沃肯气枪射中了里斯·约翰逊的心脏。

src: Johnson died in a hospital at 0211 BST the next day from said wound.
ref: 约翰逊因该伤势而于次日英国夏令时0211在医院去世。

src: Philip Rogers, a coroner from Swansea, recorded the verdict as an accidental death.
ref: 来自斯旺西的验尸官菲利普·罗杰斯将判决记录为意外死亡。

src: He was told that the friend had no intention of shooting Johnson.
ref: 因为他被告知，这名朋友无意射击约翰逊。

src: Therefore, no legal action has been taken against Johnson's friend accordingly.
ref: 因此，没有对约翰逊的朋友采取相应的法律行动。

src: The boy held the rifle at the butt in his right arm with his finger on the trigger.
ref: 那男孩右手拿着步枪枪托，手指扣在扳机上。

src: As he turned he felt the gun to be heavy.
ref: 当他转过身时，觉得枪很重。

src: As it fell away he pulled it towards him and accidentally fired the trigger.
ref: 当枪掉下来时，他把它拉向自己而不小心扣动了扳机。

src: Rhys was holding himself to the chest—he thought he was joking then he thought he's shot Rhys in the hand.
ref: 里斯紧紧按住自己的胸膛，他以为他在开玩笑，然后又以为自己射中了里斯的手。

src: He saw no blood and Rhys ran to the house."
ref: 他没看见血，里斯就跑到屋里去了。”

src: The detective stated that the friend "was crying and apologizing for what happened."
ref: 警探说这名朋友“为已发生的事情哭泣并致歉”。

src: Rhys Johnson's father, David, age 36, an engineer in a workshop and the owner of the air rifle testified, "I would allow him to use it if he was with me when I was up the garden or we were spending time together.
ref: 里斯·约翰逊的父亲，大卫，36岁，一位车间工程师并是空气枪的主人作证说：“如果我在花园里的时候他和我在一起，或者我们在一起，我会允许他使用它。

src: Rhys would have shown interest in it from when he was about eight-years-old."
ref: 从大约八岁开始，里斯就已经表现出对它的兴趣。”

src: The coroner urged "anyone with children to try and ensure that such weapons are not used without parental supervision," going on to say that he was "sure Mr. and Mrs. Johnson were not aware the children were using the weapon unsupervised."
ref: 验尸官敦促“任何有孩子的人都要努力确保在没有父母监督的情况下不要使用这种武器”，他接着说，他“肯定约翰逊夫妇不知道孩子们在没有监督的情况下使用了这种武器”。

src: The Seattle Post-Intelligencer (P-I), the 146-year-old Seattle newspaper, will make its final print edition on today, before becoming an online-only news agency.
ref: 拥有146年历史的西雅图报纸“西雅图邮报”（P-I）将于今天出版最后一期印刷版，之后将成为一家只在网上发行的新闻机构。

src: However, the online version is to be for local news only.
ref: 然而，在线版本只提供本地新闻。

src: The editorial staff would consist of twenty people, less than one-seventh of the 150 staff that were employed before the closure.
ref: 编辑人员将由20人组成，不到关闭前雇用的150名工作人员的七分之一。

src: With this closure, the Seattle Times is now Seattle's only major daily newspaper.
ref: 由于该报停刊，“西雅图时报”现在是西雅图唯一的主要日报。

src: "We don't feel like we have to cover everything ourselves.
ref: “我们不觉得我们必须自己包揽所有事情。

src: We'll partner for some content; we won't duplicate what the wire is reporting unless we have something unique to offer; we'll continue to showcase the great content from our 150 or so reader bloggers and we'll link to content partners and competitors to create the best mix of news on our front page," said Michelle Nicolosi, who is to be the executive producer of the online paper.
ref: 我们会合作一些内容，除非我们有独特的内容可供提供，否则我们不会复制有线新闻报道的内容；我们将继续展示150多名读者博主的精彩内容，我们将链接到内容合作伙伴和竞争对手，在我们的首页上创造最佳的新闻组合。”即将成为这份在线报纸执行制片人的米歇尔·尼科洛西说。

src: The Hearst Corporation, the owner of the P-I, was not able to find a buyer for the newspaper when it was put up for sale back in January.
ref: “西雅图邮报”的所有者赫斯特集团在今年1月出售该报时，未能为该报找到买家。

src: The newspaper industry in the country has been suffering as revenue from advertising plunges.
ref: 该国的报业一直受到广告收入暴跌的影响。

src: Other newspapers in the United States have also shut down recently: Denver's Rocky Mountain News shut down earlier this year, whilst the Tucson Citizen of Arizona will print its final edition on Saturday.
ref: 美国其他报纸最近也纷纷停刊：丹佛的“落基山新闻报”今年早些时候停刊，而“亚利桑那图森市民报”将于周六出版最后一期。

src: Thursday was the second day of play in the third test between Australia and India at the WACA, Perth, Australia.
ref: 星期四是澳大利亚与印度在澳大利亚帕斯西澳大利亚板球协会体育场进行的第三轮测试赛的第二天。

src: Australia took the remaining four wickets before the lunch break.
ref: 澳大利亚队在午餐休息前连续4次击中三柱门。

src: Mahendra Singh Dhoni (19) and Irfan Pathan (28) both fell lbw in successive overs.
ref: 在后续的几次击球中，马亨德拉·辛格·多尼（19岁）和厄尔番·巴坦（28岁）均手腿碰球出局。

src: India reached 330 all out with the loss of Anil Kumble for one run and R. P. Singh for a duck.
ref: 印度队竭尽全力取得了330分的成绩，只有阿尼尔·库姆博失去1分，R·P辛格得零分。

src: Australia struggled early on as Irfan Pathan dismissed both Australian openers for less than ten runs each and Michael Hussey was caught behind without scoring.
ref: 厄尔番·巴坦将澳大利亚的两位开局击球员在连10分也未得到的情况下统统赶出局，而且迈克尔·哈希击出的球又被对方接住，从而一分未得，因此澳大利亚队早早就开始了苦斗。

src: The next session, Australia played well, despite losing Ricky Ponting (20) and Michael Clarke (23), coming to the tea break with a score of 5/148.
ref: 在接下来的一局中，澳大利亚队表现不错。尽管瑞基·庞廷（20岁）和迈克尔·克拉克（23岁）出局，但是在饮茶休息时间到来之前，该队比分为5比148。

src: However, in the last session of the day India took five wickets, sending Australia all out with a score of 212 after fifty overs.
ref: 然而，在当日最后一局的比赛中，印度队5次击中三柱门，将澳大利亚全队逼出局，并在50回合结束时获212分。

src: Andrew Symonds was Australia's top scorer with 66 runs, while Adam Gilchrist made 55.
ref: 安德鲁·西蒙兹得66分，是澳大利亚队的最高得分手，亚当·吉尔克莱斯特得55分。

src: In reply, India are 1/52 at stumps having lost Wasim Jaffer for 11 runs just before the close of play.
ref: 作为回应，在比赛即将结束时，瓦西姆·贾法尔在得11分后因击球失误而出局，印度队得分为1比52。

src: Jack Palance, best known for his role as Curly in the 1991 film, "City Slickers", died of natural causes on Friday, November 10, at the age of 87.
ref: 11月10日，星期五，杰克·帕兰斯自然死亡，享年87岁。他最有名的角色是在1991年出品的影片“城市乡巴佬”中出演科尔利。

src: He died in Montecito, California, surrounded by family, according to spokesman Dick Guttman.
ref: 根据他的发言人，迪克·葛特曼提供的消息，他在加州蒙特西托去世，身边陪伴着家人。

src: Palance is survived by his second wife, Elaine Rogers Palance; his daughter, Holly; another daughter, Brook Palance Wilding; grandchildren Lily and Spencer Spottiswoode and Tarquin Wilding; his brother, John Palance, and sister Anne Despiva.
ref: 帕兰斯在世的家人中包括他的第二任妻子伊莱恩·罗杰斯·帕兰斯、女儿霍莉、二女儿布鲁克·帕兰斯·威尔丁、孙儿女莉丽、斯宾塞·斯波提斯伍德和塔昆·威尔丁、他的弟弟约翰·帕兰斯和妹妹安妮·德斯皮娃。

src: A memorial service for him is planned for December 16.
ref: 计划将于12月16日举行葬礼。

src: He also played the role of the Oscar- nominated Jack Wilson in "Shane".
ref: 他还在获奥斯卡提名的“原野奇侠”一片中扮演过杰克·威尔森这个角色。

src: Oscar Peterson, a Canadian jazz pianist who earned many honours during his decades-long career, died Sunday in Mississauga, Ontario aged 82.
ref: 奥斯卡·彼德森，一位在其长达几十年的生涯中获得无数荣誉的加拿大爵士钢琴家，于星期日在安大略米西索加镇去世，终年82岁。

src: The Montreal-born Peterson learned to play piano in childhood and by the 1940s was actively performing in Canadian big bands such as the Johnny Holmes Orchestra.
ref: 出生于蒙特利尔的彼德森自幼开始学习钢琴，到了20世纪40年代，他已经活跃在加拿大各大乐队中，比如约翰尼·霍姆斯管弦乐团。

src: A groundbreaking performance at New York's Carnegie Hall in 1949 brought Peterson's career to an international level.
ref: 1949年在纽约卡内基音乐厅的一场突破性演出将彼德森的音乐生涯提升到世界水平。

src: Among many honours, he was appointed a Companion of the Order of Canada, the nation's highest civilian honour, in 1984.
ref: 他获得过许多荣誉，其中包括在1984年获得的加拿大杰出人士奖，此为授予该国平民的最高荣誉。

src: He also received seven Grammy Awards and in 1978 was inducted into the Canadian Music Hall of Fame.
ref: 他还获得过7次格莱美音乐奖，并于1978年进入加拿大音乐名人堂。

src: Colombian authorities rescued a 2-month-old baby, who was kidnapped by a woman on Monday in Bogotá, in Armenia on Thursday night, September 14.
ref: 9月14日，星期四晚上，哥伦比亚当局在亚美尼亚营救了一名只有2个月大的婴儿。该婴儿于星期一在波哥大被一名妇女绑架。

src: The baby girl, Maribel Muñoz, was taken by a woman who told her parents, Zenaida Muñoz and Henry López Romero that she belonged to an NGO and could get medical care for the girl inside Hotel Tequendama.
ref: 女婴名叫玛丽贝尔·姆诺兹。当时领走她的女人告诉她的父母则奈达·姆诺兹和亨利·洛佩兹·罗梅罗说，她是非政府组织的成员，可以带孩子去特肯达玛酒店做治疗。

src: The parents, who are displaced people, went to Caracol TV network in order to report the kidnapping.
ref: 这对身为难民的父母前往卡拉科尔电视网络报案。

src: Surveillance recordings from the hotel and the city's bus terminal helped with the search.
ref: 酒店和该城的公交车站的监控记录为搜寻提供了便利。

src: The woman, described as in her late twenties, of height 1.65 m, and having black hair and almond-shaped eyes, left the hotel with two men and went to the local bus terminal.
ref: 据描述，这个女人不到30岁，身高1.65米，黑头发，杏仁眼。她与2名男人离开酒店后，就去了当地的公交车站。

src: On Thursday, a taxi driver told the media that the day before, he had driven a woman with those features to Cedritos, a neighbourhood in northeast Bogotá.
ref: 星期四，一名出租车司机告诉媒体说，就在前一天，他开车送一个带有那些特征的女人去了波哥大东北部的塞德利托斯小区。

src: Finally, on Thursday night, the kidnapper, Esmeralda Echeverri Castaño, was taken into custody in Cali.
ref: 最后，在星期四晚上，绑架者艾斯梅拉达·埃切维利·卡斯塔诺在卡里被拘留。

src: She confessed that she had abandoned the baby in a hotel in Armenia, where Maribel was finally found and moved to a hospital.
ref: 根据她的交待，她将婴儿遗弃在阿美尼亚的一家酒店里了。最后，玛丽贝尔终于在这家酒店被找到并送往医院。

src: The doctors found the baby to be in good health.
ref: 医生们认为婴儿的健康状况良好。

src: Maribel's parents, who live in a modest house in Usme, south Bogotá, recognized the baby on Friday early morning, thanks to a digital picture sent from Armenia to the police in Bogotá.
ref: 玛丽贝尔的父母居住在波哥大南部的乌斯梅区的一间不大的房子里。多亏了从阿美尼亚发送给波哥大警方的一幅数字图像，使他们星期五一大早就对婴儿做了确认。

src: The child was returned to her parents at 11:30 a.m. (16:30 UTC) on Friday.
ref: 星期五上午11：30（世界时16：30），孩子被归还给她的父母。

src: US president Barack Obama declared a swine flu emergency in the country on Saturday, according to a statement released by the White House.
ref: 根据白宫发布的一项声明，星期六，美国总统巴拉克·奥巴马宣布全国进入猪流感紧急状态。

src: Obama signed a declaration late on Friday, authorising health secretary Kathleen Sebelius to bypass some federal rules, in order to let health officials respond more efficiently to the outbreak of the H1N1 virus.
ref: 奥巴马于周五晚些时候签署了一项声明，授权卫生部长卡瑟林·塞比里乌斯绕过某些联邦法规，让卫生官员们能够更加有效地应对H1N1病毒的爆发。

src: The move is aimed at making it less difficult for people affected by the virus to seek treatment, and allow medical providers to give it immediately, bypassing potential hurdles such as health privacy regulations.
ref: 这一举动的目的是让被病毒感染的人们更容易得到治疗，并让医疗提供者能够立即提供服务，从而绕过类似健康隐私条例这样的潜在障碍。

src: "As a nation, we have prepared at all levels of government, and as individuals and communities, taking unprecedented steps to counter the emerging pandemic," the president wrote in the declaration.
ref: 总统在声明中说：“作为一个国家，我们各级政府都做好了准备，作为个人和社区，要采取一切史无前例的步骤来对抗这场正在全国发生的流行疾病”。

src: Swine flu has now been circulated in 46 of the 50 US states, and has resulted in at least 411 confirmed deaths since the end of August.
ref: 猪流感目前已经在美国50个州中的46个州流行。自8月份以来，已有至少411名患者被确认死亡。

src: Production of antiviral vaccines has been slower than initially predicted, and it is likely that the US government's targets for delivery won't be met by drug makers, according to Thomas Frieden, the director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
ref: 根据疾病控制和预防中心主任，托马斯·弗赖顿的说法，抗病毒疫苗的生产速度比最初预测的要慢，药物制造商很可能无法实现政府的交付目标。

src: Windsor Castle, one of Queen Elizabeth II of the United Kingdom's official residences, is to get a hydro-electric power scheme.
ref: 温莎堡，女王伊丽莎白二世在英国的官方住宅之一，将采用一项水力发电计划。

src: The £1 million project will consist of a series of under-water turbines to be installed at Romney Weir in the nearby River Thames.
ref: 这一价值1百万英镑的项目将涉及在泰晤士河的罗姆尼堰坝安装一连串水下涡轮机。

src: The system will generate 200kW, enough to meet approximately one third of the castle's electricity needs.
ref: 该系统将产生200kW的电力，足以满足这座城堡三分之一的用电需求。

src: The electricity from the four turbines will not be sold into the local electricity grid, but will instead be directly connected to Windsor Castle's electrical system.
ref: 这4部涡轮机所产生的电力将不会出售给当地电网，而是直接连接到温莎堡的电力系统中。

src: It will save 600 tonnes of carbon dioxide from being released into the atmosphere every year.
ref: 它将每年减少向大气中排放600吨的二氧化碳。

src: The scheme was announced after it gained planning permission from the local council, the plans having been submitted in February of last year.
ref: 在当地议会批准了该项计划后，对这一方案进行了公布。计划是在去年2月份提交的。

src: A feasibility study will now be conducted, with construction scheduled to start next year.
ref: 即将开始可行性研究，并计划于明年开工。

src: The Windsor Castle is not the only environmentally-friendly Royal scheme.
ref: 温莎堡的这个方案并不是皇室提出的唯一一项环保方案。

src: A borehole beneath Buckingham Palace provides cold water for air-conditioning and the Duke of Edinburgh's taxi runs on liquid petroleum gas.
ref: 在白金汉宫地下就凿了一个涵洞为空调提供冷水，而爱丁堡公爵的出租车则是用液化石油气驱动的。

src: The New Zealand government has announced that it will be reviewing funding for medical and dentistry students at Otago and Auckland Universities to certify the institutions' standards and help staff retention.
ref: 新西兰政府宣布，其将审查为奥塔戈和奥克兰大学医学与牙科学生提供的资金，以证明该机构的水准并提高员工保留率。

src: The dean of Auckland University's Faculty of Medical and Health Sciences, Professor Iain Martin says the review “can’t come soon enough”.
ref: 奥克兰大学医学和健康科学系主任伊恩·马丁教授说，审查“不会来得很快”。

src: It says that it has been worried about student debt for years "High debt encourages too many graduates overseas, or into high paying areas of practice at the expense of areas like general practice"
ref: 政府说，多年来，政府一直担忧学生的贷款问题，“高贷款鼓励太多的毕业生去海外留学，或者鼓励他们进入高薪专业，其代价是冷落了全科医学这样的专业”。

src: The investigation into the plane crash that killed Polish President Lech Kaczyński has revealed that passengers were in the cockpit of the crashed plane.
ref: 对导致波兰总统莱赫·卡钦斯基遇难的坠机事故调查结果表明，当时有乘客出现在飞机的驾驶舱里。

src: According to the head of the technical commission involved with investigating the crash, Alexei Morozov, the crew of the aircraft had been warned of limited visibility, although it has not been determined whether or not the crew's decision to land had been influenced by the passengers on board.
ref: 根据参与调查的技术委员会负责人阿列克谢·莫洛佐夫的说法，机组人员曾收到能见度有限的警告，虽然还不清楚机组做出降落决定的时候，是否受到机上乘客的影响。

src: The cause of the crash has not been identified, although the possibility of an explosion or terrorist attack on board the aircraft has been ruled out.
ref: 坠机的原因尚不清楚，但是排除了在飞机上实施爆炸或恐怖袭击的可能性。

src: Morozov also said that the crew on board the plane had not been properly trained for the flight, and had been assembled only a few days before the flight.
ref: 莫洛佐夫还说，飞机的机组人员并未经受过与执行这次飞行任务有关的良好训练，仅仅是在起飞的前几天才被集中到一起。

src: He said that the crew "did not undergo regular simulated training, including the practice of co-ordination and emergency situations during flights."
ref: 他说，机组人员“没有经过正规的模拟训练，包括飞行中的协调和紧急情况处置方法等”。

src: The overall leader of the investigation, Tatyana Anodina, confirmed that unauthorized people had been in the cockpit near the end of the flight, saying that "in the cockpit there were individuals who were not members of the crew."
ref: 调查工作的总负责人塔提亚娜·阿诺狄娜证实，在飞行末段，有未授权人士出现在驾驶舱。她说：“驾驶舱中有几个人并不是机组人员”。

src: One person had been identified, although their name has not been released.
ref: 其中一人已被确定身份，虽然并没有公布其姓名。

src: The investigation also found that the aircraft involved had been in normal operating condition; Anodina said that "[t]he engines were working up till the moment the plane collided with the ground."
ref: 调查结果还发现，涉事飞机当时处于正常操作状态；阿诺狄娜说：“引擎直到飞机撞击地面以前一直在工作”。

src: Two 11-year-old twin brothers were found stabbed in their home in Penn Hills, Pennsylvania on Tuesday.
ref: 星期二，一对11岁的孪生兄弟被发现在其宾夕法尼亚州彭希尔斯的家中被刺。

src: Their older brother is being charged with the stabbings, one of which was fatal.
ref: 其中一人受致命伤。而他们的哥哥被指控为凶手。

src: Grandfather Lovett Williams said Tyrel was found upon his dead brother, Tyron.
ref: 他们的祖父洛维特·威廉姆斯说，泰洛尔被发现躺在死去的兄弟泰伦身上。

src: While Tyron was pronounced dead at the scene, Tyrel underwent hours of surgery at Children's Hospital in Pittsburgh and is expected to survive.
ref: 泰伦在现场被宣布死亡，而泰洛尔则在匹兹堡儿童医院接受数小时的手术之后，有望幸存下来。

src: Williams allegedly told police that Tyrel said his 18-year-old brother, Troy Lavalle Hill, was their killer.
ref: 据传，威廉姆斯告诉警方说，泰洛尔说杀手是他的18岁哥哥特洛伊·拉瓦尔·希尔。

src: The boys have a 3-year-old sister who was not home at the time of the stabbing.
ref: 两兄弟有一个3岁大的妹妹。谋杀案发生的时候，她不在家。

src: Search parties worked throughout the night on Tuesday looking for Hill but he did not turn up until a neighbor spotted the suspect on Loretta Drive in Penn Hills.
ref: 搜寻组星期二一整夜都在寻找希尔，但是，直到一位邻居在彭希尔斯洛雷塔大道上发现他之前，该嫌疑人一直不见踪影。

src: Troy Lavalle Hill reportedly has a history of emotional problems.
ref: 据报道，特洛伊·拉瓦尔·希尔曾经有过感情问题。

src: "They were great athletes, straight-A students, just good, little boys...It's tough," said neighbor Don Taylor.
ref: 邻居唐·泰勒说：“他们善于运动，全A生，都是很好的小男孩……，很不幸”。

src: Another neighbor added, "Wonderful neighbors, just the sweetest kids I've ever known."
ref: 另一位邻居说：“非常棒的邻居，是我认识的最可爱的孩子”。

src: Grief counselors were on duty at the childrens' middle school, Linton Middle School.
ref: 心理导师正在孩子们的学校林顿中学开展工作。

src: There is no word on a motive in the case.
ref: 关于案子的动机，尚无任何消息。

src: Grandfather Williams said, "I don't know how I'm going to make it...I moved here so I could be with my grandsons.
ref: 祖父威廉姆斯说：“我不知道能不能挺过去……，我搬到这里来住，就是为了跟孙子们在一起。

src: As long as [Tyrel] makes it, I might make it, too."
ref: 只要【泰洛尔】挺过来了，我大概也能”。

src: Vail, Colorado, United States — Yesterday, Wikinews sat down with Australian blind Paralympic skier Melissa Perrine who was participating in a national team training camp in Vail, Colorado.
ref: 美国，科罗拉多州维尔镇。昨天，“维基新闻”与澳大利亚残奥会盲人滑雪运动员梅莉萨·佩琳进行了座谈。她将参加在科罗拉多州维尔镇举办的国家队训练营。

src: And are you like Jess Gallagher and just here training and not competing?
ref: 你会像杰斯·格拉法一样，只是来训练而不会参加比赛吗？

src: I want to let you get back to changing.
ref: 我希望会让你恢复并有所变化。

src: An Asiana Airlines Boeing 777 airplane crashed upon landing at San Francisco International Airport around 11:30 AM local time today.
ref: 今天当地时间11：30，一架韩亚航空公司的波音777飞机在旧金山国际机场降落的时候坠毁。

src: Flight #214, coming from Seoul, carrying 291 passengers — including one infant, and 16 crew members — crashed on runway 28L.
ref: 来自首尔，搭载291名乘客（包括1名婴儿和16名机组人员）的214号航班在28L号跑道坠毁。

src: Two deaths are reported and 10 passengers were taken to San Francisco General Hospital critically injured.
ref: 据报道，有2人死亡，10名乘客严重受伤并被送往旧金山综合医院。

src: In total, officials report 181 people were hospitalized and one person remains unaccounted for.
ref: 官方报告说，总共有181人住院治疗，1人目前仍然下落不明。

src: It is reported that when the airplane took off from Seoul, smoke was coming from the airplane.
ref: 据报道，当这架飞机从首尔起飞时，曾经有烟从机内冒出。

src: The weather was good as the plane was landing in San Francisco.
ref: 飞机在旧金山降落的时候，天气很好。

src: According to David Eun, a passenger on the airplane and the executive vice president of Samsung, the tail came off of the plane upon landing.
ref: 根据机上乘客戴维·尤恩（三星公司执行副总裁）的说法，飞机一落地，机尾就脱落了。

src: A non-passenger witness, Anthony Castorani, has reported that a fireball formed upon the plane landing and that the plane flipped over.
ref: 一位非乘客目击者安特尼·卡斯托拉尼报告说，飞机降落时，形成了一个火球，然后就翻转了。

src: A large portion of the passenger area of the plane was on fire and has burned out.
ref: 飞机的乘客区大部分着火并被烧毁。

src: Passengers were seen using emergency slides to escape the wreckage.
ref: 有人看到乘客们利用紧急滑梯逃离飞机残骸。

src: There have been no reports stating that the airplane pilot made distress calls before the accident.
ref: 没有报道表明飞机驾驶员曾在事故发生前发出过遇险信号。

src: Law enforcement does not believe the accident was the result of terrorism or criminal activity.
ref: 执法部门不相信这起事故系因恐怖或犯罪活动而引起。

src: The National Transportation Safety Board will be investigating the crash.
ref: 国家运输安全委员会将对坠机事件进行调查。

src: The airport was closed to all incoming and outgoing air and vehicle traffic until 3:30 PM local time, when it opened 2 runways.
ref: 机场已经关闭了所有进出场的航班和车辆交通，直到当地时间下午3：30才开放了2条跑道。

src: More than 70 flights headed to San Francisco were not allowed to land at the airport and were sent to other cities.
ref: 70多架飞往旧金山的航班被禁止在该机场降落，只得飞往其他城市。

src: Some flights have been diverted to Sacramento International Airport and Delta Air Lines has canceled 10 flights to and from San Francisco.
ref: 有些航班被转往萨克拉门托国际机场，三角航空公司取消了进出旧金山的10个航班。

src: United Airlines and Virgin America offered passengers the opportunity to change the flights at no extra cost until Monday.
ref: 联合航空公司和维珍美国航空公司为乘客提供了周一前免费改签航班的机会。

src: Sheryl Sandberg, Facebook Chief Operating Officer, was supposed to travel on the Asiana flight.
ref: “脸书”的首席运营官谢丽尔·桑德伯格本来是打算乘坐韩亚航空公司航班的。

src: She rescheduled, along with colleagues, her flight to fly on United Airlines instead.
ref: 但是她又改变了计划，与同事们一起改乘联合航空公司的航班。

src: A Boeing 777 can hold as many as 300 passengers.
ref: 一架波音777能够搭载多达300名乘客。

src: The National Hockey League (NHL) has handed down a season-long suspension, including the playoffs, to Chris Simon of the New York Islanders.
ref: 国家冰球联盟（NHL）已经向纽约岛民的克里斯·西蒙宣布了包括季后赛在内的长达一个赛季的禁赛。

src: The suspension, for a minimum of 25 games, is a ruling for a hit Simon laid on Ryan Hollweg of the New York Rangers during a March 8 game at Nassau Veterans' Memorial Coliseum.
ref: 这次禁赛至少有25场比赛，是对西蒙在3月8日对拿骚老兵纪念体育馆的比赛中对纽约流浪者队的瑞安·霍尔韦格的打击做出的裁决。

src: In a press release earlier today, the NHL indicated that they considered Simon's hit on Hollweg, with a stick to the face, to be a deliberate intent to injure.
ref: 在今天早些时候的一份新闻稿中，NHL表示，他们认为西蒙用棍子打在霍尔韦格脸上的行为是蓄意伤害。

src: "The National Hockey League will not accept the use of a stick in the manner and fashion in which Mr. Simon used his Thursday night," said Colin Campbell, NHL Senior Executive Vice President and Director of Hockey Operations.
ref: NHL高级执行副总裁兼曲棍球运营总监科林·坎贝尔说：“国家冰球联盟不会接受西蒙先生以其周四晚上采取的行为和方式使用球棍”。

src: After receiving a hard check from Hollweg, Simon swung his stick and delivered a two-handed blow to Hollweg's upper body, causing a cut on Hollweg's chin.
ref: 在遭到霍尔韦格的一次犯规后，西蒙挥舞着他的球棍，用双手击打了霍尔韦格的上半身，造成了他下巴的割伤。

src: Based on his $1-million contract, which expires at the conclusion of the 2006-07 season, Simon forfeits a minimum of $80,213.90.
ref: 根据他在2006-07赛季结束时签订的价值100万美元的合同，西蒙最低赔偿金额为80,213.90美元。

src: The suspension could carry over into the 2007-2008 hockey season, depending on how far the Islanders advance into the playoffs.
ref: 根据岛民队进入季后赛的程度，这次禁赛可能延续到2007-2008赛季的曲棍球赛季。

src: According to the NHL press release, if the Islanders do not qualify for the 2007 playoffs, or play fewer than 10 playoff games in the 2007 playoffs, Simon would serve additional games at the start of the 2007-08 regular season to satisfy the minimum term of the suspension.
ref: 根据NHL的新闻稿，如果岛民没有资格参加2007年的季后赛，或者在2007年的季后赛中打的季后赛少于10场，西蒙将在2007-08常规赛开始时再打更多的比赛，以满足停赛的最短期限。

src: Garth Snow, General Manager of the Islanders, indicated his support for Simon in a brief press release.
ref: 岛民总经理加思·斯诺在一份简短的新闻稿中表达了对西蒙的支持。

src: "I spoke with Colin Campbell this morning and he informed me of his decision.
ref: “今天早上我和科林·坎贝尔谈过，他告诉我他的决定。

src: Chris Simon has played a major role in our success this season and we will miss his presence in our lineup.
ref: 克里斯·西蒙在本赛季的成功中发挥了重要作用，我们将错过他在我们阵容中的表现。

src: His regret is clearly evident in the statement he released last night.
ref: 他的遗憾在昨晚发表的声明中显而易见。

src: Our entire organization supports Chris every step of the way."
ref: 我们整个组织都在支持克里斯的每一步”。

src: In a statement March 10, prior to the verdict, Simon expressed regret for his actions.
ref: 在3月10日的一份声明中，在判决之前，西蒙对他的行为表示遗憾。

src: "After watching the tape the morning after Thursday's game, I was disgusted.
ref: “在周四比赛后的早晨观看了录像带之后，我很反感。

src: There is absolutely no place in hockey for what I did.
ref: 我所做的在曲棍球中是绝对没有立足之地的。

src: I was grateful to learn that Ryan is okay and that he returned to the game.
ref: 我很高兴得知瑞安没事，他回到了比赛中。

src: My hope is to reach out to him in the near future."
ref: 我希望在不久的将来能够与他联系”。

src: Simon explains that his behavior may have been influenced by a hit he received less than a minute before his stick swinging incident.
ref: 西蒙解释说，他的行为可能受到他在挥杆事件发生前不到一分钟的打击所影响。

src: When I saw the tape on Friday morning, it explained a lot to me when I saw the look on my face after being hit into the boards.
ref: 当我在周五早上看到录像带时，当我看到我被击中并压向护板后我脸上的表情时，这对我而言很说明问题。

src: Simon didn't appear to let it excuse his hit on Hollweg.
ref: 西蒙似乎没有让它成为他袭击霍尔韦格的借口。

src: "I need to make clear that this is not justification for the danger I put Ryan Hollweg in and the damage I have caused the game.
ref: “我需要明确指出，这不是我让莱恩·霍尔韦格陷入危险和我给比赛带来损害的理由”。

src: The Associated Press indicated that criminal charges against Simon are being considered.
ref: 美联社表示正在考虑对西蒙的刑事指控。

src: According to a spokesperson for Nassau County District Attorney Kathleen Rice, "no decision has been reached" on bringing charges, but that "prosecutors would review the tape."
ref: 根据拿骚县地方检察官凯瑟琳·赖斯的发言人的说法，“没有就提出指控达成任何决定”，但“检察官会审查录像带”。

src: Raouf Amin el-Araby, a 52-year-old Egyptian doctor who has been serving the Saudi Royal family for 20 years, was convicted of malpractice.
ref: 乌夫·阿明·阿拉比是一名52岁的埃及医生，他在沙特王室供职20年，被判犯有渎职罪。

src: Egyptian newspapers reported that he was accused of driving a Saudi princess "to addiction", reportedly after treating a Saudi princess with painkillers.
ref: 埃及报纸报道称，他被指控迫使沙特公主“上瘾”，据称是在给一名沙特公主服用止痛药后。

src: Initially sentenced to 7 years and 700 lashes, he has been sentenced to 15 years and 1500 lashes, 70 a week, after making an appeal.
ref: 他最初被判处7年和700鞭刑，经过上诉后，已被判处15年和1500鞭刑，每周70鞭。

src: Family members, friends and colleagues gathered in outrage and grief outside the headquarters of Egypt's doctors union, calling upon King Abdullah to pardon Raouf.
ref: 家人、朋友和同事愤怒而悲伤地聚集在埃及医生工会总部外，呼吁阿卜杜拉国王赦免拉乌夫。

src: "1,500 lashes is unprecedented in the history of Islam," read one banner carried by protesters.
ref: 抗议者举着的一条横幅上写着：“1500鞭刑在伊斯兰教历史上是前所未有的”。

src: "Who is responsible for the humiliation of our doctors abroad?" read another.
ref: 另一条横幅上写着：“谁应该为我们海外医生的屈辱负责”。

src: The Egyptian Organization for Human Rights (EOHR) and the foreign minister are working hard to find a way to return Raouf home quickly.
ref: 埃及人权组织（EOHR）和外交部长正在努力寻找让拉乌夫尽快回家的方法。

src: Hafez Abu Saeda, the director of EOHR, stated that the princess was prescribed the same medication that she was receiving in the United States, "so it is obvious that the doctor was not at fault for her addiction."
ref: EOHR主任哈菲兹·阿布·赛达表示，公主服用的药物与她在美国接受的药物相同，“所以很明显，医生对她的成瘾没有过错”。

src: Protests in Egypt have driven the Egyptian foreign ministry to seek a solution, partly out of concern that negative repercussions may damage relations between Cairo and Riyadh.
ref: 埃及的抗议活动促使埃及外交部寻求解决方案，部分原因是担心负面影响可能会破坏开罗与利雅得之间的关系。

src: A human rights lawyer said that he was given the first 70 lashes last week and he will get 70 more this week.
ref: 一名人权律师表示，他上周被打了70鞭，本周还将再被打70鞭。

src: There are two things one can expect on a trip to see Michael Musto at the offices of the Village Voice: a 20-minute round-trip wait for the elevator and rapid fire answers from one of the most recognizable gossip columnists in the United States.
ref: 在去《乡村之声》办公室拜访迈克尔·穆斯托的路上，你可以期待两件事：一是电梯20分钟的往返等待时间，二是美国最知名的八卦专栏作家之一的快速回复。

src: Musto, in addition to his appearances on Countdown with Keith Olbermann and the E! network, has been writing his column for the Voice since 1984.
ref: 穆斯托，除了他与基思·奥尔伯曼和E网络一起出现在倒计时节目上，自1984年以来一直在为《声音》撰写专栏。

src: He has recently compiled the best of them in a book released this year titled, La Dolce Musto: Writings by the World's Most Outrageous Columnist.
ref: 最近，他在今年出版的一本名为《La Dolce Musto：世界上最令人发指的专栏作家的作品》的书中收录了其中最好的部分。

src: He was Carrie Bradshaw, replete with a prodigious use of puns, before Sex and the City was a thought.
ref: 他就是凯莉·布拉德肖，在《欲望都市》问世之前，她就已经对双关语有了惊人的运用。

src: His column is a romp through his life, spats and opinions on socio-political issues.
ref: 他的专栏是关于他的生活、争吵和对社会政治问题的看法的轻松之作。

src: As David Thigpen of the Chicago Tribune wrote, Musto is "a funny and caustic satirist who masquerades as a gossip and nightlife columnist."
ref: 正如《芝加哥论坛报》的大卫·蒂本所写的那样，穆斯托是“一位滑稽而刻薄的讽刺作家，他假扮成八卦和夜生活专栏作家”。

src: Musto, a Columbia University graduate, is a rarity in today's celebrity world: he is accessible.
ref: 哥伦比亚大学毕业生穆斯托在当今的名人圈子里是一个罕见的人物：他平易近人。

src: He often corresponds with his readers and his public functions are a mix of parties, nightclubs, academic lectures, university panels and film premieres.
ref: 他经常与读者交流，他的公共活动包括聚会、夜总会、学术讲座、大学座谈会和电影首映。

src: He is friendly and frank, and he welcomes people to join him in his world ("I just got a message that Michael Lucas died!" he says staring wide-eyed at his phone; the message turned out to be false).
ref: 他很友好、坦率，欢迎人们加入他的世界（“我刚收到一条消息，迈克尔·卢卡斯去世了”，他睁大眼睛盯着手机说，这个消息原来是假的）。

src: Wikinews reporter David Shankbone spoke with Musto about his life and his relationship to the world of celebrity journalism.
ref: 维基新闻记者大卫·尚克伯恩与穆斯托谈论了他的生活以及他与名人新闻界的关系。

src: An extensive vaccination campaign across 19 West and Central African countries is to begin today in an attempt to stem a year-long polio epidemic in the region.
ref: 今天将在西非和中非19个国家开始大规模疫苗接种运动，试图遏制该地区持续一年的脊髓灰质炎流行。

src: The United Nations and international aid agencies plan to immunize 85 million children under five.
ref: 联合国和国际援助机构计划为8500万五岁以下儿童提供免疫接种。

src: More than 400, 000 volunteers and health workers will take part in the campaign, visiting children in their homes.
ref: 40多万名志愿者和卫生工作者将参加这项活动，到儿童家中看望他们。

src: The current polio epidemic has been going on for a year and there have been outbreaks in the last six months in Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Chad, Guinea, Liberia, Mali, Mauritania, Senegal and Sierra Leone.
ref: 目前的脊髓灰质炎流行已持续一年，过去6个月在布基纳法索、喀麦隆、乍得、几内亚、利比里亚、马里、毛里塔尼亚、塞内加尔和塞拉利昂均有暴发。

src: These countries will be the focus of the campaign, along with Benin, Cape Verde, Central African Republic, Côte d'Ivoire, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea-Bissau, Niger, Nigeria and Togo.
ref: 这些国家将与贝宁、佛得角、中非共和国、科特迪瓦、冈比亚、加纳、几内亚比绍、尼日尔、尼日利亚和多哥一道成为该运动的焦点。

src: Efforts last year failed to halt the disease because not enough children were vaccinated.
ref: 去年的努力未能阻止这种疾病，因为接种疫苗的儿童的数量不够。

src: The program failed in part because local religious leaders told parents that the vaccines would sterilize their children, or cause AIDS.
ref: 该计划失败的部分原因是，当地宗教领袖告诉家长，疫苗会让孩子绝育，或者导致艾滋病。

src: As well as targeting more children, today's campaign features better training for volunteers.
ref: 除了针对更多的儿童，今天的活动还以更好地培训志愿者为特色。

src: Vaccinations will be repeated on 26 March in the six key countries, and again on 24 April for all 19 countries involved.
ref: 将于3月26日在6个主要国家重复接种疫苗，并于4月24日对所有涉及的19个国家重复接种。

src: The campaign is funded by Rotary International who have provided $30 million.
ref: 这项活动由国际扶轮社资助，该社提供了三千万美元。

src: In 2009 the World Health Organization reported that approximately 1,600 children were paralysed by the virus worldwide.
ref: 2009年，世界卫生组织报告说，全世界大约有1600名儿童因该病毒而瘫痪。

src: Doctors performing a Caesarian delivery in a Darwin, Australia hospital were stunned to discover a rare ovarian ectopic pregnancy.
ref: 在澳大利亚达尔文医院进行剖腹产分娩的医生惊呆了，发现罕见的卵巢异位妊娠。

src: According to Robin Cahill, general manager of the Darwin Private Hospital, ovarian pregnancies occur in only 1 in every 40,000 fertilisations.
ref: 根据达尔文私立医院总经理罗宾·卡希尔的说法，卵巢妊娠仅在每40,000例受精中发生一次。

src: An ectopic pregnancy occurs when a fertilised egg implants in a woman's body in a location other than the uterus.
ref: 当受精卵在子宫以外的位置植入女性体内时，会发生异位妊娠。

src: The most common place for an ectopic pregnancy to occur is the Fallopian tubes, accounting for roughly 95% of all ectopic pregnancies.
ref: 异位妊娠最常见的部位是输卵管，约占所有异位妊娠的95％。

src: Ectopic pregnancies are generally discovered early, especially as they tend to cause bleeding in the mother, and tend to miscarry or be terminated due to the health risks they pose.
ref: 异位妊娠通常很早就被发现，特别是因为它们往往会导致母亲出血，并且由于它们所带来的健康风险而容易流产或终止妊娠。

src: The mother, Meera Thangarajah, however, suffered no complications during her pregnancy, and an ultrasound performed mid-way through the pregnancy did not discover the complication.
ref: 然而，这位名叫米拉·塔加拉杰的母亲在怀孕期间没有出现并发症，在怀孕中期进行的超声波检查也没有发现并发症。

src: The hospital's obstetrician Andrew Miller says that having an ovarian pregnancy survive to full-term is "unheard of".
ref: 医院的产科医生安德鲁·米勒说，卵巢妊娠能存活到足月是“前所未闻的”。

src: The British Royal College of Obstetricians and Gynaecologists agrees, with a representative saying the odds of a successful ovarian pregnancy are "no more than one in a million", taking into account both the difficulty of bringing such a pregnancy to term and the tendency for the pregnancy to be terminated when it is discovered early.
ref: 英国皇家妇产科学院同意一位代表的观点，他认为同时考虑到这种妊娠难以足月以及妊娠早期发现就终止妊娠的倾向，成功的卵巢妊娠几率“不超过百万分之一”。

src: The baby, a girl, was named Durga, a Hindu name meaning "goddess", and weighed 6 pounds 3 ounces (2.8 kg).
ref: 这个女婴名叫杜尔加，是印度教的一个名字，意思是“女神”，重6磅3盎司（2.8公斤）。

src: The father, Ravi Thangarajah, says that doctors told him he was "one of the luckiest men in the world".
ref: 他的父亲拉维·坦加拉贾表示，医生告诉他，他是“世界上最幸运的人之一”。

src: People came across Canada to Ottawa to celebrate Canada's 139th birthday.
ref: 人们来到加拿大渥太华庆祝加拿大的139岁生日。

src: About 25,000 people including Prime Minister Stephen Harper, his wife and their two children were there.
ref: 包括总理斯蒂芬·哈珀、他的妻子和他们的两个孩子在内的大约25000人在那里。

src: Military veterans, medal-winning Olympic athletes and some of Canada's biggest names in music were there.
ref: 退伍军人、奥运奖牌获得者和一些加拿大音乐界最著名的人物都在那里。

src: Canadian artists like Colin James and Annie Villeneuve performed in front of the Peace Tower.
ref: 加拿大艺术家科林·詹姆斯和安妮·维伦纽夫在和平塔前表演。

src: Since Canada has two official languages (English and French) some artists were from Quebec and sung in French.
ref: 由于加拿大有两种官方语言（英语和法语），一些艺术家来自魁北克，用法语演唱。

src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper urged Canadians to pay tribute to the soldiers and aid workers in Afghanistan.
ref: 总理斯蒂芬·哈珀敦促加拿大人向在阿富汗的士兵和援助工作者致敬。

src: "Let's show our appreciation, today and every day, to those who do it best for us in Afghanistan and around the world," Harper said.
ref: 哈珀说：“让我们今天和每一天都向那些在阿富汗和世界各地为我们尽力的人表示感谢”。

src: "Our diplomats, our development workers and brave men and women of the Canadian Forces."
ref: “我们的外交官，我们的发展工作者和加拿大军队的勇敢的好男好女们”。

src: Michaëlle Jean noted Canada's prosperity, including in her remarks a thank you to the people who toil to provide the country with a safe and plentiful food supply.
ref: 米歇尔·让提到了加拿大的繁荣，她在讲话中感谢为国家提供安全和充足粮食供应而辛勤工作的人民。

src: Bill Graham released a statement describing Canada as being like no other country, "made up of individuals, representing all ethnicities and all religions, bound together by our shared values of family, community, tolerance and freedom."
ref: 比尔·格雷厄姆发表了一份声明，称加拿大不同于其他任何国家，“由个体组成，代表所有种族和所有宗教，被我们共同的家庭、社区、宽容和自由价值观团结在一起”。

src: Musicians performed in front of the Peace Tower, and fireworks ended the show.
ref: 音乐家在和平塔前演出，并以烟花作为压轴大戏。

src: George W. Bush, the president of the United States has visited Tennessee, which was hit by over 25 tornadoes which caused over 33 deaths.
ref: 美国总统乔治·W·布什访问了田纳西州，田纳西州被超过25场的龙卷风袭击，造成33人死亡。

src: In the visit Mr.Bush said that "the government has got a role to play" in repairing the damage from the tornado and that anyone who has been affected should call 1-800-621-3362 to "find out the help that is available."
ref: 布什总统在访问中说，政府在修复龙卷风造成的破坏方面“必须发挥作用”，任何受到影响的人都应该拨打1-800-621-3362，“寻求可获得的帮助”。

src: Later in the speech Mr.Bush said that he's "sorry you're going through what you're going through," to the residents of Macon County, which he was visiting.
ref: 布什总统后来在讲话中对他访问的梅肯郡的居民说，他对“你们正在经历的一切感到抱歉”。

src: He continued by saying that "life sometimes is unfair and you don't get to play the hand that you wanted to play," and that he believes "the question is when you get dealt the hand, how do you play it?"
ref: 他接着说，“生活有时是不公平的，你不能只打你想打的那副牌”，他认为，“问题是，你拿到什么牌，你要怎么打”。

src: He continued by saying that the community of Macon County "is going to be as strong as ever."
ref: 他接着说，梅肯郡的社区“将一如既往地强大”。

src: Andry Rajoelina, who ousted Madagascan ex-president President Marc Ravalomanana earlier this week, officially became the leader of the country, after being sworn in on Saturday.
ref: 本周早些时候推翻马达加斯加前总统马克·拉瓦卢马纳纳的安德里·拉乔利纳在周六宣誓就职后正式成为该国的领导人。

src: National television broadcasted the inauguration, which occurred at a soccer field in Antananarivo, the capital of Madagascar.
ref: 国家电视台播放了在马达加斯加首都塔那那利佛的一个足球场举办的就职典礼的实况。

src: Tens of thousands of people attended the event, although approximately 2,000 supporters of Ravalomanana held protests in the capital's Democracy Square.
ref: 成千上万的人参加了此次活动，尽管大约2000名拉瓦卢马纳纳的支持者在首都的民主广场举行抗议活动。

src: "We proclaim today the end of the dictatorship," said the new president, promising to tackle corruption that was rife under Ravalomanana.
ref: “我们今天宣布独裁统治结束”，新总统说，他承诺要解决拉瓦卢马纳纳领导下充斥的腐败问题。

src: Earlier this week, then-president Ravalomanana gave up his power to military forces, which subsequently gave Rajoelina control over the government.
ref: 本周早些时候，当时的总统拉瓦卢马纳纳将权力移交给军方，军方随后让拉乔利纳控制了政府。

src: Many foreign powers, among them the United States and France, have denounced the change in leadership as a coup.
ref: 包括美国和法国在内的许多外国势力都谴责这次领导人换届是一场政变。

src: Norway and the US have both frozen all non-humanitarian aid to Madagascar, whilst the African Union suspended Madagascar's membership.
ref: 挪威和美国都冻结了对马达加斯加的所有非人道主义援助，同时非洲联盟暂停了马达加斯加的成员国资格。

src: The South African Development Community (SADC) stated that it "completely rejected the legitimacy" of the new president.
ref: 南非发展共同体（SADC）表示，它“完全拒绝了新总统的合法性”。

src: American celebutante and businesswoman Paris Hilton has bashed a recent presidential campaign ad by 2008 U.S. presidential hopeful John McCain in which he compared his rival Barack Obama to celebrities such as Hilton and Britney Spears.
ref: 美国著名女明星、女商人帕丽斯·希尔顿最近抨击了2008年美国总统候选人约翰·麦凯恩的一则竞选广告。麦凯恩在广告中把他的竞争对手巴拉克·奥巴马比作希尔顿和布兰妮·斯皮尔斯等名人。

src: In McCain's TV ad, it was stated that Obama was "the biggest celebrity in the world."
ref: 在麦凯恩的电视广告中，有人说奥巴马是“世界上最大的名人”。

src: Hilton recorded and uploaded a video to comedy website Funny or Die, in which she mocked McCain by calling him a "wrinkly white-haired guy."
ref: 希尔顿录制了一段视频，并上传到喜剧网站“搞笑还是死亡”，在视频中，她嘲笑麦凯恩，称他为“满脸皱纹的白发男人”。

src: "I am Paris Hilton, and I am a celebrity too," she states at the beginning of the video, but not before images of the Star Wars character Yoda and the cast of The Golden Girls are paraded across the screen apparently comparing the characters to McCain.
ref: “我是帕丽斯·希尔顿，我也是个名人”，她在视频一开始就这样说，最终《星球大战》中尤达的形象和《黄金女郎》的演员阵容出现在屏幕上，显然是在拿这两个角色和麦凯恩作比较之前。

src: "Only I am not from the olden days, and I am not promising change like 'that other guy'."
ref: “只是我不是旧时代的人，我也不像‘那个人’那样承诺改变”。

src: "I'm just hot," remarked Hilton, adding, "I guess I am running for president," since McCain's TV ad showed her.
ref: “我只是太性感了”，希尔顿说，“我想我是在竞选总统”，因为麦凯恩的电视广告播放了她的画面。

src: McCain's advertisement, released early this week, states, "Is the biggest celebrity in the world ready to help your family?"
ref: 麦凯恩在本周早些时候发布的广告中说，“世界上最大的名人愿意帮助你的家人吗”。

src: According to the Boston Globe and video displayed on its website, the narrator then points out that "the real Obama promises higher taxes, more government spending."
ref: 据《波士顿环球报》及其网站上的视频显示，解说员接着指出，“真正的奥巴马承诺提高税收，增加政府开支”。

src: Bill Burton, a spokesman for Obama, responded to the ad:
ref: 奥巴马的发言人比尔·伯顿回应了这则广告：。

src: "Is the biggest proponent of George Bush’s tired, failed policies ready to bring about change?"
ref: “乔治·布什陈旧、失败的政策的最大支持者准备好带来变革了吗”。

src: "Another day brings another dishonest attack from John McCain."
ref: “又一天，约翰·麦凯恩又一次进行了不诚实的攻击”。

src: "While Senator McCain knows that Senator Obama has proposed cutting taxes for 95% of American families, what he’s not telling us is that he wants to give $4 billion in tax breaks to the oil companies, continue giving tax breaks to corporations that ship our job overseas, and provide no direct tax relief for more than 100 million middle-class families."
ref: “虽然麦凯恩参议员知道奥巴马参议员已经提议对百分之95的美国家庭减税，他没有告诉我们的是，他希望给予石油公司40亿美元的税收优惠，继续给予将我们的工作运往海外的公司税收优惠，并且不向超过1亿中产阶级家庭提供直接的税收减免”。

src: Hilton appears in good spirits in her video and even thanks McCain for endorsing her.
ref: 希尔顿在她的视频中表现得很好，甚至还要感谢麦凯恩支持她。

src: "And I want America to know, that I am like totally ready to lead."
ref: “我想让美国知道，我已经完全做好了领导的准备”。

src: Alexandre Vinokourov of Kazakhstan has won stage 15 of the 2007 Tour de France in a time of 5h 34' 28".
ref: 哈萨克斯坦选手亚历山大·维诺科罗夫以5小时34分28秒的成绩赢得了2007年环法自行车赛第15站冠军。

src: Michael Rasmussen of Denmark kept his overall lead by 2' 23' over Alberto Contador of Spain.
ref: 丹麦的迈克尔·拉斯穆森以2分23秒的总比分领先于西班牙的阿尔贝托·康塔多。

src: The two extend their lead on Cadel Evans of Australia by 1' 37", and more on the rest of the contenders.
ref: 两人的领先优势比澳大利亚的卡德尔·埃文斯高出1分37秒，比其他竞争者高出更多。

src: The United States Department of the Treasury's Bureau of Engraving and Printing unveiled a new United States one hundred-dollar bill Wednesday morning.
ref: 美国财政部雕版印刷局周三上午发行了一张新的100美元钞票。

src: This is the first time that the one hundred dollar note has been redesigned since 1996.
ref: 这是自1996年以来第一次重新设计一百美元纸币。

src: Until now the one hundred dollar note, along with the one and two dollar notes, was not part of the newest batch of dollar note redesigns.
ref: 直到现在，100美元纸币，以及1美元和2美元纸币，都不是最新一批美元纸币重新设计的一部分。

src: The Bureau of Engraving and Printing redesigned the series 2006 5, 10, 20, and 50 dollar notes previously.
ref: 美国铸印局此前重新设计了2006年5、10、20和50美元纸币系列。

src: The new one hundred dollar note will contain new security and design features.
ref: 新的一百美元钞票将包含新的安全和设计功能。

src: Along with a new stylized portrait of Benjamin Franklin, the note also features a quill pen and inkwell on the obverse.
ref: 除了一幅新的本杰明·富兰克林的风格化画像，这张纸币的正面还有一支羽毛笔和墨水瓶。

src: On the reverse it has a new larger printed '100' in gold lettering.
ref: 在背面有一个新的更大的“100”金字印刷。

src: The new security features include a EURion constellation, a new more secure watermark, and a new feature called 'motion' which uses 650,000 micro lenses to create a moving image.
ref: 新的安全功能包括一个EURion星座，一个新的更安全的水印，以及一个名为“motion”的新功能，它使用65万个微透镜来创建一个移动图像。

src: The note was originally slated for release in 2008 although budget constraints pushed the release date back to late 2009 or early to mid 2010.
ref: 该纸币原定于2008年发布，尽管预算限制将发布日期推迟至2009年底或2010年中期。

src: The note will go into general circulation by early 2011.
ref: 该纸币将于2011年初开始全面流通。

src: In a recent study released by the World Bank and the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development (OECD), economic opportunities for women are still lagging behind opportunities for men in the developing world.
ref: 世界银行和经济合作与发展组织（经合发组织）最近发表的一项研究表明，发展中国家妇女的经济机会仍然落后于男子。

src: Improvements have been made in women health and education, according to the study.
ref: 该研究表明，女性健康和教育方面已有所改善。

src: The study calls for investments totaling over US$13 billion a year to achieve gender equality and women empowerment.
ref: 该研究要求每年投资总额超过130亿美元，以实现性别平等和赋予妇女权力。

src: Danny Leipziger, World Bank Vice President for Poverty Reduction and Economic Management, said, "gender equality is key for poverty reduction and growth."
ref: 世界银行负责减贫和经济管理的副总裁丹尼·莱比锡说：“性别平等是减贫和增长的关键。”

src: "Progress on women’s education is essential but not enough if we don’t improve women’s access to good jobs and credit lines, to land ownership and to income-generating activities."
ref: “在妇女教育方面取得进展至关重要，但如果我们不改善妇女获得好工作和信贷额度、土地所有权和创收活动的机会，这还不够。”

src: The study Equality for Women: Where Do We Stand on Millennium Development Goal 3? looks at the achievements made by the developing world as laid out by the Millennium Development Goals (MD).
ref: 妇女平等研究：我们对千年发展目标3的立场是什么？看看发展中国家在千年发展目标（MD）中取得的成就。

src: These goals are eight international development goals that 189 United Nations member states and at least 23 international organizations have agreed to achieve by the year 2015.
ref: 这些目标是189个联合国会员国和至少23个国际组织同意在2015年之前实现的8个国际发展目标。

src: They include halving extreme poverty, reducing child mortality rates, fighting disease epidemics such as AIDS, and developing a global partnership for development.
ref: 这些目标包括将极端贫困人口减半、降低儿童死亡率、抗击艾滋病等流行病以及建立全球发展伙伴关系。

src: Education has improved in 82 countries out of 122 and are on track to meet their MD goals.
ref: 122个国家中有82个国家的教育得到了改善，正在朝着实现MD目标的方向迈进。

src: However, 19 countries, 13 of which are in Sub- Saharan Africa, are seriously off track to meet their target.
ref: 然而，19个国家，其中13个在撒哈拉以南非洲，严重偏离了实现其目标的轨道。

src: The United Nations will hold a conference on Thursday at the annual session of the UN in New York to discuss the Millennium Development Goals.
ref: 联合国将于周四在纽约联合国年会上召开会议，讨论千年发展目标。

src: Maher said he was asked by CBS News to appear on the segment.
ref: 马赫尔说，哥伦比亚广播公司新闻频道要求他上这个节目。

src: But when he asked if he could talk about religion, "that was a dealbreaker from the start".
ref: 但当他被问及是否可以谈谈宗教时，“这从一开始就是不能通融的条件”。

src: Instead, he said they would send over a list of "acceptable topics".
ref: 相反，他表示，他们将提交一份“可接受话题”清单。

src: CBS News executive producer Rome Hartman has since responded in an e-mail to TVNewser saying that, "Bill Maher was never told that he couldn't discuss religion in a Free Speech segment," and added, "In fact, Free Speech has already addressed religion and we expect others will in the future."
ref: CBS新闻执行制片人罗马·哈特曼在一封给TVNewser的电子邮件中回应说，“比尔·马赫尔从来没有被告知他不能在言论自由环节讨论宗教，”并补充说，“事实上，言论自由已经涉及宗教，我们希望其他人在未来也会这样做。”

src: No response from Bill Maher on this statement as of yet.
ref: 到目前为止，比尔·马赫还没有对此声明作出回应。

src: A Virginia man who allegedly clubbed to death an alligator he hooked while fishing, is under consideration by the U.S. Attorney’s Office in Richmond for destroying a "threatened species".
ref: 维吉尼亚州一名男子在钓鱼时用棍子打死了他钓到的一条短吻鳄。目前，美国里士满检察官办公室正在考虑这名男子是否伤害了一个“濒危物种”。

src: But according to the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service web page of delisted species on the Endangered Species Act, the American alligator was removed from the list in 1987.
ref: 但根据美国鱼类和野生动物服务局公布的《濒危物种法》摘牌物种网页，1987年美国短吻鳄被排除在名单之外。

src: The reason cited for its removal was the species had recovered.
ref: 其被移除的原因是该物种数量已经不符合濒危要求。

src: Fisherman Max Belle reportedly used an oar to bring into submission the 44-inch-long, 9 pound creature when he brought it to the boat.
ref: 据报道，渔夫马克斯·贝尔在把这只44英寸长、9磅重的生物带到船上时，用桨将它制服。

src: Belle was fishing on the Chesterfield County Falling Creek Reservoir, where the alligator was first sighted in May.
ref: 贝尔当时正在切斯特菲尔德县福尔克里克水库钓鱼，今年5月，人们首次在那里发现了这只短吻鳄。

src: An alligator is not a native species in the mid-Atlantic region of the USA, and it is thought that it was released by someone who once kept it as a pet.
ref: 短吻鳄不是美国大西洋中部地区的本土物种，据认为它是由曾经将其作为宠物饲养的人释放的。

src: U.S.Department of Agriculture (USDA) employee attempts to capture and relocate it were unsuccessful.
ref: 美国美国农业部（USDA）的工作人员试图捕获并重新安置它，但没有成功。

src: The native habitat of the alligator is in regions of the Southeast, starting from the Carolinas and moving southwards to Texas.
ref: 短吻鳄的原始栖息地在美国东南部，从卡罗来纳州开始，向南迁移到德克萨斯州。

src: The fisherman’s attorney, David P. Baugh, said area residents surrounding the reservoir are happy the alligator is gone.
ref: 渔民的律师大卫·P·鲍格说，水库周围的居民很高兴鳄鱼走了。

src: Referring to the support for Mr. Belle of reservoir neighbors, he said, "... next time they [USDA] will ask to hire Mr. Belle to come catch the alligator."
ref: 谈到水库邻居对贝尔先生的支持，他说：“……下次他们【美国农业部】将要求雇用贝尔先生来抓短吻鳄。”

src: His client received a court summons Thursday and is prepared to pay a $300 fine and $50 court costs if he is found guilty of the federal misdemeanor crime.
ref: 他的当事人星期四接到法院传票，如果被判犯有联邦轻罪，他准备支付300美元的罚款和50美元的法庭费用。

src: It took investigators two weeks to positively identify the toothy crocodile as an American alligator, (Alligator mississippiensis).
ref: 调查人员花了两周时间才确定这条有牙齿的鳄鱼是美洲短吻鳄（密西西比短吻鳄）。

src: United States and Iraqi forces have captured the al-Qaeda in Iraq's second in command, Hamad Jama al-Saedi.
ref: 美国和伊拉克军队抓获了伊拉克基地组织的第二号头目哈马德·贾马·萨伊迪。

src: He is also known as Al-Suaidi, Abu Rana and Abu Humam.
ref: 他也被叫做奥萨地，阿布·拉纳和阿布·胡曼。

src: Officials say that the arrest "dealt a severe blow" to al-Qaeda in Iraq.
ref: 官员们表示，此次逮捕对伊拉克的基地组织“造成了严重打击”。

src: According to officials, Saedi masterminded the al-Askari shrine bombing which occurred in February.
ref: 据有关官员说，萨伊迪策划了今年2月发生的阿斯卡里神庙爆炸案。

src: "Deliberate intelligence work both by Iraqi forces and as well as multinational forces have dealt a very severe blow to al Qaeda organization in Iraq," said Barham Salih, the Planning Minister for Iraq.
ref: 伊拉克规划部长巴勒姆·萨利赫说，“伊拉克部队以及多国部队的深思熟虑的情报工作，对伊拉克的基地组织造成了非常严重的打击。”

src: The arrest was made north of Baquba when forces found Rana hiding inside a building.
ref: 逮捕行动发生在巴古拜北部，当时部队发现拉纳藏在一座建筑内。

src: According to Rubaie, the building was currently in use by some families.
ref: 据鲁巴伊说，这栋建筑目前被一些家庭使用。

src: Forces found information on the location of Saedi when a U.S. airstrike in June killed former leader of al-Qaeda in Iraq, Abu Musab al-Zarqawi.
ref: 美军在6月份的一次空袭中击毙了伊拉克基地组织前领导人阿布·穆萨布·al-扎卡维，发现了有关萨伊迪所在地的信息。

src: By a majority of 378 to 262, Members of the European Parliament have voted to abolish the right of European Union countries to opt out of Working Time Directive.
ref: 欧洲议会以378票对262票的多数投票废除了欧盟国家选择不工作时间指令的权利。

src: If the Council of Ministers agrees, the right to opt out of the directive will be phased out over a period of three years.
ref: 如果部长理事会同意，选择退出该指令的权利将在三年内逐步取消。

src: Under the "derogation" provision of the directive, individual workers can waive the right to work no more than 48 hours per week.
ref: 根据该指令的“减损”条款，个人工人可以放弃每周工作不超过48小时的权利。

src: Among the member states, only the United Kingdom uses this provision.
ref: 在成员国中，只有英国使用这一规定。

src: 12 firefighters in Buffalo, New York, United States have been taken to the hospital where they are being treated for smoke and chemical inhalation after a massive fire broke out at a warehouse on Buffalo's west side, early Monday morning.
ref: 美国纽约州布法罗市的一处仓库星期一凌晨发生大火，12名消防队员被送往医院接受烟雾和化学物质吸入治疗。

src: At least three fire companies started battling the blaze, which engulfed the entire warehouse, sending a plume of smoke into the air which could be seen for several miles, at one point darkening the sky.
ref: 至少有三家消防公司开始灭火，大火吞没了整个仓库，一股浓烟直冲云霄，几英里外都能看到，天空一度变得昏暗。

src: All 12 firefighters are being treated at Erie County Medical Center, but their conditions are not known.
ref: 所有12名消防员正在伊利县医疗中心接受治疗，但他们的病情尚不清楚。

src: At least 80 firefighters were reported to be on scene along with a total of nine of the 19 fire companies in Buffalo.
ref: 据报道，至少80名消防队员和布法罗19家消防公司中的9家一起在现场。

src: Firefighters were still on scene as of 9:15 a.m. EDT (UTC-4) today, nearly 24 hours after the fire started.
ref: 截至美国东部时间今天上午9点15分（UTC-4），火灾发生后近24小时，消防队员仍在现场。

src: The fire started at the Leisure Living Pool Supplies warehouse at 1130 Niagara street between West Ferry and Albany streets behind the Rich Products building at around 10:30 a.m. Monday and was not brought under control until 6:30 a.m. today.
ref: 星期一上午10：30左右，大火发生在富产品大厦后面的西渡口和奥尔巴尼街之间的尼亚加拉街1130号休闲生活池用品仓库，直到今天早上6：30才被控制。

src: Firefighters had the fire under control just before 12:00 p.m. Monday, but wind off Lake Erie reignited the fire at around 3:00 p.m.
ref: 消防队员在周一中午12点之前控制住了火势，但伊利湖附近的风在下午3点左右再次点燃了大火。

src: At around 7:00 p.m., most of the blaze was under control, but smoke could still be seen coming from the building.
ref: 晚上7点左右，大部分火势都得到控制，但仍能从大楼里看到烟雾。

src: All employees from both Rich's and the chemical company have been sent home for the day and made it out safely.
ref: 里奇和这家化工公司的所有员工都已被送回家，并已安全撤离。

src: The building is owned by PoolSupplies.com which is a division of Leisure Living, selling supplies, recreation and chemicals for swimming pools.
ref: 该建筑为PoolSupplies.com所有，是一个休闲生活、销售游泳池用品、娱乐和化学品的部门。

src: At 9:00 p.m., firefighters reported that most of the fire was contained under the collapsed portions of the building, but around 10:00 p.m. firefighters reported that more thick black smoke started to rise from the building.
ref: 晚上9点，消防队员报告说，大部分火灾被控制在大楼倒塌的部分，但大约晚上10点，消防队员报告说，更多的黑烟开始从大楼上升。

src: Black smoke usually indicates burning, whereas white smoke often indicates water putting out a fire.
ref: 黑烟通常表示燃烧，而白烟通常表示水灭火。

src: Firefighters are using a helicopter, courtesy of the Erie County Sheriff's Department, that is equipped with infrared cameras in order to see the areas of the building which still contain a significant amount of heat or fire.
ref: 消防队员正在使用一架直升机，这是伊利县治安官部门提供的，它配备了红外摄像机，以便看到建筑物中仍然有大量热量或火灾的区域。

src: After having fought the fire for over 24 hours, fire officials stated that the fire was mostly extinguished and ordered fire companies to start shutting down the hoses and pack up their equipment.
ref: 在与大火搏斗了24个多小时后，消防官员表示，大火已基本被扑灭，并命令消防公司开始关闭水管，收拾好设备。

src: Just before 1:00 p.m. the fire command post stated that fire investigators were on scene and that "they can call us (firefighters) back if they need anything."
ref: 就在下午1点之前，消防指挥所表示，火灾调查人员已经在现场，“如果他们需要什么，可以给我们（消防员）打电话。”

src: Officials have urged all residents near the blaze to stay indoors and to shut all windows and doors due to the smoke which has been blowing close to the ground.
ref: 官员们敦促大火附近的所有居民呆在室内，并关闭所有门窗，因为浓烟已经向地面蔓延。

src: At least one civilian who was inside a park at the foot of Ferry was also taken to the hospital for smoke and chemical inhalation.
ref: 至少一名在渡轮脚下公园内的平民也被送往医院接受烟雾和化学物质吸入。

src: Officials were able to evacuate the park and no other injuries were reported.
ref: 官员们已经撤离了公园，没有其他人员受伤的报道。

src: At one point, the sun was blocked by the black smoke rising from the building.
ref: 有一段时间，太阳被从大楼升起的黑烟挡住了。

src: It appears it reignited due to the earlier collapse of the roof and the winds off the lake.
ref: 它似乎是由于早期的屋顶坍塌和湖上的风重新点燃的。

src: "Right now, one thing fire officials would like to get out and stress is anyone in and around the Niagara and Ferry area, if you could please go indoors, and shut your doors," stated Michael DeGeorge, a spokesman for the Buffalo Police Department, to reporters.
ref: 布法罗警察局的发言人迈克尔·德杰尔奇对记者说：“现在，消防官员想要做的一件事就是让尼亚加拉和渡轮附近的人感到压力，如果你们能进入室内，关上你们的门。”

src: The northbound lane of the I-190 expressway, which lies just to the west of the warehouse, was closed at the Porter Street exit at the Peace Bridge to the exit leading to the 198 expressway for several hours.
ref: I-190号高速公路的北行车道就在仓库的西面，在和平桥的波特街出口和通往198号高速公路的出口关闭了数小时。

src: At 11:15 p.m., firefighters stated they would begin to reopen the lane.
ref: 晚上11点15分，消防员表示将开始重新开放车道。

src: Niagara street from Albany to West Ferry reopened to normal traffic in the late morning hours of Tuesday.
ref: 从奥尔巴尼到西渡轮的尼亚加拉街在星期二上午晚些时候恢复正常交通。

src: Throughout Monday afternoon and early evening, employees of Marco's Restaurant on Niagara and Albany were providing ice and beverages to firefighters and police officers who were on scene.
ref: 整个星期一下午和傍晚，尼亚加拉和奥尔巴尼的马可餐厅的员工正在为现场的消防员和警察提供冰和饮料。

src: Temperatures were quite warm, in the upper 70's (F), with winds gusting to nearly 15-20 MPH, coming out of the southwest.
ref: 气温相当温暖，在70华氏度（华氏度）以上，风速高达每小时15-20英里，从西南方向吹来。

src: Although the wind assisted in reigniting the fire, it also assisted firefighters by quickly clearing the area of smoke.
ref: 虽然风帮助重新点燃了大火，但它也帮助消防员迅速清除了该地区的烟雾。

src: The warehouse is a storage and distribution facility for pool chemicals, especially chlorine.
ref: 仓库是一个储存和分配池化学品，特别是氯气的设施。

src: Chemical drops could be felt flying through the air, which also had the smell of bleach.
ref: 空气中弥漫着漂白剂的味道，可以感觉到化学药水在空中飞舞。

src: According to a source who spoke to Wikinews on condition of anonymity, the warehouse contained over US$8 million in supplies and chemicals.
ref: 一位不愿透露姓名的消息人士向维基新闻透露，这个仓库里有超过800万美元的物资和化学品。

src: Earlier tests performed on the air by firefighters and Haz-mat officials had shown that the smoke and fumes rising from the fire are not dangerous or toxic.
ref: 早些时候，消防员和危险物料官员对空气进行的测试显示，火灾产生的烟雾并不危险，也没有毒性。

src: Further tests were performed, but those results are not yet known and officials don't believe there was any danger to the air.
ref: 进行了进一步的测试，但这些结果尚不清楚，官员们并不认为空气有任何危险。

src: Officials will testing the water runoff from fire hoses to make sure that it is not contaminated as it is emptying into the Niagara River.
ref: 官员们将测试消防水管流出的水，以确保这些水在流入尼亚加拉河时没有受到污染。

src: The warehouse is located just down stream from a drinking water pumping station with several more scattered along the River from Buffalo to Niagara Falls.
ref: 仓库位于一个饮用水泵站的下游，从布法罗到尼亚加拉大瀑布沿河分布着更多的仓库。

src: The cause of the fire is not known and is under investigation.
ref: 火灾的原因尚不清楚，正在调查中。

src: Last year, on May 14, 2007, at least five buildings that were part of a warehouse complex about 1/3 of a mile from Leisure caught fire, and required nearly 130 firefighters to battle the blaze.
ref: 去年，也就是2007年5月14日，至少有5栋大楼起火，这些大楼是距离休闲区约1/3英里的仓库建筑群的一部分，需要近130名消防员来扑灭大火。

src: Smoke from that fire was seen over 40 miles away.
ref: 大火产生的烟雾在40多英里外都能看到。

src: Instead of returning to practise from a fractured finger today as scheduled, flamboyant Dallas Cowboys receiver Terrell Owens is instead recovering at Baylor Medical Center this morning from an apparent suicide attempt last night.
ref: 今天，达拉斯牛仔队的花哨的接球手特雷尔·欧文斯因手指骨折后没有按计划恢复训练，而是正在贝勒医疗中心从昨晚的一次明显的自杀企图中恢复过来。

src: A female friend who was with Owens last night observed him taking several prescription pain killers and behaving erratically.
ref: 昨晚与欧文斯在一起的一位女性朋友观察到他服用了几种处方止痛药，行为异常。

src: She called 911 and Owens was rushed to the hospital.
ref: 她打了911，欧文斯被紧急送往医院。

src: Original reports stated that Owens was suffering from an adverse reaction to the pain medication, which he was taking for a fractured hand.
ref: 最初的报告说，欧文斯对止痛药有不良反应，他服用止痛药是因为他的手骨折。

src: But this morning, Dallas police have reported that Owens took an unknown large amount of the pills, and when asked by police this morning if he had been attempting to hurt himself, Owens replied, "Yes."
ref: 但今天早上，达拉斯警方报告说，欧文斯服用了一大批不明数量的药片，当警方今天上午询问他是否试图伤害自己时，欧文斯回答说：“是的。”

src: Paramedics have only confirmed that they called police to report that they were bringing Owens to hospital.
ref: 医护人员只证实，他们报警报告说，他们正在把欧文斯送到医院。

src: Owens has since said that he was not attempting suicide.
ref: 自那以后，欧文斯说他并不是企图自杀。

src: Rabies is a disease that has no cure and nearly everyone it infects is dead just two weeks after the symptoms show.
ref: 狂犬病是一种无法治愈的疾病，几乎所有感染狂犬病的人在症状出现两周后就会死亡。

src: And yet, last week a teenage girl named Jeanna Giese was released from a hospital having been successfuly treated.
ref: 然而，上周，一位名叫珍娜·吉斯的十几岁女孩在接受了成功的治疗后从一家医院出院。

src: She became the first known person to recover from the disease without vaccination.
ref: 她成为第一个在没有接种疫苗的情况下从疾病中康复的人。

src: On September 12, 2004, Jeanna — a 15 year old from Fond du Lac, Wisconsin— was bitten by a bat while attending church.
ref: 2004年9月12日，来自威斯康星州芬德杜拉克的15岁的珍娜在参加教堂活动的时候被蝙蝠咬了。

src: By the time she saw a doctor about fatigue and numbness, it was October 18, and the bat incident was not brought up until several days later.
ref: 到了10月18日，她去看了一位医生和医生说她有时感到疲劳和麻木，而她被蝙蝠咬的事情直到几天后才被提起。

src: Usually when there is a possibility of rabies, doctors will vaccinate patients: the vaccine has a chance to act before the symptoms appear.
ref: 通常，当有狂犬病的可能性时，医生会给病人接种疫苗：疫苗有机会在症状出现之前发挥作用。

src: In Jeanna's case it was too late to try to vaccinate, and her doctors at the Children's Hospital of Wisconsin devised a new treatment.
ref: 在珍娜的案例中，试图接种疫苗为时已晚，她在威斯康星州儿童医院的医生设计了一种新的治疗方法。

src: Jeanna was put into a drug-induced coma for a week, and doctors began an intensive treatment to prop up her nervous system until her natural immunity recovered enough to fight the disease.
ref: 珍妮娜被药物催眠昏迷一周，医生开始强化治疗，以支撑她的神经系统，直到她的自然免疫恢复到足以对抗疾病。

src: By surviving and recovering, Jeanna became the only person known in medicine to overcome rabies without a vaccine.
ref: 通过康复，珍娜成为医学上唯一一个没有疫苗就能战胜狂犬病的人。

src: She is not yet fully recovered: the effects of the coma are still apparent, and she has difficulty with movement.
ref: 她还没有完全康复：昏迷的影响仍然明显，她有运动困难。

src: Yet the doctors believe that she is getting well much faster than they expected, and feel that Jeanna will be able to return to her high school studies, needing only physical and occupational therapy.
ref: 然而，医生们认为她的康复速度比他们预期的要快得多，并认为珍娜将能够回到她的高中学习，只需要物理和职业治疗。

src: The novel treatment is hailed by doctors as promising, but needs analysis and verification on another human.
ref: 这种新颖的治疗方法被医生们誉为很有希望，但需要对另一人进行分析和验证。

src: Jeanna's is the sixth case of human recovery from a rabies infection, but the other five people were vaccinated against rabies either before infection, or before the symptoms appeared.
ref: 珍娜是人类从狂犬病感染中恢复的第六例，但其他5人在感染之前或症状出现之前就接种了狂犬病疫苗。

src: Stan Berenstain, co-creator of the popular Berenstain Bears children's books, has died due to complications from cancer at age 82.
ref: 广受欢迎的贝伦斯坦熊童书的共同创作者斯坦·贝伦斯坦因癌症并发症去世，享年82岁。

src: Along with his wife, Jan Berenstain, Stan and Jan Berenstain published over 200 books aimed at teaching children to read and helping them with lessons such as sharing, new siblings.
ref: 他和妻子简·贝伦斯坦、斯坦和简·贝伦斯坦出版了200多本书，目的是教孩子们阅读，并帮助他们学习分享、新生兄弟姐妹等课程。

src: The first Berenstain Bears book was published in 1962 and titled "The Big Honey Hunt".
ref: 伯伦斯坦熊的第一本书出版于1962年，书名是“大猎蜂蜜”。

src: With the help of head of children's publishing at Random House, author Theodor Geisel, better known as Dr. Seuss, the Berenstains created a franchise that drew millions of young readers.
ref: 在兰登书屋儿童出版部负责人、作为苏斯博士更广为人知的作家西奥多·盖泽尔的帮助下，贝伦斯坦夫妇创造了一项专营权，吸引了数以百万计的年轻读者。

src: Until 1997, when they hired an employee to run the company's computer, Mr. Berenstain and his family managed the entire ursine enterprise, which has branched out into two television series, videos, stage musicals, toys, cereal and other products.
ref: 直到1997年，贝伦斯坦先生和他的家人聘请了一名员工来管理公司的电脑，他们管理着整个氨酸企业，该企业已经发展到到包括制作两部电视剧、视频、舞台音乐剧、玩具、谷类食品和其他产品。

src: According to an interview of the Berenstain Bears official website, Papa Bear is based on Stan, Mama on Jan; Stan clarifies that he's "not as stupid" as Papa.
ref: 根据伯伦斯坦熊官方网站的一次采访，熊爸爸和熊妈妈分别是以斯坦和他的妻子简为原型。1月份斯坦澄清说，他“可不像熊爸爸那样愚笨”。

src: Stan fed his interest in drawing as a child, by drawing on paper bags and cardboard.
ref: 斯坦从小就对绘画感兴趣，他用纸袋和纸板作画。

src: The trial against internet file-sharing network Kazaa in Sydney, Australia, is coming to an end, as closing arguments began today.
ref: 在澳大利亚悉尼，针对互联网文件共享网络Kazaa的审判即将结束，结案辩论今天开始。

src: Kazaa pleaded it could not be held responsible for the copyright infringements perpetrated by its users, as it cannot control how the software is used.
ref: Kazaa辩称，它不能对用户侵犯版权的行为负责，因为它无法控制软件的使用方式。

src: The peer-to-peer distribution software and its owner, Sharman Networks Ltd. and its directors were sued by a group of Australian record labels for copyright infringements by the network's estimated 100 million members worldwide.
ref: 点对点分销软件及其所有者沙曼网络有限公司及其董事因侵犯版权行为被一群澳大利亚唱片公司起诉，该软件在全球约有1亿会员。

src: Members of the software share music files with each other, and download up to three billion songs and music files monthly.
ref: 该软件的成员彼此共享音乐文件，并每月下载多达30亿首歌曲和音乐文件。

src: The music industry claims it has lost millions of dollars in unpaid royalties as a result.
ref: 音乐界声称它已经因此而损失了数百万美元的未付版税。

src: Lawyer Tony Meagher argued that Sharman is no more responsible for the uses of its software than the designers of the photocopiers and video recorders were responsible for the illegal copying of materials on those machines.
ref: 律师托尼·米格尔辩称，与复印机和录像机的设计者对非法复制这些设备上的资料所应付的责任相比，沙曼对其软件的使用不用负任何责任。

src: The remaining question is whether Kazaa authorises its users to download files illegally.
ref: 剩下的问题是Kazaa是否授权其用户非法下载文件。

src: "We tell these users in our Web site and we tell them in our license that they cannot use this (software) for infringing copyright," Meagher told Judge Murray Wilcox.
ref: “我们在我们的网站上告诉这些用户，我们在许可证中告诉他们，他们不能使用这个（软件）来侵犯版权，”米格尔告诉法官穆雷·威尔科克斯。

src: By consenting to this license by users, Kazaa is exempted from responsibility.
ref: 通过用户同意本许可，Kazaa不承担任何责任。

src: The record industry claims Kazaa not only enables but encourages copyright infringement.
ref: 唱片业声称Kazaa不仅能够支持而且还鼓励侵犯版权。

src: Record industry lawyer Tony Bannon argued that as Kazaa collected information from its users through spyware and sold it to advertisers, the company's claim that it had no control over the software was "completely mind boggling."
ref: 唱片业律师托尼·班农认为，当Kazaa通过间谍软件从用户那里收集信息并将其卖给广告商时，该公司声称自己对该软件没有控制权的说法“完全令人难以置信”。

src: This is not the first trial against Kazaa, and other programs of its kind.
ref: 这不是针对Kazaa和其他同类案件的第一次审判。

src: In August last year, Judge Stephen Wilson ruled that the distribution by Grokster and Morpheus of peer-to-peer software does not violate U.S. copyright law.
ref: 去年8月，斯蒂芬·威尔逊法官裁定格罗斯特和莫菲斯发行的点对点软件并没有违反美国版权法。

src: Rod Dorman, lead trial council for Sharman Networks in the U.S., said, "As a result of this decision, Sharman Networks will be filing a motion for summary judgement, nearly identical to the successful motions filed by Grokster and Morpheus, and we are confident that Judge Wilson will find that our product, Kazaa, is a lawful product as well."
ref: 沙曼网络在美国的首席审判委员会委员罗德·多尔曼表示，“由于这一决定，沙曼网络将提交简易判决动议，几乎与格罗斯特和莫菲斯提出的成功动议相同，我们对此充满信心，威尔逊法官会发现我们的产品Kazaa也是合法的产品。”

src: However, the ruling held no precedential effect in the Australian trial, as the principles differed.
ref: 然而，由于原则不同，该裁决在澳大利亚审判中没有任何先例效应。

src: Kazaa and the FastTrack protocol are the brainchild of the Scandinavians Niklas Zennström and Janus Friis, and were introduced in March 2001 by their Dutch company Consumer Empowerment.
ref: Kazaa和FastTrack协议是斯堪的纳维亚人尼古拉斯·曾斯特姆和乔纳斯·弗里斯的心血结晶，并于2001年3月由他们的荷兰公司Consumer Empowerment推出。

src: It appeared during the end of the first generation of P2P networks.
ref: 它出现在第一代P2P网络的末期。

src: In July 2004, Romania will revalue its currency, the leu, so that 10,000 old lei will equal 1 new leu, with 1 euro being equal to approximately 3.6 new lei.
ref: 2004年7月，罗马尼亚将重新计算其货币列伊的价值，使10,000个旧列伊相当于1个新列伊，1欧元相当于约3.6个新列伊。

src: Dual pricing, in both the old leu and the new leu, has already been introduced from March 2005.
ref: 新旧两种方式的双重定价已于2005年3月开始实行。

src: The transition to the new leu is expected to stabilise the Romanian currency and prepare the country for euro adoption.
ref: 预计向新列伊的过渡将稳定罗马尼亚货币，并为该国采用欧元做好准备。

src: In Romania's case, the adoption will take place 5-7 years after accession in 2007.
ref: 就罗马尼亚而言，2007年后的未来5到7年都将使用新的货币定价方式。

src: Fans of quirky numbers everywhere celebrated recently as the clock struck 01:02:03, 04/05/06 (using the DD/MM/YY date convention).
ref: 最近，当时钟敲响01：02：03、04/05/06（使用dd/mm/yy方式）时，世界各地古怪数字的粉丝们都在庆祝。

src: This once-in-a-century event was highlighted in advance by webloggers and websites such as Boing Boing.
ref: 这是百年一遇的盛事，网络博主和BoingBoing等网站提前强调了这一点。

src: For countries where the MM/DD/YY convention is more common, the event happened a month ago on 5th April.
ref: 对于使用MM/DD/YY时钟计时方式较为常见的国家，这一事件发生在一个月前的4月5日。

src: The date attracted numerous comments when posted to the news website Digg, and the special date has been mentioned by hundreds of thousands of websites, according to a Google search.
ref: 据谷歌搜索显示，这一日期在新闻网站Digg上发布时吸引了大量评论，成千上万的网站都提到了这一特殊日期。

src: Whilst 01:02:03, 04/05/06 won't happen again for another hundred years, those who missed out might want to celebrate 06:06:06, 06/06/06 in just over a month's time, unless you're a hexakosioihexekontahexaphobic.
ref: 虽然01：02：03，04/05/06在接下来的100年内不会再发生，但是那些错过了这个特殊时间数字的人可能想会在下一个多月的时间里庆祝06：06：06，06/06/06这个时间数字，除非你是个六六六数字的恐惧症患者。

src: The Greek ministries of Public Order and Economy announced that they offer the amount of 800,000 euros to those who will submit information that could help authorities in the fight against local terrorism.
ref: 希腊公共秩序部和经济部宣布，他们将向那些将提交有助于当局打击当地恐怖主义的情报的人提供80万欧元。

src: More specifically, as Greek police stated, everybody who has information about the Revolutionary Struggle (ELA) terrorist far-left organization, can call (within Greece) the police numbers, 170 and 1014.
ref: 更具体地说，正如希腊警方所说，任何人如果有关于革命斗争（ELA）恐怖主义极左组织的情报，都可以（在希腊境内）拨打报警号码170和1014。

src: This effort by the Greek government has been fully supported by the Embassy of the United States in Athens which, in a statement, announced that offers up to $1 million to those who will significantly help towards the capture of terrorists.
ref: 希腊政府的这一努力得到了美国驻雅典大使馆的全力支持，该大使馆在一份声明中宣布，向那些将大力帮助抓获恐怖分子的人提供高达100万美元的援助。

src: As the Embassy stated, "you can help bring terrorists to justice and save lives by providing valuable information to resolve past acts of terrorism or prevent future ones".
ref: 正如大使馆指出的那样，“你可以通过提供宝贵的信息来解决恐怖主义行为或防止未来的恐怖主义行为，从而帮助将恐怖分子绳之以法并拯救生命”。

src: The Revolutionary Struggle is regarded as a spinoff of the notorious terrorist group November 17th; the members of which were captured in 2003.
ref: 革命斗争组织被认为是臭名昭著的恐怖组织11月17日的一个分支，该组织的成员是在2003年被捕的。

src: ELA took responsibility for a rocket attack against the US Embassy in Athens, on January 12, 2007.
ref: 2007年1月12日，革命斗争组织用火箭弹袭击了美国驻雅典大使馆。

src: The Entertainment Software Association president Douglas Lowenstein confirmed speculations that his group is planning to file a lawsuit against the state of Oklahoma because of a new law, HB3004.
ref: 娱乐软件协会主席道格拉斯·洛文斯坦证实了外界的猜测，由于一部新的法律HB3004，他的团队计划对俄克拉荷马州提起诉讼。

src: Under this law, games that have "inappropriate violence" are added to a list of materials that are considered harmful to minors.
ref: 根据这项法律，具有“不适当暴力”的游戏被添加到被认为对未成年人有害的材料清单中。

src: Lowenstein said that the ESA believes "HB3004 will restrict the First Amendment rights of Oklahoma's citizens and intend to file suit in Oklahoma federal district court shortly, asking that the state's new video game law be overturned."
ref: 洛文斯坦表示，娱乐软件协会认为“HB3004将限制俄克拉荷马州公民的第一修正案权利，并打算近期在俄克拉荷马州联邦地方法院提起诉讼，要求推翻该州的新视频游戏法。”

src: Similar laws have been found unconstitutional in St. Louis, Indianapolis, Washington, Illinois, and Michigan.
ref: 在圣路易斯，印第安纳波利斯，华盛顿，伊利诺伊州和密歇根州，类似的法律被认定为违宪。

src: A California video game law is currently being reviewed in federal court.
ref: 目前联邦法院正在对加州的一项视频游戏法进行审查。

src: Last week, a Minnesota law was passed fining minors $25 for purchasing games rated "mature" or "adults only".
ref: 上周，明尼苏达州通过一项法律，对购买评级为“成人”或“仅限成人”游戏的未成年人，处以25美元罚款。

src: The annual Living Planet Report compiled by the Zoological Society of London and the Global Footprint Network, published this week by WWF International, assessed "the health of the planet's ecosystems" and measured the demands people make on the planet's resources.
ref: 本周，世界自然基金会国际组织出版了由伦敦动物学会和全球足迹网共同编制的年度生命星球报告，报告评估了“地球生态系统的健康状况”，并测算了人们对地球资源的需求。

src: The Living Planet Index is based on population trends between 1970 and 2003 of over 3 600 populations of more than 1 300 vertebrate species from around the world.
ref: 生命星球指数基于1970年至2003年间来自世界各地超过1,300种脊椎动物物种的3,600多个种群的数量趋势。

src: There has been an overall decline of around 30 per cent over the 33-year period.
ref: 在33年期间，总体下降了约30％。

src: Tropical species populations declined by around 55 per cent on average from 1970 to 2003, while temperate species populations, have shown little overall change.
ref: 从1970年到2003年，热带物种种群平均下降了约55％，而温带物种种群的总体变化很小。

src: The Ecological Footprint measures the area of biologically productive land and sea required to sustian humanity.
ref: 生态足迹测算了人类所需的生物生产性土地和海洋面积。

src: In 2003 this was 14.1 billion global hectares, or 2.2 global hectares per person (a global hectare is a hectare with world-average ability to produce resources and absorb wastes).
ref: 2003年，这个面积为141亿全球标准公顷，即每人2.2公顷（全球标准公顷为具有世界平均生产资源和吸收废物的能力的公顷）。

src: The total supply of productive area, or biocapacity, in 2003 was 11.2 global hectares, or 1.8 global hectares per person.
ref: 2003年生产面积或生物承载力的总供应量为11.2全球公顷，即每人1.8公顷。

src: Demand overshot supply first in the 1980s and has been increasing every year since.
ref: 在20世纪80年代需求量首先超过供应量，并且自那以后每年都在增加。

src: By 2003 the overshoot was about 25 per cent.
ref: 到2003年，超过量约为25％。

src: Thus, it took approximately a year and three months for the Earth to produce the ecological resources humanity used in that year.
ref: 因此，地球花了大约一年零三个月的时间才生产出当年人类使用的生态资源。

src: The Living Planet Index and the Ecological Footprint, along with other measures, have been adopted as indicators for the 2010 targets of the Convention on Biological Diversity.
ref: “生命地球指数”和“生态足迹”以及其他措施已被用作“生物多样性公约”2010年目标的指标。

src: The report concludes with a description of the roles of the various disciplines required to "shift humanity's current trajectory on to a path that will remain within the biological capacity of the planet".
ref: 报告最后描述了“将人类当前的轨迹转移到将保持在地球生物能力之内的道路”所需的各种学科的作用。

src: James P. Leape, the Director General of WWF International summarises:
ref: 世界自然基金会总干事詹姆斯·莱普总结道：。

src: "The message of these two indices is clear and urgent:"
ref: “这两个指数的信息是明确而紧迫的：”。

src: "we have been exceeding the Earth's ability to support our lifestyles for the past 20 years, and we need to stop."
ref: “在过去的20年里，我们一直在透支地球支持我们生活方式的能力，我们需要停下来。”

src: "We must balance our consumption with the natural world's capacity to regenerate and absorb our wastes."
ref: “我们必须平衡我们的消费与自然世界再生和吸收废物的能力。”

src: ABC News anchorman Bob Woodruff and his camera operator Doug Vogt have been seriously injured in an explosion.
ref: 美国广播公司新闻主播鲍勃·伍德拉夫和他的摄影师道格·沃格特在一次爆炸中受重伤。

src: Early reports indicate that both men sustained head injuries in the blast.
ref: 早期报告显示，两人在爆炸中头部受伤。

src: Woodruff was evacuated to the Balad Airbase, 68 kilometers north of Baghdad and is currently undergoing surgery.
ref: 伍德拉夫被疏散到巴格达以北68公里的巴拉德空军基地，目前正在接受手术。

src: "Bob and Doug are in serious condition and are being treated at a U.S. military hospital in Iraq," ABC said in a statement.
ref: 美国广播公司在一份声明中说：“鲍勃和道格伤势严重，目前正在伊拉克的一家美军医院接受治疗。”

src: Reports say Woodruff was taping a report inside an Iraqi mechanized military vehicle near Taji, Iraq when the vehicle ran over and detonated an improvised explosive device.
ref: 有报道说，伍德拉夫在伊拉克塔吉附近的一辆伊拉克机械化军车内录下了一份报告，这辆车撞上并引爆了一枚简易爆炸装置。

src: ABC also reports that exchanges of small arms fire took place shortly after the explosion.
ref: 美国广播公司还报道说，在爆炸后不久还发生了小规模武器交火。

src: MSNBC reports that Woodruff and Vogt were wearing body armor and helmets when the explosion occurred, measures that may turn out to have saved their lives.
ref: MSNBC报道说，爆炸发生时，伍德拉夫和沃格特身穿防弹衣和头盔，这些措施可能挽救了他们的生命。

src: The Associated Press is reporting that the two men were standing in the hatch of the vehicle at the time of the explosion, and that no other people were injured.
ref: 美联社报道称，爆炸发生时，这两名男子正站在车的舱口，没有其他人受伤。

src: Woodruff and Vogt had been embedded with the 4th Infantry Division that was accompanying an Iraqi Army unit.
ref: 伍德拉夫和沃格特与随同伊拉克陆军部队的第4步兵师一起驻扎。

src: ABC also said that both Woodruff and Vogt were wearing body armor and helmets.
ref: 美国广播公司还说，伍德拉夫和沃格特都穿着防弹衣和头盔。
