src: The U.S. military headquarters in Baghdad has confirmed the attack took place.
ref: 驻巴格达美军总部证实，袭击事件确实发生。

src: Vogt, a 46-year-old Canadian based in France, is an Emmy-award winning cameraman for ABC News with 25 years of experience.
ref: 沃格特，46岁的加拿大人，定居在法国，是美国广播公司新闻网获得艾美奖的摄影师，有25年的工作经验。

src: According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, 61 journalists have been killed in the line of duty in Iraq since the U.S.-led invasion in 2003.
ref: 据保护记者委员会称，自2003年以美国为首的入侵伊拉克以来，已有61名记者在执行任务时被杀。

src: Woodruff became the permanent co-anchor of ABC's World News Tonight, with Elizabeth Vargas on January 3, 2006, replacing the late Peter Jennings.
ref: 伍德拉夫成为美国广播公司今晚世界新闻的永久联合主播，2006年1月3日，伊丽莎白·巴尔加斯取代了已故的彼得·詹宁斯。

src: The New York Mets baseball team has agreed to a 20-year sponsorship deal with financial house Citigroup for the team's new ballpark, now called CitiField.
ref: 纽约大都会棒球队已经同意与金融机构花旗集团为该队现称为花旗场地的新棒球场签订一项为期20年的赞助协议。

src: The deal, which includes stadium naming rights, is worth more than $20 million annually, according to a baseball official.
ref: 据一位棒球官员透露，这个包括体育场冠名权在内的协议每年价值超过2000万美元。

src: This tops the approximately ten million annually the NFL's Houston Texans receive from Reliant Energy to call their home Reliant Stadium.
ref: 这超过了美国橄榄球联盟的休斯顿得克萨斯人队每年从可靠能源公司获得的大约1000万美元，用以将他们的主场场馆命名为可靠体育场。

src: The agreement between the Mets and the financial services company includes options for both the team and Citigroup that could extend the deal to up to 35-years.
ref: 大都会棒球队和金融服务公司花旗集团之间的协议包括双方都有权可将协议延长至35年。

src: Other commercial arrangements are part of the contract, the official said.
ref: 这位官员说，合同还包括其他商业安排。

src: Construction on the ballpark, next to the current stadium in Queens, New York, began last summer and is scheduled to be ready for the 2009 season.
ref: 棒球场位于纽约皇后区的现有球场旁边，从去年夏天开始建设，预计将在2009年赛季完工。

src: The Mets have played at Shea Stadium since 1964, the team's third year in the league.
ref: 大都会从1964年开始就在谢伊体育场比赛。当年是该队加入联赛的第三年。

src: The ballpark is named for William A. Shea, a lawyer who helped bring National League baseball back to New York.
ref: 棒球场是以威廉A.﻿谢伊命名的。他是一名帮助国家棒球联盟重返纽约律师。

src: The announcement will be made Monday at a special ceremony that will be attended by New York Govener, George Pataki and New York City Mayor Michael Bloomberg.
ref: 这一协议将在周一的一个特别仪式上宣布。纽约州长乔治·帕塔奇和纽约市市长迈克尔·布隆伯格将出席。

src: Citigroup is one of the world's largest full-service banks, with two hundred million customers in more than 100 countries.
ref: 花旗集团是世界上最大的全业务银行之一，在100多个国家拥有2亿客户。

src: In the Six Nations Cup, Ireland beat England 28 points to 24, to win The Triple Crown.
ref: 在六国杯上，爱尔兰以28比24击败英格兰队，夺得三冠王。

src: Ireland have now beaten England on the last three occasions that these sides have met.
ref: 爱尔兰在过去的三次交锋中击败了英格兰队。

src: In the biggest ever narcotics haul in India's capital, the New Delhi police have seized over 4,400 kg of Mandrax and Rs. 20 crore from a dealer in the city.
ref: 在印度首都有史以来最大的一次缉毒行动中，新德里警方从该市的一个商人手中缴获了4400公斤镇静片和20亿卢比。

src: The consignment, meant for a customer in the U.S, was seized from a godown in Badarpur, near the Delhi-Haryana border.
ref: 这批货物是从靠近德里-哈里亚纳邦边界的巴达普尔的一个货仓中缴获的，目的是给美国的一名顾客。

src: The alleged trafficker, identified as Vinod Sharma, claimed that the contraband was not his and that he had nothing to do with the matter.
ref: 被指控的贩运者，名叫维诺德·沙玛，声称走私品不是他的，他与此事无关。

src: Sharma started his career as a scrap-dealer in Delhi, and police suspect that with the help of some contacts he used container depots for drug-trafficking, whilst successfully dodging both the police and the Customs Department.
ref: 沙玛的职业生涯始于德里的废品商，警方怀疑，在一些联系人的帮助下，他利用集装箱仓库进行毒品贩运，同时成功地躲过了警察和海关部门的追捕。

src: On Sunday the Delhi Police arrested him at his Kalkaji residence.
ref: 周日，德里警方在他的卡拉卡机住所逮捕了他。

src: The Deputy Commissioner of Police for South District, Delhi Police, Anil Shukla said, "Sharma befriended container drivers and once they had driven past customs, he and his men would meet them at a distance and pilfer the containers."
ref: 德里警察局南区副局长阿尼尔·苏克拉说：“沙玛是集装箱司机的朋友，一旦他们驶过海关，他和他的人就会在远处与他们见面并偷窃集装箱。”

src: The Council of Europe is pressing member governments to provide information concerning CIA prisons operating secretly in Europe.
ref: 欧洲委员会正在敦促各成员国政府提供有关在欧洲秘密运营的中央情报局监狱的资料。

src: In an interim report by the human rights council rapporteur, Swiss senator Dick Marty made public the 42-member nation's preliminary conclusions regarding CIA activity on European Union soil.
ref: 在人权理事会报告员的一份临时报告中，瑞士参议员迪克·马蒂公布了42个成员国关于中央情报局在欧盟领土上活动的初步结论。

src: Marty reported, "Individuals have been abducted, deprived of their liberty and transported to different destinations in Europe, to be handed over to countries in which they have suffered degrading treatment and torture."
ref: 马蒂报告说，“一些人被绑架，被剥夺自由，并被送往欧洲不同的目的地，然后被移交给他们遭受有辱人格的待遇和酷刑的国家。”

src: The report estimates the rendition of "more than a hundred persons."
ref: 报告估计有“一百多人”被引渡。

src: But when it comes right down to it, no irrefutable evidence exists to confirm allegations that the CIA operated secret detention centers in Europe.
ref: 但归根结底，并没有无可辩驳的证据来证实中情局在欧洲运营秘密拘留中心的指控。

src: "There is a great deal of coherent, convergent evidence pointing to the existence of a system of 'relocation' or 'outsourcing of torture'," the report stated while further noting that, "It is highly unlikely that European governments, or at least their intelligence services, were unaware."
ref: “大量前后一致、趋同的证据表明，存在着一种‘重新安置’或‘外包酷刑’的制度，”该报告还指出，“欧洲各国政府，或至少其情报机构，极不可能不知情。”

src: "Our aim is to find out the truth that is being hidden from us today", he said.
ref: 他说：“我们的目标是找出今天隐藏在我们面前的真相。”

src: He adds that he is afraid of "the pressure put on the media in the United States not to report on this affair."
ref: 他补充说，他害怕“对美国媒体施加的不报道这件事的压力”。

src: A researcher for Human Rights Watch, John Swift, said; "Cooperation is going to be needed if this investigation is going to succeed."
ref: 人权观察的一位研究员约翰·斯威夫特说：“如果这项调查要成功，就需要合作。”

src: "They can decide to cooperate with this investigation and uphold European traditions of human rights, or they can continue their romance with the CIA."
ref: “他们可以决定配合这项调查，维护欧洲的人权传统，也可以继续与中央情报局的合作。”

src: The report has also been criticized for appearing to lack new content and to be incomplete.
ref: 该报告还因缺乏新内容和不完整而受到批评。

src: Former minister for Europe and British member of parliament Denis MacShane has said that Marty's report "has more holes than a Swiss cheese."
ref: 前欧洲事务大臣、英国国会议员丹尼斯·麦克沙恩曾表示，马蒂的报告“有比瑞士奶酪更多的漏洞”。

src: US State Department spokesman Sean McCormack has rejected the report and stated that it was an example of the "same old reports wrapped up in some new rhetoric."
ref: 美国国务院发言人肖恩·麦科马克否认了这份报告，并表示这是“用一些新的言辞包装的旧报告”的一个例子。

src: US Department of Homeland Security secretary Michael Chertoff has stated regarding the US government that "the government acts in accordance with the law and with respect to the sovereignty of host countries in which it operates," and further stated that "The authorities are free to investigate what they want to investigate but we should not allow ourselves to be distracted from the need to identify, prevent and protect against terrorist acts of violence."
ref: 美国国土安全部部长迈克尔·切尔托夫对美国政府表示，“政府依法行事，尊重其活动所在国的主权”，并进一步表示，“当局可以自由地调查他们想调查的事情，但我们不应该让自己分心于确定，防止和预防恐怖主义暴力行为“。

src: The group Amnesty International USA is calling for the US Congress to create a commission to investigate detention and interrogation practices.
ref: 美国国际特赦组织呼吁美国国会成立一个调查拘留和审讯行为的委员会。

src: The United States neither confirms nor denies the existence of secret detention centers.
ref: 美国既不确认也不否认存在秘密拘留中心。

src: The Co-operative Group (Co-op) and Bristol-based Somerfield today agreed on a deal worth £1.565 billion which results in Somerfield being acquired by Co-op.
ref: 合作集团（Co-op）和总部设在布里斯托尔的萨默菲尔德公司公司今天达成了一项价值15.65亿英镑的交易，结果萨默菲尔德公司被Co-op收购。

src: Co-op has said that the acquisition took place on a "cash-free debt-free basis."
ref: Co-op表示，收购是在“无现金、无债务的基础上进行的”。

src: Peter Marks, chief executive of The Co-operative Group, claimed that "this is good news for consumers and for competition in the grocery market, where we will create a stronger fifth player in food and a convenience store chain with unrivalled geographic reach."
ref: 合作集团首席执行官彼得·马克斯声称，“这对消费者和食品杂货市场的竞争都是好消息，我们将在食品领域创造一个更强大的第五大杂货连锁店，并打造一个地理覆盖范围无与伦比的便利店连锁店。”

src: He then said that "for The Co-operative Group this is a transformational deal – cementing our position as the UK’s premier community retailer and helping us significantly as we lead a renaissance of The Co-operative brand."
ref: 他接着表示：“对于合作集团来说，这是一项变革性的交易-巩固了我们作为英国首屈一指的社区零售商的地位，并在对我们的品牌复兴提供了很大帮助。”

src: Paul Mason, chair of privately-held Somerfield, also commented on the takeover.
ref: 私人持股萨默菲尔德董事长保罗·梅森也对此次收购发表了评论。

src: "The Co-operative Group and Somerfield have a similar focus in terms of customers, store types, product ranges and business vision."
ref: “合作集团和萨默菲尔德在客户、商店类型、产品范围和商业愿景方面有着相似的重点。”

src: "Our shared vision of providing a high-quality and affordable convenience offer to local communities means that together we will be twice as strong, and therefore twice as able to deliver the local grocery shops British customers demand," he said.
ref: 他说：“我们的共同愿景是为当地社区提供高质量和负担得起的便利，这意味着我们的实力将是原来的两倍，因此能够提供英国顾客所需的当地杂货店的能力也将提高一倍。”

src: With 4.4% share of the market, the Co-op is the fifth largest grocery chain in the UK.
ref: 合作集团拥有百分之4.4的市场份额，是英国第五大杂货连锁店。

src: The owners of Somerfield made their wish to sell the company clear in January of this year.
ref: 萨默菲尔德的所有者在今年1月明确表达了出售该公司的愿望。

src: Co-op first expressed an interest in the purchase in April.
ref: 合作集团第一次表示对购买感兴趣是在4月。

src: BBC News Online reported that the Competition Commission may force Co-op to sell some stores due to its increased presence.
ref: BBC新闻在线报道，竞争委员会可能会强迫合作集团出售一些商店，因为它的规模增大。

src: The president of Niger, Tandja Mamadou, has been captured and imprisoned by a group of Nigerien soldiers under the name of "Supreme Council for the Restoration of Democracy" after an attack on the presidential palace late Thursday.
ref: 一群名为“恢复民主最高委员会”的尼日利亚士兵在周四晚些时候袭击总统府后，尼日尔总统坦贾·马马杜被抓获并监禁。

src: The Nigerien embassy in London has issued a statement saying that both the president and ministers in his company were "safe and well," although officials said that the company was most likely imprisoned in military barracks outside of Niamy.
ref: 尼日尔驻伦敦大使馆发表了一份声明，称总统和部长们都“安然无恙”，尽管官员们表示，他们很可能被关押在尼亚米以外的军营里。

src: According to an announcement by the representative of the group responsible for the coup, a Nigerien Army colonel, the country's constitution has been suspended and all government institutions have been dissolved.
ref: 据负责政变的一名尼日尔陆军上校的代表宣布，该国宪法已经暂停，所有政府机构都已解散。

src: It is not clear who the leader of the coup is, although several military sources said that Major Adamou Harouna of the Nigerien Army was responsible.
ref: 目前尚不清楚政变的领导人是谁，但一些军方消息来源称，尼日尔军队的阿达穆·哈鲁纳少校是政变领导人。

src: The coup apparently took place during a cabinet meeting in the capitol building, and was preceded by a several-hour long gun battle in the capital, Niamy.
ref: 政变显然是在国会大厦的内阁会议期间发生的，在此之前，首都尼亚米发生了长达几个小时的枪战。

src: The battle began at about 13:00 local time (12:00 UTC), ending about four hours later, with both foot soldiers and tanks involved, although no significant deployment of the military was reported.
ref: 战斗在当地时间大约13：00（世界协调时12：00时）开始，大约四小时后结束，步兵和坦克都参与了战斗，尽管没有关于军队大规模部署的报道。

src: The morning after the battle, the streets were relatively quiet, and the only significant military presence is heavy artillery around the presidential palace.
ref: 战斗结束后的早晨，街道相对平静，唯一重要的军事存在是总统府周围的重型火炮。

src: The battle led to at least ten deaths, four of which were soldiers.
ref: 这场战斗导致至少十人死亡，其中四人是士兵。

src: Additionally, a curfew has been imposed, and the military has closed Niger's borders.
ref: 此外，实行了宵禁，军队关闭了尼日尔的边界。

src: Despite the crisis, the government has yet to release an official statement as to its status.
ref: 尽管发生了危机，但政府尚未就其地位发表正式声明。

src: The actions of the military prompted condemnations of the coup from both the African Union and the nation of France, both of which called for negotiations to resolve the situation.
ref: 军方的行动引发了非洲联盟和法国两国对政变的谴责，这两个国家都呼吁通过谈判解决局势。

src: The West African group of countries Ecowas has already dispatched a delegation to talk to the group responsible for the coup.
ref: 西非国家经济共同体已经派出一个代表团与政变的责任人进行会谈。

src: The coup came after an extended political crisis in which President Tandja has dissolved both the National Assembly and Niger's High Court, as well as extending his presidential term by three years, and removing all further limits on his term.
ref: 政变发生在一场持续的政治危机之后，坦贾总统解散了国民议会和尼日尔高等法院，并将其总统任期延长了三年，并取消了对其任期的所有进一步限制。

src: These actions have led to increasing pressure against him and the government, culminating with a thousands-strong demonstration against the government last week.
ref: 这些行动给他和政府带来了越来越大的压力，最终导致上周数千人举行反对政府的示威活动。

src: James Hipwell, a former financial reporter for the Daily Mirror tabloid, told the Leveson Inquiry today he believed hacking into voicemails of celebrities and others was a "bog-standard tool" for entertainment journalists at the Mirror.
ref: “每日镜报”前财经记者詹姆斯·希普韦尔今天告诉“莱韦森调查”他认为窃听名人和其他人的语音信箱是“镜报”娱乐记者的“标准工具”。

src: Hipwell was fired from the paper in 2000 and then convicted and sent to prison in February 2006 for using his "City Slicker" column in the newspaper to write about companies he had a financial stake in, which netted him approximately £40,000.
ref: 希普韦尔于2000年被该报解雇，随后于2006年2月被判有罪并被送进监狱，原因是他利用报纸上的“城市骗子”专栏报道了他拥有财务利益的公司，这使他净赚了大约40,000英镑。

src: Trinity Mirror newspapers, which publishes the Mirror, also publishes another tabloid The People which is also alleged to have used phone hacking to get stories.
ref: 出版“镜报”的“三一镜报”也出版了另一份小报“人民报”，该小报也被指控利用电话窃听来获取新闻。

src: Hipwell told the inquiry he believed that voicemail hacking was "genuinely accepted", "happened every day" and "was entirely accepted by the senior editors on the newspaper" and that "it was seen as a slightly underhand thing to do but not illegal."
ref: 希普韦尔在接受调查时表示，他认为语音信箱窃听是“真正被接受的”，“每天都在发生”，“完全被报纸的高级编辑接受”，“这被视为一种略显低调的行为，但不是非法的。”

src: Hipwell's testimony contradicts claims by the former editor of the Mirror, Piers Morgan, who now hosts a talk show on CNN.
ref: 希普韦尔的证词与“镜报”前编辑皮尔斯·摩根的说法相矛盾，他现在主持CNN的一个脱口秀节目。

src: Morgan claims that under his editorship, he was unaware of any hacking, but Hipwell claims it is unlikely Morgan did not know about hacking going on at the paper.
ref: 摩根声称，在他担任编辑期间，他不知道任何黑客行为，但希普韦尔声称，摩根不太可能不知道“华尔街日报”正在进行的黑客攻击。

src: The Leveson Inquiry was set up by the British Prime Minister David Cameron following the scandal which engulfed the News of the World after widespread allegations they hacked into voicemails of crime victims and their families including the murdered schoolgirl Milly Dowler, and has so far interviewed numerous representatives of the media industry, and alleged victims of press intrusion and phone hacking.
ref: 莱韦森调查是英国首相戴维·卡梅伦丑闻被“世界新闻报”发表后设立的，此前有广泛指控称，该报侵入了犯罪受害者及其家人的语音信箱，其中包括遇害的女学生米莉·多勒。到目前为止，该调查采访了许多媒体行业的代表，以及媒体入侵和电话窃听的受害者。

src: The United States and Russia yesterday agreed to the swap of prisoners held by both nations after eleven Russian spies were arrested late last month.
ref: 美国和俄罗斯昨天同意交换两国关押的囚犯，上个月晚些时候有11名俄罗斯间谍被捕。

src: The swap will include the ten Russian spies arrested on US soil (the eleventh was arrested in Cyprus and subsequently escaped) and four spies being held in Russia on charges of espionage.
ref: 交换的对象将包括在美国本土被捕的10名俄罗斯间谍（第11名在塞浦路斯被捕，随后逃跑）和4名因间谍罪被关押在俄罗斯的间谍。

src: The spies arrested by the US all pled guilty to charges of "conspiracy to act as an unregistered agent of a foreign country."
ref: 被美国逮捕的间谍都承认犯有“担任外国未经注册代理人的阴谋”的指控。

src: Below are the Russian spies who were convicted (cover names are in quotes, while real names are unquoted):*"Richard and Cynthia Murphy" *Vicky Paleaz *"Juan Lazaro" *Anna Chapman *Mikhail Zemenko *"Michael Zottoli" and "Patricia Mills" *"Donald Howard Heathfield" and "Tracy Lee Ann Foley"
ref: 以下是被定罪的俄罗斯间谍（封面名用引号引起来，实名不用引号）：*“Richard and Cynthia Murphy”*Vicky Paleaz*“Juan Lazaro”*Anna Chapman*Mikhail Zemenko*“Michael Zottoli”和“Patricia Mills”*“Donald Howard Heathfield”和“Tracy Lee Ann Foley”。

src: The swap reportedly began late yesterday, with Russia beginning the process of releasing at least one of the prisoners they held, Igor Sutyagin, almost immediately.
ref: 据报道，交换开始于昨天晚些时候，俄罗斯几乎立即开始释放他们关押的至少一名囚犯伊戈尔·苏蒂亚金。

src: Russian media reported that he had already arrived in Vienna, Austria, although his father said that it was so far unconfirmed.
ref: 据俄罗斯媒体报道，他已经抵达奥地利维也纳，尽管他的父亲说目前还没有得到证实。

src: Russia has so far not confirmed the identities of other prisoners to be released, although several names have been speculated, including Alexander Zaporozhsky, Sergei Skripal, and Alexander Sypachev, all accused of transferring information to foreign governments.
ref: 到目前为止，俄罗斯还没有确认其他将被释放的囚犯的身份，但据推测其他被释放了几个人的名字应该包括亚历山大·萨波罗日斯基、谢尔盖·斯克里帕尔和亚历山大·萨帕乔夫，他们都被指控向外国政府传递信息。

src: The US arrested the ten spies that are to be returned to Russia as part of its breakup of a long-term spy ring that had operated for years, and involved the spies living as American civilians, some as couples.
ref: 美国逮捕了将返回俄罗斯的10名间谍，这是美国瓦解一个已运作多年的长期间谍集团的一部分，其中包括以美国平民身份生活的间谍，其中一些人是夫妻。

src: Prosecutors say that they had been commanded by Russia's Foreign Intelligence Service, with the mission of collecting information about American policy.
ref: 检察官说，他们是由俄罗斯外交情报局指挥的，其任务是收集有关美国政策的信息。

src: Kabul Afghanistan saw the worst violence on Monday since the fall of the Taliban, after a large U.S. Military cargo truck crashed into about a dozen vehicles at an intersection in Kabul killing at least 7 civilians and injuring about 40.
ref: 阿富汗喀布尔在周一遭遇了自塔利班垮台后最严重暴力事件，此前一辆大型美国军用货运卡车在喀布尔一个十字路口撞毁了大约十几辆汽车，造成至少7名平民死亡，约40人受伤。

src: "There was a traffic jam and all the vehicles were stopped," said one witness, 21-year old shopkeeper Mohammad Wali.
ref: 21岁的店主穆罕默德·瓦利说：“交通堵塞，所有车辆都停了下来。”

src: "The American convoy hit all the vehicles which were on the way."
ref: “美国车队撞到了路上的所有车辆。”

src: A U.S. military spokesman, Lieutenant Colonel Paul Fitzpatrick, said no U.S. troops had been hurt, and that an investigation has begun into the incident.
ref: 美国军方发言人中校保罗·菲茨帕特里克说，没有美军受伤，对这一事件的调查已经开始。

src: The U.S. military also said the crash was caused by brake failure but Afghans often complain about aggressive driving tactics of the U.S. military.
ref: 美国军方还表示撞车事故是由刹车失灵引起的，但阿富汗人经常抱怨美军的侵略性驾驶策略。

src: Convoys often pass through crowded areas at high speed and occasionally disregard road rules.
ref: 护卫队经常高速穿过拥挤的区域，有时会无视交通规则。

src: U.S. military says such driving is necessary to protect the troops from attack.
ref: 美国军方称这种驾驶是必要的，以免部队受到攻击。

src: Afghan rioters also claimed U.S. troops had shot and killed civilians at the scene of the accident.
ref: 阿富汗暴乱分子还声称，美军在事故现场开枪打死了平民。

src: Chanting "Death to America," rioters stoned the U.S. convoy involved in the accident Monday before heading to the center of Kabul where they ransacked offices of international aid groups and searched for foreigners.
ref: 暴乱者高呼“美国去死吧”的口号，向周一事故中的美国车队投掷石块，然后前往喀布尔中心，他们在那里洗劫了国际援助组织的办公室，并搜查了外国人。

src: Smoke billowed from burning buildings along the path of destruction.
ref: 沿着毁灭的道路，燃烧的建筑物中冒出滚滚浓烟。

src: New South Wales Police have broadened investigations into Australia's oldest Catholic boarding school, St Stanislaus College in Bathurst, New South Wales, following claims that at least 13 men were sexually abused while children at the school in the 1970s and 1980s.
ref: 新南威尔士州警方扩大了对澳大利亚历史最悠久的天主教寄宿学校新南威尔士州巴瑟斯特的圣斯坦尼斯劳斯学院的调查，此前有人声称，在1970年代和1980年代，至少有13名男子在学校受到性虐待。

src: The claims have surfaced following police being alerted in August last year.
ref: 这些指控是在去年8月警方接到警报后浮出水面的。

src: Police have appealed for victims to come forward, but acknowledged it may be difficult for some.
ref: 警方呼吁受害者站出来，但承认这可能对一些人来说很困难。

src: "I would imagine it would be very hard for anyone subject to these sort of things to come forward," Detective Superintendent Michael Goodwin said.
ref: 侦探总监迈克尔·古德温说：“我想，任何受这类事情影响的人都很难站出来。”

src: "All I can say is that NSW police force will be providing every form of support we possibly can to make the process for them as trouble-free as possible."
ref: “我所能说的是，新南威尔士州的警察部队将提供我们所能提供的一切形式的支持，使他们的程序尽可能没有麻烦。”

src: Superintendent Goodwin reassured the community that the allegations date back two decades and there is "absolutely no suggestion whatsoever that the college involved is/has been looking to anything in the current day."
ref: 总监古德温向社区保证，这些指控可以追溯到二十年前，“指控和调查绝对不只是针对现在。”

src: "The college involved has been cooperating with the police completely with this inquiry," Goodwin added.
ref: 古德温补充说：“在这项调查中，该学院一直与警方完全合作。”

src: The police would not release how many suspects were being investigated but said their inquiries had not led them to any other locations where former staff may have been employed.
ref: 警方不愿透露有多少嫌疑人正在接受调查，但表示他们的调查没有将他们带到任何其他可能雇用了前工作人员的地点。

src: Superintendent Goodwin said Police were exploring all lines of enquiry and that "no loose ends [are] being let go at this stage."
ref: 警司古德温说，警方正在调查所有的调查路线，“在这一阶段不会放过任何零散的事情。”

src: The school's principal, John Edwards, said the police had served him with a search warrant last month which listed the names of three former staff members.
ref: 这所学校的校长约翰·爱德华兹说，警方上个月向他发出了搜查令，上面列出了三名前工作人员的名字。

src: "There were three former staff member who were listed on the search warrant that was served on me in early July, and we facilitated the gathering of material for police," Mr Edwards told Fairfax Radio Network.
ref: 爱德华兹告诉费尔法克斯广播网：“在七月初发给我的搜查证上，有三名前工作人员被列入名单，我们为警方收集材料提供了便利。”

src: Mr Edwards called for the matter to be transparent and described the complaints as "gravely concerning" and he hopes they are properly dealt with by the courts.
ref: 爱德华兹呼吁此事要透明，并将这些投诉描述为“严重关切”，他希望法院能妥善处理这些投诉。

src: "It is absolutely a requirement for this matter to be open, for this matter to be addressed and this matter to be resolved," he said.
ref: 他说：“这绝对是公开这件事的要求，这件事必须得到处理，这件事才能得到解决。”

src: "This school is very concerned to ensure that children are treated well and that their interests are protected."
ref: “这所学校非常关心确保儿童受到良好的待遇和他们的利益得到保护。”

src: A former priest, Brian Joseph Spillane, aged 65 was arrested over the case in May.
ref: 前牧师布莱恩·约瑟夫·斯皮兰今年65岁，今年5月因此案被捕。

src: He faced Bathurst Local Court in July, facing 33 separate charges including six counts of sexual intercourse with pupils aged 10 and 18.
ref: 他在7月份被巴瑟斯特地方法院起诉，面临33项不同的指控，其中包括6项与10岁和18岁学生发生性关系的指控。

src: Spillane's lawyer, Greg Walsh, says media reports alerted him to the new claims.
ref: 莱恩·约瑟夫的律师格雷格·沃尔什说，媒体报道提醒他注意这些新的说法。

src: "I don't know anything about eight alleged other victims, I've not been served with any witness statements so I really can't comment about it," said Walsh.
ref: 沃尔什说：“我不知道关于其他八名受害者的任何事情，我没有收到任何证人的证词，所以我真的不能对此发表评论。”

src: One former student described the alleged abuse as "an orgy", claiming that boys were herded into a prayer room by a priest chanting "hypnotic" spells in tongues.
ref: 一名前学生将所称的虐待描述为“狂欢”，声称一名牧师用舌头喊着“催眠”咒语，把男孩们带进了一个祈祷室。

src: It is alleged that boys were subject to sexual abuse or forced to assault each other once in the prayer room.
ref: 据称，男孩曾在祈祷室里遭到性虐待或被强迫互相攻击。

src: A former border told The Daily Telegraph that priests "got a group between eight and 12 of us together and they'd just start chanting and I would wake up during these sessions and see what was going on."
ref: 一位前边境人士告诉“每日电讯报”，牧师“召集了一群8到12个人在一起，他们就会开始吟诵圣歌，我会从中醒来，看看发生了什么事。”

src: The allegations came to light after one of the alleged victims made a visit to Bathurst last year to hand out fliers documenting the abuse and providing a link to his website address.
ref: 去年，一名据称的受害者访问了巴瑟斯特，散发了记录虐待行为的传单，并提供了指向他的网站地址的链接，之后，这些指控才浮出水面。

src: The school called in police, who the victim claims contacted him and asked him to make a complaint.
ref: 学校报了警，受害人声称警察与他联系并要求他提出申诉。

src: The game does not affect Group D as both Germany and the Czech Republic have already qualified for next summer's tournament.
ref: 这场比赛不会影响D组，因为德国队和捷克队都已经获得了明年夏天的参赛资格。

src: The victory for Germany keeps them tied in first position in Group D.
ref: 德国队的胜利使他们保住了D组第一的位置。

src: Germany finishes off its Euro 2008 qualification games against Wales on Wednesday.
ref: 周三德国对阵威尔士，从而结束了2008年欧洲杯资格赛。

src: A new study by Duke University in the US suggests depressed adolescents who respond to treatment within twelve weeks are at a reduced risk of drug abuse later in their lives.
ref: 美国杜克大学的一项新研究表明，在12周内对治疗有反应的抑郁青少年在以后的生活中滥用药物的风险会降低。

src: The research followed about half of a pool of 439 adolescents who had received treatment for major depression and volunteered for Duke University research.
ref: 这项研究跟踪了439名青少年中的一半，他们接受了严重抑郁症的治疗，并自愿参加了杜克大学的研究。

src: At the five-year study's conclusion the participants were aged 17–23.
ref: 这项为期五年的研究得出结论时，参与者年龄在17-23岁之间。

src: Of those who had experienced a reduction in depressive symptoms within twelve weeks of treatment, ten percent went on to have drug abuse problems.
ref: 在那些在治疗后12周内抑郁症状减轻的人中，百分之10的人继续有药物滥用问题。

src: Alcohol use problems, however, were equally prevalent regardless of treatment outcome.
ref: 然而，不管治疗结果如何，酒精使用问题同样普遍。

src: The study was run by Dr. John Curry, a professor of neuroscience and psychology.
ref: 这项研究由神经科学和心理学教授约翰·库里博士负责。

src: Curry noted that the results for those treated successfully held true "whatever they responded to — cognitive-behavioral therapy, Prozac, both treatments, or a placebo".
ref: 约翰·库里指出，对于那些成功治疗的人来说，结果是正确的，“无论是对认知行为疗法、百忧解，这两种治疗方法，还是安慰剂，他们做出了什么样的反应”。

src: The study has called for treatments to take possible alcohol and drug use into account.
ref: 这项研究呼吁治疗方法要考虑到可能的酒精和药物使用。

src: Said Curry, "When the teenagers got over the depression, about half of them stayed well for the whole five-year period, but almost half of them had a second episode of depression... what we found out was that, for those who had both alcohol disorder and another depression, the alcohol disorder almost always came first".
ref: 库里说：“当这些青少年从抑郁症中恢复过来时，大约有一半的青少年在整个五年的时间里都很好，但几乎有一半的青少年患有第二次抑郁症……我们发现，对于那些既有酒精障碍又有另一种抑郁的人来说，酒精障碍几乎总是第一位的。”

src: He also said the study had "a take-home message" in "that alcohol use disorders are very prevalent during that particular age period and there’s a need for a lot of prevention and education for college students to avoid getting into heavy drinking and then the beginnings of an alcohol disorder".
ref: 他还表示，这项研究“传达了一个关键信息”，即“酒精使用障碍在特定年龄段非常普遍，有必要对大学生进行大量预防和教育，以避免酗酒，然后开始出现酒精障碍”。

src: Curry, alongside Dr. Susan Silva, a co-author, want more research using larger groups.
ref: 库里和合著者苏珊·席尔瓦博士希望利用更多的研究对象组进行更多的研究。

src: They also say work towards a comparison with non-depressed individuals is needed.
ref: 他们还说，这项工作还需要和非抑郁的人进行比较。

src: Safia Ahmed-jan, the director of the Afghan Ministry of Women's Affairs for the Khandahar province and an advocate of women's rights and a strong critic of the Taliban's repression of those rights, was shot dead by unidentified gunmen outside her home in Khandahar city in southern Afghanistan on Monday.
ref: 阿富汗坎达哈尔省妇女事务部主任、倡导妇女权利的萨菲亚·艾哈迈德·扬周一在阿富汗南部坎大哈市的家中被身份不明的枪手枪杀。艾哈迈德-扬强烈批评塔利班对妇女权利的压制。

src: Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva, the president of Brazil, said on Wednesday that not continuing to use biofuels would be a "crime against humanity."
ref: 巴西总统路易斯·伊纳西奥·卢拉·达席尔瓦周三表示，不继续使用生物燃料将是“反人类罪”。

src: "Don't tell me, for the love of God, that food is expensive because of biodiesel," said Lula, when talking to reporters.
ref: “看在上帝的份上，不要告诉我，因为生物柴油食物变得昂贵，”卢拉在接受记者采访时说。

src: Lula also stated that he was ready for a debate on biofuels.
ref: 卢拉还表示，他已准备好就生物燃料问题进行辩论。

src: "I and my government are ready to travel around the world," he said.
ref: 他说：“我和我的政府准备环游世界。”

src: This move comes soon after a press release was made available by the European Parliament saying that "in the last year scientific evidence, though disputed, has indicated that biofuels may not be as good for the environment as was once thought."
ref: 在此之前不久，欧洲议会发布了一份新闻稿，称“过去一年，尽管有争议，科学证据表明，生物燃料可能不像人们曾经认为的那样对环境有益。”

src: A Washington, D.C. student of Georgetown University has been arrested on suspicion of a hate crime, in which he allegedly beat up another man because the victim was gay.
ref: 华盛顿特区乔治敦大学的一名学生因涉嫌仇恨犯罪被捕，据称他殴打另一名男子，因为受害者是同性恋。

src: News reports confirm that the victim - who also goes to the same school - recognized the alleged assailant, because of his profile and photos on Facebook.
ref: 新闻报道证实，受害者-也在同一所学校上学-因为据称的袭击者在Facebook上的个人资料和照片而被认出。

src: Washington DC Metropolitan Police Chief Cathy Lanier announced yesterday that Philip Cooney had been arrested after a warrant was issued for the September 9 attack, which occurred in the 1400 block of 36th Street NW (Between O and P Streets, NW).
ref: 华盛顿特区警察局长凯西·拉尼尔昨日宣布，菲利普·库尼已因9月9日的袭击发出逮捕令而被捕。袭击发生在36街西北部（O街和P街之间，西北部）的1400街区。

src: The victim was allegedly attacked by a group of males yelling homophobic slurs.
ref: 据称，受害者遭到一群男子的攻击，这些男子高喊仇视同性恋的污言秽语。

src: "He made it a point to etch the suspect's face in his mind and remember him," Police Lt. Alberto Jova said.
ref: 警察中尉阿尔贝托·乔瓦说：“他在脑海中留下了嫌疑人的脸，并记住了他。”

src: "Because of that he was able to give a very positive identification."
ref: “正因为如此，他才能给出一个非常积极的身份证明。”

src: The victim in this case suffered a broken thumb and cuts and bruises to his face.
ref: 在这起案件中，受害者的拇指骨折，脸上有割伤和瘀伤。

src: The victim suspected his attacker was also a student at Georgetown, and did extensive examination of information available on Facebook, a popular web site used by students to socialize online.
ref: 受害者怀疑袭击者也是乔治敦大学的一名学生，并对Facebook上的信息进行了广泛的检查，Facebook是一个学生用来在线社交的热门网站。

src: Cooney could not be reached for comment, and will be arraigned in D.C.
ref: 记者无法联系到库尼请其置评，他将在华盛顿接受传讯。

src: A friend of the alleged assailant was shocked at the allegations and said he is "one of the nicest and most gentle people that we know at this school."
ref: 被指控的袭击者的一位朋友对这些指控感到震惊，并说他是“我们在这所学校认识的最善良、最温和的人之一”。

src: The attack is considered unrelated to two other hate crimes which occurred this month in the Northwest quadrant of the city.
ref: 这起袭击被认为与本月发生在该市西北地区的另外两起仇恨犯罪无关。

src: The UN has certified that the Delhi Metro has aided in the reduction of greenhouse gases, earning 'carbon credits'.
ref: 联合国已经证明德里地铁帮助减少了温室气体，获得了“碳信用”。

src: This makes the Delhi Metro the first of its kind in the world to do so.
ref: 这使得德里地铁成为世界上第一个这样做的单位。

src: This comes under the Clean Development Mechanism (CDM) of the UN under the Kyoto Protocol.
ref: 这属于“京都议定书”规定的联合国清洁发展机制（CDM）的范畴。

src: The UN said the rail based system has helped to save 630,000 tonnes of pollution a year.
ref: 联合国说，铁路系统每年帮助减少63万吨的污染。

src: The credits to the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) are worth $9.5 million for each of the next seven years.
ref: 在接下来的七年里，德里地铁公司（DMRC）每年的贷款额为950万美元。

src: More credits would be given for more passengers on the system.
ref: 更多的这种信贷将被发放以让更多乘客受益。

src: The credits are designed as a financial incentive for developing countries to reduce greenhouse emissions.
ref: 这些信贷旨在为发展中国家减少温室气体排放提供财政奖励。

src: According to the DMRC, it has reduced road traffic by more than 91,000 vehicles per day.
ref: 根据DMRC的数据，它每天减少了91,000多辆道路交通。

src: Erosion in Nigeria has lead to increasing concern on climate policy for the entire country.
ref: 尼日利亚的水土流失已导致对整个国家气候政策的日益关注。

src: Areas in Nigeria have been subject to damages caused by increasing erosion for over 50 years.
ref: 50多年来，尼日利亚的一些地区一直受到日益严重的侵蚀所造成的损害。

src: This issue has grown over the past years, and responsibility has been pointed at a lack of national policy.
ref: 这一问题在过去几年中日益严重，责任在于缺乏国家政策。

src: However, locals recognize that they too contribute to the problem.
ref: 然而，当地人认识到他们也是造成这一问题的原因。

src: "Some of the problem of erosion is created by our people, by our attitude to waste disposal."
ref: “部分侵蚀问题是由我们的人民造成的，是我们对废物处理的态度造成的。”

src: "When we dump garbage in the drains that are built by the government we simply aggravate the problem of erosion," said state environmental commissioner Michael Egbebike.
ref: “当我们把垃圾倾倒在政府修建的排水沟里时，我们只会加剧侵蚀问题，”州环境专员迈克尔·埃格比克说。

src: "And this waste combined with the force of the flood and trying to erode the soil and sometimes they actually block the channel that has been created for flood dispersion and the floods come back and actually destroy their homes, and at that point they call on government," he added.
ref: 他补充说：“这些废物与洪水的力量结合在一起，试图侵蚀土壤，有时他们真的堵塞了为洪水扩散而创建的渠道，洪水又回来了，实际上摧毁了他们的家园，在这一点上，他们呼吁政府。”

src: Geological studies of the area affected most by erosion, Anambra, have concluded that the cost of implementing a project which could effectively slow erosion are estimated at US$2 billion.
ref: 对受侵蚀影响最大的地区阿纳姆布拉进行的地质研究得出的结论是，实施一个能够有效减缓侵蚀的项目的费用估计为20亿美元。

src: Officials are looking for answers and help in funding a project at the Copenhagen environmental conference in December.
ref: 官员们正在寻求答案和帮助，为12月份哥本哈根环境会议上的一个项目提供资金。

src: "The state is struggling because the monies spent on this erosion problem are huge sums of money."
ref: “国家正在挣扎，因为花在这个侵蚀问题上的钱是一大笔钱。”

src: "So we will of course need a lot of help from the international community and the federal government."
ref: “因此，我们当然需要国际社会和联邦政府的大量帮助。”

src: "Alone it would be a Herculean task for Anambra state," commented Egbebike.
ref: “单是这对阿南布拉州来说这就将是一项艰巨的任务，”埃格比克评论说。

src: Benjamin Mullany, the British man who was shot along with his wife while on holiday in Antigua has died.
ref: 在安提瓜度假时和妻子一起被枪杀的英国男子本杰明·穆拉尼去世。

src: He and his wife, Catherine had been on the last day of their honeymoon when both were shot during what seems to be a botched robbery on July 29.
ref: 他和他的妻子凯瑟琳在蜜月的最后一天，即7月29日在一场似乎是拙劣的抢劫中被枪杀。

src: Doctors were unaware if he knew that his wife did not survive the attack.
ref: 医生不知道他是否知道他的妻子在这次袭击中没能幸免于难。

src: Ben was flown back to Britain on August 2 after a 22 hour operation to try and save his life.
ref: 本在经历了22个小时的手术后，于8月2日被空运回英国以试图挽救他的生命。

src: He died at Morriston Hospital, in Swansea, Wales where he remained unresponsive.
ref: 他死于威尔士斯旺西的莫里斯顿医院，在那里他仍然没有反应。

src: The couple married on July 12 and later flew out to the holiday island.
ref: 这对夫妇于7月12日结婚，随后飞往度假岛。

src: With the death of both Catherine and Ben the murder figures for Antigua have been placed into double figures.
ref: 随着凯瑟琳和本的死亡，安提瓜的谋杀数字已经变成了两位数。

src: Prime minister Baldwin Spencer has asked for Britain's help during the investigation.
ref: 首相鲍德温·斯宾塞在调查中请求英国的帮助。

src: Germany's minister of defence, Franz-Josef Jung (CDU), has proposed to shoot down planes hijacked by terrorists.
ref: 德国国防部长弗朗茨·约瑟夫·荣恩（CDU）建议击落被恐怖分子劫持的飞机。

src: Although the Federal Constitutional Court of Germany decided in February 2006 that shooting down a hijacked plane would only be lawful if there were no innocent passengers on the plane, Jung announced in public that he would give the order to attack if the basic principles of the constitution were in danger or if the plane posed a tremendous threat to the people.
ref: 尽管2006年2月德国联邦宪法法院判决击落被劫持的飞机仅在机上没有无辜乘客的情况下才是合法的，荣恩仍然当众宣布如果宪法的基本原则受到威胁或者飞机对人民群众造成巨大威胁，他会下令进攻。

src: Representatives of the grand coalition differed in their views regarding this question.
ref: 大联合政府的代表对此问题持不同观点。

src: A member of the Social Democrat Party disagreed with Jung and advised him against contradicting the court's judgment.
ref: 社会民主党的某成员不同意荣恩的做法，告诫他不要违背法院的判决。

src: The opposition in parliament even called Jung an "enemy of the constitution" and called for him to resign.
ref: 议会的反对派甚至称荣恩为“宪法的敌人”，并要求他辞职。

src: Jung was supported by members of his own party which underlined the necessity of shooting down a hijacked plane in order to save thousands of lives.
ref: 荣恩自己政党的成员对他予以支持，他们强调了为了拯救数千人的生命而击落一架被劫持的飞机的必要性。

src: The dispute between the two coalition partners concerning new laws to ensure the security of Germany remains unresolved.
ref: 两方联盟合作伙伴之间关于保证德国安全的新法律的争议仍然没有解决。

src: The pilots of the German airforce have made it clear that they won't bring down a hijacked plane due to fundamental legal and moral doubts.
ref: 德国空军的飞行员已经明确表示由于对基本法律和道德的疑虑，他们不会击落被劫持的飞机。

src: In the United States and other European countries such as France, Great Britain or the Czech Republic laws were passed which give the government permission to shoot down a passenger plane under the control of terrorists.
ref: 在美国和法国、英国或者捷克等其他欧洲国家已经通过了允许政府击落被恐怖分子控制的客机的法律。

src: Belgian authorities have confirmed that at least eighteen people died in a head-on collision between two passenger trains in the suburbs of Brussels.
ref: 比利时官方确认在布鲁塞尔郊区发生的两辆客运列车迎面相撞的事故中至少有18人遇难。

src: Other reports suggest that the death toll could be as high as 25.
ref: 其他报道显示死亡人数可能多达25人。

src: More than 125 passengers are reported injured, 11 of them "very seriously".
ref: 据报道，超过125人受伤，其中11人伤势“非常严重”。

src: Rescuers were still trying to free bodies from the wreckage of the trains more than eight hours after the crash, which occurred in snowy conditions at 08:28 local time (0728 UTC) near the station of Buizingen in the municipality of Halle, about 15 kilometres southwest of the Belgian capital.
ref: 撞车事故发生8个多小时之后，营救人员仍在尽力从火车的残骸中救人，此次事故于当地时间08：28（UTC时间07：28）发生在哈勒市区内的布宜津根车站附近，距比利时首都西南部大约15公里左右。

src: The collision saw the first two carriages of one train being forced upwards into the air over the first carriage of the second train.
ref: 撞车事故发生时，其中一辆列车的前两节车厢冲向空中落在了第二辆列车的第一节车厢上。

src: Eyewitnesses described the collision as "brutal", with passengers being thrown "violently" around the carriages.
ref: 据目击者描述撞车非常“惨烈”，乘客被“猛烈地”甩到车厢周围。

src: Television footage showed the two smashed locomotives forced up in the air, with passenger cars strewn over a wide area and dazed survivors wandering at the crash site.
ref: 电视画面显示两辆被撞毁的火车头冲向空中，乘客车厢大面积散落在周围区域，意识不清醒的幸存者在撞车地点徘徊。

src: Train speed at the time of the crash was not immediately known.
ref: 撞车时列车的速度无法立刻获悉。

src: There are reports that one of the trains ran a stop signal.
ref: 有报道称其中一辆列车启动了停车信号。

src: Initial reports suggest that the Leuven–Braine-le-Comte train was on the wrong line.
ref: 初步报告显示，勒芬-布赖恩勒孔特的列车驶错了轨道。

src: It is not known if the train went through a red signal or if there was a problem with the signalling.
ref: 目前还不清楚当时列车是否是在红色信号灯下运行，或者信号是否出现问题。

src: A "well informed source" quoted by French-language daily Le Soir suggested that there might have been an electrical failure in the signalling system.
ref: 法语晚报引述一位“消息灵通人士”的话，信号系统可能出现了电气故障。

src: The collision occurred on one of the main access lines to Brussels-South station, about 14 kilometres (9 miles) from the Belgian capital.
ref: 事故发生在通往布鲁塞尔车站的主轨道线路上，距离比利时首都大约14公里（9英里）。

src: It caused "major damage" to overhead power cables, especially on the Brussels–Mons and Brussels–Tournai lines, and high speed rail services between Brussels and France and the UK have been suspended.
ref: 事故对架空电缆，特别是布鲁塞尔-蒙斯和布鲁塞尔-图尔奈线路上的电缆造成了“重大损坏”，布鲁塞尔与法国和英国之间的高速铁路暂停运行。

src: Thalys services were temporarily halted due to the accident, with four of its trains in the region being diverted to alternative stations.
ref: 高速列车由于此次事故临时停运，其在此地区的4趟列车转行至其他车站。

src: Thalys services between Brussels and Cologne have now resumed, but services to Amsterdam and Paris are still suspended.
ref: 目前布鲁塞尔和科隆间的高速列车已经恢复运行，但是阿姆斯特丹和巴黎之间的高速列车仍处于停运状态。

src: One passenger on board, Christian Wampach, described conditions on board the train, "It was a nightmare."
ref: 列车上的一位乘客克里斯蒂安·汪帕奇描述车上的状况时说，“那简直是一场恶梦。”

src: "There were a number of people injured in my car but I think all the dead were in the first car."
ref: “我所在的车厢有几个人受伤，但是我想所有遇难者都应该在第一节车厢里。”

src: Another passenger, Patricia Lallemand, said, "When we came out we saw dead bodies lying next to the tracks, some mutilated."
ref: 另外一位乘客帕特丽夏·拉勒曼德说：“我们出来的时候，看到轨道的附近躺着一些死尸，有些已经支离破碎。”

src: The famous Greek lawyers, Sakis Kechagioglou and George Nikolakopoulos have been imprisoned in the Athens' jail of Korydallus, as they were found guilty of graft and corruption.
ref: 著名的希腊律师萨基斯・柯察吉奥格罗和乔治・尼克拉可科泊罗斯因贪污受贿被定罪，关押在雅典的科里达鲁斯监狱。

src: As a result of this, a big scandal within the Greek legal community has been raised through the exposure of illegal actions that judges, lawyers, solicitors and attorneys have done during the previous years.
ref: 此事发生后，通过曝光法官、律师、检察官在过去几年中的非法行为而引出了希腊法律界的一个大丑闻。

src: A few weeks ago, after the information published by the journalist Makis Triantafylopoulos in his popular Television show "Zoungla" in Alpha TV, the member of Parliament and lawyer, Petros Mantouvalos was abdicated as members of his office had been involved in illegal graft and corruption.
ref: 几周之前，记者玛吉斯・特李安塔费罗泊罗斯在希腊电视台流行电视节目“Zoungla”发布消息之后，议会成员及律师佩托罗斯・曼陀瓦罗斯被迫辞职，因为他的部门牵涉到非法贪污受贿。

src: Moreover, top judge Evangelos Kalousis is imprisoned as he found guilty of corruption and degenerate behaviour.
ref: 此外，最高法官伊万格罗斯・卡洛西斯因受贿和堕落行为被判罪入狱。

src: Except from journalists' research about scandals in the legal Community of Greece, accusations from well-known lawyers and attorneys such as the famous Athens' lawyer Alexis Kougias, against colleagues have as a result a greater dialogue and discussion in the country upon this important issue.
ref: 除了记者关于希腊法律界丑闻的调查以外，来自像雅典律师阿列克西斯・库吉阿斯这样的著名律师对同僚的指控引起了希腊国内对此重要事件更多的对话和讨论。

src: The plane reportedly skidded off the wet runway, crossed a busy thoroughfare before careening into a fuel depot and warehouse ultimately bursting into flames.
ref: 据报道，飞机滑行时脱离了湿滑的跑道，穿过一条繁忙的主干道，然后倾斜着撞进一个燃料库和仓库，最后突然起火。

src: "The plane accelerated when it reached the end of the runway and tried to take off again to avoid the road, but it crashed into the building and exploded," Junior Matos told AFP.
ref: 朱尼尔·马托斯接受法新社采访时说：“这架飞机在到达跑道尽头的时候突然加速，试图重新起飞以避开主路，但是它撞进了大楼然后爆炸。”

src: Authorities believe that all 180 people onboard the plane have died, and a further 15 people on the ground are feared dead as well.
ref: 警方相信飞机上全部180个人全部遇难，另外地面上还有15个人被吓死。

src: Low clouds and heavy rain were reported at the time of the crash.
ref: 据报道，爆炸发生时出现了低云，而且下起了暴雨。

src: Additionally, the runway has had a history of problems with standing water.
ref: 此外，那条跑道以前出现过积水问题。

src: Neither of these factors have been linked to the cause of the crash at this point.
ref: 这两个因素都与此次事件的原因无关。

src: Rodrigo Pinho, state attorney, said the authorities will thoroughly investigate "to determine the cause and to identify who was responsible".
ref: 州检察官罗德里戈·皮尼奥称警方会彻底调查此案“确定事故原因并找出对此事负责的人”。

src: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has stated that the cholera outbreak that has struck the African country of Zimbabwe seems to have passed its peak.
ref: 世界卫生组织（WHO）表示，袭击非洲国家津巴布韦的霍乱疫情似乎已经过了高峰期。

src: The WHO said that "while data collection and verification remain a challenge throughout the country with the effect that weekly statistics are not always accurate or complete, the overall trend over the last 2 months is of a decreasing number of cases and deaths."
ref: 世卫组织表示，“尽管全国各地的数据收集和核实仍然面临挑战，每周的统计数据并不总是准确或完整的，但过去两个月的总体趋势是病例和死亡人数下降。”

src: "The overall trend over the last two months is of a decreasing number of cases and deaths," the WHO said.
ref: 世界卫生组织说：“过去两个月的总体趋势是病例和死亡人数减少。”

src: The number of new cholera cases in the week ending March 14 was 2,076, almost half of the 3,812 infections reported the week before, and 8,000 per week in the beginning of February.
ref: 截至3月14日的一周内，新增霍乱病例为2,076例，几乎占前一周报告的3,812例感染病例的一半，2月初每周新增8,000例。

src: The WHO stated that the fatality rate per week dropped from a peak of 6% in January to 2.3% this month.
ref: 世卫组织称，每周的死亡率从1月份的峰值百分之6降至本月的百分之2.3。

src: 91,164 total cases were reported as of March 17 since the epidemic started in August of last year, with a total of 4,307 deaths.
ref: 自去年8月疫情爆发以来，截至3月17日共报告91,164例病例，死亡4,307人。

src: The cholera epidemic is the deadliest in Africa for a decade and a half.
ref: 霍乱是15年来非洲最致命的疾病。

src: US Attorney General Alberto Gonzales, after several months of controversy, today announced his resignation after 13 years of public service.
ref: 经过几个月的争议，美国司法部长阿尔贝托·冈萨雷斯今天宣布辞去13年的公职。

src: While he did not elaborate on the circumstances of his departure, he referred to his tenure as a "remarkable journey" and said he had "lived the American dream."
ref: 虽然他没有详细说明离职的具体情况，但他将自己的任期称为“非凡的旅程”，并表示自己“实现了美国梦”。

src: Critics of the embattled Attorney General have called for his ousting for several months, largely over his conflicts with the US Congress over the Bush Administration's warrant-less wiretapping program, and his firing of nine US attorneys.
ref: 几个月来，这位身陷困境的司法部长的批评者一直呼吁他下台，主要原因是他与美国国会在布什政府未经授权的窃听项目上发生冲突，以及他解雇了9名美国律师。

src: Observers have expressed surprise at the sudden announcement, as Gonzales had said as recently as the weekend of the 18th of August that he had planned to stay through the end of President Bush's second term.
ref: 观察人士对这一突然宣布表示惊讶，因为冈萨雷斯在8月18日周末说，他计划在布什总统第二任期结束后继续留任。

src: Critics of the Attorney General, most notably Harry Reid, majority leader for the US Senate, have welcomed the announcement, as Gonzales had been one of the most controversial members of the Bush Administration.
ref: 司法部长的批评者，尤其是美国参议院多数党领袖哈里·里德，对这一声明表示欢迎，因为冈萨雷斯是布什政府最具争议的成员之一。

src: President Bush spoke on his "close friend's" resignation saying that he has reluctantly accepted the resignation, but noted that Gonzales' name had been "dragged through the mud for political reasons."
ref: 布什总统在谈到他“亲密朋友”的辞职时说，他不情愿地接受了他的辞职，但是他指出，冈萨雷斯的名字“由于政治原因而被拖下水”。

src: Throughout the recent controversy Bush has stood next to Gonzales.
ref: 在最近的争论中，布什站在冈萨雷斯旁边。

src: Paul Clement, the current Solicitor General, will serve as the acting Attorney General until a replacement has been confirmed by the Senate.
ref: 现任总检察长保罗·克莱门特将担任代理总检察长，直到参议院确认接替人选。

src: The Peel P50, a single door, three wheel microcar went on display at New York's Ripley's Believe It or Not! Museum on Monday.
ref: 这辆名为Peel P50的单门三轮微型汽车于本周一在纽约的雷普利信不信由你！博物馆展出。

src: The Peel Engineering Company manufactured 50 to 100 of the one-seater vehicles which weighed 130 lb (59 kg), and are 52.8 in (134 cm) in length, 47 in (120 cm) in height and 39 in (99 cm) in width.
ref: 皮尔工程公司制造了50到100辆单座汽车，重130磅（59千克），长52.8英寸（134厘米），高47英寸（120厘米），宽39英寸（99厘米）。

src: The little car can travel as fast as 38 mph (61 kph), and comes equipped with a handle on the car so the driver can pull the car to back up.
ref: 这辆小车的速度可以达到每小时38英里（每小时61公里），并且配备了一个把手，这样司机就可以把车拉回来。

src: Only twenty of the vehicles have survived since 1963, and the original price of £199 has soared to approximately £40,000 (US$ 65,000) today.
ref: 自1963年以来，只有20辆车保存下来，而199英镑的原价今天已飙升至约40,000英镑（65,000美元）。

src: Prince Laurent of Belgium, the youngest son of King Albert II of Belgium, has been questioned last night by the federal police and is attending today's court session in Hasselt in a marine fraud case that has gripped Belgian media since last December.
ref: 比利时国王阿尔伯特二世最小的儿子，比利时的劳伦特王子，昨晚受到联邦警察的审问，并出席了今天在哈塞尔举行的法庭开庭，自去年12月以来，这起海上欺诈案一直是比利时媒体关注的焦点。

src: He arrived in a Smart car and was accompanied by his lawyer and former politician Fred Erdman.
ref: 他坐着一辆智能车到达，由他的律师和前政治家弗雷德·埃尔德曼陪同。

src: The case turns around funds of the Belgian Navy that have been used to beautify the Prince's villa in Tervuren.
ref: 此案中，海军的资金被挪用于装修王子的别墅。

src: In total, € 2.2 million was supposedly diverted from the marine's purchasing services using false invoices.
ref: 据推测，总共有220万欧元从海军陆战队的采购服务中挪用，使用的是虚假发票。

src: Roughly € 185 000 was allegedly used to paint the Prince's villa, install lights in the garden, for the purchase of carpet and furniture, and for his secretariat and for animal clinics the Prince supports via his Foundation.
ref: 据称，大约18.5万欧元被用于为王子的别墅刷漆、在花园里安装电灯、购买地毯和家具，以及王子通过基金会资助的秘书处和动物诊所。

src: Twelve marine officers and contractors are being accused of document fraud, collusion, bribery, embezzlement of government money etc. and could face 10 years in prison.
ref: 12名海军军官和承包商被控文件欺诈、共谋、贿赂、挪用公款等罪名，可能面临10年监禁。

src: The money was part of the budget that wasn't spent at the end of the year, and which would flow back to the government if the army didn't spend it.
ref: 这笔钱是预算的一部分，没有在年底使用，如果军队不使用这笔钱，这笔钱由政府收回。

src: The Prince, who is also an officer in the navy, is being treated only as a witness in this case, there have been no charges against him.
ref: 王子也是一名海军军官，目前只被当作这起案件的证人，他没有受到任何指控。

src: The Attorney General in Hasselt Marc Rubens has said that there are no elements in the investigation that point to the fact that Laurent was aware of the affair, however several accused have contested this in the press.
ref: 哈塞尔·马克·鲁本斯的司法部长说，调查中没有任何因素表明劳伦特知道这件事，但有几名被告在媒体上对此提出异议。

src: Technically, the villa is not the property of the Prince himself, but of the Royal Gift, which manages the real property of the Royal Family.
ref: 从技术上讲，别墅不是王子本人的财产，而是皇家礼物的财产，他管理着皇室的不动产。

src: During his interview by the police last night, Prince Laurent stated that he needed funds to renovate his villa, and that Noël Vaessen, his adviser, told him the Navy could help him.
ref: 昨晚在接受警方采访时，劳伦特王子表示，他需要资金来翻修他的别墅，他的顾问诺尔·瓦森告诉他，海军可以帮助他。

src: The Prince stated that he thought it was legal, and that he had no reason to doubt his adviser.
ref: 王子说他认为这是合法的，他没有理由怀疑他的顾问。

src: Vaessen has declared in the media during the last month that the Prince actively participated in the fraud, and that he fears a cover-up.
ref: 上个月，瓦森在媒体上宣布，王子积极参与了诈骗活动，他担心有人会掩盖真相。

src: He said that the Prince was a demanding party in the operation, and that "he knew that we were arranging things to make his life and his work as comfortable as possible."
ref: 他说王子在这次行动中是要求很高的一方，“他知道我们在安排事情，使他的生活和工作尽可能舒适。”

src: According to Vaessen, the Prince was in need of money to support a royal lifestyle, and "didn't even have enough money to buy food."
ref: 根据瓦森的说法，王子需要钱来维持皇室的生活方式，“甚至没有足够的钱去买食物。”

src: In 2001, Vaessen was discharged with honour from the army "for medical reasons", but Defence Minister André Flahaut is investigating if there was no agreement to give him his pension in exchange for the fact that he wouldn't incriminate the Prince.
ref: 2001年，瓦森因“医疗原因”光荣退伍，但国防部长安德烈·弗拉豪正在调查是否有协议给予他退休金，以换取他不会指控王子。

src: Vaessen also accused the Prince of other things, such as racing against the high-speed train TGV on a French highway.
ref: 瓦森还指责王子的其他事情，例如在法国高速公路上与高速列车TGV比赛。

src: Captain Johan Claeys, one of the accused, studied with the Prince and worked at the facturation services of the Navy in 1998 and 1999.
ref: 约翰·克拉伊斯上尉是其中一名被告，曾与王子一起学习，并于1998年和1999年在海军的制造部门工作。

src: One of the accused contractors, Marc Luypaerts, has told the press that the judge responsible for the investigation in Hasselt had forbidden him to speak about Prince Laurent.
ref: 被告承包商之一马克·卢皮特斯告诉媒体，负责哈塞尔调查的法官禁止他谈论劳伦特王子。

src: Laurent's status as a Prince has several judicial consequences for the trial.
ref: 劳伦特王子的身份对审判有几个司法后果。

src: In Belgium, it's against the law to incriminate the Royal Family during a trial.
ref: 在比利时，在审判期间起诉皇室是违法的。

src: Also, the Prince is protected from judicial pursuit because he is also a Senator by law.
ref: 此外，由于王子也是一名参议员，因此他不受司法追捕。

src: Justice Minister Laurette Onkelinx has issued a Royal Decrete, which the King has signed while on holiday in Napels, which would make it possible for Princes to testify in a trial.
ref: 司法部长劳雷特·昂凯林颁布了一项皇家法令，国王在那不勒斯度假时签署了该法令，这将使王子们有可能在审判中作证。

src: However, Public Prosecutor Erwin Steyls has chosen to have Laurent interrogated by the police last night in Hasselt.
ref: 然而，检察官埃尔文·斯泰尔斯选择让劳伦特昨晚在哈塞尔接受警方审讯。

src: This was the first time during the last six years of the inquiry that the Prince was questioned.
ref: 这是在调查的最后六年里，王子第一次受到询问。

src: Today in the court, the Prosecutor defended the act of having him questioned outside the trial, saying that there were several procedural issues.
ref: 今天在法庭上，检察官为让他在庭外接受讯问的行为进行了辩护，说有几个程序问题。

src: First, the subpoena for the Prince wasn't issued in time to be legal.
ref: 首先，对王子的传票没有及时发出以使其合法。

src: Second, the details of the protocol to hear the Prince in court were not explained in the recent Royal Decrete, making it worthless -something Minister Onkelickx denied.
ref: 第二，在最近的皇家法令中，关于在法庭上听取王子意见的协议细节没有得到解释，这使得它毫无价值，这是昂凯力克部长否认的。

src: Thirdly, nobody can be forced to testify against himself, and if the Prince were to make false statements under oath, he could only be sued for perjury.
ref: 第三，任何人都不能被强迫做不利于自己的证词，如果王子在宣誓时做了虚假的陈述，他只能因作伪证而被起诉。

src: However, the court has decided to let him testify anyway this afternoon.
ref: 然而，法院决定让他今天下午出庭作证。

src: During the last month, the case has caused a several spin-off discussions in Belgium.
ref: 上个月，该案在比利时引发了几次分拆讨论。

src: One of the surprises during this period was the King's Christmas Message, in which he referred to the case.
ref: 在这段时间里，国王的圣诞致辞中提到了这个案件，这让人感到意外。

src: The regional governments are now investigating and discussing their donations to the IRGT/KINT, an environmental organisation supported by Prince Laurent.
ref: 地区政府现在正在调查和讨论他们对IRGT/KINT的捐赠，这是一个由劳伦特王子支持的环境组织。

src: But there is also an ongoing debate over the position of the Monarchy in Belgium.
ref: 但是，关于比利时君主制地位的争论也在继续。

src: Some politicians are suggesting to limit the role of the Monarchy, and other think that only the King and Queen, the Crown Prince or Princess and the widow(er) of the King or Queen should receive state funding.
ref: 一些政治家建议限制君主制的作用，另一些则认为只有国王和王后、王储或公主以及国王或王后的遗孀（ER）才应该接受国家资助。

src: Controversy was sparked by his choice of conservative Italian Rocco Buttiglione for the Justice Commissioner position, who made several statements regarding homosexuality and women that members of the European Parliament objected to.
ref: 他选择保守的意大利人罗科·布蒂里奥尼担任司法专员一职引发了争议。布蒂里奥尼曾就同性恋和女性问题发表过几次声明，遭到欧洲议会成员的反对。

src: The European Parliament voted in favour the Commissioners on November 18th, giving Barroso and his staff the green light to start their official five-year term starting on Monday.
ref: 11月18日，欧洲议会投票支持欧盟委员会委员，这给巴罗佐和他的工作人员开了绿灯，让他们从周一开始正式的五年任期。

src: While the Greens, Eurosceptics and the Communist Party voted against, the Commission secured the approval of the Parliament's biggest parties - the Socialists, the Liberals and the European People's Party.
ref: 尽管绿党、欧洲怀疑论者和共产党投了反对票，但欧盟委员会获得了欧洲议会最大政党-社会党、自由党和欧洲人民党-的批准。

src: The vote ended with 449 in favour, 149 against and 82 abstentions, CNN reports.
ref: 据CNN报道，投票结果是449票赞成，149票反对，82票弃权。

src: That was said by some, especially from nationalistic and populist parties, such as Peace and Justice, and Self-Defense and League of Polish Families, candidates in the last elections (both parliamentary and presidential), who had been promising people a strengthening of the position of Polish president.
ref: 据一些上次选举（议会和总统选举）的候选人，特别是来自民族主义和民粹主义政党的候选人，如和平正义党、自卫党和波兰家庭联盟的候选人承诺，他们将强化波兰总统的地位。

src: He was unable to stand for re-election again as the Constitution of Poland states that the Polish president can only be re-elected once.
ref: 由于波兰宪法规定波兰总统只能连任一次，因此他无法再次参与竞选。

src: The head of the Israel Defense Forces, Lt. Gen. Dan Halutz, resigned on Tuesday January 16, 2007 after an internal review criticized his military's leadership during the war in Lebanon last summer.
ref: 2007年1月16日星期二，一份内部审查报告批评了去年夏天黎巴嫩战争期间丹·霍尔茨的军队领导能力，之后这位以色列国防军少将宣布辞职。

src: Halutz sent his resignation letter to Prime Minister Ehud Olmert, which according to Israeli Army Radio said, "For me, the concept of responsibility is everything."
ref: 霍尔茨向总理埃胡德·奥尔默特递交了辞职信。据以色列军方电台报道，奥尔默特说：“对我来说，责任的概念就是对一切负责。”

src: Halutz has also been facing criticism after it was disclosed that he sold a portion of his stock portfolio hours after the Lebanon fighting began on July 12, 2006.
ref: 霍尔茨还被揭露，在2006年7月12日黎巴嫩战争爆发数小时后，出售了部分股票，他也因此面临指责。

src: A recently published nationwide survey of US teenagers indicates boys tend to masturbate more — and start younger — than girls.
ref: 最近公布的一项针对美国青少年的全国性调查显示，男孩比女孩更容易手淫，而且男孩开始手淫的年龄也更小。

src: It also finds boys who masturbate are more likely to engage in safe sex than boys who don't.
ref: 研究还发现，自慰的男孩比不自慰的男孩更有可能进行安全性行为。

src: Dr. Cynthia L. Robbins, the study's lead author from Indiana University in Indianapolis, spoke of the need for the academic community to focus more on masturbation.
ref: 这项研究的主要研究者印第安纳波利斯印第安纳大学的辛西娅·L·罗宾斯博士说，学术界需要更多对自慰的关注。

src: "Many adolescent boys and girls masturbate, and among sexually active teens masturbation is associated with other sexual behaviors and condom use."
ref: 许多青少年男孩和女孩会自慰，在性活跃的青少年中，自慰与其他性行为和使用避孕套有关。

src: "It is important to recognize that masturbation is an important and normal component of adolescent sexual development."
ref: “重要的是要认识到自慰是青少年性发育的重要和正常组成部分。”

src: The survey, named the National Survey of Sexual Health and Behavior (NSSHB), was supported by Church & Dwight, which makes Trojan condoms.
ref: 这项名为全国性健康和行为调查（NSSHB）的调查得到了制作特洛伊安全套的杜威公司的支持。

src: A representative nationwide sample of 820 teens 14–17 years old participated in the study with parental permission.
ref: 在全国范围内，820名14到17岁青少年在父母允许的情况下参与了这项调查。

src: The findings were published Monday in the Archives of Pediatrics and Adolescent Medicine.
ref: 研究结果发表在周一的《儿科和青少年医学档案》上。

src: Male and female respondents were asked to note how frequently they masturbated in the past three months, the past year, and throughout their lifetime.
ref: 男性和女性受访者被要求记录他们在过去三个月、去年和一生中自慰的频率。

src: They were also asked to recall whether they masturbated alone or with a partner, and also how often they used condoms.
ref: 他们还被要求回忆他们是单独自慰还是与伴侣一同自慰，以及他们使用避孕套的频率。

src: Nearly three-fourths of boys reported having masturbated, compared to only less than half of girls.
ref: 近四分之三的男孩表示曾自慰，而只有不到一半的女孩这么做。

src: About half of boys reported masturbating twice or more per week, also higher than the 23 percent of girls.
ref: 大约一半的男孩每周自慰两次或两次以上，频率也高于百分之23的女孩。

src: Masturbation rates for both genders increased along with age, though only boys were more likely to report having "recently" engaged in the activity as they grew older.
ref: 随着年龄的增长，男性和女性的自慰率都在增加，不过只有男孩更有可能在长大后有“最近”进行过自慰的经历。

src: Among adolescents who engage in oral or vaginal sex, boys who masturbate were eight times more likely to use a condom than boys who don't.
ref: 在进行口交或阴道性交的青少年中，自慰的男孩使用避孕套的可能性是不自慰男孩的8倍。

src: The researchers who conducted the study urge more open and educational discussion of this highly stigmatized topic.
ref: 进行这项研究的研究人员敦促对这个被高度非议的话题进行更开放和更有教育意义的讨论。

src: "The findings of this study together with existing publications on masturbation should be used by health care providers to inform, educate and reassure adolescents about masturbation to provide competent and comprehensive sexuality education in the clinical setting".
ref: “这项研究的结果，连同现有的关于自慰的出版物，应该被卫生保健提供者用来告知、教育和消除青少年自慰的疑虑，以便在临床环境中提供有能力和全面的性教育。”

src: May 27, 2005 Mount Qomolangma, known in the west as Mount Everest, may be taller than ever, and a group of 24 Chinese researchers have scaled the peak and made observations they hope will document its current height.
ref: 2005年5月27日，珠穆朗玛峰，在西方被称为埃佛勒斯峰，可能比以往任何时候都要高。一个由24名中国研究人员组成的小组已经登上了珠峰，并进行了观测，他们希望能记录下珠峰目前的高度。

src: In 1975 the peak was surveyed at a height of 8 848 metres, in line with previous calculations, but a U.S. survey team in 1999 measured it at 8 850m.
ref: 1975年，珠峰被测量的高度为8848米，与之前的计算结果一致，但1999年一个美国调查小组测量的高度为8850米。

src: The growth to some extent fits current theories regarding the geology of the region, a region with crustal upthrust.
ref: 这种增长在一定程度上符合目前关于该地区地质的理论，因为该地区是一个地壳上冲的地区。

src: The growth may also be due in part to rapid glacier retreat on the peak's slopes, and the mountain springing back as the weight of snow melts and runs off.
ref: 造成这种增长的部分原因可能是因为山顶上的冰川急速消退，随着积雪的融化和流失，山顶又重新出现了。

src: At the same time, recent theories suggest the mountain is also shrinking.
ref: 同时，最近的一些理论表明这座山也在缩小。

src: The peak may be getting smaller from subsidence as it reaches extreme heights, and again the glaciers and snow help to stabilize and expand the mountain itself.
ref: 峰顶可能会因为下沉而变得越来越小，因为达到了极端的高度，而冰川和雪再次帮助稳定和扩大了山本身。

src: There is some disagreement regarding the methods of measurement used previously, so the researchers spent an hour at the summit taking measurements using radar, satellite, and other methods on 6 points.
ref: 因为对之前使用的测量方法存在一些分歧，所以研究人员在峰会上花了一个小时用雷达、卫星等方法对6个点进行测量。

src: The average of the measurements will be used to make the official Chinese measurement, which remains at 8 848.
ref: 测量值的平均值将为中国官方的测量值，该值仍为8848米。

src: Results of the expedition are expected to be available in August.
ref: 这次考察的结果预计将于8月公布。

src: A previous measurement team from Italy also used the radar methodology in 2004, but their results have not yet been published.
ref: 先前意大利的一个测量团队在2004年也使用了雷达方法，但是他们的结果还没有公布。

src: The mountain straddles the border between Tibet and Nepal, and is known by several names.
ref: 这座横跨西藏和尼泊尔边界的山有好几个名字。

src: In Chinese, 珠穆朗瑪峰 (pinyin: Zhūmùlǎngmǎ Fēng); Tibetan Qomolangma ("Mother of the Universe"); in Nepal Sagarmatha ("Forehead of the Sky"); and in English named after Sir George Everest.
ref: 中文名为珠穆朗玛峰（拼音：ZhūmùlǎngmǎFēng）；藏语名为Qomolangma（“宇宙之母”）；尼泊尔语为Sagarmatha（“天空之前额”）；英文中以乔治·埃佛勒斯特爵士的名字为其命名。

src: In a conscience vote last night, Wednesday, parliament decided that the alcohol purchasing for New Zealanders will not be raised to 20 but instead will stay at the current age of 18.
ref: 昨天晚上，也就是周三，议会在一次良心投票中决定，新西兰人购买酒类产品的年龄不会提高到20岁，而是依然保持在目前的18岁。

src: The vote was 72-49 with the noes as the majority, a conscience vote is where the individual Member of Parliament (MP) votes instead of the party and their policies.
ref: 投票结果是72票对49票，以无党派人士居多，良心投票是为国会议员个人投票的地方，而不是为政党及其政策投票。

src: The bill was brought before Parliament with the intent of placing the drinking age back at 20 following its lowering to 18 in 1999.
ref: 自1999年将年龄降低到18岁之后，法案又被提交给议会，目的就是将饮酒年龄重新调整到20岁。

src: It was first drafted by Matt Robson of the NZ Progressive Party, and was then taken on by Martin Gallagher from the New Zealand Labour Party.
ref: 它最初由新西兰进步党的马特·罗布森起草，然后草案由新西兰工党的马丁·加拉赫接任。

src: However, the Labour-led government is being attacked for interfering with the liquor purchase age bill.
ref: 然而，以工党为首的政府因干预酒类购买年龄法案而受到抨击。

src: Before the debate on the bill, two ministers who are against raising the age, justice minister Mark Burton and associate health minister, Damien O'Conner both announced that they would fully review the sale/supply of liquor to people below the age of 18, regardless of whether the bill were passed or not.
ref: 在对该法案进行辩论之前，反对提高年龄的两位部长，司法部长马克·伯顿和卫生部副部长达米安·奥康纳都宣布，无论该法案是否通过，他们都将全面审查18岁以下人群的酒类销售和供应情况。

src: The review will most likely look at how many off-licence outlets there are and increased law enforcement of the drink age.
ref: 审查将最有可能查出有多少个非营业网点，并提高酒龄执法力度。

src: Mr Burton said that he did not pre-empt the bill voting, he said: "It was important to ensure all options were on the table before the vote."
ref: 伯顿表示，他没有抢在法案投票之前采取行动。他表示：“重要的是确保在投票前所有选项都摆在桌面上。”

src: "What we are saying is you can have confidence that if the bill doesn't proceed there will be an alternative vehicle for addressing the issues immediately thereafter."
ref: “我们想说的是，你们可以相信，如果该法案不继续执行，在那之后将会有另一种途径能够立即解决这些问题。”

src: Many MPs said that it was unorthodox to intrude in such a manner in the voting process.
ref: 许多议员表示，以这种方式介入投票过程是不正统的。

src: Leader of Jim Anderton's Progressive coalition and supporter of the bill, Jim Anderton, said: "Making a last-minute plea to MPs is not to be fooled by the promise of the unnecessary review."
ref: 吉姆·安德顿领导的进步联盟和该法案的支持者吉姆·安德顿说：“在最后时刻向国会议员提出请求，不会被不必要的审查承诺所愚弄。”

src: "This is the review you have when you want to give parliamentarians a soft option."
ref: “当你想给议员们一个轻松的选择时，就需要进行这样的审查。”

src: "And I hear that sigh of relief in many places, 'oh gosh you've got a review so we don't have to make a hard decision'."
ref: “我在很多地方都听到了松气声，‘哦，天哪，你还有一份评估报告，所以我们不必做出艰难的决定。’”。

src: "Well this is the place for hard decisions and this is where the buck stops."
ref: “好吧，这是一个艰难决定的地方，但这就是责任所在。”

src: Christopher Bishop, a spokesman for the Keep it 18 campaign, said: "We welcome the Government's moves to review the supply of alcohol to minors in the likely event that the Sale of Liquor Amendment Bill is defeated today."
ref: 坚持18岁的运动发言人克里斯托弗·毕晓普表示：“我们欢迎政府在可能的情况下，对未成年人的酒精供应进行审查，因为现在《酒类销售修正案法案》很可能被否决。”

src: "Raising the drinking age is never going to work as a way of dealing with New Zealand's drinking culture."
ref: “提高饮酒年龄绝不会成为处理新西兰饮酒文化的一种方式。”

src: "It is a simplistic and knee-jerk solution – a legislative sledgehammer."
ref: “这是一个简单的、下意识的解决方案-一个立法大锤。”

src: Chester Burrows, National MP, said: "My experience is I've seen too many pissed young people, raped young people, assaulted young people."
ref: 国家议员切斯特·伯罗斯说：“我的经验是，我见过太多喝醉的年轻人，被强奸的年轻人，被袭击的年轻人。”

src: Gordon Copeland, United Future MP, who also preferred the split age, said he had "no doubt the move would influence the way people voted."
ref: 未来的国会议员戈登•科普兰也赞成划分年龄，他表示，“毫无疑问，此举将影响人们的投票方式。”

src: Ron Mark, New Zealand First MP, said: "Are we going to do something, or are we going to do nothing?" asked New Zealand First list MP Ron Mark.
ref: 新西兰第一议员罗恩·马克说：“我们是要做些什么，还是什么都不做呢？”

src: "We can at least let this bill go through to the next stage."
ref: “我们至少可以让这项法案进入下一阶段。”

src: Ross Bell, spokesman for the Drug Foundation, said: "Not only is such a review too narrow, it also seemed to pre-empt the outcome of Wednesday's debate."
ref: 药物基金会发言人罗斯•贝尔说：“这样的审查不仅过于狭隘，似乎还抢先于周三辩论的结果。”

src: "A cynical person might think the announcement gave MPs an excuse not to support the bill."
ref: “愤世嫉俗的人可能会认为，该声明给了议员们不支持该法案的借口。”

src: "That review has already been looked at by the Law and Order Select Committee, and what is needed is a review of price and availability of alcohol."
ref: “法律和秩序特别委员会已经对这一审查进行了研究，现在需要的是对酒类价格和供应情况进行审查。”

src: However it has been suggested by the select committee previously researching the drinking problem in New Zealand that there is little hard evidence 18 & 19 year olds are buying alcohol for minors, with the largest problem instead being the purchasing of alcohol by parents for their children.
ref: 然而，据特别委员会此前对新西兰的饮酒问题进行的研究表明，几乎没有确凿的证据表明18岁和19岁的青少年在为未成年人买酒，而最大的问题其实是父母在为孩子买酒。

src: Wednesday morning, the Frankfurt Book Fair opened its gates to the first of an estimated 280,000 visitors this year in Frankfurt am Main, Germany.
ref: 周三上午，法兰克福书展在德国法兰克福开幕，预计今年有28万名参观者。

src: The Frankfurt Book Fair is the biggest book fair in the world.
ref: 法兰克福书展是世界上最大的书展。

src: It also organises the participation of German publishers at more than 25 international book fairs and is the co-founder of the Cape Town Book Fair in South Africa.
ref: 它还组织德国出版商参加了超过25个的国际书展，是南非开普敦书展的联合创始人。

src: It maintains the most visited website worldwide for the publishing industry.
ref: 它运营着全球访问量最大的出版业网站。

src: The German Publishers & Booksellers Association, which runs the Frankfurt Book Fair, says that the book market is thriving.
ref: 负责法兰克福书展的德国出版商和书商协会表示，图书市场正在蓬勃发展。

src: It declared on Tuesday that the high number of exhibitors and the record numbers of 7,448 exhibitors from over 100 countries, showing 391,652 books, including 121,267 new books of this year, proves that the book market is thriving.
ref: 周二，法兰克福书展宣布，来自100多个国家的7448家参展商将展出了391652本书，其中包括今年的121267本新书，创下新的书展记录，这也证明了图书市场的繁荣。

src: TV and merchandising rights have long played a role, but have become more and more important for larger projects.
ref: 对图书市场来说，电视和商品开发权长期以来一直扮演着一定的角色，但对于更大的项目来说，它们会变得越来越重要。

src: Two other media forms have also become more standard elements of the value chain.
ref: 另外两种媒体形式也成为了图书价值链的标准元素。

src: E-books and audiobooks are both big topics of this year's Book Fair.
ref: 电子书和有声读物都是今年书展的大主题。

src: In an effort to ease complaints by the U.S. and Europe about a heavy influx of low priced Chinese goods, China will raise export tariffs on 74 categories of textile products in June.
ref: 为了缓解美国和欧洲对中国低价商品大量涌入的抱怨，中国将在6月提高74类纺织品的出口关税。

src: This follows plans from the U.S. to impose quotas on Chinese textiles and clothing.
ref: 此前，美国计划对中国纺织品和服装实施配额限制。

src: Products likely to see an increase from the Chinese move include synthetic fiber shirts, trousers, knit shirts and blouses, cotton shirts, and combined cotton yarn.
ref: 中国此举可能增税的产品包括合成纤维衬衫、裤子、针织衬衫和衬衫、棉质衬衫以及棉纱混纺衬衫。

src: Last week, similar restrictions were imposed by the U.S. on cotton trousers, knit shirts, and underwear.
ref: 上周，美国对棉裤、针织衬衫和内衣实施了类似的限制。

src: Currently, a 2.5 cent charge per item is imposed; the new tariff will raise this to the equivalent of 12 cents per piece now.
ref: 目前，每件产品征收百分之2.5的费用；新的关税将把这一价格提高到每件12美分。

src: While this is a fourfold increase, it is not expected to affect consumer prices.
ref: 虽然增长了四倍，但预计不会影响消费者价格。

src: Because of this, some doubt the tariff will have any effect on correcting the trade imbalance.
ref: 因此，一些人怀疑关税的增长是否会对纠正贸易失衡有任何影响。

src: This move is in response to U.S. trade quotas imposed due to concerns that increased Chinese goods would put U.S. textile manufacturers out of business.
ref: 这一举措是对美国实施贸易配额限制的回应，因为美国担心中国商品的增加将使美国纺织制造商倒闭。

src: According to Auggie Tantillo, executive director of the American Manufacturing Trade Action Coalition, a textile industry group in the U.S., the move will preserve 10,000 U.S. jobs.
ref: 据美国纺织工业集团美国制造业贸易行动联盟执行主任奥吉•坦蒂洛称，美国此举将保留1万个美国就业岗位。

src: The new U.S. trade quota will limit the growth of Chinese textile imports to 7.5 percent compared with shipments over the past year.
ref: 新的美国贸易配额将限制中国纺织品进口相比去年百分之7.5的进口配额。

src: Prior to January 1, a global quota system helped regulate the trade.
ref: 在1月1日之前，全球配额制度帮助监管了贸易。

src: With the quota system gone, fears have arisen that a flood of Chinese goods could undercut U.S. competitiveness in the market.
ref: 随着配额制度的取消，人们开始担心中国商品的泛滥会削弱美国在市场上的竞争力。

src: China is able to market its goods cheaply due to an artificially weak yuan.
ref: 由于人为压低了人民币汇率，中国能够以低廉的价格销售商品。

src: The U.S. Treasury criticized the China yuan policy as "highly distortionary", posing a major risk to China's economy itself and to global economic growth.
ref: 美国财政部批评中国的人民币政策是“高度扭曲”的，这会对中国经济本身和全球经济增长构成重大风险。

src: They challenged China to revalue its currency to bring it to a level they believe will allow fairer competition between global manufacturers.
ref: 他们要求中国让人民币升值，使其汇率达到他们认为的能实现全球制造商之间的公平竞争的水平。

src: Chinese Commerce Minister Bo Xilai said, "I believe they are not reasonable".
ref: 中国商务部长薄熙来说：“我认为这是不合理的。”

src: Laura Jones, a representative of large retailers, also criticized the move, saying "These restrictions on imports from China will do absolutely nothing to help the U.S. textile industry -- and the government knows it."
ref: 大型零售商代表劳拉·琼斯也批评了这一举措，她说：“这些对中国进口的限制对美国纺织业毫无帮助-政府也知道这一点。”

src: A main belt asteroid, No. 274301, has been named after Wikipedia, a free encyclopedia.
ref: 主带小行星，编号274301，以免费百科全书维基百科命名。

src: The information became available on the Minor Planet Center's website yesterday.
ref: 昨天，这些信息在小行星中心的网站上公布了。

src: The decision of the Committee for Small Body Nomenclature to assign the name "Wikipedia" to the asteroid was published in the Minor Planet Circular of January 27, published online yesterday, page 82403.
ref: 小体命名委员会决定以“维基百科”这个名字为小行星命名，这一决定发表在1月27日的《小行星通报》上，并于昨天在线发布在第82403页。

src: It was submitted to the Committee by the head of the Andrushivka Astronomical Observatory in Ukraine, Yuri Ivashchenko.
ref: 这项决定是由乌克兰安德鲁绍夫卡天文台台长尤里·伊瓦什琴科提交给委员会的。

src: The asteroid 274301 Wikipedia was discovered by the team of astronomers of Andrushivka Astronomical Observatory.
ref: 这颗名为维基百科的小行星274301是由安德鲁绍夫卡天文台的天文学家团队发现的。

src: At first it was observed by that team on August 25, 2008 at 22:47 (UTC).
ref: 起初，该小组在2008年8月25日22：47（UTC）时观察到了这一现象。

src: It was also observed on the next night and two weeks later on September 6.
ref: 第二天晚上以及两周后的9月6日天文台也观察到了这一现象。

src: Accurate calculation of its orbit showed asteroid 2008 QH24 is the same as 1997 RO4 and 2007 FK34.
ref: 通过对其轨道的精确计算，2008年的QH24小行星与1997年的RO4小行星和2007年的FK34小行星相同。

src: The asteroid had been previously spotted by observatories including Caussols-ODAS in France, and Mt. Lemmon Survey and Steward Observatory in Arizona, US.
ref: 这颗小行星此前曾被法国的科索斯-奥达斯天文台、美国亚利桑那州的莱蒙山勘测和斯图尔德天文台等天文台发现。

src: On April 18, 2011 the minor planet received the number 274301.
ref: 2011年4月18日，这颗小行星获得编号274301。

src: Al-Jazeera reported a few days earlier that the Iraqi militants would kill the journalists unless the Romanian government withdraws its troops from the country within four days.
ref: 卡塔尔半岛电视台几天前报道称，若罗马尼亚政府四天内不从伊拉克撤军，伊拉克激进分子将杀死记者。

src: With 850 troops, Romania has one of the largest contingents in Iraq.
ref: 军队有850人，是罗马尼亚在伊拉克最大的特遣队之一。

src: In January this year, after President Băsescu was elected, he pledged to send more peacekeeping troops in Iraq.
ref: 今年1月，在贝塞斯克当选总统后，他承诺将向伊拉克派遣更多的维和部队。

src: On Friday evening, the colleagues and relatives of the journalists gathered in front of the Cotroceni Palace, Băsescu's residence, to call for their release.
ref: 周五晚上，记者们的同事和亲属聚集在科特罗切尼宫前，要求释放他们。

src: After learning of the released tape, Băsescu returned from the GUUAM summit in Chişinău, Republic of Moldova, where he was an observer, to Bucharest, where he called for a meeting with the relevant departments to discuss the issue.
ref: 贝塞斯克在获悉发布的录音带后，从摩尔多瓦基希讷乌举行的的古阿姆组织峰会返回，在摩尔瓦多他是观察员，回到布加勒斯特他是决议者，他召集了有关部门开会讨论来这个问题。

src: Reporter Marie-Jeanne Ion, from Prima TV, and cameraman Sorin Dumitru Miscoci and reporter Ovidiu Ohanesian, from newspaper România Liberă, were kidnapped in Baghdad on March 28, one day after President Băsescu made an unexpected visit to Iraq to announce a supplement of troops.
ref: 3月28日，普里玛电视台的记者玛丽·珍妮·伊恩，以及来自《自由报》的摄影师索林·杜米特鲁米塞奇和记者奥维迪乌·奥哈内西恩在巴格达被绑架，而一天前，总统贝塞斯克突然访问伊拉克，宣布增派部队。

src: Bloc Quebecois Member of Parliament Benoit Sauvageau was killed in an automobile accident on Monday morning after his vehicle hit a tow truck at the side of a road in his Montreal constituency.
ref: 星期一早上，魁北克议会议员贝诺伊特·索瓦乔在一场车祸中丧生。当时他在蒙特利尔选区的一条路边撞上一辆拖车。

src: Sauvageau, 42, had been an MP since 1993 and represented the riding of Repentigny at the time of his death.
ref: 42岁的索瓦戈自1993年起就当选议员，他去世时代表着雷朋堤尼选区。

src: "I think he was a very good member of Parliament, a very good sovereigntist," added Duceppe.
ref: “我认为他是一位非常优秀的国会议员，一个非常好的主权主义者，”杜塞普补充。

src: Visibly shaken by the news, Duceppe said: "It's awful, at 42 with four children (daughters) between the ages of five and 15, it's not right."
ref: 杜塞普显然对这一消息感到震惊，他说：“这太可怕了，他才42岁，有四个5至15岁的孩子（都是女儿），这太糟了。”

src: Former Quebec Premier Lucien Bouchard, who led the BQ when Sauvageau was first elected, told Radio Canada: "It's a tragedy."
ref: 魁北克前总理卢西恩·布沙尔在索瓦乔首次当选时，他正领导德国联邦广播公司，他告诉加拿大广播电台：“这是一场悲剧。”

src: "He is a man who was engaged in political fights but he did it correctly, with nobility and idealism and a lot of respect for others, even his adversaries," said Bouchard.
ref: 博查德说：“他是一个从事政治斗争的人，但他行事端正，品格高尚和是个理想主义者，对他人，甚至对对手都很尊重。”

src: As an MP he was the Bloc's spokesperson on public accounts and the treasury board and was also the party's critic responsible for the Official Languages Act and the rights of Francophones outside of Quebec.
ref: 他不仅是国会议员，也是欧盟公共账户和财政委员会的发言人，还兼任该党对《官方语言法》和魁北克以外法语国家权利的评论员。

src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper said the prayers and thoughts of all Parliamentarians are with Sauvageau's loved ones at this difficult time.
ref: 史蒂芬·哈珀总理称，在这个困难的时刻，所有国会议员的心都与索瓦乔的亲人们同在。

src: A car containing an large explosive device has been defused in the Haymarket, London.
ref: 一辆装有大型爆炸装置的汽车在伦敦的海马克特被拆除了。

src: A second device was later found in a car park in Park Lane.
ref: 随后，第二个炸弹装置在帕克巷的一个停车场被发现。

src: A car, a light metallic green Mercedes-Benz E Class saloon (produced 1984-1995), parked near the nightclub 'TigerTiger', contained petrol, gas cylinders and nails.
ref: 一辆轻金属绿色梅赛德斯-奔驰E级轿车（1984-1995年生产），停在“泰格”夜总会附近，里面装着汽油、气罐和钉子。

src: Police carried out a controlled explosion at 2:00 a.m. BST and the car has been taken to a forensic explosives laboratory for further investigation.
ref: 警方在英国夏令时凌晨2点进行了一次控制性爆炸，这辆车已被送往法院爆炸物实验室作进一步调查。

src: Eyewitnesses saw the car driving "erratically" and colliding with bins before being abandoned.
ref: 在这辆车被遗弃之前，有目击者看到“横冲直撞”，还撞上了垃圾箱。

src: An ambulance crew in the area alerted police after seeing smoke inside the car.
ref: 该地区的一名救护人员看到车内有烟后立即报警。

src: Deputy Assistant Police Commissioner Peter Clarke said there could have been "significant injury or loss of life".
ref: 副警务专员助理彼得•克拉克表示，差点就造成“重大伤亡”了。

src: A meeting of COBRA, chaired by new Home Secretary Jacqui Smith was held about the incident.
ref: 由新任内政大臣杰奎•史密斯就这一事件举行了的柯博拉会议。

src: Police say it is too early to tell who is behind the threat.
ref: 警方表示，现在判断谁是幕后黑手还为时过早。

src: Prime Minister Gordon Brown said the country faces a "serious and continued security threat" and urged people to "be vigilant at all times".
ref: 布朗首相称，英国面临着“严重和持续的安全威胁”，并敦促人们“时刻保持警惕”。

src: Disruption has been caused to transport in the area with roads closed and bus routes diverted.
ref: 道路封闭、公交路线改道，造成了该地区的交通混乱。

src: Piccadilly Circus tube station has reopened after an earlier closure
ref: 皮卡迪利马戏团地铁站关了一阵又重新开放了。

src: Police are reviewing major events to be held in London over the weekend.
ref: 警方正在审查周末将在伦敦举行的重大事件。

src: CBS News has reported that a message appeared on the widely used jihadist Internet forum Al-Hesbah at 8:09 a.m. June 28, saying: "Today I say: Rejoice, by Allah, London shall be bombed."
ref: 据哥伦比亚广播公司新闻报道称，6月28日上午8：09，一条消息出现在广泛使用的圣战分子网络论坛赫斯巴上：“今天的我说：欢呼吧，伦敦将被真主阿拉轰炸。”

src: The message went on to mention the recently announced knighthood of Satanic Verses author Salman Rushdie.
ref: 这条消息还提到了最近宣布爵士身份的撒旦诗集作者萨尔曼·拉什迪。

src: Following an incident at Glasgow airport, Home Secretary Jacqui Smith announced the elevation of the UK's national threat level from "Severe" to "Critical", indicating that an attack could be expected "imminently".
ref: 在格拉斯哥机场发生事故后，内政大臣雅克·史密斯宣布，英国的国家威胁级别从“严重”上升到“紧急”，这表明恐怖分子可能会“迫切”发起攻击。

src: Two people have been arrested in Cheshire in connection with the Glasgow International Airport attack and attempted London car bombings.
ref: 两人因涉嫌格拉斯哥国际机场袭击和伦敦汽车爆炸未遂在柴郡被捕。

src: A new report by the International Federation of Journalists (IFJ) documents 129 cases where media workers have been killed because of their work during 2004.
ref: 国际新闻工作者联合会（IFJ）发布的一份新报告记录了129起媒体工作者在2004年因工作而死亡的案例。

src: They expect the number to increase as more information reaches them.
ref: 他们预计随着收集的信息更多，这个数字会增加。

src: 49 casualties (close to 40%) occurred in Iraq, making it by far the deadliest country for journalists.
ref: 有49起伤亡发生在伊拉克（接近百分之40），是迄今为止对记者来说最致命的国家。

src: At least 20 of those appeared to be cases where journalists were directly targeted because of their profession.
ref: 其中至少有20起案件似乎是因其记者职业而受到攻击。

src: Another country that deserved special attention was the Philippines, where 13 journalists appear to have been assassinated in separate incidents because of their reporting.
ref: 另一个值得特别关注的国家是菲律宾，似乎有13名记者因为报道而在不同事件中被暗杀。

src: None of the murderers have been apprehended by the police.
ref: 警察没有逮捕任何一个杀人犯。

src: In Nepal, two journalists were killed by security forces and one by the rebels.
ref: 在尼泊尔，两名记者被安全部队打死，一名被叛军杀死。

src: In an effort to reduce the effect of the ongoing financial crisis, six central banks worldwide have reduced their interest rates by 0.5% in an unexpected move which took place today.
ref: 为了减少金融危机的持续影响，全球六家央行在今天，出人意料的都降低了百分之0.5的利率。

src: The banks involved in the deal are the Bank of Canada, the Bank of England, the European Central Bank, the Federal Reserve, Sveriges Riksbank, and the Swiss National Bank.
ref: 参与行动的银行包括加拿大银行、英格兰银行、欧洲中央银行、美联储、瑞典央行和瑞士国家银行。

src: "Throughout the current financial crisis, central banks have engaged in continuous close consultation and have cooperated in unprecedented joint actions such as the provision of liquidity to reduce strains in financial markets," said the banks in a joint statement.
ref: 六家银行在一份联合声明中表示：“在当前金融危机期间，各国央行一直在进行持续密切的磋商，例如在提供流动资金以减轻金融市场的压力的计划中，实现了前所未有的合作。”

src: "Inflationary pressures have started to moderate in a number of countries, partly reflecting a marked decline in energy and other commodity prices."
ref: 许多国家的通货膨胀压力已经开始缓和，部分原因是能源和其他商品价格的明显下降。

src: "Inflation expectations are diminishing and remain anchored to price stability."
ref: “通货膨胀预期正不断降低，且依然保持在价格稳定区间内。”

src: "The recent intensification of the financial crisis has augmented the downside risks to growth and thus has diminished further the upside risks to price stability."
ref: “最近金融危机的加剧增大了的下行风险，从而进一步降低了价格稳定的上行风险。”
