src: Opposition groups asserted that the elections were rigged to favour president Mahmoud Ahmadinejad, but the government denied it, saying it was a foreign-backed attempt to discredit the Iranian government system.
ref: 反对派组织声称选举被操纵来偏袒马哈茂德·艾哈迈迪内贾德总统，但政府否认了这一点，并称这是由外国支持的破坏伊朗政府系统信誉的狼子野心。

src: Libyan leader Muammar al-Gaddafi has said that Nigeria should be divided into two separate nations to avoid further violence between Muslims and Christians.
ref: 利比亚领导人穆阿迈尔·卡扎菲说，尼日利亚应该分成两个独立的国家，以避免穆斯林和基督徒之间的进一步暴力。

src: He was quoted as saying that the spilt "would stop the bloodshed and burning of places of worship."
ref: 有人引用他的话说，分离开“将阻止流血事件和焚烧礼拜场所。”

src: During his speech to students, Gaddafi spoke about the partition of India.
ref: 在他对学生的演讲中，卡扎菲谈到了印度的分离。

src: He called that division a "historic, radical solution" which saved the lives of "millions of Hindus and Muslims," despite reports that one million people were killed.
ref: 他称这种分离是“历史性的、彻底的解决方案”，拯救了“数百万印度教徒和穆斯林的生命”，尽管有报道称有100万人被杀。

src: He also called the recent violence in Jos a "deep conflict of a religious nature," and put the blame on the British stating that the federal state was imposed by Britain.
ref: 他还称最近在乔斯发生的暴力事件是“宗教性质的深层次冲突”，并将责任归咎于英国人，称联邦国家是英国强加的。

src: Around 100 people have died already this year in violence near the city of Jos.
ref: 今年已经有大约100人在乔斯市附近的暴力事件中丧生。

src: A senior Nigerian diplomat responded to Gaddafi's comments saying that he "did not take the suggestion seriously."
ref: 一名尼日利亚高级外交官回应卡扎菲的评论说，他“没有认真对待这个建议”。

src: Patsy Calton from Bramhall, Cheshire, England, a Liberal Democrat MP for the Cheadle constituency died at age 56 from cancer on Sunday May 29.
ref: 来自英格兰柴郡布拉姆霍尔的帕齐·卡尔顿，是来自奇德尔选区的自由民主党议员，他于5月29日星期天死于癌症，享年56岁。

src: The Liberal Democrat party leader Charles Kennedy described her as a "spirited and courageous" politician.
ref: 自由民主党领袖查尔斯·肯尼迪形容她是一位“精神奕奕、英勇无比”的政治家。

src: She was first elected to the Cheadle constituency by the slim margin of 33 votes in the 2001 election.
ref: 在2001年的选举中，她以33票的微弱优势首次当选为奇德尔选区议员。

src: She was then re-elected just 24 days before her death with a greatly increased majority of 4020, in spite of not campaigning herself due to the illness.
ref: 就在她去世前24天，她又以4020的多数票数获得连任，尽管她本人因病没有参加竞选。

src: She was a staunch supporter of a ban on smoking in enclosed public spaces.
ref: 她是禁止在封闭的公共场所吸烟的坚定支持者。

src: Acting as the party's health spokesman, she supported the Bath Liberal Democrats anti-smoking initiatives in the 2004 spring conference.
ref: 作为该党的健康发言人，她在2004年春季会议上支持巴斯自由民主党的反吸烟倡议。

src: She is survived by her husband Clive Calton, who worked as her researcher at the House of Commons, and her son and two daughters.
ref: 她死后留下丈夫克莱夫·卡尔顿和一个儿子以及两个女儿。克莱夫·卡尔顿曾在下议院担任帕齐的研究员。

src: Talks between the European Union Trade Commissioner Peter Mandelson and Chinese Commerce Minister Bo Xilai, held today in Beijing, brought no compromise on unblocking 80 milion pieces of Chinese textiles impounded in the EU.
ref: 欧盟贸易专员彼得·曼德尔森和中国商务部长薄熙来今天在北京举行会谈，双方没有就解除在欧盟扣押的八千万件中国纺织品的问题达成妥协。

src: The clothing is held in European warehouses due to overshoot of the China-to-the-EU export quotas.
ref: 由于中国对欧盟的出口配额过高，这些服装被存放在欧洲的仓库中。

src: In June, the EU member states agreed to raise the limit by approximately 10%, but EU importers and Chinese producers continue to push for a greater amount of trade.
ref: 今年6月，欧盟成员国同意将配额上限提高约百分之10，但欧盟进口商和中国生产商仍在继续推动更大的贸易额。

src: Concerns on textiles imported from Asia have split the EU countries: those with strong retail sector support increasing the quotas, while others, which have large clothing industries (Spain, Portugal, Italy) want to keep, or even reduce, limits in the future.
ref: 对从亚洲进口纺织品的担忧导致欧盟国家出现分歧：零售部门实力雄厚的国家支持提高配额，而其他拥有大型服装业的国家（如西班牙、葡萄牙、意大利）希望在未来保持、甚至减少或限制配额。

src: A similar dispute exists between China and the United States.
ref: 中美之间也存在类似的争端。

src: On Friday, George W. Bush's administration announced new quotas on imports of Chinese bras and synthetic fabric, after negotiations between both countries broke down.
ref: 周五，在两国谈判破裂后，乔治·布什政府宣布了关于中国内衣和合成纤维的新进口配额。

src: Bill Gwatney, chairman of the Democratic Party of Arkansas, died this afternoon at 3:59 pm CDT (UTC-5) after having been shot earlier this morning.
ref: 阿肯色州民主党主席比尔·格瓦特尼在今天早上被枪击后，于今天下午3点59分（世界标准时5时）去世。

src: The suspect is Tim Johnson, a white male, described by Gwatney's secretary as wearing "khaki pants, white shirt, silver-gray hair, late 40s."
ref: 嫌疑人是提姆·约翰逊，一名白人男性，据格瓦特尼的秘书描述，他“穿着卡其色裤子，白色衬衫，银灰色头发，40多岁。”

src: He reportedly walked into the party headquarters facilities in Little Rock, Arkansas, conversed with the Chairman's secretary, refused her offer of bumper stickers, and then walked past her saying he had to see the Chairman.
ref: 据报道，他走进阿肯色州小石城的党派总部，与主席的秘书进行了交谈，拒绝了她提供的保险杠贴纸后，从她身边走过，并说他必须见主席。

src: After the shooting, Johnson got into his blue Chevrolet pickup truck and led police on a 25-mile chase.
ref: 枪击案发生后，约翰逊开着他那辆蓝色的雪佛兰皮卡逃跑了，警察追了他25英里。

src: The end result was the shooting of the suspect, who was airlifted to a hospital and eventually died of his wounds.
ref: 最后警察开枪打中了嫌疑犯，他被空运到一家医院，最后他死于枪伤。

src: According to The New York Times, Bill Clinton and Hillary Clinton issued a joint statement saying, "We are stunned and shaken by today's shooting at the Arkansas Democratic Party where our good friend and fellow Democrat Bill Gwatney was critically wounded ...
ref: 据纽约时报报道，比尔·克林顿和希拉里·克林顿发表了一份联合声明，称：“我们对今天阿肯色州民主党发生的枪击案感到吃惊和震动，我们的好朋友、民主党同事比尔·格瓦特尼在枪击案中受了重伤……。”

src: Bill is not only a strong chairman of Arkansas' Democratic Party, but he is also a cherished friend and confidante."
ref: 比尔不仅是阿肯色州民主党的一位强有力的主席，也是一位珍贵的朋友和知己。“。

src: Gwatney was also a car dealership owner and former state senator.
ref: 格瓦特尼还当过汽车经销商和州参议员。

src: David Hempleman-Adams left St. John's at approximately 9:30 p.m. local time on July 2, 2007 from St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador in a small helium filed balloon in an attempt to make the Trans-Atlantic crossing in the smallest balloon ever to make such a crossing.
ref: 当地时间2007年7月2日大约在晚上9：30，大卫·亨普尔曼-亚当斯离开圣约翰。乘坐小氦气球从圣约翰、纽芬兰和拉布拉多出发，他试图用有史以来最小气球横渡大西洋。

src: The final destination of the landing is not known and will be determined as the flight nears its end.
ref: 着陆的最终目的地尚不清楚，将在飞行接近尾声时才能确定。

src: The craft is made of light weight material with just enough space for necessary equipment and cooking implements.
ref: 这个氦气球是由重量轻的材料制成，刚好有足够的空间放置必要的设备和烹饪工具。

src: The basket is small and has openings in the side for Hempleman-Adams to extend his legs as he sleeps.
ref: 气球的篮子很小，一边有开口，可以让亨普尔曼-亚当斯在睡觉时伸展腿。

src: Hempleman-Adams is hoping to make the crossing in three to four days and reach Europe by July 5 or 6th.
ref: 亨普尔曼-亚当斯希望在三到四天内完成穿越，并于7月5日或6日到达欧洲。

src: Russian president Dmitriy Medvedev met with the Khaled Meshaal, leader of the Hamas group, earlier this week in Syria, prompting criticism from Israel.
ref: 本周早些时候，俄罗斯总统德米特里·梅德韦杰夫在叙利亚会见了哈马斯组织的领导人哈立德·马沙尔，这引发了以色列的批评。

src: Medvedev, during the meeting, had encouraged Hamas to reconciliate with rival Fatah; a spokeswoman quoted him as saying that "no one" should be left out of the peace process.
ref: 梅德韦杰夫在会谈中鼓励哈马斯组织与对手法塔赫和解；一位发言人援引他的话说，“任何人”都不应被排除在和平进程之外。

src: He also requested that an Israeli soldier captured by Hamas in 2006, Gilad Shalit, be released, although this was refused by Hamas, who says that Shalit wouldn't be released unless there was an "honourable" prisoner exchange with Israel.
ref: 他还要求释放2006年被哈马斯组织抓获的以色列士兵吉拉德·沙利特，尽管哈马斯组织拒绝了这一要求，称除非与以色列进行“体面的”囚犯交换，否则沙利特不会被释放。

src: Shortly before his conversation with Meshaal, Medvedev also held a meeting with Syrian president Bashar al-Assad.
ref: 在与马沙尔会谈前不久，梅德韦杰夫还与叙利亚总统巴沙尔·阿萨德举行了会晤。

src: A statement by the Israeli foreign ministry read: "Hamas is a terror organization whose declared goal is the destruction of the state of Israel.
ref: 以色列外交部的一份声明称：“哈马斯是一个恐怖组织，其宣称的目标是摧毁以色列国。

src: Hamas is responsible for the murder of hundreds of innocent civilians, among them immigrants from the Soviet Union and also Russian citizens.
ref: 哈马斯杀害了数百名无辜平民，其中包括来自苏联的移民和俄罗斯公民。

src: "Israel has always stood by Russia in its struggle against the Chechnyan terrorism.
ref: “以色列一直支持俄罗斯反对车臣恐怖主义的斗争。

src: We expect the same attitude when we are talking about the Hamas terrorism against Israel."
ref: 我们希望在谈到反对以色列的恐怖主义哈马斯组织时，俄罗斯持有同样的态度。”

src: Ha'aretz, an Israeli newspaper, described the meeting as being "a surprise" for the country.
ref: 以色列报纸“国土报”称，这次会议对以色列来说是“一个意外”。

src: Andrei Nesterenko, a spokesman for the Russian foreign ministry, responded to Israel's comments, saying: "Hamas is not an artificial structure.
ref: 俄罗斯外交部发言人安德烈·涅斯特延科对以色列的言论做出回应，称：“哈马斯组织不是一个人为组织。

src: It is a movement that draws on the trust and sympathy of a large number of Palestinians.
ref: 它一场依靠大量巴勒斯坦人的信任和同情发起的运动。

src: "It is known that all other participants of the Middle East quartet are also in some sort of contact with Hamas leadership, although for some unknown reason they are shy to publicly admit it."
ref: “众所周知，中东四方的其他所有参与者也与哈马斯领导层进行了某种形式的接触，尽管出于某种未知的原因，他们不愿公开承认这一点。”

src: Only a few countries in Europe, including Russia, maintain ties with Hamas; the European Union and the United States regard it as a terrorist organisation.
ref: 欧洲只有几个国家，包括俄罗斯在内，与哈马斯保持联系；欧盟和美国将哈马斯视为恐怖组织。

src: Saturday evening, at approximately 7:00 p.m. PST on Mt. Washington in Los Angeles, California, a brush fire broke out on the southwestern side of the hill.
ref: 周六晚上太平洋标准时7点左右。在加利福尼亚州洛杉矶的华盛顿山西南侧的小山上的灌木丛发生大火。

src: Firefighters were on the scene by 8:30 p.m. with fire trucks, paramedic units, surveillance helicopters, and water-equipped helicopters.
ref: 消防员携带消防车、辅助医疗单位、监视直升机以及装备水的直升机在晚上8：30到达现场。。

src: Two fire trucks blasted water at the blaze from higher up on the mountain, while every minute or so, a water-equipped helicopter would swoop down over the flames and release its payload.
ref: 两辆消防车从山上更高的地方向大火喷水，而每隔一分钟左右，一架装有水的直升机就会俯冲下来喷水。

src: At the top of the hill, there were five fire trucks and one paramedic unit; the three main entrances to the mountain were barricaded off by fire trucks.
ref: 山顶上有五辆消防车和一支救护部队，三个主要的登山口被消防车封住了。

src: By approximately 9:15 p.m., the flame was entirely extinguished, thanks mainly to the water-equipped helicopters.
ref: 到了晚上9：15左右，火焰完全熄灭了，这主要归功于装备水的直升机。

src: Firefighters were offering bystanders bottles of water and Gatorade to help combat the effects of standing near an open flame.
ref: 消防队员为旁边的人提供瓶装水和佳得乐，以帮助消除站在明火附近的影响。

src: Three are dead after a tornado hit Cincinnati, a small town in Arkansas, about three miles from Oklahoma’s border.
ref: 一场龙卷风袭击了距离俄克拉荷马州边境三英里的阿肯色州小镇辛辛那提，造成了三人死亡。

src: Around 6:00 local time, on Friday, the system, fed by warm winter air, caused several injuries, damaging the power grid.
ref: 当地时间周五6点左右，由冬季暖空气造成的龙卷风，造成数人受伤，并破坏了电网。

src: Josh Howerton, the county’s sheriff’s dispatcher, stated that the storm touched down near the town’s center.
ref: 县长的调度员乔希·豪顿表示，风暴在市中心附近登陆。

src: A tornado warning for Cincinnati and nearby towns was issued by the Tulsa weather center nine minutes before the storm struck.
ref: 风暴来袭前九分钟，塔尔萨天气中心向辛辛那提及附近城镇发布了龙卷风警报。

src: "Any time you have a significant change in air mass there is going to be unsettled weather marking the two different air masses," said Joe Sellers, a meteorologist from the National Weather Service in Oklahoma.
ref: 俄克拉何马州国家气象局的气象学家乔·塞勒斯说：“每当空气质量发生重大变化时，就会形成出现两个不同气团的不稳定天气。”

src: Alain Corneau, a French film director, has died at the age of 67.
ref: 法国电影导演阿兰·科诺去世，享年67岁。

src: Born on August 7, 1943, Corneau's first interest was music.
ref: 他出生于1943年8月7日，科诺的第一个兴趣是音乐。

src: Before the success of his first film, Corneau attempted to make a documentary about New York and an adaptation of a novel.
ref: 在他的第一部电影取得成功之前，科诺试图拍摄一部关于纽约的纪录片，并改编一部小说。

src: After working as assistant director on L'Aveu with Costa Gavras he directed his first film in 1973, France, Inc.
ref: 1973年，在与科斯塔·加夫拉斯合作担任《大冤狱》助理导演后，他执导了他的第一部电影《法国公司》。

src: Corneau's other films include La Menace, Fort Saganne, and the highly successful Tous les matins du monde.
ref: 科诺的其他电影包括《威胁》、《沙岗堡》和非常成功的《世界的每一个早晨》。

src: Tous les matins du monde received 11 César Award nominations and won seven of them.
ref: 《世界的每一个早晨》获得了11项塞凯撒奖提名，并赢得了其中7项提名。

src: The awards included Best Film, Best Director, and Best Music.
ref: 包括最佳影片奖、最佳导演奖和最佳配乐奖。

src: Corneau said in a 1992 interview in the New York Times that "Many people got emotional about this film, and that made it possible for it to escape cult status."
ref: 科诺在1992年接受《纽约时报》采访时说，“许多人被这部电影感动，这使得它有可能摆脱盲目崇拜。”

src: French President Nicolas Sarkozy commented on the death of Corneau.
ref: 法国总统萨科齐对科诺之死发表评论。

src: He said "Corneau was a courageous man and a great director."
ref: 他说：“科诺是一个勇敢的人和也是一个伟大的导演。”

src: Corneau was set to appear at the Toronto Film Festival in September.
ref: 科诺本打算出席九月的多伦多电影节。

src: Caloundra lead Glasshouse by 153 runs at stumps on day two of the 2010 Sunshine Coast, Australia division one cricket grand final.
ref: 2010年阳光海岸澳大利亚赛区板球总决赛第二天，卡伦德拉领导玻璃房队获得153分。

src: "I think the nerves of a grand final gets to you too.
ref: “我想总决赛的紧张情绪也会影响到你。”

src: You try and put it in the back of your mind but it’s still there,” Glasshouse captain Brett Milini said.
ref: “即使你试着把紧张放在你的脑后，但它仍然在那里”，玻璃房队队长布雷特·米里尼说。

src: Caloundra were all out in their first inning for 193.
ref: 卡伦德拉队在第一轮全力以赴得到了193分的成绩。

src: I thought 250 was a par score and I thought we were in with a big chance,” Milini said.
ref: “我以为会250分打平，我想我们有一个很大的机会得到250分”，米利尼说。

src: "If we were good enough, we should have got that pretty easy but we didn’t bat well today."
ref: “如果我们足够好的话，我们本来可以很容易地做到这一点，但我们今天的击球并不好。”

src: Caloundra rounded out day two at six out for fifty seven, leaving Glasshouse an outside chance of snatching the championship.
ref: 卡伦德拉队在第二天57投6中的成绩结束了比赛，这使玻璃房队获得夺取冠军的意外良机。

src: “We’ve given ourselves another chance but if we bat like we did in the first innings, we’re already gone,” he said.
ref: “我们给了自己另一次机会，但如果我们像第一轮那样击球，我们就已经出局了，”他说。

src: “It should be a real good game, it’s interesting cricket.”
ref: “这应该是一场真正精彩的比赛，是一场有趣的板球比赛。”

src: Results for the second division, third B division, southern fourth division and fifth division traditional grand finals have not been accessible to Wikinews as of this report
ref: 截至本报告，维基新闻还无法获得第二区、第三B区、南部第四区和第五区传统的总决赛的结果。

src: A minimum of 85 Hindu pilgrims have been killed in India and 64 injured after their lorry and trailer plunged 24m (80ft) into a river gorge late last night.
ref: 昨天半夜，印度教朝圣者们的卡车和拖车坠入了24米（80英尺）的河谷，在印度当地造成至少85名死亡，64人受伤。

src: Approximately 150 people were on board when the driver lost control on a sharp bend near the village of Nagbavji, Rajasthan, smashing through a concrete crash barrier and continuing down into the valley, coming to rest inverted.
ref: 当时车上约有150人，司机在拉贾斯坦邦那格巴基村附近的一个急转弯处失控，冲破了混凝土防撞墙，直接掉进了山谷，车子整个发生了颠倒。

src: An overnight rescue operation was initiated, removing both survivors and bodies of the dead from the wreck, with the aid of cranes and spotlights.
ref: 在吊车和聚光灯的帮助下，通宵的营救行动开始了，从失事车辆上救出了幸存者并找到了遇难者的尸体。

src: Ambulances and medical teams rushed to the scene from surrounding areas.
ref: 救护车和医疗队从周围地区赶到现场。

src: Of the 64 who were hospitalised, three are reported to be in critical condition.
ref: 据报，在64名住院病人中，3人伤势严重。

src: The Press Trust of India reported that as many as 130 were injured, and Al Jazeera reported that there may have been 200 people on board.
ref: 印度报业托拉斯报道说，有多达130人受伤，半岛电视台报道说，车上可能有200人。

src: It is believed the death toll could rise still further, as many people remain trapped beneath the trailer.
ref: 相信死亡人数还会进一步上升，因为仍有许多人被困在拖车下面。

src: The truck was a 12-wheeled model designed for hauling shipping containers, and was carrying pilgrims from three nearby villages Shiwal, Madri and Bhawa.
ref: 这是一辆12轮的卡车，是为运输集装箱而设计的，当时卡车运载着来自附近三个村庄什瓦、马得利和巴瓦的朝圣者。

src: The driver had offered to take them to their destination for free, a practise common in India, despite the fact that such trucks are not safe for passenger transport, being designed primarily as freight transporters.
ref: 司机主动提出免费送他们到目的地，这种行为在印度很常见，尽管这种卡车主要是作为货物运输设计的，在客运方面并不安全。

src: The vehicle had been destined for the temple of Ramdev, a site considered by both Hindus and Muslims as being of high spiritual significance.
ref: 这辆车的目的地是拉姆德夫神庙，印度教徒和穆斯林都认为这一地点具有高度的精神意义。

src: The temple is the subject of an annual ten-day pilgrimage every September, which begins on September 13, although most of the 250,000 pilgrims who flock to the site arrive several days in advance of the festival.
ref: 这座寺庙是每年九月十天朝圣节的去处，朝圣于九月十三日开始，尽管25万名朝圣者中的大多数人是在节日前几天到达这里的。

src: The Chief Minister of Rajasthan Vasundhara Raje visited the three villages in which the victims resided.
ref: 拉贾斯坦邦首席部长瓦苏拉达·拉吉访问了受害者居住的三个村庄。

src: The local government has initiated a full inquiry into the disaster.
ref: 当地政府已开始对这场灾难进行全面调查。

src: The ringleaders of the so-called Bali Nine were today sentenced to death by a Denpasar court.
ref: 所谓“巴厘岛九人”的头目今天被登巴萨法院判处死刑。

src: Andrew Chan received the news via translators at about 3:45 p.m. AEDT, and Myuran Sukumaran was sentenced at about 4:50 p.m. AEDT.
ref: 澳大利亚时间下午3点45分左右，安德鲁·陈通过翻译收到了这一消息。迈兰·苏库马兰则于澳大利亚时间下午4点50分被判刑。

src: The two were charged with attempting to smuggle 8.3 kg of heroin from Bali to Australia.
ref: 两人被指控企图从巴厘岛走私8.3公斤海洛因到澳大利亚。

src: The Australian Federal Police have been criticised for allowing the Bali Nine to travel to Indonesia, where it was known they could face the death penalty.
ref: 澳大利亚联邦警察因允许“巴厘岛九人”前往印度尼西亚而受到批评，因为警方已知在那里他们可能会被判处死刑。

src: Yesterday two other drug mules, Renae Lawrence and Scott Rush, were sentenced to life imprisonment.
ref: 昨天，另两名毒贩雷纳·劳伦斯和斯科特·拉什被判处终身监禁。

src: Chan was alleged to be the mastermind of the operation, and Myuran was alleged to be an enforcer.
ref: 据称，陈是这次行动的策划者，而迈兰则是执行者。

src: Chan, who claimed to have rediscovered his Christian faith, prayed for divine intervention prior to the sentence being handed down.
ref: 陈声称已经重新发现了他的基督教信仰，判决前他祈祷请求神的干预。

src: Chan fell over after jostling with a media scrum, and Sukumaran threw a bottle of water at the media.
ref: 陈在与媒体的推撞中摔倒，苏库马兰向媒体扔了一瓶水。

src: Donald Rothwell, a Professor of International Law at the University of Sydney, has said that, unlike countries such as Singapore, it may not be long before the two are executed.
ref: 悉尼大学国际法教授唐纳德·罗思韦尔表示，与新加坡等国不同，这两个人可能很快就会被处决。

src: "The Indonesian judicial system is one in which death sentences are often carried out very quickly," he said.
ref: 他说：“印尼的司法制度中，死刑判决往往执行得非常迅速。”

src: "So unlike the situation of Van Nguyen in Singapore, where an appeal process and a clemency process played out over quite some time, this may not be the situation in Bali."
ref: “因此，与在新加坡的阮万情况不同，在那里上诉程序和宽大处理程序都经过了相当长的一段时间。巴厘岛的情况可能不是这样的。”

src: Foreign Affairs Minister Alexander Downer told parliament today that he had made a direct request to the Indonesian government that the death penalty not be imposed.
ref: 外交部长唐纳今天在议会上表示，他已经向印尼政府提出了不判处死刑的直接要求。

src: "On the 18th of December last year, I wrote to the Indonesian Attorney-General reminding him that the Australian Government was opposed to the death sentence and we didn't want to see, in the context of the Bali nine, any of the Australians sentenced to death," he said.
ref: 他说：“去年12月18日，我写信给印度尼西亚总检察长，提醒他，澳大利亚政府反对判处死刑，我们不希望在巴厘岛九人案中看到任何被判处死刑的澳大利亚人。”

src: In Bali the death sentence is carried out by firing squad.
ref: 在巴厘岛，死刑由行刑队执行。

src: Australia's Allan Davis won the 2009 Tour Down Under professional road cycling race.
ref: 澳大利亚选手艾伦·戴维斯在2009年职业公路自行车赛中赢得了巡回赛冠军。

src: Sprint specialist Davis completed Sunday's final stage in the main pack to maintain the lead he had built up in time bonuses from sprint wins earlier in the race.
ref: 冲刺能手戴维斯完成了周日主赛的最后阶段比赛从而保持他在赛前早些时候冲刺胜利所带来的领先优势。

src: 122 cyclists completed the six day race around a circuit starting and ending at Adelaide, South Australia.
ref: 122名骑手在南澳大利亚州阿德莱德的一条赛道上完成了为期六天的比赛。

src: American cyclist Lance Armstrong also participated in the race, his first professional bike race since the 2005 Tour de France.
ref: 美国自行车选手兰斯·阿姆斯特朗也参加了这场比赛，这是他自2005年参加环法自行车赛以来的第一次职业自行车比赛。

src: It is not clear if the seven-time Tour de France winner intended to compete for the general classification, but he did make an unsuccessful breakaway on Sunday in pursuit of a stage victory.
ref: 目前尚不清楚这位七次获得环法自行车赛冠军的选手是否打算参加分类比赛的争夺，但他确实在周日为追求阶段赛的胜利而进行了一次失败的突破。

src: Despite several attacks over the week, Armstrong placed 29th in the general classification.
ref: 尽管这一周发起了几次追击，但阿姆斯特朗在总分排名中排在第29位。

src: The Philippine military said today that gunmen have seized at least 75 people, most of them schoolchildren, after a raid on a remote elementary school in the southern Philippines.
ref: 今天菲律宾军方称，持枪歹徒在袭击菲律宾南部一所偏远的小学后，至少75人被解救，其中大部分是小学生。

src: Military officials said that about fifteen gunmen from the Manobo tribe abducted some of the residents of a village on the Mindanao island on Thursday.
ref: 军方官员说，周四大约十五名来自马诺博部落的枪手绑架了棉兰老岛一个村庄的一些居民。

src: The group, reportedly armed with M-14 and M-16 rifles, captured four teachers and the school principal of the New Maasim Elementary School, and an unknown number of students.
ref: 据报告，该团伙携带M-14和M-16步枪，俘虏了新马西姆小学的四名教师和校长以及许多学生。

src: The seizure occurred shortly after the flag ceremony, when they were due to start classes.
ref: 袭击是在升旗仪式后不久进行的，当时他们正准备上课。

src: Two foresters for the Department of Environment and Natural Resources were also taken hostage.
ref: 环境和自然资源部的两名林业人员也被扣为人质。

src: Negotiations are being made to release the captives, according to a local police chief.
ref: 据当地一位警察局长说，目前正在进行释放俘虏的谈判。

src: We are trying to find out how the others can be released," said Lino Calingasan to the Reuters news agency.
ref: 我们正在努力想办法如何解救其他人，“利诺·贾林桑对路透社说。

src: Local police have filed charges against the suspected kidnappers, however, they reported that the gunmen didn't seem to want to hurt or kill the hostages.
ref: 当地警方已对涉嫌绑架者提出指控，但他们报告说，持枪歹徒似乎并不想伤害或杀害人质。

src: Officials said that the gunmen appear to be using them as human shields to escape.
ref: 官员说，持枪歹徒似乎打算利用他们作为人盾逃跑。

src: The southern Philippines suffers from frequent banditry, loosely supervised government-armed militias, and Muslim and communist insurgents.
ref: 菲律宾南部经常发生土匪活动，政府武装民兵监督松散，穆斯林和共产主义叛乱分子也深受其害。

src: Last month, 57 people in an election convoy were massacred in the southern part of the Maguindanao province, which has since been placed under martial law.
ref: 上个月，一个选举车队中的57人在马京达瑙省南部遭到屠杀。马京达瑙省自那以后一直处于戒严状态。

src: On Tuesday, the United States Senate Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs's Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations held a hearing titled "Credit Card Practices: Unfair Interest Rate Increases."
ref: 周二，美国参议院国土安全委员会和政府事务常设调查小组委员会举行了一次听证会，主题为“信用卡职能：不公平的利率上升”。

src: The hearing examined the circumstances under which credit card issuers may increase the interest rates of cardholders who are in compliance with the terms of their credit cards.
ref: 听证会研究了在何种情况下，发卡机构可提高符合信用卡条款的持卡人的利率。

src: Subcommittee Chairman Carl Levin said in his opening statement: "Today's focus is on credit card issuers who hike the interest rates of cardholders who play by the rules — meaning those folks who pay on time, pay at least the minimum amount due, and wake up one day to find their interest rate has gone through the roof — again, not because they paid late or exceeded the credit limit, but because their credit card issuer decided they should be 'repriced'."
ref: 小组委员会主席卡尔·莱文在开幕词中说：“今天会议的重点是信用卡发行者，他们提高了遵守规则的持卡人的利率，这意味着那些按时付款、至少支付最低到期金额的人，有一天醒来发现他们的利率已经过高，不是因为他们迟交或者超过了信贷限额，而是因为他们的信用卡发行商决定‘重新定价’。”

src: Present to testify on behalf of credit card issuers were Roger C. Hochschild of Discover Financial Services, Bruce L. Hammonds of Bank of America Corporation, and Ryan Schneider of Capital One Financial Corporation.
ref: 出席为信用卡发行人作证的有发现金融有限公司的罗杰·霍赫希尔德、美国银行公司的布鲁斯·哈蒙兹和第一资本金融公司的瑞恩·施耐德。

src: Much of the 90 minute hearing focused on specific cases where interest rates were raised, allegedly because credit scores of the debtor dropped, and not because they were delinquent or otherwise behind on payments.
ref: 90分钟的听证会主要集中在提高利率的具体案件上，据称是因为债务人的信用评分下降，而不是因为他们拖欠或以其他方式拖欠付款。

src: According to Levin, this practice made it so that almost all payments went towards finance charges with almost none toward repaying the principal.
ref: 根据莱文的说法，这种做法使得几乎所有的还款都用来支付财务费用，而几乎没有一笔用于偿还本金。

src: This, he felt, is an unfair practice, as the credit card companies were negligent in informing their customers of the rate hikes and the reason for such hikes.
ref: 他认为，这是一种不公平的做法，因为信用卡公司在告知客户加息及其原因方面存在疏忽。

src: The collective credit card debt of Americans totals an estimated US$900 billion.
ref: 美国人的信用卡债务总额估计为9000亿美元。

src: Issuers have come under pressure to disclose their policies in regards to setting fees and interest rates.
ref: 发行人受到压力，必须披露他们在拟定收费和利率方面的政策。

src: The US Truth in Lending Act requires that terms of a loan be set forth up front.
ref: 美国的“贷款真理法案”要求贷款条款必须事先明确。

src: Fluctuating interest rates on credit cards would, on the surface, appear to violate this act.
ref: 从表面上看，信用卡利率波动似乎违反了这一规定。

src: Roger C. Hochschild disagreed, arguing that "every card transaction is a new extension of credit ...
ref: 罗杰·霍赫希尔德不同意这一观点，他认为“每一次信用卡交易都是信贷的新延伸……。

src: This makes it difficult — and risky — to underwrite, and price, the loan based solely on the borrower's credit-worthiness at the time of application [for the card]."
ref: 这使得仅仅根据借款人在申请【信用卡】时的信用价值来担保贷款和确定贷款价格变得困难-而且是有风险的。“。

src: Ryan Schneider, agreed: "The ability to modify the terms of a credit card agreement to accommodate changes over time to the economy or the credit-worthiness of consumers must be preserved."
ref: 瑞安·施耐德表示同意：“必须保留修改信用卡协议条款的能力，以适应随着时间推移带来的经济或消费者信用价值的变化”。

src: "Attempts to interfere with the market here ... will inevitably result in less credit being offered," warned Bruce Hammonds.
ref: “试图干预这里的市场……将不可避免地导致提供的信贷减少”，布鲁斯·汉蒙兹警告说。

src: All three credit card executives also mentioned an ongoing Federal Reserve System review of credit card rules that already proposes a 45-day notification ahead of any rate changes.
ref: 这三种信用卡的高管还提到，美联储正在对信用卡规则进行审查，该审查已提议在利率变化前提前45天发出通知。

src: Included in the criticism was the practice of mailing checks to card-holders, failing to notify applicants that obtaining additional cards could lower their credit score and raise their rates, and "ambushing" card-holders with raised rates.
ref: 批评了包括将支票邮寄给持卡人，不通知申请人办理额外的卡会降低他们的信用评分和提高他们的利率，以及用提高的利率“伏击”持卡人的做法。

src: Ranking minority member of the subcommittee, Norm Coleman said, "families find themselves ensnared in a seemingly inescapable web of credit card debt.
ref: 小组委员会的少数党成员诺姆·科尔曼说：“每个家庭会发现自己陷入了似乎无法逃避的信用卡债务网。

src: They particularly report being saddled with interest rates that skyrocketed on them seemingly out of the blue."
ref: 他们尤其谈到，他们正背负着突如其来的利率飙升的重担”。

src: A peaceful protest in Sarajevo, lasting for several weeks so far, was ignited by a post on an online discussion board, Sarajevo-X.
ref: 在萨拉热窝举行的一场和平抗议活动已经持续数周。这次活动的导火索是Sarajevo X在线留言板上的一个帖子。

src: In a post named "Patriotism" one user, with nickname Stolac92, expressed his dissatisfaction with Bosnia today, writing among other things on December 22: "My heart hurts.
ref: 有一个网名叫做Stolac92的用户，在其标题为“爱国主义”的帖子中表示了对当今波斯尼亚的不满。他于12月22日写道：“我心痛。

src: But what hurts the most is that we are quiet, we are tolerating, forgiving instead of doing something about it."
ref: 但是，最令人伤心的是，我们在容忍、宽恕，而不是就此采取某种行动”。

src: After receiving support from other forum members, the user proposed gathering in front of the Assembly building every day, starting from 5pm.
ref: 在获得其他论坛成员的支持以后，该用户建议，每天下午5点钟开始在议会大厦前集会。

src: The protests started the same weekend, and had been lasting since, with couple to several dozen people attending.
ref: 抗议活动就在那个周末开始，并一直持续到现在。出席人数从数人到数十人不等。

src: Forum members decided they will not support any particular political party, but to work for Bosnia and Herzegovina without political ethnic entities and to support policies which are fair to all citizens and punish criminals.
ref: 论坛成员决定，他们不支持任何具体政党，不组成政治民族实体，而是为波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那工作，支持对全体公民一视同仁并惩罚罪犯的政策。

src: They decided to use an open palm with a Bosnian map on it for their symbol, with word Dosta (Enough) as their slogan.
ref: 他们决定在手掌上画波斯尼亚地图，以此作为运动的象征符号，并以Dosta（够了）为口号。

src: Bosnia and Herzegovina has been divided in two ethnic entities since the end of the war, the Serbian Republic and Federation of Bosniaks and Croats.
ref: 战争结束后，波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维纳那被分解成两个民族实体，即塞尔维亚共和国和波斯尼亚与克罗地亚联邦。

src: Economic progress has been slow and created disparity between people.
ref: 经济发展缓慢，并形成了民族差异。

src: A bomb explosion on a bus in Myanmar (alternatively Burma) has killed a 55-year-old man and left another man wounded.
ref: 在缅甸的一辆公共汽车上发生炸弹爆炸，导致一名55岁老妇死亡，另有一名男子受伤。

src: The explosion occurred yesterday at 8:50 am local time (0220 GMT) as the bus traveled to Yangon, but state media has only posted news of the attack today.
ref: 爆炸发生于当地时间昨日上午8：50（世界时02：20）。当时这辆汽车正驶往仰光。但是该国媒体直到今天才发布了有关这次袭击的消息。

src: The deceased was identified only as Khant by the New Light of Myanmar, the Burmese government-owned daily newspaper.
ref: 根据缅甸政府日报《缅甸新光》的报道，只知道亡者的名字叫“坎”。

src: The article said that the injured man was 46-year-old Pa Pa and that he received a stomach injury.
ref: 该文章说，伤者是46岁的帕帕，伤在腹部。

src: The bus had 35 passengers traveling from Kyaukkyi, and was near Daik Oo, some 85 miles from its destination.
ref: 这辆公交车从皎支发车时，车上有35名乘客，爆炸地接近代库，距目的地85英里。

src: The bombing was blamed on insurgents, but it is unclear which group is responsible.
ref: 爆炸被归咎于叛乱分子，但尚不清楚哪个组织应该为此负责。

src: The ruling military junta is subject to attacks from a number of extremist groups opposed to its rule.
ref: 执政的军政府可能会遭到多个反对其统治的极端群体的攻击。

src: A British High Court judge has ruled that Pringles are not a potato snack and therefore not subject to a 17.5% tax.
ref: 英国高等法院的一名法官裁定，“品客”不是马铃薯小吃，所以不得对之征收百分之17.5的增值税。

src: The judge, Justice Nicholas Warren, overruled a Value Added Tax (VAT) Tribunal decision that imposed the 17.5% tax which is also applied on other potato products.
ref: 法官尼科拉斯·沃伦驳回了增值税（VAT）法庭关于征收百分之17.5增值税的决定。该决定亦适用于其他马铃薯产品。

src: Pringles' owner Procter & Gamble had claimed at a ruling in May that Pringles do not feel, look, or taste like a crisp.
ref: “品客”拥有者P&G公司在5月的裁决过程中声称，“品客”无论从触觉、视觉还是味觉角度来判断，都不是薯片。

src: Justice Warren ruled that since Pringles are only 42% potato, it is exempt from VAT.
ref: 法官沃伦裁定，由于“品客”只含有百分之42的马铃薯成分，应该对它免征增值税。

src: A deadly hotel bombing in Mogadishu, the capital of Somalia, has killed at least fifteen people, including three Somali Cabinet ministers, earlier today.
ref: 今天早些时候，索马里首都摩加迪沙一家酒店发生致命爆炸，至少15人死亡，包括3名索马里内阁部长。

src: The blast targeted a university graduation ceremony being attended by a number of government officials.
ref: 这次爆炸所针对的目标是有多名政府官员出席的大学毕业典礼。

src: The Shamo Hotel was hosting a graduation ceremony for Benadir University.
ref: 沙摩酒店当时正在举办贝纳迪尔大学的毕业典礼。

src: Eyewitnesses reported that a suicide bomber gained access to the venue dressed as a woman, donning a full abaya and a veil.
ref: 目击者报告说，一名自杀炸弹携带者男扮女装，身着罩袍和面纱，因而得以进入会场。

src: The attacker was wearing an explosive strapped to his torso, but was not patted down by security.
ref: 袭击者将炸药用带子捆绑在身上，安检搜身的时候未能查出来。

src: The director of Median Hospital, Ali Yusuf, commented that "forty people with shrapnel wounds, including students and medical doctors, have been hospitalized today.
ref: 密迪安医院院长，阿里·优素福表示：“今天医院接收了40名被弹片击伤的人员，其中包括学生和医生”。

src: Former Islamic Courts Union members at the scene identified the bomber, whose head and face had been completely shaven, as a member of al-Shabab, the ultra-conservative Islamist group believed to have links to al-Qaeda.
ref: 在场的前伊斯兰法庭联盟的成员们认出了炸弹携带者，其头部和面部已经完全被削掉。他是“青年”组织的成员。据信，这一极端保守主义的伊斯兰教团体与基地组织有关系。

src: Somali Health Minister Qamar Aden Ali, Education Minister Ahmed Abdullahi Waayeel, and Higher Education Minister Ibrahim Hassan Adow were killed in the attack on Hotel.
ref: 索马里卫生部长卡玛尔·亚丁·阿里、教育部长阿赫迈德·阿卜杜拉希·瓦阿伊尔和高教部长易卜拉辛·哈桑·埃多在这次酒店袭击中遇难。

src: Abdulkadir Mohamed Osman, the Somali presidency's director of information, commented on the incident.
ref: 索马里总统信息主管阿卜杜卡迪尔·默罕默德·奥斯曼对事件发表了评论。

src: The blast rocked inside the hotel, killing three ministers and wounding another one."
ref: 爆炸在酒店内剧烈震动，造成三名部长死亡，另一人受伤。

src: Adow served as the foreign secretary of the insurgent Islamic Courts Union when it took power in 2006.
ref: 当反叛的伊斯兰法庭联盟于2006年掌权时，埃多曾担任外交部长。

src: The Somali minister for sports is also reported to be hospitalized and in critical condition.
ref: 据报道，索马里体育部长伤势严重，也在医院接受治疗。

src: Mohamed Mohamoud, an attending graduate of the ceremony, said that he personally saw the remains of the health minister on the ground, as well as the corpses of other government officials.
ref: 参加典礼的一名学生穆罕默德·马哈茂德说，他亲眼看见卫生部长的遗体躺在地上，还有其他政府官员的尸体。

src: They have been studying in such a horrific environment, and today they passed away without benefiting from their education.
ref: 他们在如此恐怖的环境里学习，今天，他们还没有来得及从教育中获益就死去了。

src: Two journalists, a reporter for Radio Shabelle and a cameraman with al-Arabia TV, were also found dead from the explosion.
ref: 另外，发现有2名记者也死于这次爆炸。一位是沙贝尔电台的记者，另一位是阿拉伯电视台的摄影师。

src: The National Union of Somali Journalists has issued a statement condemning the attack and expressing outrage at the loss of their colleagues.
ref: 索马里国家记者联盟发表声明对袭击进行谴责，并为同事的死亡而表示愤慨。

src: Somalia is one of the world's most dangerous places for journalists to work.
ref: 对于记者来说，索马里是世界上最危险的工作地点之一。

src: Eight have been killed in Somalia since the beginning of 2009.
ref: 自从2009年初以来，已经有8名记者在索马里被害。

src: Hotel Shamo is often chosen by government officials to host events and at one time was a popular lodging option for foreign journalists.
ref: 政府官员经常选择沙摩酒店来举办活动，它在一段时间内还曾经是非常受外国记者欢迎的住宿地点。

src: Recently-released Canadian journalist Amanda Lindhout and Australian photojournalist Nigel Brennan were staying at the hotel before their capture last year.
ref: 最近被释放的加拿大记者阿曼达·林浩特和澳大利亚摄影记者尼杰尔·布伦南在去年被捕之前均住在该酒店。

src: The hotel security staff say that they were kicked out of the room prior to the ceremony, as government security officials wanted sole handling of the event.
ref: 酒店安保人员说，典礼开始之前，他们被撵出房间，因为政府安全官员要独自管理这次活动。

src: The government officials were attending the graduation of 43 students from the local Banadir University.
ref: 这几位政府官员当时正在出席当地贝纳迪尔大学43名学生的毕业典礼。

src: The official death toll from the blast is expected to continue to rise, with some reports indicating that more than 60 people have been found dead.
ref: 预期因爆炸致死的官员名单还会继续增加，因为有些报道表明，已发现的死亡人数已经超过60人。

src: The attack is the latest in a string of incidents linking al-Shabab to common insurgent tactics used by Islamist terrorist groups in other parts of the world.
ref: 这次袭击是“青年”组织制造的一连串事件中的最近一次，其手法与伊斯兰恐怖主义团体在世界其他地区常用的反叛战术有关。

src: Until recently, suicide bombings were an unusual practice in Somalia.
ref: 直到最近，自杀炸弹在索马里还是非常罕见的。

src: In September, al-Shabab claimed responsibility for a bold attack on a meeting between government officials and the African Union peacekeeping mission in Somalia, known as AMISOM, which killed 17 peacekeepers, including the top Burundian commander.
ref: 9月，“青年”组织声称其为针对在索马里举行的政府官员与非盟维和使团（AMISOM）会议而发动的一次大胆袭击负责。那次袭击导致17名维和人员死亡，其中包括布隆迪最高司令官。

src: Two vehicles containing explosives were given entry to the AMISOM base and subsequently blew up.
ref: 2辆载有炸药的汽车被允许进入AMISOM基地并随后被引爆。

src: The rebel group is battling for control of the war-ravaged nation against the Western-backed Transitional Federal Government, led by former Islamic insurgent Sheikh Sharif Sheikh Ahmed.
ref: 叛军集团在前伊斯兰叛军头目谢利夫酋长和阿赫迈德酋长的带领下，与西方支持下的传统联邦政府作战，争夺对这个饱受战乱之国的控制权。

src: Rebel groups control much of southern and central Somalia, as well as significant portions of Mogadishu.
ref: 叛军集团控制了大部分索马里南部和中部地区，还有摩加迪沙的一大部分地区。

src: The government is being bolstered by the continuing presence of the peacekeeping force composed of Ugandans and Burundians.
ref: 政府得到由乌干达和布隆迪军队组成的常驻维和部队的支持。

src: The AMISOM forces are mandated with the protection of key city sites such as the airport, seaport, and presidential palace.
ref: AMISON军队被授权保护城市重要地点的安全，比如机场、海港和总统府。

src: Pakistani officials have said that five attacks on government sites across the country have killed at least forty people.
ref: 巴基斯坦官员说，在全国各地发生了5次针对政府驻地的袭击行动，至少导致40人死亡。

src: The latest attack occurred late on Thursday at a government residential area in Peshawar.
ref: 最近的一次袭击发生在星期四傍晚，攻击目标是白沙瓦市的一个政府住宅区。

src: Officials said they suspect Taliban militants for being responsible for the attacks.
ref: 官员们说，他们怀疑塔利班激进分子应对这些袭击负责。

src: Authorities said that the situation in the eastern city of Lahore was under control, following separate attacks on the country's Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) and two police training centers.
ref: 当局表示，东部城市拉合尔的局势已经得到控制，此前曾发生过针对联邦调查局（FIA）和2座警察训练中心的多次独立袭击。

src: Gunmen with at least one suicide jacket stormed the FIA building at mid-morning.
ref: 上午10点钟左右，持枪歹徒们至少身着一件自杀背心冲进了FIA大楼。

src: The FIA is an agency responsible for investigating matters relating to terrorism and immigration.
ref: FIA是负责调查与恐怖主义和移民相关事宜的机构。

src: Early last year, the building was the target of a suicide truck bomb that killed more than 20 people.
ref: 去年年初，这座大楼曾经遭到自杀式卡车炸弹的攻击，导致20余人死亡。

src: "Reportedly, four men attacked the FIA building and initial reports are that two of them have been killed," said the provincial interior secretary, Nadeem Hassan Asif Punjab.
ref: 该省内务部长纳迪姆·哈桑·阿西夫·庞贾布说：“据报道，有4人攻击了FIA大楼。据最初报告，其中2人被击毙”。

src: Soon after the assault on the FIA began, gunmen targeted two police training centers on the outskirts of Lahore.
ref: 在针对FIA的袭击开始不久，持枪歹徒又将目标转向拉合尔郊外的2座警察训练中心。

src: In the suburb of Manawa, gunmen targeted a center that militants attacked earlier this year.
ref: 在马纳瓦郊区，歹徒们将目标对准了年初曾遭到激进分子袭击的一个中心。

src: In the other incident, attackers with suicide jackets in Bedian climbed over a wall to gain access to the Elite Force Training Center.
ref: 在贝迪安发生的另一次事件中，袭击者身穿自杀背心翻墙进入精锐部队训练中心。

src: It took several hours before security forces were able to gain control of all the sites.
ref: 安全部花费了数小时的时间才控制了全部场地。

src: The attacks in Pakistan's east took place hours after a suicide car bomber targeted a police station at a garrison town about an hour's drive from the northwestern city of Peshawar.
ref: 在一座距西北部城市白沙瓦大约一小时车程的驻防城市中的一个警察局遭到汽车炸弹袭击之后几个小时内，又在巴基斯坦东部发生了这些袭击事件。

src: Speaking to local media, Pakistani Interior Minister Rehman Malik said intelligence agencies had expected attacks on security sites in the country and that authorities will remain on high-alert.
ref: 巴基斯坦内务部长拉赫曼·马利克对当地媒体表示，情报机构曾经预料到有可能对该国安全驻地进行袭击，当局将保持高度警惕。

src: He said the recent violence shows the militants want to bring the frontlines from Pakistan's violent northwest to Punjab province.
ref: 他认为，最近发生的暴力行动表明，激进分子想把战线从巴基斯坦战乱的西北部推进到旁遮普省。

src: On Saturday, militants with ties to Punjab, as well as the South Waziristan tribal region, assaulted the Pakistani army's headquarters in Rawalpindi.
ref: 星期六，与旁遮普和南瓦济里斯坦部落区有联系的激进分子袭击了位于拉瓦尔品第的巴基斯坦陆军司令部。

src: Pakistani intelligence officials believe the attacks are a reaction to the military's raids on South Waziristan.
ref: 巴基斯坦情报官员认为，这些攻击行动是针对军方向南瓦济里斯坦发动袭击而做出的回应。

src: The military is expected to launch a full-scale assault on Taliban militants in the region bordering Afghanistan.
ref: 预期军方将对接壤阿富汗的边境地区的塔利班激进分子发动一场全面进攻。

src: England beat Kenya by 7 wickets (with 60 balls remaining) in the final Group C game in the World Cup at Beausejour Stadium, Gros Islet, Saint Lucia.
ref: 在圣露西亚格罗斯伊雷特的博塞茹尔体育场举行的世界杯C组最后一场比赛中，英格兰队以7次击中三柱门（还剩60个球）的成绩击败肯尼亚队。

src: England will now advance through to the Super 8 stage.
ref: 英格兰将进入超级8强阶段。

src: Rain delayed the start of the match by some two hours, and therefore the match was only a 43 over game.
ref: 因为下雨，比赛推迟了大约2个小时，因此变成了一场43分结束的比赛。

src: Sales of smartphones running the Android operating system have tripled since the beginning of 2010, according to figures released yesterday.
ref: 根据昨天发布的统计数字，自从2010年初以来，采用安卓操作系统的智能手机销售量已经增加了3倍。

src: Market analysts GfK said that "around one in every eight handsets sold in the UK between April and June 2010 on a contract is Android-powered, compared to one in 33 on average between January and March."
ref: GfK集团的市场分析家说：“在2010年4月和6月期间，在英国按合同售出的手机中，几乎每8部中就有1部是采用安卓系统的，而相比之下，在1月和3月期间，平均每33部中才有1部”。

src: Last week, Samsung stepped up the marketing for its latest Android-powered device, the Galaxy S.
ref: 上周，三星加强了最新版安卓系统Galaxy S手机的营销活动。

src: Other Android-powered devices include the Sony Ericsson X10 and the HTC Desire.
ref: 其他安卓系统手机包括Sony Ericsson X10和HTC Desire等。

src: GfK analyst Megan Baldock said to The Guardian: "The figures suggest an increasing number of consumers are now asking for Android handsets by name."
ref: GfK集团的市场分析家梅根·波尔多克告诉《卫报》说：“这些数字表明，现在有越来越多的消费者在指名要求购买安卓手机”。

src: Kuwait might finance a great number of public works in East Timor, in an investment worth 500 million to 600 million dollars, the East Timorese Prime Minister said today.
ref: 东帝汶总理今天说，科威特可能为东帝汶提供大量的公共工程资助，投资价值达到5亿至6亿美元。

src: José Ramos Horta leaves today for an official visit to Kuwait.
ref: 何塞·拉莫斯·霍塔今天前往科威特进行正式访问。

src: "I want to start right now the negotiations process with the Development Fund of Kuwait for the construction of great projects for East Timor's roads, bridges, harbors and airports", Ramos Horta, East Timor's Prime Minister, said.
ref: 东帝汶总理何塞·霍塔说：“我想立刻与科威特发展基金会展开谈判，以便推动东帝汶的道路、桥梁、海港和飞机场等重大项目建设”。

src: "For a project of this magnitude, to carry throughout several years, the amount of money to be spent is about 500 million to 600 million dollars or more.
ref: “对于如此大规模的工程项目来说，需要几年的建设时间，要花费大约5亿至6亿美元，或许更多的资金。

src: We are now waiting a preliminary study made by an Indian company, paid by Kuwait", Ramos Horta added.
ref: 我们正在等待一家印度公司的初步研究结果，由科威特出资”，拉莫斯·霍塔又说道。

src: The East Timorese delegation is composed by the Minister of public works, Odete Victor, and the Minister of energy & mineral resources, José Teixeira.
ref: 在东帝汶代表团的成员中，包括公共工程部长奥蒂特·维克多和能源与矿产资源部长何塞·特谢拉。

src: The visit is part of an invitation by Kuwait's Prime Minister Nasser Al-Mohammed Al-Ahmed Al-Sabah, and includes meetings with the Emir Sabah Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, the crown prince Nawaf Al-Ahmad Al-Jaber Al-Sabah, the Minister of Foreign Affairs Mohammed Sabah Al Salem Al Sabah and representatives of the Development Fund of Kuwait.
ref: 这次访问是科威特总理纳赛尔·艾尔·默罕默德·艾尔·阿赫迈德·艾尔·萨巴赫发出的邀请函中的一个组成部分，包括与埃米尔萨巴赫·艾尔·阿赫迈德·艾尔·贾巴尔·艾尔·萨巴赫、王储纳瓦夫·艾尔·阿赫迈德·艾尔·贾巴尔·艾尔·萨巴赫、外交部长默罕默德·萨巴赫·艾尔·萨勒姆·艾尔·萨巴赫和科威特发展基金会代表们的会晤。

src: This is the second visit to Kuwait in two years by Ramos Horta, an country with who the East Timorese Prime Minister maintains relations with several members of the royal family and of the government.
ref: 这是2年来拉莫斯·霍塔对科威特的第2次访问。这位东帝汶总理与该国多位王室成员和政府官员保持着良好关系。

src: A group of 19 people, including local aborigines and Roads and Traffic Authority (RTA) staff, were sprayed by a crop duster in rural Australia today.
ref: 今天，在澳大利亚农村，一个由19人组成的团队被农作物撒药飞机喷洒了一身农药。该团队成员中包括当地的土著居民和道路交通管理局（RTA）工作人员。

src: They were walking the proposed route of a freeway bypass, looking for sites that may have significance to Aboriginal people.
ref: 他们当时正在一条计划中的高速旁路线路上行走，寻找可能对土著居民有意义的遗址。

src: The freeway bypass will be part of the Hume Highway, near Coolac in south-west New South Wales.
ref: 这条高速旁路将成为位于新南威尔士州西南部库拉克镇附近的休姆高速路的一个组成部分。

src: Police are yet to rule out that the dusting was deliberate.
ref: 警方尚未排除这种可能性，即这次喷洒是蓄意而为。

src: "We don't know whether they knew the people were there or not so we're appealing for anyone who might have witnessed the incident or knows anything about a low-flying crop-duster in the area to contact police," she said.
ref: 她说：“我们不知道他们是否知道有人在那儿，所以呼吁任何目击者或了解当地低空撒药飞机情况的人员与警方联系”。

src: News available via the web does not (as of this writing) detail the effects of the spraying.
ref: （截至本文成稿之时）通过网络传播的消息并没有详细说明喷洒的结果。

src: ABC Online reports that the pilot of the plane may face charges.
ref: 据ABC在线新闻报道，该飞机驾驶员可能会面临指控。

src: Moldovan wine producers took three silver medals at the third annual international contest of wine tasting and judging of strong alcoholic beverages, the "Concours Mondial de Bruxelles 2008".
ref: 摩尔多瓦葡萄酒生产商在“2008年布鲁塞尔国际葡萄酒大赛”上获得3枚银奖。这是第3届年度国际烈性酒精饮料品评大赛。

src: Previously, the event was held in Portugal and in Maastricht in 2007 and will held in Spain next year.
ref: 此前，这项赛事曾于2007年在葡萄牙和马斯特里赫特举办，明年将在西班牙举办。

src: The medals went to the wines produced by the stock company Acorex Wine Holding, Amaro de la Valea Perjei 2003, Pinot Grigio/ Aligote/ Sauvignon Blanc 2005 and Pinot Noir 2005, with the last two being from the Private reserve series.
ref: 获得奖牌的葡萄酒品牌如下：阿克莱斯葡萄酒控股公司生产的Amaro de la Valea Perjei 2003、灰比诺、艾格特、萨维尼翁白葡萄酒2005和黑比诺2005。后2个品牌都是私藏系列。

src: Last year's fourteenth edition of the contest, held in the Netherlands in 2007, Moldovan wines won three gold medals and three silver ones.
ref: 在去年2007年荷兰举办的第14届比赛上，摩尔多瓦葡萄酒夺得3枚金牌和3枚银牌。

src: A Southern Sudan Air Connection aircraft has crashed today in Southern Sudan, killing over a dozen people, including the area's defence minister.
ref: 1架“南苏丹空联”的飞机今天在南苏丹坠毁，导致十几人遇难，其中包括当地的国防部长。

src: There are conflicting reports on how many people were on board and how many died in the Bahr Gazal crash, but at least twenty people were on board.
ref: 关于巴赫加匝尔地区坠机事件中机上人数和死亡人数的报道是相互矛盾的，但是，机上至少乘坐了20人。

src: Some sources suggest nineteen fatalities and two survivors, and others say there were 26 deaths and no survivors; it should be noted that if either of these were correct then there were more than twenty on board.
ref: 一些消息来源表明，有19人死亡，2人幸存，而另一些来源则声称，机上26人全部死亡，无一幸存。应该注意的是，如果这两个说法中有任何一个是正确的，那么机上人数一定不止20人。

src: Lieutenant General Dominic Dim Deng, the area's defence minister, is confirmed to be dead and it is thought at least 19 military officials are now deceased.
ref: 该地区的国防部长多米尼克·蒂姆·登中将已被确认死亡。据认为，目前至少有19名军方官员已经死亡。

src: "The plane had been rented from a charter company and was carrying a delegation of leaders from the (former rebel) Sudan People's Liberation Movement from Wau to the capital Juba," said Luka Mariak, spokesman for the Souther Sudan president Salva Kiir.
ref: 南苏丹总统萨尔瓦·基伊尔的发言人卢卡·马利亚克说：“飞机是从包机公司租赁的，当时正搭载着由苏丹人民解放运动（前叛军）领导人组成的代表团从瓦乌飞往首都朱巴”。

src: This makes the journey around 450 kilometres (290 miles), with the plane crashing in a flat region 375 kilometres (around 220 miles) from Juba.
ref: 航程大约450公里（290英里）。飞机坠毁在离朱巴375公里（大约220英里）远的一个平坦区域。

src: The United Nations said that the United Nations Mission in Sudan (UNMIS) had dispatched a helicopter to assist the emergency response effort.
ref: 联合国表示，驻苏丹的联合国使团（UNMIS）已派遣1架直升机前往协助应急行动。

src: The UN also said that the aircraft was a Beechcraft 1900 and that they would fly in government officials and aviation experts to conduct an investigation.
ref: 联合国还指出，那是一架比奇1900飞机，并且他们将派遣政府官员和航空专家前往调查。

src: Ashraf Jehangir Qazi, UNMIS's Secretary-General's Special Representative, offered his condolences to the government on behalf of both UNMIS and th UN as a whole.
ref: 联合国使团UNMIS秘书长的特别代表-阿什拉夫·贾汗季·卡齐代表使团和联合国向该国政府表示了哀悼。

src: Kiir said in a press conference "Twenty-one passengers were killed and either two or three crew members."
ref: 基伊尔在记者会上说：“21名乘客遇难，还有2名或3名机组人员”。

src: "Two engines failed and there was nothing the pilot could do."
ref: “2部引擎都发生故障，飞行员无能为力”。

src: Justin Yak and his wife are also confirmed to be dead.
ref: 贾斯丁·亚科和他的夫人也已确认死亡。

src: Yak was the minister for cabinet affairs until a 2007 reshuffle left him removed from office.
ref: 亚科曾担任内阁事务部长，直到2007年政府改组的时候才离任。

src: He was an adviser to the president at the time of his death.
ref: 遇难时，他是总统的顾问。

src: Bodies were flown into Juba Airport were relatives waited for hours for news.
ref: 遇难者遗体被飞机送往朱巴机场。他们的家属数小时前就在那里等待消息。

src: UNMIS is expected to fly the bodies on to their nearby airfield, to which there is no public access.
ref: 据预期，联合国使团将把遗体空运到附近的机场，与公众隔绝。

src: The disaster is thought to be an accident caused by mechanical trouble.
ref: 这场灾难被认为是因机械故障而引起的。

src: The pilot had contacted Air Traffic Control (ATC) to report engine problems and requested permission to conduct an emergency landing at nearby Rumbek.
ref: 飞行员曾向空管中心报告机械故障，并要求在附近的隆贝克紧急降落。

src: The Global Polio Eradication Initiative has announced its goal to eradicate Polio from Asia in 2005.
ref: “全球根除脊髓灰质炎行动小组”宣布了该组织将于2005年从亚洲彻底根除脊髓灰质炎的目标。

src: The 16 year old private-public project aims to add Poliomyelitis to the list of childhood diseases which have been eliminated.
ref: 这一成立于16年前的私立公益项目组织致力于将小儿麻痹症列入已被根除的儿童疾病清单。

src: The World Health Organization, Rotary International, the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention and UNICEF are leading the Initiative and coordinating a series of overlapping immunization campaigns in the region.
ref: 世界卫生组织、扶轮国际、美国疾病防控中心和联合国儿童基金会正在带头响应这一建议，并且正在该地区协调一系列相互重叠的免疫行动。

src: In 2004 Afghanistan, India, and Pakistan cut their number of Polio cases by 45%.
ref: 2004年，阿富汗、印度和巴基斯坦将脊髓灰质炎病例减少了百分之45。

src: In 2005 the goal is to cut the number of cases by 100%.
ref: 2005年的目标是减少百分之100。

src: The three countries are the last in Asia to have endemic polio, and the disease is confined to a small number of regions within the country.
ref: 这是亚洲最后3个流行地方性脊髓灰质炎的国家。该疾病已被局限于该国少数几个地区。

src: Only 186 cases were reported in 2004, down from 336 the previous year.
ref: 2004年只接到了186起发病报告，而此前一年则接到了336起。

src: The Indonesian province of Aceh was struck by a 7.5 magnitude earthquake at 3:08 PM local time (8:08 AM GMT).
ref: 当地时间下午3：08（格林威治时间上午8：08），印尼亚齐省发生7.5级地震。

src: The epicentre was 319 km (198 miles) off the coast of Sumatra, close to the island of Simeulue.
ref: 震中距苏门答腊海岸319公里（198英里），在锡默卢岛附近。

src: At least three people have been killed and several buildings have been damaged.
ref: 至少有3人死亡，数座建筑物受损。

src: The same region was hit by an earthquake in 2004, that triggered a tsunami.
ref: 同一地区在2004年也曾遭受地震袭击，并触发海啸。

src: According to local citizens the quake lasted about one minute and was felt in Banda Aceh, the province capital, approximately 300 km (185 mls) away, also in Meulaboh and Gunung Sitoli on Nias island.
ref: 根据当地居民的说法，地震持续了约1分钟。大约300公里（185英里）外的省会班达亚齐市有震感，尼亚斯岛的米拉务和古农西托利也有震感。

src: The U.S. Geological Survey, that reported the earthquake, says that no local tsunami warning has been issued.
ref: 美国地质调查局报告了这次地震，并指出，当地尚未发布海啸警报。

src: Minutes after the quake hit, the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center issued a warning that parts of the Sumatran coast were at risk of a possible tsunami but was later cancelled.
ref: 地震发生几分钟后，太平洋海啸警报中心发布警报说，苏门答腊海岸可能面临海啸袭击，但是后来撤销了这一警报。

src: Japan's meteorological agency said India's Andaman and Nicobar island chain was also at risk.
ref: 日本气象局说，印度的安达曼和尼科巴岛链也有危险。

src: Indonesia's meteorology and geophysics agency recorded at least two aftershocks about 20 minutes after the first tremors, one measuring 5.5 and the other 5.3 on the Richter scale.
ref: 在初震发生20分钟后，印尼地球物理及气象局记录到至少2次余震。一次为里氏5.5级，另一次为5.3级。

src: Budi Waluyo, an official at the National Meteorology and Geophysics Agency said the quake occurred about 30 kilometres beneath the ground.
ref: 国家地球物理及气象局官员布迪·瓦卢约说，地震发生在地下30公里处。

src: The US Geological Survey measured the quake at 7.6 on the Richter scale.
ref: 根据美国地质调查局的测定，地震为里氏7.6级。

src: "The quake has no tsunami potential because it's happening under the ground, not the sea," Waluyo said.
ref: 瓦卢约说：“这次地震不会导致海啸，因为它发生在地下，而不是在海里”。

src: The South African government has reported that former President Nelson Mandela has been discharged from a hospital in Pretoria, where he was hospitalised December 8.
ref: 据南非政府的报道，前总统纳尔逊·曼德拉已经从比勒陀利亚的一家医院出院。他是于12月8日住进那家医院的。

src: Mandela received hospital treatment for gallstones and a lung infection.
ref: 曼德拉在医院里接受了胆结石和肺部感染治疗。

src: Presidential spokesperson Mac Maharaj said Mandela "will undergo home-based high care at his Houghton home until he recovers fully".
ref: 总统发言人麦克·马哈拉吉说，曼德拉“将在霍顿的家中接受高等级家庭护理，直到他完全康复”。

src: Mandela was hospitalised for eighteen days, his longest hospitalisation since 1990, when he was released from prison after 27 years.
ref: 曼德拉住院18天。自1990年他被监禁27年后获释以来，这是为时最长的一次住院治疗。

src: Current president Jacob Zuma visited Mandela in hospital this past weekend.
ref: 上周末，现任总统雅各布·祖马去医院看望了曼德拉。

src: Zuma visited Mandela again on Christmas, as did Graca Machel, Mandela's wife.
ref: 祖马于圣诞节再次看望曼德拉，曼德拉的夫人格拉卡·马切尔也于同一时间探望了曼德拉。

src: Mandela has been hospitalised three times since the start of last year.
ref: 去年年初以来，曼德拉已经住院三次。

src: In January 2011, Mandela received hospital treatment for an acute respiratory infection.
ref: 2011年1月，曼德拉因急性呼吸道感染而住院治疗。

src: Work at a Robben Island limestone quarry, where he was imprisoned for sixteen years during South Africa's Apartheid, damaged his eyes and lungs.
ref: 在罗本岛石灰石采石场的工作损害了他的眼睛和肺部。在南非种族隔离时期，他在那里被监禁了16年。

src: During the 1980s, while still a prisoner on Robben Island, he developed .
ref: 在上世纪80年代，当时他还是个囚犯，他犯病了。

src: Maharaj, once a political prisoner alongside Mandela during Apartheid, expressed thanks for public and media support and allowing Mandela privacy.
ref: 在种族隔离时期曾与曼德拉一起坐牢的政治犯马哈拉吉对公众和媒体的支持和不打扰曼德拉安静养病的做法表示感谢。

src: On behalf of the government, Maharaj also asked for a "continuation of the privacy in order to allow for the best possible conditions for full recovery".
ref: 马哈拉吉还代表政府要求大家“继续不要去打扰曼德拉，以便提供最好的康复条件”。

src: The aftershock reached a magnitude of 5.9 with the epicenter located nineteen kilometers west of Pichilemu, according to the University of Chile Geological Survey (UCGS).
ref: 根据智利大学地质调查局（UCGS）的信息，余震达到5.9级，震中在披市勒亩披市勒亩西部19公里处。

src: However, the United States Geological Survey (USGS) reported that it reached a magnitude of 5.8; had a depth of 8,5 kilometers; and that the epicenter was located 65 kilometers at the southwest of San Antonio, Valparaíso; 100 kilometers at the west of Rancagua, O'Higgins 105 kilometers at the northwest of Curicó, Maule and; 135 kilometers at the southwest of Santiago, Metropolitan Region.
ref: 然而，据美国地质调查局（USGS）报告，地震为5.8级，深度8.5公里，震中在瓦尔帕莱索市圣安东尼奥西南65公里，奥伊金斯市兰卡瓜以西100公里，马乌来市库利科西北105公里和大都市圈圣地亚哥西南135公里处。

src: United States glam metal band Poison is suing Capitol Records and EMI Music Marketing over an alleged breach of contract.
ref: 美国华丽金属乐队“毒药”指控Capitol唱片公司和EMI音乐营销公司违约。

src: Poison claim the two companies have underpaid them royalties for years.
ref: “毒药”声称，这两家公司多年来一直欠付他们的版税。

src: The band claims Capitol miscategorized various record sales and miscalculated every possible expense since the 1980s.
ref: 该乐队声称，自从1980年代以来，Capitol唱片公司将各种唱片销售进行错误分类，并且错误地计算每一项费用。

src: They say when attempting to check company records they received no co-operation and are now asking a judge to order the firms to reveal their records so the band can determine how much they are owed.
ref: 他们说，当他们试图核查公司的唱片时，对方不予配合，所以现在请求法官命令这两家公司公布其唱片数量，以便乐队了解对方欠付了多少钱。

src: Thai-Japanese Bangkok Youth Center, Bangkok — Wikinews interviewed Georgia Inglis, of the Australia women's national wheelchair basketball team, known as the Gliders.
ref: 曼谷，泰国-日本曼谷青年中心维基新闻采访了乔治亚·英格利斯。她是澳大利亚国家女子轮椅篮球队即“滑翔者队”的成员。

src: The Gliders are in Bangkok, Thailand, for the Asia-Oceania Zone Wheelchair Basketball Championships, which are being held at the Thai-Japanese Bangkok Youth Center.
ref: 滑翔者队前来泰国曼谷的目的，是为了参加在泰国-日本曼谷青年中心举行的亚洲-大洋洲轮椅篮球锦标赛。

src: They are hoping to qualify for the World Championships, which are being held in Toronto, Canada, in June next year.
ref: 她们希望能取够入围明年6月在加拿大多伦多举办的世界锦标赛。

src: Inglis is one of two new players in the team.
ref: 英格利斯是该队2名新队员之一。

src: Wikinews caught up with her before the Gliders' match against China.
ref: 维基新闻赶在滑翔者队与中国队开赛之前对她进行了采访。

src: The United States 2008 federal deficit has reached a record high, US$454.8 billion—more than double last year's deficit.
ref: 美国在2008年的联邦赤字达到了历史最高点——4548亿美元，比去年的赤字增加了一倍多。

src: Financial experts believe that next year, the deficit will reach over $700 billion, while the National Debt Clock has recently run out of digits to record over $10 trillion in national debt.
ref: 财务专家们认为，明年的赤字将超过7000亿，而国家债务钟近期已经爆表，它记录的国债已超过10万亿美元。

src: The deficit is now equivalent to 3.2% of the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the United States, with the government's total income being 17.8% of GDP, and total outlays being equivalent to 21% of GDP.
ref: 这一赤字数额目前已相当于美国国内生产总值（GDP）的百分之3.2。政府总收入为国内生产总值的百分之17.8，而总支出则相当于GDP的百分之21。

src: Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson blamed the deficit on the housing market, related markets, and slow growth.
ref: 财政部长亨利·保尔森将造成赤字的原因归咎于住房市场、相关市场和增长缓慢。

src: He said the news would "reinforce the need to not only address short-term challenges, but pursue policies that promote economic growth and fiscal responsibility, and address entitlement reform".
ref: 他说，这一消息将“迫使我们不仅需要应对短期挑战，而且也需要奉行促进经济增长和财政责任的政策，还要进行福利改革”。

src: Democrats like Senator Kent Conrad, however, placed the blame on "President Bush's failed policies".
ref: 然而，民主党人，比如肯特·康拉德参议员，则将问题归咎于“布什总统的失败政策”。

src: "The reality is that the next president will be inheriting a fiscal and economic mess of historic proportions," said Conrad, adding that "it will take years to dig our way out".
ref: 康拉德说：“现实的情况是，下一任总统将接手历史上最大的财政与经济混乱局面”。他还说：“将需要数年的时间才能摆脱困境”。

src: Another Democrat, House Budget Committee Chairman John Spratt, also blamed the Bush administration.
ref: 另一位民主党人众院预算委员会主席约翰·斯普拉特也将问题归咎于布什政府。

src: "The eight years of this administration will include the five biggest budget deficits in history," he said.
ref: 他说：“在这届政府的8年执政期间，将囊括历史上5次最大的预算赤字”。

src: "The resulting debt will be passed to our children and grandchildren."
ref: “所产生的债务将遗留给我们的子孙后代”。

src: Jim Nussle, director of the Office of Management and Budget said that he believes that the deficit will start to decline.
ref: 管理与预算办公室主任吉姆·纳斯勒认为，赤字将开始下降。

src: "The bipartisan stimulus bill and the slow economy are the primary reasons for the increase in deficit as reflected in this year's budget results."
ref: “两党刺激法案和经济发展缓慢是赤字增多的主要原因，这一点可以从今年的预算结果反应出来”。

src: "This increase reinforces the need to adopt and maintain policies that promote economic growth and fiscal responsibility, including entitlement reform and pro-growth tax policies."
ref: “赤字的增多迫使我们需要采纳并维护促进经济增长和财政责任的政策，包括福利改革和有利于增长的税收政策”。

src: "I am confident the economy can return to stronger growth with a declining deficit—after working through current challenges if Congress limits wasteful and excessive spending."
ref: “我有信心，如果国会限制浪费和过度的支出，那么在克服了当前的困难以后，经济会恢复强劲的增长势头，赤字也会下降”。

src: ETA (Euskadi Ta Askatasuna), a separatist group based out of the Basque region of northern Spain, announced in a recorded and written message that it would end its armed campaign for independence, instead focusing on political means for achieving its goals.
ref: 埃塔（巴斯克祖国与自由组织），这个以西班牙北部巴斯克地区为基地的分裂组织在一份录音的书面文告中宣布，它将结束其争取独立的武装斗争，改为主要通过政治手段来实现其目标。

src: In the video sent to the BBC, ETA stated that, while the autonomy framework enshrined in the Spanish constitution is "not the way to satisfy the wishes of the Basque people", the organisation was committed to finding a democratic solution to the conflict.
ref: 在送交BBC的视频中，埃塔声明，既然西班牙宪法中规定的自治框架“不能满足巴斯克人民的愿望”，那么该组织将致力于寻找一个民主方案来解决冲突。

src: Several analysts have suggested that this most recent ceasefire is based on ETA's tactics causing their support in the Basque region to plummet.
ref: 多名分析家表示，最近的停火决定是埃塔的一种策略，但是它导致该组织在巴斯克地区的支持率直线下降。

src: Author Paddy Woodworth found in a recent trip to the region that the group's actions had made former supporters of the movement believe ETA was politically finished.
ref: 作家派迪·伍德沃斯在最近去该地区的采访之行中发现，该组织的行为已经让过去的支持者们感到它在政治上已经完蛋了。

src: The BBC's Sarah Rainsford said that ETA is at the weakest point in its 51-year history and that the ceasefire may just be a ploy to disguise that weakness.
ref: BBC记者萨拉·雷恩斯福德说，埃塔正处于其51年历史上的最低点，而停火决定可能只是掩盖其弱点的一个策略。

src: The group, which is listed as a terrorist organization by the European Union and the United States, have declared ceasefires several times before, which have all ended in a resumption of violence.
ref: 这个组织已被欧盟和美国列为恐怖组织。虽然它此前亦曾多次宣布停火，但是最后均无一例外地又恢复了暴力行动。

src: The most recent ceasefire, in 2006, led to peace talks between the group and the Spanish government, but they were interrupted by a car-bombing at Madrid's Barajas Airport.
ref: 最近一次停火是在2006年，之后该组织与西班牙政府进行了多次谈判。谈判因马德里巴拉哈斯机场的汽车爆炸事件而被终结。

src: The bombing was frowned upon by all involved in the peace process, including other Basque separatist parties in the region.
ref: 所有参与和平进程的人们都对那场爆炸表示不满，其中也包括该地区的其他巴斯克分裂主义组织。

src: Australia will press on with plans to withdraw its troops from Iraq in June this year, although promises were made by the nation's foreign minister that relations with the United States will not be affected by the move.
ref: 澳大利亚将继续实施今年6月从伊拉克撤军的计划，虽然该国外交部长承诺这一举动不会影响与美国的关系。

src: Foreign minister Stephen Smith said that the withdrawal will be conducted in an orderly fashion to minimise inconvenience to other nations in Iraq.
ref: 外交部长斯蒂芬·史密斯说，撤军将以井然有序的方式展开，以尽量减少为驻伊拉克的其他国家带来不便。

src: Speaking in New York as part of his first US visit since the election he said "We want to do that in a way which sees minimal disruption, which causes the least inconvenience to our allies there, both the United States and the United Kingdom."
ref: 作为他在选举后首次访问美国计划的一部分，他在纽约说：“我们打算以一种干扰最小的方式来做这件事，以便尽可能减少为包括美国和英国在内的盟国带来不方便”。

src: On Monday Smith will meet with Condoleezza Rice and others to discuss Afghanistan, where Australia also has troops stationed.
ref: 史密斯将于星期一与康多莉扎·赖斯和其他官员一起讨论阿富汗问题。澳大利亚在那里也有驻军。

src: It is currently the intention for this to remain the case.
ref: 当前的意图是要维持这种状况。

src: Smith said of the effect on relations with the US - which have been strong since World War II - "It's not something which I believe will disturb what to date has been a very good working relationship between the new government and the (U.S.) administration."
ref: 史密斯谈到二战以来与美国的紧密关系及其影响：“我相信，在新政府与（美国）政府之间，这件事不会干扰迄今为止非常良好的工作关系”。

src: "It's a very strong alliance - an alliance which transcends changes in governments."
ref: “这是一个非常强大的联盟，一个超越政府更迭的联盟”。

src: "Administrations come and go, governments come and go, but the alliance is a long-term, enduring fundamental relationship between our two nations."
ref: “行政部门在不断变更，政府在不断变更，但是我们两国之间的联盟是一种长期，持久的根本关系”。

src: The confirmation is important as Australia saw a new government elected in November.
ref: 这是一个重要的承诺，因为澳大利亚已于11月选出了新政府。

src: Prime Minister Kevin Rudd (Labour) defeated Conservative head and former PM John Howard.
ref: 凯文·拉德（工党）击败了保守党首脑，前总理约翰·霍华德。

src: Howard is a supporter of US President George W. Bush and his government.
ref: 霍华德是美国总统乔治·W·布什及其政府的支持者。

src: Germany beat Argentina 4-2 on penalties to book a place in the Fifa World Cup semi-finals in Berlin, Friday.
ref: 今天星期五，德国队在点球大战中以4-2击败阿根廷，跻身柏林世界杯半决赛。

src: The match had drawn 1-1 without many clear chances for either side due to defensive play on both sides.
ref: 由于双方均采取了防守打法，两个队都没有很多机会，最后打成1-1平。

src: First it was Germany who were unable to be positive as Argentina dominated play with 65 per cent of ball possession.
ref: 起初，德国无法采取主动，因为阿根廷掌握了百分之65的控球权。

src: Four minutes after half-time Roberto Ayala got across Miroslav Klose to meet Juan Riquelme's corner which he powered between Jens Lehmann and his near post guard, Philipp Lahm.
ref: 下半场开场4分钟时，罗伯托·阿亚拉越过米罗斯拉夫·克洛泽，接到胡安·里克尔梅发出的角球，在延斯·莱曼和门柱前的后卫菲利普·拉姆的夹击下强力攻门。

src: The goal early in the second period made for a more exciting match which had been mostly uneventful in a first half during which neither side could muster more than a single shot.
ref: 上半场双方各自射门不超过一次，因而显得波澜不惊，而下半场的迅速进球则为比赛增加了火药味。

src: Juergen Klinsmann may be credited with a substitution change that partially helped Germany get an equalising goal.
ref: 朱尔根·克林斯曼的换人起到了作用，它部分地帮助德国队追平了比分。

src: The fast David Odonkor troubled Juan Sorin and the Argentine left flank and allowed Germany to press forward nearer to the opposition penalty area.
ref: 快马大卫·奥东科尔给胡安·索林和阿根廷队的左翼制造了麻烦，使得德国队快速推进到对方的罚球区附近。

src: Argentine manager may also have made a tactical mistake and suffered form a moment of bad fortune.
ref: 阿根廷教练可能也犯了一个战术错误，此外也遇到了厄运。

src: In the minutes before Germany equalised from Ballack's wonderful left field cross his goalkeeper had to be stretchered off with a muscle injury.
ref: 他的门将因肌肉拉伤被担架抬出场地。几分钟后，巴拉克通过绝妙的左场过人为德国队追平了比分。

src: Jose Pekerman followed his keeper's substitutions with two defensive ones; taking off creative midfield playmaker Riquelme and forward Hernan Crespo.
ref: 何塞·佩克尔曼在替换了守门员以后，又用2名防守球员换掉了中场核心胡安·里克尔梅和前锋埃尔南·克雷斯波。

src: The gifts of Lionel Messi and Javier Saviola were left on the bench while Julio Cruz, a long ball-holding forward, was brought on to partner Carlos Tevez.
ref: 天才球员里奥·梅西和哈维尔·萨维奥拉依旧坐在板凳上，而将控球前锋朱利奥·克鲁斯换上场与卡洛斯·特维斯配合。

src: The bad luck and changes seemed to put Germany in charge of the tactical game for the first time in the match.
ref: 坏运气和一连串换人的结果，导致德国队首次在场上占据了战术优势。

src: A minute after Cruz arrived Pekerman might have regretted his decision.
ref: 克鲁斯上场一分钟以后，佩克尔曼似乎就对自己的决策后悔了。

src: Klose's fifth World Cup goal ten minutes from time put him at the top of the Fifa Golden Boot leader board as the tournament's highest goalscorer.
ref: 十分钟后，克洛泽攻进了他在世界杯上的第5枚入球，以本届锦标赛最高得分手的身份荣登国际足联金靴榜的榜首。

src: He beat his marker to dip and head beyond Leonardo Franco after Tim Borowski, a substitution on 74 minutes, had flicked on a Ballack cross.
ref: 在第74分钟替换上场的提姆·博洛夫斯基协助巴拉克过人后，克洛泽摆脱了对手的盯防，越过莱昂纳多·弗朗戈射门。

src: The game finished 1-1 and the two halves of extra time mirrored the match; first half uneventful, the second half more attacking.
ref: 比赛以1-1结束。加时赛再现了这样的局面：上半场波澜不惊，下半场攻势不断。

src: Fabricio Coloccini came closest to breaking the deadlock when he hit the crossbar from 45 yards trying to catch Lehmann off his goal line.
ref: 法布里西奥·科洛奇尼试图将莱曼诱离门线，在距球门45码处击中横梁。这是最接近打破僵局的一记射门。

src: Neither Germany or Argentina had lost in a World Cup penalty contest; both sides had won three.
ref: 德国队和阿根廷队在世界杯点球大战中都从来没有输过，双方各赢过3次。

src: All the penalties hit the target and were well struck, except Ayala's who hit a soft effort which Lehmann saved to his left.
ref: 所有的点球都漂亮地命中球门，只有阿拉亚的射门偏软，被莱曼从左侧扑住。

src: Cambiasso's effort to Lehmann's left was better struck but the keeper had guessed the right side to dive to break Argentine hearts.
ref: 坎比亚索的左侧射门踢得更漂亮，但是门将已猜破了意图，用一个鱼跃扑球刺痛了阿根廷的心脏。

src: FIFA launched an investigation into an on-field melee which began after the penalties had been decided in Germany's favour.
ref: 在判定德国点球获胜后，场上发生了冲突，导致国际足联介入调查。

src: Unused Argentine substitute Leandro Cufre assaulted German Per Mertesacker and was presented the red card by Lubos Michel.
ref: 阿根廷未上场的替补莱昂德罗·库弗雷袭击了德国队球员佩尔·默特萨克，结果被卢博斯·米海尔出示红牌。

src: According to the German captain Michael Ballack the conflict originated when Argentine players shouted at the German team during the shootout.
ref: 根据德国队长迈克尔·巴拉克的说法，冲突的起因是，在射点球的过程中，阿根廷球员对德国队大喊大叫。

src: When Tim Borowski got Germany's fourth penalty he made a sign to the Argentine players to be quiet.
ref: 当提姆·博洛夫斯基罚中德国队的第4枚点球后，他打手势让阿根廷球员保持安静。

src: After the penalty kicks Argentine players approached Borowski and a scuffle of mostly pushing began that involved dozens of players, referees, coaches and substitutes.
ref: 点球大战结束后，阿根廷球员逼近博洛夫斯基开始推搡和扭打，有十几位球员、裁判、教练和替补队员参与了混战。

src: FIFA said television pictures would be looked at and fines or sanctions would be considered if appropriate.
ref: 国际足联说，将查看电视画面，并视情给与罚款或其他处罚。

src: Vladimir Putin has relieved from power Admiral Vladimir Kuroyedov, the head of the Russian navy.
ref: 弗拉基米尔·普京解除了俄罗斯海军司令弗拉基米尔·库罗耶多夫的职务。

src: This comes a month after an incident where 7 Russian sailors became trapped in a submarine, and had to be rescued with help from abroad.
ref: 就在一个月前，7名俄罗斯水手被困在一艘潜艇里，不得不在国外的帮助下获救。

src: No reason was given for Kuroyedov's dismissal, although Admiral Eduard Baltin speculated on Moscow Radio that it may be because of the navy chief's poor health.
ref: 虽然爱德华·巴尔廷在莫斯科电台推测，这可能是因为这位海军司令的健康状况不佳，但没人给出解职的理由。

src: Admiral Kuroyedov was in charge of the navy during the Kursk disaster of 2000, in which 118 sailors died when their submarine sank.
ref: 在2000年的库尔斯克灾难发生时，海军上将库洛耶多夫负责管理海军，在那次灾难中，118名水兵在潜艇沉没时丧生。

src: Kuroyedov is being replaced by Vladimir Masorin, who was previously serving as the Chief of staff for the Russian Navy.
ref: 此前曾任俄罗斯海军参谋长的弗拉基米尔·马索林将接替库洛耶多夫。

src: In remarks Putin made about this leadership change and referring to Masorin, he said "The recent exercises, including those I have attended, show that the navy is developing and that is certainly your merit to a large extent."
ref: 普京在谈到这一领导层更迭时说，“最近的演习，包括我参加的那些演习，都表明海军正在发展，这在很大程度上是你的长处。”

src: Putin also added "at the same time, there were difficult events, tragedies, but I would like to underline once again that with all these problems, all these tragedies, the main thing is that the Navy is undergoing a revival."
ref: 普京还补充说，“同时，也有困难的事件，包括悲剧的发生。但我要再次强调，所有这些问题，所有这些悲剧，最主要的是代表海军正在经历复兴。”

src: Masorin added while in a hall at the Admiralty, "One thing is clear — to continue in the condition which we are in and do nothing is simply not possible."
ref: 马索林在海军部的一个大厅里补充道：“有一件事是很清楚的，我们要在我们所处的条件下继续发展下去，什么都不做是不可能的。”

src: "I have been given the task of stopping the navy shaking public opinion."
ref: “我的任务是阻止海军动摇的舆论。”

src: "I am not experiencing euphoria at being appointed head of the navy."
ref: “我不会因为被任命为海军司令而感到兴奋。”

src: A conflict erupted between Greek Orthodox monks and Arab Christians in Jerusalem on Good Friday, as the Arab Christians protested the monks' sale of church land to Jewish residents.
ref: 在耶稣受难日，希腊东正教僧侣和阿拉伯基督徒在耶路撒冷爆发冲突，因为阿拉伯基督徒抗议僧侣将教堂土地出售给犹太居民。

src: Israeli police broke up the protest near the Church of the Holy Sepulchre.
ref: 以色列警方驱散了圣墓教堂附近的抗议活动。

src: Omar Harani, a 25-year-old leading the protesters, told the Telegraph, "We gave the land 2,000 years ago to the Church to look after," and continued, "So it is not their land to sell."
ref: 抗议领导者，25岁的奥马尔·哈拉尼告诉《电讯报》，“我们在2000年前把这块土地交给了教会看管，”他接着说，“所以这不是他们可以出售的土地”。

src: "For hundreds of years we Christians, who used to be 15 per cent of the population, have been persecuted and driven out of the Holy Land and now we are a tiny minority."
ref: “几百年来，我们曾经占人口百分之十五的基督徒受到迫害并被驱逐出圣地，现在我们只占很小的一部分”。

src: "But we will make our voice heard to stop this sale."
ref: “但我们会让人们听到我们的声音，阻止这笔交易”。

src: After having a meeting in Bari, Italy, on the 13th of March, the President of Russia, Vladimir Putin, and the Prime Minister of Italy, Romano Prodi, gave a press-conference, summarizing the results of their conversations.
ref: 3月13日，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京和意大利总理罗马诺·普罗迪在意大利巴里会晤后，举行了记者招待会，总结了会谈结果。

src: The main point the two leaders agreed on was that only diplomatic means should be used in solving such international conflicts as in Afghanistan, Iraq and, especially, Iran with its nuclear program issue.
ref: 两国领导人一致认为，只有通过外交手段才能用来解决阿富汗问题、伊拉克问题、特别是伊朗核问题等国际冲突。

src: Mr. Putin confirmed once again his views on any use of armed forces in resolving such international conflicts.
ref: 普京再次坚定了他对任何使用武力解决此类国际冲突的看法。

src: Mr. Prodi agreed with the Russian President on this point and also stated that such conflicts should be solved using a multi-lateral approach, where several nations would take part in discussions.
ref: 在这一点上，普罗迪先生同意俄罗斯总统的意见，并指出，应采用多边办法解决这种冲突，应该几个国家一起参加讨论。

src: In addition to this the potential of the UN authority should be used, added Mr. Prodi.
ref: 此外，普罗迪补充说，应该利用联合国权力的潜力。

src: The Prime Minister said that Italy is looking forward to a closer cooperation with Russia in the UN Security Council, as well as in the energy sector.
ref: 他说，意大利期待着同俄罗斯在联合国安理会和能源领域进行更密切的合作。

src: All of this could be reached only through thoroughly developed partnership agreements, he added.
ref: 他补充说，只有通过彻底制定伙伴关系协议，才能实现所有这些目标。

src: Rock band Rage Against The Machine have beaten Joe McElderry to become the UK's official Christmas number one, following one of the biggest battles in the history of the UK Singles Chart.
ref: 在进行了英国单曲榜历史上最大的对抗之一后，摇滚乐队暴力反抗机器击败乔·麦克尔德里成为英国官方的圣诞冠军。

src: Their song Killing in the Name pushed the X Factor winner's new single The Climb into second place.
ref: 他们的歌曲《杀戮的名义》将这位X因素获胜者的新单曲《攀登》推到了第二名。

src: A Facebook campaign backing the American band aimed to stop an X Factor winner reaching the Christmas number one spot once again.
ref: 为了阻止一位“X因素”获胜者再次登上圣诞节第一名的位置，脸书上发起了支持这支美国乐队的活动。

src: Artists from the TV talent show, owned by music mogul Simon Cowell, have taken the festive top spot for four years in a row.
ref: 音乐界大亨西蒙·考威尔旗下电视选秀节目的艺术家们，已经连续四年登上了节日的头把交椅。

src: The group attracted over 900,000 members and widespread press attention, after it was started by Jon and Tracy Morter.
ref: 在乔恩和特蕾西·莫特创办该组织后，该组织吸引了逾90万名成员和媒体的广泛关注。

src: "Are you getting fed up about the possibility of ANOTHER X-Factor Christmas No.1? ...us too...so we're going to do something about it!," they said on the group's Facebook page.
ref: 他们在该组织的脸书页面上说：“你是不是厌倦了另一个X因素可能得到圣诞节第一名？…我们也是…所以我们要做点什么！”

src: They decided to back "Killing In The Name", first released in 1992.
ref: 他们决定支持1992年首次发布的《杀戮的名义》。

src: Cowell had previously branded the campaign "cynical", but on Saturday contacted the Morters to congratulate them on making a "very exciting race for the Christmas number one".
ref: 考埃尔此前称这场竞选是“愤世嫉俗的”，但在周六他联系了莫特夫妇，祝贺他们“为争夺圣诞节第一名进行了一场非常令人兴奋的比赛”。

src: The campaign has also raised over £69,000 for homeless charity Shelter.
ref: 这项运动还为无家可归者慈善机构“庇护所”筹集了6.9万英镑。

src: Rage Against The Machine guitarist Tom Morello had backed the campaign on Twitter.
ref: 暴力反抗机器的机械吉他手汤姆·莫雷洛在推特上支持这一活动。

src: He announced that the band would play a free victory gig in the UK if they reached number one.
ref: 他宣布，如果乐队获得第一名，他们将在英国进行一场免费的胜利演出。

src: The result was announced on BBC Radio 1's chart show this evening by Scott Mills.
ref: 今晚，斯科特·米尔斯在英国广播公司第一台的歌曲排行榜节目中宣布了这一结果。

src: McElderry had been due to appear on the show, but did not arrive.
ref: 麦克尔德里本应出现在节目中，但他并没有出现。

src: The latest advertisement for United States Republican presidential candidate John McCain is questioning Democrat Barack Obama's benefit to families.
ref: 美国共和党总统候选人约翰·麦凯恩的最新广告质疑了民主党人巴拉克·奥巴马是否会对美国家庭带来好处。

src: Last week the BBC reported that the McCain campaign had released an advertisement comparing Obama to American celebrities Britney Spears and Paris Hilton, calling him "the biggest celebrity in the world."
ref: 上周，英国广播公司报道称，麦凯恩竞选团队发布了一则广告，将奥巴马与美国名人布兰妮·斯皮尔斯和帕丽斯·希尔顿相提并论，称他是“世界上最大的名人”。

src: McCain's newest advertisement, released early this week, continues along those same lines.
ref: 本周早些时候，麦凯恩发布的最新广告也是沿着同样的思路进行的。

src: "Is the biggest celebrity in the world ready to help your family?" the narrator asks, according to The Boston Globe and a video of the ad displayed on its website.
ref: 据《波士顿环球报》的报道以及网站上播放的这则广告得知，广告中的解说者问，“世界上最大的名人准备好帮助你的家庭了吗？”

src: With images of wind turbines in the background, the narrator says, "Renewable energy to transform our economy, create jobs and energy independence, that's John McCain."
ref: 广告以风力涡轮机的图像为背景，广告中的讲述者说，“可再生能源可以改变我们的经济，创造就业和能源独立，这就是约翰·麦凯恩能为大家带来的好处。”

src: The Boston Globe reports that McCain's latest ad does not acknowledge that Obama's economic policy, especially the proposed rollback of current president George W. Bush's capital gains tax cuts, would largely affect the wealthiest of America, not the middle class.
ref: 据《波士顿环球报》报道，麦凯恩的最新广告并未承认奥巴马的经济政策，特别是关于建议撤销现任总统乔治·布什的资本利得税减税政策，这一建议将在很大程度上影响美国最富有的人群，而不影响中产阶级。

src: Obama, the BBC reports, is quoted as calling McCain "cynical," "desperate" and "in the pocket of Big Oil."
ref: 奥巴马形容麦凯恩的词被英国广播公司引用、“愤世嫉俗”、“不顾一切”、“在石油大亨口袋里的人”。

src: The latest Obama video, shown on the USA Today website, touts McCain as "just more of the same" politics employed by George W. Bush.
ref: 奥巴马的最新视频在《今日美国》网站上播出，宣称麦凯恩和乔治·布什所采用的政治手段“有很大程度的相似”。

src: The ad cites a May 22, 2003 Fox News Channel interview where McCain says "the President and I agree on most issues."
ref: 这则广告引用了2003年5月22日福克斯新闻频道的一次采访，麦凯恩在采访中说，“乔治总统和我在大多数问题上意见一致。”

src: "There was a recent study that showed I voted with the President over 90 percent of the time."
ref: “最近的一项研究显示，我在百分之90以上的时间里都投了总统的票。”

src: The ad then criticizes McCain's policies on tax cuts, money for oil companies, and "tax breaks for companies that ship jobs overseas."
ref: 这则广告还批评了麦凯恩的减税政策、石油公司的资金政策，以及“对向海外输送工作岗位的公司减免税收”。

src: McCain is set to appear at an Ohio furniture plant Wednesday to reinforce the messages in his latest advertisement.
ref: 周三，麦凯恩将出现在俄亥俄州的一家具厂，以强化宣称他最新广告中的信息。

src: "America has the second highest business tax rate in the entire world," he plans to say, according to prepared remarks issued by his campaign, and released by The Boston Globe.
ref: 根据他的竞选团队发表并由《波士顿环球报》公布的预备性言论显示，他计划说“美国拥有全世界第二高的商业税税率。”

src: "Is it any wonder that jobs are moving overseas when we are taxing them out of the country? "
ref: “当我们在国外对他们征税时，工作正向海外转移，这难道不奇怪吗？”

src: "Unfortunately Senator Obama's plans would raise taxes on businesses even more.”
ref: “不幸的是，奥巴马参议员计划进一步提高对企业的税收。”

src: "He has promised tax increases on income, tax increases on investment, tax increases on small businesses."
ref: “他打算对收入增税，对投资增税，对小企业增税。”

src: "Raising taxes in a bad economy is about the worst thing you could do because it will kill even more jobs when what we need are policies that create jobs."
ref: “在糟糕的经济中增税几乎是你能做的最糟糕的事情，因为我们需要的是创造就业机会的政策时，这将扼杀更多的就业机会。”

src: "Is the biggest proponent of George Bush’s tired, failed policies ready to bring about change? "
ref: “乔治·布什疲惫、失败政策的最大支持者准备好变革了吗？”

src: "Another day brings another dishonest attack from John McCain."
ref: “又一天，约翰·麦凯恩又发起了一次不实的攻击。”

src: "While Senator McCain knows that Senator Obama has proposed cutting taxes for 95% of American families, what he’s not telling us is that he wants to give $4 billion in tax breaks to the oil companies, continue giving tax breaks to corporations that ship our job overseas, and provide no direct tax relief for more than 100 million middle-class families."
ref: “虽然麦凯恩参议员知道奥巴马参议员提议为百分之95的美国家庭减税，但他没有告诉我们的是，他自己想为石油公司提供40亿美元的税收减免，继续为把我们的工作转移到海外的公司提供税收减免，并且没有为1亿多个中产阶级家庭提供直接税收减免。”

src: "It’s time to retire these old policies and bring new energy to America."
ref: “是时候放弃这些旧政策，给美国带来新的活力了。”

src: Iraqi President Jalal Talabani in a press conference to reporters Wednesday was quoted saying: He promises more details in the coming days.
ref: 星期三，伊拉克总统贾拉勒·塔拉巴尼在新闻发布会上对记者说，他承诺在未来几天内将提供更多的细节。

src: The presidential news conference was in response to events unfolding by reports from Shi'ite officials.
ref: 总统新闻发布会是为了回应什叶派官员的报道中披露的事件。

src: They said Saturday that as many as 100 Shi’ites were taken hostage by Sunni fighters, and were threatened with death in the town of al-Madain, near Baghdad.
ref: 周六，他们说，多达100名什叶派被逊尼派武装分子劫持为人质，并在巴格达附近的马丹镇受到死亡威胁。

src: An Iraqi security force on Monday raided the town of about 1,000 families, but found no evidence of a hostage situation.
ref: 周一，一支伊拉克安全部队突袭了该镇约1000户家庭，但没有发现人质被劫持的证据。

src: The Shi’ite officials later said the bodies — believed to be the hostages — were found in the Tigris River.
ref: 什叶派官员后来说，这些据信是人质的尸体，是在底格里斯河发现的。

src: In a separate incident 200km north of Baghdad in Haditha, after hearing shots reporters and residents found the bodies of 19 men executed in a soccer stadium on Wednesday.
ref: 在巴格达以北200公里的哈迪萨发生的另一起事件中，记者和居民在听到枪声后，于周三在一座足球场发现了19具被处决男子的尸体。

src: It is believed those shot were Iraqi soldiers executed by anti-government fighters, according to an Interior Ministry official, although the victims were not dressed in military garb.
ref: 据一名内政部官员说，尽管受害者没有穿军装，但据信这被枪击的人是被反政府战斗人员处决的伊拉克士兵。

src: They were thought to have been heading home for a holiday marking the birthday of the prophet Muhammad when abducted by insurgents.
ref: 当他们被叛乱分子诱骗时，他们以为是回家度假，庆祝先知穆罕默德的生日。

src: A police officer has been killed in County Armagh, Northern Ireland by Continuity IRA gunmen a mere 48 hours after two soldiers were killed.
ref: 一名警察在北爱尔兰的阿玛县被爱尔兰共和军持枪歹徒杀害，仅仅在48小时前，有两名士兵被打死。

src: In what is presumed to be an attempt by dissident Republicans to derail the peace process, Pc Stephen Carroll was shot in the head just before 10:00 p.m. on March 9.
ref: 据推测，持不同政见的共和党人试图破坏和平进程，在3月9日晚上10点前，史蒂芬·卡罗尔警官被击中头部。

src: The officer, described as an experienced veteran with 23 years of service, was responding to a call for help in the Lismore Manor estate in Craigavon when he was shot.
ref: 这名警官被描述为一名有23年丰富经验的老兵，他是在克雷加文的利斯莫尔岛庄园执行求救电话任务时被枪击的。

src: In what is described as a genuine incident, a female member of the public had called for help saying a street gang had broken a window.
ref: 据描述，求救的是一起真正的事件，一名女性公众呼吁帮助说，一个街头帮派打破了一扇窗户。
