src: The Bucharest-London flights will run on Monday, Thursday and Saturday, while the return flights will run on Wednesday, Friday and Sunday.
ref: 布加勒斯特-伦敦的航班将在周一、周四和周六运行，而返回航班将在周三、周五和周日运行。

src: The extra flights will mean that British Airways will now fly from Bucharest to London, and back, ten times a week.
ref: 增加的航班将意味着英国航空公司现在将从布加勒斯特飞往伦敦，然后返回，每周飞10次。

src: Michael Jackson's This Is It, a documentary film based on world-famous singer Michael Jackson rehearsing for his last tour before his untimely death, will be premiered in at least 15 cinemas in cities all over the world simultaneously.
ref: 迈克尔·杰克逊的《就是这样》是一部纪录片，基于世界著名歌手迈克尔·杰克逊去世前为最后一次巡演彩排。这部纪录片将同时在世界各地城市的至少15家影院首映。

src: The film is due to premiere on October 27 and October 28.
ref: 这部电影将于10月27日和28日首映。

src: The world cities may be in different time zones with different dates but they will all be premiering the film at exactly the same time.
ref: 世界各地的城市可能在不同的时区，不同的日期，但它们都将在同一时间首映这部电影。

src: One such premiere location is Los Angeles, in the US state of California, which will have the film starting at 1800 PT.
ref: 其中一个首映地点是美国加利福尼亚州的洛杉矶，这里，该片将于太平洋标准时间1800时开始。

src: Another simultaneity is the Odeon Leicester Square cinema in London, England, which will start at 0100 GMT on October 27.
ref: 另一个同时首映地是英国伦敦的奥迪恩莱斯特广场电影院，将于10月27日格林尼治时间0100时开始。

src: Other locations holding concurrent premieres are the South African city of Johannesburg, New York City in New York, German capital Berlin, Russian capital city Moscow, Japanese capital Tokyo, Australian city Sydney, French capital Paris, South Korean city Seoul, and Rio de Janeiro, a large city in Brazil.
ref: 同时举行首映的还有南非城市约翰内斯堡、纽约州的纽约市、德国首都柏林、俄罗斯首都莫斯科、日本首都东京、澳大利亚城市悉尼、法国首都巴黎、韩国城市首尔和巴西大城市里约热内卢。

src: Michael Jackson died on June 25, 2009 aged 50, after suffering from a cardiac arrest.
ref: 2009年6月25日，迈克尔·杰克逊因心脏骤停去世，享年50岁。

src: The movie will feature some of the rehearsal footage made in the weeks before his death.
ref: 这部电影将以他去世前几周的一些彩排镜头为主要内容。

src: In total, there will be at least 25 cinemas premiering the film, but not all of them will be released simultaneously.
ref: 一共至少有25家影院将首映这部电影，但不会同时公布所有这些影院。

src: Sony Pictures, the film production company, have yet to announce the other cities involved.
ref: 电影制作公司索尼影业尚未宣布其他相关城市。

src: Tickets for the film will be available to purchase from Sunday, September 27.
ref: 电影票将自9月27日星期日起发售。

src: The film is directed by Kenny Ortega, who previously directed all the High School Musical films.
ref: 这部电影由肯尼·奥尔特加执导，他曾执导过《歌舞青春》系列的所有电影。

src: He also directed some significant Michael Jackson events, such as his This Is It concert and Jackson's memorial service.
ref: 他还导演了一些重要的迈克尔·杰克逊的活动，如他的《就是这样》音乐会和杰克逊的追悼会。

src: Jeff Blake, chairman of worldwide marketing and distribution for Sony Pictures, said: "Michael Jackson has an army of fans everywhere around the world... we are giving the audiences an incredible opportunity to join together in celebration of Michael Jackson's incredible career."
ref: 索尼影业全球营销和发行主席杰夫·布莱克表示：“迈克尔·杰克逊在世界各地拥有一支粉丝大军……我们这是给观众一个极好的机会，让他们一起庆祝迈克尔·杰克逊伟大的职业生涯。”

src: A family of four adults and one minor has been reported dead after the house they were inhabiting in the city of Pichilemu, in Chile was allegedly intentionally set on fire on Sunday morning.
ref: 据报道，在所住房屋于周日早上被故意纵火后，智利皮钦勒姆市的一家四名成年人和一名未成年人死亡。

src: "It's a great tragedy for the Pichileminian and couldn't pass unnoticed."
ref: “对于皮钦勒姆人来说，这是一场巨大的悲剧，不容忽视。”

src: The police haven't been able to contact their respective relatives.
ref: 警方一直无法联系到他们各自的亲属。

src: Dozens of people gathered outside the burnt house during Sunday afternoon.
ref: 周日下午，数十人聚集在被烧毁的房子外。

src: It is believed that the fire affected at least five other homes.
ref: 据信，这场火灾至少波及了另外5所住宅。

src: Governor Jon Corzine announced a bill that would provide $270 million to stem cell research.
ref: 州长乔恩·科尔津宣布了一项法案，将提供2.7亿美元用于干细胞研究。

src: He announced, "I don't want New Jersey to join the crowd of stem cell research states, I want New Jersey to lead it."
ref: 他宣布，“我不希望新泽西州加入一群研究干细胞的州，我希望新泽西州来领导它们。”

src: BusinessWeek reports that the announcement came two days after Corzine announced that the state will give out $10 million in research grants next year, including $7 million for stem cell research.
ref: 据《商业周刊》报道，这项法案宣布的两天前，科尔津宣布，该州将在明年拨款1,000万美元用于研究，其中包括用于干细胞研究的700万美元。

src: A 15-year-old boy who allegedly stole a Melbourne, Australia tram and drove for 40 minutes picking up and setting down passengers, may yet be allowed to work as a tram driver, despite his nine charges related to the incident.
ref: 一名15岁的男孩据称偷了澳大利亚墨尔本的一辆有轨电车，并开车40分钟服务乘客上下车。尽管他有9项与这起事件有关的指控，但他仍可能被允许从事有轨电车司机的工作。

src: "We have a very good recruiting policy and anybody who passes the muster for our recruiting policy we'd be glad to offer a job to, provided he's old enough to hold a driver's license," Yarra Trams Deputy Chief Executive, Dennis Cliche, told Australian Associated Press on Monday.
ref: 周一，雅拉电车执行副总裁丹尼斯·克莱切告诉澳大利亚美联社：“我们有非常好的招聘政策，对于符合我们招聘政策的任何人，我们都很乐意为他提供一份工作，只要他到了可持有驾照的年龄。”

src: Detective Senior Constable Barry Hills of Victoria Police, said of the boy, "He's a nice lad, he's a good lad."
ref: 维多利亚警察局的侦探高级警员巴里·希尔斯谈到这个男孩时说：“他是个讨人喜欢的孩子，是个好孩子。”

src: "I think his obsession just got the better of him."
ref: “我想他是因为抵受不住自己的痴迷。”

src: Described as wearing a jacket similar to official Yarra Trams uniforms, the boy was caught on Sunday night by police in east suburban Kew, 15km from where the tram was stolen, when electricity was shut off to the route.
ref: 据描述，这名男孩穿着一件与雅拉电车制服相似的夹克。周日晚上，这名男孩在距电车被盗地点15公里的克佑市东郊被警察抓获，当时这条路线的电力被切断。

src: He is also accused of stealing a tram on Friday night, from South Melbourne depot.
ref: 他还被指控在周五晚上从南墨尔本火车站偷了一辆有轨电车。
